obj.item.abductor.alien_omnitool.desc: Effectively just a Space Swiss Army Knife. Contains a multitude of integrated tools. Right-click it to switch which toolset is active.

obj.item.abductor.silencer.desc: A compact device used to shut down communications equipment.

obj.item.ammo_box.advanced.s12gauge.desc: A box of 7 slug shells. Large, singular shots that pack a punch.
obj.item.ammo_box.advanced.s12gauge.name: Slug ammo box

obj.item.ammo_box.advanced.s12gauge.bean.desc: A box of 7 beanbag slug shells. These are large, singular beanbags that pack a less-lethal punch.
obj.item.ammo_box.advanced.s12gauge.bean.name: Beanbag Slug ammo box

obj.item.ammo_box.advanced.s12gauge.brea.desc: A box of 7 Breaching slug. It's able to punches through- quite literally anything with ease.
obj.item.ammo_box.advanced.s12gauge.brea.name: Breaching Slug ammo box

obj.item.ammo_box.advanced.s12gauge.buck.desc: A box of 7 buckshot shells. These have a modest spread of weaker projectiles.
obj.item.ammo_box.advanced.s12gauge.buck.name: Buckshot ammo box

obj.item.ammo_box.advanced.s12gauge.buck.desc: A box of 7 buckshot shells. These have a modest spread of weaker projectiles.
obj.item.ammo_box.advanced.s12gauge.buck.name: Buckshot ammo box

obj.item.ammo_box.advanced.s12gauge.drag.name: Dragon's breath ammo box

obj.item.ammo_box.advanced.s12gauge.flec.desc: A box of 7 flechette shells. Each shell contains a small group of tumbling blades that excel at armor penetration.
obj.item.ammo_box.advanced.s12gauge.flec.name: Flechette ammo box

obj.item.ammo_box.advanced.s12gauge.fran.desc: A box of 7 Frangible slug. It's able to punches through windows, airlocks whatever with ease. Less-than-effective against people
obj.item.ammo_box.advanced.s12gauge.fran.name: Frangible Slug ammo box

obj.item.ammo_box.advanced.s12gauge.honk.desc: A box of 7 honkshot shotgun shells. These are filled with confetti and sure to make any party go out with a bang!
obj.item.ammo_box.advanced.s12gauge.honk.name: Confetti Honkshot ammo box

obj.item.ammo_box.advanced.s12gauge.hunt.desc: A box of 7 hunter slug shells. These shotgun slugs excel at damaging the local fauna.
obj.item.ammo_box.advanced.s12gauge.hunt.name: Hunter slug ammo box

obj.item.ammo_box.advanced.s12gauge.ince.desc: A box of 7 incendiary slug shells. These will ignite targets and leave a trail of fire behind them.
obj.item.ammo_box.advanced.s12gauge.ince.name: Incendiary Slug ammo box

obj.item.ammo_box.advanced.s12gauge.lase.desc: A box of 7 laser shells. Fires highly lethal laser shell.
obj.item.ammo_box.advanced.s12gauge.lase.name: Scatterlaser ammo box

obj.item.ammo_box.advanced.s12gauge.puls.desc: A box of 7 Pulse slug. It's able to punches through structures and anything behind it.
obj.item.ammo_box.advanced.s12gauge.puls.name: Pulse Slug ammo box

obj.item.ammo_box.advanced.s12gauge.rubb.desc: A box of 7 rubbershot shells. These have a modest spread of weaker, less-lethal projectiles.
obj.item.ammo_box.advanced.s12gauge.rubb.name: Rubbershot ammo box

obj.item.ammo_box.speedloader.strilka310.desc: A stripper clip that's just as brass as the rounds it holds.
obj.item.ammo_box.speedloader.strilka310.name: stripper clip (.310 brass)

obj.item.ammo_casing.a223.ap.desc:
A .277 armor-piercing bullet casing.

ARMOR PIERCING: Increased armor piercing capabilities. What did you expect?
obj.item.ammo_casing.a223.ap.name: .277 Aestus armor-piercing bullet casing

obj.item.ammo_casing.a357.desc:
A .357 bullet casing.

HAND CANNON: Fired out of a handgun, deals disproportionately large damage.
obj.item.ammo_casing.a357.name: .357 bullet casing

obj.item.ammo_casing.a357.heartseeker.desc:
A .357 heartseeker bullet casing.

HEARTSEEKER: Has homing capabilities, methodology unknown.
obj.item.ammo_casing.a357.heartseeker.name: .357 bullet casing

obj.item.ammo_casing.a357.match.desc:
A .357 bullet casing, manufactured to exceedingly high standards.

MATCH: Ricochets everywhere. Like crazy.
obj.item.ammo_casing.a357.match.name: .357 bullet casing

obj.item.ammo_casing.a357.phasic.desc:
A .357 phasic bullet casing.

PHASIC: Ignores all surfaces except organic matter.
obj.item.ammo_casing.a357.phasic.name: .357 bullet casing

obj.item.ammo_casing.a40mm.desc: A cased high explosive grenade that can only be activated once fired out of a ballistic grenade launcher.
obj.item.ammo_casing.a40mm.name: 40mm HE shell

obj.item.ammo_casing.a40mm.flak.desc: An oversized shotgun case. The big brother of buckshot, this shell launches dense titanium shells for immense damage to armor and flesh alike.
obj.item.ammo_casing.a40mm.flak.name: 40mm titanium flak shell

obj.item.ammo_casing.a40mm.incendiary.desc: A cased incendiary explosive grenade that can only be activated once fired out of a ballistic grenade launcher. Creates a mighty conflagration. A favourite of inquisitors.
obj.item.ammo_casing.a40mm.incendiary.name: 40mm incendiary shell

obj.item.ammo_casing.a40mm.rubber.desc: A cased rubber puck. The big brother of the beanbag slug. Made for stopping someone dead in their tracks.
obj.item.ammo_casing.a40mm.rubber.name: 40mm rubber shell

obj.item.ammo_casing.a40mm.tear_gas.desc: A cased tear gas grenade that can only be activated once fired out of a ballistic grenade launcher. Spreads a large amount of tear gas into the air upon impact. 		Great for suppressing riots, protests and birthday parties!
obj.item.ammo_casing.a40mm.tear_gas.name: 40mm tear gas shell

obj.item.ammo_casing.arrow.ash.desc: An arrow made from ash and iron. They're cheap, but they fell the beasts of lavaland like none other.
obj.item.ammo_casing.arrow.ash.name: ashen arrow

obj.item.ammo_casing.arrow.ashen.desc: An arrow made from watcher sinew and bone. Seems unusually lethal against the creatures it is made from.
obj.item.ammo_casing.arrow.ashen.name: ashen arrow

obj.item.ammo_casing.arrow.blunt.desc: An arrow with its head reduced to a blunt tip. Suitable for breaking bones and subduing targets without excessive physical damage. Staggers targets on impact.
obj.item.ammo_casing.arrow.blunt.name: blunt arrow

obj.item.ammo_casing.arrow.bone.desc: An arrow made of bone and sinew. The tip is sharp and jagged, suitable for digging into flesh.
obj.item.ammo_casing.arrow.bone.name: bone arrow

obj.item.ammo_casing.arrow.bronze.desc: An arrow tipped with bronze. Fit for killing gods.
obj.item.ammo_casing.arrow.bronze.name: bronze arrow

obj.item.ammo_casing.arrow.clockbolt.desc: An arrow made from a strange energy.
obj.item.ammo_casing.arrow.clockbolt.name: energy bolt

obj.item.ammo_casing.arrow.holy.desc: A holy diver seeking its target.
obj.item.ammo_casing.arrow.holy.name: holy arrow

obj.item.ammo_casing.arrow.holy.blazing.desc: A holy diver seeking its target, blessed with fire. Will ignite on hit, destroying the arrow. But if you hit an already ignited target...?
obj.item.ammo_casing.arrow.holy.blazing.name: blazing star arrow

obj.item.ammo_casing.arrow.plastic.desc: The earliest mining teams within the Spinward Sector were the somewhat stout ancestors of the modern settlers. These teams 		found themselves often unable to access the quality materials they were digging up for equipment maintenance, all being sent off-site. 		Left with few options, and in need of a way to protect themselves in the hostile work environments of the Spinward, they turned 		to the one material they had in abundance.
obj.item.ammo_casing.arrow.plastic.name: plastic arrow

obj.item.ammo_casing.arrow.sticky.desc: A sticky arrow. Not sharp-ended, but ripping it off yourself once hit would be rather difficult and painful.
obj.item.ammo_casing.arrow.sticky.name: sticky arrow

obj.item.ammo_casing.arrow.taser.desc:
An arrow, the head removed, replaced with an igniter, and hooked up to a power cell. Negligible damage, but capable of delivering a terrible electric shock.
	Likely to break apart on impact. Ineffective against those insulated against electricity.
obj.item.ammo_casing.arrow.taser.name: taser arrow

obj.item.ammo_casing.c160smart.desc: A .160 smart bullet with a small charge of booster propellant at the bottom.
obj.item.ammo_casing.c160smart.name: .160 smart bullet casing

obj.item.ammo_casing.c27_54cesarzowa.desc: A purple-bodied caseless cartridge home to a small projectile with a fine point.
obj.item.ammo_casing.c27_54cesarzowa.name: .27-54 Cesarzowa piercing bullet casing

obj.item.ammo_casing.c300.desc: A .300 caseless round for proprietary Nanotrasen firearms.
obj.item.ammo_casing.c300.name: .300 caseless round

obj.item.ammo_casing.c357.match.desc: A .357 bullet casing, manufactured to exceedingly high standards.
obj.item.ammo_casing.c357.match.name: .357 match bullet casing

obj.item.ammo_casing.c35sol.desc: A TerraGov standard caseless lethal pistol round.
obj.item.ammo_casing.c35sol.name: .35 Sol Short lethal bullet casing

obj.item.ammo_casing.c35sol.incapacitato.desc: A TerraGov standard caseless less-lethal pistol round. Exhausts targets on hit, has a tendency to bounce off walls at shallow angles.
obj.item.ammo_casing.c35sol.incapacitato.name: .35 Sol Short incapacitator bullet casing

obj.item.ammo_casing.c35sol.ripper.desc: A TerraGov standard caseless ripper pistol round. Causes slashing wounds on targets, but is weak to armor.
obj.item.ammo_casing.c35sol.ripper.name: .35 Sol Short ripper bullet casing

obj.item.ammo_casing.c38.holy.desc: A lucky .38 bullet casing. You feel lucky just holding it.
obj.item.ammo_casing.c38.holy.name: lucky .38 bullet casing

obj.item.ammo_casing.c38.match.desc: A .38 bullet casing, manufactured to exceedingly high standards.
obj.item.ammo_casing.c38.match.name: .38 Match bullet casing

obj.item.ammo_casing.c38.match.bouncy.desc: A .38 rubber bullet casing, manufactured to exceedingly bouncy standards.
obj.item.ammo_casing.c38.match.bouncy.name: .38 Rubber bullet casing

obj.item.ammo_casing.c40sol.desc: A TerraGov standard caseless lethal rifle round.
obj.item.ammo_casing.c40sol.name: .40 Sol Long lethal bullet casing

obj.item.ammo_casing.c40sol.fragmentatio.desc: A TerraGov standard caseless fragmentation rifle round. Shatters upon impact, ejecting sharp shrapnel that can potentially incapacitate targets.
obj.item.ammo_casing.c40sol.fragmentatio.name: .40 Sol Long fragmentation bullet casing

obj.item.ammo_casing.c40sol.incendiary.desc: A TerraGov standard caseless incendiary rifle round. Leaves no flaming trail, only igniting targets on impact.
obj.item.ammo_casing.c40sol.incendiary.name: .40 Sol Long incendiary bullet casing

obj.item.ammo_casing.c40sol.pierce.desc: A TerraGov standard caseless match grade rifle round. Fires at a higher pressure and thus fires slightly faster projectiles. 		Rumors say you can do sick ass wall bounce trick shots with these, though the official suggestion is to just shoot your target and 		not the wall next to them.
obj.item.ammo_casing.c40sol.pierce.name: .40 Sol Long match bullet casing

obj.item.ammo_casing.c585trappiste.desc: A white polymer cased high caliber round commonly used in handguns.
obj.item.ammo_casing.c585trappiste.name: .585 Trappiste lethal bullet casing

obj.item.ammo_casing.c585trappiste.hollo.desc: A white polymer cased high caliber round with a hollowed tip. Designed to cause as much damage on impact to fleshy targets as possible.
obj.item.ammo_casing.c585trappiste.hollo.name: .585 Trappiste hollowhead bullet casing

obj.item.ammo_casing.c585trappiste.incap.desc: A white polymer cased high caliber round with a relatively soft, flat tip. Designed to flatten against targets and usually not penetrate on impact.
obj.item.ammo_casing.c585trappiste.incap.name: .585 Trappiste flathead bullet casing

obj.item.ammo_casing.c980grenade.desc: A large grenade shell that will detonate at a range given to it by the gun that fires it. Practice shells disintegrate into harmless sparks.
obj.item.ammo_casing.c980grenade.name: .980 Tydhouer practice grenade

obj.item.ammo_casing.c980grenade.riot.desc: A large grenade shell that will detonate at a range given to it by the gun that fires it. Bursts into a tear gas cloud.
obj.item.ammo_casing.c980grenade.riot.name: .980 Tydhouer tear gas grenade

obj.item.ammo_casing.c980grenade.shrapne.desc: A large grenade shell that will detonate at a range given to it by the gun that fires it. Explodes into shrapnel on detonation.
obj.item.ammo_casing.c980grenade.shrapne.name: .980 Tydhouer shrapnel grenade

obj.item.ammo_casing.c980grenade.shrapne.desc: A large grenade shell that will detonate at a range given to it by the gun that fires it. Explodes into smoke and flames on detonation.
obj.item.ammo_casing.c980grenade.shrapne.name: .980 Tydhouer phosphor grenade

obj.item.ammo_casing.c980grenade.smoke.desc: A large grenade shell that will detonate at a range given to it by the gun that fires it. Bursts into a laser-weakening smoke cloud.
obj.item.ammo_casing.c980grenade.smoke.name: .980 Tydhouer smoke grenade

obj.item.ammo_casing.canister_shot.desc: A gigantic... well, canister of canister shot. Used for reloading the Canister Gatling Gun.
obj.item.ammo_casing.canister_shot.name: Canister Shot

obj.item.ammo_casing.chemgun.desc: A high-power spring, linked to an energy-based piercing dart synthesiser.
obj.item.ammo_casing.chemgun.name: dart synthesiser

obj.item.ammo_casing.dnainjector.desc: A high-power spring that throws DNA injectors.
obj.item.ammo_casing.dnainjector.name: rigged syringe gun spring

obj.item.ammo_casing.m7mm.match.desc: A 7mm bullet casing manufactured to unfailingly high standards, you could pull off some cool trickshots with this.

obj.item.ammo_casing.p60strela.desc: A massive block of plasma-purple propellant with an equally massive round sticking out the top of it. 		While good at killing a man, you'll find most effective use out of destroying things with it.
obj.item.ammo_casing.p60strela.name: .60 Strela caseless cartridge

obj.item.ammo_casing.rebar.desc: A Sharpened Iron rod. It's Pointy!
obj.item.ammo_casing.rebar.name: Sharpened Iron Rod

obj.item.ammo_casing.rebar.healium.desc: Who needs a syringe gun, anyway?
obj.item.ammo_casing.rebar.healium.name: healium crystal bolt

obj.item.ammo_casing.rebar.hydrogen.desc: An ultra-sharp rod made from pure metallic hydrogen. Armor may as well not exist.
obj.item.ammo_casing.rebar.hydrogen.name: metallic hydrogen bolt

obj.item.ammo_casing.rebar.supermatter.desc: Wait, how is the bow capable of firing this without dusting?
obj.item.ammo_casing.rebar.supermatter.name: supermatter bolt

obj.item.ammo_casing.rebar.syndie.desc: An Iron rod, with notches cut into it. You really don't want this stuck in you.
obj.item.ammo_casing.rebar.syndie.name: Jagged Iron Rod

obj.item.ammo_casing.rebar.zaukerite.desc: A sliver of a zaukerite crystal. Due to its irregular, jagged edges, removal of an embedded zaukerite sliver should only be done by trained surgeons.
obj.item.ammo_casing.rebar.zaukerite.name: zaukerite sliver

obj.item.ammo_casing.rocket.desc: An 84mm High Explosive rocket. Fire at people and pray.
obj.item.ammo_casing.rocket.name: Dardo HE rocket

obj.item.ammo_casing.rocket.heap.desc: An 84mm High Explosive All Purpose rocket. For when you just need something to not exist anymore.
obj.item.ammo_casing.rocket.heap.name: Dardo HE-AP rocket

obj.item.ammo_casing.rocket.reverse.desc: An 84mm High Explosive rocket. Fire at people and pray.
obj.item.ammo_casing.rocket.reverse.name: Dardo HE rocket

obj.item.ammo_casing.rocket.weak.desc: An 84mm High Explosive rocket. This one isn't quite as devastating.
obj.item.ammo_casing.rocket.weak.name: Dardo HE Low-Yield rocket

obj.item.ammo_casing.security.desc: A standard security-issue cartridge. Optimized to avoid long-lasting damage so criminals can be brigged (and billed) after medical care is administered.
obj.item.ammo_casing.security.name: 9x19 security casing

obj.item.ammo_casing.security_missile.desc: An 69mm High Explosive missile with built-in radar technology. Fire at people and forget, because it's honestly best to forget what happened if you accidentally hit a stray assistant with these.
obj.item.ammo_casing.security_missile.name: "VARS" HE missile

obj.item.ammo_casing.shotgun.antitide.desc: A highly experimental shell filled with nanite electrodes that will embed themselves in soft targets. The electrodes are charged from kinetic movement which means moving targets will get punished more. it also cannot be reflected by martial art
obj.item.ammo_casing.shotgun.antitide.name: stardust shell

obj.item.ammo_casing.shotgun.beanbag.desc: A weak beanbag slug for riot control.
obj.item.ammo_casing.shotgun.beanbag.name: beanbag slug

obj.item.ammo_casing.shotgun.beehive.desc: A less-lethal 12 gauge shell that fires four pellets capable of bouncing off nearly any surface and re-aiming themselves toward the nearest target. They will, however, go for any target nearby.
obj.item.ammo_casing.shotgun.beehive.name: hornet shell

obj.item.ammo_casing.shotgun.breacher.desc: A 12 gauge anti-material slug. Great for breaching airlocks and windows, quickly and efficiently.
obj.item.ammo_casing.shotgun.breacher.name: breaching slug

obj.item.ammo_casing.shotgun.buckshot.mi.desc: A 12 gauge buckshot shell, used by various paramilitaries and mercernary forces.
obj.item.ammo_casing.shotgun.buckshot.mi.name: milspec buckshot shell

obj.item.ammo_casing.shotgun.dart.desc: A dart for use in shotguns. Can be injected with up to 15 units of any chemical.
obj.item.ammo_casing.shotgun.dart.name: shotgun dart

obj.item.ammo_casing.shotgun.dart.bioter.desc: An improved shotgun dart filled with deadly toxins. Can be injected with up to 30 units of any chemical.
obj.item.ammo_casing.shotgun.dart.bioter.name: bioterror dart

obj.item.ammo_casing.shotgun.dart.large.desc: A dart for use in shotguns. Can be injected with up to 25 units of any chemical.
obj.item.ammo_casing.shotgun.dart.large.name: XL shotgun dart

obj.item.ammo_casing.shotgun.dragonsbrea.desc: A shotgun shell which fires a spread of incendiary pellets.
obj.item.ammo_casing.shotgun.dragonsbrea.name: dragonsbreath shell

obj.item.ammo_casing.shotgun.executioner.desc: A 12 gauge lead slug purpose built to annihilate flesh on impact.
obj.item.ammo_casing.shotgun.executioner.name: executioner slug

obj.item.ammo_casing.shotgun.flechette.desc: A shotgun casing filled with small metal darts. Pokes many tiny holes into meat and kevlar alike. Useful for turning someones insides 		into outsides.
obj.item.ammo_casing.shotgun.flechette.name: flechette shell

obj.item.ammo_casing.shotgun.flechette.d.desc: Donk Co., looking to create a new and exciting shell to move onto the open market, invented what they call the 'Donk Spike'. 		A flechette not made from standard ferrous metals. But...plastic. It was a financial failure due to a complete lack of 		confidence in the product. Now there are millions of these things in landfills across the sector. This is one such example. 		Looks like a donk-pocket! Tastes like death!
obj.item.ammo_casing.shotgun.flechette.d.name: Donk Co. 'Donk Spike' Shell

obj.item.ammo_casing.shotgun.frag12.desc: A high explosive breaching round for a 12 gauge shotgun.
obj.item.ammo_casing.shotgun.frag12.name: FRAG-12 slug

obj.item.ammo_casing.shotgun.frangible.desc: A weak anti materiel shell intended for dislodging airlock, breaking down barricades and structures. Not effective against people.
obj.item.ammo_casing.shotgun.frangible.name: frangible slug

obj.item.ammo_casing.shotgun.honkshot.desc: A 12 gauge buckshot shell thats been filled to the brim with confetti, yippie!
obj.item.ammo_casing.shotgun.honkshot.name: confetti shell

obj.item.ammo_casing.shotgun.hunter.desc: A 12 gauge slug shell that fires specially designed slugs that deal extra damage to the local planetary fauna
obj.item.ammo_casing.shotgun.hunter.name: hunter slug shell

obj.item.ammo_casing.shotgun.incapacitat.desc: A shotgun casing filled with... something. used to incapacitate targets.
obj.item.ammo_casing.shotgun.incapacitat.name: custom incapacitating shot

obj.item.ammo_casing.shotgun.incendiary..desc: An incendiary-coated shotgun slug, specially treated to only ignite on impact.
obj.item.ammo_casing.shotgun.incendiary..name: precision incendiary slug

obj.item.ammo_casing.shotgun.ion.desc: An advanced shotgun shell which uses a subspace ansible crystal to produce an effect similar to a standard ion rifle. 	The unique properties of the crystal split the pulse into a spread of individually weaker bolts.
obj.item.ammo_casing.shotgun.ion.name: ion shell

obj.item.ammo_casing.shotgun.meteorslug.desc: A shotgun shell rigged with CMC technology, which launches a massive slug when fired.
obj.item.ammo_casing.shotgun.meteorslug.name: meteorslug shell

obj.item.ammo_casing.shotgun.pulseslug.desc: A delicate device which can be loaded into a shotgun. The primer acts as a button which triggers the gain medium and fires a powerful 	energy blast. While the heat and power drain limit it to one use, it can still allow an operator to engage targets that ballistic ammunition 	would have difficulty with.
obj.item.ammo_casing.shotgun.pulseslug.name: pulse slug

obj.item.ammo_casing.shotgun.pulverizer.desc: A 12 gauge lead slug purpose built to annihilate bones on impact.
obj.item.ammo_casing.shotgun.pulverizer.name: pulverizer slug

obj.item.ammo_casing.shotgun.rubbershot.desc: A shotgun casing filled with densely-packed rubber balls, used to incapacitate crowds from a distance.
obj.item.ammo_casing.shotgun.rubbershot.name: rubber shot

obj.item.ammo_casing.shotgun.scatterlase.desc: An advanced shotgun shell that uses a micro laser to replicate the effects of a scatter laser weapon in a ballistic package.
obj.item.ammo_casing.shotgun.scatterlase.name: scatter laser shell

obj.item.ammo_casing.shotgun.techshell.desc: A high-tech shotgun shell which can be loaded with materials to produce unique effects.
obj.item.ammo_casing.shotgun.techshell.name: unloaded technological shell

obj.item.ammo_casing.strilka310.desc: A .310 Strilka bullet casing. Casing is a bit of a fib; there is no case, it's just a block of red powder.
obj.item.ammo_casing.strilka310.name: .310 Strilka bullet casing

obj.item.ammo_casing.strilka310.ap.desc:
A .310 armor-piercing bullet casing. Note, does not actually contain a casing.

ARMOR-PIERCING: Improved armor-piercing capabilities, in return for less outright damage.
obj.item.ammo_casing.strilka310.ap.name: .310 Strilka armor-piercing bullet casing

obj.item.ammo_casing.strilka310.enchante.desc: A .310 Strilka bullet casing. Casing is a bit of a fib; there is no case, it's just a block of red powder.
obj.item.ammo_casing.strilka310.enchante.name: enchanted rifle round

obj.item.ammo_casing.strilka310.lionhunt.desc: A .310 Strilka bullet casing. Casing is a bit of a fib; there is no case, it's just a block of red powder.
obj.item.ammo_casing.strilka310.lionhunt.name: hunter's rifle round

obj.item.ammo_casing.strilka310.lionhunt.desc: A .310 Strilka bullet casing. Casing is a bit of a fib; there is no case, it's just a block of red powder.
obj.item.ammo_casing.strilka310.lionhunt.name: brass rifle round

obj.item.ammo_casing.strilka310.surplus.desc: A .310 Strilka bullet casing. Casing is a bit of a fib; there is no case, it's just a block of red powder.
obj.item.ammo_casing.strilka310.surplus.name: .310 Strilka surplus bullet casing

obj.item.ammo_casing.syringegun.desc: A high-power spring that throws syringes.
obj.item.ammo_casing.syringegun.name: syringe gun spring

obj.item.ammo_casing.syringegun.dart.desc: A high-power spring that throws syringes.
obj.item.ammo_casing.syringegun.dart.name: syringe gun spring

obj.item.analyzer.desc: A hand-held environmental scanner which reports current gas levels.
obj.item.analyzer.name: gas analyzer

obj.item.analyzer.drone.desc: A gas analyzer built into your chassis.
obj.item.analyzer.drone.name: digital gas analyzer

obj.item.analyzer.hilbertsanalyzer.desc: A hand-held environmental scanner which reports current gas levels. This one seems custom rigged to additionally be able to analyze some sort of bluespace device.
obj.item.analyzer.hilbertsanalyzer.name: custom rigged analyzer

obj.item.analyzer.ranged.desc: A hand-held long-range environmental scanner which reports current gas levels.
obj.item.analyzer.ranged.name: long-range gas analyzer

obj.item.anointing_oil.desc: And so Helgar Knife-Arm spoke to the Hearth, and decreed that all of the Kin who gave name to beasts would do so with conquest and blood.
obj.item.anointing_oil.name: anointing bloodresin

obj.item.anomaly_neutralizer.desc: A one-use device capable of instantly neutralizing anomalous or otherworldly entities.
obj.item.anomaly_neutralizer.name: anomaly neutralizer

obj.item.anomaly_releaser.desc: Single-use injector that releases and stabilizes anomalies by injecting an unknown substance.
obj.item.anomaly_releaser.name: anomaly releaser

obj.item.antag_granter.changeling.desc: A blue injector filled with some viscous, red substance. It has no markings apart from an orange warning stripe near the large needle.
obj.item.antag_granter.changeling.name: viral injector

obj.item.antag_granter.clock_cultist.desc: A cogwheel-shaped device of brass, with a glass lens floating, suspended in the center.
obj.item.antag_granter.clock_cultist.name: brass contraption

obj.item.antag_granter.heretic.desc: A purple book with a green eye on the cover. You swear it's looking at you....
obj.item.antag_granter.heretic.name: strange book

obj.item.antag_spawner.contract.desc: A magic contract previously signed by an apprentice. In exchange for instruction in the magical arts, they are bound to answer your call for aid.
obj.item.antag_spawner.contract.name: contract

obj.item.antag_spawner.loadout.desc: A single-use beacon designed to quickly launch bad code into the field.
obj.item.antag_spawner.loadout.name: generic beacon

obj.item.antag_spawner.loadout.contracto.desc: A beacon sold to the most prestigeous syndicate members, a single-use radio for calling immediate backup.
obj.item.antag_spawner.loadout.contracto.name: contractor support beacon

obj.item.antag_spawner.loadout.monkey_ma.desc: Call up some backup from ARC for monkey mayhem.
obj.item.antag_spawner.loadout.monkey_ma.name: monkey agent beacon

obj.item.antag_spawner.nuke_ops.desc: A single-use beacon designed to quickly launch reinforcement operatives into the field.
obj.item.antag_spawner.nuke_ops.name: syndicate operative beacon

obj.item.antag_spawner.nuke_ops.borg_tel.desc: A single-use beacon designed to quickly launch reinforcement cyborgs into the field.
obj.item.antag_spawner.nuke_ops.borg_tel.name: syndicate cyborg beacon

obj.item.antag_spawner.nuke_ops.borg_tel.desc: A single-use beacon designed to quickly launch reinforcement cyborgs into the field.
obj.item.antag_spawner.nuke_ops.borg_tel.name: syndicate assault cyborg beacon

obj.item.antag_spawner.nuke_ops.borg_tel.desc: A single-use beacon designed to quickly launch reinforcement cyborgs into the field.
obj.item.antag_spawner.nuke_ops.borg_tel.name: syndicate medical beacon

obj.item.antag_spawner.nuke_ops.borg_tel.desc: A single-use beacon designed to quickly launch reinforcement cyborgs into the field.
obj.item.antag_spawner.nuke_ops.borg_tel.name: syndicate saboteur beacon

obj.item.antag_spawner.nuke_ops.clown.desc: A single-use beacon designed to quickly launch reinforcement clown operatives into the field.
obj.item.antag_spawner.nuke_ops.clown.name: clown operative beacon

obj.item.antag_spawner.nuke_ops.ed209_nu.desc: A single-use beacon designed to quickly launch reinforcement operatives into the field.
obj.item.antag_spawner.nuke_ops.ed209_nu.name: Syndicate ED209 Robot

obj.item.antag_spawner.nuke_ops.overwatc.desc: Assigns an Overwatch Intelligence Agent to your operation. Stationed at their own remote outpost, they can view station cameras, alarms, and even move the Infiltrator shuttle! 		Also, all members of your operation will receive body cameras that they can view your progress from.
obj.item.antag_spawner.nuke_ops.overwatc.name: overwatch support beacon

obj.item.antag_spawner.slaughter_demon.desc: A magically infused bottle of blood, distilled from countless murder victims. Used in unholy rituals to attract horrifying creatures.
obj.item.antag_spawner.slaughter_demon.name: vial of blood

obj.item.antag_spawner.slaughter_demon.l.desc: A magically infused bottle of clown love, distilled from countless hugging attacks. Used in funny rituals to attract adorable creatures.
obj.item.antag_spawner.slaughter_demon.l.name: vial of tickles

obj.item.aquarium_kit.desc: Everything you need to build your own aquarium or fish tank. Raw materials sold separately.
obj.item.aquarium_kit.name: DIY Aquarium Construction Kit

obj.item.aquarium_prop.rocks.desc: A bunch of tiny plastic rocks for decorating an aquarium. Surely you could have just used real pebbles?
obj.item.aquarium_prop.rocks.name: decorative rocks

obj.item.aquarium_prop.sand.desc: A plastic board for lining the bottom of an aquarium. It's got a bumpy patterned surface vaguely reminiscent of yellow sand.
obj.item.aquarium_prop.sand.name: aquarium sand

obj.item.aquarium_prop.seaweed.desc: Little plastic sheets with weighted bottoms, designed to look like underwater foliage. They can be used to spruce up an aquarium.
obj.item.aquarium_prop.seaweed.name: fake seaweed

obj.item.aquarium_prop.seaweed.top.desc: A bunch of artificial plants for an aquarium.
obj.item.aquarium_prop.seaweed.top.name: fake seaweed

obj.item.aquarium_prop.treasure.desc: A very small plastic treaure chest, with nothing inside. You could put this in an aquarium, and it'll look like very small pirates hid treasure in there. Wouldn't that be nice?
obj.item.aquarium_prop.treasure.name: tiny treasure chest

obj.item.aquarium_upgrade.bioelec_gen.desc: All the required components to allow an aquarium to harness energy bioelectric fish.
obj.item.aquarium_upgrade.bioelec_gen.name: aquarium bioelectricity kit

obj.item.aquarium_upgrade.bluespace_tank.desc: The required components to upgrade your portable fish tank into bottomless, handheld aquarium.
obj.item.aquarium_upgrade.bluespace_tank.name: bluespace fish tank kit

obj.item.armament_points_card.desc: A points card that can be used at an Armaments Station or Armaments Dealer.
obj.item.armament_points_card.name: armament points card

obj.item.armament_points_card.assaultops.desc: A points card that can be used at an Armaments Station or Armaments Dealer.
obj.item.armament_points_card.assaultops.name: armament points card

obj.item.armament_points_card.hecu.desc: A points card that can be used at an Armaments Station or Armaments Dealer.
obj.item.armament_points_card.hecu.name: armament points card

obj.item.arrival_announcer.desc: A radio signaller which uses a backdoor in the NT announcement system to trigger a fake announcement that you have just arrived there, then self-destructs.
obj.item.arrival_announcer.name: arrivals announcement signaller

obj.item.ash_seed.tendril.desc: A horrible fleshy mass that pulse with a dark energy.
obj.item.ash_seed.tendril.name: tendril seed

obj.item.ash_seed.vent.desc: A horrible fleshy mass covers a boulder. It seems to slowly pulse, reacting to you near it
obj.item.ash_seed.vent.name: ore seed

obj.item.ash_staff.desc: A gnarly and twisted branch that is imbued with some ancient power.
obj.item.ash_staff.name: staff of the ashlands

obj.item.assault_pod.desc: Used to select a landing zone for assault pods.
obj.item.assault_pod.name: Assault Pod Targeting Device

obj.item.assault_pod.medieval.desc: A map of the station used to select where you want to land your shuttle.
obj.item.assault_pod.medieval.name: Shuttle placement designator

obj.item.assault_pod.mining.desc: Deploy to designate the landing zone of the auxiliary base.
obj.item.assault_pod.mining.name: Landing Field Designator

obj.item.assault_pod.mining.unrestricted.desc: Allows the deployment of the mining base ANYWHERE. Use with caution.
obj.item.assault_pod.mining.unrestricted.name: omni-locational landing field designator

obj.item.assembly.desc: A small electronic device that should never exist.
obj.item.assembly.name: assembly

obj.item.assembly.control.desc: A small electronic device able to control a blast door remotely.
obj.item.assembly.control.name: blast door controller

obj.item.assembly.control.airlock.desc: A small electronic device able to control an airlock remotely.
obj.item.assembly.control.airlock.name: airlock controller

obj.item.assembly.control.camkillswitch.desc: A small electronic device that cuts feed for an entire network.
obj.item.assembly.control.camkillswitch.name: camera network kill switch

obj.item.assembly.control.camkillswitch..desc: A small electronic device that cuts feed for an entire network.
obj.item.assembly.control.camkillswitch..name: persistence interior camera network kill switch

obj.item.assembly.control.camkillswitch..desc: A small electronic device that cuts feed for an entire network.
obj.item.assembly.control.camkillswitch..name: persistence exterior camera network kill switch

obj.item.assembly.control.camkillswitch..desc: A small electronic device that cuts feed for an entire network.
obj.item.assembly.control.camkillswitch..name: persistence xenobiology camera network kill switch

obj.item.assembly.control.crematorium.desc: An evil-looking remote controller for a crematorium.
obj.item.assembly.control.crematorium.name: crematorium controller

obj.item.assembly.control.curtain.desc: A small electronic device able to control a mechanical curtain remotely.
obj.item.assembly.control.curtain.name: curtain controller

obj.item.assembly.control.elevator.desc: A small device used to call elevators to the current floor.
obj.item.assembly.control.elevator.name: elevator controller

obj.item.assembly.control.flasher.desc: A remote controller for a mounted flasher.
obj.item.assembly.control.flasher.name: flasher controller

obj.item.assembly.control.igniter.desc: A remote controller for a mounted igniter.
obj.item.assembly.control.igniter.name: ignition controller

obj.item.assembly.control.massdriver.desc: A small electronic device able to control a mass driver.
obj.item.assembly.control.massdriver.name: mass driver controller

obj.item.assembly.control.photobooth_con.desc: A remote controller for the HoP's photobooth.
obj.item.assembly.control.photobooth_con.name: photobooth controller

obj.item.assembly.control.polarizer.desc: A small electronic device able to control the polarization status of linked windows remotely.
obj.item.assembly.control.polarizer.name: window polarization remote controller

obj.item.assembly.control.showtime.desc: A remote controller for entertainment monitors.
obj.item.assembly.control.showtime.name: showtime controller

obj.item.assembly.control.ticket_machine.desc: A remote controller for the HoP's ticket machine.
obj.item.assembly.control.ticket_machine.name: ticket machine controller

obj.item.assembly.control.transport.desc: A small electronic device able to control a blast door remotely.
obj.item.assembly.control.transport.name: blast door controller

obj.item.assembly.control.transport.call.desc: A small device used to bring trams to you.
obj.item.assembly.control.transport.call.name: tram call button

obj.item.assembly.control.transport.remo.desc: A remote control that can be linked to a tram. This can only go well.
obj.item.assembly.control.transport.remo.name: tram remote

obj.item.assembly.flash.desc: A powerful and versatile flashbulb device, with applications ranging from disorienting attackers to acting as visual receptors in robot production.
obj.item.assembly.flash.name: flash

obj.item.assembly.flash.armimplant.desc: A high-powered photon projector implant normally used for lighting purposes, but also doubles as a flashbulb weapon. Self-repair protocols fix the flashbulb if it ever burns out.
obj.item.assembly.flash.armimplant.name: photon projector

obj.item.assembly.flash.cyborg.desc: A powerful and versatile flashbulb device, with applications ranging from disorienting attackers to acting as visual receptors in robot production.
obj.item.assembly.flash.cyborg.name: flash

obj.item.assembly.flash.handheld.desc: A powerful and versatile flashbulb device, with applications ranging from disorienting attackers to acting as visual receptors in robot production.
obj.item.assembly.flash.handheld.name: flash

obj.item.assembly.flash.hypnotic.desc: A modified flash device, programmed to emit a sequence of subliminal flashes that can send a vulnerable target into a hypnotic trance.
obj.item.assembly.flash.hypnotic.name: flash

obj.item.assembly.flash.memorizer.desc: If you see this, you're not likely to remember it any time soon.
obj.item.assembly.flash.memorizer.name: memorizer

obj.item.assembly.health.desc: Used for scanning and monitoring health.
obj.item.assembly.health.name: health sensor

obj.item.assembly.igniter.desc: A small electronic device able to ignite combustible substances.
obj.item.assembly.igniter.name: igniter

obj.item.assembly.igniter.condenser.desc: A small electronic device able to chill their surroundings.
obj.item.assembly.igniter.condenser.name: condenser

obj.item.assembly.infra.desc: Emits a visible or invisible beam and is triggered when the beam is interrupted.
obj.item.assembly.infra.name: infrared emitter

obj.item.assembly.mousetrap.desc: A handy little spring-loaded trap for catching pesty rodents.
obj.item.assembly.mousetrap.name: mousetrap

obj.item.assembly.mousetrap.armed.desc: A handy little spring-loaded trap for catching pesty rodents.
obj.item.assembly.mousetrap.armed.name: mousetrap

obj.item.assembly.prox_sensor.desc: Used for scanning and alerting when someone enters a certain proximity.
obj.item.assembly.prox_sensor.name: proximity sensor

obj.item.assembly.shock_kit.desc: This appears to be made from both an electropack and a helmet.
obj.item.assembly.shock_kit.name: electrohelmet assembly

obj.item.assembly.signaler.desc: Used to remotely activate devices. Allows for syncing when using a secure signaler on another.
obj.item.assembly.signaler.name: remote signaling device

obj.item.assembly.signaler.anomaly.desc: The neutralized core of an anomaly. It'd probably be valuable for research.
obj.item.assembly.signaler.anomaly.name: anomaly core

obj.item.assembly.signaler.anomaly.biosc.desc: The neutralized core of a bioscrambler anomaly. It's squirming, as if moving. It'd probably be valuable for research.
obj.item.assembly.signaler.anomaly.biosc.name: bioscrambler anomaly core

obj.item.assembly.signaler.anomaly.blues.desc: The neutralized core of a bluespace anomaly. It keeps phasing in and out of view. It'd probably be valuable for research.
obj.item.assembly.signaler.anomaly.blues.name: bluespace anomaly core

obj.item.assembly.signaler.anomaly.dimen.desc: The neutralized core of a dimensional anomaly. Objects reflected on its surface don't look quite right. It'd probably be valuable for research.
obj.item.assembly.signaler.anomaly.dimen.name: dimensional anomaly core

obj.item.assembly.signaler.anomaly.ectop.desc: The neutralized core of an ectoplasmic anomaly. When you hold it close, you can hear faint murmuring from inside. It'd probably be valuable for research.
obj.item.assembly.signaler.anomaly.ectop.name: ectoplasm anomaly core

obj.item.assembly.signaler.anomaly.flux.desc: The neutralized core of a flux anomaly. Touching it makes your skin tingle. It'd probably be valuable for research.
obj.item.assembly.signaler.anomaly.flux.name: flux anomaly core

obj.item.assembly.signaler.anomaly.grav.desc: The neutralized core of a gravitational anomaly. It feels much heavier than it looks. It'd probably be valuable for research.
obj.item.assembly.signaler.anomaly.grav.name: gravitational anomaly core

obj.item.assembly.signaler.anomaly.hallu.desc: The neutralized core of a hallucination anomaly. It seems to be moving, but it's probably your imagination. It'd probably be valuable for research.
obj.item.assembly.signaler.anomaly.hallu.name: hallucination anomaly core

obj.item.assembly.signaler.anomaly.pyro.desc: The neutralized core of a pyroclastic anomaly. It feels warm to the touch. It'd probably be valuable for research.
obj.item.assembly.signaler.anomaly.pyro.name: pyroclastic anomaly core

obj.item.assembly.signaler.anomaly.vorte.desc: The neutralized core of a vortex anomaly. It won't sit still, as if some invisible force is acting on it. It'd probably be valuable for research.
obj.item.assembly.signaler.anomaly.vorte.name: vortex anomaly core

obj.item.assembly.signaler.anomaly.weath.desc: The neutralized core of a weather anomaly. The sound of thunder can be heard in the distance. It'd probably be valuable for research.
obj.item.assembly.signaler.anomaly.weath.name: weather anomaly core

obj.item.assembly.signaler.cyborg.desc: Used to remotely activate devices. Allows for syncing when using a secure signaler on another.
obj.item.assembly.signaler.cyborg.name: remote signaling device

obj.item.assembly.signaler.internal.desc: Used to remotely activate devices. Allows for syncing when using a secure signaler on another.
obj.item.assembly.signaler.internal.name: internal remote signaling device

obj.item.assembly.signaler.low_range.desc: Used to remotely activate devices, within a small range of 9 tiles. Allows for syncing when using a secure signaler on another.
obj.item.assembly.signaler.low_range.name: low-power remote signaling device

obj.item.assembly.timer.desc: Used to time things. Works well with contraptions which has to count down. Tick tock.
obj.item.assembly.timer.name: timer

obj.item.assembly.trapdoor.desc: A sinister-looking controller for a trapdoor.
obj.item.assembly.trapdoor.name: trapdoor controller

obj.item.assembly.voice.desc: A small electronic device able to record a voice sample, and send a signal when that sample is repeated.
obj.item.assembly.voice.name: voice analyzer

obj.item.assembly.wiremod.desc: A small electronic device that can house an integrated circuit.
obj.item.assembly.wiremod.name: circuit assembly

obj.item.attachable_soulcatcher.desc: This device, a polymorphic nanomachine net, wraps around objects of most sizes and allows them to function as a container for Resonance. The soul in question within the vessel is imbued much like it would be in a body or a normal Soulcatcher, perceiving the world and even speaking out of their new form. The nanomachine net of the device allows for the consciousness to somewhat manipulate their container, but any large-scale movement is out of the question.
obj.item.attachable_soulcatcher.name: Poltergeist-Type RSD

obj.item.autopsy_scanner.desc: Used in surgery to extract information from a cadaver. Can also scan the health of cadavers like an advanced health analyzer!
obj.item.autopsy_scanner.name: autopsy scanner

obj.item.autoslime.desc: It resembles a normal slime extract, but seems filled with a strange, multi-colored fluid.
obj.item.autoslime.name: autoslime

obj.item.autosurgeon.desc: A device that automatically inserts an implant, skillchip or organ into the user without the hassle of extensive surgery. 		It has a slot to insert implants or organs and a screwdriver slot for removing accidentally added items.
obj.item.autosurgeon.name: autosurgeon

obj.item.bag_of_holding_inert.desc: What is currently a just an unwieldy block of metal with a slot ready to accept a bluespace anomaly core.
obj.item.bag_of_holding_inert.name: inert bag of holding

obj.item.bait_can.desc: there's a lot of them in there, getting them out takes a while though.
obj.item.bait_can.name: can o bait

obj.item.bait_can.super_baits.desc: This can got the nectar of god.
obj.item.bait_can.super_baits.name: can o' super-baits

obj.item.ballistic_broken.desc: An unsalvageable, unrecoverable mess of armor steel and kevlar. Should've maintained it, huh?
obj.item.ballistic_broken.name: broken ballistic shield

obj.item.balloon_mallet.desc: It's a mallet, a weapon known for being heavy, but made from notoriously light balloons. Air inside removes any force from the swings. It'd be quite embarrassing to get hit by this.
obj.item.balloon_mallet.name: balloon mallet

obj.item.bambostaff.desc: A long bamboo-made staff with steel-capped ends. It is rumoured that initiates of Spider Clan train with such before getting to learn how to use a katana.
obj.item.bambostaff.name: bamboo staff

obj.item.banhammer.real.desc: A hammer that has been banned in several sectors. Careful when using this.
obj.item.banhammer.real.name: REAL banhammer

obj.item.banner.desc: A banner with Nanotrasen's logo on it.
obj.item.banner.name: banner

obj.item.banner.blue.desc: A banner with the logo of the blue deity.
obj.item.banner.blue.name: blue banner

obj.item.banner.cargo.desc: The banner of the eternal Cargonia, with the mystical power of conjuring any object into existence.
obj.item.banner.cargo.name: cargonia banner

obj.item.banner.cargo.mundane.desc: The banner of the eternal Cargonia, with the mystical power of conjuring any object into existence.
obj.item.banner.cargo.mundane.name: cargonia banner

obj.item.banner.command.desc: The banner of Command, a staunch and ancient line of bureaucratic kings and queens.
obj.item.banner.command.name: command banner

obj.item.banner.command.mundane.desc: The banner of Command, a staunch and ancient line of bureaucratic kings and queens.
obj.item.banner.command.mundane.name: command banner

obj.item.banner.engineering.desc: The banner of Engitopia, wielders of limitless power.
obj.item.banner.engineering.name: engitopia banner

obj.item.banner.engineering.mundane.desc: The banner of Engitopia, wielders of limitless power.
obj.item.banner.engineering.mundane.name: engitopia banner

obj.item.banner.medical.desc: The banner of Meditopia, generous benefactors that cure wounds and shelter the weak.
obj.item.banner.medical.name: meditopia banner

obj.item.banner.medical.mundane.desc: The banner of Meditopia, generous benefactors that cure wounds and shelter the weak.
obj.item.banner.medical.mundane.name: meditopia banner

obj.item.banner.red.desc: A banner with the logo of the red deity.
obj.item.banner.red.name: red banner

obj.item.banner.science.desc: The banner of Sciencia, bold and daring thaumaturges and researchers that take the path less traveled.
obj.item.banner.science.name: sciencia banner

obj.item.banner.science.mundane.desc: The banner of Sciencia, bold and daring thaumaturges and researchers that take the path less traveled.
obj.item.banner.science.mundane.name: sciencia banner

obj.item.banner.security.desc: The banner of Securistan, ruling the station with an iron fist.
obj.item.banner.security.name: securistan banner

obj.item.banner.security.mundane.desc: The banner of Securistan, ruling the station with an iron fist.
obj.item.banner.security.mundane.name: securistan banner

obj.item.barcode.desc: A tiny tag, associated with a crewmember's account. Attach to a wrapped item to give that account a portion of the wrapped item's profit.
obj.item.barcode.name: barcode tag

obj.item.barcodescanner.desc: A fabulous tool if you need to scan a barcode.
obj.item.barcodescanner.name: barcode scanner

obj.item.barriercube.desc: A compressed cube of slime. When squeezed, it grows to massive size!
obj.item.barriercube.name: barrier cube

obj.item.baton_upgrade.cuff.desc: Allows the user to apply restraints to a target via baton, requires to be loaded with up to three prior.
obj.item.baton_upgrade.cuff.name: handcuff baton upgrade

obj.item.baton_upgrade.focus.desc: Use of the baton on a target, should they be the subject of your contract, will be extra exhausted.
obj.item.baton_upgrade.focus.name: focus baton upgrade

obj.item.baton_upgrade.mute.desc: Use of the baton on a target will mute them for a short period.
obj.item.baton_upgrade.mute.name: mute baton upgrade

obj.item.batterer.desc: A strange device with twin antennas.
obj.item.batterer.name: mind batterer

obj.item.bdsm_candle.desc: A candle with low melting temperature.
obj.item.bdsm_candle.name: soy candle

obj.item.beacon.desc: A beacon used by a teleporter.
obj.item.beacon.name: tracking beacon

obj.item.beamout_tool.desc: Use this to begin the lengthy beam-out  process to return to Terran Government space. It will bring anyone you are pulling with you.
obj.item.beamout_tool.name: beam-out tool

obj.item.bear_armor.desc: A scattered pile of various shaped armor pieces fitted for a bear, some duct tape, and a nail filer. Crude instructions 		are written on the back of one of the plates in Russian. This seems like an awful idea.
obj.item.bear_armor.name: pile of bear armor

obj.item.bedsheet.captain.desc: It has a Nanotrasen symbol on it, and was woven with a revolutionary new kind of thread guaranteed to have 0.01% permeability for most non-chemical substances, popular among most modern captains.
obj.item.bedsheet.captain.name: captain's bedsheet

obj.item.bedsheet.captain.double.desc: It has a Nanotrasen symbol on it, and was woven with a revolutionary new kind of thread guaranteed to have 0.01% permeability for most non-chemical substances, popular among most modern captains.
obj.item.bedsheet.captain.double.name: captain's bedsheet

obj.item.bedsheet.ce.desc: It is decorated with a wrench emblem. It's highly reflective and stain resistant, so you don't need to worry about ruining it with oil.
obj.item.bedsheet.ce.name: chief engineer's bedsheet

obj.item.bedsheet.ce.double.desc: It is decorated with a wrench emblem. It's highly reflective and stain resistant, so you don't need to worry about ruining it with oil.
obj.item.bedsheet.ce.double.name: chief engineer's bedsheet

obj.item.bedsheet.centcom.desc: Woven with advanced nanothread for warmth as well as being very decorated, essential for all officials.
obj.item.bedsheet.centcom.name: CentCom bedsheet

obj.item.bedsheet.centcom.double.desc: Woven with advanced nanothread for warmth as well as being very decorated, essential for all officials.
obj.item.bedsheet.centcom.double.name: CentCom bedsheet

obj.item.bedsheet.chaplain.desc: A blanket woven with the hearts of gods themselves... Wait, that's just linen.
obj.item.bedsheet.chaplain.name: chaplain's blanket

obj.item.bedsheet.chaplain.double.desc: A blanket woven with the hearts of gods themselves... Wait, that's just linen.
obj.item.bedsheet.chaplain.double.name: chaplain's blanket

obj.item.bedsheet.clown.desc: A rainbow blanket with a clown mask woven in. It smells faintly of bananas.
obj.item.bedsheet.clown.name: clown's blanket

obj.item.bedsheet.clown.double.desc: A rainbow blanket with a clown mask woven in. It smells faintly of bananas.
obj.item.bedsheet.clown.double.name: clown's blanket

obj.item.bedsheet.cmo.desc: It's a sterilized blanket that has a cross emblem. There's some cat fur on it, likely from Runtime.
obj.item.bedsheet.cmo.name: chief medical officer's bedsheet

obj.item.bedsheet.cmo.double.desc: It's a sterilized blanket that has a cross emblem. There's some cat fur on it, likely from Runtime.
obj.item.bedsheet.cmo.double.name: chief medical officer's bedsheet

obj.item.bedsheet.cosmos.desc: Made from the dreams of those who wonder at the stars.
obj.item.bedsheet.cosmos.name: cosmic space bedsheet

obj.item.bedsheet.cosmos.double.desc: Made from the dreams of those who wonder at the stars.
obj.item.bedsheet.cosmos.double.name: cosmic space bedsheet

obj.item.bedsheet.cult.desc: You might dream of Nar'Sie if you sleep with this. It seems rather tattered and glows of an eldritch presence.
obj.item.bedsheet.cult.name: cultist's bedsheet

obj.item.bedsheet.cult.double.desc: You might dream of Nar'Sie if you sleep with this. It seems rather tattered and glows of an eldritch presence.
obj.item.bedsheet.cult.double.name: cultist's bedsheet

obj.item.bedsheet.gondola.desc: A precious bedsheet made from the hide of a endangered and peculiar critter.
obj.item.bedsheet.gondola.name: gondola bedsheet

obj.item.bedsheet.hop.desc: It is decorated with a key emblem. For those rare moments when you can rest and cuddle with Ian without someone screaming for you over the radio.
obj.item.bedsheet.hop.name: head of personnel's bedsheet

obj.item.bedsheet.hop.double.desc: It is decorated with a key emblem. For those rare moments when you can rest and cuddle with Ian without someone screaming for you over the radio.
obj.item.bedsheet.hop.double.name: head of personnel's bedsheet

obj.item.bedsheet.hos.desc: It is decorated with a shield emblem. While crime doesn't sleep, you do, but you are still THE LAW!
obj.item.bedsheet.hos.name: head of security's bedsheet

obj.item.bedsheet.hos.double.desc: It is decorated with a shield emblem. While crime doesn't sleep, you do, but you are still THE LAW!
obj.item.bedsheet.hos.double.name: head of security's bedsheet

obj.item.bedsheet.medical.desc: It's a 'sterilized' blanket commonly used in the Medbay.
obj.item.bedsheet.medical.name: medical blanket

obj.item.bedsheet.medical.double.desc: It's a 'sterilized' blanket commonly used in the Medbay.
obj.item.bedsheet.medical.double.name: medical blanket

obj.item.bedsheet.mime.desc: A very soothing striped blanket.  All the noise just seems to fade out when you're under the covers in this.
obj.item.bedsheet.mime.name: mime's blanket

obj.item.bedsheet.mime.double.desc: A very soothing striped blanket.  All the noise just seems to fade out when you're under the covers in this.
obj.item.bedsheet.mime.double.name: mime's blanket

obj.item.bedsheet.nanotrasen.desc: It has the Nanotrasen logo on it and has an aura of duty.
obj.item.bedsheet.nanotrasen.name: Nanotrasen bedsheet

obj.item.bedsheet.nanotrasen.double.desc: It has the Nanotrasen logo on it and has an aura of duty.
obj.item.bedsheet.nanotrasen.double.name: Nanotrasen bedsheet

obj.item.bedsheet.patriot.desc: You've never felt more free than when sleeping on this.
obj.item.bedsheet.patriot.name: patriotic bedsheet

obj.item.bedsheet.patriot.double.desc: You've never felt more free than when sleeping on this.
obj.item.bedsheet.patriot.double.name: patriotic bedsheet

obj.item.bedsheet.pirate.desc: It has a Jolly Roger emblem on it and has a faint scent of grog.
obj.item.bedsheet.pirate.name: pirate's bedsheet

obj.item.bedsheet.qm.desc: It is decorated with a crate emblem in silver lining.  It's rather tough, and just the thing to lie on after a hard day of pushing paper.
obj.item.bedsheet.qm.name: quartermaster's bedsheet

obj.item.bedsheet.qm.double.desc: It is decorated with a crate emblem in silver lining.  It's rather tough, and just the thing to lie on after a hard day of pushing paper.
obj.item.bedsheet.qm.double.name: quartermaster's bedsheet

obj.item.bedsheet.rainbow.desc: A multicolored blanket. It's actually several different sheets cut up and sewn together.
obj.item.bedsheet.rainbow.name: rainbow bedsheet

obj.item.bedsheet.rainbow.double.desc: A multicolored blanket. It's actually several different sheets cut up and sewn together.
obj.item.bedsheet.rainbow.double.name: rainbow bedsheet

obj.item.bedsheet.rd.desc: It appears to have a beaker emblem, and is made out of fire-resistant material, although it probably won't protect you in the event of fires you're familiar with every day.
obj.item.bedsheet.rd.name: research director's bedsheet

obj.item.bedsheet.rd.double.desc: It appears to have a beaker emblem, and is made out of fire-resistant material, although it probably won't protect you in the event of fires you're familiar with every day.
obj.item.bedsheet.rd.double.name: research director's bedsheet

obj.item.bedsheet.rev.desc: A bedsheet stolen from a Central Command official's bedroom, used a symbol of triumph against Nanotrasen's tyranny. The golden emblem on the front has been scribbled out.
obj.item.bedsheet.rev.name: revolutionary's bedsheet

obj.item.bedsheet.rev.double.desc: A bedsheet stolen from a Central Command official's bedroom, used a symbol of triumph against Nanotrasen's tyranny. The golden emblem on the front has been scribbled out.
obj.item.bedsheet.rev.double.name: revolutionary's bedsheet

obj.item.bedsheet.syndie.desc: It has a syndicate emblem and it has an aura of evil.
obj.item.bedsheet.syndie.name: syndicate bedsheet

obj.item.bedsheet.syndie.double.desc: It has a syndicate emblem and it has an aura of evil.
obj.item.bedsheet.syndie.double.name: syndicate bedsheet

obj.item.bedsheet.wiz.desc: A special fabric enchanted with magic so you can have an enchanted night. It even glows!
obj.item.bedsheet.wiz.name: wizard's bedsheet

obj.item.bedsheet.wiz.double.desc: A special fabric enchanted with magic so you can have an enchanted night. It even glows!
obj.item.bedsheet.wiz.double.name: wizard's bedsheet

obj.item.bee_smoker.desc: A device which can be used to hypnotize bees!
obj.item.bee_smoker.name: bee smoker

obj.item.bikehorn.desc: A horn off of a bicycle. Rumour has it that they're made from recycled clowns.
obj.item.bikehorn.name: bike horn

obj.item.bikehorn.airhorn.desc: Damn son, where'd you find this?
obj.item.bikehorn.airhorn.name: air horn

obj.item.bikehorn.golden.desc: Golden? Clearly, it's made with bananium! Honk!
obj.item.bikehorn.golden.name: golden bike horn

obj.item.bikehorn.rubberducky.desc: Rubber ducky you're so fine, you make bathtime lots of fuuun. Rubber ducky I'm awfully fooooond of yooooouuuu~
obj.item.bikehorn.rubberducky.name: rubber ducky

obj.item.bikehorn.rubberducky.plasticduc.desc: It's a cheap plastic knockoff of a loveable bathtime toy.
obj.item.bikehorn.rubberducky.plasticduc.name: plastic ducky

obj.item.biopsy_tool.desc: Used to retrieve cell lines from organisms. Don't worry, it won't sting.
obj.item.biopsy_tool.name: biopsy tool

obj.item.biopsy_tool.organ.desc: Used to retrieve cell lines from organ tissue and organisms. Don't worry, it won't sting.
obj.item.biopsy_tool.organ.name: tissue biopsy tool

obj.item.birthday_invite.desc: A card stating that it's someone's birthday today.
obj.item.birthday_invite.name: birthday invitation

obj.item.bitrunning_debug.desc: Adds points and reduces cooldown time for debugging
obj.item.bitrunning_debug.name: bitrunning debug item

obj.item.blackbox.desc: A strange relic, capable of recording data on extradimensional vertices. It lives inside the blackbox recorder for safe keeping.
obj.item.blackbox.name: the blackbox

obj.item.blank_coffee_cartridge.desc: A blank coffee cartridge, ready to be filled with coffee paste.
obj.item.blank_coffee_cartridge.name: blank coffee cartridge

obj.item.blood_beam.desc: Sinister looking aura that distorts the flow of reality around it.
obj.item.blood_beam.name: magical aura

obj.item.blood_filter.advanced.desc: An unholy combination of bonesetter and bloodfilter.
obj.item.blood_filter.advanced.name: medical combitool

obj.item.blood_filter.alien.desc: A reversed engineered bloodfilter... This does not look nice to be on the receiving end of... .
obj.item.blood_filter.alien.name: alien bloodfilter

obj.item.blood_scanner.desc: This Me-Lo Tech branded medical device can detect abnormalities in blood flow or composition. There is a button on the side which scans the patient's blood for common medicines.
obj.item.blood_scanner.name: hemoanalytic scanner

obj.item.blood_worm_tester.desc: A proprietary device patented by the DeForest Medical Corporation that is tailor-made for detecting hemoparasites, such as the infamous space-faring blood worm. The testing process is allegedly very painful.
obj.item.blood_worm_tester.name: hemoparasite testing tool

obj.item.bloodcrawl.desc: You are unable to hold anything while in this form.
obj.item.bloodcrawl.name: blood crawl

obj.item.bloodcrawl_bottle.desc: Drinking this will give you unimaginable powers... and mildly disgust you because of it's metallic taste.
obj.item.bloodcrawl_bottle.name: bloodlust in a bottle

obj.item.blueprints.desc: Blueprints of the station. There is a "Classified" stamp and several coffee stains on it.
obj.item.blueprints.name: station blueprints

obj.item.blueprints.cyborg.desc: A digital copy of the station blueprints stored in your memory.
obj.item.blueprints.cyborg.name: station schematics

obj.item.blueprints.golem.desc: Use it to build new structures in the wastes.
obj.item.blueprints.golem.name: land claim

obj.item.blueprints.slime.desc: A one use yet of blueprints made of jelly like organic material. Extends the reach of the management console.
obj.item.blueprints.slime.name: cerulean prints

obj.item.blueprints.tarkon.desc: Blueprints of the Tarkon surface breaching drill and several Tarkon base designs. Red, stamped text reads "Confidential" on the backside of it.
obj.item.blueprints.tarkon.name: Tarkon Design Prints

obj.item.bluespace_finger.desc: Firmly grasp reality and pull yourself to a nearby location.
obj.item.bluespace_finger.name: bluespace knot

obj.item.bodybag.desc: A folded bag designed for the storage and transportation of cadavers.
obj.item.bodybag.name: body bag

obj.item.bodybag.bluespace.desc: A folded bluespace body bag designed for the storage and transportation of cadavers.
obj.item.bodybag.bluespace.name: bluespace body bag

obj.item.bodybag.environmental.desc: A folded, reinforced bag designed to protect against exoplanetary environmental storms.
obj.item.bodybag.environmental.name: environmental protection bag

obj.item.bodybag.environmental.nanotrase.desc: A folded, heavily reinforced, and insulated bag, capable of fully isolating its contents from external factors.
obj.item.bodybag.environmental.nanotrase.name: elite environmental protection bag

obj.item.bodybag.environmental.prisoner.desc: Intended for transport of prisoners through hazardous environments, this folded environmental protection bag comes with straps to keep an occupant secure.
obj.item.bodybag.environmental.prisoner.name: prisoner transport bag

obj.item.bodybag.environmental.prisoner..desc: Intended for transport of prisoners through hazardous environments, this folded environmental protection bag comes with straps to keep an occupant secure.
obj.item.bodybag.environmental.prisoner..name: pressurized prisoner transport bag

obj.item.bodybag.environmental.prisoner..desc: An alteration of Nanotrasen's environmental protection bag which has been used in several high-profile kidnappings. Designed to keep a victim unconscious, alive, and secured until they are transported to a required location.
obj.item.bodybag.environmental.prisoner..name: syndicate prisoner transport bag

obj.item.bodybag.lost_crew.desc: A folded bag designed for the long-term storage and transportation of cadavers.
obj.item.bodybag.lost_crew.name: long-term body bag

obj.item.bodybag.stasis.desc: A folded bag designed for the storage and transportation of cadavers.
obj.item.bodybag.stasis.name: body bag

obj.item.bodypart.arm.desc: Hey buddy give me a HAND and report this to the github because you shouldn't be seeing this.
obj.item.bodypart.arm.name: arm

obj.item.bodypart.arm.left.desc: Did you know that the word 'sinister' stems originally from the 		Latin 'sinestra' (left hand), because the left hand was supposed to 		be possessed by the devil? This arm appears to be possessed by no 		one though.
obj.item.bodypart.arm.left.name: left arm

obj.item.bodypart.arm.left.kinetic.name: left kinetic prosthetic arm

obj.item.bombcore.desc: A powerful secondary explosive of syndicate design and unknown composition, it should be stable under normal conditions...
obj.item.bombcore.name: bomb payload

obj.item.bombcore.badmin.desc: If you're seeing this someone has either made a mistake or gotten dangerously savvy with var editing!
obj.item.bombcore.badmin.name: badmin payload

obj.item.bombcore.badmin.summon.desc: If you're seeing this someone has either made a mistake or gotten dangerously savvy with var editing!
obj.item.bombcore.badmin.summon.name: badmin payload

obj.item.bombcore.chemical.desc: An explosive payload designed to spread chemicals, dangerous or otherwise, across a large area. Properties of the core may vary with grenade casing type, and must be loaded before use.
obj.item.bombcore.chemical.name: chemical payload

obj.item.bombcore.chemical.nukie.desc: An explosive payload designed to spread chemicals, dangerous or otherwise, across a large area. Properties of the core may vary with grenade casing type, and must be loaded before use.
obj.item.bombcore.chemical.nukie.name: chemical payload

obj.item.bombcore.dimensional.desc: A wicked payload meant to wildly transmutate terrain over a wide area, a power no mere human should wield.
obj.item.bombcore.dimensional.name: multi-dimensional payload

obj.item.bombcore.emp.desc: A set of superconducting electromagnetic coils designed to release a powerful pulse to destroy electronics and scramble circuits

obj.item.card.cardboard.korvenbank.desc: An old, blank bank card with an inactive account, belonging to the Korve Central Bank.
obj.item.card.cardboard.korvenbank.name: korven bank card

obj.item.card.cardboard.unioncard.desc: Considered contraband on Nanotrasen-aligned stations, this card proclaims the wearer's membership to the Worker's Union.
obj.item.card.cardboard.unioncard.name: union membership card

obj.item.card.emag.desc: It's a card with a magnetic strip attached to some circuitry.
obj.item.card.emag.name: cryptographic sequencer

obj.item.card.emag.battlecruiser.desc: An ominous card that contains the location of the station, and when applied to a communications console, 	the ability to long-distance contact the Syndicate fleet.

obj.item.card.emag.blue.desc: It's a card with a magnetic strip attached to some circuitry.

obj.item.card.emag.bluespace.desc: It's a blue card with a magnetic strip attached to some circuitry. It appears to have some sort of transmitter attached to it.
obj.item.card.emag.bluespace.name: bluespace cryptographic sequencer

obj.item.card.emag.doorjack.desc: Commonly known as a "doorjack", this device is a specialized cryptographic sequencer specifically designed to override station airlock access codes. Uses self-refilling charges to hack airlocks.
obj.item.card.emag.doorjack.name: modified ID card

obj.item.card.emag.halloween.desc: It's a pumpkin with a cryptographic sequencer sticking out.

obj.item.card.emag.one_shot.desc: It's a card with a magnetic strip attached to some circuitry.

obj.item.card.faction_access.desc: A small card, that when used on any ID, will add faction access. This one is empty.
obj.item.card.faction_access.name: faction access card

obj.item.card.faction_access.command.desc: A small card, that when used on any ID, will add all faction access.
obj.item.card.faction_access.command.name: faction command access card

obj.item.card.faction_access.crew.desc: A small card, that when used on any ID, will add crew access, which allows entering most areas, barring command.
obj.item.card.faction_access.crew.name: faction crew access card

obj.item.card.faction_access.guest.desc: A small card, that when used on any ID, will add guest access, which allows entering halls, living areas, kitchens and bars.

obj.item.card.fuzzy_license.desc: A very official looking license. Not actually endorsed by Nanotrasen.

obj.item.card.id.advanced.tarkon.desc: A dust-collected visitors pass, A small tagline reading "Port Tarkon, The first step to Civilian Partnership in Space Homesteading".
obj.item.card.id.advanced.tarkon.name: Tarkon deck access pass

obj.item.card.id.advanced.tarkon.cargo.desc: An access card designated for "cargo's finest". You're also a part time space miner, when cargonia is quiet.
obj.item.card.id.advanced.tarkon.cargo.name: P-T cargo hauler's access card

obj.item.card.id.advanced.tarkon.directo.desc: An access card designated for "Tarkon's Port Director". Its no longer hesitation, only consideration.
obj.item.card.id.advanced.tarkon.directo.name: Tarkon port director's access card

obj.item.card.id.advanced.tarkon.engi.desc: An access card designated for "engineering staff". You're going to be the one everyone points at to fix stuff, lets be honest.
obj.item.card.id.advanced.tarkon.engi.name: P-T maintenance engineer's access card

obj.item.card.id.advanced.tarkon.ensign.desc: An access card designated for "Tarkon ensign". No one has to listen to you... But you're the closest there is for command around here.
obj.item.card.id.advanced.tarkon.ensign.name: Tarkon ensign's access card

obj.item.card.id.advanced.tarkon.med.desc: An access card designated for "medical staff". You provide the medic bags.
obj.item.card.id.advanced.tarkon.med.name: P-T trauma medic's access card

obj.item.card.id.advanced.tarkon.sci.desc: An access card designated for "the science team". You are forgotten basically immediately when it comes to the lab.
obj.item.card.id.advanced.tarkon.sci.name: P-T field researcher's access card

obj.item.card.id.advanced.tarkon.sec.desc: An access card designated for "security members". Everyone wants your guns, partner. Yee-haw.
obj.item.card.id.advanced.tarkon.sec.name: P-T resident deputy's access card

obj.item.card.id.advanced.tarkon.service.desc: An access card designated for "the stations` support". Cook, clean, and keep everyone on the crew happy.
obj.item.card.id.advanced.tarkon.service.name: P-T service techs access card

obj.item.card.id.advanced.technician_id.desc: Repair Technician? We don't have those in this sector, just a bunch of lazy engineers! This must have been from the between-shift crew...

obj.item.ceramic.cup.desc: A piece of clay with high walls, in the shape of a cup. It can hold 120 units.

obj.item.ceramic.plate.desc: A piece of clay that is flat, in the shape of a plate.
obj.item.ceramic.plate.name: ceramic plate

obj.item.ceramic.tray.desc: A piece of clay that is flat, in the shape of a tray.
obj.item.ceramic.tray.name: ceramic tray

obj.item.ceremonial_blade.desc: A blade created to spar with. It seems weak, but if you spar with it...?
obj.item.ceremonial_blade.name: ceremonial blade

obj.item.chainsaw.desc: A versatile power tool. Useful for limbing trees and delimbing humans.
obj.item.chainsaw.name: chainsaw

obj.item.chainsaw.doomslayer.desc: A versatile power tool. Useful for limbing trees and delimbing humans.
obj.item.chainsaw.doomslayer.name: THE GREAT COMMUNICATOR

obj.item.chair.musical.desc: Oh, so this is like the fucked up Monopoly rules where there are no rules and you can pick up and place the musical chairs as you please.
obj.item.chair.musical.name: musical chair

obj.item.chair.plastic.desc: Somehow, you can always find one under the wrestling ring.
obj.item.chair.plastic.name: folding plastic chair

obj.item.chameleon.desc: A vaguely insidious device with a scanner and large projector.
obj.item.chameleon.name: chameleon projector

obj.item.chisel.desc: Breaking and making art since 4000 BC. This one uses advanced technology to allow the creation of lifelike moving statues.
obj.item.chisel.name: chisel

obj.item.chisel.ashwalker.desc: Where there is a will there is a way; the tool head of this chisel is fashioned from bone shaped when it was fresh and then left to calcify in iron rich water, to make a strong head for all your carving needs.
obj.item.chisel.ashwalker.name: primitive chisel

obj.item.choice_beacon.desc: Hey, why are you viewing this?!! Please let CentCom know about this odd occurrence.
obj.item.choice_beacon.name: choice beacon

obj.item.choice_beacon.ancient_milsim.desc: Summon a gear closet for your contributions in the early access testing. Synchronises with the current game version to give you the most up-to-date class equipment.
obj.item.choice_beacon.ancient_milsim.name: early access equipment beacon

obj.item.choice_beacon.augments.desc: Summons augmentations. Can be used 3 times!
obj.item.choice_beacon.augments.name: augment beacon

obj.item.choice_beacon.blueshield.desc: A single use beacon to deliver a weapon of your choice. Please only call this in your office
obj.item.choice_beacon.blueshield.name: blueshield weapon beacon

obj.item.choice_beacon.hero.desc: To summon heroes from the past to protect the future.
obj.item.choice_beacon.hero.name: heroic beacon

obj.item.choice_beacon.holy.desc: Summon a set of standard issue chaplain armaments, as dictated by I.C.R.A.
obj.item.choice_beacon.holy.name: armaments beacon

obj.item.choice_beacon.ingredient.desc: Summon a box of ingredients to help you get started cooking.
obj.item.choice_beacon.ingredient.name: ingredient delivery beacon

obj.item.choice_beacon.ntc.desc: A single use beacon to deliver a gunset of your choice. Please only call this in your office
obj.item.choice_beacon.ntc.name: gunset beacon

obj.item.choice_beacon.station_magistrat.desc: A single use beacon to deliver a weapon of your choice. Please only call this in your office
obj.item.choice_beacon.station_magistrat.name: nanotrasen dignitaries weapon beacon

obj.item.choice_beacon.syndicateoffstati.desc: A single use beacon to deliver a weapon kit of your choice. Please use this or store it in your safe.
obj.item.choice_beacon.syndicateoffstati.name: Standard Syndicate sidearm beacon

obj.item.choice_beacon.syndicateoffstati.desc: A single use beacon to deliver a weapon kit of your choice. Please use this or store it in your safe.
obj.item.choice_beacon.syndicateoffstati.name: Syndicate command staff weapon beacon

obj.item.choice_beacon.syndicateoffstati.desc: A single use beacon to deliver a weapon kit of your choice. Please use this or store it in your safe.
obj.item.choice_beacon.syndicateoffstati.name: Engineering Officer's Syndicate sidearm beacon

obj.item.choice_beacon.syndicateoffstati.desc: A single use beacon to deliver a weapon kit of your choice. Please use this or store it in your safe.
obj.item.choice_beacon.syndicateoffstati.name: Master At Arms Syndicate weapon beacon

obj.item.choice_beacon.syndicateoffstati.desc: A single use beacon to deliver a weapon kit of your choice. Please use this or store it in your safe.
obj.item.choice_beacon.syndicateoffstati.name: Syndicate Admiral weapon beacon

obj.item.choice_beacon.unholy.desc: Contains a set of armaments for those who would unlock their power.
obj.item.choice_beacon.unholy.name: armaments beacon

obj.item.chromosome.energy.desc: A chromosome that reduces action based mutation cooldowns by 50%.
obj.item.chromosome.energy.name: energetic chromosome

obj.item.chromosome.power.desc: A chromosome that increases mutation power by 50%.
obj.item.chromosome.power.name: power chromosome

obj.item.chromosome.stabilizer.desc: A chromosome that reduces mutation instability by 20%.
obj.item.chromosome.stabilizer.name: stabilizer chromosome

obj.item.chromosome.synchronizer.desc: A chromosome that reduces mutation knockback and downsides by 50%.
obj.item.chromosome.synchronizer.name: synchronizer chromosome

obj.item.cigarette.desc: A roll of tobacco and nicotine. It is not food.
obj.item.cigarette.name: cigarette

obj.item.cigarette.candy.desc: For all ages*! Doesn't contain any amount of nicotine. Health and safety risks can be read on the tip of the cigarette.
obj.item.cigarette.candy.name: Little Timmy's candy cigarette

obj.item.cigarette.candy.nicotine.desc: For all ages*! Doesn't contain any* amount of nicotine. Health and safety risks can be read on the tip of the cigarette.
obj.item.cigarette.candy.nicotine.name: Little Timmy's candy cigarette

obj.item.cigarette.carp.desc: A Carp Classic brand cigarette. A small label on its side indicates that it does NOT contain carpotoxin.
obj.item.cigarette.carp.name: cigarette

obj.item.cigarette.cigar.desc: A brown roll of tobacco and... well, you're not quite sure. This thing's huge!
obj.item.cigarette.cigar.name: cigar

obj.item.cigarette.cigar.cohiba.desc: There's little more you could want from a cigar.
obj.item.cigarette.cigar.cohiba.name: Cohiba Robusto cigar

obj.item.cigarette.cigar.havana.desc: A cigar fit for only the best of the best.
obj.item.cigarette.cigar.havana.name: premium Havanian cigar

obj.item.cigarette.cigar.premium.desc: A brown roll of tobacco and... well, you're not quite sure. This thing's huge!
obj.item.cigarette.cigar.premium.name: premium cigar

obj.item.cigarette.dromedary.desc: A DromedaryCo brand cigarette. Contrary to popular belief, does not contain Calomel, but is reported to have a watery taste.

obj.item.cigarette.flash_powder.desc: A roll of tobacco and nicotine. It is not food.
obj.item.cigarette.flash_powder.name: cigarette

obj.item.cigarette.greytide.name: grey mainthol

obj.item.cigarette.khi.desc: A roll of tobacco and nicotine. It is not food.
obj.item.cigarette.khi.name: Kitsuhana Singularity cigarette

obj.item.cigarette.pipe.desc: A pipe, for smoking. Probably made of meerschaum or something.
obj.item.cigarette.pipe.name: smoking pipe

obj.item.cigarette.pipe.cobpipe.name: corn cob pipe

obj.item.cigarette.pipe.crackpipe.desc: An ergonomic, low-key delivery method for the combusted. This apparatus taught the ancients much wisdom.
obj.item.cigarette.pipe.crackpipe.name: glass pipe

obj.item.cigarette.rollie.desc: A roll of dried plant matter wrapped in thin paper.
obj.item.cigarette.rollie.name: rollie

obj.item.cigarette.rollie.cannabis.desc: A roll of dried plant matter wrapped in thin paper.
obj.item.cigarette.rollie.cannabis.name: rollie

obj.item.cigarette.rollie.mindbreaker.name: rollie
