obj.item.cigarette.rollie.nicotine.name: rollie

obj.item.cigarette.rollie.trippy.desc: A roll of dried plant matter wrapped in thin paper.
obj.item.cigarette.rollie.trippy.name: rollie

obj.item.cigarette.shadyjims.desc: A Shady Jim's Super Slims cigarette.
obj.item.cigarette.shadyjims.name: cigarette

obj.item.cigarette.space_cigarette.desc: A Space brand cigarette that can be smoked anywhere.
obj.item.cigarette.space_cigarette.name: cigarette

obj.item.cigarette.uplift.desc: An Uplift Smooth brand cigarette. Smells refreshing.
obj.item.cigarette.uplift.name: cigarette

obj.item.cigbutt.roach.desc: A manky old roach, or for non-stoners, a used rollup.
obj.item.cigbutt.roach.name: roach

obj.item.circuitboard.computer.slot_mach.desc: You can change the theme using a screwdriver.
obj.item.circuitboard.computer.slot_mach.name: Slot Machine

obj.item.circuitboard.machine.bluespace_.desc: The bluespace miner is a machine that, when provided the correct temperature and pressure, will produce materials.
obj.item.circuitboard.machine.bluespace_.name: Bluespace Miner

obj.item.circuitboard.machine.chem_maste.desc: You can turn the "mode selection" dial using a screwdriver.
obj.item.circuitboard.machine.chem_maste.name: ChemMaster 3000

obj.item.circuitboard.machine.chem_maste.desc: You can turn the "mode selection" dial using a screwdriver.
obj.item.circuitboard.machine.chem_maste.name: CondiMaster 3000

obj.item.circuitboard.machine.powerator.desc: The powerator is a machine that allows stations to sell their power to other stations that require additional sources.
obj.item.circuitboard.machine.powerator.name: Powerator

obj.item.circuitboard.machine.powerator..desc: The powerator is a machine that allows stations to sell their power to other stations that require additional sources.
obj.item.circuitboard.machine.powerator..name: Interdyne Powerator

obj.item.circuitboard.machine.powerator..desc: The powerator is a machine that allows stations to sell their power to other stations that require additional sources.
obj.item.circuitboard.machine.powerator..name: Tarkon Powerator

obj.item.circuitboard.machine.tesla_coil.desc: Does not let you shoot lightning from your hands.
obj.item.circuitboard.machine.tesla_coil.name: Tesla Controller

obj.item.circuitboard.machine.vendor.desc: You can turn the "brand selection" dial using a screwdriver.
obj.item.circuitboard.machine.vendor.name: Custom Vendor

obj.item.circuitboard.mecha.durand.targe.name: Durand Weapon Control and Targeting module (Exosuit Board)

obj.item.circuitboard.mecha.gygax.target.name: Gygax Weapon Control and Targeting module (Exosuit Board)

obj.item.circuitboard.mecha.honker.targe.name: H.O.N.K Weapon Control and Targeting module (Exosuit Board)

obj.item.circuitboard.mecha.phazon.targe.name: Phazon Weapon Control and Targeting module (Exosuit Board)

obj.item.circuitboard.mecha.savannah_iva.name: Savannah-Ivanov Combination Control Lock module (Exosuit Board)
Ivanov Weapon Control and Targeting module (Exosuit Board)

obj.item.circular_saw.alien.desc: Do the aliens also lose this, and need to find an alien hatchet?
obj.item.circular_saw.alien.name: alien saw

obj.item.circular_saw.augment.desc: A small but very fast spinning saw. It rips and tears until it is done.
obj.item.circular_saw.augment.name: circular saw

obj.item.circular_saw.cruel.desc: A twisted blade for twisted purpose. Rip sinew and bone until your work is done.
obj.item.circular_saw.cruel.name: jagged bonesaw

obj.item.circular_saw.cruel.augment.desc: A jagged sawblade built for grisly work.
obj.item.circular_saw.cruel.augment.name: jagged bonesaw

obj.item.civ_bounty_beacon.desc: N.T. approved civilian bounty beacon, toss it down and you will have a bounty pad and computer delivered to you.
obj.item.civ_bounty_beacon.name: civilian bounty beacon

obj.item.claymore.desc: What are you standing around staring at this for? Get to killing!
obj.item.claymore.name: claymore

obj.item.claymore.bone.desc: Jagged pieces of bone are tied to what looks like a goliaths femur.
obj.item.claymore.bone.name: bone sword

obj.item.claymore.carrot.desc: A full-sized carrot sword. Definitely not good for the eyes, not anymore.
obj.item.claymore.carrot.name: carrot sword

obj.item.claymore.cutlass.desc: A piratey sword used by buckaneers to "negotiate" the transfer of treasure.
obj.item.claymore.cutlass.name: cutlass

obj.item.claymore.cutlass.old.desc: A piratey sword used by buckaneers to "negotiate" the transfer of treasure.
obj.item.claymore.cutlass.old.name: old cutlass

obj.item.claymore.dragonslayer.desc: A blade that seems too big to be called a sword. Too big, too thick, too heavy, and too rough, it's more like a large hunk of raw iron.
obj.item.claymore.dragonslayer.name: Dragonslayer

obj.item.claymore.dragonslayer.very_fuck.desc: A blade that seems too big to be called a sword. Too big, too thick, too heavy, and too rough, it's more like a large hunk of raw iron.
obj.item.claymore.dragonslayer.very_fuck.name: Tempered Dragonslayer

obj.item.claymore.gladius.desc: A short but formidable sword, favored by recently-reanimated ancient warriors.
obj.item.claymore.gladius.name: gladius

obj.item.claymore.highlander.desc: THERE CAN BE ONLY ONE, AND IT WILL BE YOU!!! Activate it in your hand to point to the nearest victim.
obj.item.claymore.highlander.name: claymore

obj.item.claymore.highlander.robot.desc: THERE CAN BE ONLY ONE, AND IT WILL BE YOU!!! Activate it in your hand to point to the nearest victim.
obj.item.claymore.highlander.robot.name: claymore

obj.item.claymore.shortsword.desc: A mercenary's sword, chipped and worn from battles long gone. You could say it is a swordsman's shortsword short sword.
obj.item.claymore.shortsword.name: shortsword

obj.item.claymore.weak.ceremonial.desc: A rusted claymore, once at the heart of a powerful scottish clan struck down and oppressed by tyrants, it has been passed down the ages as a symbol of defiance.
obj.item.claymore.weak.ceremonial.name: claymore

obj.item.claymore.weak.weaker.desc: This one is rus-.. no, painted to look rusty.. it's a display piece, still carries a fair edge though.
obj.item.claymore.weak.weaker.name: claymore

obj.item.clicker.desc: A small clicking toy that fits in the palm of your hand, typically used to condition pets into obedience. It makes a satisfying 'click' sound when pressed.
obj.item.clicker.name: clicker

obj.item.climbing_hook.desc: Standard hook with rope to scale up holes. The rope is of average quality, but due to your weight amongst other factors, may not withstand extreme use.
obj.item.climbing_hook.name: climbing hook

obj.item.climbing_hook.climbing_moth_win.desc: Useful for climbing up onto high places, though tiresome.
obj.item.climbing_hook.climbing_moth_win.name: outstretched wings

obj.item.climbing_hook.emergency.desc: An emergency climbing hook to scale up holes.
obj.item.climbing_hook.emergency.name: emergency climbing hook

obj.item.climbing_hook.implanted.desc: A plasteel hook, with rope. Upon closer inspection, the rope appears to be made out of plasteel woven into regular rope, amongst many other reinforcements.
obj.item.climbing_hook.implanted.name: implanted climbing hook

obj.item.climbing_hook.infinite.desc: A plasteel hook, with rope. Upon closer inspection, the rope appears to be made out of plasteel woven into regular rope, amongst many other reinforcements.
obj.item.climbing_hook.infinite.name: infinite climbing hook

obj.item.climbing_hook.syndicate.desc: REALLY suspicious climbing hook to scale up holes. The hook has a syndicate logo engraved on it, and the rope has sinister mechanical mechanisms to assist with climbing away from nefarious activities.
obj.item.climbing_hook.syndicate.name: suspicious climbing hook

obj.item.clipboard.cyborg.desc: A clipboard which seems to come adapted with a paper synthetizer, carefully hidden in its paper clip.
obj.item.clipboard.cyborg.name: integrated clipboard

obj.item.clockwork.clockwork_slab.desc: A mechanical-looking device filled with intricate cogs that swirl to their own accord.
obj.item.clockwork.clockwork_slab.name: Clockwork Slab

obj.item.clockwork.integration_cog.desc: A small cog that seems to spin by its own acord when left alone.
obj.item.clockwork.integration_cog.name: integration cog

obj.item.clockwork.replica_fabricator.desc: A strange, brass device with many twisting cogs and vents.
obj.item.clockwork.replica_fabricator.name: replica fabricator

obj.item.clockwork.trap_placer.flipper.desc: A steam powered rotating floor panel. When input is received it will fling anyone on top of it.
obj.item.clockwork.trap_placer.flipper.name: flipper

obj.item.clockwork.trap_placer.pressure_.desc: I wonder what happens if you step on it.
obj.item.clockwork.trap_placer.pressure_.name: pressure plate

obj.item.clockwork.trap_placer.skewer.desc: A spiked, brass skewer attached to a steam powered extension mechanism.
obj.item.clockwork.trap_placer.skewer.name: brass skewer

obj.item.clockwork.weapon.brass_battleha.desc: A brass hammer glowing with energy.
obj.item.clockwork.weapon.brass_battleha.name: brass battle-hammer

obj.item.clockwork.weapon.brass_spear.desc: A razor-sharp spear made of brass. It thrums with barely-contained energy.
obj.item.clockwork.weapon.brass_spear.name: brass spear

obj.item.clockwork.weapon.brass_sword.desc: A large sword made of brass.
obj.item.clockwork.weapon.brass_sword.name: brass longsword

obj.item.clockwork_alloy.desc: The remains of the strongest clockwork knight.
obj.item.clockwork_alloy.name: clockwork alloy

obj.item.clothing.accessory.anti_sec_pin.desc: A badge which loudly and proudly proclaims your hostility to the Nanotrasen Security Team, and authority in general.
obj.item.clothing.accessory.anti_sec_pin.name: subversive pin

obj.item.clothing.accessory.armband.carg.name: cargo bay guard armband

obj.item.clothing.accessory.armband.carg.name: mining officer armband

obj.item.clothing.accessory.armband.depu.name: security deputy armband

obj.item.clothing.accessory.armband.engi.name: engineering guard armband

obj.item.clothing.accessory.armband.scie.name: science guard armband

obj.item.clothing.accessory.colonial_web.desc: A versatile individual carrying equipment, cherished by colonists and hoarders alike. Compact enough to be worn underneath bulky clothing.
obj.item.clothing.accessory.colonial_web.name: slim colonial webbing vest

obj.item.clothing.accessory.deaf_pin.desc: Indicates that the wearer is deaf.
obj.item.clothing.accessory.deaf_pin.name: deaf personnel pin

obj.item.clothing.accessory.debt_payer_p.desc: I've paid my debt and all I've got was this pin.
obj.item.clothing.accessory.debt_payer_p.name: debt payer pin

obj.item.clothing.accessory.dogtag.desc: Can't wear a collar, but this is fine?
obj.item.clothing.accessory.dogtag.name: Dogtag

obj.item.clothing.accessory.dogtag.aller.desc: A dogtag with a listing of allergies.
obj.item.clothing.accessory.dogtag.aller.name: Allergy dogtag

obj.item.clothing.accessory.dogtag.borg_.desc: Can't wear a collar, but this is fine?
obj.item.clothing.accessory.dogtag.borg_.name: Pre-Approved Cyborg Candidate dogtag

obj.item.clothing.accessory.dogtag.uniqu.desc: A dogtag with a listing of blood properties.
obj.item.clothing.accessory.dogtag.uniqu.name: Blood dogtag

obj.item.clothing.accessory.dogtags.desc: Two small metal tags, connected with a thin piece of chain that hold important health information. And everything needed for a tombstone...
obj.item.clothing.accessory.dogtags.name: Dogtags

obj.item.clothing.accessory.fake.medal.desc: Yeah nice try buddy. They won't record this one. Especially since it reads 'youre winnar!!'. Alt-Click to reskin!
obj.item.clothing.accessory.fake.medal.name: plastic medal

obj.item.clothing.accessory.hypno_watch.desc: A shining pocket watch, cast in gold and embossed with metallic swirls that almost seem  amethyst under the right light... There's a button on the top to unlatch the front panel, although all that's inside is a layer of cracked glass, the argent hands stuck pointing to 7:07 PM. The brushed silver of these arrows almost seems to swirl if one's gaze lingers for too long. Despite its inert appearance, the eerie mechanical sound of gears turning and clicking in place seems to quietly ring out from the artifact. In the right hands...
obj.item.clothing.accessory.hypno_watch.name: cracked pocket watch

obj.item.clothing.accessory.kheiral_cuff.desc:
A prototype wrist communicator powered by Kheiral Matter. When both ends are clamped to one wrist, acts as a signal range booster for your suit sensors.
		A small engraving on the inside reads, "NOT HANDCUFFS".
obj.item.clothing.accessory.kheiral_cuff.name: Kheiral cuffs

obj.item.clothing.accessory.lawyers_badg.desc: Fills you with the conviction of JUSTICE. Lawyers tend to want to show it to everyone they meet.
obj.item.clothing.accessory.lawyers_badg.name: attorney's badge

obj.item.clothing.accessory.lewdapron.desc: The best part of a maid costume. Now with different colors!
obj.item.clothing.accessory.lewdapron.name: shiny maid apron

obj.item.clothing.accessory.maidapron.desc: The best part of a maid costume.
obj.item.clothing.accessory.maidapron.name: maid apron

obj.item.clothing.accessory.maidcorset.s.desc: Practical? No. Tactical? Also no. Cute? Most definitely yes.
obj.item.clothing.accessory.maidcorset.s.name: syndicate maid apron

obj.item.clothing.accessory.maidcorset.t.desc: Practical? No. Tactical? Also no. Cute? Most definitely yes.
obj.item.clothing.accessory.maidcorset.t.name: Tactical maid apron

obj.item.clothing.accessory.medal.bronze.desc: A bronze heart-shaped medal awarded for sacrifice. It is often awarded posthumously or for severe injury in the line of duty.
obj.item.clothing.accessory.medal.bronze.name: bronze heart medal

obj.item.clothing.accessory.medal.bubber.desc: A medal dedicated to those who display robustness in many fields.
obj.item.clothing.accessory.medal.bubber.name: medal of robustness

obj.item.clothing.accessory.medal.bubber.desc: A medal dedicated to true syndicate agents for robustness in many fields.
obj.item.clothing.accessory.medal.bubber.name: syndicate medal of robustness

obj.item.clothing.accessory.medal.bubber.desc: A medal dedicated to those whom have proven themselves as capable counter-communications specialists.
obj.item.clothing.accessory.medal.bubber.name: syndicate medal of communication

obj.item.clothing.accessory.medal.bubber.desc: A medal dedicated to a rarer agent, one who doesn't rush in; this is for agents who, through patient observation and strategizing, seize the 	perfect moment to act. Like our emblematic snake, they wait to strike until the enemy shows their throat, and deliver the perfect killing blow.
obj.item.clothing.accessory.medal.bubber.name: syndicate medal of diligence

obj.item.clothing.accessory.medal.bubber.desc: A medal dedicated to those who have proven themselves capable at covert operations.
obj.item.clothing.accessory.medal.bubber.name: syndicate medal of espionage

obj.item.clothing.accessory.medal.bubber.desc: A medal dedicated to agents of particular talent at both gathering information on competetors (in ways both subtle and overt) and protecting 	their own employers' confidentiality.
obj.item.clothing.accessory.medal.bubber.name: syndicate medal of intelligence

obj.item.clothing.accessory.medal.bubber.desc: A medal dedicated to those who have proven themselves capable at interrogating even the most resilient members of an enemy corporation.
obj.item.clothing.accessory.medal.bubber.name: syndicate medal of interrogation

obj.item.clothing.accessory.medal.conduc.desc: A bronze medal awarded for distinguished conduct. Whilst a great honor, this is the most basic award given by Nanotrasen. It is often awarded by a captain to a member of his crew.
obj.item.clothing.accessory.medal.conduc.name: distinguished conduct medal

obj.item.clothing.accessory.medal.gold.a.desc: A golden medal awarded exclusively to those promoted to the rank of captain. 		It signifies the codified responsibilities of an Admiral to the Sothran Syndicate, and their undisputable authority over their crew.
obj.item.clothing.accessory.medal.gold.a.name: medal of admiralty

obj.item.clothing.accessory.medal.gold.c.desc: A golden medal awarded exclusively to those promoted to the rank of captain. It signifies the codified responsibilities of a captain to Nanotrasen, and their undisputable authority over their crew.
obj.item.clothing.accessory.medal.gold.c.name: medal of captaincy

obj.item.clothing.accessory.medal.gold.h.desc: An extremely rare golden medal awarded only by CentCom. To receive such a medal is the highest honor and as such, very few exist. This medal is almost never awarded to anybody but commanders.
obj.item.clothing.accessory.medal.gold.h.name: medal of exceptional heroism

obj.item.clothing.accessory.medal.gold.n.desc: A golden medal awarded exclusively to those promoted to the rank of Nanotrasen Consultant. It signifies the diplomatic abilities of said individual and their sheer dedication to Nanotrasen.
obj.item.clothing.accessory.medal.gold.n.name: medal of diplomacy

obj.item.clothing.accessory.medal.gold.o.desc: Awarded for outstanding excellence in paperwork, administration, and bureaucracy.
obj.item.clothing.accessory.medal.gold.o.name: The OrdoM Memorial Medal For Excellence in Paperwork

obj.item.clothing.accessory.medal.med_me.desc: A medal awarded to those who have shown distinguished conduct, performance, and initiative within the medical department.
obj.item.clothing.accessory.medal.med_me.name: exemplary performance medal

obj.item.clothing.accessory.medal.med_me.desc: A medal awarded to those who have shown legendary performance, competence, and initiative beyond all expectations within the medical department.
obj.item.clothing.accessory.medal.med_me.name: excellence in medicine medal

obj.item.clothing.accessory.medal.plasma.desc: An eccentric medal made of plasma.
obj.item.clothing.accessory.medal.plasma.name: plasma medal

obj.item.clothing.accessory.medal.plasma.desc: A plasma medal which represents significant contributions to the field of science or engineering.
obj.item.clothing.accessory.medal.plasma.name: nobel sciences award

obj.item.clothing.accessory.medal.ribbon.desc: An award bestowed only upon those cargotechs who have exhibited devotion to their duty in keeping with the highest traditions of Cargonia.
obj.item.clothing.accessory.medal.ribbon.name: "cargo tech of the shift" award

obj.item.clothing.accessory.medal.silver.desc: Awarded for exemplary managerial services rendered while under contract with Nanotrasen.
obj.item.clothing.accessory.medal.silver.name: Excellence in Bureaucracy Medal

obj.item.clothing.accessory.medal.silver.desc: Often referred to as the "elder atmosian" award, this medal is awarded to the exemplary scientists and technicians who push the boundaries and demonstrate mastery of atmospherics.
obj.item.clothing.accessory.medal.silver.name: atmospheric mastery award

obj.item.clothing.accessory.medal.silver.desc: A silver medal awarded to the outstanding emergency service workers of Nanotrasen, those who work tirelessly together through adversity to keep their crew safe and breathing in the harsh environments of outer space.
obj.item.clothing.accessory.medal.silver.name: emergency services award

obj.item.clothing.accessory.medal.silver.desc: A silver medal awarded to the outstanding emergency service workers of Nanotrasen, those who work tirelessly together through adversity to keep their crew safe and breathing in the harsh environments of outer space.
obj.item.clothing.accessory.medal.silver.name: emergency services award

obj.item.clothing.accessory.medal.silver.desc: A silver medal awarded to the outstanding emergency service workers of Nanotrasen, those who work tirelessly together through adversity to keep their crew safe and breathing in the harsh environments of outer space.
obj.item.clothing.accessory.medal.silver.name: emergency services award

obj.item.clothing.accessory.medal.silver.desc: Nanotrasen's dictionary defines excellence as "the quality or condition of being excellent". This is awarded to those rare crewmembers who fit that definition.
obj.item.clothing.accessory.medal.silver.name: the head of personnel award for outstanding achievement in the field of excellence

obj.item.clothing.accessory.medal.silver.desc: The Sothran Syndicate's dictionary defines excellence as "the ability to crush NT scum under one's boot". 		This is awarded to those rare operatives who fit that definition.
obj.item.clothing.accessory.medal.silver.name: military excellence medal

obj.item.clothing.accessory.medal.silver.desc: An award for distinguished combat and sacrifice in defence of Nanotrasen's commercial interests. Often awarded to security staff.
obj.item.clothing.accessory.medal.silver.name: robust security award

obj.item.clothing.accessory.medal.silver.desc: A silver medal awarded for acts of exceptional valor.
obj.item.clothing.accessory.medal.silver.name: medal of valor

obj.item.clothing.accessory.medal.steele.desc: An intricate pendant given to those who help a key member of the Steele Corporation.
obj.item.clothing.accessory.medal.steele.name: Insignia Of Steele

obj.item.clothing.accessory.mime_fan_pin.desc: A pin to show off your appreciation for mimes and miming!
obj.item.clothing.accessory.mime_fan_pin.name: Mime Pin

obj.item.clothing.accessory.nova.acc_med.desc: A special golden neckpin to show true loyalty to the Federation.
obj.item.clothing.accessory.nova.acc_med.name: GalFed Official neckpin

obj.item.clothing.accessory.pandora_hope.desc: Found at the bottom of Pandora. After all the evil was released, this was the only thing left inside.
obj.item.clothing.accessory.pandora_hope.name: Hope

obj.item.clothing.accessory.pocketprotec.desc: Can protect your clothing from ink stains, but you'll look like a nerd if you're using one.
obj.item.clothing.accessory.pocketprotec.name: pocket protector

obj.item.clothing.accessory.pocketprotec.desc: Can protect your clothing from ink stains, but you'll look like a nerd if you're using one.
obj.item.clothing.accessory.pocketprotec.name: pocket protector

obj.item.clothing.accessory.pocketprotec.desc: Can protect your clothing from ink stains, but you'll look like a nerd if you're using one.
obj.item.clothing.accessory.pocketprotec.name: pocket protector

obj.item.clothing.accessory.pocketwatch.desc: A fancy gold pocket watch, inspired by the popular Uair brand of Carota. Open me, you fool. Open the light and summon me and receive my majesty.
obj.item.clothing.accessory.pocketwatch.name: pocket watch

obj.item.clothing.accessory.press_badge.desc: A blue press badge that clearly identifies the wearer as a member of the media. While it signifies press affiliation, it does not grant any special privileges or rights no matter how much the wearer yells about it.
obj.item.clothing.accessory.press_badge.name: press badge

obj.item.clothing.accessory.pride.desc: A Nanotrasen Diversity & Inclusion Center-sponsored holographic pin to show off your pride, reminding the crew of their unwavering commitment to equity, diversity, and inclusion!
obj.item.clothing.accessory.pride.name: pride pin

obj.item.clothing.accessory.skilt.desc: For the last time. IT'S A KILT not a skirt.
obj.item.clothing.accessory.skilt.name: sinew skirt

obj.item.clothing.accessory.skilt.armour.desc: For the last time. IT'S A KILT not a skirt.
obj.item.clothing.accessory.skilt.armour.name: sinew skirt

obj.item.clothing.accessory.skullcodpiec.desc: A skull shaped ornament, intended to protect the important things in life.
obj.item.clothing.accessory.skullcodpiec.name: skull codpiece

obj.item.clothing.accessory.skullcodpiec.desc: A skull shaped ornament, intended to protect the important things in life.
obj.item.clothing.accessory.skullcodpiec.name: skull codpiece

obj.item.clothing.accessory.spy_bug.desc: An advanced piece of espionage equipment in the shape of a pocket protector. It has a built in 360 degree camera for all your "admirable" needs. Microphone not included.
obj.item.clothing.accessory.spy_bug.name: pocket protector

obj.item.clothing.accessory.talisman.desc: A hunter's talisman, some say the old gods smile on those who wear it.
obj.item.clothing.accessory.talisman.name: bone talisman

obj.item.clothing.accessory.talisman.arm.desc: A hunter's talisman, some say the old gods smile on those who wear it.
obj.item.clothing.accessory.talisman.arm.name: bone talisman

obj.item.clothing.accessory.vest_sheriff.desc: Now you just have to pick your favourite deputy.
obj.item.clothing.accessory.vest_sheriff.name: sheriff vest

obj.item.clothing.ears.earmuffs.desc: Protects your hearing from loud noises, and quiet ones as well.
obj.item.clothing.ears.earmuffs.name: earmuffs

obj.item.clothing.ears.earmuffs.debug.desc: Wearing these sends a chat message for every sound played. Walking to ignore footsteps is highly recommended.
obj.item.clothing.ears.earmuffs.debug.name: debug earmuffs

obj.item.clothing.ears.kinky_headphones.desc: Protect your ears from loud noises. It has a switch on the right hand side.
obj.item.clothing.ears.kinky_headphones.name: kinky headphones

obj.item.clothing.ears.kinky_headphones..desc: Black metalic headphones with a glossy finish. The soft rubber cushions are comftorable and form fitting
obj.item.clothing.ears.kinky_headphones..name: suspiciously glossy headphones

obj.item.clothing.erp_leash.desc: A guiding hand's best friend; in a sleek, semi-elastic package. Can either clip to a collar or be affixed to the neck on its own.
obj.item.clothing.erp_leash.name: leash

obj.item.clothing.glasses.biker.desc: Brown leather riding gear, You can leave, just give us the gas.
obj.item.clothing.glasses.biker.name: biker goggles

obj.item.clothing.glasses.blindfold.kink.desc: Covers the eyes, preventing sight. But it looks so nice...
obj.item.clothing.glasses.blindfold.kink.name: kinky blindfold

obj.item.clothing.glasses.blindfold.whit.desc: Indicates that the wearer suffers from blindness.
obj.item.clothing.glasses.blindfold.whit.name: blind personnel blindfold

obj.item.clothing.glasses.chameleon.desc: Used by engineering and mining staff to see basic structural and terrain layouts through walls, regardless of lighting condition.
obj.item.clothing.glasses.chameleon.name: Optical Meson Scanner

obj.item.clothing.glasses.chameleon.brok.desc: Used by engineering and mining staff to see basic structural and terrain layouts through walls, regardless of lighting condition.
obj.item.clothing.glasses.chameleon.brok.name: Optical Meson Scanner

obj.item.clothing.glasses.clockwork.judi.desc: A purple visor gilt with Ratvarian runes, allowing a user to see, unfettered by others. The cogs on the sides look pretty tight...
obj.item.clothing.glasses.clockwork.judi.name: judicial visor

obj.item.clothing.glasses.clockwork.judi.desc: A purple visor gilt with Ratvarian runes, allowing a user to see, unfettered by others. The cogs on the sides look pretty tight...
obj.item.clothing.glasses.clockwork.judi.name: judicial visor

obj.item.clothing.glasses.clockwork.wrai.desc: Mystical glasses that glow with a bright energy. Some say they can see things that shouldn't be seen.
obj.item.clothing.glasses.clockwork.wrai.name: wraith spectacles

obj.item.clothing.glasses.cold.desc: A pair of goggles meant for low temperatures.
obj.item.clothing.glasses.cold.name: cold goggles

obj.item.clothing.glasses.debug.architec.desc: High-tech glasses with many of special abilites.
obj.item.clothing.glasses.debug.architec.name: Architector glasses

obj.item.clothing.glasses.eyepatch.medic.desc: Used by space weeaboos to pretend their eye isn't there, and crewmembers who actually lost their eye to pretend their eye is there.
obj.item.clothing.glasses.eyepatch.medic.name: medical eyepatch

obj.item.clothing.glasses.eyepatch.medic.desc: Used by space weeaboos to pretend their eye isn't there, and crewmembers who actually lost their eye to pretend their eye is there.
obj.item.clothing.glasses.eyepatch.medic.name: medical eyepatch

obj.item.clothing.glasses.eyepatch.rosec.desc: A customized eyepatch with a bright pink HUD floating in front of it. It looks like there's more to it than just an eyepatch, considering the materials it's made of.
obj.item.clothing.glasses.eyepatch.rosec.name: rose-colored eyepatch

obj.item.clothing.glasses.eyepatch.white.desc: This is what happens when a pirate gets a PhD.
obj.item.clothing.glasses.eyepatch.white.name: white eyepatch

obj.item.clothing.glasses.eyepatch.wrap.desc: A glorified bandage. At least this one's actually made for your head...
obj.item.clothing.glasses.eyepatch.wrap.name: eye wrap

obj.item.clothing.glasses.fake_sunglasse.desc: A cheaper brand of sunglasses rated for much lower UV levels. Offers the user no protection against bright lights.
obj.item.clothing.glasses.fake_sunglasse.name: low-UV sunglasses

obj.item.clothing.glasses.fake_sunglasse.desc: A pair of designer sunglasses. Doesn't seem like it'll block flashes.
obj.item.clothing.glasses.fake_sunglasse.name: aviators

obj.item.clothing.glasses.godeye.desc: A strange eye, said to have been torn from an omniscient creature that used to roam the wastes.
obj.item.clothing.glasses.godeye.name: eye of god

obj.item.clothing.glasses.gold_aviators.desc: A round pair of gold aviator glasses, the lenses having been applied with a gem-like purple tint.
obj.item.clothing.glasses.gold_aviators.name: purple and gold aviators

obj.item.clothing.glasses.heat.desc: A pair of goggles meant for high temperatures.
obj.item.clothing.glasses.heat.name: heat goggles

obj.item.clothing.glasses.hud.desc: A heads-up display that provides important info in (almost) real time.
obj.item.clothing.glasses.hud.name: HUD

obj.item.clothing.glasses.hud.ar.desc: A heads-up display that provides important info in (almost) real time. These don't really seem to work
obj.item.clothing.glasses.hud.ar.name: AR glasses

obj.item.clothing.glasses.hud.ar.aviator.desc: A pair of designer sunglasses with electrochromatic darkening lenses!
obj.item.clothing.glasses.hud.ar.aviator.name: aviators

obj.item.clothing.glasses.hud.ar.aviator.desc: A heads-up display capable of analyzing the integrity and status of robotics and exosuits. This HUD has been fitted inside of a pair of sunglasses.
obj.item.clothing.glasses.hud.ar.aviator.name: diagnostic HUD aviators

obj.item.clothing.glasses.hud.ar.aviator.desc: A heads-up display capable of analyzing the integrity and status of robotics and exosuits. This HUD has been fitted inside of a pair of sunglasses which has lenses that help correct eye sight.
obj.item.clothing.glasses.hud.ar.aviator.name: prescription diagnostic HUD aviators

obj.item.clothing.glasses.hud.ar.aviator.desc: A heads-up display that scans the humanoids in view and provides accurate data about their health status. This HUD has been fitted inside of a pair of sunglasses.
obj.item.clothing.glasses.hud.ar.aviator.name: medical HUD aviators

obj.item.clothing.glasses.hud.ar.aviator.desc: A heads-up display that scans the humanoids in view and provides accurate data about their health status. This HUD has been fitted inside of a pair of sunglasses which has lenses that help correct eye sight.
obj.item.clothing.glasses.hud.ar.aviator.name: prescription medical HUD aviators

obj.item.clothing.glasses.hud.ar.aviator.desc: A heads-up display used by engineering and mining staff to see basic structural and terrain layouts through walls, regardless of lighting conditions. This HUD has been fitted inside of a pair of sunglasses.
obj.item.clothing.glasses.hud.ar.aviator.name: meson HUD aviators

obj.item.clothing.glasses.hud.ar.aviator.desc: A heads-up display used by engineering and mining staff to see basic structural and terrain layouts through walls, regardless of lighting conditions. This HUD has been fitted inside of a pair of sunglasses which has lenses that help correct eye sight.
obj.item.clothing.glasses.hud.ar.aviator.name: prescription meson HUD aviators

obj.item.clothing.glasses.hud.ar.aviator.desc: A pair of tacky purple aviator sunglasses that allow the wearer to recognize various chemical compounds with only a glance.
obj.item.clothing.glasses.hud.ar.aviator.name: science aviators

obj.item.clothing.glasses.hud.ar.aviator.desc: A pair of tacky purple aviator sunglasses that allow the wearer to recognize various chemical compounds with only a glance, which has lenses that help correct eye sight.
obj.item.clothing.glasses.hud.ar.aviator.name: prescription science aviators

obj.item.clothing.glasses.hud.ar.aviator.desc: A heads-up display that scans the humanoids in view and provides accurate data about their ID status and security records. This HUD has been fitted inside of a pair of sunglasses with toggleable electrochromatic tinting.
obj.item.clothing.glasses.hud.ar.aviator.name: security HUD aviators

obj.item.clothing.glasses.hud.ar.aviator.desc: A heads-up display that scans the humanoids in view and provides accurate data about their ID status and security records. This HUD has been fitted inside of a pair of sunglasses with toggleable electrochromatic tinting which. Has lenses that help correct eye sight.
obj.item.clothing.glasses.hud.ar.aviator.name: prescription security HUD aviators

obj.item.clothing.glasses.hud.ar.project.desc: A headset equipped with a scanning lens and mounted retinal projector. It doesn't provide any eye protection, but it's less obtrusive than a visor.
obj.item.clothing.glasses.hud.ar.project.name: retinal projector

obj.item.clothing.glasses.hud.ar.project.desc: A headset equipped with a scanning lens and mounted retinal projector. It doesn't provide any eye protection, but it's less obtrusive than a visor.
obj.item.clothing.glasses.hud.ar.project.name: retinal projector diagnostic HUD

obj.item.clothing.glasses.hud.ar.project.desc: A headset equipped with a scanning lens and mounted retinal projector. It doesn't provide any eye protection, but it's less obtrusive than a visor.
obj.item.clothing.glasses.hud.ar.project.name: retinal projector health HUD

obj.item.clothing.glasses.hud.ar.project.desc: A headset equipped with a scanning lens and mounted retinal projector. It doesn't provide any eye protection, but it's less obtrusive than a visor.
obj.item.clothing.glasses.hud.ar.project.name: retinal projector meson HUD

obj.item.clothing.glasses.hud.ar.project.desc: A headset equipped with a scanning lens and mounted retinal projector. It doesn't provide any eye protection, but it's less obtrusive than a visor.
obj.item.clothing.glasses.hud.ar.project.name: science retinal projector

obj.item.clothing.glasses.hud.ar.project.desc: A headset equipped with a scanning lens and mounted retinal projector. It doesn't provide any eye protection, but it's less obtrusive than a visor.
obj.item.clothing.glasses.hud.ar.project.name: retinal projector security HUD

obj.item.clothing.glasses.hud.civilian.desc: A heads-up display that scans the humanoids around you and displays their ID status. Experts say this has well over 9000 uses.
obj.item.clothing.glasses.hud.civilian.name: Civilian HUD Glasses

obj.item.clothing.glasses.hud.diagnostic.desc: A heads-up display capable of analyzing the integrity and status of robotics and exosuits.
obj.item.clothing.glasses.hud.diagnostic.name: diagnostic HUD

obj.item.clothing.glasses.hud.diagnostic.desc: A robotics diagnostic HUD fitted with a light amplifier.
obj.item.clothing.glasses.hud.diagnostic.name: night vision diagnostic HUD

obj.item.clothing.glasses.hud.diagnostic.desc: A heads-up display capable of analyzing the integrity and status of robotics and exosuits. This one has prescription lenses.
obj.item.clothing.glasses.hud.diagnostic.name: prescription diagnostic HUD

obj.item.clothing.glasses.hud.eyepatch.desc: A simple HUD designed to interface with optical nerves of a lost eye. This one seems busted.
obj.item.clothing.glasses.hud.eyepatch.name: eyepatch HUD

obj.item.clothing.glasses.hud.eyepatch.d.desc: Lost your eyeball to a rogue borg? Dare to tell a Dogborg to do it's job? Got bored? Whatever the reason, this bit of tech will help you still repair borgs, they'll never need it since they usually do it themselves, but its the thought that counts.
obj.item.clothing.glasses.hud.eyepatch.d.name: diagnostic eyepatch HUD

obj.item.clothing.glasses.hud.eyepatch.d.desc: a fake blindfold with a diagnostic HUD inside, excellent for working on androids.
obj.item.clothing.glasses.hud.eyepatch.d.name: diagnostic blindfold HUD

obj.item.clothing.glasses.hud.eyepatch.m.desc: Do no harm, maybe harm has befell to you, or your poor eyeball, thankfully there's a way to continue your oath, thankfully it didn't mention sleepdarts or monkey men.
obj.item.clothing.glasses.hud.eyepatch.m.name: medical eyepatch HUD

obj.item.clothing.glasses.hud.eyepatch.m.desc: a fake blindfold with a medical HUD inside, great for helping keep a poker face when dealing with patients.
obj.item.clothing.glasses.hud.eyepatch.m.name: medical blindfold HUD

obj.item.clothing.glasses.hud.eyepatch.m.desc: For those that only want to go half insane when staring at the supermatter.
obj.item.clothing.glasses.hud.eyepatch.m.name: mesons eyepatch HUD

obj.item.clothing.glasses.hud.eyepatch.m.desc: a fake blindfold with meson lenses inside. Doesn't shield against welding.
obj.item.clothing.glasses.hud.eyepatch.m.name: meson blindfold HUD

obj.item.clothing.glasses.hud.eyepatch.s.desc: Every few years, the aspiring mad scientist says to themselves 'I've got the castle, the evil laugh and equipment, but what I need is a look', thankfully, Dr. Galox has already covered that for you dear friend - while it doesn't do much beyond scan chemicals, what it lacks in use it makes up for in style.
obj.item.clothing.glasses.hud.eyepatch.s.name: science eyepatch HUD

obj.item.clothing.glasses.hud.eyepatch.s.desc: a fake blindfold with a science HUD inside, provides a way to get used to blindfolds before you eventually end up needing the real thing.
obj.item.clothing.glasses.hud.eyepatch.s.name: science blindfold HUD

obj.item.clothing.glasses.hud.eyepatch.s.desc: a fake blindfold with a security HUD inside, helps you look like blind justice. This won't provide the same protection that you'd get from sunglasses.
obj.item.clothing.glasses.hud.eyepatch.s.name: sec blindfold HUD

obj.item.clothing.glasses.hud.gun_permit.desc: A heads-up display that scans humanoids in view, and displays if their current ID possesses a firearms permit or not.
obj.item.clothing.glasses.hud.gun_permit.name: permit HUD

obj.item.clothing.glasses.hud.gun_permit.desc: A pair of sunglasses with a heads-up display that scans humanoids in view, and displays if their current ID possesses a firearms permit or not.
obj.item.clothing.glasses.hud.gun_permit.name: permit HUD sunglasses

obj.item.clothing.glasses.hud.health.desc: A heads-up display that scans the humanoids in view and provides accurate data about their health status.
obj.item.clothing.glasses.hud.health.name: health scanner HUD

obj.item.clothing.glasses.hud.health.nig.desc: An advanced medical heads-up display that allows doctors to find patients in complete darkness.
obj.item.clothing.glasses.hud.health.nig.name: night vision health scanner HUD

obj.item.clothing.glasses.hud.health.nig.desc: May Nar'Sie guide you through the darkness and shield you from the light.
obj.item.clothing.glasses.hud.health.nig.name: zealot's blindfold

obj.item.clothing.glasses.hud.health.nig.desc: Where we are going, we won't need eyes to see.
obj.item.clothing.glasses.hud.health.nig.name: zealot's blindfold

obj.item.clothing.glasses.hud.health.nig.desc: May Nar'Sie guide you through the darkness and shield you from the light.
obj.item.clothing.glasses.hud.health.nig.name: zealot's blindfold
night vision meson health scanner HUD

obj.item.clothing.glasses.hud.health.nig.desc: A clandestine medical science heads-up display that allows operatives to find 		both dying captains and the perfect poison to finish them off, all in complete darkness.
obj.item.clothing.glasses.hud.health.nig.name: night vision medical science scanner HUD

obj.item.clothing.glasses.hud.health.pre.desc: A heads-up display that scans the humanoids in view and provides accurate data about their health status. This one has prescription lenses.
obj.item.clothing.glasses.hud.health.pre.name: prescription health scanner HUD

obj.item.clothing.glasses.hud.health.sur.desc: A pair of goggles worn to protect the eyes from viscera flying off a patient, a wonderful development in medical technology.
obj.item.clothing.glasses.hud.health.sur.name: surgery goggles

obj.item.clothing.glasses.hud.medsechud.desc: A heads-up display that scans the humanoids in view and provides accurate data about their health status, ID status and security records.
obj.item.clothing.glasses.hud.medsechud.name: health scanner security HUD

obj.item.clothing.glasses.hud.medsechud..desc: A heads-up display that scans the humanoids in view and provides accurate data about their health status, ID status and security records.
obj.item.clothing.glasses.hud.medsechud..name: health scanner security HUD sunglasses

obj.item.clothing.glasses.hud.security.desc: A heads-up display that scans the humanoids in view and provides accurate data about their ID status and security records.
obj.item.clothing.glasses.hud.security.name: security HUD

obj.item.clothing.glasses.hud.security.c.desc: A stolen security HUD integrated with Syndicate chameleon technology. Provides flash protection.
obj.item.clothing.glasses.hud.security.c.name: chameleon security HUD

obj.item.clothing.glasses.hud.security.n.desc: An advanced heads-up display that provides ID data and vision in complete darkness.
obj.item.clothing.glasses.hud.security.n.name: night vision security HUD

obj.item.clothing.glasses.hud.security.n.desc: An advanced heads-up display that provides ID data and vision in complete darkness.
obj.item.clothing.glasses.hud.security.n.name: night vision security HUD

obj.item.clothing.glasses.hud.security.p.desc: A heads-up display that scans the humanoids in view and provides accurate data about their ID status and security records. This one has prescription lenses.
obj.item.clothing.glasses.hud.security.p.name: prescription security HUD

obj.item.clothing.glasses.hud.security.r.desc: A heads-up display that scans the humanoids in view and provides accurate data about their ID status and security records.
obj.item.clothing.glasses.hud.security.r.name: security HUD

obj.item.clothing.glasses.hud.security.s.desc: A pair of black sunglasses worn by Naval Command officers.
obj.item.clothing.glasses.hud.security.s.name: black security sunglasses

obj.item.clothing.glasses.hud.security.s.desc: The cooler looking cousin of HUDSunglasses.
obj.item.clothing.glasses.hud.security.s.name: eyepatch HUD

obj.item.clothing.glasses.hud.security.s.desc: The cooler looking cousin of HUDSunglasses.
obj.item.clothing.glasses.hud.security.s.name: eyepatch HUD

obj.item.clothing.glasses.hud.security.s.desc: GIGA GAR glasses with a HUD.
obj.item.clothing.glasses.hud.security.s.name: giga HUD gar glasses

obj.item.clothing.glasses.hud.security.s.desc: GIGA GAR glasses with a security hud implanted in the lens. Reminds you of a time before the color blue.
obj.item.clothing.glasses.hud.security.s.name: red-tinted giga HUD gar glasses

obj.item.clothing.glasses.hud.spacecop.desc: For thinking you look cool while brutalizing protestors and minorities.
obj.item.clothing.glasses.hud.spacecop.name: police aviators

obj.item.clothing.glasses.hud.spacecop.h.desc: These sunglasses are special, and let you view potential criminals.
obj.item.clothing.glasses.hud.spacecop.h.name: sunglasses

obj.item.clothing.glasses.hud.toggle.the.desc: Thermal imaging HUD in the shape of glasses.
obj.item.clothing.glasses.hud.toggle.the.name: thermal HUD scanner

obj.item.clothing.glasses.kim.desc: Stylish round lenses subtly shaded for your protection and criminal discomfort.
obj.item.clothing.glasses.kim.name: binoclard lenses

obj.item.clothing.glasses.material.minin.desc: Used by miners to detect ores deep within the rock.
obj.item.clothing.glasses.material.minin.name: optical material scanner

obj.item.clothing.glasses.material.minin.desc: Do the impossible, see the invisible!
obj.item.clothing.glasses.material.minin.name: gar material scanner

obj.item.clothing.glasses.meson.desc: Used by engineering and mining staff to see basic structural and terrain layouts through walls, regardless of lighting conditions.
obj.item.clothing.glasses.meson.name: optical meson scanner

obj.item.clothing.glasses.meson.engine.desc: Goggles used by engineers. The Meson Scanner mode lets you see basic structural and terrain layouts through walls and the T-ray Scanner mode lets you see underfloor objects such as cables and pipes.
obj.item.clothing.glasses.meson.engine.name: engineering scanner goggles

obj.item.clothing.glasses.meson.engine.a.desc: Used by Nanotrasen admins to detect blueprint areas, pipes, thermal, wiring, and pipes.
obj.item.clothing.glasses.meson.engine.a.name: admin imaging goggles

obj.item.clothing.glasses.meson.engine.a.desc: Goggles used by Atmospheric Technicians to see the thermal energy of gasses in open areas.
obj.item.clothing.glasses.meson.engine.a.name: atmospheric thermal imaging goggles

obj.item.clothing.glasses.meson.engine.p.desc: Goggles used by engineers. The Meson Scanner mode lets you see basic structural and terrain layouts through walls, the T-ray Scanner mode lets you see underfloor objects such as cables and pipes, and the Radiation Scanner mode let's you see objects contaminated by radiation. Each lens has been replaced with a corrective lens.
obj.item.clothing.glasses.meson.engine.p.name: prescription engineering scanner goggles

obj.item.clothing.glasses.meson.engine.s.desc: Used to see the boundaries of shuttle regions.
obj.item.clothing.glasses.meson.engine.s.name: shuttle region scanner

obj.item.clothing.glasses.meson.engine.t.desc: Used by engineering staff to see underfloor objects such as cables and pipes.
obj.item.clothing.glasses.meson.engine.t.name: optical t-ray scanner

obj.item.clothing.glasses.meson.engine.t.desc: Goggles used by engineers. The Meson Scanner mode lets you see basic structural and terrain layouts through walls, the T-ray Scanner mode lets you see underfloor objects such as cables and pipes, and the Radiation Scanner mode let's you see objects contaminated by radiation. This one has a lens that help correct eye sight.
obj.item.clothing.glasses.meson.engine.t.name: prescription optical t-ray scanner

obj.item.clothing.glasses.meson.gar.desc: Do the impossible, see the invisible!
obj.item.clothing.glasses.meson.gar.name: gar mesons

obj.item.clothing.glasses.meson.night.desc: An optical meson scanner fitted with an amplified visible light spectrum overlay, providing greater visual clarity in darkness.
obj.item.clothing.glasses.meson.night.name: night vision meson scanner

obj.item.clothing.glasses.meson.prescrip.desc: Used by engineering and mining staff to see basic structural and terrain layouts through walls, regardless of lighting conditions. This one has prescription lens fitted in.
obj.item.clothing.glasses.meson.prescrip.name: prescription optical meson scanner

obj.item.clothing.glasses.mod.desc: A pair of glasses for a MODsuit.
obj.item.clothing.glasses.mod.name: MOD glasses

obj.item.clothing.glasses.nerve_staple.desc: A horrific looking device that is stapled into your face
obj.item.clothing.glasses.nerve_staple.name: a nerve staple

obj.item.clothing.glasses.nice_goggles.desc: It has an inscription engraved on the handle. Kubic. How strange.
obj.item.clothing.glasses.nice_goggles.name: surprisingly nice looking goggles

obj.item.clothing.glasses.night.desc: You can totally see in the dark now!
obj.item.clothing.glasses.night.name: night vision goggles

obj.item.clothing.glasses.nightmare_visi.desc: They give off a putrid stench. Seemingly no effect on anything.
obj.item.clothing.glasses.nightmare_visi.name: nightmare vision goggles

obj.item.clothing.glasses.orange.desc: A sweet pair of orange shades.
obj.item.clothing.glasses.orange.name: orange glasses

obj.item.clothing.glasses.osi.desc: There's no such thing as good news! Just bad news and... weird news..
obj.item.clothing.glasses.osi.name: O.S.I. Sunglasses

obj.item.clothing.glasses.overwatch.desc: A set of incredibly advanced sunglasses, providing you with an array of different sensor scans and visual readouts for pretty much anything you look at. 		It's kind of overwhelming, actually. Wearing this for a few hours will probably give you a migrane.
obj.item.clothing.glasses.overwatch.name: intelligence glasses

obj.item.clothing.glasses.prism_glasses.desc: The lenses seem to glow slightly, and reflect light into dazzling colors.
obj.item.clothing.glasses.prism_glasses.name: prism glasses

obj.item.clothing.glasses.regular.better.desc: After Nerd. Co went bankrupt for tax evasion and invasion, they were bought out by Dork.Co, who revamped their classic design.
obj.item.clothing.glasses.regular.better.name: modern glasses

obj.item.clothing.glasses.regular.circle.desc: Why would you wear something so controversial yet so brave?
obj.item.clothing.glasses.regular.circle.name: circle glasses

obj.item.clothing.glasses.regular.hipste.desc: Prescription glasses developed by the nerds at Nanotrasen. For some reason, these glasses give the wearer military-tier weapons training regardless of their background.
obj.item.clothing.glasses.regular.hipste.name: ultra nerd glasses

obj.item.clothing.glasses.regular.kim.desc: Shows you know how to sew a lapel and center a back vent.
obj.item.clothing.glasses.regular.kim.name: binoclard lenses

obj.item.clothing.glasses.regular.thin.desc: More expensive, more fragile and much less practical, but oh so fashionable.
obj.item.clothing.glasses.regular.thin.name: thin prescription glasses

obj.item.clothing.glasses.rosecolored.desc: Goggle-shaped glasses that seem to have a HUD-like feed in some odd line-based script. It doesn’t look like they were made by NT.
obj.item.clothing.glasses.rosecolored.name: rose-colored glasses

obj.item.clothing.glasses.salesman.desc: A pair of glasses with uniquely colored lenses. The frame is inscribed with 'Best Salesman 1997'.
obj.item.clothing.glasses.salesman.name: colored glasses

obj.item.clothing.glasses.science.desc: A pair of snazzy goggles used to protect against chemical spills. Fitted with an analyzer for scanning items and reagents.
obj.item.clothing.glasses.science.name: science goggles

obj.item.clothing.glasses.science.night.desc: Lets the user see in the dark and recognize chemical compounds at a glance.
obj.item.clothing.glasses.science.night.name: night vision science goggles

obj.item.clothing.glasses.science.prescr.desc: These glasses scan the contents of containers and projects their contents to the user in an easy to read format. This one has prescription lenses.
obj.item.clothing.glasses.science.prescr.name: prescription science glasses

obj.item.clothing.glasses.sunglasses.desc: Strangely ancient technology used to help provide rudimentary eye cover. Enhanced shielding blocks flashes.
obj.item.clothing.glasses.sunglasses.name: sunglasses

obj.item.clothing.glasses.sunglasses.big.desc: Strangely ancient technology used to help provide rudimentary eye cover. Larger than average enhanced shielding blocks flashes.
obj.item.clothing.glasses.sunglasses.big.name: sunglasses

obj.item.clothing.glasses.sunglasses.che.desc: Cheap plastic eye lenses to protect you from harsh sunlight. These flimsy ones won't help against flashes.
obj.item.clothing.glasses.sunglasses.che.name: cheap sunglasses

obj.item.clothing.glasses.sunglasses.che.desc: A pair of tacky purple sunglasses that allow the wearer to recognize various chemical compounds with only a glance.
obj.item.clothing.glasses.sunglasses.che.name: science glasses

obj.item.clothing.glasses.sunglasses.gar.desc: Go beyond impossible and kick reason to the curb!
obj.item.clothing.glasses.sunglasses.gar.name: black gar glasses

obj.item.clothing.glasses.sunglasses.gar.desc: We evolve past the person we were a minute before. Little by little we advance with each turn. That's how a drill works!
obj.item.clothing.glasses.sunglasses.gar.name: giga gar glasses

obj.item.clothing.glasses.sunglasses.gar.desc: Just who the hell do you think I am?!
obj.item.clothing.glasses.sunglasses.gar.name: gar glasses

obj.item.clothing.glasses.sunglasses.noi.desc: A pair of sleek, futuristic glasses that allow the wearer to see the world in a different light.
obj.item.clothing.glasses.sunglasses.noi.name: noir glasses

obj.item.clothing.glasses.sunglasses.ova.desc: Vintage wrap around sunglasses. Provides a little protection.
obj.item.clothing.glasses.sunglasses.ova.name: oval sunglasses

obj.item.clothing.glasses.sunglasses.rea.desc: A pair of sunglasses outfitted with apparatus to scan reagents, as well as providing an innate understanding of liquid viscosity while in motion.
obj.item.clothing.glasses.sunglasses.rea.name: beer goggles

obj.item.clothing.glasses.sunglasses.rob.desc: Strangely ancient technology used to help provide rudimentary eye cover. Enhanced shielding blocks flashes. These ones seem to be bulletproof?
obj.item.clothing.glasses.sunglasses.rob.name: badass sunglasses

obj.item.clothing.glasses.sunglasses.spy.desc: Made by Nerd. Co's infiltration and surveillance department. Upon closer inspection, there's a small screen in each lens.
obj.item.clothing.glasses.sunglasses.spy.name: sunglasses

obj.item.clothing.glasses.thermal.desc: Thermals in the shape of glasses.
obj.item.clothing.glasses.thermal.name: optical thermal scanner

obj.item.clothing.glasses.thermal.eyepat.desc: An eyepatch with built-in thermal optics.
obj.item.clothing.glasses.thermal.eyepat.name: optical thermal eyepatch

obj.item.clothing.glasses.thermal.monocl.desc: Never before has seeing through walls felt so gentlepersonly.
obj.item.clothing.glasses.thermal.monocl.name: thermoncle

obj.item.clothing.glasses.thermal.syndi.desc: A pair of thermal optic goggles with an onboard chameleon generator.
obj.item.clothing.glasses.thermal.syndi.name: chameleon thermals

obj.item.clothing.glasses.thermal.xray.desc: A pair of xray goggles manufactured by the Syndicate.
obj.item.clothing.glasses.thermal.xray.name: syndicate xray goggles

obj.item.clothing.glasses.thin.desc: Often seen staring down at someone taking a book.
obj.item.clothing.glasses.thin.name: thin glasses

obj.item.clothing.glasses.trickblindfold.desc: A see-through blindfold perfect for cheating at games like pin the stun baton on the clown.
obj.item.clothing.glasses.trickblindfold.name: blindfold

obj.item.clothing.glasses.trickblindfold.desc: Perfect for stealing hamburgers from innocent multinational capitalist monopolies.
obj.item.clothing.glasses.trickblindfold.name: thief visor

obj.item.clothing.glasses.trickblindfold.desc: A blindfold made from black silk, it feels nice to the touch.
obj.item.clothing.glasses.trickblindfold.name: silk blindfold

obj.item.clothing.glasses.trickblindfold.desc: An ornate fake blindfold, devoid of any electronics. It's belived to be originally worn by members of bygone military force that sought to protect humanity.
obj.item.clothing.glasses.trickblindfold.name: obsolete fake blindfold

obj.item.clothing.glasses.trickblindfold.desc: A restored version of the obsolete fake blindfold, retrofitted with the proper electronics to work as a NIF HUD.
obj.item.clothing.glasses.trickblindfold.name: modernized fake blindfold

obj.item.clothing.glasses.welding.desc: Protects the eyes from bright flashes; approved by the mad scientist association.
obj.item.clothing.glasses.welding.name: welding goggles

obj.item.clothing.glasses.welding.steamp.desc: This really feels like something you'd expect to see sitting on top of a certain ginger's head... They have a rather fancy brass trim around the lenses.
obj.item.clothing.glasses.welding.steamp.name: steampunk goggles

obj.item.clothing.gloves.atmos.desc: Heavy duty gloves for firefighters. These are thick, non-flammable and let you carry people faster.
obj.item.clothing.gloves.atmos.name: atmospheric extrication gloves

obj.item.clothing.gloves.ball_mittens.desc: A pair of inflatable latex mittens. Adorable and comfortable, but completely useless for anything requiring fingers. Getting these off yourself is a serious ordeal — you'll probably want help.
obj.item.clothing.gloves.ball_mittens.name: ball mittens

obj.item.clothing.gloves.ball_mittens.lo.desc: A pair of inflatable latex mittens shaped like rounded paws. Helpless AND humiliating.
obj.item.clothing.gloves.ball_mittens.lo.name: latex paw mittens

obj.item.clothing.gloves.botanic_leather.desc: These leather gloves protect against thorns, barbs, prickles, spikes and other harmful objects of floral origin.  They're also quite warm.
obj.item.clothing.gloves.botanic_leather.name: botanist's leather gloves

obj.item.clothing.gloves.boxing.desc: Because you really needed another excuse to punch your crewmates.
obj.item.clothing.gloves.boxing.name: boxing gloves

obj.item.clothing.gloves.boxing.blue.desc: Because you really needed another excuse to punch your crewmates.
obj.item.clothing.gloves.boxing.blue.name: boxing gloves

obj.item.clothing.gloves.boxing.evil.desc: These strange gloves radiate an unusually evil aura.
obj.item.clothing.gloves.boxing.evil.name: evil boxing gloves

obj.item.clothing.gloves.boxing.golden.desc: The reigning champ of the station!
obj.item.clothing.gloves.boxing.golden.name: golden gloves

obj.item.clothing.gloves.boxing.green.desc: Because you really needed another excuse to punch your crewmates.
obj.item.clothing.gloves.boxing.green.name: boxing gloves

obj.item.clothing.gloves.boxing.yellow.desc: Because you really needed another excuse to punch your crewmates.
obj.item.clothing.gloves.boxing.yellow.name: boxing gloves

obj.item.clothing.gloves.bracer.desc: For when you're expecting to get slapped on the wrist. Offers modest protection to your arms.
obj.item.clothing.gloves.bracer.name: bone bracers

obj.item.clothing.gloves.bracer.wraps.desc: Cloth bracers, the colour all left up to the choice of the wearer.
obj.item.clothing.gloves.bracer.wraps.name: cloth arm wraps

obj.item.clothing.gloves.bubber.boss.desc: We're both slowly being eaten away by the karma of others. We'll never have the chance to die peacefully of old age. We have no tomorrow. But we can still have hope for the future.
obj.item.clothing.gloves.bubber.boss.name: mercury woman's gloves

obj.item.clothing.gloves.bubber.clussy.desc: Clown regulations require a professional to operate their horn with the proper PPE (Party Protection Equipment).
obj.item.clothing.gloves.bubber.clussy.name: pink clown gloves

obj.item.clothing.gloves.butchering.desc: These gloves allow the user to rip apart bodies with precision and ease.
obj.item.clothing.gloves.butchering.name: butchering gloves

obj.item.clothing.gloves.captain.desc: Regal blue gloves, with a nice gold trim, a diamond anti-shock coating, and an integrated thermal barrier. Swanky.
obj.item.clothing.gloves.captain.name: captain's gloves

obj.item.clothing.gloves.captain.centcom.desc: Exotic green gloves, with a nice gold trim, a emerald anti-shock coating, and an integrated thermal barrier. Swanky. Given to CentCom Commanders.

obj.item.clothing.gloves.captain.pilot.desc: Regal blue gloves, with a nice silver trim, a diamond anti-shock coating, and an integrated thermal barrier.

obj.item.clothing.gloves.color.yellow.he.desc: A cheaper make of the standard insulated gloves, using internal ceramic lining to make up for the sub-par rubber material. The extra weight makes them more bulky to use.
obj.item.clothing.gloves.color.yellow.he.name: ceramic-lined insulated gloves

obj.item.clothing.gloves.color.yellow.sp.desc: How're you gonna get 'em off, nerd?
obj.item.clothing.gloves.color.yellow.sp.name: spray-on insulated gloves

obj.item.clothing.gloves.combat.desc: These tactical gloves are fireproof and electrically insulated.
obj.item.clothing.gloves.combat.name: combat gloves

obj.item.clothing.gloves.combat.boss.desc: We're both slowly being eaten away by the karma of others. We'll never have the chance to die peacefully of old age. We have no tomorrow. But we can still have hope for the future.
obj.item.clothing.gloves.combat.boss.name: patriot's gloves

obj.item.clothing.gloves.combat.floortil.desc: Is it just me or is there a pair of gloves on the floor?
obj.item.clothing.gloves.combat.floortil.name: floortile camouflage gloves

obj.item.clothing.gloves.combat.maid.desc: These 'tactical' gloves and sleeves are fireproof and electrically insulated. Warm to boot.
obj.item.clothing.gloves.combat.maid.name: combat maid sleeves

obj.item.clothing.gloves.combat.maid.arm.desc: These 'tactical' gloves and sleeves are fireproof and electrically insulated. Warm to boot.
obj.item.clothing.gloves.combat.maid.arm.name: combat maid sleeves

obj.item.clothing.gloves.combat.naval.desc: A high quality pair of thick gloves covered in gold stitching, given to Nanotrasen's Naval Commanders.
obj.item.clothing.gloves.combat.naval.name: nanotrasen naval gloves

obj.item.clothing.gloves.combat.naval.fl.desc: A high quality pair of thick gloves covered in gold stitching, given to Nanotrasen's Naval Commanders.
obj.item.clothing.gloves.combat.naval.fl.name: fleet admiral's gloves

obj.item.clothing.gloves.combat.naval.na.desc: A high quality pair of thick gloves covered in gold stitching.
obj.item.clothing.gloves.combat.naval.na.name: CentCom gloves

obj.item.clothing.gloves.combat.white.desc: These tactical gloves are fireproof and electrically insulated.
obj.item.clothing.gloves.combat.white.name: combat gloves

obj.item.clothing.gloves.combat.wizard.desc: These gloves have been enchanted with a spell that makes them electrically insulated and fireproof.
obj.item.clothing.gloves.combat.wizard.name: enchanted gloves

obj.item.clothing.gloves.cut.desc: These gloves would protect the wearer from electric shock... if the fingers were covered.
obj.item.clothing.gloves.cut.name: fingerless insulated gloves

obj.item.clothing.gloves.cut.heirloom.desc: The old gloves your great grandfather stole from Engineering, many moons ago. They've seen some tough times recently.
obj.item.clothing.gloves.cut.heirloom.name: fingerless insulated gloves

obj.item.clothing.gloves.divine_archer.desc: Bracers, a wise choice for archers who do not want their outfit to get in the way of drawing and firing their weapon.
obj.item.clothing.gloves.divine_archer.name: divine archer bracers

obj.item.clothing.gloves.elofy.desc: These gloves are a near perfect replica of those worn by Admiral Yi Sun-Sin, main character from "Heroes of the Galactic Conflict", 		an animated war drama set between the Free Planetary Trade Union and the Second Galactic Empire. 		It proved to be a sensational piece among those who appreciate animated cartoons and period war dramas, 		but hasn't had much spread outside of the Terran Government.
obj.item.clothing.gloves.elofy.name: anime admiral gloves

obj.item.clothing.gloves.evening.desc: Thin, pretty gloves intended for use in regal feminine attire, but knowing Space China these are just for some maid fetish.
obj.item.clothing.gloves.evening.name: evening gloves

obj.item.clothing.gloves.evening.lace.desc: A pair of lace gloves, the delicate fabric trails down to cover just the top of your hand.
obj.item.clothing.gloves.evening.lace.name: lace gloves

obj.item.clothing.gloves.fingerless.desc: Plain black gloves without fingertips for the hard-working.
obj.item.clothing.gloves.fingerless.name: fingerless gloves

obj.item.clothing.gloves.fingerless.blut.desc: The one who wears these had everything and yet lost it all...
obj.item.clothing.gloves.fingerless.blut.name: Blutigen wraps

obj.item.clothing.gloves.fingerless.prim.desc: Simple cloth to wrap around one's arms.
obj.item.clothing.gloves.fingerless.prim.name: arm wraps

obj.item.clothing.gloves.fingerless.prim.desc: Simple cloth arm wraps with overlying metal protection.
obj.item.clothing.gloves.fingerless.prim.name: gauntlets

obj.item.clothing.gloves.fingerless.punc.desc: Fingerless gloves with nasty spikes attached. Allows the wearer to utilize the ill-reputed fighting technique known as Hunter Boxing. The style 		allows the user to rapidly punch wildlife into smithereens. Great workout. Extremely ill-advised for ensuring your own personal survival.
obj.item.clothing.gloves.fingerless.punc.name: punching mitts

obj.item.clothing.gloves.fishing.desc: A pair of gloves to fish without a fishing rod but your raw athletics strength. It doubles as a good workout device. WARNING: May cause injuries when catching bigger fish.
obj.item.clothing.gloves.fishing.name: athletic fishing gloves

obj.item.clothing.gloves.forging_plate_g.desc: A set of leather gloves with protective armor plates connected to the wrists.
obj.item.clothing.gloves.forging_plate_g.name: reagent plate gloves

obj.item.clothing.gloves.frontier_coloni.desc: A sturdy pair of black gloves that'll keep your precious fingers protected from the outside world. 		They go a bit higher up the arm than most gloves should, and you aren't quite sure why.
obj.item.clothing.gloves.frontier_coloni.name: frontier gloves

obj.item.clothing.gloves.frontier_coloni.desc: A sturdy pair of black gloves that'll keep your precious fingers protected from the outside world. 		They go a bit higher up the arm than most gloves should, and you aren't quite sure why.
obj.item.clothing.gloves.frontier_coloni.name: frontier gloves

obj.item.clothing.gloves.kaza_ruk.combat.desc: These tactical gloves are fireproof and electrically insulated. These gloves seem to guide you through a non-lizardperson friendly variant of the Tiziran martial art, Kaza Ruk.
obj.item.clothing.gloves.kaza_ruk.combat.name: combat gloves plus

obj.item.clothing.gloves.kaza_ruk.combat.desc: A set of combat gloves plus emblazoned with red knuckles, showing dedication to the trade while also hiding any blood left after use.
obj.item.clothing.gloves.kaza_ruk.combat.name: master at arms' combat gloves

obj.item.clothing.gloves.kaza_ruk.sec.desc: These gloves seem to guide you through a non-lizardperson friendly variant of the Tiziran martial art, Kaza Ruk. 		You're not entirely sure how they do that. Probably nanites.
obj.item.clothing.gloves.kaza_ruk.sec.name: kaza ruk gloves

obj.item.clothing.gloves.kim.desc: Breathable red gloves for expert handling of a pen and notebook.
obj.item.clothing.gloves.kim.name: aerostatic gloves

obj.item.clothing.gloves.latex.desc: Cheap sterile gloves made from latex. Provides quicker carrying from a good grip.
obj.item.clothing.gloves.latex.name: latex gloves

obj.item.clothing.gloves.latex.allameric.desc: A sterile pair of gloves for preparing food without the risk of contamination! The old fashion american style.
obj.item.clothing.gloves.latex.allameric.name: all-american diner latex gloves

obj.item.clothing.gloves.latex.coroner.desc: Black gloves made from latex with a superhydrophobic coating. Useful for picking bodies up instead of dragging blood behind.
obj.item.clothing.gloves.latex.coroner.name: coroner's gloves

obj.item.clothing.gloves.latex.nitrile.desc: Pricy sterile gloves that are thicker than latex. Excellent grip ensures very fast carrying of patients along with the faster use time of various chemical related items.
obj.item.clothing.gloves.latex.nitrile.name: nitrile gloves

obj.item.clothing.gloves.latex.nitrile.e.desc: Pricy sterile gloves that are thicker than latex. Excellent grip ensures very fast carrying of patients along with the faster use time of various chemical related items.
obj.item.clothing.gloves.latex.nitrile.e.name: expeditionary corps medic gloves

obj.item.clothing.gloves.latex.nitrile.h.desc: Pricy sterile gloves that are thicker than latex. Perfect for hiding fingerprints.
obj.item.clothing.gloves.latex.nitrile.h.name: nitrile gloves

obj.item.clothing.gloves.latex.nitrile.l.desc: Pricy somewhat sterile gloves that are thicker than latex, these ones extend almost past the elbow. Excellent grip ensures very fast carrying of patients along with the faster use time of various chemical related items.
obj.item.clothing.gloves.latex.nitrile.l.name: long rubber medical gloves

obj.item.clothing.gloves.latex.nitrile.n.desc: A pair of nitrile-alternative gloves used by Trauma Team specialists, sealable to protect from pressure and with a unique (and expensive) acid-repellent coating to prevent damage handling chemical hazards. Wont protect the rest of your body, though.
obj.item.clothing.gloves.latex.nitrile.n.name: trauma specialist gloves

obj.item.clothing.gloves.latex_gloves.desc: Awesome looking gloves that are satisfying to the touch.
obj.item.clothing.gloves.latex_gloves.name: latex gloves

obj.item.clothing.gloves.longrubberglove.desc: Not as rewarding as the hurting, sadly.
obj.item.clothing.gloves.longrubberglove.name: long rubber gloves

obj.item.clothing.gloves.military.desc: Tactical gloves made for military personnel, they are thin to allow easy operation of most firearms.
obj.item.clothing.gloves.military.name: military gloves

obj.item.clothing.gloves.military.ashwal.desc: Some sort of thin material with the backing of bronze plates.
obj.item.clothing.gloves.military.ashwal.name: ash coated bronze gloves

obj.item.clothing.gloves.military.claw.desc: A gauntlet fashioned from the hand of a long-dead creature. Judging by the claws, whoever brought the beast down must have had a hard fight.
obj.item.clothing.gloves.military.claw.name: tribal claw glove

obj.item.clothing.gloves.misc.diver.desc: An old pair of gloves used by a now-defunct mining coalition.
obj.item.clothing.gloves.misc.diver.name: black divers gloves

obj.item.clothing.gloves.mod.desc: A pair of gauntlets for a MODsuit.
obj.item.clothing.gloves.mod.name: MOD gauntlets

obj.item.clothing.gloves.netra.desc: Some black gloves with silver reinforcements, made of a shiny synthetic material.
obj.item.clothing.gloves.netra.name: black and silver gloves

obj.item.clothing.gloves.plate.desc: They're like gloves, but made of metal.
obj.item.clothing.gloves.plate.name: plate gauntlets

obj.item.clothing.gloves.plate.blue.desc: They're like gloves, but made of metal.
obj.item.clothing.gloves.plate.blue.name: plate gauntlets

obj.item.clothing.gloves.plate.larp.desc: They're like gloves, but made of metal. Better not touch any live wires!
obj.item.clothing.gloves.plate.larp.name: plate gauntlets

obj.item.clothing.gloves.plate.larp.blue.desc: They're like gloves, but made of metal. Better not touch any live wires!
obj.item.clothing.gloves.plate.larp.blue.name: plate gauntlets

obj.item.clothing.gloves.plate.larp.red.desc: They're like gloves, but made of metal. Better not touch any live wires!
obj.item.clothing.gloves.plate.larp.red.name: plate gauntlets

obj.item.clothing.gloves.plate.red.desc: They're like gloves, but made of metal.
obj.item.clothing.gloves.plate.red.name: plate gauntlets

obj.item.clothing.gloves.race.desc: Extremely finely made gloves meant for use by sportsmen in speed-shooting competitions.
obj.item.clothing.gloves.race.name: race gloves

obj.item.clothing.gloves.radio.desc: A pair of electronic gloves which connect to nearby radios wirelessly. Allows for sign language users to 'speak' over comms.
obj.item.clothing.gloves.radio.name: translation gloves

obj.item.clothing.gloves.rapid.desc: Just looking at these fills you with an urge to beat the shit out of people.
obj.item.clothing.gloves.rapid.name: Gloves of the North Star

obj.item.clothing.gloves.ring.desc: A tiny gold ring, sized to wrap around a finger.
obj.item.clothing.gloves.ring.name: gold ring

obj.item.clothing.gloves.ring.diamond.desc: An expensive ring, studded with a diamond. Cultures have used these rings in courtship for a millenia.
obj.item.clothing.gloves.ring.diamond.name: diamond ring

obj.item.clothing.gloves.ring.hypno.desc: A tiny gold ring, sized to wrap around a finger.
obj.item.clothing.gloves.ring.hypno.name: gold ring

obj.item.clothing.gloves.ring.hypno.bipp.desc: A silver bolt component that once belonged to a very peculiar IPC. It's large enough to be worn as a ring on nearly any finger, and is said to amplify the voice of one's mind to another's in the softness of a Whisper...
obj.item.clothing.gloves.ring.hypno.bipp.name: hypnobot hexnut

obj.item.clothing.gloves.ring.hypno.coff.desc: A pallid, softly desaturated-looking gold ring that doesn't look like it belongs. It's hard to put one's finger on why it feels at odds with the world around it - the shine coming off it looks like it could be a mismatch with the lighting in the room, or it could be that it seems to glint and twinkle occasionally when there's no obvious reason for it to - though only when you're not really looking.
obj.item.clothing.gloves.ring.hypno.coff.name: hypnodemon's ring

obj.item.clothing.gloves.ring.hypno.shar.desc: This ring oozes with an assertive edge as sharp light bends along the smooth, black bronze. Like the finger that wears it, an exceptional amount of polish repels nearly all the light that glances along its surface. If you look closer, a slight golden hue indicates the precious metals inside the alloy.
obj.item.clothing.gloves.ring.hypno.shar.name: suspiciously glossy ring

obj.item.clothing.gloves.ring.reagent_cl.desc: A tiny ring, sized to wrap around a finger.
obj.item.clothing.gloves.ring.reagent_cl.name: reagent ring

obj.item.clothing.gloves.ring.silver.desc: A tiny silver ring, sized to wrap around a finger.
obj.item.clothing.gloves.ring.silver.name: silver ring

obj.item.clothing.gloves.skyy.desc: Valuing form over function, these gloves barely cover more than the palm of your hand.
obj.item.clothing.gloves.skyy.name: charcoal fingerless gloves

obj.item.clothing.gloves.tackler.desc: Special gloves that manipulate the blood vessels in the wearer's hands, granting them the ability to launch headfirst into walls and tackle fleeing criminals in a single bound.
obj.item.clothing.gloves.tackler.name: enhanced retrieval gloves

obj.item.clothing.gloves.tackler.combat.desc: Premium quality combative gloves, heavily reinforced to give the user an edge in close combat tackles, though they are more taxing to use than normal gripper gloves. Fireproof to boot!
obj.item.clothing.gloves.tackler.combat.name: gorilla gloves

obj.item.clothing.gloves.tackler.combat..desc: Superior quality combative gloves, good for performing tackle takedowns as well as absorbing electrical shocks.
obj.item.clothing.gloves.tackler.combat..name: guerrilla gloves

obj.item.clothing.gloves.tackler.combat..desc: These tactical gloves appear to be unique, made out of double woven durathread fibers which make it fireproof as well as acid resistant
obj.item.clothing.gloves.tackler.combat..name: combat gloves

obj.item.clothing.gloves.tackler.dolphin.desc: Sleek, aerodynamic gripper gloves that are less effective at actually performing takedowns, but more effective at letting the user sail through the hallways and cause accidents.
obj.item.clothing.gloves.tackler.dolphin.name: dolphin gloves

obj.item.clothing.gloves.tackler.footbal.desc: Gloves for football players! Teaches them how to tackle like a pro.
obj.item.clothing.gloves.tackler.footbal.name: football gloves

obj.item.clothing.gloves.tackler.offbran.desc: Ratty looking fingerless gloves wrapped with sticky tape. Beware anyone wearing these, for they clearly have no shame and nothing to lose.
obj.item.clothing.gloves.tackler.offbran.name: improvised gripper gloves

obj.item.clothing.gloves.tackler.rocket.desc: The ultimate in high risk, high reward, perfect for when you need to stop a criminal from fifty feet away or die trying. Banned in most Spinward gridiron football and rugby leagues.
obj.item.clothing.gloves.tackler.rocket.name: rocket gloves

obj.item.clothing.gloves.tackler.securit.desc: Special gloves that manipulate the blood vessels in the wearer's hands, granting them the ability to launch headfirst into walls and tackle fleeing criminals in a single bound.
obj.item.clothing.gloves.tackler.securit.name: enhanced retrieval gloves

obj.item.clothing.gloves.the_sleeping_ca.desc: These gloves are capable of making people use The Sleeping Carp.
obj.item.clothing.gloves.the_sleeping_ca.name: carp gloves

obj.item.clothing.gloves.tinkerer.desc: Overdesigned engineering gloves that have automated construction subroutines dialed in, allowing for faster construction while worn.
obj.item.clothing.gloves.tinkerer.name: tinker's gloves

obj.item.clothing.head.anubite.desc: A dark coloured headpiece with golden accents. Its features seem reminiscent of the god Anubis.
obj.item.clothing.head.anubite.name: Anubite headpiece

obj.item.clothing.head.ash_headdress.desc: A headdress that shows the dominance of the walkers of ash.
obj.item.clothing.head.ash_headdress.name: ash headdress

obj.item.clothing.head.ash_headdress.win.desc: A headdress that shows the dominance of the walkers of ash.
obj.item.clothing.head.ash_headdress.win.name: winged ash headdress

obj.item.clothing.head.avipilot.desc: Shockingly, despite space winds, and the lack of any practicality, this pilot cap seems to be fairly well standing, there's a rabbit head seemingly stamped into the side of it.
obj.item.clothing.head.avipilot.name: smuggler's flying cap

obj.item.clothing.head.back_bow.desc: A large bow that you can place on the back of your head.
