obj.item.clothing.head.beret.blueshield.desc: A blue beret made of durathread with a genuine golden badge, denoting its owner as a Blueshield Lieuteneant. It seems to be padded with nano-kevlar, making it tougher than standard reinforced berets.
obj.item.clothing.head.beret.blueshield.name: blueshield's beret

obj.item.clothing.head.beret.blueshield..desc: A navy-blue beret made of durathread with a silver badge, denoting its owner as a Blueshield Lieuteneant. It seems to be padded with nano-kevlar, making it tougher than standard reinforced berets.
obj.item.clothing.head.beret.blueshield..name: navy blueshield's beret

obj.item.clothing.head.beret.cargo.desc: No need to compensate when you can wear this beret!
obj.item.clothing.head.beret.cargo.name: cargo beret

obj.item.clothing.head.beret.cargo.qm.desc: A beret that helps the QM keep telling themselves that they're an official head of staff.
obj.item.clothing.head.beret.cargo.qm.name: quartermaster's beret

obj.item.clothing.head.beret.cargo.qm.al.desc: A beret that helps the QM keep telling themselves that they're an official head of staff. This one is made out of white fabric. Fancy
obj.item.clothing.head.beret.cargo.qm.al.name: quartermaster's beret

obj.item.clothing.head.beret.centcom_for.desc: Sometimes, a compromise between fashion and defense needs to be made. Thanks to Nanotrasen's most recent nano-fabric durability enhancements, this time, it's not the case.
obj.item.clothing.head.beret.centcom_for.name: CentCom Formal Beret

obj.item.clothing.head.beret.centcom_for.desc: Sometimes, a compromise between fashion and defense needs to be made. Thanks to Nanotrasen's most recent nano-fabric durability enhancements, this time, it's not the case.
obj.item.clothing.head.beret.centcom_for.name: CentCom Formal Beret

obj.item.clothing.head.beret.clown.desc: A tactical berret to be used during the enacting of the most dangerous of pranks.
obj.item.clothing.head.beret.clown.name: H.O.N.K tactical beret

obj.item.clothing.head.beret.clown.rainb.desc: You see, when a Mime loves a Clown very much...
obj.item.clothing.head.beret.clown.rainb.name: rainbow beret

obj.item.clothing.head.beret.durathread.desc: A beret made from durathread, its resilient fibers provide some protection to the wearer.

obj.item.clothing.head.beret.medical.desc: A medical-flavored beret for the doctor in you!

obj.item.clothing.head.beret.medical.cmo.name: chief medical officer beret

obj.item.clothing.head.beret.medical.vir.desc: Sneezing in this expensive beret would be a waste of a good beret.

obj.item.clothing.head.collectable.wizar.desc: NOTE: Any magical powers gained from wearing this hat are purely coincidental.

obj.item.clothing.head.costume.bubber.je.desc: It's my money, it's my game, Kill Jester.

obj.item.clothing.head.costume.paper_hat.desc: A flimsy hat made of paper.
obj.item.clothing.head.costume.paper_hat.name: paper hat

obj.item.clothing.head.costume.paper_hat.desc: An ancient hat made of paper. "Savior of the Universe" is spelled out on the rim in orange marker.
obj.item.clothing.head.costume.paper_hat.name: ancient paper hat

obj.item.clothing.head.costume.papersack.desc: A paper sack with crude holes cut out for eyes. Useful for hiding one's identity or ugliness.
obj.item.clothing.head.costume.papersack.name: paper sack hat

obj.item.clothing.head.costume.papersack.desc: A paper sack with crude holes cut out for eyes and a sketchy smile drawn on the front. Not creepy at all.
obj.item.clothing.head.costume.papersack.name: paper sack hat

obj.item.clothing.head.costume.party.desc: A crappy paper hat that you are REQUIRED to wear.
obj.item.clothing.head.costume.party.name: party hat

obj.item.clothing.head.costume.party.fes.desc: A crappy paper hat that you are REQUIRED to wear.
obj.item.clothing.head.costume.party.fes.name: festive paper hat

obj.item.clothing.head.costume.rabbitear.desc: Wearing these makes you look useless, and only good for your sex appeal.
obj.item.clothing.head.costume.rabbitear.name: rabbit ears

obj.item.clothing.head.costume.rice_hat.desc: Welcome to the rice fields, motherfucker.
obj.item.clothing.head.costume.rice_hat.name: rice hat

obj.item.clothing.head.costume.santa.desc: On the first day of christmas my employer gave to me!
obj.item.clothing.head.costume.santa.name: santa hat

obj.item.clothing.head.costume.santa.gag.desc: On the first day of christmas my employer gave to me!
obj.item.clothing.head.costume.santa.gag.name: santa hat

obj.item.clothing.head.costume.skyrat.pa.desc: A big wooly clump of fur designed to go on your head.
obj.item.clothing.head.costume.skyrat.pa.name: papakha

obj.item.clothing.head.costume.skyrat.pa.desc: A big wooly clump of fur designed to go on your head.
obj.item.clothing.head.costume.skyrat.pa.name: papakha

obj.item.clothing.head.costume.snakeeate.desc: A bandana. It seems to have a little carp embroidered on the inside, as well as the kanji '魚'.
obj.item.clothing.head.costume.snakeeate.name: strange bandana

obj.item.clothing.head.costume.snowman.desc: A ball of white styrofoam. So festive.
obj.item.clothing.head.costume.snowman.name: snowman head

obj.item.clothing.head.costume.sombrero.desc: You can practically taste the fiesta.
obj.item.clothing.head.costume.sombrero.name: sombrero

obj.item.clothing.head.costume.sombrero..desc: As elegant as a dancing cactus.
obj.item.clothing.head.costume.sombrero..name: green sombrero

obj.item.clothing.head.costume.sombrero..desc: Once it's on, it never comes off.
obj.item.clothing.head.costume.sombrero..name: shamebrero

obj.item.clothing.head.costume.spacepoli.desc: A blue cap for patrolling the daily beat.
obj.item.clothing.head.costume.spacepoli.name: space police cap

obj.item.clothing.head.costume.strigihat.desc: A cute witch hat typically worn by an owl-like teshari.
obj.item.clothing.head.costume.strigihat.name: starry witch hat

obj.item.clothing.head.costume.tmc.desc: A small, red bandana tied thin.
obj.item.clothing.head.costume.tmc.name: Lost M.C. bandana

obj.item.clothing.head.costume.tv_head.desc: A mysterious headgear made from the hollowed out remains of a status display. How very retro-retro-futuristic of you.
obj.item.clothing.head.costume.tv_head.name: television helmet

obj.item.clothing.head.costume.ushanka.desc: Perfect for winter in Siberia, da?
obj.item.clothing.head.costume.ushanka.name: ushanka

obj.item.clothing.head.costume.ushanka.f.desc: A dark blue ushanka with a hand-stitched snowflake on the front. Cool to the touch.
obj.item.clothing.head.costume.ushanka.f.name: blue ushanka

obj.item.clothing.head.costume.ushanka.p.desc: Handcrafted in Siberia from real polar bears.
obj.item.clothing.head.costume.ushanka.p.name: bear hunter's ushanka

obj.item.clothing.head.costume.ushanka.s.desc: A warm and comfortable ushanka, dyed with 'all natural flavors' according to the tag.
obj.item.clothing.head.costume.ushanka.s.name: security ushanka

obj.item.clothing.head.costume.ushanka.s.desc: A warm and comfortable ushanka, dyed with 'all natural flavors' according to the tag.
obj.item.clothing.head.costume.ushanka.s.name: security ushanka

obj.item.clothing.head.costume.whoopee.desc: A relic of archaic humor technology.
obj.item.clothing.head.costume.whoopee.name: whoopee cushion

obj.item.clothing.head.costume.xenos.desc: A helmet made out of chitinous alien hide.
obj.item.clothing.head.costume.xenos.name: xenos helmet

obj.item.clothing.head.costume.yuri.desc: A strange, whitish helmet with 3 eyeholes.
obj.item.clothing.head.costume.yuri.name: yuri initiate helmet

obj.item.clothing.head.cowboy.desc: Ain't nobody gonna cheat the hangman in my town.
obj.item.clothing.head.cowboy.name: cowboy hat

obj.item.clothing.head.cowboy.black.desc: People with ropes around their necks don't always hang.
obj.item.clothing.head.cowboy.black.name: desperado hat

obj.item.clothing.head.cowboy.black.synd.desc: People with ropes around their necks don't always hang.
obj.item.clothing.head.cowboy.black.synd.name: desperado hat

obj.item.clothing.head.cowboy.grey.desc: The hat for an assistant with no name.
obj.item.clothing.head.cowboy.grey.name: drifter hat

obj.item.clothing.head.cowboy.red.desc: Don't let the garish coloration fool you. This hat has seen some terrible things.
obj.item.clothing.head.cowboy.red.name: deputy hat

obj.item.clothing.head.cowboy.skyrat.cat.desc: A hat with a creased brim and a tall crown, intended to be pushed down further on the head to stay on in harsh weather. Not as relevant in space but still comes in handy.
obj.item.clothing.head.cowboy.skyrat.cat.name: cattleman hat

obj.item.clothing.head.cowboy.skyrat.cat.desc: A security cattleman hat, perfect for any true lawman.
obj.item.clothing.head.cowboy.skyrat.cat.name: security cattleman hat

obj.item.clothing.head.cowboy.skyrat.cat.desc: A hat with a wide, slightly creased brim. Good for working in the sun, not so much for fitting through tight gaps.
obj.item.clothing.head.cowboy.skyrat.cat.name: wide brimmed cattleman hat

obj.item.clothing.head.cowboy.skyrat.cat.desc: A bandit turned sheriff, his enforcement is brutal but effective - whether out of fear or respect is unclear, though not many bodies hang high. A peaceful land, a quiet people.
obj.item.clothing.head.cowboy.skyrat.cat.name: wide brimmed security cattleman hat

obj.item.clothing.head.cowboy.skyrat.fla.desc: A finely made hat with a short flat brim, perfect for an old fashioned shootout.
obj.item.clothing.head.cowboy.skyrat.fla.name: flat brimmed hat

obj.item.clothing.head.cowboy.skyrat.fla.desc: A finely made hat with a short flat brim, paired with a snug and warm cowl. Today's a cold day to die...
obj.item.clothing.head.cowboy.skyrat.fla.name: flat brimmed hat with cowl

obj.item.clothing.head.cowboy.skyrat.fla.desc: A dark hat with a matching dark cowl, warm yet breathable. There's a small set of antlers embroidered on the inside.
obj.item.clothing.head.cowboy.skyrat.fla.name: winter sheriff hat

obj.item.clothing.head.cowboy.skyrat.fla.desc: A light brown hat with a smell of iron. There's a small set of antlers embroidered on the inside.
obj.item.clothing.head.cowboy.skyrat.fla.name: deputy hat

obj.item.clothing.head.cowboy.skyrat.fla.desc: A dark brown hat with a smell of whiskey. There's a small set of antlers embroidered on the inside.
obj.item.clothing.head.cowboy.skyrat.fla.name: sheriff hat

obj.item.clothing.head.cowboy.skyrat.wid.desc: A wide-brimmed hat, to keep the sun out of your eyes in style.
obj.item.clothing.head.cowboy.skyrat.wid.name: wide brimmed hat

obj.item.clothing.head.cowboy.skyrat.wid.desc: A wide-brimmed hat adorned with a feather, the perfect flourish to a rugged outfit.
obj.item.clothing.head.cowboy.skyrat.wid.name: wide brimmed feathered hat

obj.item.clothing.head.cowboy.white.desc: There are two kinds of people in the world: those with guns and those that dig. You dig?
obj.item.clothing.head.cowboy.white.name: ten-gallon hat

obj.item.clothing.head.deprivation_helme.desc: Completely cuts off the wearer from the outside world.
obj.item.clothing.head.deprivation_helme.name: deprivation helmet

obj.item.clothing.head.fedora.desc: A really cool hat if you're a mobster. A really lame hat if you're not.
obj.item.clothing.head.fedora.name: fedora

obj.item.clothing.head.fedora.beige.desc: A really cool hat if you're a mobster. A really lame hat if you're not.
obj.item.clothing.head.fedora.beige.name: beige fedora

obj.item.clothing.head.fedora.beige.pres.desc: A beige fedora with a piece of paper saying "PRESS" stuck in its rim.
obj.item.clothing.head.fedora.beige.pres.name: press fedora

obj.item.clothing.head.fedora.brown.desc: A really cool hat if you're a mobster. A really lame hat if you're not.
obj.item.clothing.head.fedora.brown.name: brown fedora

obj.item.clothing.head.fedora.carpskin.desc: A really cool hat if you're a mobster. A really lame hat if you're not.
obj.item.clothing.head.fedora.carpskin.name: carpskin fedora

obj.item.clothing.head.fedora.curator.desc: You got red text today kid, but it doesn't mean you have to like it.
obj.item.clothing.head.fedora.curator.name: treasure hunter's fedora

obj.item.clothing.head.fedora.det_hat.desc: There's only one man who can sniff out the dirty stench of crime, and he's likely wearing this hat.
obj.item.clothing.head.fedora.det_hat.name: detective's fedora

obj.item.clothing.head.fedora.det_hat.cy.desc: A popular helmet used by certain law enforcement agencies. It has minor armor plating and a neo-laminated fiber lining.
obj.item.clothing.head.fedora.det_hat.cy.name: type-34P semi-enclosed headwear

obj.item.clothing.head.fedora.det_hat.cy.desc: The civilian model of a popular helmet used by certain law enforcement agencies. It has no armor plating.
obj.item.clothing.head.fedora.det_hat.cy.name: type-34C semi-enclosed headwear

obj.item.clothing.head.fedora.det_hat.mi.desc: There's only one man who can sniff out the dirty stench of crime, and he's likely wearing this hat.
obj.item.clothing.head.fedora.det_hat.mi.name: detective's fedora

obj.item.clothing.head.fedora.det_hat.no.desc: There's only one man who can recklessly discharge a firearm into a crowded street while trying to stop a criminal, 		and he's likely wearing this hat.
obj.item.clothing.head.fedora.det_hat.no.name: detective's noir fedora

obj.item.clothing.head.fedora.greyscale.desc: A really cool hat if you're a mobster. A really lame hat if you're not.
obj.item.clothing.head.fedora.greyscale.name: fedora

obj.item.clothing.head.fedora.human_leat.desc: This will scare them. All will know my power.
obj.item.clothing.head.fedora.human_leat.name: human skin hat

obj.item.clothing.head.fedora.inspector_.desc: There's only one man can try to stop an evil villain.
obj.item.clothing.head.fedora.inspector_.name: inspector's fedora

obj.item.clothing.head.fedora.white.desc: A really cool hat if you're a mobster. A really lame hat if you're not.
obj.item.clothing.head.fedora.white.name: white fedora

obj.item.clothing.head.frontier_colonist.desc: A unusual piece of headwear somewhere between a proper helmet and a normal cap.
obj.item.clothing.head.frontier_colonist.name: frontier soft helmet

obj.item.clothing.head.hair_tie.desc: An elastic hair tie, made to hold your hair up!
obj.item.clothing.head.hair_tie.name: hair tie

obj.item.clothing.head.hair_tie.plastic_.desc: An elastic hair tie, adornished with colorful plastic beads.
obj.item.clothing.head.hair_tie.plastic_.name: colorful hair tie

obj.item.clothing.head.hair_tie.scrunchi.desc: An elastic hair tie, its fabric is velvet soft.
obj.item.clothing.head.hair_tie.scrunchi.name: scrunchie

obj.item.clothing.head.hair_tie.syndicat.desc: An elastic hair tie with a metal clip, brandishing the logo of the Syndicate.
obj.item.clothing.head.hair_tie.syndicat.name: Syndicate hair tie

obj.item.clothing.head.hats.caphat.azule.desc: A peaked cap worn by some ADU officials, and many officers in the ADU Armada. It denotes rank or position on the front of the cap, and matches the uniform worn with it.
obj.item.clothing.head.hats.caphat.azule.name: Akula Democratic Union official's cap

obj.item.clothing.head.hats.caphat.azule.desc: A peaked and stylish hat worn by some ruling members of the Akula border principalities. It seems to follow the philosophy of style over substance, and is just as flashy as the uniform worn with it.
obj.item.clothing.head.hats.caphat.azule.name: Akula border prince's cap

obj.item.clothing.head.hats.caphat.bicor.desc: Why be king when you can be Emperor?
obj.item.clothing.head.hats.caphat.bicor.name: captain's bicorne

obj.item.clothing.head.hats.caphat.bunny.desc: A pair of dark blue bunny ears attached to a headband. Worn in lieu of the more traditional bicorn hat.
obj.item.clothing.head.hats.caphat.bunny.name: captain's bunny ears

obj.item.clothing.head.hats.caphat.naval.desc: A cap worn by those in the Nanotrasen Navy.
obj.item.clothing.head.hats.caphat.naval.name: naval cap

obj.item.clothing.head.hats.caphat.naval.desc: A cap worn by the Nanotrasen Fleet Admiral.
obj.item.clothing.head.hats.caphat.naval.name: fleet admiral's cap

obj.item.clothing.head.hats.caphat.parad.desc: Worn only by Captains with an abundance of class.
obj.item.clothing.head.hats.caphat.parad.name: captain's parade cap

obj.item.clothing.head.hats.caphat.parad.desc: An officer's cap that demands discipline from the one who wears it.
obj.item.clothing.head.hats.caphat.parad.name: Officer's cap

obj.item.clothing.head.hats.caphat.parad.desc: An officer's cap that demands discipline from the one who wears it.
obj.item.clothing.head.hats.caphat.parad.name: Officer's cap

obj.item.clothing.head.hats.caphat.parad.desc: An officer's cap that demands discipline from the one who wears it.
obj.item.clothing.head.hats.caphat.parad.name: Officer's cap

obj.item.clothing.head.hats.caphat.parad.desc: An officer's cap that demands discipline from the one who wears it.
obj.item.clothing.head.hats.caphat.parad.name: Officer's cap

obj.item.clothing.head.hats.caphat.parad.desc: An officer's cap that demands discipline from the one who wears it.
obj.item.clothing.head.hats.caphat.parad.name: Officer's cap

obj.item.clothing.head.hats.caphat.pilot.desc: It's good being the king's navigator.
obj.item.clothing.head.hats.caphat.pilot.name: pilot's hat

obj.item.clothing.head.hats.centcom_cap.desc: Worn by the finest of CentCom commanders. Two faint initials lie inside the lining of the cap.
obj.item.clothing.head.hats.centcom_cap.name: CentCom commander cap

obj.item.clothing.head.hats.colonial.desc: A puffy cap made out of tarpaulin covered by some textile. It is sturdy and comfortable, and seems to retain its form very well.
obj.item.clothing.head.hats.colonial.name: colonial cap

obj.item.clothing.head.hats.colonial.nri.desc:
A puffy cap made out of tarpaulin covered by some textile. It is sturdy and comfortable, and seems to retain its form very well.
Silver Commonwealth police insignia is woven right above its visor.
obj.item.clothing.head.hats.colonial.nri.name: imperial police cap

obj.item.clothing.head.hats.consultant_c.desc: A fancy peaked cap, worn by only CentCom's station officials. Inside the lining of the cap, lies two faint initials.
obj.item.clothing.head.hats.consultant_c.name: CentCom representative's cap

obj.item.clothing.head.hats.coordinator.desc: A cap for a party coordinator, stylish!.
obj.item.clothing.head.hats.coordinator.name: coordinator cap

obj.item.clothing.head.hats.flakhelm.desc: A dilapidated helmet used in ancient wars. This one is brittle and essentially useless. An ace of spades is tucked into the band around the outer shell.
obj.item.clothing.head.hats.flakhelm.name: flak helmet

obj.item.clothing.head.hats.hopcap.desc: The symbol of true bureaucratic micromanagement.
obj.item.clothing.head.hats.hopcap.name: head of personnel's cap

obj.item.clothing.head.hats.hos.desc: Please contact the Nanotrasen Costuming Department if found.
obj.item.clothing.head.hats.hos.name: generic head of security hat

obj.item.clothing.head.hats.hos.beret.desc: A robust beret for the Head of Security, for looking stylish while not sacrificing protection.
obj.item.clothing.head.hats.hos.beret.name: head of security's beret

obj.item.clothing.head.hats.hos.beret.fa.desc: A black beret with thick armor padding inside. Stylish and robust. There's an unknown insignia emblazoned on it.
obj.item.clothing.head.hats.hos.beret.fa.name: faction beret

obj.item.clothing.head.hats.hos.beret.na.desc: A special beret with the Head of Security's insignia emblazoned on it. A symbol of excellence, a badge of courage, a mark of distinction.
obj.item.clothing.head.hats.hos.beret.na.name: head of security's formal beret

obj.item.clothing.head.hats.hos.beret.sy.desc: A black beret with thick armor padding inside. Stylish and robust.
obj.item.clothing.head.hats.hos.beret.sy.name: syndicate beret

obj.item.clothing.head.hats.hos.cap.desc: The robust standard-issue cap of the Head of Security. For showing the officers who's in charge. Looks a bit stout.
obj.item.clothing.head.hats.hos.cap.name: head of security cap

obj.item.clothing.head.hats.hos.cap.red.desc: The robust standard-issue cap of the Head of Security. For showing the officers who's in charge. Looks a bit stout.
obj.item.clothing.head.hats.hos.cap.red.name: head of security cap

obj.item.clothing.head.hats.hos.cap.synd.desc: A black cap fit for a high ranking syndicate officer.
obj.item.clothing.head.hats.hos.cap.synd.name: syndicate cap

obj.item.clothing.head.hats.hos.elofy.desc: This hat is a near perfect replica of the one worn by Admiral Yi Sun-Sin, main character from "Heroes of the Galactic Conflict", 		an animated war drama set between the Free Planetary Trade Union and the Second Galactic Empire. 		It proved to be a sensational piece among those who appreciate animated cartoons and period war dramas, 		but hasn't had much spread outside of the Terran Government.
obj.item.clothing.head.hats.hos.elofy.name: anime admiral hat

obj.item.clothing.head.hats.hos.shako.desc: Wearing this makes you want to shout "Down and give me twenty!" at someone.
obj.item.clothing.head.hats.hos.shako.name: sturdy shako

obj.item.clothing.head.hats.intern.desc: A horrifying mix of beanie and softcap in CentCom green. You'd have to be pretty desperate for power over your peers to agree to wear this.
obj.item.clothing.head.hats.intern.name: CentCom Head Intern beancap

obj.item.clothing.head.hats.intern.devel.desc: A horrifying mix of beanie and softcap in CentCom green. You'd have to be pretty desperate for power over your peers to agree to wear this.
obj.item.clothing.head.hats.intern.devel.name: intern beancap

obj.item.clothing.head.hats.sus_bowler.desc: A deep black bowler. Inside the hat, there is a sleek red S, with a smaller X insignia embroidered within. On closer inspection, the brim feels oddly weighted...
obj.item.clothing.head.hats.sus_bowler.name: odd bowler

obj.item.clothing.head.hats.tophat.ballo.desc: It's a colourful looking top-hat to match your colourful personality.
obj.item.clothing.head.hats.tophat.ballo.name: balloon top-hat

obj.item.clothing.head.hats.warden.desc: It's a special armored hat issued to the Warden of a security force. Protects the head from impacts.
obj.item.clothing.head.hats.warden.name: warden's police hat

obj.item.clothing.head.hats.warden.drill.desc: A special armored campaign hat with the security insignia emblazoned on it. Uses reinforced fabric to offer sufficient protection.
obj.item.clothing.head.hats.warden.drill.name: warden's campaign hat

obj.item.clothing.head.hats.warden.drill.desc: A variant of the warden's campaign hat recolored to match the Blueshield. Made with durathread to protect their squishy braincase. It's padded with nano-kevlar, making it more protective than standard berets.
obj.item.clothing.head.hats.warden.drill.name: blueshield's campaign hat

obj.item.clothing.head.hats.warden.drill.desc: A variant of the warden's campaign hat for your more militaristic captains.
obj.item.clothing.head.hats.warden.drill.name: captain's campaign hat

obj.item.clothing.head.hats.warden.drill.desc: A variant of the warden's campaign hat for the Head of Security. End the blood-feud and team up.
obj.item.clothing.head.hats.warden.drill.name: head of security's campaign hat

obj.item.clothing.head.hats.warden.drill.desc: A variant of the warden's campaign hat for your more militaristic representatives.
obj.item.clothing.head.hats.warden.drill.name: representative's campaign hat

obj.item.clothing.head.hats.warden.polic.desc: A police officer's hat. This hat emphasizes that you are THE LAW.
obj.item.clothing.head.hats.warden.polic.name: police officer's hat

obj.item.clothing.head.hats.warden.red.desc: A warden's red hat. Looking at it gives you the feeling of wanting to keep people in cells for as long as possible.
obj.item.clothing.head.hats.warden.red.name: warden's hat

obj.item.clothing.head.hats.warden.syndi.desc: A fashionable police cap emblazoned with a golden badge, issued to the Master at Arms. Protects the head from impacts.
obj.item.clothing.head.hats.warden.syndi.name: master at arms' police hat

obj.item.clothing.head.helmet.desc: Standard Security gear. Protects the head from impacts.
obj.item.clothing.head.helmet.name: helmet

obj.item.clothing.head.helmet.abductor.desc: Abduct with style - spiky style. Prevents digital tracking.
obj.item.clothing.head.helmet.abductor.name: agent headgear

obj.item.clothing.head.helmet.abductor.f.desc: A very plain helmet used by the Greys of the Kabrus Mining Site. This helmet only protects the wearer from wind and rain it seems.
obj.item.clothing.head.helmet.abductor.f.name: Kabrus Utility Helmet

obj.item.clothing.head.helmet.alt.desc: A bulletproof combat helmet that excels in protecting the wearer against traditional projectile weaponry and explosives to a minor extent.
obj.item.clothing.head.helmet.alt.name: bulletproof helmet

obj.item.clothing.head.helmet.astrum.desc: An exceptionally robust helmet. For alien standards, that is.
obj.item.clothing.head.helmet.astrum.name: agent headgear

obj.item.clothing.head.helmet.balloon.desc: A helmet made out of balloons. The like saw great usage in the Great Clown - Mime War. Surprisingly resistant to fire. Mimes were doing unspeakable things.
obj.item.clothing.head.helmet.balloon.name: balloon helmet

obj.item.clothing.head.helmet.blueshirt.desc: A reliable, blue tinted helmet reminding you that you still owe that engineer a beer.
obj.item.clothing.head.helmet.blueshirt.name: blue helmet

obj.item.clothing.head.helmet.blueshirt..desc: A reliable, blue tinted helmet reminding you that you still owe that engineer a beer.
obj.item.clothing.head.helmet.blueshirt..name: blue helmet

obj.item.clothing.head.helmet.blueshirt..desc: A reliable, blue tinted helmet reminding you that you still owe that engineer a beer.
obj.item.clothing.head.helmet.blueshirt..name: blue helmet

obj.item.clothing.head.helmet.changeling.desc: A tough, hard covering of black chitin with transparent chitin in front.
obj.item.clothing.head.helmet.changeling.name: chitinous mass

obj.item.clothing.head.helmet.changeling.desc: A strange, waxy outer coating covering your head. Gives you tinnitus.
obj.item.clothing.head.helmet.changeling.name: hive head

obj.item.clothing.head.helmet.changeling.desc: A strange, boney coating covering your head with a fleshy inside. Surprisingly comfortable.
obj.item.clothing.head.helmet.changeling.name: legion hive head

obj.item.clothing.head.helmet.chaplain.a.desc: Its only heretical when others do it.
obj.item.clothing.head.helmet.chaplain.a.name: adept hood

obj.item.clothing.head.helmet.chaplain.c.desc: A cage that restrains the will of the self, allowing one to see the profane world for what it is.
obj.item.clothing.head.helmet.chaplain.c.name: cage

obj.item.clothing.head.helmet.chaplain.c.desc: It has the unyielding gaze of a god eternally forgotten.
obj.item.clothing.head.helmet.chaplain.c.name: forgotten helmet

obj.item.clothing.head.helmet.chaplain.h.desc: Conceals your features from the things that look back at you.
obj.item.clothing.head.helmet.chaplain.h.name: occultist's hood

obj.item.clothing.head.helmet.chaplain.w.desc: This hat saw much use back in the day.
obj.item.clothing.head.helmet.chaplain.w.name: witchunter hat

obj.item.clothing.head.helmet.cin_surplu.desc: An outdated service helmet previously used by CIN military forces. The design dates back to the years leading up to CIN - TerraGov border war, and was in service until the advent of VOSKHOD powered armor becoming standard issue.
obj.item.clothing.head.helmet.cin_surplu.name: GZ-03 combat helmet

obj.item.clothing.head.helmet.cin_surplu.desc: An outdated service helmet previously used by CIN military forces. The design dates back to the years leading up to CIN - TerraGov border war, and was in service until the advent of VOSKHOD powered armor becoming standard issue.
obj.item.clothing.head.helmet.cin_surplu.name: GZ-03 combat helmet

obj.item.clothing.head.helmet.cin_surplu.desc: An outdated service helmet previously used by CIN military forces. The design dates back to the years leading up to CIN - TerraGov border war, and was in service until the advent of VOSKHOD powered armor becoming standard issue.
obj.item.clothing.head.helmet.cin_surplu.name: GZ-03 combat helmet

obj.item.clothing.head.helmet.cin_surplu.desc: An outdated service helmet previously used by CIN military forces. The design dates back to the years leading up to CIN - TerraGov border war, and was in service until the advent of VOSKHOD powered armor becoming standard issue.
obj.item.clothing.head.helmet.cin_surplu.name: GZ-03 combat helmet

obj.item.clothing.head.helmet.cin_surplu.desc: An outdated service helmet previously used by CIN military forces. The design dates back to the years leading up to CIN - TerraGov border war, and was in service until the advent of VOSKHOD powered armor becoming standard issue.
obj.item.clothing.head.helmet.cin_surplu.name: GZ-03 combat helmet

obj.item.clothing.head.helmet.clockwork.desc: A strong, brass helmet worn by the soldiers of the Ratvarian armies. Includes an integrated light-dimmer for flash protection, as well as occult-grade muffling for factory based environments.
obj.item.clothing.head.helmet.clockwork.name: brass helmet

obj.item.clothing.head.helmet.dragoon.desc: A chainmail helmet with dragon scales attached to the skeleton, with ash-covered mythril plate reinforcement covering it.
obj.item.clothing.head.helmet.dragoon.name: drachen helmet

obj.item.clothing.head.helmet.durability.desc: A helmet made from a hollowed out barrelmelon. As sturdy as actual wood, though its rigid structure makes it break quicker.
obj.item.clothing.head.helmet.durability.name: barrelmelon helmet

obj.item.clothing.head.helmet.durability.desc: A helmet made from a hollowed out barrelmelon. As sturdy as actual wood, though its rigid structure makes it break quicker.
obj.item.clothing.head.helmet.durability.name: barrelmelon helmet

obj.item.clothing.head.helmet.durability.desc: A helmet from a hollowed out holymelon. Might take a few hits, but don't expect it to withstand much.
obj.item.clothing.head.helmet.durability.name: holymelon helmet

obj.item.clothing.head.helmet.durability.desc: A helmet from a hollowed out holymelon. Might take a few hits, but don't expect it to withstand much.
obj.item.clothing.head.helmet.durability.name: holymelon helmet

obj.item.clothing.head.helmet.durability.desc: A helmet cut out from a watermelon. Might take a few hits, but don't expect it to withstand much.
obj.item.clothing.head.helmet.durability.name: watermelon helmet

obj.item.clothing.head.helmet.durability.desc: A helmet cut out from a watermelon. Might take a few hits, but don't expect it to withstand much.
obj.item.clothing.head.helmet.durability.name: watermelon helmet

obj.item.clothing.head.helmet.durathread.desc: A helmet made from durathread and leather.
obj.item.clothing.head.helmet.durathread.name: durathread helmet

obj.item.clothing.head.helmet.elder_atmo.desc: A superb helmet made with the toughest and rarest materials available to man.
obj.item.clothing.head.helmet.elder_atmo.name: Elder Atmosian Helmet

obj.item.clothing.head.helmet.expedition.desc: A robust helmet worn by Expeditionary Corps troopers. Alt+click it to toggle the NV system.
obj.item.clothing.head.helmet.expedition.name: expeditionary corps helmet

obj.item.clothing.head.helmet.forging_pl.desc: A helmet out of hammered plates with a leather neck guard and chin strap.
obj.item.clothing.head.helmet.forging_pl.name: reagent plate helmet

obj.item.clothing.head.helmet.hecu.desc: Helmet designed to take heavy beating and probably keep the user alive in the process.
obj.item.clothing.head.helmet.hecu.name: combat helmet

obj.item.clothing.head.helmet.knight.gre.desc: A classic medieval helmet, if you hold it upside down you could see that it's actually a bucket.
obj.item.clothing.head.helmet.knight.gre.name: knight helmet

obj.item.clothing.head.helmet.knight.war.desc: There is no man behind the helmet, only a terrible thought.
obj.item.clothing.head.helmet.knight.war.name: golden barbute helmet

obj.item.clothing.head.helmet.marine.desc: A tactical black helmet, sealed from outside hazards with a plate of glass and not much else.
obj.item.clothing.head.helmet.marine.name: tactical combat helmet

obj.item.clothing.head.helmet.marine.eng.desc: A tactical black helmet, sealed from outside hazards with a plate of glass and not much else.
obj.item.clothing.head.helmet.marine.eng.name: marine utility helmet

obj.item.clothing.head.helmet.marine.med.desc: A tactical black helmet, sealed from outside hazards with a plate of glass and not much else.
obj.item.clothing.head.helmet.marine.med.name: marine medic helmet

obj.item.clothing.head.helmet.marine.pmc.desc: A tactical black helmet, designed to protect one's head from various injuries sustained in operations. Its stellar survivability makes up for its lack of space worthiness
obj.item.clothing.head.helmet.marine.pmc.name: tactical combat helmet

obj.item.clothing.head.helmet.marine.sec.desc: A tactical black helmet, sealed from outside hazards with a plate of glass and not much else.
obj.item.clothing.head.helmet.marine.sec.name: marine heavy helmet

obj.item.clothing.head.helmet.marine.sul.desc: A tactical black helmet, barely sealed from outside hazards with a plate of glass and not much else. Not as protective as it used to be, but it is still completely functional.
obj.item.clothing.head.helmet.marine.sul.name: damaged tactical combat helmet

obj.item.clothing.head.helmet.metrocophe.desc: Standard issue helmet for Civil Protection. Uses advanced GigaSlop brand Matrixes to allow alternative variants!
obj.item.clothing.head.helmet.metrocophe.name: civil protection helmet

obj.item.clothing.head.helmet.military.desc: A cheaply made kettle helmet with an added faceplate to protect the eyes and mouth.
obj.item.clothing.head.helmet.military.name: Crude Helmet

obj.item.clothing.head.helmet.monkey_sen.desc: A fragile, circuitry embedded helmet for boosting the intelligence of a monkey to a higher level. You see several warning labels...
obj.item.clothing.head.helmet.monkey_sen.name: monkey mind magnification helmet

obj.item.clothing.head.helmet.nri_police.desc: Thick-looking tactical helmet made out of shaped Plasteel. Colored dark blue, similar to one imperial police is commonly using.
obj.item.clothing.head.helmet.nri_police.name: imperial police helmet

obj.item.clothing.head.helmet.old.desc: Standard issue security helmet. Due to degradation the helmet's visor obstructs the users ability to see long distances.
obj.item.clothing.head.helmet.old.name: degrading helmet

obj.item.clothing.head.helmet.perceptoma.desc: This piece of headgear harnesses the energies of a hallucinatory anomaly to create a safe audiovisual replica of -all- external stimuli directly into the cerebral cortex, 		granting the user effective immunity to both psychic threats, and anything that would affect their perception - be it ear, eye, or even brain damage. 		It can also violently discharge said energy, inducing hallucinations in others.
obj.item.clothing.head.helmet.perceptoma.name: perceptomatrix helm

obj.item.clothing.head.helmet.perceptoma.desc: This piece of headgear harnesses the energies of a hallucinatory anomaly to create a safe audiovisual replica of -all- external stimuli directly into the cerebral cortex, 		granting the user effective immunity to both psychic threats, and anything that would affect their perception - be it ear, eye, or even brain damage. 		It can also violently discharge said energy, inducing hallucinations in others.
obj.item.clothing.head.helmet.perceptoma.name: perceptomatrix helm

obj.item.clothing.head.helmet.press.desc: A blue helmet used to distinguish non-combatant "PRESS" members, like anyone cares.
obj.item.clothing.head.helmet.press.name: press helmet

obj.item.clothing.head.helmet.roman.desc: An ancient helmet made of bronze and leather.
obj.item.clothing.head.helmet.roman.name: Roman helmet

obj.item.clothing.head.helmet.roman.fake.desc: An ancient helmet made of plastic and leather.
obj.item.clothing.head.helmet.roman.fake.name: Roman helmet

obj.item.clothing.head.helmet.roman.legi.desc: An ancient helmet made of bronze and leather. Has a red crest on top of it.
obj.item.clothing.head.helmet.roman.legi.name: Roman legionnaire helmet

obj.item.clothing.head.helmet.roman.legi.desc: An ancient helmet made of plastic and leather. Has a red crest on top of it.
obj.item.clothing.head.helmet.roman.legi.name: Roman legionnaire helmet

obj.item.clothing.head.helmet.rus_helmet.desc: It can hold a bottle of vodka.
obj.item.clothing.head.helmet.rus_helmet.name: russian helmet

obj.item.clothing.head.helmet.sec.desc: Standard Security gear. Protects the head from impacts.
obj.item.clothing.head.helmet.sec.name: helmet

obj.item.clothing.head.helmet.sec.futuri.desc: Standard Security gear. Protects the head from impacts.
obj.item.clothing.head.helmet.sec.futuri.name: helmet

obj.item.clothing.head.helmet.sec.peacek.desc: A standard issue combat helmet for security medics. Has decent tensile strength and armor. Keep your head down.
obj.item.clothing.head.helmet.sec.peacek.name: security medic helmet

obj.item.clothing.head.helmet.sec.redsec.desc: Standard Security gear. Protects the head from impacts.
obj.item.clothing.head.helmet.sec.redsec.name: helmet

obj.item.clothing.head.helmet.sec.sol.id.desc: A helmet worn by the romulus expeditionary force.
obj.item.clothing.head.helmet.sec.sol.id.name: ironmoon service helmet.

obj.item.clothing.head.helmet.sf_peaceke.desc: A large, almost always ill-fitting helmet painted in bright blue. It proudly bears the emblems of TerraGov on its sides. 		It will protect from bullets best, with some protection against blunt blows, but falters easily in the presence of lasers.
obj.item.clothing.head.helmet.sf_peaceke.name: 'Kastrol' peacekeeper helmet

obj.item.clothing.head.helmet.sf_peaceke.desc: A large, almost always ill-fitting helmet painted a dull grey. This one seems to lack any special markings. 		It will protect from bullets best, with some protection against blunt blows, but falters easily in the presence of lasers.
obj.item.clothing.head.helmet.sf_peaceke.name: 'Kastrol' ballistic helmet

obj.item.clothing.head.helmet.sf_sacrifi.desc: A large, almost always ill-fitting helmet painted in a tacticool black. 		As the 'sacrificial' name might imply, this helmet has extremely high bullet protection 		in exchange for allowing itself to be destroyed by impacts. It'll protect you from hell, 		but only for so long.
obj.item.clothing.head.helmet.sf_sacrifi.name: 'Val' sacrificial ballistic helmet

obj.item.clothing.head.helmet.skull.desc: An intimidating tribal helmet, it doesn't look very comfortable.
obj.item.clothing.head.helmet.skull.name: skull helmet

obj.item.clothing.head.helmet.skull.blea.desc: An intimidating tribal helmet, it doesn't look very comfortable.
obj.item.clothing.head.helmet.skull.blea.name: skull helmet

obj.item.clothing.head.helmet.skull.cosm.desc: You can see and feel the surrounding space pulsing through it...
obj.item.clothing.head.helmet.skull.cosm.name: cosmic skull

obj.item.clothing.head.helmet.skull.fake.desc: An intimidating tribal helmet, it doesn't look very comfortable.
obj.item.clothing.head.helmet.skull.fake.name: skull helmet

obj.item.clothing.head.helmet.space.desc: A special helmet with solar UV shielding to protect your eyes from harmful rays.
obj.item.clothing.head.helmet.space.name: space helmet

obj.item.clothing.head.helmet.space.akul.desc: The helmet on an Akula Shoredress wetsuit, often called a 'glass'. Full of water, comes in many colors, none of which you have access to. Often insultingly called a 'fishbowl'.
obj.item.clothing.head.helmet.space.akul.name: Shoredress helm

obj.item.clothing.head.helmet.space.bere.desc: An armored beret commonly used by special operations officers. Uses advanced force field technology to protect the head from space.
obj.item.clothing.head.helmet.space.bere.name: CentCom officer's beret

obj.item.clothing.head.helmet.space.chan.desc: A special helmet with solar UV shielding to protect your eyes from harmful rays.
obj.item.clothing.head.helmet.space.chan.name: space helmet

obj.item.clothing.head.helmet.space.emer.desc: A fragile looking emergency spacesuit helmet for limited use in space.
obj.item.clothing.head.helmet.space.emer.name: emergency space helmet

obj.item.clothing.head.helmet.space.eva.desc: A lightweight space helmet with the basic ability to protect the wearer from the vacuum of space during emergencies.
obj.item.clothing.head.helmet.space.eva.name: EVA helmet

obj.item.clothing.head.helmet.space.frag.desc: A bulky, airtight helmet meant to protect the user during emergency situations. It doesn't look very durable.
obj.item.clothing.head.helmet.space.frag.name: emergency space helmet

obj.item.clothing.head.helmet.space.free.desc: An advanced, space-proof helmet. It appears to be modeled after an old-world eagle.
obj.item.clothing.head.helmet.space.free.name: eagle helmet

obj.item.clothing.head.helmet.space.hev_.desc: The Mark IV HEV suit helmet.
obj.item.clothing.head.helmet.space.hev_.name: hazardous environment suit helmet

obj.item.clothing.head.helmet.space.hev_.desc: A composite graphene-plasteel helmet with a ballistic nylon inner padding, complete with a deployable airtight polycarbonate visor and respirator system. 'НРИ - Оборонная Коллегия' is imprinted on the back.
obj.item.clothing.head.helmet.space.hev_.name: VOSKHOD powered combat armor helmet

obj.item.clothing.head.helmet.space.hev_.desc: A black composite polyurea coated graphene-plastitanium helmet with durathread inner padding, complete with a deployable airtight tinted plasmaglass visor and a kevlar-lined respirator system. 'НРИ - Оборонная Коллегия' is imprinted on the back.
obj.item.clothing.head.helmet.space.hev_.name: VOSKHOD-2 powered combat armor helmet

obj.item.clothing.head.helmet.space.hev_.desc: A composite tungsten-plasteel helmet with a lead-lined ballistic nylon inner padding, complete with a deployable airtight polycarbonate visor and respirator system. 'НРИ - Оборонная Коллегия' is imprinted on the back.
obj.item.clothing.head.helmet.space.hev_.name: VOSKHOD-IN powered combat armor helmet

obj.item.clothing.head.helmet.space.hev_.desc: A combat medic's composite graphene-titanium helmet with bio-resistant padding, complete with a deployable airtight polycarbonate visor and optimized respirator system. 'НРИ - Оборонная Коллегия' is imprinted on the back.
obj.item.clothing.head.helmet.space.hev_.name: VOSKHOD-KH powered combat armor helmet

obj.item.clothing.head.helmet.space.hev_.desc: A deprecated combat helmet developed during the early 21th century in Sol-3, with protections rated level III-A. Contains attachment points for AN/PVS night vision goggles.
obj.item.clothing.head.helmet.space.hev_.name: powered combat helmet

obj.item.clothing.head.helmet.space.nasa.desc: An old, NASA CentCom branch designed, dark red space suit helmet.
obj.item.clothing.head.helmet.space.nasa.name: NASA void helmet

obj.item.clothing.head.helmet.space.nasa.desc: A CentCom engineering dark red space suit helmet. While old and dusty, it still gets the job done.
obj.item.clothing.head.helmet.space.nasa.name: engineering void helmet

obj.item.clothing.head.helmet.space.ntra.desc: A faceless white helmet fit to seal with a softsuit, used by Trauma Teams to operate in potentially hazardous environments. It's coated in acid-repellent chemicals.
obj.item.clothing.head.helmet.space.ntra.name: trauma team helmet

obj.item.clothing.head.helmet.space.oran.desc: A special helmet with solar UV shielding to protect your eyes from harmful rays.
obj.item.clothing.head.helmet.space.oran.name: emergency space helmet

obj.item.clothing.head.helmet.space.pira.desc: A modified helmet to allow space pirates to intimidate their customers whilst staying safe from the void. Comes with some additional protection.
obj.item.clothing.head.helmet.space.pira.name: modified EVA helmet

obj.item.clothing.head.helmet.space.pira.desc: A modified helmet to allow space pirates to intimidate their customers whilst staying safe from the void. Comes with some additional protection.
obj.item.clothing.head.helmet.space.pira.name: modified EVA helmet

obj.item.clothing.head.helmet.space.pira.desc: A modified EVA helmet with a five-thousand credit Lizzy Vuitton hat affixed to the top, proving that working in deep space is no excuse for being poor.
obj.item.clothing.head.helmet.space.pira.name: designer pirate helmet

obj.item.clothing.head.helmet.space.plas.desc: A special containment helmet that allows plasma-based lifeforms to exist safely in an oxygenated environment. It is space-worthy, and may be worn in tandem with other EVA gear.
obj.item.clothing.head.helmet.space.plas.name: plasma envirosuit helmet

obj.item.clothing.head.helmet.space.plas.desc: A space-worthy helmet specially designed for atmos technician plasmamen, the usual purple stripes being replaced by atmos' blue. Has improved thermal shielding.
obj.item.clothing.head.helmet.space.plas.name: atmospherics plasma envirosuit helmet

obj.item.clothing.head.helmet.space.plas.desc: An envirohelmet with extended blue light filters for bitrunning plasmamen.
obj.item.clothing.head.helmet.space.plas.name: bitrunner's plasma envirosuit helmet

obj.item.clothing.head.helmet.space.plas.desc: A plasmaman containment helmet designed for certified blueshields, who's job guarding heads should not include self-combustion... most of the time.
obj.item.clothing.head.helmet.space.plas.name: blueshield envirosuit helmet

obj.item.clothing.head.helmet.space.plas.desc: A green and blue envirohelmet designating its wearer as a botanist. While not specifically designed for it, it would protect against minor plant-related injuries.
obj.item.clothing.head.helmet.space.plas.name: botany plasma envirosuit helmet

obj.item.clothing.head.helmet.space.plas.desc: A special containment helmet designed for heavy usage. Multiple dings and notches are on this one.
obj.item.clothing.head.helmet.space.plas.name: emission's helmet

obj.item.clothing.head.helmet.space.plas.desc: An Azulean-made Enviro-Helmet, adjusted for the unique skull shape typical of the species. Alongside the standard features, it includes an embossment of the Azulean Crest on the back of the helmet.
obj.item.clothing.head.helmet.space.plas.name: azulean's environment helmet

obj.item.clothing.head.helmet.space.plas.desc: A special containment helmet designed for the Captain. Embarrassingly enough, it looks way too much like the Head of Personnel's design save for the gold stripes. I mean, come on. Gold stripes can fix anything.
obj.item.clothing.head.helmet.space.plas.name: captain's plasma envirosuit helmet

obj.item.clothing.head.helmet.space.plas.desc: A plasmaman envirohelmet designed for cargo techs and quartermasters.
obj.item.clothing.head.helmet.space.plas.name: cargo plasma envirosuit helmet

obj.item.clothing.head.helmet.space.plas.desc: A special containment helmet designed for the Higher Central Command Staff. Not many of these exist, as CentCom does not usually employ plasmamen to higher staff positions due to their complications.
obj.item.clothing.head.helmet.space.plas.name: CentCom commander plasma envirosuit helmet

obj.item.clothing.head.helmet.space.plas.desc: A special containment helmet designed for CentCom Staff. You know, so any coffee spills don't kill the poor sod.
obj.item.clothing.head.helmet.space.plas.name: CentCom intern plasma envirosuit helmet

obj.item.clothing.head.helmet.space.plas.desc: A special containment helmet designed for CentCom Staff. They sure do love their green.
obj.item.clothing.head.helmet.space.plas.name: CentCom official plasma envirosuit helmet

obj.item.clothing.head.helmet.space.plas.desc: An envirohelmet specially designed for only the most pious of plasmamen.
obj.item.clothing.head.helmet.space.plas.name: chaplain's plasma envirosuit helmet

obj.item.clothing.head.helmet.space.plas.desc: A plasmaman envirosuit designed for chemists, two orange stripes going down its face.
obj.item.clothing.head.helmet.space.plas.name: chemistry plasma envirosuit helmet

obj.item.clothing.head.helmet.space.plas.desc: A special containment helmet designed for the Chief Engineer, the usual purple stripes being replaced by the chief's green. Has improved thermal shielding.
obj.item.clothing.head.helmet.space.plas.name: chief engineer's plasma envirosuit helmet

obj.item.clothing.head.helmet.space.plas.desc: A special containment helmet designed for the Chief Medical Officer. A gold stripe applied to differentiate them from other medical staff.
obj.item.clothing.head.helmet.space.plas.name: chief medical officer's plasma envirosuit helmet

obj.item.clothing.head.helmet.space.plas.desc: The make-up is painted on, it's a miracle it doesn't chip. 'HONK!'
obj.item.clothing.head.helmet.space.plas.name: clown envirosuit helmet

obj.item.clothing.head.helmet.space.plas.desc: An envirohelmet designed for plasmaman coroners, having more edge than the usual model.
obj.item.clothing.head.helmet.space.plas.name: coroners's plasma envirosuit helmet

obj.item.clothing.head.helmet.space.plas.desc: A slight modification on a traditional voidsuit helmet, this helmet was Nanotrasen's first solution to the *logistical problems* that come with employing plasmamen. Despite their limitations, these helmets still see use by historians and old-school plasmamen alike.
obj.item.clothing.head.helmet.space.plas.name: curator's plasma envirosuit helmet

obj.item.clothing.head.helmet.space.plas.desc: A space-worthy helmet specially designed for engineer plasmamen, the usual purple stripes being replaced by engineering's orange.
obj.item.clothing.head.helmet.space.plas.name: engineering plasma envirosuit helmet

obj.item.clothing.head.helmet.space.plas.desc: A plasmaman envirohelmet designed for geneticists.
obj.item.clothing.head.helmet.space.plas.name: geneticist's plasma envirosuit helmet

obj.item.clothing.head.helmet.space.plas.desc: A special containment helmet designed for the Head of Personnel. Embarrassingly enough, it looks way too much like the captain's design save for the red stripes.
obj.item.clothing.head.helmet.space.plas.name: head of personnel's envirosuit helmet

obj.item.clothing.head.helmet.space.plas.desc: A grey helmet bearing a pair of purple stripes, designating the wearer as a janitor.
obj.item.clothing.head.helmet.space.plas.name: janitor's plasma envirosuit helmet

obj.item.clothing.head.helmet.space.plas.desc: An envirohelmet designed for plasmaman medical doctors, having two stripes down its length to denote as much.
obj.item.clothing.head.helmet.space.plas.name: medical doctor's plasma envirosuit helmet

obj.item.clothing.head.helmet.space.plas.desc: The make-up is painted on, it's a miracle it doesn't chip. It's not very colourful.
obj.item.clothing.head.helmet.space.plas.name: mime envirosuit helmet

obj.item.clothing.head.helmet.space.plas.desc: A khaki helmet given to plasmamen miners operating on lavaland.
obj.item.clothing.head.helmet.space.plas.name: mining plasma envirosuit helmet

obj.item.clothing.head.helmet.space.plas.desc: An envirohelmet designed for plasmaman paramedics, with darker blue stripes compared to the medical model.
obj.item.clothing.head.helmet.space.plas.name: paramedic plasma envirosuit helmet

obj.item.clothing.head.helmet.space.plas.desc: Extra large version of plasmaman helmet, made to fit those with non-humanoid skulls.
obj.item.clothing.head.helmet.space.plas.name: plasMAX envirosuit helmet

obj.item.clothing.head.helmet.space.plas.desc: A plasmaman containment helmet for prisoners.
obj.item.clothing.head.helmet.space.plas.name: prisoner's plasma envirosuit helmet

obj.item.clothing.head.helmet.space.plas.desc: A special containment helmet designed for the Research Director. A light brown design is applied to differentiate them from other scientists.
obj.item.clothing.head.helmet.space.plas.name: research director's plasma envirosuit helmet

obj.item.clothing.head.helmet.space.plas.desc: A plasmaman envirohelmet designed for roboticists.
obj.item.clothing.head.helmet.space.plas.name: robotics plasma envirosuit helmet

obj.item.clothing.head.helmet.space.plas.desc: A plasmaman envirohelmet designed for scientists.
obj.item.clothing.head.helmet.space.plas.name: science plasma envirosuit helmet

obj.item.clothing.head.helmet.space.plas.desc: A plasmaman containment helmet designed for security officers, protecting them from burning alive, alongside other undesirables.
obj.item.clothing.head.helmet.space.plas.name: security plasma envirosuit helmet

obj.item.clothing.head.helmet.space.plas.desc: A special containment helmet designed for detectives, protecting them from burning alive, alongside other undesirables.
obj.item.clothing.head.helmet.space.plas.name: detective's plasma envirosuit helmet

obj.item.clothing.head.helmet.space.plas.desc: A special containment helmet designed for the Head of Security. A pair of gold stripes are added to differentiate them from other members of security.
obj.item.clothing.head.helmet.space.plas.name: head of security's plasma envirosuit helmet

obj.item.clothing.head.helmet.space.plas.desc: A plasmaman containment helmet designed for the warden. A pair of white stripes being added to differeciate them from other members of security.
obj.item.clothing.head.helmet.space.plas.name: warden's plasma envirosuit helmet

obj.item.clothing.head.helmet.space.plas.desc: There's no doubt about it, this helmet puts you above ALL of the other plasmamen. If you see another plasmaman wearing a helmet like this, it's either because they're a fellow badass, 		or they've murdered one of your fellow badasses and have taken it from them as a trophy. Either way, anyone wearing this deserves at least a cursory nod of respect.
obj.item.clothing.head.helmet.space.plas.name: tacticool envirosuit helmet

obj.item.clothing.head.helmet.space.plas.desc: The helmet worn by the safest people on the station, those who are completely immune to the monstrosities they create.
obj.item.clothing.head.helmet.space.plas.name: virology plasma envirosuit helmet

obj.item.clothing.head.helmet.space.plas.desc: A generic white envirohelm.
obj.item.clothing.head.helmet.space.plas.name: white plasma envirosuit helmet

obj.item.clothing.head.helmet.space.skin.desc:
A reinforced type of 'Glass' often used particularly by Azulean boarding teams, this offshoot of the ones seen in Shoredresses is built to last. 
		These make use of laminated glass rather than the typical 'flexiglass' of civilian models, allowing them not only durability, but to hold together when a shatter does occur; 		and for what remains to stay in the frame. These are typically made of up to four layers of the stuff, working unintentionally to ensure the faces of their wearers are difficult to identify. 

		In addition, the interlayer gives the helms sound insulation properties, and the ability to block UV radiation. 		These helmets are known for being distinctly uncomfortable in comparison to their civilian counterparts; cramped and with only the most barebones climate control tech.
obj.item.clothing.head.helmet.space.skin.name: Stardress helm

obj.item.clothing.head.helmet.taghelm.re.name: red laser tag helmet

obj.item.clothing.head.helmet.toggleable.name: helmet

obj.item.clothing.head.helmet.toggleable.desc: WEEEEOOO. WEEEEEOOO. STOP THAT MONKEY. WEEEOOOO.
obj.item.clothing.head.helmet.toggleable.name: alarm helmet

obj.item.clothing.head.helmet.toggleable.desc: Space Jesus gives his silliest hats to his most whimsical of goobers.
obj.item.clothing.head.helmet.toggleable.name: pinwheel hat

obj.item.clothing.head.helmet.toggleable.desc: The strongest possible pinwheel pinwheel hat. Such is fate that the silliest things in the world are also the most beautiful; others may not see the shine in you, but the magnificent pinwheel hat does. It appreciates you for who you are and what you've done. It feels alive, and makes you feel alive too. You see the totality of existence reflected in the golden shimmer of the pin.
obj.item.clothing.head.helmet.toggleable.name: magnificent pinwheel hat

obj.item.clothing.head.helmet.toggleable.desc: It's a helmet specifically designed to protect against close range attacks.
obj.item.clothing.head.helmet.toggleable.name: riot helmet

obj.item.clothing.head.helmet.toggleable.desc: A thick-fronted helmet with extendable visor for whole face protection. The materials and geometry of the helmet 		combine in such a way that bullets lose much of their armor penetrating energy before any damage can be done, rather than penetrate into it.
obj.item.clothing.head.helmet.toggleable.name: 'Muur' enclosed helmet

obj.item.clothing.head.helmet.toggleable.desc: A thick-fronted helmet with extendable visor for whole face protection. The materials and geometry of the helmet 		combine in such a way that bullets lose much of their armor penetrating energy before any damage can be done, rather than penetrate into it. 		This one has a red stripe down the front.
obj.item.clothing.head.helmet.toggleable.name: 'Archangel' enclosed helmet

obj.item.clothing.head.helmet.viro.name: helmet

obj.item.clothing.head.hooded.ablative.desc: Hood hopefully belonging to an ablative trenchcoat. Includes a visor for cool-o-vision.

obj.item.clothing.head.hooded.berserker.desc: This burdensome helmet seems to possess some kind of dark force within; howling in rage, hungry for carnage. 		The self-sealing stem bolts that allowed this helmet to be spaceworthy have long since corroded. However, the entity 		sealed within the suit seems to hunger for the fleeting lifeforce found in the remains left in the remains of drakes. 		Feeding it drake remains seems to empower a suit piece, though turns the remains back to lifeless ash.
obj.item.clothing.head.hooded.berserker.name: berserker helmet

obj.item.clothing.head.hooded.berserker..desc: A uniquely styled helmet with ghastly red eyes that seals it's user inside.
obj.item.clothing.head.hooded.berserker..name: berserker helmet

obj.item.clothing.head.hooded.big_hoodie.desc: Cotton fibres grown in vertical aeroponic farming systems were ringspun and knit into a continuous loop fleece with 	a soft pile and little stretch. The hood was cut comfortably oversized.
obj.item.clothing.head.hooded.big_hoodie.name: oversized hood

obj.item.clothing.head.hooded.carp_hood.desc: A hood attached to a carp costume.
obj.item.clothing.head.hooded.carp_hood.name: carp hood

obj.item.clothing.head.hooded.carp_hood..desc: Spaceworthy and it looks like a space carp's head, smells like one too.
obj.item.clothing.head.hooded.carp_hood..name: carp helmet

obj.item.clothing.head.hooded.chaplain_h.desc: Hood made for acolytes of the chaplain.
obj.item.clothing.head.hooded.chaplain_h.name: follower hood

obj.item.clothing.head.hooded.chaplain_h.desc: A divine hood included, because have you ever got the sun in your eyes during archery? Oh, it's just the worst.
obj.item.clothing.head.hooded.chaplain_h.name: divine archer hood

obj.item.clothing.head.hooded.chaplain_h.desc: I mean, you don't /have/ to seek bling water. I just think you should.
obj.item.clothing.head.hooded.chaplain_h.name: leader hood

obj.item.clothing.head.hooded.cloakhood..name: red cloak hood

obj.item.clothing.head.hooded.cloakhood..desc: The horns and skull of a wendigo, held together by the remaining icy energy of a demonic miner.
obj.item.clothing.head.hooded.cloakhood..name: godslayer helm

obj.item.clothing.head.hooded.cloakhood..desc: This hat is unquestionably the best one, bluespaced to and from CentCom. It smells of Fish and Tea with a hint of antagonism
obj.item.clothing.head.hooded.cloakhood..name: NT special issue

obj.item.clothing.head.hooded.cult_hoodi.desc: Gleaming gems conjure forth wisps of power, turning about to illuminate the wearer in a dim radiance. 			Gazing upon the robe, you cannot help but feel noticed.
obj.item.clothing.head.hooded.cult_hoodi.name: Starwoven Hood

obj.item.clothing.head.hooded.cult_hoodi.desc: A torn, dust-caked hood. Strange eyes line the inside.
obj.item.clothing.head.hooded.cult_hoodi.name: ominous hood

obj.item.clothing.head.hooded.cult_hoodi.desc: Touching the folds of this plain robe seem to fill you with unease. 			Even looking fills you with a sense of vertigo. 			Some pulse threatening to pull you within.

obj.item.clothing.head.hooded.cult_hoodi.desc: At first, the empty canvas of this robe seems to shimmer with a faint, cold light. 			Yet upon tracking the shape of the folds more carefully, it is better to describe it as the absence of such a thing.

obj.item.clothing.mask.gas.hecu2.desc: A deprecated field protective mask developed during the 20th century in Sol-3. It's designed to protect from chemical agents, biological agents, and nuclear fallout particles. It does not protect the user from ammonia or from lack of oxygen, though the filter can be replaced with a tube for any air tank.

obj.item.clothing.mask.gas.mime.desc: The traditional mime's mask. It has an eerie facial posture.
obj.item.clothing.mask.gas.mime.name: mime mask

obj.item.clothing.mask.gas.mime.plasmama.desc: The traditional mime's mask. It has an eerie facial posture.
obj.item.clothing.mask.gas.mime.plasmama.name: mime mask

obj.item.clothing.mask.gas.ninja.plasmam.desc: A close-fitting nano-enhanced mask that acts both as an air filter and a post-modern fashion statement.
