obj.item.clothing.mask.gas.prop.name: prop gas mask

obj.item.clothing.mask.gas.respirator.desc: A half mask respirator that's really just a standard gas mask with the glass taken off.
obj.item.clothing.mask.gas.respirator.name: half mask respirator

obj.item.clothing.mask.gas.sechailer.desc: A standard issue Security gas mask with integrated 'Compli-o-nator 3000' device. Plays over a dozen pre-recorded compliance phrases designed to get scumbags to stand still whilst you tase them. Do not tamper with the device.
obj.item.clothing.mask.gas.sechailer.name: security gas mask

obj.item.clothing.mask.gas.sechailer.cyb.desc: A set of recognizable pre-recorded messages for cyborgs to use when apprehending criminals.
obj.item.clothing.mask.gas.sechailer.cyb.name: security hailer

obj.item.clothing.mask.gas.sechailer.pla.desc: A standard issue Security gas mask with integrated 'Compli-o-nator 3000' device. Plays over a dozen pre-recorded compliance phrases designed to get scumbags to stand still whilst you tase them. Do not tamper with the device.
obj.item.clothing.mask.gas.sechailer.pla.name: security gas mask

obj.item.clothing.mask.gas.sechailer.swa.desc: A close-fitting tactical mask with an especially aggressive Compli-o-nator 3000.
obj.item.clothing.mask.gas.sechailer.swa.name: SWAT mask

obj.item.clothing.mask.gas.sechailer.swa.desc: A close-fitting tactical mask created in cooperation with a certain megacorporation, comes with an especially aggressive Compli-o-nator 3000.
obj.item.clothing.mask.gas.sechailer.swa.name: spacepol mask

obj.item.clothing.mask.gas.sechailer.syn.desc: For the agent wanting to keep a low profile whilst concealing their identity. Has a small respirator to be used with internals.
obj.item.clothing.mask.gas.sechailer.syn.name: neck gaiter

obj.item.clothing.mask.gas.sechailer.vox.desc: A standard issue Security gas mask with integrated 'Compli-o-nator 3000' device. Plays over a dozen pre-recorded compliance phrases designed to get scumbags to stand still whilst you tase them. Do not tamper with the device. This one's got an easily accessible feeding port to be more suitable for the Vox crewmembers.
obj.item.clothing.mask.gas.sechailer.vox.name: security gas mask

obj.item.clothing.mask.gas.seva.desc: A head-covering mask that can be connected to an external air supply. Intended for use with the SEVA Suit.
obj.item.clothing.mask.gas.seva.name: SEVA mask

obj.item.clothing.mask.gas.sexyclown.desc: A feminine clown mask for the dabbling crossdressers or female entertainers.
obj.item.clothing.mask.gas.sexyclown.name: sexy-clown wig and mask

obj.item.clothing.mask.gas.soviet.desc: A white gas mask with a green filter, there's a small sticker verifying it's Asbestos free! An even smaller sticker has been torn off. Nothing to worry about.
obj.item.clothing.mask.gas.soviet.name: soviet gas mask

obj.item.clothing.mask.gas.syndicate.desc: A close-fitting tactical mask that can be connected to an air supply.
obj.item.clothing.mask.gas.syndicate.name: syndicate mask

obj.item.clothing.mask.gas.syndicate.cyb.desc: It's really more about making a statement than protecting you from environmental hazards.
obj.item.clothing.mask.gas.syndicate.cyb.name: Cybersun mask

obj.item.clothing.mask.gas.syndicate.ds.desc: A fancy balaclava, while it doesn't muffle your voice, it's fireproof and has a miniature rebreather for internals. Comfy to boot!
obj.item.clothing.mask.gas.syndicate.ds.name: balaclava

obj.item.clothing.mask.gas.syndicate.pla.desc: A close-fitting tactical mask that can be connected to an air supply.
obj.item.clothing.mask.gas.syndicate.pla.name: syndicate mask

obj.item.clothing.mask.gas.tiki_mask.desc: A creepy wooden mask. Surprisingly expressive for a poorly carved bit of wood.
obj.item.clothing.mask.gas.tiki_mask.name: tiki mask

obj.item.clothing.mask.gas.tiki_mask.yal.desc: A creepy wooden mask. Surprisingly expressive for a poorly carved bit of wood.
obj.item.clothing.mask.gas.tiki_mask.yal.name: tiki mask

obj.item.clothing.mask.gas.welding.desc: A gas mask with built-in welding goggles and a face shield. Looks like a skull - clearly designed by a nerd.
obj.item.clothing.mask.gas.welding.name: welding mask

obj.item.clothing.mask.hheart.desc: It's an odd ceramic mask. Set in the internal side are several suspicious electronics branded by Steele Tech.
obj.item.clothing.mask.hheart.name: Hollow Heart

obj.item.clothing.mask.hifl.desc: Just like the good ol' days.
obj.item.clothing.mask.hifl.name: H.I.F.L. mask

obj.item.clothing.mask.joy.desc: Express your happiness or hide your sorrows with this cultured cutout.
obj.item.clothing.mask.joy.name: emotion mask

obj.item.clothing.mask.kitsune.desc: Porcelain mask made in the style of the Sol-3 region. It is painted to look like a kitsune.
obj.item.clothing.mask.kitsune.name: kitsune mask

obj.item.clothing.mask.leatherwhip.desc: A tool used for domination. Hurts in a way you like it.
obj.item.clothing.mask.leatherwhip.name: leather whip

obj.item.clothing.mask.luchador.desc: Worn by robust fighters, flying high to defeat their foes!
obj.item.clothing.mask.luchador.name: Luchador Mask

obj.item.clothing.mask.luchador.enzo.desc: A mask belonging to El Red Templar, a warrior of lucha. Taking it from him is not recommended.
obj.item.clothing.mask.luchador.enzo.name: mask of El Red Templar

obj.item.clothing.mask.luchador.rudos.desc: Worn by robust fighters who are willing to do anything to win.
obj.item.clothing.mask.luchador.rudos.name: Rudos Mask

obj.item.clothing.mask.luchador.tecnicos.desc: Worn by robust fighters who uphold justice and fight honorably.
obj.item.clothing.mask.luchador.tecnicos.name: Tecnicos Mask

obj.item.clothing.mask.madness_mask.desc: A mask created from suffering. When you look into its eyes, it looks back.
obj.item.clothing.mask.madness_mask.name: abyssal mask

obj.item.clothing.mask.masquerade.desc: You'll never guess who's under that mask, it's the perfect disguise!
obj.item.clothing.mask.masquerade.name: masquerade mask

obj.item.clothing.mask.masquerade.feathe.desc: You'll never guess who's under that mask, it's the perfect disguise! This one even has a feather, to make it fancier!
obj.item.clothing.mask.masquerade.feathe.name: feathered masquerade mask

obj.item.clothing.mask.masquerade.two_co.desc: You'll never guess who's under that mask, it's the perfect disguise! There's even two colors, to add to the confusion!
obj.item.clothing.mask.masquerade.two_co.name: split masquerade mask

obj.item.clothing.mask.masquerade.two_co.desc: You'll never guess who's under that mask, it's the perfect disguise! There's even two colors AND a feather, making it the most fancy masquerade mask yet!
obj.item.clothing.mask.masquerade.two_co.name: feathered split masquerade mask

obj.item.clothing.mask.muzzle.ball.desc: I'm pretty fuckin far from okay.
obj.item.clothing.mask.muzzle.ball.name: ballgag

obj.item.clothing.mask.muzzle.ring.desc: A mouth wrap seemingly designed to hold the mouth open.
obj.item.clothing.mask.muzzle.ring.name: ring gag

obj.item.clothing.mask.muzzle.tape.desc: A piece of tape that can be put over someone's mouth.
obj.item.clothing.mask.muzzle.tape.name: tape piece

obj.item.clothing.mask.muzzle.tape.point.desc: A piece of tape that can be put over someone's mouth. Looks like it will hurt if this is ripped off.
obj.item.clothing.mask.muzzle.tape.point.name: pointy tape piece

obj.item.clothing.mask.muzzle.tape.point.desc: A piece of tape that can be put over someone's mouth. This thing could rip your face into a thousand pieces if ripped off.
obj.item.clothing.mask.muzzle.tape.point.name: super pointy tape piece

obj.item.clothing.mask.muzzle.tape.super.desc: A piece of tape that can be put over someone's mouth. This one has extra strength.
obj.item.clothing.mask.muzzle.tape.super.name: super tape piece

obj.item.clothing.mask.muzzle.tape.surgi.desc: A piece of tape that can be put over someone's mouth. As long as you apply this to your patient, you won't hear their screams of pain!
obj.item.clothing.mask.muzzle.tape.surgi.name: surgical tape piece

obj.item.clothing.mask.nobreath.desc: A transparent mask, resembling a conventional breath mask, but made of bluish slime. Seems to lack any air supply tube, though.
obj.item.clothing.mask.nobreath.name: rebreather mask

obj.item.clothing.mask.paper.desc: It's true. Once you wear a mask for so long, you forget about who you are. Wonder if that happens with shitty paper ones.
obj.item.clothing.mask.paper.name: paper mask

obj.item.clothing.mask.party_horn.desc: A paper tube used at parties that makes a noise when blown into.
obj.item.clothing.mask.party_horn.name: party horn

obj.item.clothing.mask.primitive_catgirl.desc: A cloth for covering your neck, and usually part of your face too, but that part's optional.
obj.item.clothing.mask.primitive_catgirl.name: neck gaiter

obj.item.clothing.mask.rebellion.desc: Mask that is usually used during rebellions by insurgents. It covers the entire face and makes you unrecognizable.
obj.item.clothing.mask.rebellion.name: rebellion mask

obj.item.clothing.mask.surgical.desc: A sterile mask designed to help prevent the spread of diseases.
obj.item.clothing.mask.surgical.name: sterile mask

obj.item.clothing.mask.surgical.greyscal.desc: A sterile mask designed to help prevent the spread of diseases.
obj.item.clothing.mask.surgical.greyscal.name: sterile mask

obj.item.clothing.mask.whistle.desc: A police whistle for when you need to make sure the criminals hear you.
obj.item.clothing.mask.whistle.name: police whistle

obj.item.clothing.mask.whistle.minigame.desc: A referee whistle used to call fouls against players.
obj.item.clothing.mask.whistle.minigame.name: referee whistle

obj.item.clothing.neck.antimagic_collar.desc: A cumbersome collar of antimagic nature, capable of reaching into - and cutting off - a thread of mansus wherever it may be.
obj.item.clothing.neck.antimagic_collar.name: irreality collar

obj.item.clothing.neck.beads.desc: A cheap, plastic bead necklace. Show team spirit! Collect them! Throw them away! The possibilities are endless!
obj.item.clothing.neck.beads.name: plastic bead necklace

obj.item.clothing.neck.binary.desc: It's a sad piece of clothing where one finds many graves.
obj.item.clothing.neck.binary.name: crow feather cloak

obj.item.clothing.neck.bowtie.rainbow.desc: An extremely large neosilk rainbow-colored bowtie.
obj.item.clothing.neck.bowtie.rainbow.name: rainbow bow tie

obj.item.clothing.neck.bunny_pendant.desc: A golden pendant depicting a holy rabbit.
obj.item.clothing.neck.bunny_pendant.name: bunny pendant

obj.item.clothing.neck.chaplain.black.cl.desc: A unique cloak that shimmers with the Corporate Liaison's emblem.
obj.item.clothing.neck.chaplain.black.cl.name: corporate liaison's cloak

obj.item.clothing.neck.cloak.desc: It's a cape that can be worn around your neck.
obj.item.clothing.neck.cloak.name: brown cloak

obj.item.clothing.neck.cloak.admiral.desc: A vibrant green cape with gold stitching, worn by Nanotrasen Navy Admirals.
obj.item.clothing.neck.cloak.admiral.name: admiral's cape

obj.item.clothing.neck.cloak.cap.desc: Worn by the commander of Space Station 13.
obj.item.clothing.neck.cloak.cap.name: captain's cloak

obj.item.clothing.neck.cloak.ce.desc: Worn by Engitopia, wielders of an unlimited power.
obj.item.clothing.neck.cloak.ce.name: chief engineer's cloak

obj.item.clothing.neck.cloak.cmo.desc: Worn by Meditopia, the valiant men and women keeping pestilence at bay.
obj.item.clothing.neck.cloak.cmo.name: chief medical officer's cloak

obj.item.clothing.neck.cloak.colonial.desc: A cloak made from heavy tarpaulin. Nigh wind- and waterproof thanks to its design.
obj.item.clothing.neck.cloak.colonial.name: colonial cloak

obj.item.clothing.neck.cloak.colonial.nr.desc: A cloak made from heavy tarpaulin. Nigh wind- and waterproof thanks to its design. The signature white rectangle of the Commonwealth police covers the garment's back.
obj.item.clothing.neck.cloak.colonial.nr.name: imperial police cloak

obj.item.clothing.neck.cloak.colourable.desc: It's a cape that can be worn around your neck.
obj.item.clothing.neck.cloak.colourable.name: colourable cloak

obj.item.clothing.neck.cloak.colourable..desc: It's a cape that can be worn around your neck.
obj.item.clothing.neck.cloak.colourable..name: colourable boatcloak

obj.item.clothing.neck.cloak.colourable..desc: It's a cape that can be worn around your neck.
obj.item.clothing.neck.cloak.colourable..name: colourable shroud

obj.item.clothing.neck.cloak.colourable..desc: It's a cape that can be worn around your neck.
obj.item.clothing.neck.cloak.colourable..name: colourable veil

obj.item.clothing.neck.cloak.fleet_admir.desc: A godly cape worn by the highest ranking person in the Nanotrasen Navy, the Fleet Admiral.
obj.item.clothing.neck.cloak.fleet_admir.name: fleet admiral's cape

obj.item.clothing.neck.cloak.fluffycloak.desc: Hugs and kisses is only what this one knows, may their hugs be for all and not for their own "For Fuffy Use Only".
obj.item.clothing.neck.cloak.fluffycloak.name: Cloak of the Fluffy One

obj.item.clothing.neck.cloak.grunnyyy.desc: The design on this seems a little too familiar.
obj.item.clothing.neck.cloak.grunnyyy.name: black and red cloak

obj.item.clothing.neck.cloak.healercloak.desc: Worn by the most skilled professional medics on the station, this legendary cloak is only attainable by becoming the pinnacle of healing. This status symbol represents the wearer has spent countless years perfecting their craft of helping the sick and wounded.
obj.item.clothing.neck.cloak.healercloak.name: legendary healer's cloak

obj.item.clothing.neck.cloak.herald_cloa.desc: A cloak which protects you from the heresy of the world.
obj.item.clothing.neck.cloak.herald_cloa.name: cloak of the prophet

obj.item.clothing.neck.cloak.hop.desc: Worn by the Head of Personnel. It smells faintly of bureaucracy.
obj.item.clothing.neck.cloak.hop.name: head of personnel's cloak

obj.item.clothing.neck.cloak.hos.desc: Worn by Securistan, ruling the station with an iron fist.
obj.item.clothing.neck.cloak.hos.name: head of security's cloak

obj.item.clothing.neck.cloak.hos.redsec.desc: Worn by Securistan, ruling the station with an iron fist.
obj.item.clothing.neck.cloak.hos.redsec.name: head of security's cloak

obj.item.clothing.neck.cloak.inferno.desc: The design on this seems a little too familiar.
obj.item.clothing.neck.cloak.inferno.name: Kiara's cloak

obj.item.clothing.neck.cloak.qm.desc: Worn by Cargonia, supplying the station with the necessary tools for survival.
obj.item.clothing.neck.cloak.qm.name: quartermaster's cloak

obj.item.clothing.neck.cloak.qm.syndie.desc: A cloak that represents the eternal Cargoslavia. There's little Mosin Nagant emblems woven into the fabric.
obj.item.clothing.neck.cloak.qm.syndie.name: deck officer's cloak

obj.item.clothing.neck.cloak.rd.desc: Worn by Sciencia, thaumaturges and researchers of the universe.
obj.item.clothing.neck.cloak.rd.name: research director's cloak

obj.item.clothing.neck.cloak.skill_rewar.desc: It's a cape that can be worn around your neck.
obj.item.clothing.neck.cloak.skill_rewar.name: brown cloak

obj.item.clothing.neck.cloak.skill_rewar.desc: Worn by the most skilled custodians, this legendary cloak is only attainable by achieving janitorial enlightenment. This status symbol represents a being not only extensively trained in grime combat, but one who is willing to use an entire arsenal of cleaning supplies to its full extent to wipe grime's miserable ass off the face of the station.
obj.item.clothing.neck.cloak.skill_rewar.name: legendary cleaner's cloak

obj.item.clothing.neck.cloak.skill_rewar.desc: Those who wear this cloak have the knowledge and understanding to start the foundation of a civilization. 	It is within folklore that there exists people who can create and destroy villages, towns, and cities within minutes.
obj.item.clothing.neck.cloak.skill_rewar.name: legendary builder's cloak

obj.item.clothing.neck.cloak.skill_rewar.desc: Worn by the most skilled professional gamers on the station, this legendary cloak is only attainable by achieving true gaming enlightenment. This status symbol represents the awesome might of a being of focus, commitment, and sheer fucking will. Something casual gamers will never begin to understand.
obj.item.clothing.neck.cloak.skill_rewar.name: legendary gamer's cloak

obj.item.clothing.neck.cloak.skill_rewar.desc: Worn by the most skilled miners, this legendary cloak is only attainable by achieving true mineral enlightenment. This status symbol represents a being who has forgotten more about rocks than most miners will ever know, a being who has moved mountains and filled valleys.
obj.item.clothing.neck.cloak.skill_rewar.name: legendary miner's cloak

obj.item.clothing.neck.cloak.skill_rewar.desc: Worn by the wisest of veteran employees, this legendary cloak is only attainable by maintaining a living employment agreement with Nanotrasen for over five thousand hours. This status symbol represents a being is better than you in nearly every quantifiable way, simple as that.
obj.item.clothing.neck.cloak.skill_rewar.name: legendary veteran's cloak

obj.item.clothing.neck.cloak.skill_rewar.desc: Those who wear this cloak take the responsibility that comes with it: that they may be last survivor of their race. 	Society may change or crumble, yet those who wear this cloak will observe that destruction and carry their task.
obj.item.clothing.neck.cloak.skill_rewar.name: legendary survivalist's cloak

obj.item.clothing.neck.cloak.skill_rewar.desc: Worn by the most skilled producers, this legendary cloak is only attainable by knowing how to create the best products. 	This status symbol represents a being who has crafted some of the finest glass and ceramic works.
obj.item.clothing.neck.cloak.skill_rewar.name: legendary producer's cloak

obj.item.clothing.neck.cloak.skill_rewar.desc: This legendary cloak is awarded only to those who have created a large stir within the scientific community with their contributions. 	Those who wear this cloak create the scientific foundations, and have the ability to discern the truth of the universe even from the most mundane things.
obj.item.clothing.neck.cloak.skill_rewar.name: legendary researcher's cloak

obj.item.clothing.neck.cloak.skill_rewar.desc: Worn by the most skilled smithies, this legendary cloak is only attainable by knowing every inch of the blacksmith's forge. 	This status symbol represents a being who has forged some of the finest weapons and armors.
obj.item.clothing.neck.cloak.skill_rewar.name: legendary smithy's cloak

obj.item.clothing.neck.cloak.tribalmantl.desc: An ornate mantle commonly worn by a shaman or chieftain.
obj.item.clothing.neck.cloak.tribalmantl.name: ornate mantle

obj.item.clothing.neck.cloak.wolf_coat.desc: A cloak made of very lively wolf fur, feels warm to touch.
obj.item.clothing.neck.cloak.wolf_coat.name: wolf pelt cloak

obj.item.clothing.neck.collar.reagent_cl.desc: A collar that is ready to be worn for certain individuals.
obj.item.clothing.neck.collar.reagent_cl.name: reagent collar

obj.item.clothing.neck.collar_bomb.desc: A cumbersome collar of some sort, filled with just enough explosive to rip one's head off... at least that's what it reads on the front tag.
obj.item.clothing.neck.collar_bomb.name: collar bomb

obj.item.clothing.neck.cowboylea.desc: A sand covered cloak, there seems to be a small deer head with antlers embroidered inside.
obj.item.clothing.neck.cowboylea.name: green cowboy poncho

obj.item.clothing.neck.cross.desc: A silver cross to be worn on a chain around your neck. Certain to bring you favour from up above.
obj.item.clothing.neck.cross.name: silver cross

obj.item.clothing.neck.eldritch_amulet.desc: A strange medallion. Peering through the crystalline surface, the world around you melts away. You see your own beating heart, and the pulsing of a thousand others.
obj.item.clothing.neck.eldritch_amulet.name: warm eldritch medallion

obj.item.clothing.neck.eldritch_amulet.p.desc: A strange medallion. Peering through the crystalline surface, the light refracts into new and terrifying spectrums of color. You see yourself, reflected off cascading mirrors, warped into impossible shapes.
obj.item.clothing.neck.eldritch_amulet.p.name: piercing eldritch medallion

obj.item.clothing.neck.face_scarf.desc: A warm looking scarf that you can easily put around your face.
obj.item.clothing.neck.face_scarf.name: face scarf

obj.item.clothing.neck.fake_heretic_amul.desc: A strange medallion, which makes its wearer look like they're part of some cult.
obj.item.clothing.neck.fake_heretic_amul.name: religious icon

obj.item.clothing.neck.fishpendant.desc:
A simple, silver necklace with a blue tuna pendant.
"L. Alazawi" is inscribed on the back. You get the feeling it would go well with potatoes and green beans.
obj.item.clothing.neck.fishpendant.name: fish necklace

obj.item.clothing.neck.flower_collar.desc: A purple collar with a dainty red flower attached to the right side of the item.
obj.item.clothing.neck.flower_collar.name: Flower Collar

obj.item.clothing.neck.heretic_focus.desc: An amber focusing glass that provides a link to the world beyond. The necklace seems to twitch, but only when you look at it from the corner of your eye.
obj.item.clothing.neck.heretic_focus.name: amber focus

obj.item.clothing.neck.heretic_focus.cri.desc: A blood-red focusing glass that provides a link to the world beyond, and worse. Its eye is constantly twitching and gazing in all directions. It almost seems to be silently screaming...
obj.item.clothing.neck.heretic_focus.cri.name: crimson medallion

obj.item.clothing.neck.heretic_focus.moo.desc: A piece of the mind, the soul and the moon. Gazing into it makes your head spin and hear whispers of laughter and joy.
obj.item.clothing.neck.heretic_focus.moo.name: moonlight amulet

obj.item.clothing.neck.human_petcollar.desc: It's for pets. Though you probably could wear it yourself, you'd doubtless be the subject of ridicule.
obj.item.clothing.neck.human_petcollar.name: pet collar

obj.item.clothing.neck.human_petcollar.c.desc: Quite fashionable... if you're somebody who's just read their first BDSM-themed erotica novel.
obj.item.clothing.neck.human_petcollar.c.name: choker

obj.item.clothing.neck.human_petcollar.l.desc: It's for pets. Though you probably could wear it yourself, you'd doubtless be the subject of ridicule.
obj.item.clothing.neck.human_petcollar.l.name: leather pet collar

obj.item.clothing.neck.human_petcollar.l.desc: A collar that has a small lock on it to keep it from being removed.
obj.item.clothing.neck.human_petcollar.l.name: locked collar

obj.item.clothing.neck.human_petcollar.l.desc: A loud and annoying collar for your little kitten!
obj.item.clothing.neck.human_petcollar.l.name: bell collar

obj.item.clothing.neck.human_petcollar.l.desc: Quite fashionable... if you're somebody who's just read their first BDSM-themed erotica novel.
obj.item.clothing.neck.human_petcollar.l.name: choker

obj.item.clothing.neck.human_petcollar.l.desc: Don't fear the reaper, now your pet doesn't have to.
obj.item.clothing.neck.human_petcollar.l.name: cowbell collar

obj.item.clothing.neck.human_petcollar.l.desc: A collar with holographic information. Like a microchip, but around the neck.
obj.item.clothing.neck.human_petcollar.l.name: holocollar

obj.item.clothing.neck.human_petcollar.l.desc: A collar that has a small lock on it to keep it from being removed.
obj.item.clothing.neck.human_petcollar.l.name: leather pet collar

obj.item.clothing.neck.human_petcollar.l.desc: A soft collar that chimes for your little pet!
obj.item.clothing.neck.human_petcollar.l.name: ringing bell collar

obj.item.clothing.neck.human_petcollar.l.desc: A collar for a moody pet. Or a pitbull.
obj.item.clothing.neck.human_petcollar.l.name: spiked collar

obj.item.clothing.neck.human_petcollar.t.desc: Like the normal one, but thinner!
obj.item.clothing.neck.human_petcollar.t.name: thin choker

obj.item.clothing.neck.inferno_collar.desc: A soft black collar that seems to stretch to fit whoever wears it.
obj.item.clothing.neck.inferno_collar.name: Kiara's collar

obj.item.clothing.neck.kink_collar.desc: A nice, tight collar. It fits snug to your skin
obj.item.clothing.neck.kink_collar.name: collar

obj.item.clothing.neck.kink_collar.locke.desc: A tight collar. It appears to have some kind of lock.
obj.item.clothing.neck.kink_collar.locke.name: locked collar

obj.item.clothing.neck.kink_collar.locke.desc: A collar that lets you find your pet anywhere with GPS!
obj.item.clothing.neck.kink_collar.locke.name: tracking collar

obj.item.clothing.neck.lace_collar.desc: A delicate choker with a silver heart on the front.
obj.item.clothing.neck.lace_collar.name: heart choker

obj.item.clothing.neck.link_scryer.desc: An intricate piece of machinery that creates a holographic video call with another MODlink-compatible device. Essentially a video necklace.
obj.item.clothing.neck.link_scryer.name: MODlink scryer

obj.item.clothing.neck.link_scryer.loade.desc: An intricate piece of machinery that creates a holographic video call with another MODlink-compatible device. Essentially a video necklace.
obj.item.clothing.neck.link_scryer.loade.name: MODlink scryer

obj.item.clothing.neck.link_scryer.loade.desc: An intricate piece of machinery that creates a holographic video call with another MODlink-compatible device. Essentially a video necklace.
obj.item.clothing.neck.link_scryer.loade.name: MODlink scryer

obj.item.clothing.neck.link_scryer.loade.desc: A nanomachine construct working as a modified version of the MODlink scryer, conjured using a NIF; functionally the same, but able to carry out holocalls in a more portable format.
obj.item.clothing.neck.link_scryer.loade.name: NIFLink Holocaller

obj.item.clothing.neck.long_cape.desc: A graceful cloak that carefully surrounds your body.
obj.item.clothing.neck.long_cape.name: long cape

obj.item.clothing.neck.maid_neck_cover.desc: A neckpiece for a maid costume, it smells faintly of disappointment.
obj.item.clothing.neck.maid_neck_cover.name: maid neck cover

obj.item.clothing.neck.mantle.desc: A decorative drape over the shoulders. This one has a simple, dry color.
obj.item.clothing.neck.mantle.name: mantle

obj.item.clothing.neck.mantle.bsmantle.desc: A plated mantle with command colors. Suitable for the one assigned to making sure they're still breathing.
obj.item.clothing.neck.mantle.bsmantle.name: the blueshield's mantle

obj.item.clothing.neck.mantle.capmantle.desc: A formal mantle to drape around the shoulders. Others stand on the shoulders of giants. You're the giant they stand on.
obj.item.clothing.neck.mantle.capmantle.name: the captain's mantle

obj.item.clothing.neck.mantle.cemantle.desc: A bright white and yellow striped mantle. Do not wear around active machinery.
obj.item.clothing.neck.mantle.cemantle.name: the chief engineer's mantle

obj.item.clothing.neck.mantle.cmomantle.desc: A light blue shoulder draping for THE medical professional. Contrasts well with blood.
obj.item.clothing.neck.mantle.cmomantle.name: the chief medical officer's mantle

obj.item.clothing.neck.mantle.hopmantle.desc: A decorative draping of blue and red over your shoulders, signifying your stamping prowess.
obj.item.clothing.neck.mantle.hopmantle.name: the head of personnel's mantle

obj.item.clothing.neck.mantle.hosmantle.desc: A plated mantle that one might wrap around the upper torso. The 'scales' of the garment signify the members of security and how you're carrying them on your shoulders.
obj.item.clothing.neck.mantle.hosmantle.name: the head of security's mantle

obj.item.clothing.neck.mantle.qm.desc: A snug and comfortable looking shoulder covering garment, it has an air of rebellion and independence. Or annoyance and delusions, your call.
obj.item.clothing.neck.mantle.qm.name: the quartermaster's mantle

obj.item.clothing.neck.mantle.rdmantle.desc: A terribly comfortable shoulder draping for the discerning scientist of fashion.
obj.item.clothing.neck.mantle.rdmantle.name: the research director's mantle

obj.item.clothing.neck.mantle.recolorabl.desc: A simple drape over the shoulders.
obj.item.clothing.neck.mantle.recolorabl.name: mantle

obj.item.clothing.neck.mantle.recolorabl.desc: A simple drape over the shoulders.
obj.item.clothing.neck.mantle.recolorabl.name: mantle

obj.item.clothing.neck.mantle.regal.desc: A colorful felt mantle. You feel posh just holding this thing.
obj.item.clothing.neck.mantle.regal.name: regal mantle

obj.item.clothing.neck.mind_collar.desc: A tight collar. It has some strange high-tech emitters on the side.
obj.item.clothing.neck.mind_collar.name: mind collar

obj.item.clothing.neck.necklace.ashwalke.desc: A necklace crafted from ash, connected to the Necropolis through the core of a Legion. This imbues overdwellers with an unnatural understanding of Ashtongue, the native language of Lavaland, while worn.
obj.item.clothing.neck.necklace.ashwalke.name: ashen necklace

obj.item.clothing.neck.necklace.ashwalke.desc: A necklace crafted from ash, connected to the Necropolis through the core of a Legion. This imbues overdwellers with an unnatural understanding of Ashtongue, the native language of Lavaland, while worn. Cannot be removed!
obj.item.clothing.neck.necklace.ashwalke.name: cursed ashen necklace

obj.item.clothing.neck.necklace.dope.desc: Damn, it feels good to be a gangster.
obj.item.clothing.neck.necklace.dope.name: gold necklace

obj.item.clothing.neck.necklace.dope.mer.desc: Don't ask how it works, the proof is in the holochips!
obj.item.clothing.neck.necklace.dope.mer.name: gold necklace

obj.item.clothing.neck.necklace.memento_.desc: A mysterious pendant. An inscription on it says: "Certain death tomorrow means certain life today."

obj.item.clothing.neck.tie.horrible.desc: A neosilk tie. This one is disgusting.
obj.item.clothing.neck.tie.horrible.name: horrible tie

obj.item.clothing.neck.tie.red.hitman.desc: This is a $47,000 custom-tailored Référence Du Tueur À Gages tie. The clot is from neosilkworms raised at a tie microfarm in Cookwell, from a secret pattern passed down by monk tailors since the twenty-first century!
obj.item.clothing.neck.tie.red.hitman.name: red tie

obj.item.clothing.neck.tie.red.hitman.ti.desc: This is a $47,000 custom-tailored Référence Du Tueur À Gages tie. The clot is from neosilkworms raised at a tie microfarm in Cookwell, from a secret pattern passed down by monk tailors since the twenty-first century!
obj.item.clothing.neck.tie.red.hitman.ti.name: red tie

obj.item.clothing.neck.warrior_cape.desc: A cloak worn by those that have faced death in the eyes and prevailed.
obj.item.clothing.neck.warrior_cape.name: cloak of the marked one

obj.item.clothing.neck.warrior_cape.load.desc: A cloak from a once feared foe now worn by those that have faced death in the eyes and prevailed, it looks rather worn as not as pristine as it used to be
obj.item.clothing.neck.warrior_cape.load.name: tattered cloak

obj.item.clothing.neck.wide_cape.desc: A proud, broad-shouldered cloak with which you can protect the honor of your back.
obj.item.clothing.neck.wide_cape.name: wide cape

obj.item.clothing.neck.wreath.desc: An elaborate crown made from the twisted flesh and sinew of a watcher. 		Wearing it makes you feel like you have eyes in the back of your head.
obj.item.clothing.neck.wreath.name: Watcher Wreath

obj.item.clothing.neck.wreath.icewing.desc: An elaborate crown made from the twisted flesh and sinew of an icewing watcher. 		Wearing it sends shivers down your spine just from being near it.
obj.item.clothing.neck.wreath.icewing.name: Icewing Wreath

obj.item.clothing.sextoy.buttplug.desc: I'm meant to put that WHERE?!
obj.item.clothing.sextoy.buttplug.name: buttplug

obj.item.clothing.sextoy.condom.desc: I wonder if I can put this over my head...
obj.item.clothing.sextoy.condom.name: condom

obj.item.clothing.sextoy.dildo.desc: A large plastic penis, much like the one in your mother's bedside drawer.
obj.item.clothing.sextoy.dildo.name: dildo

obj.item.clothing.sextoy.dildo.custom_di.desc: A dildo that can be customized to your specification.
obj.item.clothing.sextoy.dildo.custom_di.name: custom dildo

obj.item.clothing.sextoy.dildo.double_di.desc: You'll have to be a real glizzy gladiator to contend with this.
obj.item.clothing.sextoy.dildo.double_di.name: double dildo

obj.item.clothing.sextoy.eggvib.signalvi.desc: A vibrating sex toy with remote control capability. Use a signaller to turn it on.
obj.item.clothing.sextoy.eggvib.signalvi.name: signal vibrating egg

obj.item.clothing.sextoy.fleshlight.blue.desc: Internal design based on the captain's mother.
obj.item.clothing.sextoy.fleshlight.blue.name: bluespace fleshlight

obj.item.clothing.sextoy.magic_wand.desc: Not sure where is magic in this thing, but if you press button - it makes funny vibrations
obj.item.clothing.sextoy.magic_wand.name: magic wand

obj.item.clothing.sextoy.vibrator.desc: Woah. What an... Interesting item. I wonder what this red button does...
obj.item.clothing.sextoy.vibrator.name: vibrator

obj.item.clothing.sextoy.vibroring.desc: A ring toy used to keep your erection going strong.
obj.item.clothing.sextoy.vibroring.name: vibrating ring

obj.item.clothing.shoes.banana_slippers.desc: Stylish banana shaped shoes that make it impossible to walk without slipping. Due to the slippery nature of them, removal will require the help of a friend!
obj.item.clothing.shoes.banana_slippers.name: banana slippers

obj.item.clothing.shoes.bhop.desc: A specialized pair of combat boots with a built-in propulsion system for rapid forward movement.
obj.item.clothing.shoes.bhop.name: jump boots

obj.item.clothing.shoes.bhop.rocket.desc: Very special boots with built-in rocket thrusters! SHAZBOT!
obj.item.clothing.shoes.bhop.rocket.name: rocket boots

obj.item.clothing.shoes.bone_greaves.desc: For when you're expecting to step on spiky things. Offers modest protection to your feet.
obj.item.clothing.shoes.bone_greaves.name: bone greaves

obj.item.clothing.shoes.boots.diver.desc: An old pair of boots used by a now-defunct mining coalition, it seems close to the ones used by Nanotrasen miners, but without the compartments for fitting small items.
obj.item.clothing.shoes.boots.diver.name: black divers boots

obj.item.clothing.shoes.bronze.desc: A giant, clunky pair of shoes crudely made out of bronze. Why would anyone wear these?
obj.item.clothing.shoes.bronze.name: bronze boots

obj.item.clothing.shoes.clockwork.desc: A strong pair of brass boots worn by the soldiers of the Ratvarian armies.
obj.item.clothing.shoes.clockwork.name: brass treads

obj.item.clothing.shoes.clown_shoes.desc: The prankster's standard-issue clowning shoes. Damn, they're huge! Ctrl-click to toggle waddle dampeners.
obj.item.clothing.shoes.clown_shoes.name: clown shoes

obj.item.clothing.shoes.clown_shoes.bana.desc: Lost prototype of advanced clown tech. Powered by bananium, these shoes leave a trail of chaos in their wake.
obj.item.clothing.shoes.clown_shoes.bana.name: mk-honk prototype shoes

obj.item.clothing.shoes.clown_shoes.bana.desc: The culmination of years of clown combat research, these shoes leave a trail of chaos in their wake. They will slowly recharge themselves over time, or can be manually charged with bananium.
obj.item.clothing.shoes.clown_shoes.bana.name: mk-honk combat shoes

obj.item.clothing.shoes.clown_shoes.brit.desc: The prankster's standard-issue clowning shoes. They look extraordinarily cute. Ctrl-click to toggle waddle dampeners.
obj.item.clothing.shoes.clown_shoes.brit.name: Britches' shoes

obj.item.clothing.shoes.clown_shoes.bubb.desc: Finally, you can be an unpaid Discord moderator in space. Clean it up Jannie!
obj.item.clothing.shoes.clown_shoes.bubb.name: official bubberstation chat mod shoes

obj.item.clothing.shoes.clown_shoes.bubb.desc: Some Clowns have been throwing away their shoes to wear heels. This corrects that through painful nerve implanting needles! And squeaking heels. May have went a bit far in a few places...
obj.item.clothing.shoes.clown_shoes.bubb.name: squeaky clown heels

obj.item.clothing.shoes.clown_shoes.bubb.desc: As if two jester shoes weren't enough, here's a third. Never ask Clown Planet for anything again.
obj.item.clothing.shoes.clown_shoes.bubb.name: amazing jester shoes

obj.item.clothing.shoes.clown_shoes.comb.desc: Advanced Clown Shoes that protect the wearer and render them nearly immune to slipping on their own peels. They also squeak at 100% capacity.
obj.item.clothing.shoes.clown_shoes.comb.name: combat clown shoes

obj.item.clothing.shoes.clown_shoes.heel.desc: A pair of high heeled clown shoes. What kind of maniac would design these?
obj.item.clothing.shoes.clown_shoes.heel.name: honk heels

obj.item.clothing.shoes.clown_shoes.jest.desc: A court jester's shoes, updated with modern squeaking technology.
obj.item.clothing.shoes.clown_shoes.jest.name: jester shoes

obj.item.clothing.shoes.clown_shoes.meow.desc: The adorable sound they make when you walk will mean making friends is more likely.
obj.item.clothing.shoes.clown_shoes.meow.name: meown shoes

obj.item.clothing.shoes.clown_shoes.moff.desc: No moths were harmed in the making of these slippers.
obj.item.clothing.shoes.clown_shoes.moff.name: moffers

obj.item.clothing.shoes.clown_shoes.pink.desc: A particularly pink pair of punny shoes.
obj.item.clothing.shoes.clown_shoes.pink.name: pink clown shoes

obj.item.clothing.shoes.colorable_laceup.desc: These don't seem to come pre-polished, how saddening.

obj.item.clothing.shoes.colorable_sandal.desc: Rumor has it that wearing these with socks puts you on a no entry list in several sectors.

obj.item.clothing.shoes.combat.desc: High speed, low drag combat boots.
obj.item.clothing.shoes.combat.name: combat boots

obj.item.clothing.shoes.magboots.basketb.name: magboots

obj.item.clothing.shoes.singerb.desc: These boots were made for dancing.

obj.item.clothing.shoes.winterboots.chri.name: red christmas boots

obj.item.clothing.shoes.winterboots.chri.name: green christmas boots

obj.item.clothing.shoes.winterboots.ice_.name: Endotherm hiking boots

obj.item.clothing.shoes.workboots.name: work boots

obj.item.clothing.shoes.workboots.heeled.name: heeled work boots

obj.item.clothing.shoes.workboots.mining.desc: Steel-toed mining boots for mining in hazardous environments. Very good at keeping toes uncrushed.

obj.item.clothing.shoes.workboots.old.desc: Nanotrasen-issue Engineering lace-up work boots for the especially blue-collar.
obj.item.clothing.shoes.workboots.old.name: work boots

obj.item.clothing.shoes.wraps.cloth.desc: Boxer tape or bandages wrapped like a mummy, all left up to the choice of the wearer.

obj.item.clothing.suit.armor.durability..name: holymelon armor

obj.item.clothing.suit.armor.durability..desc: An armor, made from watermelons. Probably won't take too many hits, but at least it looks serious... As serious as worn watermelon can be.

obj.item.clothing.suit.armor.elder_atmos.desc: A superb armor made with the toughest and rarest materials available to man.
obj.item.clothing.suit.armor.elder_atmos.name: Elder Atmosian Armor

obj.item.clothing.suit.armor.heavy.name: heavy armor

obj.item.clothing.suit.armor.heavy.adama.name: adamantine armor

obj.item.clothing.suit.armor.hop_tailcoa.desc: A strict looking coat usually worn by bunny themed bureaucrats. The pauldrons are sure to make people finally take you seriously.
obj.item.clothing.suit.armor.hop_tailcoa.name: head of personnel's tailcoat

obj.item.clothing.suit.armor.hos.desc: A greatcoat enhanced with a special alloy for some extra protection and style for those with a commanding presence.
obj.item.clothing.suit.armor.hos.name: armored greatcoat

obj.item.clothing.suit.armor.hos.elofy.desc: This coat is a near perfect replica of the one worn by Admiral Yi Sun-Sin, main character from "Heroes of the Galactic Conflict", 		an animated war drama set between the Free Planetary Trade Union and the Second Galactic Empire. 		It proved to be a sensational piece among those who appreciate animated cartoons and period war dramas, 		but hasn't had much spread outside of the Terran Government.
obj.item.clothing.suit.armor.hos.elofy.name: anime admiral coat

obj.item.clothing.suit.armor.hos.hos_for.desc: For when an armoured vest isn't fashionable enough.
obj.item.clothing.suit.armor.hos.hos_for.name: Head of Security's parade jacket

obj.item.clothing.suit.armor.hos.hos_for.desc: For when an armoured vest isn't fashionable enough.
obj.item.clothing.suit.armor.hos.hos_for.name: Head of Security's parade jacket

obj.item.clothing.suit.armor.hos.maa_gre.name: Master at Arms' armored greatcoat

obj.item.clothing.suit.armor.hos.trenchc.name: armored trenchcoat

obj.item.clothing.suit.armor.hos.trenchc.name: armadyne trenchcoat

obj.item.clothing.suit.armor.hos.trenchc.desc: A trenchcoat enhanced with a special lightweight kevlar. It has little Syndicate logos sewn onto the shoulder badges with the letters 'MAA' just under it.
obj.item.clothing.suit.armor.hos.trenchc.name: Master at Arms' armored trenchcoat

obj.item.clothing.suit.armor.hos.trenchc.desc: A trenchcoat enhanced with a special lightweight kevlar, padded with wool on the collar and inside. You feel strangely lonely wearing this coat.
obj.item.clothing.suit.armor.hos.trenchc.name: head of security's winter trenchcoat

obj.item.clothing.suit.armor.hos.viro.desc: A greatcoat enhanced with a special alloy for some extra protection and style for those with a commanding presence.
obj.item.clothing.suit.armor.hos.viro.name: armored greatcoat

obj.item.clothing.suit.armor.hos.viro.tr.desc: A trenchcoat enhanced with a special lightweight kevlar. The epitome of tactical plainclothes.
obj.item.clothing.suit.armor.hos.viro.tr.name: armored trenchcoat

obj.item.clothing.suit.armor.hos.viro.tr.desc: A trenchcoat enhanced with a special lightweight kevlar, padded with wool on the collar and inside. You feel strangely lonely wearing this coat.
obj.item.clothing.suit.armor.hos.viro.tr.name: head of security's winter trenchcoat

obj.item.clothing.suit.armor.hos_tailcoa.desc: A reinforced tailcoat worn by bunny themed security commanders. Enhanced with a special alloy for some extra protection and style.
obj.item.clothing.suit.armor.hos_tailcoa.name: head of security's tailcoat

obj.item.clothing.suit.armor.laserproof.desc: A vest that excels in protecting the wearer against energy projectiles, as well as occasionally reflecting them.
obj.item.clothing.suit.armor.laserproof.name: reflector vest

obj.item.clothing.suit.armor.militia.desc: A well worn uniform used by militia across the frontier, its thick padding useful for cushioning blows.
obj.item.clothing.suit.armor.militia.name: station defender's coat

obj.item.clothing.suit.armor.nerd.desc: The Defenseless Operator Traversal Assistance suit is a highly experimental Nanotrasen designed 		protective full body harness designed to prolong the lifespan (and thus productivity) of an employee 		via surplus medical technology found in the abandoned part of maintenance no one seems to want to talk about. 		Unfortunately the research department couldn't design a helmet before the third quarter so this is definitely not spaceproof. 		One size fits most.
obj.item.clothing.suit.armor.nerd.name: D.O.T.A. suit

obj.item.clothing.suit.armor.reactive.desc: Doesn't seem to do much for some reason.
obj.item.clothing.suit.armor.reactive.name: reactive armor

obj.item.clothing.suit.armor.reactive.ba.desc: An experimental suit of armor that generates barriers from another world when it detects its bearer is in danger.
obj.item.clothing.suit.armor.reactive.ba.name: reactive barricade armor

obj.item.clothing.suit.armor.reactive.bi.desc: An experimental suit of armor with sensitive detectors hooked up to a biohazard release valve. It scrambles the bodies of those around.
obj.item.clothing.suit.armor.reactive.bi.name: reactive bioscrambling armor

obj.item.clothing.suit.armor.reactive.ec.desc: An experimental suit of armor that animates nearby objects with a ghostly possession.
obj.item.clothing.suit.armor.reactive.ec.name: reactive possession armor

obj.item.clothing.suit.armor.reactive.fi.desc: An experimental suit of armor with a reactive sensor array rigged to a flame emitter. For the stylish pyromaniac.
obj.item.clothing.suit.armor.reactive.fi.name: reactive incendiary armor

obj.item.clothing.suit.armor.reactive.ha.desc: An experimental suit of armor with sensitive detectors hooked up to the mind of the wearer, sending mind pulses that causes hallucinations around you.
obj.item.clothing.suit.armor.reactive.ha.name: reactive hallucinating armor

obj.item.clothing.suit.armor.reactive.ps.desc: An experimental suit of armor psykers use to push their mind further. Reacts to hostiles by powering up the wearer's psychic abilities.
obj.item.clothing.suit.armor.reactive.ps.name: reactive psykerboost armor

obj.item.clothing.suit.armor.reactive.re.desc: An experimental suit of armor that violently throws back attackers.
obj.item.clothing.suit.armor.reactive.re.name: reactive repulse armor

obj.item.clothing.suit.armor.reactive.st.desc: An experimental suit of armor that renders the wearer invisible on detection of imminent harm, and creates a decoy that runs away from the owner. You can't fight what you can't see.
obj.item.clothing.suit.armor.reactive.st.name: reactive stealth armor

obj.item.clothing.suit.armor.reactive.ta.desc: If you can't beat the memes, embrace them.
obj.item.clothing.suit.armor.reactive.ta.name: reactive table armor

obj.item.clothing.suit.armor.reactive.te.desc: Someone separated our Research Director from his own head!
obj.item.clothing.suit.armor.reactive.te.name: reactive teleport armor

obj.item.clothing.suit.armor.reactive.te.desc: An experimental suit of armor with sensitive detectors hooked up to a huge capacitor grid, with emitters strutting out of it. Zap.
obj.item.clothing.suit.armor.reactive.te.name: reactive tesla armor

obj.item.clothing.suit.armor.reactive.we.desc: An experimental suit of armor that manipulates the weather around the wearer when in danger.
obj.item.clothing.suit.armor.reactive.we.name: reactive weather armor

obj.item.clothing.suit.armor.riot.desc: A suit of semi-flexible polycarbonate body armor with heavy padding to protect against melee attacks. Helps the wearer resist shoving in close quarters.

obj.item.clothing.suit.armor.riot.skinsu.desc:
'Shorebreaker'-pattern Stardress plating was developed for Azulean boarding teams in service of the New Principalities. 		Kept resilient and maneuverable, Shorebreaker armor is built predominantly close-quarters breaching. 

		Having sparse plating around the wearer's arms and legs, boarding teams are encouraged after their pod lands to do one thing: 		make use of their rapid movement, and render their enemies past tense. The armor is relatively hardy against ranged weapons, 		but the alloys involved are primarily constructed around resisting strikes from boarding axes, lances, and other common pirate-repellant weapons.
obj.item.clothing.suit.armor.riot.skinsu.name: Shorebreaker plating

obj.item.clothing.suit.armor.security_ta.desc: A reinforced tailcoat worn by bunny themed security officers. Uses the same lightweight armor as the MK 1 vest, though obviously has lighter protection in the chest area.

It'll protect you from hell, 		but only for so long.
