obj.item.clothing.suit.brownbattlecoat.desc: There is nothing more valuable, nothing more sacred, look at the fur lining, it's beautiful, when you cruse through Necropolis in this thing, you're gonna be balls deep in Ash Walker snatch.
obj.item.clothing.suit.brownbattlecoat.name: expensive brown fur coat

obj.item.clothing.suit.brownfurrich.desc: Cargonia, or if you're a dork, Cargoslavia has shipped out a coat for loyal quartermasters, despite accusations it's just a dyed black fur coat, it's...not, promise!
obj.item.clothing.suit.brownfurrich.name: quartermaster fur coat

obj.item.clothing.suit.brownfurrich.crea.desc: A lavishly cosy furr coat, made with 100% recycled carbon!
obj.item.clothing.suit.brownfurrich.crea.name: cream fur coat

obj.item.clothing.suit.brownfurrich.publ.desc: A lavishly cosy furr coat, made with 100% recycled carbon!
obj.item.clothing.suit.brownfurrich.publ.name: fur coat

obj.item.clothing.suit.brownfurrich.whit.desc: A lavishly cosy furr coat, made with 100% recycled carbon!
obj.item.clothing.suit.brownfurrich.whit.name: white fur coat

obj.item.clothing.suit.chameleon.desc: A slim armored vest that protects against most types of damage.
obj.item.clothing.suit.chameleon.name: armor

obj.item.clothing.suit.chameleon.broken.desc: A slim armored vest that protects against most types of damage.
obj.item.clothing.suit.chameleon.broken.name: armor

obj.item.clothing.suit.chaplainsuit.armo.desc: The ideal outfit for burning the unfaithful.
obj.item.clothing.suit.chaplainsuit.armo.name: adept robes

obj.item.clothing.suit.chaplainsuit.armo.desc: It sounds like hissing steam, ticking cogs, gone silent, It looks like a dead machine, trying to tick with life.
obj.item.clothing.suit.chaplainsuit.armo.name: forgotten armour

obj.item.clothing.suit.chaplainsuit.armo.desc: Armour that's comprised of metal and cloth.
obj.item.clothing.suit.chaplainsuit.armo.name: crusader's armour

obj.item.clothing.suit.chaplainsuit.armo.desc: Armour that's comprised of metal and cloth.
obj.item.clothing.suit.chaplainsuit.armo.name: crusader's armour

obj.item.clothing.suit.chaplainsuit.armo.desc: Armour that's comprised of metal and cloth.
obj.item.clothing.suit.chaplainsuit.armo.name: crusader's armour

obj.item.clothing.suit.chaplainsuit.armo.desc: Shields your body from the things others fail to notice.
obj.item.clothing.suit.chaplainsuit.armo.name: occultist's robes

obj.item.clothing.suit.chaplainsuit.armo.desc: A short cape over a cassock, worn by bishops and popes in traditional Christianity
obj.item.clothing.suit.chaplainsuit.armo.name: papal robe

obj.item.clothing.suit.chaplainsuit.armo.desc: The uniform of a bygone institute of learning.
obj.item.clothing.suit.chaplainsuit.armo.name: student robe

obj.item.clothing.suit.chaplainsuit.armo.desc: Protect the weak and defenceless, live by honor and glory, and fight for the welfare of all!
obj.item.clothing.suit.chaplainsuit.armo.name: crusader armour

obj.item.clothing.suit.chaplainsuit.armo.desc: This worn outfit saw much use back in the day.
obj.item.clothing.suit.chaplainsuit.armo.name: witchunter garb

obj.item.clothing.suit.chaplainsuit.bish.desc: Glad to see the tithes you collected were well spent.
obj.item.clothing.suit.chaplainsuit.bish.name: bishop's robes

obj.item.clothing.suit.chaplainsuit.clow.desc: Meant for a clown of the cloth.
obj.item.clothing.suit.chaplainsuit.clow.name: Robes of the Honkmother

obj.item.clothing.suit.chaplainsuit.holi.desc: This is a nice holiday, my son.
obj.item.clothing.suit.chaplainsuit.holi.name: holiday priest

obj.item.clothing.suit.chaplainsuit.monk.desc: Best combined with a shaved head.
obj.item.clothing.suit.chaplainsuit.monk.name: eastern monk's robes

obj.item.clothing.suit.chaplainsuit.nun.desc: Maximum piety in this star system.
obj.item.clothing.suit.chaplainsuit.nun.name: nun robe

obj.item.clothing.suit.chaplainsuit.shri.desc: Won't help you communicate with spirits, but you'll certainly look the part.
obj.item.clothing.suit.chaplainsuit.shri.name: shrinehand robe

obj.item.clothing.suit.chaplainsuit.whit.desc: Good for clerics and sleepy crewmembers.
obj.item.clothing.suit.chaplainsuit.whit.name: white robe

obj.item.clothing.suit.cloak.ashencloak.desc: A cloak of advanced make. Clearly beyond what ashwalkers are capable of, it was probably pulled from a downed vessel or something. It seems to have been reinforced with goliath hide and watcher sinew, and the hood has been torn off.
obj.item.clothing.suit.cloak.ashencloak.name: ashen wastewalker cloak

obj.item.clothing.suit.cloak.shawl.desc: A delicate silk shawl meant to be worn over the elbows, the fabric is delightfully soft.
obj.item.clothing.suit.cloak.shawl.name: silk shawl

obj.item.clothing.suit.clockwork.desc: A strong, bronze suit worn by the soldiers of the Ratvarian armies.
obj.item.clothing.suit.clockwork.name: bronze armor

obj.item.clothing.suit.clockwork.cloak.desc: A faltering cloak that bends light around it, distorting the user's appearance, making it hard to see them with the naked eye. However, it provides very little protection.
obj.item.clothing.suit.clockwork.cloak.name: shrouding cloak

obj.item.clothing.suit.clockwork.speed.desc: A shiny suit, glowing with a vibrant energy. The wearer will be able to move quickly across battlefields, but will be able to withstand less damage before falling.
obj.item.clothing.suit.clockwork.speed.name: robes of divinity

obj.item.clothing.suit.coordinator.desc: A jacket for a party coordinator, stylish!.
obj.item.clothing.suit.coordinator.name: coordinator jacket

obj.item.clothing.suit.corset.desc: A tight latex corset. How can anybody fit in THAT?
obj.item.clothing.suit.corset.name: corset

obj.item.clothing.suit.cossack.desc: Hop on your horse, dawn your really fluffy hat, and strap this coat to your back.
obj.item.clothing.suit.cossack.name: ukrainian coat

obj.item.clothing.suit.costume.bear_suit.desc: A suit of 100% bear fur. Would probably be a lot more convincing without that HUGE zipper on the front.
obj.item.clothing.suit.costume.bear_suit.name: bear suit

obj.item.clothing.suit.costume.bronze.desc: A big and clanky suit made of bronze that offers no protection and looks very unfashionable. Nice.
obj.item.clothing.suit.costume.bronze.name: bronze suit

obj.item.clothing.suit.costume.cardborg.desc: An ordinary cardboard box with holes cut in the sides.
obj.item.clothing.suit.costume.cardborg.name: cardborg suit

obj.item.clothing.suit.costume.chickensu.desc: A suit made long ago by the ancient empire KFC.
obj.item.clothing.suit.costume.chickensu.name: chicken suit

obj.item.clothing.suit.costume.dracula.desc: Looks like this belongs in a very old movie set.
obj.item.clothing.suit.costume.dracula.name: dracula coat

obj.item.clothing.suit.costume.drfreeze_.desc: A labcoat imbued with the power of features and freezes.
obj.item.clothing.suit.costume.drfreeze_.name: doctor freeze's labcoat

obj.item.clothing.suit.costume.football_.desc: Given to members of the football team!
obj.item.clothing.suit.costume.football_.name: football protective gear

obj.item.clothing.suit.costume.ghost_she.desc: The hands float by themselves, so it's extra spooky.
obj.item.clothing.suit.costume.ghost_she.name: ghost sheet

obj.item.clothing.suit.costume.gothcoat.desc: Perfect for those who want to stalk around a corner of a bar.
obj.item.clothing.suit.costume.gothcoat.name: gothic coat

obj.item.clothing.suit.costume.hastur.desc: Robes not meant to be worn by man.
obj.item.clothing.suit.costume.hastur.name: Hastur's robe

obj.item.clothing.suit.costume.hawaiian.desc: A cool shirt for chilling on the beach.
obj.item.clothing.suit.costume.hawaiian.name: hawaiian overshirt

obj.item.clothing.suit.costume.imperium_.desc: Have YOU killed a xeno today?
obj.item.clothing.suit.costume.imperium_.name: Imperium monk suit

obj.item.clothing.suit.costume.irs.desc: I'm crazy enough to take on The Owl, but the IRS? Nooo thank you!
obj.item.clothing.suit.costume.irs.name: internal revenue service jacket

obj.item.clothing.suit.costume.joker.desc: I mean, don’t you have to be funny to be a comedian?
obj.item.clothing.suit.costume.joker.name: comedian coat

obj.item.clothing.suit.costume.monkeysui.desc: A suit that looks like a primate.
obj.item.clothing.suit.costume.monkeysui.name: monkey suit

obj.item.clothing.suit.costume.pg.desc: Remind Security of their mistakes in giving prisoners blasting charges.
obj.item.clothing.suit.costume.pg.name: powder ganger jacket

obj.item.clothing.suit.costume.poncho.gr.desc: Your classic, non-racist poncho. This one is green.
obj.item.clothing.suit.costume.poncho.gr.name: green poncho

obj.item.clothing.suit.costume.poncho.po.desc: Forced to live on your shameful acting as a fake Mexican, you and your poncho have grown inseparable. Literally.
obj.item.clothing.suit.costume.poncho.po.name: poncho of shame

obj.item.clothing.suit.costume.poncho.re.desc: Your classic, non-racist poncho. This one is red.
obj.item.clothing.suit.costume.poncho.re.name: red poncho

obj.item.clothing.suit.costume.samurai.desc: A set of ancient-Japan Samurai armor. Despite being a cheap replica, it's still remarkably heavy.
obj.item.clothing.suit.costume.samurai.name: samurai armor

obj.item.clothing.suit.costume.shrine_ma.desc: Makes you want to exterminate some troublesome youkai.
obj.item.clothing.suit.costume.shrine_ma.name: shrine maiden's outfit

obj.item.clothing.suit.costume.snowman.desc: Two white spheres covered in white glitter. 'Tis the season.
obj.item.clothing.suit.costume.snowman.name: snowman outfit

obj.item.clothing.suit.costume.soviet.desc: Conscript reporting! Sponsored by DonkSoft Co. for historical reenactment of the Third World War!
obj.item.clothing.suit.costume.soviet.name: soviet armored coat

obj.item.clothing.suit.costume.striped_s.desc: Reminds you of someone, but you just can't put your finger on it...
obj.item.clothing.suit.costume.striped_s.name: striped sweater

obj.item.clothing.suit.costume.tmc.desc: Making sure everyone knows you're in the best biker gang this side of Alderney.
obj.item.clothing.suit.costume.tmc.name: Lost M.C. cut

obj.item.clothing.suit.costume.wellworn_.desc: A worn out, curiously comfortable t-shirt. You wouldn't go so far as to say it feels like being hugged when you wear it, but it's pretty close. Good for sleeping in.
obj.item.clothing.suit.costume.wellworn_.name: well-worn shirt

obj.item.clothing.suit.costume.wellworn_.desc: A worn out, curiously comfortable t-shirt with a character from Phanic the Weasel on the front. It adds some charm points to itself and the wearer, and reminds you of when the series was still good; way back in 2500.
obj.item.clothing.suit.costume.wellworn_.name: well-worn graphic shirt

obj.item.clothing.suit.costume.wellworn_.desc: A worn out, curiously comfortable t-shirt with a picture of Ian the Corgi. You wouldn't go so far as to say it feels like being hugged when you wear it, but it's pretty close. Good for sleeping in.
obj.item.clothing.suit.costume.wellworn_.name: well-worn ian shirt

obj.item.clothing.suit.costume.wellworn_.desc: This worn-out, somehow comfortable t-shirt has reached a more thorough understanding of grime; maybe the fact that it's still gone unwashed could function as a sort of camo?
obj.item.clothing.suit.costume.wellworn_.name: messy worn-out shirt

obj.item.clothing.suit.costume.wellworn_.desc: This worn-out, somehow comfortable t-shirt has reached a more thorough understanding of grime. Normies will never understand that this is a collector's item, and your sense of fashion absolutely mogs theirs. Phanic Phorever.
obj.item.clothing.suit.costume.wellworn_.name: messy graphic shirt

obj.item.clothing.suit.costume.wellworn_.desc: A baggy, extremely well-used shirt with vintage game character Phanic the Weasel far-too-boldly displayed on the chest. Your mind cannot hope to withstand the assault of remembering the Phanic Phanart you've seen; let alone the stench of this top.
obj.item.clothing.suit.costume.wellworn_.name: gamer shirt

obj.item.clothing.suit.costume.wellworn_.desc: This worn-out, somehow comfortable t-shirt has reached a more thorough understanding of grime. You get the feeling like you understand how it's like to be a stray dog, yet Ian's face still comforts you.
obj.item.clothing.suit.costume.wellworn_.name: messy ian shirt

obj.item.clothing.suit.costume.wellworn_.desc: A worn out, curiously comfortable t-shirt proclaiming your pro-skub stance. Fuck those anti-skubbies.
obj.item.clothing.suit.costume.wellworn_.name: pro-skub shirt

obj.item.clothing.suit.costume.wellworn_.desc: A worn out, curiously comfortable t-shirt proclaiming your anti-skub stance. Fuck those pro-skubbies.
obj.item.clothing.suit.costume.wellworn_.name: anti-skub shirt

obj.item.clothing.suit.costume.wellworn_.desc: A pretty grubby, yet still comfortable t-shirt. You've been sleeping in this one for a bit too long.
obj.item.clothing.suit.costume.wellworn_.name: worn-out shirt

obj.item.clothing.suit.costume.wellworn_.desc: A pretty grubby, yet still comfortable t-shirt with a character from Phanic the Weasel on the front. The slightly raggedy nature recalls that one horrid title where they made him a vampire. You should get cheevos for sleeping in it this many days straight.
obj.item.clothing.suit.costume.wellworn_.name: worn-out graphic shirt

obj.item.clothing.suit.costume.wellworn_.desc: A pretty grubby, yet still comfortable t-shirt with a picture of Ian the Corgi. It's gone past 'a bit worn' to 'well-loved;' excellent for use as pajamas.
obj.item.clothing.suit.costume.wellworn_.name: worn-out ian shirt

obj.item.clothing.suit.costume.xenos.desc: A suit made out of chitinous alien hide.
obj.item.clothing.suit.costume.xenos.name: xenos suit

obj.item.clothing.suit.costume.yuri.desc: Yuri is master! Sponsored by DonkSoft Co. for historical reenactment of the Third World War!
obj.item.clothing.suit.costume.yuri.name: yuri initiate coat

obj.item.clothing.suit.cowboyvest.desc: A white cream vest lined with... fur, of all things, for desert weather. There's a small deer head logo sewn into the vest.
obj.item.clothing.suit.cowboyvest.name: blonde cowboy vest

obj.item.clothing.suit.crop_jacket.desc: A jacket that, some time long past, probably made quite the effective outdoors wear. Now, 		some barbarian has cut the entire bottom half out.
obj.item.clothing.suit.crop_jacket.name: crop-top jacket

obj.item.clothing.suit.crop_jacket.long.desc: A jacket that probably makes quite the effective outdoors wear.
obj.item.clothing.suit.crop_jacket.long.name: sports jacket

obj.item.clothing.suit.crop_jacket.short.desc: A jacket that, some time long past, probably made quite the effective outdoors wear. Now, 		some barbarian has cut the entire bottom half out, as well as half the sleeves.
obj.item.clothing.suit.crop_jacket.short.name: short-sleeved crop-top jacket

obj.item.clothing.suit.crop_jacket.short.desc: A jacket that probably makes quite the effective outdoors wear. However, 		some barbarian has cut the sleeves in half.
obj.item.clothing.suit.crop_jacket.short.name: short-sleeved sports jacket

obj.item.clothing.suit.crop_jacket.sleev.desc: A jacket that, some time long past, probably made quite the effective outdoors wear. Now, 		some barbarian has cut the entire bottom half out, as well as the sleeves.
obj.item.clothing.suit.crop_jacket.sleev.name: sleeveless crop-top jacket

obj.item.clothing.suit.crop_jacket.sleev.desc: A jacket that probably makes quite the effective outdoors wear. However, 		some barbarian has cut the sleeves off.
obj.item.clothing.suit.crop_jacket.sleev.name: sleeveless sports jacket

obj.item.clothing.suit.croptop.desc: A comfy looking turtleneck that exposes your midriff, fashionable but makes the point of a sweater moot. Now with Pycroft polychromatic tech!
obj.item.clothing.suit.croptop.name: crop top turtleneck

obj.item.clothing.suit.dagger_mantle.desc: For their Spring 2560 collection, the designer had a lot to say about the allure of objects that 		'seem to spring into existence without human intervention.' Made from a single piece of fabric with a seam 		and closure in the back, this mantle is almost austere enough to disguise its origin in a Marsian garment 		factory.
obj.item.clothing.suit.dagger_mantle.name: 'Dagger' designer mantle

obj.item.clothing.suit.discoblazer.desc: Looks like someone skinned this blazer off some long extinct disco-animal. It has an enigmatic white rectangle on the back and the right sleeve.
obj.item.clothing.suit.discoblazer.name: disco ass blazer

obj.item.clothing.suit.duster.desc: This station ain't big enough for the both of us.
obj.item.clothing.suit.duster.name: duster

obj.item.clothing.suit.dutchjacketsr.desc: Botanists screaming of mangos have been rumored to wear this.
obj.item.clothing.suit.dutchjacketsr.name: western jacket

obj.item.clothing.suit.fallsparka.desc: A light brown coat with light fur lighting around the collar.
obj.item.clothing.suit.fallsparka.name: falls parka

obj.item.clothing.suit.fedcoat.desc: A uniform jacket from the United Federation. Set phasers to awesome.
obj.item.clothing.suit.fedcoat.name: Federation uniform jacket

obj.item.clothing.suit.fedcoat.capt.desc: A uniform jacket from the United Federation. Set phasers to awesome.
obj.item.clothing.suit.fedcoat.capt.name: Federation uniform jacket

obj.item.clothing.suit.fedcoat.eng.desc: A uniform jacket from the United Federation. Set phasers to awesome.
obj.item.clothing.suit.fedcoat.eng.name: Federation uniform jacket

obj.item.clothing.suit.fedcoat.medsci.desc: A uniform jacket from the United Federation. Set phasers to awesome.
obj.item.clothing.suit.fedcoat.medsci.name: Federation uniform jacket

obj.item.clothing.suit.fedcoat.modern.desc: A modern uniform jacket from the United Federation.
obj.item.clothing.suit.fedcoat.modern.name: modern Federation uniform jacket

obj.item.clothing.suit.fedcoat.modern.en.desc: A modern uniform jacket from the United Federation.
obj.item.clothing.suit.fedcoat.modern.en.name: modern engineering Federation jacket

obj.item.clothing.suit.fedcoat.modern.me.desc: A modern uniform jacket from the United Federation.
obj.item.clothing.suit.fedcoat.modern.me.name: modern medsci Federation jacket

obj.item.clothing.suit.fedcoat.modern.se.desc: A modern uniform jacket from the United Federation.
obj.item.clothing.suit.fedcoat.modern.se.name: modern security Federation jacket

obj.item.clothing.suit.flakjack.desc: A dilapidated jacket made of a supposedly bullet-proof material (Hint: It isn't.). Smells faintly of napalm.
obj.item.clothing.suit.flakjack.name: flak jacket

obj.item.clothing.suit.frenchtrench.desc: There's a certain timeless feeling to this coat, like it was once worn by a romantic, broken through his travels, from a schemer who hunted injustice to a traveller, however it arrived in your hands? Who knows?
obj.item.clothing.suit.frenchtrench.name: blue trenchcoat

obj.item.clothing.suit.frontier_colonist.desc: A simple flak jacket with an exterior of water-resistant material. 		Jackets like these are often found on first wave colonists that want some armor 		due to the fact they can be made easily within a colony core type machine.
obj.item.clothing.suit.frontier_colonist.name: frontier flak jacket

obj.item.clothing.suit.furcoat.desc: A thick, comfy looking leather coat. It's got some fluffy fur at the collar and sleeves.
obj.item.clothing.suit.furcoat.name: leather coat

obj.item.clothing.suit.gautumn.desc: In stark contrast to the undersuit, this large and armored coat is as white as snow, perfect for the bloodstains.
obj.item.clothing.suit.gautumn.name: neo american general's coat

obj.item.clothing.suit.greyscale.furred_.desc: A warm trenchcoat lined with fur, made for the cold, dark, and desperate winter nights.
obj.item.clothing.suit.greyscale.furred_.name: furred trenchcoat

obj.item.clothing.suit.greyscale.sweater.desc: A big'ol sweater! Makes for an improvised blanket with how huge this thing is.
obj.item.clothing.suit.greyscale.sweater.name: big sweater

obj.item.clothing.suit.greyscale.sweater.desc: A big'ol sweater with an equally big ribbon bow! Makes for an improvised blanket with how huge this thing is.
obj.item.clothing.suit.greyscale.sweater.name: big sweater with bow

obj.item.clothing.suit.hazardvest.desc: A high-visibility vest used in work zones.
obj.item.clothing.suit.hazardvest.name: hazard vest

obj.item.clothing.suit.hazardvest.press.desc: A blue high-visibility vest used to distinguish non-combatant "PRESS" members, like if anyone cares.
obj.item.clothing.suit.hazardvest.press.name: press hazard vest

obj.item.clothing.suit.hazardvest.securi.desc: A high-visibility vest used in work zones.
obj.item.clothing.suit.hazardvest.securi.name: security medic hazard vest

obj.item.clothing.suit.heart_sweater.desc: A comfortable warm-looking sweater. It even has a heart pattern on it, how cute.
obj.item.clothing.suit.heart_sweater.name: heart sweater

obj.item.clothing.suit.hifl_suit.desc: The High-Impact Fauna Laminate Suit: A suit designed to withstand a wide variety of planetary hazards. There's an engraving on one of it's shoulders: "Not for use in Hadean-grade planets.". Cheap higher-ups.
obj.item.clothing.suit.hifl_suit.name: H.I.F.L. suit

obj.item.clothing.suit.hooded.ablative.desc: Experimental trenchcoat specially crafted to reflect and absorb laser and disabler shots. Don't expect it to do all that much against an axe or a shotgun, however.
obj.item.clothing.suit.hooded.ablative.name: ablative trenchcoat

obj.item.clothing.suit.hooded.berserker.desc: This hulking armor seems to possess some kind of dark force within; howling in rage, hungry for carnage. 		The self-sealing stem bolts that allowed this suit to be spaceworthy have long since corroded. However, the entity 		sealed within the suit seems to hunger for the fleeting lifeforce found in the remains left in the remains of drakes. 		Feeding it drake remains seems to empower a suit piece, though turns the remains back to lifeless ash.
obj.item.clothing.suit.hooded.berserker.name: berserker armor

obj.item.clothing.suit.hooded.berserker..desc: A suit of ancient body armor imbued with potent spiritual magnetism, capable of massively boosting a wearer's close combat skills at the cost of ravaging their mind and overexerting their body.
obj.item.clothing.suit.hooded.berserker..name: berserker armor

obj.item.clothing.suit.hooded.big_hoodie.desc: Cotton fibres grown in vertical aeroponic farming systems were ringspun and knit into a continuous loop fleece with 	a soft pile and little stretch. This fabric was cut oversized with soft sloping shoulders and cuffs that fall right at the first knuckle.
obj.item.clothing.suit.hooded.big_hoodie.name: oversized hoodie

obj.item.clothing.suit.hooded.bloated_hu.desc: A horribly bloated suit made from human skins.
obj.item.clothing.suit.hooded.bloated_hu.name: bloated human suit

obj.item.clothing.suit.hooded.carp_costu.desc: A costume made from 'synthetic' carp scales, it smells.
obj.item.clothing.suit.hooded.carp_costu.name: carp costume

obj.item.clothing.suit.hooded.carp_costu.desc: A slimming piece of dubious space carp technology, you suspect it won't stand up to hand-to-hand blows.
obj.item.clothing.suit.hooded.carp_costu.name: carp space suit

obj.item.clothing.suit.hooded.carp_costu.desc: It's covered in bite marks and scratches, yet seems to be still perfectly functional.
obj.item.clothing.suit.hooded.carp_costu.name: battered carp space suit

obj.item.clothing.suit.hooded.chaplain_h.desc: Hoodie made for acolytes of the chaplain.
obj.item.clothing.suit.hooded.chaplain_h.name: follower hoodie

obj.item.clothing.suit.hooded.chaplain_h.desc: Outer coat for divine archers. Offers some protection.
obj.item.clothing.suit.hooded.chaplain_h.name: divine archer coat

obj.item.clothing.suit.hooded.chaplain_h.desc: Now you're ready for some 50 dollar bling water.
obj.item.clothing.suit.hooded.chaplain_h.name: leader hoodie

obj.item.clothing.suit.hooded.chaplainsu.desc: A few steps above rended sackcloth.
obj.item.clothing.suit.hooded.chaplainsu.name: monk's habit

obj.item.clothing.suit.hooded.cloak.davi.desc: Ever wanted to look like a badass without ANY effort? Try this nanotrasen brand red cloak, made of entirely synthetic material.
obj.item.clothing.suit.hooded.cloak.davi.name: red cloak

obj.item.clothing.suit.hooded.cloak.drak.desc: A suit of armour fashioned from the remains of an ash drake.
obj.item.clothing.suit.hooded.cloak.drak.name: drake armour

obj.item.clothing.suit.hooded.cloak.drak.desc: A suit of armour fashioned from the remains of an ash drake.
obj.item.clothing.suit.hooded.cloak.drak.name: drake armour

obj.item.clothing.suit.hooded.cloak.gods.desc: A suit of armour fashioned from the remnants of a knight's armor, and parts of a wendigo.
obj.item.clothing.suit.hooded.cloak.gods.name: godslayer armour

obj.item.clothing.suit.hooded.cloak.goli.desc: A staunch, practical cape made out of numerous monster materials, it is coveted amongst exiles & hermits.
obj.item.clothing.suit.hooded.cloak.goli.name: goliath cloak

obj.item.clothing.suit.hooded.cloak.zuli.desc: A standard version of a prototype cloak given out by Nanotrasen higher ups. It's surprisingly thick and heavy for a cloak despite having most of it's tech stripped. It also comes with a bluespace trinket which calls it's accompanying hat onto the user. A worn inscription on the inside of the cloak reads 'Fleuret' ...the rest is faded away.
obj.item.clothing.suit.hooded.cloak.zuli.name: Project: Zul-E

obj.item.clothing.suit.hooded.colorblock.desc: A soft pastel color-block hoodie from an unrecognizable brand.
obj.item.clothing.suit.hooded.colorblock.name: color-block hoodie

obj.item.clothing.suit.hooded.cultlain_r.desc: A ragged, dusty set of robes.
obj.item.clothing.suit.hooded.cultlain_r.name: ancient robes

obj.item.clothing.suit.hooded.cultrobes.desc: A ragged, dusty set of robes. Strange letters line the inside.
obj.item.clothing.suit.hooded.cultrobes.name: ancient cultist robes

obj.item.clothing.suit.hooded.cultrobes..desc: An armored set of robes worn by the followers of Nar'Sie.
obj.item.clothing.suit.hooded.cultrobes..name: cultist robes

obj.item.clothing.suit.hooded.cultrobes..desc: An armored set of robes worn by the followers of Nar'Sie.
obj.item.clothing.suit.hooded.cultrobes..name: cultist robes

obj.item.clothing.suit.hooded.cultrobes..desc: Empowered armor which creates a powerful shield around the user.
obj.item.clothing.suit.hooded.cultrobes..name: empowered cultist armor

obj.item.clothing.suit.hooded.cultrobes..desc: A ragged, dusty set of robes. Strange eyes line the inside.
obj.item.clothing.suit.hooded.cultrobes..name: ominous armor

obj.item.clothing.suit.hooded.cultrobes..desc: Left to burn to tatters, what remains is naught but a blackened echo of the mantle of the Watch. 		Yet the soot-choked folds turn blade and flame from the form within. A brief reprieve before its gaze turns inwards.
obj.item.clothing.suit.hooded.cultrobes..name: Scorched Mantle

obj.item.clothing.suit.hooded.cultrobes..desc: The sharpened edges of this ancient suit of armor assert a revelation known to aspirants of battle; 			a true warrior can not be distinguished from the blade they wield.
obj.item.clothing.suit.hooded.cultrobes..name: Shattered Panoply

obj.item.clothing.suit.hooded.cultrobes..desc: Gleaming gems conjure forth wisps of power, turning about to illuminate the wearer in a dim radiance. 			Gazing upon the robe, you cannot help but feel noticed.
obj.item.clothing.suit.hooded.cultrobes..name: Starwoven Cloak

obj.item.clothing.suit.hooded.cultrobes..desc: A rotten carcass, or perhaps several, twisted into fleshy polyps, knotted intestines and cracked bone. 			How one 'wears' this baffles reasonable understanding. It moves when it believes itself unobserved.
obj.item.clothing.suit.hooded.cultrobes..name: Writhing Embrace

obj.item.clothing.suit.hooded.cultrobes..desc: A ragged, dusty set of robes. Strange eyes line the inside.
obj.item.clothing.suit.hooded.cultrobes..name: Shifting Guise

obj.item.clothing.suit.hooded.cultrobes..desc: The confounding nature of this opulent garb turns and twists the sight. 			The viewer must come to a chilling revelation; 			what they see is as true as any other face.
obj.item.clothing.suit.hooded.cultrobes..name: Resplendant Regalia

obj.item.clothing.suit.hooded.cultrobes..desc: Touching the folds of this plain robe seem to fill you with unease. 			Even looking fills you with a sense of vertigo. 			Some pulse threatening to pull you within.
obj.item.clothing.suit.hooded.cultrobes..name: Salvaged Remains

obj.item.clothing.suit.hooded.cultrobes..desc: At first, the empty canvas of this robe seems to shimmer with a faint, cold light. 			Yet upon tracking the shape of the folds more carefully, it is better to describe it as the absence of such a thing.
obj.item.clothing.suit.hooded.cultrobes..name: Hollow Weave

obj.item.clothing.suit.hooded.cultrobes..desc: A heavily-armored exosuit worn by warriors of the Nar'Sien cult. It can withstand hard vacuum.
obj.item.clothing.suit.hooded.cultrobes..name: Nar'Sien hardened armor

obj.item.clothing.suit.hooded.cultrobes..desc: Black like tar, reflecting no light. Runic symbols line the outside. 		With each flash you lose comprehension of what you are seeing.
obj.item.clothing.suit.hooded.cultrobes..name: void cloak

obj.item.clothing.suit.hooded.ethereal_r.desc: A raincoat commonly worn by travelers or tourists not too fond of Sprout's rainy weather.
obj.item.clothing.suit.hooded.ethereal_r.name: ethereal raincoat

obj.item.clothing.suit.hooded.ethereal_r.desc: A masterfully handcrafted oilslick coat, supposedly makes for excellent camouflage among Sprout's vegetation. You can hear a faint electrical buzz emanating from the luminescent pattern.
obj.item.clothing.suit.hooded.ethereal_r.name: trailwarden oilcoat

obj.item.clothing.suit.hooded.explorer.desc: An armoured suit for exploring harsh environments.
obj.item.clothing.suit.hooded.explorer.name: explorer suit

obj.item.clothing.suit.hooded.explorer.s.desc: An armoured suit for exploring harsh environments, dyed in the sinister red and black of the Syndicate. This one seems better armored than the ones Nanotrasen gives out.
obj.item.clothing.suit.hooded.explorer.s.name: syndicate explorer suit

obj.item.clothing.suit.hooded.hostile_en.desc: Hostile Environment Cross-Kinetic Suit: A suit designed to withstand the wide variety of hazards from Lavaland. It wasn't enough for its last owner.
obj.item.clothing.suit.hooded.hostile_en.name: H.E.C.K. suit

obj.item.clothing.suit.hooded.ian_costum.desc: A costume that looks like someone made a human-like corgi, it won't guarantee belly rubs.
obj.item.clothing.suit.hooded.ian_costum.name: corgi costume

obj.item.clothing.suit.hooded.leather.desc: A simple leather coat with a hoodie underneath it, not really hooded is it?
obj.item.clothing.suit.hooded.leather.name: hooded leather coat

obj.item.clothing.suit.hooded.mysticrobe.desc: Wearing this makes you feel more attuned with the nature of the universe... as well as a bit more irresponsible.
obj.item.clothing.suit.hooded.mysticrobe.name: mystic's robe

obj.item.clothing.suit.hooded.occult.desc: A big, heavy coat lined with leather and ivory cloth, adorned with a hood. It looks dusty.
obj.item.clothing.suit.hooded.occult.name: occult collector's coat

obj.item.clothing.suit.hooded.seva.desc: A fire-proof suit for exploring hot environments. Its design doesn't allow for upgrading with goliath plates.
obj.item.clothing.suit.hooded.seva.name: SEVA suit

obj.item.clothing.suit.hooded.shark_cost.desc: Finally, a costume to match your favorite plush.
obj.item.clothing.suit.hooded.shark_cost.name: Shark costume

obj.item.clothing.suit.hooded.shork_cost.desc: Why would you ever do this?
obj.item.clothing.suit.hooded.shork_cost.name: shork costume

obj.item.clothing.suit.hooded.sigmarcoat.desc: A light black raincoat. You didn't even know they're made in this color.
obj.item.clothing.suit.hooded.sigmarcoat.name: black open-faced raincoat

obj.item.clothing.suit.hooded.techpriest.desc: For those who REALLY love their toasters.
obj.item.clothing.suit.hooded.techpriest.name: techpriest robes

obj.item.clothing.suit.hooded.techpriest.desc: The flesh does not discriminate. Join the flesh.
obj.item.clothing.suit.hooded.techpriest.name: wire priest's robes

obj.item.clothing.suit.hooded.twee_hoodi.desc: A sweatshirt of heavy and soft ringspun fleece has been adorned with a fabric simulation of ears.
obj.item.clothing.suit.hooded.twee_hoodi.name: disconcertingly twee hoodie

obj.item.clothing.suit.hooded.wintercoat.desc: A heavy jacket made from 'synthetic' animal furs.
obj.item.clothing.suit.hooded.wintercoat.name: winter coat

obj.item.clothing.suit.hooded.wintercoat.desc: A luxurious winter coat, stuffed with the down of the endangered Uka bird and trimmed with genuine sable. The fabric is an indulgently soft micro-fiber, 			and the deep ultramarine colour is only one that could be achieved with minute amounts of crystalline bluespace dust woven into the thread between the plectrums. 			Extremely lavish, and extremely durable.
obj.item.clothing.suit.hooded.wintercoat.name: captain's winter coat

obj.item.clothing.suit.hooded.wintercoat.desc: A tan-and-grey winter coat. The zipper tab is a small pin resembling a MULE. It fills you with the warmth of a fierce independence.
obj.item.clothing.suit.hooded.wintercoat.name: cargo winter coat

obj.item.clothing.suit.hooded.wintercoat.desc: A dark brown winter coat that has a golden crate pin for its zipper pully.
obj.item.clothing.suit.hooded.wintercoat.name: quartermaster's winter coat

obj.item.clothing.suit.hooded.wintercoat.desc: A luxurious winter coat woven in the bright green and gold colours of Central Command. It has a small pin in the shape of the Nanotrasen logo for a zipper.
obj.item.clothing.suit.hooded.wintercoat.name: centcom winter coat

obj.item.clothing.suit.hooded.wintercoat.desc: A luxurious winter coat woven in the bright green and gold colours of Central Command. It has a small pin in the shape of the Nanotrasen logo for a zipper.
obj.item.clothing.suit.hooded.wintercoat.name: centcom winter coat

obj.item.clothing.suit.hooded.wintercoat.desc: A heavy jacket made from 'synthetic' animal furs.
obj.item.clothing.suit.hooded.wintercoat.name: custom winter coat

obj.item.clothing.suit.hooded.wintercoat.desc: A heavy jacket made from 'synthetic' animal furs, with custom colors.
obj.item.clothing.suit.hooded.wintercoat.name: tailored winter coat

obj.item.clothing.suit.hooded.wintercoat.desc: A surprisingly heavy yellow winter coat with reflective orange stripes. It has a small wrench for its zipper tab, and the inside layer is covered with a radiation-resistant silver-nylon blend. Because you're worth it.
obj.item.clothing.suit.hooded.wintercoat.name: engineering winter coat

obj.item.clothing.suit.hooded.wintercoat.desc: A yellow and blue winter coat. The zipper pull-tab is made to look like a miniature breath mask.
obj.item.clothing.suit.hooded.wintercoat.name: atmospherics winter coat

obj.item.clothing.suit.hooded.wintercoat.desc: A white winter coat with reflective green and yellow stripes. Stuffed with asbestos, treated with fire retardant PBDE, lined with a micro thin sheet of lead foil and snugly fitted to your body's measurements. This baby's ready to save you from anything except the thyroid cancer and systemic fibrosis you'll get from wearing it. The zipper tab is a tiny golden wrench.
obj.item.clothing.suit.hooded.wintercoat.name: chief engineer's winter coat

obj.item.clothing.suit.hooded.wintercoat.desc: A thickly padded winter coat to keep the wearer well insulated no matter the circumstances. It has a harness for a larger oxygen tank attached to the back.
obj.item.clothing.suit.hooded.wintercoat.name: Endotherm winter coat

obj.item.clothing.suit.hooded.wintercoat.desc: A cozy winter coat, covered in thick fur. The breast features a proud yellow chevron, reminding everyone that you're the second banana.
obj.item.clothing.suit.hooded.wintercoat.name: head of personnel's winter coat

obj.item.clothing.suit.hooded.wintercoat.desc: A green and blue winter coat. The zipper tab looks like the flower from a member of Rosa Hesperrhodos, a pretty pink-and-white rose. The colours absolutely clash.
obj.item.clothing.suit.hooded.wintercoat.name: hydroponics winter coat

obj.item.clothing.suit.hooded.wintercoat.desc: A purple-and-beige winter coat that smells of space cleaner.
obj.item.clothing.suit.hooded.wintercoat.name: janitors winter coat

obj.item.clothing.suit.hooded.wintercoat.desc: An arctic white winter coat with a small blue caduceus instead of a plastic zipper tab. Snazzy.
obj.item.clothing.suit.hooded.wintercoat.name: medical winter coat

obj.item.clothing.suit.hooded.wintercoat.desc: A lab-grade winter coat made with acid resistant polymers. For the enterprising chemist who was exiled to a frozen wasteland on the go.
obj.item.clothing.suit.hooded.wintercoat.name: chemistry winter coat

obj.item.clothing.suit.hooded.wintercoat.desc: A winter coat in a vibrant shade of blue with a small silver caduceus instead of a plastic zipper tab. The normal liner is replaced with an exceptionally thick, soft layer of fur.
obj.item.clothing.suit.hooded.wintercoat.name: chief medical officer's winter coat

obj.item.clothing.suit.hooded.wintercoat.desc: A winter coat made with acid resistant polymers, used when the cold dead bodies are too much.
obj.item.clothing.suit.hooded.wintercoat.name: coroner winter coat

obj.item.clothing.suit.hooded.wintercoat.desc: A winter coat with blue markings. Warm, but probably won't protect from biological agents. For the cozy doctor on the go.
obj.item.clothing.suit.hooded.wintercoat.name: paramedic winter coat

obj.item.clothing.suit.hooded.wintercoat.desc: A white winter coat with green markings. Warm, but won't fight off the common cold or any other disease. Might make people stand far away from you in the hallway. The zipper tab looks like an oversized bacteriophage.
obj.item.clothing.suit.hooded.wintercoat.name: virology winter coat

obj.item.clothing.suit.hooded.wintercoat.desc: A dusty button up winter coat. The zipper tab looks like a tiny pickaxe.
obj.item.clothing.suit.hooded.wintercoat.name: mining winter coat

obj.item.clothing.suit.hooded.wintercoat.desc: A colorable pullover hoodie.
obj.item.clothing.suit.hooded.wintercoat.name: pullover

obj.item.clothing.suit.hooded.wintercoat.desc: A white winter coat with an outdated atomic model instead of a plastic zipper tab.
obj.item.clothing.suit.hooded.wintercoat.name: science winter coat

obj.item.clothing.suit.hooded.wintercoat.desc: A white winter coat with a DNA helix for the zipper tab.
obj.item.clothing.suit.hooded.wintercoat.name: genetics winter coat

obj.item.clothing.suit.hooded.wintercoat.desc: A thick arctic winter coat with an outdated atomic model instead of a plastic zipper tab. Most in the know are heavily aware that Bohr's model of the atom was outdated by the time of the 1930s when the Heisenbergian and Schrodinger models were generally accepted for true. Nevertheless, we still see its use in anachronism, roleplaying, and, in this case, as a zipper tab. At least it should keep you warm on your ivory pillar.
obj.item.clothing.suit.hooded.wintercoat.name: research director's winter coat

obj.item.clothing.suit.hooded.wintercoat.desc: A black winter coat with a badass flaming robotic skull for the zipper tab. This one has bright red designs and a few useless buttons.
obj.item.clothing.suit.hooded.wintercoat.name: robotics winter coat

obj.item.clothing.suit.hooded.wintercoat.desc: A red, armour-padded winter coat. It glitters with a mild ablative coating and a robust air of authority.  The zipper tab is a pair of jingly little handcuffs that get annoying after the first ten seconds.
obj.item.clothing.suit.hooded.wintercoat.name: security winter jacket

obj.item.clothing.suit.hooded.wintercoat.desc: A winter coat with an armored vest resting atop it, perfect for those cold Freyja nights.
obj.item.clothing.suit.hooded.wintercoat.name: security winter coat

obj.item.clothing.suit.hooded.wintercoat.desc: A dark gray winter coat with bronze-gold detailing, and a zipper in the shape of a toolbox.
obj.item.clothing.suit.hooded.wintercoat.name: assistant's formal winter coat

obj.item.clothing.suit.hooded.wintercoat.desc: A heavy jacket made from wool originally stolen from the chef's goat. This new design is made to fit the classic suit-and-tie aesthetic, but without the hypothermia.
obj.item.clothing.suit.hooded.wintercoat.name: bartender's winter coat

obj.item.clothing.suit.hooded.wintercoat.desc: A comfy kevlar-lined coat with blue highlights, fit to keep the blueshield armored and warm.
obj.item.clothing.suit.hooded.wintercoat.name: blueshield's winter coat

obj.item.clothing.suit.hooded.wintercoat.desc: A festive Christmas coat, warm and lined with white, soft fabric. The zipper tab is a small Candy Cane!
obj.item.clothing.suit.hooded.wintercoat.name: christmas winter coat

obj.item.clothing.suit.hooded.wintercoat.desc: A festive Christmas coat, warm and lined with white, soft fabric. The zipper tab is a small Candy Cane!
obj.item.clothing.suit.hooded.wintercoat.name: christmas winter coat

obj.item.clothing.suit.hooded.wintercoat.desc: A somber button-up in dark tones of grey entropy and a wicked crimson zipper. It's covered in intricate runes and symbols, and the zipper tab looks like a single drop of blood.
obj.item.clothing.suit.hooded.wintercoat.name: narsian winter coat

obj.item.clothing.suit.hooded.wintercoat.desc: A brass-plated button up winter coat. Instead of a zipper tab, it has a brass cog with a tiny red gemstone inset.
obj.item.clothing.suit.hooded.wintercoat.name: ratvarian winter coat

obj.item.clothing.suit.hooded.wintercoat.desc: A sinister black coat with red accents and a fancy mantle, it feels like it can take a hit. The zipper tab looks like a triple headed snake in the shape of an S, spooky.
obj.item.clothing.suit.hooded.wintercoat.name: syndicate winter coat

obj.item.clothing.suit.hooded.wintercoat.desc: A colorable zipup hoodie.
obj.item.clothing.suit.hooded.wintercoat.name: zipup

obj.item.clothing.suit.jacket.brasspries.desc: A reddish coat with brass-clad parts embed into said coat. You can hear the faint noise of some cogs turning from time to time inside.
obj.item.clothing.suit.jacket.brasspries.name: brasspriest coat

obj.item.clothing.suit.jacket.caligram_p.desc: A coat with a black belt and '/Blacktide Mercenary Corps/' stitched onto the armband. Comes in tan, blue, and patchless blue variants.
obj.item.clothing.suit.jacket.caligram_p.name: Blacktide coat

obj.item.clothing.suit.jacket.capjacket.desc: Worn by a Captain to show their class.
obj.item.clothing.suit.jacket.capjacket.name: captain's parade jacket

obj.item.clothing.suit.jacket.cherno.desc: A comfy-looking blue coat. It looks a bit fancy, with shiny silver buttons and a few belts!
obj.item.clothing.suit.jacket.cherno.name: silver-buttoned coat

obj.item.clothing.suit.jacket.curator.desc: Both fashionable and lightly armoured, this jacket is favoured by treasure hunters the galaxy over.
obj.item.clothing.suit.jacket.curator.name: treasure hunter's coat

obj.item.clothing.suit.jacket.delta.desc: A plain old grey hoodie. It has some puffing on the inside, and a animal fur trim around half of the hood.
obj.item.clothing.suit.jacket.delta.name: grey winter hoodie

obj.item.clothing.suit.jacket.det_suit.desc: A suit jacket perfect for dinner dates and criminal investigations.
obj.item.clothing.suit.jacket.det_suit.name: brown blazer jacket

obj.item.clothing.suit.jacket.det_suit.c.desc: A white cream vest lined with... fur, of all things, for desert weather. There's a small deer head logo sewn into the vest.
obj.item.clothing.suit.jacket.det_suit.c.name: blonde cowboy vest

obj.item.clothing.suit.jacket.det_suit.d.desc: Looks like someone skinned this blazer off some long extinct disco-animal. It has an enigmatic white rectangle on the back and the right sleeve.
obj.item.clothing.suit.jacket.det_suit.d.name: disco ass blazer

obj.item.clothing.suit.jacket.det_suit.k.desc: A jacket once worn by the revolutionary air brigades during the Antecentennial Revolution. There are quite a few pockets on the inside, mostly for storing notebooks and compasses.
obj.item.clothing.suit.jacket.det_suit.k.name: aerostatic bomber jacket

obj.item.clothing.suit.jacket.det_suit.n.desc: A dapper private investigator's dark suit jacket.
obj.item.clothing.suit.jacket.det_suit.n.name: noir blazer jacket

obj.item.clothing.suit.jacket.det_suit.n.desc: A dapper private investigator's dark suit jacket.
obj.item.clothing.suit.jacket.det_suit.n.name: noir blazer jacket

obj.item.clothing.suit.jacket.det_suit.n.desc: A professional suit jacket, it feels much heavier than a regular jacket. A label on the inside reads "Nanite-based Self-repairing Kevlar weave".
obj.item.clothing.suit.jacket.det_suit.n.name: armored suit jacket

obj.item.clothing.suit.jacket.det_suit.t.desc: A reinforced tailcoat worn by bunny themed detectives. Perfect for a hard boiled no-nonsense type of gal.
obj.item.clothing.suit.jacket.det_suit.t.name: detective's tailcoat

obj.item.clothing.suit.jacket.det_suit.t.desc: A reinforced tailcoat worn by noir bunny themed detectives. Perfect for a hard boiled no-nonsense type of gal.
obj.item.clothing.suit.jacket.det_suit.t.name: noir detective's tailcoat

obj.item.clothing.suit.jacket.diver.desc: A dark leather jacket with the logo of an old Sol Chromerock band on it.
obj.item.clothing.suit.jacket.diver.name: black divers coat

obj.item.clothing.suit.jacket.fancy.desc: Rated 10 out of 10 in Cosmo for best coat brand.
obj.item.clothing.suit.jacket.fancy.name: fancy fur coat

obj.item.clothing.suit.jacket.flight.desc: Originally developed for the United States Air Force. This jacket has been lovingly passed down from airman to airman before arriving in the 26th Century. Its complete with the reversible orange interior for emergency situations as well. From what you can see on the tag, this Jacket appears to have been made in the year 1985 for the USAF, with a faint name written onto the nametag.
obj.item.clothing.suit.jacket.flight.name: MA-1 flight jacket

obj.item.clothing.suit.jacket.frontier_c.desc: A knee length coat with a water-resistant exterior and relatively comfortable interior. 		In between? Just enough protective material to stop the odd sharp thing getting through, 		though don't expect miracles.
obj.item.clothing.suit.jacket.frontier_c.name: frontier trenchcoat

obj.item.clothing.suit.jacket.frontier_c.desc: A knee length coat with a water-resistant exterior and relatively comfortable interior. 		In between? Just enough protective material to stop the odd sharp thing getting through, 		though don't expect miracles.
obj.item.clothing.suit.jacket.frontier_c.name: frontier trenchcoat

obj.item.clothing.suit.jacket.frontier_c.desc: A short coat with a water-resistant exterior and relatively comfortable interior. 		In between? Just enough protective material to stop the odd sharp thing getting through, 		though don't expect miracles. This one is colored a bright red and covered in white 		stripes to denote that someone wearing it might be able to provide medical assistance.
obj.item.clothing.suit.jacket.frontier_c.name: frontier medical jacket

obj.item.clothing.suit.jacket.frontier_c.desc: A short coat with a water-resistant exterior and relatively comfortable interior. 		In between? Just enough protective material to stop the odd sharp thing getting through, 		though don't expect miracles.
obj.item.clothing.suit.jacket.frontier_c.name: frontier jacket

obj.item.clothing.suit.jacket.frontier_c.desc: A short coat with a water-resistant exterior and relatively comfortable interior. 		In between? Just enough protective material to stop the odd sharp thing getting through, 		though don't expect miracles.
obj.item.clothing.suit.jacket.frontier_c.name: frontier jacket

obj.item.clothing.suit.jacket.galfed.desc: A jacket worn by members of the Galactic Federation. It's a bit worn, but it's still in good condition.
obj.item.clothing.suit.jacket.galfed.name: Galactic Federation jacket

obj.item.clothing.suit.jacket.gorlex_har.desc: A blood-red engineering technician harness. You can't seem to figure out a use to it, but it seems to seal magnetically in some places.
obj.item.clothing.suit.jacket.gorlex_har.name: engine technician harness

obj.item.clothing.suit.jacket.henchmen_c.desc: Alright boss.. I'll handle it. It seems to be armored.
obj.item.clothing.suit.jacket.henchmen_c.name: armored henchmen coat

obj.item.clothing.suit.jacket.hos.blue.desc: This piece of clothing was specifically designed for asserting superior authority.
obj.item.clothing.suit.jacket.hos.blue.name: head of security's jacket

obj.item.clothing.suit.jacket.hos.tan.desc: This piece of clothing was specifically designed for asserting superior authority.
obj.item.clothing.suit.jacket.hos.tan.name: head of security's jacket

obj.item.clothing.suit.jacket.hydrogenro.desc: An incredibly shiny dress that seems to be covered in a very thin sheet of metallic hydrogen all over the textiles. Not very protective.
obj.item.clothing.suit.jacket.hydrogenro.name: metallic-hydrogen robes

obj.item.clothing.suit.jacket.idma_jacke.desc: A lightweight jacket worn with  a '/Romulus Expeditionary Force/' insignia on it, this one is meant to be worn as utility coat.
obj.item.clothing.suit.jacket.idma_jacke.name: ironmoon service coat

obj.item.clothing.suit.jacket.leather.bi.desc: You think I'm not even worth a single dollar, but I feel like a millionare.
obj.item.clothing.suit.jacket.leather.bi.name: biker jacket

obj.item.clothing.suit.jacket.leather_tr.desc: A long, black trenchcoat. Makes you feel like you're the one, but you're not.
obj.item.clothing.suit.jacket.leather_tr.name: leather trenchcoat

obj.item.clothing.suit.jacket.letterman.desc: A classic brown letterman jacket. Looks pretty hot and heavy.
obj.item.clothing.suit.jacket.letterman.name: letterman jacket

obj.item.clothing.suit.jacket.letterman_.desc: A blue letterman jacket with a proud Nanotrasen N on the back. The tag says that it was made in Space China.
obj.item.clothing.suit.jacket.letterman_.name: blue letterman jacket

obj.item.clothing.suit.jacket.letterman_.desc: A letterman jacket in a sick red color. Radical.
obj.item.clothing.suit.jacket.letterman_.name: red letterman jacket

obj.item.clothing.suit.jacket.letterman_.desc: Oddly, this jacket seems to have a large S on the back...
obj.item.clothing.suit.jacket.letterman_.name: blood-red letterman jacket

obj.item.clothing.suit.jacket.miljacket.desc: A canvas jacket styled after classical American military garb. Feels sturdy, yet comfortable.
obj.item.clothing.suit.jacket.miljacket.name: military jacket

obj.item.clothing.suit.jacket.officer.bl.desc: This jacket is for those special occasions when a security officer isn't required to wear their armor.
obj.item.clothing.suit.jacket.officer.bl.name: security officer's jacket

obj.item.clothing.suit.jacket.officer.ta.desc: This jacket is for those special occasions when a security officer isn't required to wear their armor.
obj.item.clothing.suit.jacket.officer.ta.name: security officer's jacket

obj.item.clothing.suit.jacket.primitive_.desc: A large piece of animal hide stuffed with fur, likely from the same animal.
obj.item.clothing.suit.jacket.primitive_.name: primitive fur coat

obj.item.clothing.suit.jacket.puffer.desc: A thick jacket with a rubbery, water-resistant shell.
obj.item.clothing.suit.jacket.puffer.name: puffer jacket

obj.item.clothing.suit.jacket.puffer.ves.desc: A thick vest with a rubbery, water-resistant shell.
obj.item.clothing.suit.jacket.puffer.ves.name: puffer vest

obj.item.clothing.suit.jacket.quartermas.desc: A luxury, brown double-breasted overcoat made from kangaroo skin. Its gold cuffs are linked and styled on the credits symbol. It makes you feel more important than you probably are.
obj.item.clothing.suit.jacket.quartermas.name: quartermaster's overcoat

obj.item.clothing.suit.jacket.ryddid.desc: An old worn out piece of clothing belonging to a certain small demon.
obj.item.clothing.suit.jacket.ryddid.name: Ryddid

obj.item.clothing.suit.jacket.skyy.desc: A jacket for those with a commanding presence. Made of synthetic fabric, it's interwoven with a special alloy that provides extra protection and style.
obj.item.clothing.suit.jacket.skyy.name: silver jacket

obj.item.clothing.suit.jacket.straight_j.desc: A suit that completely restrains the wearer. Manufactured by Antyphun Corp.
obj.item.clothing.suit.jacket.straight_j.name: straight jacket

obj.item.clothing.suit.jacket.tailcoat.desc: A coat usually worn by bunny themed waiters and the like.
obj.item.clothing.suit.jacket.tailcoat.name: tailcoat

obj.item.clothing.suit.jacket.tailcoat.b.desc: A coat usually worn by bunny themed bartenders. It has an interior holster for firearms and some extra padding for minor protection.
obj.item.clothing.suit.jacket.tailcoat.b.name: bartender's tailcoat

obj.item.clothing.suit.jacket.tailcoat.b.desc: A black and gold coat worn by bunny themed cargo technicians. Open your Space Colas and let's fuckin' game!
obj.item.clothing.suit.jacket.tailcoat.b.name: bitrunner tailcoat

obj.item.clothing.suit.jacket.tailcoat.b.desc: A green leather coat worn by bunny themed botanists. Great for keeping the sun off your back.
obj.item.clothing.suit.jacket.tailcoat.b.name: botanist's tailcoat

obj.item.clothing.suit.jacket.tailcoat.b.desc: A tailcoat emblazoned with the Union Jack. Perfect attire for teatime.
obj.item.clothing.suit.jacket.tailcoat.b.name: british flag tailcoat

obj.item.clothing.suit.jacket.tailcoat.c.desc: A simple brown coat worn by bunny themed cargo technicians. Significantly less stripy than the quartermasters.
obj.item.clothing.suit.jacket.tailcoat.c.name: cargo tailcoat

obj.item.clothing.suit.jacket.tailcoat.c.desc: An official coat usually worn by bunny themed executives. The inside is lined with comfortable yet tasteful bunny fluff.
obj.item.clothing.suit.jacket.tailcoat.c.name: Centcom tailcoat

obj.item.clothing.suit.jacket.tailcoat.c.desc: A gilded black coat worn by bunny themed chaplains. Traditional vestments of the lagomorphic cults of Cairead.
obj.item.clothing.suit.jacket.tailcoat.c.name: chaplain's tailcoat

obj.item.clothing.suit.jacket.tailcoat.c.desc: An orange polkadot coat worn by bunny themed clowns. Shows everyone who the real ringmaster is.
obj.item.clothing.suit.jacket.tailcoat.c.name: clown's tailcoat

obj.item.clothing.suit.jacket.tailcoat.c.desc: A red tailcoat emblazoned with a golden star. The official uniform of the Bunny Waiter Union.
obj.item.clothing.suit.jacket.tailcoat.c.name: really red tailcoat

obj.item.clothing.suit.jacket.tailcoat.c.desc: A professional white coat worn by bunny themed chefs. The red accents pair nicely with the monkey blood that often stains this.
obj.item.clothing.suit.jacket.tailcoat.c.name: cook's tailcoat

obj.item.clothing.suit.jacket.tailcoat.c.desc: A green linen coat worn by bunny themed librarians. Keeps the dust off your shoulders during long shifts in the archives.
obj.item.clothing.suit.jacket.tailcoat.c.name: curator's green tailcoat

obj.item.clothing.suit.jacket.tailcoat.c.desc: A red linen coat worn by bunny themed librarians. Keeps the dust off your shoulders during long shifts in the archives.
obj.item.clothing.suit.jacket.tailcoat.c.name: curator's red tailcoat

obj.item.clothing.suit.jacket.tailcoat.c.desc: A teal linen coat worn by bunny themed librarians. Keeps the dust off your shoulders during long shifts in the archives.
obj.item.clothing.suit.jacket.tailcoat.c.name: curator's teal tailcoat

obj.item.clothing.suit.jacket.tailcoat.e.desc: A high visibility tailcoat worn by bunny themed engineers. Great for working in low-light conditions.
obj.item.clothing.suit.jacket.tailcoat.e.name: engineering tailcoat

obj.item.clothing.suit.jacket.tailcoat.j.desc: A clean looking coat usually worn by bunny themed janitors. The purple sleeves are a late 24th century style.
obj.item.clothing.suit.jacket.tailcoat.j.name: janitor's tailcoat

obj.item.clothing.suit.jacket.tailcoat.l.desc: The staple of any bunny themed lawyers. EXTREMELY professional.
obj.item.clothing.suit.jacket.tailcoat.l.name: lawyer's black tailcoat

obj.item.clothing.suit.jacket.tailcoat.l.desc: A blue linen coat worn by bunny themed lawyers. May or may not contain souls of the damned in suit pockets.
obj.item.clothing.suit.jacket.tailcoat.l.name: lawyer's blue tailcoat

obj.item.clothing.suit.jacket.tailcoat.l.desc: A beige linen coat worn by bunny themed lawyers. May or may not contain souls of the damned in suit pockets.
obj.item.clothing.suit.jacket.tailcoat.l.name: good lawyer's tailcoat

obj.item.clothing.suit.jacket.tailcoat.l.desc: A red linen coat worn by bunny themed lawyers. May or may not contain souls of the damned in suit pockets.
obj.item.clothing.suit.jacket.tailcoat.l.name: lawyer's red tailcoat

obj.item.clothing.suit.jacket.tailcoat.m.desc: A stripy sleeved black coat worn by bunny themed mimes. The red accents mimic the suspenders seen in more standard mime outfits.
obj.item.clothing.suit.jacket.tailcoat.m.name: mime's tailcoat

obj.item.clothing.suit.jacket.tailcoat.m.desc: An adapted explorer suit worn by bunny themed shaft miners. It has attachment points for goliath plates but comparatively little armor.
obj.item.clothing.suit.jacket.tailcoat.m.name: explorer tailcoat

obj.item.clothing.suit.jacket.tailcoat.p.desc: A purple coat that looks to be the same purple used in several plasmaman evirosuits.
obj.item.clothing.suit.jacket.tailcoat.p.name: purple tailcoat

obj.item.clothing.suit.jacket.tailcoat.p.desc: A black linen coat worn by bunny themed psychologists. A casual open coat for making you seem approachable, maybe too casual.
obj.item.clothing.suit.jacket.tailcoat.p.name: psychologist's tailcoat

obj.item.clothing.suit.jacket.tailcoat.q.desc: A fancy brown coat worn by bunny themed quartermasters. The gold accents show everyone who's in charge.
obj.item.clothing.suit.jacket.tailcoat.q.name: quartermaster's tailcoat

obj.item.clothing.suit.jacket.tailcoat.s.desc: A oddly intimidating coat usually worn by bunny themed assassins. It's reinforced with some extremely flexible lightweight alloy. How much did they pay for this?
obj.item.clothing.suit.jacket.tailcoat.s.name: suspicious tailcoat

obj.item.clothing.suit.jacket.tailcoat.s.desc: A oddly intimidating coat usually worn by bunny themed assassins. It's reinforced with some extremely flexible lightweight alloy. How much did they pay for this?
obj.item.clothing.suit.jacket.tailcoat.s.name: suspicious tailcoat

obj.item.clothing.suit.jacket.tailcoat.u.desc: A vintage coat worn by the 5th bunny battalion during the Revolutionary War. Smooth-bore musket not included.
obj.item.clothing.suit.jacket.tailcoat.u.name: stars tailcoat

obj.item.clothing.suit.jacket.trenchcoat.desc: An armored leather overcoat, intended as the go-to wear for any aspiring gunman.
obj.item.clothing.suit.jacket.trenchcoat.name: leather overcoat

obj.item.clothing.suit.jacket.trucker.desc: Contact a coder if you see this.
obj.item.clothing.suit.jacket.trucker.name: suit

obj.item.clothing.suit.jacket.trucker.hi.desc: A trucker's jacket with high visibility orange and yellow stripes for warehouse work.
obj.item.clothing.suit.jacket.trucker.hi.name: high vis trucker jacket

obj.item.clothing.suit.jacket.trucker.ro.desc: A dark leather jacket with the logo of an old Sol Chromerock band on it.
obj.item.clothing.suit.jacket.trucker.ro.name: ronin jacket

obj.item.clothing.suit.jacket.vera_jacke.desc: A purple vest with gold trims, fits for a snobbish research director.
obj.item.clothing.suit.jacket.vera_jacke.name: silicon administrator vest

obj.item.clothing.suit.jacket.warden.blu.desc: Perfectly suited for the warden that wants to leave an impression of style on those who visit the brig.
obj.item.clothing.suit.jacket.warden.blu.name: warden's jacket

obj.item.clothing.suit.jacket.warden.tan.desc: Perfectly suited for the warden that wants to leave an impression of style on those who visit the brig.
obj.item.clothing.suit.jacket.warden.tan.name: warden's jacket

obj.item.clothing.suit.kimjacket.desc: A jacket once worn by the Air Force during the Antecentennial Revolution, there are quite a few pockets on the inside, mostly for storing notebooks and compasses.
obj.item.clothing.suit.kimjacket.name: aerostatic bomber jacket

obj.item.clothing.suit.koreacoat.desc: War makes people cold, not just on the inside, but on the outside as well... luckily this coat's not seen any hardships like that, and is actually quite warm!
obj.item.clothing.suit.koreacoat.name: eastern winter coat

obj.item.clothing.suit.leatherapron.desc: A somewhat sterile apron made from thick leather, perfect for sawing limbs off without getting your uniform bloody.
obj.item.clothing.suit.leatherapron.name: leather apron

obj.item.clothing.suit.misc.allamerican.desc: A soft fabric vest, with a nametag of the employee on it. It says, MANAGER on the back, making you obvious for the Karens who just NEED your attention.
obj.item.clothing.suit.misc.allamerican.name: all-american diner manager's vest

obj.item.clothing.suit.misc.holographic.desc: The Holographic Suit V4000 has multiple layers designed specifically to refract and bend light waves around the user, effectively making them transparent to the naked eye. The suit comes equipped with advanced sensors that constantly scan its surroundings, adjusting its holographic projection accordingly. As soon as you put on the suit it calibrates itself based on your unique body shape and size.
obj.item.clothing.suit.misc.holographic.name: Holographic Suit V4000

obj.item.clothing.suit.misc.suit_harness.desc: A near-concealed harness meant for going over uniforms. Or lack thereof.
obj.item.clothing.suit.misc.suit_harness.name: suit harness

obj.item.clothing.suit.modernwintercoatt.desc: Warm and comfy, the inner fur seems to be removable, not this one though, someone's sewn it in and left the buttons!
obj.item.clothing.suit.modernwintercoatt.name: modern winter coat

obj.item.clothing.suit.mothcoat.desc: This peculiar utility harness is a common sight among the moth fleet's crews due to its ability to fasten the wings to the body without impacting mobility inside cramped ship interiors. It looks somewhat crude yet it's surprisingly comfortable.
obj.item.clothing.suit.mothcoat.name: mothic flightsuit

obj.item.clothing.suit.mothcoat.original.desc: An old-school flightsuit from the moth fleet. A perfect token of mothic survivalistic and adaptable attitude, yet a bitter reminder that with the loss of their home planet and institution of the fleet, their beloved wings remain as a burden to bear, condemned to never fly again.
obj.item.clothing.suit.mothcoat.original.name: mothic flightsuit

obj.item.clothing.suit.mothcoat.winter.desc: A thick garment that keeps warm and protects those precious wings from harsh weather, also commonly used during festivities. Feels much heavier than it looks.
obj.item.clothing.suit.mothcoat.winter.name: mothic mantella

obj.item.clothing.suit.mush.desc: A mushroom suit, these can be sporadically seen being worn by the more fungal personalities.
obj.item.clothing.suit.mush.name: mushroom suit

obj.item.clothing.suit.pillow_suit.desc: Part man, part pillow. All CARNAGE!
obj.item.clothing.suit.pillow_suit.name: pillow suit

obj.item.clothing.suit.pizzaleader.desc: A long, cool, flowing coat in a tasteless red colour.
obj.item.clothing.suit.pizzaleader.name: dogginos manager coat

obj.item.clothing.suit.razurathcoat.desc: A fancy Nanotrasen officer coat. Now darker, golder, and cooler than ever!
obj.item.clothing.suit.razurathcoat.name: Golden Nanotrasen Officer Coat

obj.item.clothing.suit.redtag.desc: A piece of plastic armor. It has sensors that react to blue light.
obj.item.clothing.suit.redtag.name: red laser tag armor

obj.item.clothing.suit.scraparmour.desc: A shoddily crafted piece of armour. It provides no benefit apart from being clunky.
obj.item.clothing.suit.scraparmour.name: scrap armour

obj.item.clothing.suit.short_coat.desc: A short black and purple coat, mostly used for asthetics then insulating the person wearing it.
obj.item.clothing.suit.short_coat.name: Short Purple Coat

obj.item.clothing.suit.space.desc: A suit that protects against low pressure environments. Has a big 13 on the back.
obj.item.clothing.suit.space.name: space suit

obj.item.clothing.suit.space.basketball.desc: A suit that protects against low pressure environments. Has a big 13 on the back.
obj.item.clothing.suit.space.basketball.name: space suit

obj.item.clothing.suit.space.changeling.desc: A suit that protects against low pressure environments. Has a big 13 on the back.
obj.item.clothing.suit.space.changeling.name: space suit

obj.item.clothing.suit.space.emergency.desc: A fragile looking emergency spacesuit for limited use in space.
obj.item.clothing.suit.space.emergency.name: emergency space suit

obj.item.clothing.suit.space.eva.desc: A lightweight space suit with the basic ability to protect the wearer from the vacuum of space during emergencies.
obj.item.clothing.suit.space.eva.name: EVA suit

obj.item.clothing.suit.space.eva.plasmam.desc: A special plasma containment suit designed to be space-worthy, as well as worn over other clothing. Like its smaller counterpart, it can automatically extinguish the wearer in a crisis, and holds twice as many charges.
obj.item.clothing.suit.space.eva.plasmam.name: EVA plasma envirosuit

obj.item.clothing.suit.space.fragile.desc: A bulky, airtight suit meant to protect the user during emergency situations. It doesn't look very durable.
obj.item.clothing.suit.space.fragile.name: emergency space suit

obj.item.clothing.suit.space.freedom.desc: An advanced, light suit, fabricated from a mixture of synthetic feathers and space-resistant material. A gun holster appears to be integrated into the suit and the wings appear to be stuck in 'freedom' mode.
obj.item.clothing.suit.space.freedom.name: eagle suit

obj.item.clothing.suit.space.hev_suit.desc: The Mark IV HEV suit protects the user from a number of hazardous environments and has in build ballistic protection.
obj.item.clothing.suit.space.hev_suit.name: hazardous environment suit

obj.item.clothing.suit.space.hev_suit.nr.desc: A hybrid set of space-resistant armor built on a modified mass-produced Nomex-Aerogel flight suit, polyurea coated durathread-lined light plasteel plates hinder mobility as little as possible while the onboard life support system aids the user in combat. The power cell is what makes the armor work without hassle, a sticker in the power supply unit warns anyone reading to responsibly manage battery levels.
obj.item.clothing.suit.space.hev_suit.nr.name: VOSKHOD powered combat armor

obj.item.clothing.suit.space.hev_suit.nr.desc: A unique hybrid set of space-resistant armor made for high-ranking NRI operatives, built on a proprietary durathread padded, Akulan made Larr'Takh silk utility uniform. Polyurea coated hexagraphene-lined plastitanium plates hinder mobility as little as possible while the onboard life support system aids the user in combat. The power cell is what makes the armor work without hassle, a sticker in the power supply unit warns anyone reading to responsibly manage battery levels.
obj.item.clothing.suit.space.hev_suit.nr.name: VOSKHOD-2 powered combat armor

obj.item.clothing.suit.space.hev_suit.nr.desc: A hybrid set of space-resistant armor built on a modified Nanotrasen heavy-duty engineering undersuit, polyurea coated lead-lined light plasteel plates hinder mobility as little as possible and offer additional radiation protection while the onboard life support system aids the user in combat. The power cell is what makes the armor work without hassle, a sticker in the power supply unit warns anyone reading to responsibly manage battery levels.
obj.item.clothing.suit.space.hev_suit.nr.name: VOSKHOD-IN powered combat armor

obj.item.clothing.suit.space.hev_suit.nr.desc: A hybrid set of space-resistant armor built on a modified mass-produced Dipolyester-Aerogel surgeon field jumpsuit, polyurea coated titanium plates hinder mobility as little as possible while the onboard life support system aids the user in combat and provides additional medical functions. The power cell is what makes the armor work without hassle, a sticker in the power supply unit warns anyone reading to responsibly manage battery levels.
obj.item.clothing.suit.space.hev_suit.nr.name: VOSKHOD-KH powered combat armor

obj.item.clothing.suit.space.hev_suit.pc.desc: An electrically charged piece of body armor, the power stiffens the suit's fibers to provide a layer of resilient armor in response to trauma received from kinetic force.  It's fitted with a geiger counter, tactical radio, a heads up display and a combat cocktail injector that allows the user to function normally even after serious injury. The concentration of mass in the lower rear side from the onboard computer makes your ass feel heavy.
obj.item.clothing.suit.space.hev_suit.pc.name: powered combat vest

obj.item.clothing.suit.space.hunter.desc: A custom version of the MK.II SWAT suit, modified to look rugged and tough. Works as a space suit, if you can find a helmet.
obj.item.clothing.suit.space.hunter.name: bounty hunting suit

obj.item.clothing.suit.space.nasavoid.desc: An old, NASA CentCom branch designed, dark red space suit.
obj.item.clothing.suit.space.nasavoid.name: NASA voidsuit

obj.item.clothing.suit.space.nasavoid.ol.desc: A CentCom engineering dark red space suit. Age has degraded the suit making it difficult to move around in.
obj.item.clothing.suit.space.nasavoid.ol.name: engineering voidsuit

obj.item.clothing.suit.space.ntrauma.desc: A lightweight, minimally armored, entirely sterile softsuit, used by Trauma Teams to operate in potentially hazardous environments of all sorts. It's coated in acid-repellent chemicals.
obj.item.clothing.suit.space.ntrauma.name: trauma team softsuit

obj.item.clothing.suit.space.officer.desc: An armored, space-proof coat used in special operations.
obj.item.clothing.suit.space.officer.name: CentCom officer's coat

obj.item.clothing.suit.space.orange.desc: A suit that protects against low pressure environments. Has a big 13 on the back.
obj.item.clothing.suit.space.orange.name: emergency space suit

obj.item.clothing.suit.space.pirate.desc: A modified suit to allow space pirates to board shuttles and stations while avoiding the maw of the void. Comes with additional protection and is lighter to move in.
obj.item.clothing.suit.space.pirate.name: modified EVA suit

obj.item.clothing.suit.space.pirate.silv.desc: A specially-made Cybersun branded space suit; the fine plastisilk exterior is woven from the cocoons of black-market Lümlan mothroaches 		and the trim is lined with the ivory of the critically endangered Zanzibarian dwarf elephant. Baby seal leather boots sold separately.
obj.item.clothing.suit.space.pirate.silv.name: designer pirate suit

obj.item.clothing.suit.space.syndicate.desc: Has a tag on it: Totally not property of an enemy corporation, honest!
obj.item.clothing.suit.space.syndicate.name: red space suit

obj.item.clothing.suit.space.syndicate.b.desc: Has a tag on it: Totally not property of an enemy corporation, honest!
obj.item.clothing.suit.space.syndicate.b.name: black space suit

obj.item.clothing.suit.space.syndicate.b.desc: Has a tag on it: Totally not property of an enemy corporation, honest!
obj.item.clothing.suit.space.syndicate.b.name: black and blue space suit

obj.item.clothing.suit.space.syndicate.b.desc: Has a tag on it: Totally not property of an enemy corporation, honest!
obj.item.clothing.suit.space.syndicate.b.name: black engineering space suit

obj.item.clothing.suit.space.syndicate.b.desc: Has a tag on it: Totally not property of an enemy corporation, honest!
obj.item.clothing.suit.space.syndicate.b.name: black and green space suit

obj.item.clothing.suit.space.syndicate.b.desc: Has a tag on it: Totally not property of an enemy corporation, honest!
obj.item.clothing.suit.space.syndicate.b.name: black medical space suit

obj.item.clothing.suit.space.syndicate.b.desc: Has a tag on it: Totally not property of an enemy corporation, honest!
obj.item.clothing.suit.space.syndicate.b.name: black and orange space suit

obj.item.clothing.suit.space.syndicate.b.desc: Has a tag on it: Totally not property of an enemy corporation, honest!
obj.item.clothing.suit.space.syndicate.b.name: black and red space suit

obj.item.clothing.suit.space.syndicate.b.desc: Has a tag on it: Totally not property of an enemy corporation, honest!
obj.item.clothing.suit.space.syndicate.b.name: black and white space suit

obj.item.clothing.suit.space.syndicate.b.desc: Has a tag on it: Totally not property of an enemy corporation, honest!
obj.item.clothing.suit.space.syndicate.b.name: blue space suit

obj.item.clothing.suit.space.syndicate.c.desc: A specialised black and gold space suit that's quicker, and more compact than its standard Syndicate counterpart. Can be ultra-compressed into even the tightest of spaces.
obj.item.clothing.suit.space.syndicate.c.name: contractor space suit

obj.item.clothing.suit.space.syndicate.g.desc: Has a tag on it: Totally not property of an enemy corporation, honest!
obj.item.clothing.suit.space.syndicate.g.name: green space suit

obj.item.clothing.suit.space.syndicate.g.desc: Has a tag on it: Totally not property of an enemy corporation, honest!
obj.item.clothing.suit.space.syndicate.g.name: dark green space suit

obj.item.clothing.suit.space.syndicate.o.desc: Has a tag on it: Totally not property of an enemy corporation, honest!
obj.item.clothing.suit.space.syndicate.o.name: orange space suit

obj.item.clothing.suit.spooky_ghost_shee.desc: This is obviously just a bedsheet, but maybe try it on?
obj.item.clothing.suit.spooky_ghost_shee.name: spooky ghost

obj.item.clothing.suit.straight_jacket.k.desc: A tight sleeping bag made of a shiny material. It would be dangerous to put it on yourself.
obj.item.clothing.suit.straight_jacket.k.name: latex sleeping bag

obj.item.clothing.suit.straight_jacket.l.desc: A toy that is unable to actually restrain anyone. Still fun to wear!
obj.item.clothing.suit.straight_jacket.l.name: latex straight jacket

obj.item.clothing.suit.straight_jacket.l.desc: A suit that completely restrains the wearer - in quite an arousing way.
obj.item.clothing.suit.straight_jacket.l.name: latex straight jacket

obj.item.clothing.suit.straight_jacket.s.desc: Fancy shackles with a fake lock.
obj.item.clothing.suit.straight_jacket.s.name: shackles

obj.item.clothing.suit.straight_jacket.s.desc: Fancy shackles, but with a suspiciously sturdy lock...
obj.item.clothing.suit.straight_jacket.s.name: reinforced shackles

obj.item.clothing.suit.syndicatefake.desc: A plastic replica of the Syndicate space suit. You'll look just like a real murderous Syndicate agent in this! This is a toy, it is not made for use in space!
obj.item.clothing.suit.syndicatefake.name: black and red space suit replica

obj.item.clothing.suit.tailored_jacket.desc: A somewhat long jacket tailor made for... however it looks right now!
obj.item.clothing.suit.tailored_jacket.name: tailored jacket

obj.item.clothing.suit.tailored_jacket.s.desc: A jacket tailor made for... however it looks right now!
obj.item.clothing.suit.tailored_jacket.s.name: tailored short jacket

obj.item.clothing.suit.texas.desc: A white suit coat, perfect for fat oil barons.
obj.item.clothing.suit.texas.name: white suit coat

obj.item.clothing.suit.toggle.cargo_tech.desc: A brown and black puffy jacket; made from synthetic fabric. Inspired by old Eastern European designs.
obj.item.clothing.suit.toggle.cargo_tech.name: cargo gorka

obj.item.clothing.suit.toggle.chef.desc: An apron-jacket used by a high class chef.
obj.item.clothing.suit.toggle.chef.name: chef's apron

obj.item.clothing.suit.toggle.deckard.desc: They say you overused reference. Tell them you're eating in this lovely coat, a long flowing brown one.
obj.item.clothing.suit.toggle.deckard.name: runner coat

obj.item.clothing.suit.toggle.digicoat.g.desc: Glitched images display across the back. Cool!
obj.item.clothing.suit.toggle.digicoat.g.name: hacked digicoat

obj.item.clothing.suit.toggle.digicoat.i.desc: A sinister colored jacket from a familiar company.
obj.item.clothing.suit.toggle.digicoat.i.name: interdyne digicoat

obj.item.clothing.suit.toggle.digicoat.n.desc: A company jacket of popular design.
obj.item.clothing.suit.toggle.digicoat.n.name: nanotrasen digicoat

obj.item.clothing.suit.toggle.jacket.desc: A warm bomber jacket, with synthetic-wool lining to keep you nice and warm in the depths of space. Aviators not included.
obj.item.clothing.suit.toggle.jacket.name: bomber jacket

obj.item.clothing.suit.toggle.jacket.cor.desc: A pressed and ironed suit jacket, it has light armor against stabbings. There's some rank badges on the right breast.
obj.item.clothing.suit.toggle.jacket.cor.name: corrections officer's suit jacket

obj.item.clothing.suit.toggle.jacket.det.desc: A 18th-century multi-purpose trenchcoat. Someone who wears this means serious business.
obj.item.clothing.suit.toggle.jacket.det.name: brown trenchcoat

obj.item.clothing.suit.toggle.jacket.det.desc: A hard-boiled private investigator's dark trenchcoat.
obj.item.clothing.suit.toggle.jacket.det.name: noir trenchcoat

obj.item.clothing.suit.toggle.jacket.fla.desc: A cozy and warm plaid flannel jacket. Praised by Lumberjacks and Truckers alike.
obj.item.clothing.suit.toggle.jacket.fla.name: flannel jacket

obj.item.clothing.suit.toggle.jacket.fla.desc: A cozy and warm plaid flannel jacket. Praised by Lumberjacks and Truckers alike.
obj.item.clothing.suit.toggle.jacket.fla.name: aqua flannel jacket

obj.item.clothing.suit.toggle.jacket.fla.desc: A cozy and warm plaid flannel jacket. Praised by Lumberjacks and Truckers alike.
