obj.item.clothing.suit.toggle.jacket.sec.desc: A warm bomber jacket, with synthetic-wool lining to keep you nice and warm in the depths of space. Aviators not included.
obj.item.clothing.suit.toggle.jacket.sec.name: brig officer jacket

obj.item.clothing.suit.toggle.jacket.sup.desc: Even if people refuse to recognize you as a head, they can recognize you as a badass.
obj.item.clothing.suit.toggle.jacket.sup.name: quartermaster's jacket

obj.item.clothing.suit.toggle.jacket.zub.desc: People love these things. Seriously. Three seperate versions? Come on now.
obj.item.clothing.suit.toggle.jacket.zub.name: three piece bomber jacket

obj.item.clothing.suit.toggle.jacket.zub.desc: Keep your rifle close, Cargonia isn't lost yet.
obj.item.clothing.suit.toggle.jacket.zub.name: cargo bomber jacket

obj.item.clothing.suit.toggle.jacket.zub.desc: You can still carry your gear on this! Shocking, I know.
obj.item.clothing.suit.toggle.jacket.zub.name: engineering bomber jacket

obj.item.clothing.suit.toggle.jacket.zub.desc: Not actually a blazer! But, to quote the designer 'Alliteration, an art.'
obj.item.clothing.suit.toggle.jacket.zub.name: botanical bomber blazer

obj.item.clothing.suit.toggle.jacket.zub.desc: For a second, you swore this had a hood. Must be your brain playing tricks. You can glue plates onto it, too!
obj.item.clothing.suit.toggle.jacket.zub.name: mining bomber jacket

obj.item.clothing.suit.toggle.jacket.zub.desc: Trade in your, and these are not my words, 'pussy repellent labcoat' for something with some more style!
obj.item.clothing.suit.toggle.jacket.zub.name: science bomber jacket

obj.item.clothing.suit.toggle.jacket.zub.desc: STOP AURA FARMING AND GET US SYNTHFLESH!
obj.item.clothing.suit.toggle.jacket.zub.name: chemistry bomber jacket

obj.item.clothing.suit.toggle.jacket.zub.desc: A pitch black, tar bomber jacket. If all your friends weren't dead, they'd think you're the coolest person around.
obj.item.clothing.suit.toggle.jacket.zub.name: black bomber jacket

obj.item.clothing.suit.toggle.jacket.zub.desc: Let's be honest here, we threw out sterility the second we hired anything with fur.
obj.item.clothing.suit.toggle.jacket.zub.name: medical bomber jacket

obj.item.clothing.suit.toggle.jacket.zub.desc: Those terrifying dog creatures treating your lab like a kennel might show you some respect if you wear the skin of their originators.
obj.item.clothing.suit.toggle.jacket.zub.name: roboticist bomber jacket

obj.item.clothing.suit.toggle.jacket.zub.desc: Our clothing company keeps out of any 'blue/red' related debates after THE INCIDENT, sorry.
obj.item.clothing.suit.toggle.jacket.zub.name: security bomber jacket

obj.item.clothing.suit.toggle.jacket.zub.desc: If the Bomber Harris book isn't a giveaway, someone's taking 'bomber' to heart.
obj.item.clothing.suit.toggle.jacket.zub.name: suspicious bomber jacket

obj.item.clothing.suit.toggle.jacket.zub.desc: If the Bomber Harris book isn't a giveaway, someone's taking 'bomber' to heart.
obj.item.clothing.suit.toggle.jacket.zub.name: suspicious bomber jacket

obj.item.clothing.suit.toggle.labcoat.desc: A suit that protects against minor chemical spills.
obj.item.clothing.suit.toggle.labcoat.name: labcoat

obj.item.clothing.suit.toggle.labcoat.ch.desc: A suit that protects against minor chemical spills. Has an orange stripe on the shoulder.
obj.item.clothing.suit.toggle.labcoat.ch.name: chemist labcoat

obj.item.clothing.suit.toggle.labcoat.ch.desc: A sterile white and orange coat worn by bunny themed chemists. The open chest isn't the greatest when working with dangerous substances.
obj.item.clothing.suit.toggle.labcoat.ch.name: chemist's tailcoat

obj.item.clothing.suit.toggle.labcoat.ch.desc: A standard labcoat for chemistry which protects the wearer from acid spills.
obj.item.clothing.suit.toggle.labcoat.ch.name: pharmacist's labcoat

obj.item.clothing.suit.toggle.labcoat.cm.desc: A sterile blue coat worn by bunny themed chief medical officers. The blue helps both the wearer and bloodstains stand out from other, lower ranked, and cleaner doctors.
obj.item.clothing.suit.toggle.labcoat.cm.name: chief medical officer's tailcoat

obj.item.clothing.suit.toggle.labcoat.co.desc: A suit that protects against minor chemical spills. Has a black stripe on the shoulder.
obj.item.clothing.suit.toggle.labcoat.co.name: coroner labcoat

obj.item.clothing.suit.toggle.labcoat.co.desc: A sterile black and white coat worn by bunny themed coroners. Adorned with a skull on the back.
obj.item.clothing.suit.toggle.labcoat.co.name: coroner's tailcoat

obj.item.clothing.suit.toggle.labcoat.do.desc: A sterile white and blue coat worn by bunny themed doctors. Great for keeping the blood off.
obj.item.clothing.suit.toggle.labcoat.do.name: medical tailcoat

obj.item.clothing.suit.toggle.labcoat.ge.desc: A suit that protects against minor chemical spills. Has a blue stripe on the shoulder.
obj.item.clothing.suit.toggle.labcoat.ge.name: geneticist labcoat

obj.item.clothing.suit.toggle.labcoat.ge.desc: A smart white and blue coat worn by bunny themed geneticists. Nearly looks like a real doctor's lab coat.
obj.item.clothing.suit.toggle.labcoat.ge.name: geneticist's tailcoat

obj.item.clothing.suit.toggle.labcoat.ho.desc: A complicated drapery with an assortment of velcros and strings, designed to keep a patient modest during medical stay and surgeries.
obj.item.clothing.suit.toggle.labcoat.ho.name: hospital gown

obj.item.clothing.suit.toggle.labcoat.ho.desc: A hospital gown made out of hardlight - you can barely feel it on your body, especially with all the anesthetics.
obj.item.clothing.suit.toggle.labcoat.ho.name: hardlight hospital gown

obj.item.clothing.suit.toggle.labcoat.in.desc: More like an eccentric coat than a labcoat. Helps pass off bloodstains as part of the aesthetic. Comes with red shoulder pads.
obj.item.clothing.suit.toggle.labcoat.in.name: interdyne labcoat

obj.item.clothing.suit.toggle.labcoat.ma.desc: It makes you look capable of konking someone on the noggin and shooting them into space.
obj.item.clothing.suit.toggle.labcoat.ma.name: The Mad's labcoat

obj.item.clothing.suit.toggle.labcoat.me.desc: A suit that protects against minor chemical spills. Has a blue stripe on the shoulder.
obj.item.clothing.suit.toggle.labcoat.me.name: medical labcoat

obj.item.clothing.suit.toggle.labcoat.pa.desc: A dark blue jacket for paramedics with reflective stripes.
obj.item.clothing.suit.toggle.labcoat.pa.name: paramedic's jacket

obj.item.clothing.suit.toggle.labcoat.pa.desc: A heavy duty coat worn by bunny themed paramedics. Marked with high visibility lines for emergency operations in the dark.
obj.item.clothing.suit.toggle.labcoat.pa.name: paramedic's tailcoat

obj.item.clothing.suit.toggle.labcoat.re.desc: A mix between a labcoat and just a regular coat. It's made out of a special antibacterial, anti-acidic, and anti-biohazardous synthetic fabric.
obj.item.clothing.suit.toggle.labcoat.re.name: research director's coat

obj.item.clothing.suit.toggle.labcoat.re.desc: A smart purple coat worn by bunny themed head researchers. Created from captured abductor technology, what looks like a coat is actually an advanced hologram emitted from the pauldrons. Feels exactly like the real thing, too.
obj.item.clothing.suit.toggle.labcoat.re.name: research director's tailcoat

obj.item.clothing.suit.toggle.labcoat.ro.desc: More like an eccentric coat than a labcoat. Helps pass off bloodstains as part of the aesthetic. Comes with red shoulder pads.
obj.item.clothing.suit.toggle.labcoat.ro.name: roboticist labcoat

obj.item.clothing.suit.toggle.labcoat.ro.desc: A smart white coat with red pauldrons worn by bunny themed roboticists. Looks surprisingly good with oil stains on it.
obj.item.clothing.suit.toggle.labcoat.ro.name: roboticist's tailcoat

obj.item.clothing.suit.toggle.labcoat.ro.desc: A suit that protects against minor chemical spills, though the deep red colour makes them hard to see. Great for hiding blood stains, though...
obj.item.clothing.suit.toggle.labcoat.ro.name: RoroCo labcoat

obj.item.clothing.suit.toggle.labcoat.sc.desc: A suit that protects against minor chemical spills. Has a purple stripe on the shoulder.
obj.item.clothing.suit.toggle.labcoat.sc.name: scientist labcoat

obj.item.clothing.suit.toggle.labcoat.sc.desc: A smart white coat worn by bunny themed scientists. Decent protection against slimes.
obj.item.clothing.suit.toggle.labcoat.sc.name: scientist's tailcoat

obj.item.clothing.suit.toggle.labcoat.sk.desc: A high visibility vest for emergency responders, intended to draw attention away from the blood.
obj.item.clothing.suit.toggle.labcoat.sk.name: high vis labcoat

obj.item.clothing.suit.toggle.labcoat.sk.desc: A Nanotrasen standard labcoat for certified Research Directors. It has an extra plastic-latex lining on the outside for more protection from chemical and viral hazards.
obj.item.clothing.suit.toggle.labcoat.sk.name: research directors labcoat

obj.item.clothing.suit.toggle.labcoat.sk.desc: A Nanotrasen standard labcoat for researchers in the scientific field.
obj.item.clothing.suit.toggle.labcoat.sk.name: researcher's labcoat

obj.item.clothing.suit.toggle.labcoat.sk.desc: A lightweight vest worn by the Security Medic.
obj.item.clothing.suit.toggle.labcoat.sk.name: security medic labcoat

obj.item.clothing.suit.toggle.labcoat.sk.desc: A mostly sterile red and grey coat worn by bunny themed brig physicians. It lacks the padding of the "standard" security tailcoat.
obj.item.clothing.suit.toggle.labcoat.sk.name: brig physician's tailcoat

obj.item.clothing.suit.toggle.labcoat.sk.desc: A labcoat crafted from a variety of pristine materials, sewn together with a frightening amount of skill. The fabric is aery, smooth as silk, and exceptionally pleasant to the touch. The golden stripes are visible in the dark, working as a beacon to the injured. A small label on the inside of it reads "Tenrai Kitsunes Supremacy".
obj.item.clothing.suit.toggle.labcoat.sk.name: Tenrai labcoat

obj.item.clothing.suit.toggle.labcoat.vi.desc: An elaborate coat composed of a silky yet firm material. The fabric is quite thin, and provides negligible protection or insulation, but is pleasant on the skin. While extremely well made, it seems quite fragile, and rather expensive. You get the feeling it might not survive a washing machine without specialized treatment.
obj.item.clothing.suit.toggle.labcoat.vi.name: nobility dresscoat

obj.item.clothing.suit.toggle.labcoat.vi.desc: A suit that protects against minor chemical spills. Has a green stripe on the shoulder.
obj.item.clothing.suit.toggle.labcoat.vi.name: virologist labcoat

obj.item.clothing.suit.toggle.labcoat.vi.name: pathologist's tailcoat

obj.item.clothing.suit.toggle.owlwings.name: owl cloak

obj.item.clothing.suit.toggle.owlwings.g.desc: A plush white cloak made of synthetic feathers. Soft to the touch, stylish, and a 2 meter wing span that will drive your captives mad.
obj.item.clothing.suit.toggle.owlwings.g.name: griffon cloak

obj.item.clothing.suit.toggle.peacoat.desc: The way you guys are blending in with the local colour. I mean, Flag Girl was bad enough, but U-Boat Captain?
obj.item.clothing.suit.toggle.peacoat.name: peacoat

obj.item.clothing.suit.toggle.rainbowcoa.desc: A wonderfully brilliant coat that displays the color of the rainbow!
obj.item.clothing.suit.toggle.rainbowcoa.name: rainbow coat

obj.item.clothing.suit.toggle.suspenders.desc: They suspend the illusion of the mime's play.
obj.item.clothing.suit.toggle.suspenders.name: suspenders

obj.item.clothing.suit.toggle.trackjacke.name: track jacket

obj.item.clothing.suit.trenchblack.desc: A matte-black coat. Best suited for space-italians, or maybe a monochrome-cop.
obj.item.clothing.suit.trenchblack.name: black trenchcoat

obj.item.clothing.suit.trenchbrown.desc: A brown noir-inspired coat. Looks best if you're not wearing it over a baggy t-shirt.

obj.item.clothing.suit.urban.name: urban coat

obj.item.clothing.suit.utility.beekeeper.name: beekeeper suit

obj.item.clothing.suit.utility.bomb_suit.name: bomb suit

obj.item.clothing.suit.utility.fire.name: emergency firesuit

obj.item.clothing.suit.utility.fire.atmo.desc: An expensive firesuit that protects against even the most deadly of station fires. Designed to protect even if the wearer is set aflame.
obj.item.clothing.suit.utility.fire.atmo.name: atmospheric firesuit

obj.item.clothing.suit.utility.fire.atmo.desc: A heavy duty fire-tailcoat worn by bunny themed atmospheric technicians. Reinforced with asbestos weave that makes this both stylish and lung-cancer inducing.
obj.item.clothing.suit.utility.fire.atmo.name: atmospheric technician's tailcoat

obj.item.clothing.suit.utility.fire.atmo.desc: You might be shocked that this fur lined jacket is fireproof! I am too!

obj.item.clothing.suit.utility.fire.ce_t.desc: A heavy duty green and white coat worn by bunny themed chief engineers. Made of a three layered composite fabric that is both insulating and fireproof, it also has an open face rendering all this useless.
obj.item.clothing.suit.utility.fire.ce_t.name: chief engineer's tailcoat

obj.item.clothing.suit.utility.fire.fire.desc: A suit that helps protect against fire and heat.
obj.item.clothing.suit.utility.fire.fire.name: emergency firesuit

obj.item.clothing.suit.utility.fire.heav.desc: An old, bulky thermal protection suit.
obj.item.clothing.suit.utility.fire.heav.name: heavy firesuit

obj.item.clothing.suit.utility.radiation.desc: A suit that protects against radiation. The label reads, 'Made with lead. Please do not consume insulation.'
obj.item.clothing.suit.utility.radiation.name: radiation suit

obj.item.clothing.suit.utility.radiation.desc: A hood with radiation protective properties along with acidic and biological protective properties. The label reads, 'Made with thin lead sheets, please do not consume.'
obj.item.clothing.suit.utility.radiation.name: CBRN suit

obj.item.clothing.suit.varsity.desc: A simple varsity jacket with no obvious sources.
obj.item.clothing.suit.varsity.name: varsity jacket

obj.item.clothing.suit.victoriantailcoat.name: caretaker tailcoat

obj.item.clothing.suit.warm_coat.desc: A long insulated coat with fur, it looks quite comfortable.

obj.item.clothing.suit.wornshirt.name: worn shirt

obj.item.clothing.under.abductor.name: alien jumpsuit

obj.item.clothing.under.akula_wetsuit.desc: The 'Wetworks'-pattern Shoredress worn by most Akula, complete with water circulation systems and high-visibility luminescent panels for signalling. Comes in many variations.
obj.item.clothing.under.akula_wetsuit.name: Shoredress wetsuit

obj.item.clothing.under.akula_wetsuit.jo.desc: The 'Wetworks'-pattern Shoredress worn by most Akula, complete with water circulation systems and high-visibility luminescent panels for signalling. Comes in many variations.
obj.item.clothing.under.akula_wetsuit.jo.name: Shoredress wetsuit

obj.item.clothing.under.akula_wetsuit.jo.desc: The Cargo pattern of the Akula Shoredress wetsuit. The design philosophy of this wetsuit seems to have included large amounts of padding for comfort.
obj.item.clothing.under.akula_wetsuit.jo.name: cargo Shoredress wetsuit

obj.item.clothing.under.akula_wetsuit.jo.desc: The Command pattern of the Akula Shoredress wetsuit. Peak comfort, peak aesthetic, for the stylish Akula commander. Comes with a dedicated pad for adding medals without piercing the wetsuit.
obj.item.clothing.under.akula_wetsuit.jo.name: command Shoredress wetsuit

obj.item.clothing.under.akula_wetsuit.jo.desc: The Engineering pattern of the Akula Shoredress wetsuit, altered to be more heat and chemical resistant. Will not protect you from most hazards by itself, however.
obj.item.clothing.under.akula_wetsuit.jo.name: engineer Shoredress wetsuit

obj.item.clothing.under.akula_wetsuit.jo.desc: The Medical pattern of the Akula Shoredress wetsuit. It incorporates rudimentary sterilization technology, to keep the wearer inside clean during those long hours in the surgery room.
obj.item.clothing.under.akula_wetsuit.jo.name: medical Shoredress wetsuit

obj.item.clothing.under.akula_wetsuit.jo.desc: The Science pattern of the Akula Shoredress wetsuit, focused largely around environmental protections. Meant to be used in tangent with actual protections; it will not protect you alone.
obj.item.clothing.under.akula_wetsuit.jo.name: science Shoredress wetsuit

obj.item.clothing.under.akula_wetsuit.jo.desc: The Security pattern of the Akula Shoredress wetsuit. Provides a level of comfort while dealing with threats to your duty post, best worn under armor.
obj.item.clothing.under.akula_wetsuit.jo.name: security Shoredress wetsuit

obj.item.clothing.under.bimpcap.desc: A professional looking matte black uniform cladded with medals of distintive service and valor, only worn by the highest of station officials.
obj.item.clothing.under.bimpcap.name: Formal Matte Black Captain Uniform

obj.item.clothing.under.blastwave.desc: An utilitarian uniform of rugged warfare.
obj.item.clothing.under.blastwave.name: blastwave uniform

obj.item.clothing.under.bubbly_clown.ski.desc: A bright and cheerful clown dress, honk!

obj.item.clothing.under.costume.skyrat.c.desc: Can you believe it guys? Christmas. Just a lightyear away!

obj.item.clothing.under.costume.skyrat.c.desc: About 550 years since the release of Mariah Carey's "All I Want For Christmas is You", society has yet to properly recover from its repercussions. Some still keep a gun as their christmas mantlepiece, just in case she's heard singing on their rooftop late in the night...
obj.item.clothing.under.costume.skyrat.c.name: sexy christmas costume

obj.item.clothing.under.costume.skyrat.c.desc: Stupid. Ugly. Out of date. If I can't find something nice to wear I'm not going.
obj.item.clothing.under.costume.skyrat.c.name: sexy green christmas costume

obj.item.clothing.under.costume.skyrat.c.desc: 4:00, wallow in self-pity. 4:30, stare into the abyss. 5:00, solve world hunger, tell no one. 5:30, jazzercize; 6:30, dinner with me. I can't cancel that again. 7:00, wrestle with my self-loathing. I'm booked. Of course, if I bump the loathing to 9, I could still be done in time to lay in bed, stare at the ceiling and slip slowly into madness.
obj.item.clothing.under.costume.skyrat.c.name: green christmas costume

obj.item.clothing.under.costume.skyrat.k.desc: A traditional ancient Earth Japanese Kamishimo.

obj.item.clothing.under.misc.skyrat.tacc.name: tacticasual uniform

obj.item.clothing.under.misc.skyrat.util.name: general utility uniform

obj.item.clothing.under.misc.skyrat.util.desc: A utility uniform worn by civilian-ranked crew.
obj.item.clothing.under.misc.skyrat.util.name: general utility uniform

obj.item.clothing.under.misc.syndicate_s.name: syndicate souvenir tee

obj.item.clothing.under.nt_idol_skirt.desc: This outfit resembles much the same as other ranking NT Officers, but comes with certain bells and whistles, like frills around the dress, slight puffs around the shoulders and most importantly, several golden buckles to accentuate the green! The only thing fit for NT's very own idols to wear!
obj.item.clothing.under.nt_idol_skirt.name: NT Idol's suitskirt

obj.item.clothing.under.occult.desc: A set of clothes fit for someone dapper that isn't afraid of getting dirty.
obj.item.clothing.under.occult.name: occult collector's outfit

obj.item.clothing.under.pants.camo.desc: A pair of woodland camouflage pants. Probably not the best choice for a space station.
obj.item.clothing.under.pants.camo.name: camo pants

obj.item.clothing.under.pants.greyscale..desc: De riguer for techno classicists, these extreme wide leg pants come back into style every 		now and then. This pair has generous onboard storage.
obj.item.clothing.under.pants.greyscale..name: 'JUNCO' megacargo pants

obj.item.clothing.under.pants.greyscale..desc: Some loose pants with a belt that looks comfy.

obj.item.clothing.under.pants.greyscale..desc: An airy pair of wide-legged pants with a reasonably high waist.
obj.item.clothing.under.pants.greyscale..name: wide legged pants

obj.item.clothing.under.pants.jeans.desc: A nondescript pair of tough jeans.
obj.item.clothing.under.pants.jeans.name: jeans

obj.item.clothing.under.pants.skyrat.jea.name: ripped jeans

obj.item.clothing.under.pants.skyrat.kil.desc: A kilt and buttondown, adorned with a tartan sash. It is NOT a skirt.

obj.item.clothing.under.pants.skyrat.vic.name: buttondown shirt with double-breasted vest

obj.item.clothing.under.pants.skyrat.yog.desc: Breathable and stretchy, perfect for exercising comfortably!

obj.item.clothing.under.pants.skyy.name: silver jeans

obj.item.clothing.under.pants.slacks.alt.desc: A pair of pants. They do not look or feel natural, and smell like fresh blood.
obj.item.clothing.under.pants.slacks.alt.name: strange pants

obj.item.clothing.under.pants.tactical.desc: A pair of tactical pants, designed for military use.
obj.item.clothing.under.pants.tactical.name: tactical pants

obj.item.clothing.under.pants.track.desc: A pair of track pants, for the athletic.
obj.item.clothing.under.pants.track.name: track pants

obj.item.clothing.under.pants.track.robo.desc: Strangely firm yet soft black pants, these appear to have some armor padding for added protection.
obj.item.clothing.under.pants.track.robo.name: badass pants

obj.item.clothing.under.pizza.name: dogginos employee uniform

obj.item.clothing.under.plasmaman.atmosp.name: atmospherics plasma envirosuit

obj.item.clothing.under.plasmaman.candle.desc: A modified envirosuit featuring a reserved color scheme.

obj.item.clothing.under.plasmaman.candle.desc: An Azulean-made Enviro-Suit. Fitted to the Azulean form, it has surplus containment fabric designed to give the solidified mass of plasma that was once a tail some breathing room.
obj.item.clothing.under.plasmaman.candle.name: azulean's environment suit

obj.item.clothing.under.plasmaman.captai.desc: It's a blue envirosuit with some gold markings denoting the rank of "Captain".
obj.item.clothing.under.plasmaman.captai.name: captain's plasma envirosuit

obj.item.clothing.under.plasmaman.cargo.desc: A joint envirosuit used by plasmamen quartermasters and cargo techs alike, due to the logistical problems of differentiating the two with the length of their pant legs.
obj.item.clothing.under.plasmaman.cargo.name: cargo plasma envirosuit

obj.item.clothing.under.plasmaman.centco.desc: It's an envirosuit worn by CentCom's highest-tier Commanders.
obj.item.clothing.under.plasmaman.centco.name: CentCom commander plasma envirosuit

obj.item.clothing.under.plasmaman.centco.desc: It's an envirosuit worn by those interning for CentCom. The top is styled after a polo shirt for easy identification.
obj.item.clothing.under.plasmaman.centco.name: CentCom intern plasma envirosuit

obj.item.clothing.under.plasmaman.centco.desc: It's an envirosuit worn by CentCom Officers.
obj.item.clothing.under.plasmaman.centco.name: CentCom official plasma envirosuit

obj.item.clothing.under.plasmaman.chapla.desc: An envirosuit specially designed for only the most pious of plasmamen.
obj.item.clothing.under.plasmaman.chapla.name: chaplain's plasma envirosuit

obj.item.clothing.under.plasmaman.chef.desc: A white plasmaman envirosuit designed for culinary practices. One might question why a member of a species that doesn't need to eat would become a chef.
obj.item.clothing.under.plasmaman.chef.name: chef's plasma envirosuit

obj.item.clothing.under.plasmaman.chemis.desc: A plasmaman envirosuit designed for chemists.
obj.item.clothing.under.plasmaman.chemis.name: chemistry plasma envirosuit

obj.item.clothing.under.plasmaman.chief_.desc: An airtight suit designed to be used by plasmamen insane enough to achieve the rank of "Chief Engineer".
obj.item.clothing.under.plasmaman.chief_.name: chief engineer's plasma envirosuit

obj.item.clothing.under.plasmaman.chief_.desc: It's an envirosuit worn by those with the experience to be "Chief Medical Officer".
obj.item.clothing.under.plasmaman.chief_.name: chief medical officer's plasma envirosuit

obj.item.clothing.under.plasmaman.corone.desc: A plasmaman envirosuit made for morticians.
obj.item.clothing.under.plasmaman.corone.name: coroner plasma envirosuit

obj.item.clothing.under.plasmaman.curato.desc: Made out of a modified voidsuit, this suit was Nanotrasen's first solution to the *logistical problems* that come with employing plasmamen. Due to the modifications, the suit is no longer space-worthy. Despite their limitations, these suits are still in used by historian and old-styled plasmamen alike.
obj.item.clothing.under.plasmaman.curato.name: curator's plasma envirosuit

obj.item.clothing.under.plasmaman.engine.desc: An airtight suit designed to be used by plasmamen employed as engineers, the usual purple stripes being replaced by engineering's orange. It protects the user from fire and acid damage.
obj.item.clothing.under.plasmaman.engine.name: engineering plasma envirosuit

obj.item.clothing.under.plasmaman.enviro.desc: The pet project of a particularly posh plasmaman, this custom suit was quickly appropriated by Nanotrasen for its lawyers, and bartenders alike.
obj.item.clothing.under.plasmaman.enviro.name: enviroslacks

obj.item.clothing.under.plasmaman.geneti.desc: A plasmaman envirosuit designed for geneticists.
obj.item.clothing.under.plasmaman.geneti.name: genetics plasma envirosuit

obj.item.clothing.under.plasmaman.head_o.desc: It's an envirosuit worn by someone who works in the position of "Head of Personnel".
obj.item.clothing.under.plasmaman.head_o.name: head of personnel's plasma envirosuit

obj.item.clothing.under.plasmaman.janito.desc: A grey and purple envirosuit designated for plasmamen janitors.
obj.item.clothing.under.plasmaman.janito.name: janitor's plasma envirosuit

obj.item.clothing.under.plasmaman.jax2.desc: A hazard suit fitted with bio-resistant fibers. Utilizes self-sterilizing pumps fitted in the back.
obj.item.clothing.under.plasmaman.jax2.name: xuracorp hazard underfitting

obj.item.clothing.under.plasmaman.medica.desc: A suit designed for the station's more plasma-based doctors.
obj.item.clothing.under.plasmaman.medica.name: medical plasma envirosuit

obj.item.clothing.under.plasmaman.mining.desc: An airtight khaki suit designed for operations on lavaland by plasmamen.
obj.item.clothing.under.plasmaman.mining.name: mining plasma envirosuit

obj.item.clothing.under.plasmaman.parame.desc: A suit designed for the station's plasmaman paramedics.
obj.item.clothing.under.plasmaman.parame.name: paramedic envirosuit

obj.item.clothing.under.plasmaman.prison.name: prisoner envirosuit

obj.item.clothing.under.plasmaman.resear.desc: It's an envirosuit worn by those with the know-how to achieve the position of "Research Director".

obj.item.clothing.under.plasmaman.scienc.name: science plasma envirosuit

obj.item.clothing.under.plasmaman.securi.desc: The pet project of a particularly posh plasmaman, this custom suit was modified by Nanotrasen for its detectives.
obj.item.clothing.under.plasmaman.securi.name: detective plasma envirosuit

obj.item.clothing.under.plasmaman.securi.desc: A plasmaman containment suit decorated for those few with the dedication to achieve the position of Head of Security.

obj.item.clothing.under.rank.azulean.old.desc: A dress uniform used by many ADU officials, resembling the attire of the nobles of old. It is very well decorated, and speaks of a large amount of self-importance.

How does somebody put this thing on anyways?

obj.item.clothing.under.skinsuit.desc:
The 'Voidcrosser'-pattern Stardress is a long-standing template upon which most Azulean spacesuits are made. 
		This EVA suit is a single skintight garment, designed for flexibility and maneuverability while using jetpacks or any sort of thruster; 		Azuleans preferring to use more familiar swimming motions than most EVA workers. The 'Voidcrosser' applies similar technologies to traditional Shoredresses, 		utilizing high-tech fabrics and water pumps to exert pressure over the Azulean's body. 

		An attached Shoredress helm is often used in conjunction with a third-party oxygen supply to allow one to breathe, 		and open pores in the suit allow the body to be cooled by the perspiration of internal water. 
		These suits are reputable among orbital workers for having very little interference with movement, and easy storage by simply folding them inside of any bubble-shaped helmet.
obj.item.clothing.under.skinsuit.name: Voidcrosser stardress

obj.item.clothing.under.tarkon.med.name: tarkon medical uniform

obj.item.clothing.under.tarkon.sci.desc: A uniform worn by research-ranked crew, provided by Tarkon Industries.
obj.item.clothing.under.tarkon.sci.name: tarkon research uniform

obj.item.clothing.under.tarkon.sec.desc: A uniform worn by security-ranked crew, provided by Tarkon Industries.
obj.item.clothing.under.tarkon.sec.name: tarkon guard uniform

obj.item.clothing.under.texas.desc: A premium quality shirt and pants combo straight from Texas.
obj.item.clothing.under.texas.name: texan formal outfit

obj.item.clothing.under.trek.command.desc: An outdated uniform worn by command officers.
obj.item.clothing.under.trek.command.name: command uniform

obj.item.clothing.under.trek.command.ent.desc: An outdated uniform worn by command officers.
obj.item.clothing.under.trek.command.ent.name: command uniform

obj.item.clothing.under.trek.command.nex.desc: An outdated uniform worn by command officers.
obj.item.clothing.under.trek.command.nex.name: command uniform

obj.item.clothing.under.trek.command.voy.desc: An outdated uniform worn by command officers.
obj.item.clothing.under.trek.command.voy.name: command uniform

obj.item.clothing.under.trek.engsec.desc: An outdated uniform worn by engineering/security officers.
obj.item.clothing.under.trek.engsec.name: engsec uniform

obj.item.clothing.under.trek.engsec.ent.desc: An outdated uniform worn by engineering/security officers.
obj.item.clothing.under.trek.engsec.ent.name: engsec uniform

obj.item.clothing.under.trek.engsec.next.desc: An outdated uniform worn by engineering/security officers.
obj.item.clothing.under.trek.engsec.next.name: engsec uniform

obj.item.clothing.under.trek.engsec.voy.desc: An outdated uniform worn by engineering/security officers.
obj.item.clothing.under.trek.engsec.voy.name: engsec uniform

obj.item.clothing.under.trek.medsci.desc: An outdated worn by medical/science officers.
obj.item.clothing.under.trek.medsci.name: medsci uniform

obj.item.clothing.under.trek.medsci.ent.desc: An outdated worn by medical/science officers.
obj.item.clothing.under.trek.medsci.ent.name: medsci uniform

obj.item.clothing.under.trek.medsci.next.desc: An outdated worn by medical/science officers.
obj.item.clothing.under.trek.medsci.next.name: medsci uniform

obj.item.clothing.under.trek.medsci.voy.desc: An outdated worn by medical/science officers.
obj.item.clothing.under.trek.medsci.voy.name: medsci uniform

obj.item.clothing.under.trek.q.desc: Something about this uniform feels off...
obj.item.clothing.under.trek.q.name: french marshall's uniform

obj.item.clothing.under.wetsuit_norm.desc: A fitted wetsuit for trapping in heat and water. Protects against outside elements ever-so-slightly.
obj.item.clothing.under.wetsuit_norm.name: fitted wetsuit

obj.item.codeword_granter.desc: A black manual with a red S lovingly inscribed on the cover by only the finest of presses from a factory.
obj.item.codeword_granter.name: codeword manual

obj.item.codex_cicatrix.desc: This heavy tome is full of cryptic scribbles and impossible diagrams. 	According to legend, it can be deciphered to reveal the secrets of the veil between worlds.
obj.item.codex_cicatrix.name: Codex Cicatrix

obj.item.codex_cicatrix.morbus.desc: A hideous, ragged book covered in separately-blinking eyes, all of them staring at you. You have no idea how to hold this thing, and to be honest you're not sure if you want to.
obj.item.codex_cicatrix.morbus.name: Codex Morbus

obj.item.coffee_cartridge.desc: A coffee cartridge manufactured by Piccionaia Coffee, for use with the Modello 3 system.
obj.item.coffee_cartridge.name: coffeemaker cartridge- Caffè Generico

obj.item.coffee_cartridge.bootleg.desc: A jury-rigged coffee cartridge. Should work with a Modello 3 system, though it might void the warranty.
obj.item.coffee_cartridge.bootleg.name: coffeemaker cartridge - Botany Blend

obj.item.coffee_cartridge.decaf.desc: A decaf coffee cartridge manufactured by Piccionaia Coffee, for use with the Modello 3 system.
obj.item.coffee_cartridge.decaf.name: coffeemaker cartridge - Caffè Decaffeinato

obj.item.coffee_cartridge.fancy.desc: A fancy coffee cartridge manufactured by Piccionaia Coffee, for use with the Modello 3 system.
obj.item.coffee_cartridge.fancy.name: coffeemaker cartridge - Caffè Fantasioso

obj.item.coin.antagtoken.desc: A novelty coin that helps the heart know what hard evidence cannot prove.
obj.item.coin.antagtoken.name: antag token

obj.item.coin.challenge.desc: A challenge coin. On the front appears a shield with an armored glove holding an olive branch and three Lightning bolts. Under the shield is the banner with the words 'Strategic Air Command' written onto it. On the back is the United States Air Force Roundel with the words of 'Peace is Our Profession' written around it.
obj.item.coin.challenge.name: SAC Challenge Coin

obj.item.coin.donator.marsoc.desc: This is a challenge coin given to all MARSOC members upon honorable separation from the Corps. 			The coin has the insignia of the Marine Special Operations Command on one side, and the Terran Government Marine Corps logo on the other. 			This one has an engraving on the Marine Corps logo side, etched in a circle around it: 			"To Staff Sargent Henry Rockwell, for his exemplary service to the Special Operations community and his outstanding moral fiber 			and shining example to the core values of the Terran Government Marine Corps."
obj.item.coin.donator.marsoc.name: MARSOC Challenge Coin

obj.item.coin.eldritch.desc: A surprisingly heavy, ornate coin. Its sides seem to depict a different image each time you look.
obj.item.coin.eldritch.name: eldritch coin

obj.item.coin.gold.debug.desc: If you got this somehow, be aware that it will dust you. Almost certainly.
obj.item.coin.gold.debug.name: coin

obj.item.coin.thunderdome.desc: A TGC flipper, for deciding who gets to go first. Also conveniently acts as a counter, for various purposes.
obj.item.coin.thunderdome.name: TGC Flipper

obj.item.coin.twoheaded.desc: Hey, this coin's the same on both sides!
obj.item.coin.twoheaded.name: coin

obj.item.collar_bomb_button.desc: It looks like a big red button, except it's yellow. It comes with a heavy trigger, to avoid accidents.
obj.item.collar_bomb_button.name: big yellow button

obj.item.construction.desc: A device used to rapidly build and deconstruct. Reload with iron, plasteel, glass or compressed matter cartridges.
obj.item.construction.name: not for ingame use

obj.item.construction.plumbing.desc: An expertly modified RCD outfitted to construct plumbing machinery.
obj.item.construction.plumbing.name: Plumbing Constructor

obj.item.construction.plumbing.engineeri.desc: A type of plumbing constructor designed to rapidly deploy the machines needed for logistics regarding fluids.
obj.item.construction.plumbing.engineeri.name: engineering plumbing constructor

obj.item.construction.plumbing.mining.desc: A type of plumbing constructor designed to harvest from geysers and collect their fluids.
obj.item.construction.plumbing.mining.name: mining plumbing constructor

obj.item.construction.plumbing.service.desc: A type of plumbing constructor designed to rapidly deploy the machines needed to make a brewery.
obj.item.construction.plumbing.service.name: service plumbing constructor

obj.item.construction.rcd.desc: A device used to rapidly build and deconstruct. Reload with iron, plasteel, glass or compressed matter cartridges.
obj.item.construction.rcd.name: rapid-construction-device (RCD)

obj.item.construction.rcd.arcd.desc: A prototype RCD with ranged capability and infinite capacity.
obj.item.construction.rcd.arcd.name: advanced rapid-construction-device (ARCD)

obj.item.construction.rcd.arcd.matterman.desc: A strange, familiar yet distinctly different analogue to the Nanotrasen standard RCD. Works at range, and can deconstruct reinforced walls. Reload using metal, glass, or plasteel.
obj.item.construction.rcd.arcd.matterman.name: matter manipulator

obj.item.construction.rcd.arcd.tarkon.desc: An RCD of an alternative design with a "Tarkon Industries" logo on it, capable of working at range. Reload using metal, glass, or plasteel.
obj.item.construction.rcd.arcd.tarkon.name: Tarkon Industries RCD

obj.item.construction.rcd.borg.desc: A device used to rapidly build walls and floors.
obj.item.construction.rcd.borg.name: rapid-construction-device (RCD)

obj.item.construction.rcd.borg.robotics_.desc: A modified RCD designed specifically for synthetic repairs.
obj.item.construction.rcd.borg.robotics_.name: Robotics RCD

obj.item.construction.rcd.borg.syndicate.desc: A reverse-engineered RCD with black market upgrades that allow this device to deconstruct reinforced walls. Property of Donk Co.
obj.item.construction.rcd.borg.syndicate.name: syndicate RCD

obj.item.construction.rcd.ce.desc: A higher-end model of the rapid construction device, prefitted with improved cooling and disruption prevention. Provided to the chief engineer.
obj.item.construction.rcd.ce.name: professional RCD

obj.item.construction.rcd.combat.desc: A device used to rapidly build and deconstruct. Reload with iron, plasteel, glass or compressed matter cartridges.
obj.item.construction.rcd.combat.name: industrial RCD

obj.item.construction.rcd.combat.admin.desc: A device used to rapidly build and deconstruct. Reload with iron, plasteel, glass or compressed matter cartridges.
obj.item.construction.rcd.combat.admin.name: admin RCD

obj.item.construction.rcd.improved.desc: A device used to rapidly build and deconstruct. Upgraded from the standard model with superior material storage, at the cost of build speed. Reload with iron, plasteel, glass or compressed matter cartridges.
obj.item.construction.rcd.improved.name: Improved RCD

obj.item.construction.rcd.internal.desc: A device used to rapidly build and deconstruct. Reload with iron, plasteel, glass or compressed matter cartridges.
obj.item.construction.rcd.internal.name: internal RCD

obj.item.construction.rcd.loaded.desc: A device used to rapidly build and deconstruct. Reload with iron, plasteel, glass or compressed matter cartridges.
obj.item.construction.rcd.loaded.name: rapid-construction-device (RCD)

obj.item.construction.rcd.loaded.upgrade.desc: A device used to rapidly build and deconstruct. Reload with iron, plasteel, glass or compressed matter cartridges.
obj.item.construction.rcd.loaded.upgrade.name: rapid-construction-device (RCD)

obj.item.construction.rcd.repairbot.desc: A device used to rapidly build and deconstruct. Reload with iron, plasteel, glass or compressed matter cartridges.
obj.item.construction.rcd.repairbot.name: rapid-construction-device (RCD)

obj.item.construction.rcd.robotics_rcd.desc: A modified RCD that has less storage than your usual NT RCD is and has less construction options and has lost the ability to deconstruct in favor of being more accessible for synthetic repairs. Reload using metal, glass, or plasteel.
obj.item.construction.rcd.robotics_rcd.name: Robotics RCD

obj.item.construction.rld.desc: A device used to rapidly provide lighting sources to an area. Reload with iron, plasteel, glass or compressed matter cartridges.
obj.item.construction.rld.name: Rapid Lighting Device

obj.item.construction.rld.cyborg.desc: A device used to rapidly provide lighting sources to an area. Runs off a cyborg's internal power supply
obj.item.construction.rld.cyborg.name: Cyborg rapid-light-device

obj.item.construction.rld.mini.desc: A device used to rapidly provide lighting sources to an area. Reload with iron, plasteel, glass or compressed matter cartridges.
obj.item.construction.rld.mini.name: mini-rapid-light-device

obj.item.construction.rtd.desc: Used for fast placement & destruction of floor tiles.
obj.item.construction.rtd.name: rapid-tiling-device (RTD)

obj.item.construction.rtd.admin.desc: Used for fast placement & destruction of floor tiles.
obj.item.construction.rtd.admin.name: admin RTD

obj.item.construction.rtd.borg.desc: Used for fast placement & destruction of floor tiles.
obj.item.construction.rtd.borg.name: rapid-tiling-device (RTD)

obj.item.construction.rtd.loaded.desc: Used for fast placement & destruction of floor tiles.
obj.item.construction.rtd.loaded.name: rapid-tiling-device (RTD)

obj.item.conversion_kit.desc: A strange box containing wood working tools and an instruction paper to turn stun batons into something else.
obj.item.conversion_kit.name: conversion kit

obj.item.conveyor_sorter.desc: A tool that is used to not only create the conveyor sorters, but give lists to the conveyor sorters.
obj.item.conveyor_sorter.name: conveyor sorter lister

obj.item.conveyor_sorter.improved.desc: A tool that is used to not only create the conveyor sorters, but give lists to the conveyor sorters.
obj.item.conveyor_sorter.improved.name: improved conveyor sorter lister

obj.item.corpsman_broken.desc: Might be able to be repaired with a welder.
obj.item.corpsman_broken.name: broken corpsman shield

obj.item.cortical_cage.desc: A harmless cage that is intended to capture cortical borers.
obj.item.cortical_cage.name: cortical borer cage

obj.item.coupon.desc: It doesn't matter if you didn't want it before, what matters now is that you've got a coupon for it!
obj.item.coupon.name: coupon

obj.item.crafting_conversion_kit.desc: It's a set of parts, for something. This shouldn't be here, and you should probably throw this away, since it's not going to be very useful.
obj.item.crafting_conversion_kit.name: base conversion kit

obj.item.crafting_conversion_kit.mosin_p.desc: All the parts you need to make a 'Rengo' rifle, outside of the parts that make the gun actually a gun. 		It looks like this stuff could fit on an old Sakhno rifle, if only you had one of those around.
obj.item.crafting_conversion_kit.mosin_p.name: Xhihao 'Rengo' rifle conversion kit

obj.item.crowbar.desc: A small crowbar. This handy tool is useful for lots of things, such as prying floor tiles or opening unpowered doors.
obj.item.crowbar.name: pocket crowbar

obj.item.crowbar.abductor.desc: A hard-light crowbar. It appears to pry by itself, without any effort required.
obj.item.crowbar.abductor.name: alien crowbar

obj.item.crowbar.advanced.desc: A scientist's almost successful reproduction of an abductor's crowbar, it uses the same technology combined with a handle that can't quite hold it.
obj.item.crowbar.advanced.name: advanced crowbar

obj.item.crowbar.ashwalker.desc: A small crowbar. This handy tool is useful for lots of things, such as prying floor tiles or opening unpowered doors.
obj.item.crowbar.ashwalker.name: primitive crowbar

obj.item.crowbar.brass.desc: A brass crowbar. It feels faintly warm to the touch.
obj.item.crowbar.brass.name: brass crowbar

obj.item.crowbar.cyborg.desc: A hydraulic prying tool, simple but powerful.
obj.item.crowbar.cyborg.name: hydraulic crowbar

obj.item.crowbar.cyborg.power.desc: A cyborg fitted module resembling the jaws of life.
obj.item.crowbar.cyborg.power.name: modular crowbar

obj.item.crowbar.drone.desc: A crowbar built into your chassis.
obj.item.crowbar.drone.name: built-in crowbar

obj.item.crowbar.freeman.desc: A heavy handed crowbar, it drips with blood.
obj.item.crowbar.freeman.name: blood soaked crowbar

obj.item.crowbar.freeman.ultimate.desc: A weapon wielded by an ancient physicist, the blood of hundreds seeps through this rod of iron and malice.
obj.item.crowbar.freeman.ultimate.name: Freeman's crowbar

obj.item.crowbar.hammer.desc: It's a heavy hammer with a pry bar on the back of its head. Nails aren't common in space, but this tool can still be used as a weapon or a crowbar.
obj.item.crowbar.hammer.name: claw hammer

obj.item.crowbar.large.desc: It's a big crowbar. It doesn't fit in your pockets, because it's big.
obj.item.crowbar.large.name: large crowbar

obj.item.crowbar.large.doorforcer.desc: A large, sturdy crowbar, painted orange. Nothing special, or unique about it. Waste of money, honestly.
obj.item.crowbar.large.doorforcer.name: prybar

obj.item.crowbar.large.emergency.desc: It's a bulky crowbar. It almost seems deliberately designed to not be able to fit inside of a backpack.
obj.item.crowbar.large.emergency.name: emergency crowbar

obj.item.crowbar.large.heavy.science.desc: It's a big crowbar for a scientist who is clearly compensating for something. It doesn't fit in your pockets, because it's big. Feels oddly light...
obj.item.crowbar.large.heavy.science.name: physicist's crowbar

obj.item.crowbar.large.old.desc: It's an old crowbar. Much larger than the pocket sized ones, carrying a lot more heft. They don't make 'em like they used to.
obj.item.crowbar.large.old.name: old crowbar

obj.item.crowbar.large.twenty_force.desc: It's a big crowbar. It doesn't fit in your pockets, because it's big. It feels oddly heavy..
obj.item.crowbar.large.twenty_force.name: heavy crowbar

obj.item.crowbar.makeshift.desc: A makeshift crowbar, flimsily constructed with miscellaneous parts. It's got a strong head that looks like it could be used for hammering.
obj.item.crowbar.makeshift.name: makeshift crowbar

obj.item.crowbar.mechremoval.desc: A... really big crowbar. You're pretty sure it could pry open a mech, but it seems unwieldy otherwise.
obj.item.crowbar.mechremoval.name: mech removal tool

obj.item.crowbar.power.desc: A set of jaws of life, compressed through the magic of science.
obj.item.crowbar.power.name: jaws of life

obj.item.crowbar.power.paramedic.desc: A specialized version of the jaws of life, primarily to be used by paramedics to recover the injured and the recently deceased. Rather than a cutting arm, this tool has a bonesetting apparatus. 		Cannot access certain high security areas due to safety concerns.
obj.item.crowbar.power.paramedic.name: jaws of recovery

obj.item.crowbar.power.paramedic.silent.desc: A specialized version of the jaws of life, primarily to be used by paramedics to recover the injured and the recently deceased. Rather than a cutting arm, this tool has a bonesetting apparatus. 		This one looks upgraded.
obj.item.crowbar.power.paramedic.silent.name: jaws of recovery

obj.item.crowbar.power.protonitrate.desc: Hydraulic tool combined with Proto Nitrate Crystal for increased efficeincy.
obj.item.crowbar.power.protonitrate.name: proto nitrate jaws of life

obj.item.crowbar.power.protonitrate.scie.desc: Hybrid cutters combined with Proto Nitrate Crystal for increased efficeincy but without the hydraulic force required to pry open doors.
obj.item.crowbar.power.protonitrate.scie.name: proto nitrate hybrid cutters

obj.item.crowbar.power.science.desc: Quite similar to the jaws of life, this tool combines the utility of a crowbar and a set of wirecutters without the hydraulic force required to pry open doors.
obj.item.crowbar.power.science.name: hybrid cutters

obj.item.crowbar.power.syndicate.desc: An improved, faster, and smaller copy of Nanotrasen's standard jaws of life. Can be used to force open airlocks in its crowbar configuration.
obj.item.crowbar.power.syndicate.name: jaws of death

obj.item.crowbar.red.desc: A small crowbar. This handy tool is useful for lots of things, such as prying floor tiles or opening unpowered doors.
obj.item.crowbar.red.name: pocket crowbar

obj.item.crowbar.red.caravan.desc: A prototype of a new crowbar design, allegedly the red color scheme makes it go faster.
obj.item.crowbar.red.caravan.name: experimental crowbar

obj.item.crucifix.desc: An ornate golden crucifix, adorned with various gemstones and tiny carvings. For some reason, it always feels warm to the touch.
obj.item.crucifix.name: ornate crucifix

obj.item.crusher_trophy.desc: A strange spike with no usage.
obj.item.crusher_trophy.name: tail spike

obj.item.crusher_trophy.bileworm_spewlet.desc: A baby bileworm. Suitable as a trophy for a kinetic crusher.
obj.item.crusher_trophy.bileworm_spewlet.name: bileworm spewlet

obj.item.crusher_trophy.blaster_tubes.desc: The blaster tubes from a colossus's arm. Suitable as a trophy for a kinetic crusher.
obj.item.crusher_trophy.blaster_tubes.name: blaster tubes

obj.item.crusher_trophy.blaster_tubes.ma.desc: A still-searing wing from a magmawing watcher. Suitable as a trophy for a kinetic crusher.
obj.item.crusher_trophy.blaster_tubes.ma.name: magmawing watcher wing

obj.item.crusher_trophy.brimdemon_fang.desc: A fang from a brimdemon's corpse.
obj.item.crusher_trophy.brimdemon_fang.name: brimdemon's fang

obj.item.crusher_trophy.broodmother_tong.desc: The tongue of a broodmother. If attached a certain way, makes for a suitable crusher trophy.  It also feels very spongey, I wonder what would happen if you squeezed it?...
obj.item.crusher_trophy.broodmother_tong.name: broodmother tongue

obj.item.crusher_trophy.demon_claws.desc: A set of blood-drenched claws from a massive demon's hand. Suitable as a trophy for a kinetic crusher.
obj.item.crusher_trophy.demon_claws.name: demon claws

obj.item.crusher_trophy.flesh_glob.desc: A glob of shifting flesh, sealed shut permanently. Suitable as a trophy for a kinetic crusher.
obj.item.crusher_trophy.flesh_glob.name: glob of shifting flesh

obj.item.crusher_trophy.gladiator.desc: A set of soot-coated ribs from a worthy warrior. Suitable as a trophy for a kinetic crusher.
obj.item.crusher_trophy.gladiator.name: ashen bones

obj.item.crusher_trophy.goliath_tentacle.desc: A sliced-off goliath tentacle. Suitable as a trophy for a kinetic crusher.
obj.item.crusher_trophy.goliath_tentacle.name: goliath tentacle

obj.item.crusher_trophy.ice_block_talism.desc: A glowing trinket that a demonic miner had on him, it seems he couldn't utilize it for whatever reason.
obj.item.crusher_trophy.ice_block_talism.name: ice block talisman

obj.item.crusher_trophy.ice_demon_cube.desc: A stone cold cube dropped from an ice demon.
obj.item.crusher_trophy.ice_demon_cube.name: demonic cube

obj.item.crusher_trophy.legion_skull.desc: A dead and lifeless legion skull. Suitable as a trophy for a kinetic crusher.
obj.item.crusher_trophy.legion_skull.name: legion skull

obj.item.crusher_trophy.legionnaire_spin.desc: The spine of a legionnaire. With some creativity, you could use it as a crusher trophy. Alternatively, shaking it might do something as well.
obj.item.crusher_trophy.legionnaire_spin.name: legionnaire spine

obj.item.crusher_trophy.miner_eye.desc: Its pupil is collapsed and turned to mush. Suitable as a trophy for a kinetic crusher.
obj.item.crusher_trophy.miner_eye.name: eye of a blood-drunk hunter

obj.item.crusher_trophy.raptor_feather.desc: A feather of an innocent raptor. You'd go to hell for this one, if you weren't already mining in it.
obj.item.crusher_trophy.raptor_feather.name: raptor feather

obj.item.crusher_trophy.retool_kit.desc: A toolkit for changing the crusher's appearance without affecting the device's function.
obj.item.crusher_trophy.retool_kit.name: crusher retool kit

obj.item.crusher_trophy.retool_kit.ashen.desc: It burns with the flame of the necropolis, whispering in your ear. It demands to be bound to a suitable weapon.
obj.item.crusher_trophy.retool_kit.ashen.name: ashen skull

obj.item.crusher_trophy.tail_spike.desc: A spike taken from an ash drake's tail. Suitable as a trophy for a kinetic crusher.
obj.item.crusher_trophy.tail_spike.name: tail spike

obj.item.crusher_trophy.vortex_talisman.desc: A glowing trinket that was originally the Hierophant's beacon. Suitable as a trophy for a kinetic crusher.
obj.item.crusher_trophy.vortex_talisman.name: vortex talisman

obj.item.crusher_trophy.watcher_wing.desc: A wing ripped from a watcher. Suitable as a trophy for a kinetic crusher.
obj.item.crusher_trophy.watcher_wing.name: watcher wing

obj.item.crusher_trophy.watcher_wing.ice.desc: A carefully preserved frozen wing from an icewing watcher. Suitable as a trophy for a kinetic crusher.
obj.item.crusher_trophy.watcher_wing.ice.name: icewing watcher wing

obj.item.crusher_trophy.wendigo_horn.desc: A gnarled horn ripped from the skull of a wendigo. Suitable as a trophy for a kinetic crusher.
obj.item.crusher_trophy.wendigo_horn.name: wendigo horn

obj.item.ctf_flag.desc: A banner with Nanotrasen's logo on it.
obj.item.ctf_flag.name: banner

obj.item.ctf_flag.blue.desc: A blue banner used to play capture the flag.
obj.item.ctf_flag.blue.name: blue flag

obj.item.ctf_flag.blue.medisim.desc: Protect your maiden, and capture theirs!
obj.item.ctf_flag.blue.medisim.name: Bluesworth Hold Fair Maiden

obj.item.ctf_flag.green.desc: A green banner used to play capture the flag.
obj.item.ctf_flag.green.name: green flag

obj.item.ctf_flag.red.desc: A red banner used to play capture the flag.
obj.item.ctf_flag.red.name: red flag

obj.item.ctf_flag.red.medisim.desc: Protect your maiden, and capture theirs!
obj.item.ctf_flag.red.medisim.name: Redfield Castle Fair Maiden

obj.item.ctf_flag.yellow.desc: A yellow banner used to play capture the flag.
obj.item.ctf_flag.yellow.name: yellow flag

obj.item.cult_shift.desc: This relic instantly teleports you, and anything you're pulling, forward by a moderate distance.
obj.item.cult_shift.name: veil shifter

obj.item.cultivator.desc: It's used for removing weeds or scratching your back.
obj.item.cultivator.name: cultivator

obj.item.cultivator.cyborg.desc: It's used for removing weeds or scratching your back.
obj.item.cultivator.cyborg.name: cyborg cultivator

obj.item.cultivator.rake.desc: It's used for removing weeds or scratching your back.
obj.item.cultivator.rake.name: rake

obj.item.cursed_dagger.desc: A blunted dagger that seems to cause the shadows near it to tremble.
obj.item.cursed_dagger.name: cursed ash dagger

obj.item.cursed_katana.desc: A katana used to seal something vile away long ago. 	Even with the weapon destroyed, all the pieces containing the creature have coagulated back together to find a new host.
obj.item.cursed_katana.name: cursed katana

obj.item.cutting_board.desc: Processing food before electricity was cool, because you can just do your regular cutting on the table next to this right?
obj.item.cutting_board.name: cutting board

obj.item.debug.human_spawner.desc: Spawn a human by aiming at a turf and clicking. Use in hand to change type.
obj.item.debug.human_spawner.name: human spawner

obj.item.debug.omnitool.desc: The original hypertool, born before them all. Use it in hand to unleash its true power.
obj.item.debug.omnitool.name: omnitool

obj.item.debug.omnitool.item_spawner.name: spawntool

obj.item.defibrillator.desc: A device that delivers powerful shocks to detachable paddles that resuscitate incapacitated patients. 	Has a rear bracket for attachments to wall mounts and medical cyborgs.
obj.item.defibrillator.name: defibrillator

obj.item.defibrillator.compact.desc: A belt-equipped defibrillator that can be rapidly deployed.
obj.item.defibrillator.compact.name: compact defibrillator

obj.item.defibrillator.compact.combat.desc: A belt-equipped blood-red defibrillator. Can revive through thick clothing, has an experimental self-recharging battery, and can be utilized as a weapon via applying the paddles while in a combat stance.
obj.item.defibrillator.compact.combat.name: combat defibrillator

obj.item.defibrillator.compact.combat.lo.desc: A belt-equipped blood-red defibrillator. Can revive through thick clothing, has an experimental self-recharging battery, and can be utilized as a weapon via applying the paddles while in a combat stance.
obj.item.defibrillator.compact.combat.lo.name: combat defibrillator

obj.item.defibrillator.compact.combat.lo.desc: A belt-equipped state-of-the-art defibrillator. Can revive through thick clothing, has an experimental self-recharging battery, and can be utilized as a weapon via applying the paddles while in a combat stance.
obj.item.defibrillator.compact.combat.lo.name: elite Nanotrasen defibrillator

obj.item.defibrillator.compact.loaded.cm.desc: A belt-equipped defibrillator that can be rapidly deployed.
obj.item.defibrillator.compact.loaded.cm.name: chief medical officer's compact defibrillator

obj.item.deployable_turret_folded.desc: A folded and unloaded heavy machine gun, ready to be deployed and used.
obj.item.deployable_turret_folded.name: folded heavy machine gun

obj.item.dest_tagger.desc: Used to set the destination of properly wrapped packages.
obj.item.dest_tagger.name: destination tagger

obj.item.dest_tagger.borg.desc: Used to fool the disposal mail network into thinking that you're a harmless parcel. Does actually work as a regular destination tagger as well.
obj.item.dest_tagger.borg.name: cyborg destination tagger

obj.item.destabilizing_crystal.desc: A crystal that can be used to destabilize the supermatter to cause a resonance cascade. Carefully apply this on 		a fully stable supermatter crystal and start the delamination. Prevent anyone from stopping you.
obj.item.destabilizing_crystal.name: destabilizing crystal

obj.item.desynchronizer.desc: An experimental device that can temporarily desynchronize the user from spacetime, effectively making them disappear while it's active.
obj.item.desynchronizer.name: desynchronizer

obj.item.detective_scanner.desc: Used to remotely scan objects and biomass for DNA and fingerprints. Can print a report of the findings.
obj.item.detective_scanner.name: forensic scanner

obj.item.device.custom_kit.desc: A box of parts for modifying a certain object.
obj.item.device.custom_kit.name: modification kit

obj.item.device.custom_kit.deluxe_hypo2.desc: Upgrades the DeForest Hypospray Mk. II to support larger vials.
obj.item.device.custom_kit.deluxe_hypo2.name: hypospray Mk. II deluxe bodykit

obj.item.device.custom_kit.empty_cell.desc: An inactive salve medicell, use this on an aloe leaf to make this into a usable cell.
obj.item.device.custom_kit.empty_cell.name: empty salve medicell

obj.item.device.custom_kit.empty_cell.bo.desc: An inactive body teleporter medicell, use this on a bluespace slime extract to make this into a usable cell.
obj.item.device.custom_kit.empty_cell.bo.name: empty body teleporter medicell

obj.item.device.custom_kit.empty_cell.re.desc: An inactive oppressive force relocator medicell, use this on a bluespace slime extract to make this into a usable cell.
obj.item.device.custom_kit.empty_cell.re.name: empty oppressive force relocator medicell

obj.item.device.custom_kit.medigun_fastc.desc: Upgrades the internal battery inside of the medigun, allowing for faster charging and a higher cell capacity. Requires the medigun's cells to be removed first!
obj.item.device.custom_kit.medigun_fastc.name: VeyMedical CWM-479 upgrade kit

obj.item.dnainjector.shock.name: DNA injector (Shock Touch)

obj.item.dnainjector.spastic.desc: A cheap single use autoinjector that injects the user with DNA.
obj.item.dnainjector.spastic.name: DNA injector (Spastic)

obj.item.dnainjector.spatialinstability.desc: A cheap single use autoinjector that injects the user with DNA.
obj.item.dnainjector.spatialinstability.name: DNA injector (Spatial Instability)

obj.item.dnainjector.strong_legs.desc: Makes you leap like a bunny.
obj.item.dnainjector.strong_legs.name: DNA injector (Strong Legs)

obj.item.dnainjector.swedishmut.desc: A cheap single use autoinjector that injects the user with DNA.
obj.item.dnainjector.swedishmut.name: DNA injector (Swedish)

obj.item.dnainjector.telemut.darkbundle.desc: Good. Let the hate flow through you.
obj.item.dnainjector.telemut.darkbundle.name: DNA injector

obj.item.dnainjector.thermal.desc: A cheap single use autoinjector that injects the user with DNA.
obj.item.dnainjector.thermal.name: DNA injector (Thermal Vision)

obj.item.dnainjector.timed.desc: A cheap single use autoinjector that injects the user with DNA.
obj.item.dnainjector.timed.name: DNA injector

obj.item.dnainjector.timed.h2m.desc: Will make you a flea bag.
obj.item.dnainjector.timed.h2m.name: DNA injector (Human > Monkey)

obj.item.dnainjector.timed.hulk.desc: This will make you big and strong, but give you a bad skin condition.
obj.item.dnainjector.timed.hulk.name: DNA injector (Hulk)

obj.item.dnainjector.tourmut.desc: Gives you a nasty case of Tourette's.
obj.item.dnainjector.tourmut.name: DNA injector (Tour.)

obj.item.dnainjector.twoleftfeet.desc: A cheap single use autoinjector that injects the user with DNA.
obj.item.dnainjector.twoleftfeet.name: DNA injector (Two Left Feet)

obj.item.dnainjector.unintelligiblemut.desc: A cheap single use autoinjector that injects the user with DNA.
obj.item.dnainjector.unintelligiblemut.name: DNA injector (Unintelligible)

obj.item.dnainjector.void.desc: A cheap single use autoinjector that injects the user with DNA.
obj.item.dnainjector.void.name: DNA injector (Void)

obj.item.dnainjector.wackymut.desc: A cheap single use autoinjector that injects the user with DNA.
obj.item.dnainjector.wackymut.name: DNA injector (Wacky)

obj.item.dnainjector.webbing.desc: A cheap single use autoinjector that injects the user with DNA.
obj.item.dnainjector.webbing.name: DNA injector (Webbing)

obj.item.dnainjector.xraymut.desc: Finally you can see what the Captain does.
obj.item.dnainjector.xraymut.name: DNA injector (X-ray)

obj.item.documents.nanotrasen.desc: "Top Secret" Nanotrasen documents, filled with complex diagrams and lists of names, dates and coordinates.
obj.item.documents.nanotrasen.name: secret documents

obj.item.documents.photocopy.desc: A copy of some top-secret documents. Nobody will notice they aren't the originals... right?
obj.item.documents.photocopy.name: secret documents

obj.item.documents.syndicate.desc: "Top Secret" documents detailing sensitive Syndicate operational intelligence.
obj.item.documents.syndicate.name: secret documents

obj.item.documents.syndicate.blue.desc: "Top Secret" documents detailing sensitive Syndicate operational intelligence. These documents are verified with a blue wax seal.
obj.item.documents.syndicate.blue.name: blue secret documents

obj.item.documents.syndicate.mining.desc: "Top Secret" documents detailing Syndicate plasma mining operations.
obj.item.documents.syndicate.mining.name: secret documents

obj.item.documents.syndicate.red.desc: "Top Secret" documents detailing sensitive Syndicate operational intelligence. These documents are verified with a red wax seal.
obj.item.documents.syndicate.red.name: red secret documents

obj.item.dog_bone.desc: A tasty femur full of juicy marrow, the perfect gift for your best friend.
obj.item.dog_bone.name: jumbo dog bone

obj.item.donator.transponder.desc: Used by Helians to communicate with their mothership, the screen is cracked and its edges scuffed. This one has seen better days.
obj.item.donator.transponder.name: broken Helian transponder

obj.item.door_remote.desc: A remote for controlling a set of airlocks.
obj.item.door_remote.name: control wand

obj.item.door_remote.captain.desc: A remote for controlling a set of airlocks. Despite its gaudy insignia denoting the Captain as its owner, some fine print 		indicates that its access is exclusively relegated to the Bridge and high-security command areas -- an additional byline 		specifically excludes Security from the high-security areas. Ironic.
obj.item.door_remote.captain.name: command door remote

obj.item.door_remote.chief_engineer.desc: A remote for controlling a set of airlocks. This one smells like burnt flesh and ozone.
obj.item.door_remote.chief_engineer.name: engineering door remote

obj.item.door_remote.chief_medical_offic.desc: A remote for controlling a set of airlocks. It has the overpowering odor of blood and, despite its medical insignia, 		has absolutely no accompanying odor of disinfectant.
obj.item.door_remote.chief_medical_offic.name: medical door remote

obj.item.door_remote.head_of_personnel.desc: A remote for controlling a set of airlocks. This one smells like printer ink, and fills its holder with the urge 		to mysteriously vanish.
obj.item.door_remote.head_of_personnel.name: service door remote

obj.item.door_remote.head_of_security.desc: A remote for controlling a set of airlocks. This one smells like sweat, blood, resentment, and coffee. 		Someone appears to have tampered with the identifier.
obj.item.door_remote.head_of_security.name: security door remote

obj.item.door_remote.omni.desc: This control wand can access any door on the station.
obj.item.door_remote.omni.name: omni door remote

obj.item.door_remote.quartermaster.desc: Remotely controls airlocks. This remote has additional Vault access. Despite that, holding it makes you feel insecure for some reason.
obj.item.door_remote.quartermaster.name: cargo door remote

obj.item.door_remote.research_director.desc: A remote for controlling a set of airlocks. This one is slightly misshapen, as if squeezed by a person possessing ludicrous strength.
obj.item.door_remote.research_director.name: research door remote

obj.item.door_seal.desc: A brace used to seal and reinforce an airlock. Useful for making areas inaccessible to those without opposable thumbs.
obj.item.door_seal.name: pneumatic airlock seal

obj.item.dragnet_beacon.desc: Can be synced with a DRAGnet to set it as a designated teleporting point.
obj.item.dragnet_beacon.name: DRAGnet beacon

obj.item.dragons_blood.desc: You're not actually going to drink this, are you?
obj.item.dragons_blood.name: bottle of dragons blood

obj.item.drake_remains.desc: The gathered remains of a drake. It still crackles with heat, and smells distinctly of brimstone.
obj.item.drake_remains.name: drake remains

obj.item.dualsaber.toy.desc: A cheap, plastic replica of TWO energy swords.  Double the fun!
obj.item.dualsaber.toy.name: double-bladed toy sword

obj.item.duffel_of_holding_inert.desc: What is currently a just an unwieldly block of metal with a slot ready to accept a bluespace anomaly core.
obj.item.duffel_of_holding_inert.name: inert duffel bag of holding

obj.item.duty_checker.desc: Checks if the mob this is used on is off-duty. You probably shouldn't see this in-game...
obj.item.duty_checker.name: duty checker

obj.item.dyespray.desc: A spray to dye your hair any colors and gradients you'd like.
obj.item.dyespray.name: hair dye spray

obj.item.earthcracker.desc: A nasty automated pilebunker can be used to create a massive weakpoint in flooring,		which can be triggered afterwards by a sufficiently strong enough explosion.
obj.item.earthcracker.name: E-2 Earthcracker

obj.item.earthcracker.small.desc: A rusty automated pilebunker can be used to create a weakpoint in flooring,		which can be triggered afterwards by a sufficiently strong enough explosion.		You're pretty sure the mining company that used to make these got bought by Nanotrasen ages ago.
obj.item.earthcracker.small.name: E-1 Earthcracker

obj.item.ectoplasm.revenant.desc: A pile of fine blue dust. Small tendrils of violet mist swirl around it.
obj.item.ectoplasm.revenant.name: glimmering residue

obj.item.eldritch_potion.crucible_soul.desc: A glass bottle containing a bright orange, translucent liquid.
obj.item.eldritch_potion.crucible_soul.name: brew of the crucible soul

obj.item.eldritch_potion.duskndawn.desc: A glass bottle containing a dull yellow liquid. It seems to fade in and out with regularity.
obj.item.eldritch_potion.duskndawn.name: brew of dusk and dawn

obj.item.eldritch_potion.wounded.desc: A glass bottle containing a colorless, dark liquid.
obj.item.eldritch_potion.wounded.name: brew of the wounded soldier

obj.item.electroadaptive_pseudocircuit.desc: An all-in-one circuit imprinter, designer, synthesizer, outfitter, creator, and chef. It can be used in place of any generic circuit board during construction.
obj.item.electroadaptive_pseudocircuit.name: electroadaptive pseudocircuit

obj.item.electronics.airalarm.desc: Looks like a circuit. Probably is.
obj.item.electronics.airalarm.name: air alarm electronics

obj.item.electronics.airlock.desc: Looks like a circuit. Probably is.
obj.item.electronics.airlock.name: airlock electronics

obj.item.electronics.apc.desc: Heavy-duty switching circuits for power control.
obj.item.electronics.apc.name: power control module

obj.item.electronics.firealarm.desc: A fire alarm circuit. Can handle heat levels up to 40 degrees celsius.
obj.item.electronics.firealarm.name: fire alarm electronics

obj.item.electronics.firelock.desc: A circuit board used in construction of firelocks.
obj.item.electronics.firelock.name: firelock circuitry

obj.item.electronics.tracker.desc: Looks like a circuit. Probably is.
obj.item.electronics.tracker.name: tracker electronics

obj.item.electropack.shockcollar.desc: A reinforced metal collar. It has some sort of wiring near the front.
obj.item.electropack.shockcollar.name: shock collar

obj.item.electropack.shockcollar.pacify.desc: A reinforced metal collar that latches onto the wearer and prevents harmful thoughts.
obj.item.electropack.shockcollar.pacify.name: pacifying collar

obj.item.emergency_bed.desc: A collapsed medical bed that can be carried around.
obj.item.emergency_bed.name: roller bed

obj.item.emergency_bed.silicon.desc: A collapsed medical bed that can be ejected for emergency use. Must be collected or replaced after use.
obj.item.emergency_bed.silicon.name: emergency bed dock

obj.item.emitter_disk.desc: This disk can be used on an emitter with an open panel to reset its projectile. Unless this was handed to you by an admin, you should report this on github.
obj.item.emitter_disk.name: Diode Disk: Debugger

obj.item.emitter_disk.blast.desc: This disk, loaded with proprietary syndicate firmware, can be used on an emitter with an open panel to make it shoot beams of concussive force which will cause small explosions.
obj.item.emitter_disk.blast.name: Diode Disk: Hyperconcussive

obj.item.emitter_disk.healing.desc: This disk can be installed into an emitter with an open panel to make it shoot lasers which will heal the physical damages of living creatures.
obj.item.emitter_disk.healing.name: Diode Disk: Bioregenerative

obj.item.emitter_disk.incendiary.desc: This disk can be used on an emitter with an open panel to make it shoot lasers which will set living creatures ablaze.
obj.item.emitter_disk.incendiary.name: Diode Disk: Conflagratory

obj.item.emitter_disk.magnetic.desc: This disk can be used on an emitter with an open panel to make it shoot lasers which will attract nearby objects.
obj.item.emitter_disk.magnetic.name: Diode Disk: Magnetogenerative

obj.item.emitter_disk.sanity.desc: This disk can be used on an emitter with an open panel to make it shoot lasers which will depress living creatures and calm supermatter crystals.
obj.item.emitter_disk.sanity.name: Diode Disk: Psychosiphoning

obj.item.emitter_disk.stamina.desc: This disk can be used on an emitter with an open panel to make it shoot lasers which will increase the integrity of supermatter crystals and exhaust living creatures. The disk will be consumed in the process.
obj.item.emitter_disk.stamina.name: Diode Disk: Electrodisruptive

obj.item.empty_circuit.desc: This is a circuit that is close to being finished; it just requires some forethought and gold.
obj.item.empty_circuit.name: empty circuit

obj.item.emptysandbag.desc: A bag to be filled with sand.
obj.item.emptysandbag.name: empty sandbag
