obj.item.energy_katana.desc: A katana infused with strong energy.
obj.item.energy_katana.name: energy katana

obj.item.ether.desc: A flask of nausea-inducing, thick green liquid. Restores your body completely, then places you into an enhanced sleep for a full minute.
obj.item.ether.name: ether of the newborn

obj.item.etherealballdeployer.desc: Press the button for a deployment of slightly-unethical PARTY!
obj.item.etherealballdeployer.name: portable ethereal disco ball

obj.item.exodrone.desc: A long range, semi-autonomous exploration drone.
obj.item.exodrone.name: exploration drone

obj.item.experi_scanner.desc: A handheld scanner used for completing the many experiments of modern science.
obj.item.experi_scanner.name: Experi-Scanner

obj.item.experi_scanner.bluespace.desc: A version of the handheld scanner used for completing the endless experiments of modern science from range.
obj.item.experi_scanner.bluespace.name: Bluespace Experi-Scanner

obj.item.experimental_dash.desc: An experimental module that allows for dashing.
obj.item.experimental_dash.name: Exerimental Dash

obj.item.extendohand.desc: Futuristic tech has allowed these classic spring-boxing toys to essentially act as a fully functional hand-operated hand prosthetic.
obj.item.extendohand.name: extendo-hand

obj.item.extendohand.acme.desc: A novelty extendo-hand produced by the ACME corporation. Originally designed to knock out roadrunners.
obj.item.extendohand.acme.name: ACME Extendo-Hand

obj.item.extinguisher.advanced.desc: Used to stop thermonuclear fires from spreading inside your engine.
obj.item.extinguisher.advanced.name: advanced fire extinguisher

obj.item.extinguisher.advanced.empty.desc: Used to stop thermonuclear fires from spreading inside your engine.
obj.item.extinguisher.advanced.empty.name: advanced fire extinguisher

obj.item.extinguisher.anti.desc: A traditional red fire extinguisher. Made in Britain... wait, what?
obj.item.extinguisher.anti.name: fire extender

obj.item.extinguisher.crafted.desc: Spraycan turned coolant dispenser. Can be sprayed on containers to cool them. Refill using water.
obj.item.extinguisher.crafted.name: Improvised cooling spray

obj.item.extinguisher.mini.desc: A light and compact fibreglass-framed model fire extinguisher.
obj.item.extinguisher.mini.name: pocket fire extinguisher

obj.item.extinguisher.mini.empty.desc: A light and compact fibreglass-framed model fire extinguisher.
obj.item.extinguisher.mini.empty.name: pocket fire extinguisher

obj.item.extinguisher.mini.nozzle.desc: A heavy duty nozzle attached to a firefighter's backpack tank.
obj.item.extinguisher.mini.nozzle.name: extinguisher nozzle

obj.item.extinguisher.mini.nozzle.mod.desc: An atmospheric resin mister with three modes, mounted as a module.
obj.item.extinguisher.mini.nozzle.mod.name: MOD atmospheric mister

obj.item.extinguisher_refill.desc: A cartridge loaded with a compressed extinguisher mix, used to refill the automatic extinguisher on plasma envirosuits.
obj.item.extinguisher_refill.name: envirosuit extinguisher cartridge

obj.item.extraction_pack.desc: A balloon that can be used to extract equipment or personnel to a Fulton Recovery Beacon. Anything not bolted down can be moved. Link the pack to a beacon by using the pack in hand.
obj.item.extraction_pack.name: fulton extraction pack

obj.item.extraction_pack.contractor.desc: A balloon that can be used to extract equipment or personnel to a Fulton Recovery Beacon. Anything not bolted down can be moved. Link the pack to a beacon by using the pack in hand.
obj.item.extraction_pack.contractor.name: black fulton extraction pack

obj.item.extraction_pack.syndicate.desc: A balloon that can be used to extract equipment or personnel to a Fulton Recovery Beacon. Anything not bolted down can be moved. Link the pack to a beacon by using the pack in hand.
obj.item.extraction_pack.syndicate.name: syndicate fulton extraction pack

obj.item.eyesnatcher.desc: An overly complicated device that can pierce target's skull and extract their eyeballs if enough brute force is applied.
obj.item.eyesnatcher.name: portable eyeball extractor

obj.item.fake_e_cutlass.desc: Damn, son, where'd you find this? (Tell a coder if you do)
obj.item.fake_e_cutlass.name: fake energy cutlass

obj.item.fake_identity_kit.desc: All of the paperwork you need to get a fresh start and a perfect alibi, plus a little digital assistance to insert you into crew records.
obj.item.fake_identity_kit.name: fake identity kit

obj.item.fake_items.desc: If you see this you feel like you should contact an 'admin' or make an 'issue report' whatever that means
obj.item.fake_items.name: An item, of which is fake

obj.item.fake_items.abductor_win_stick.desc: A quad-mode baton used for incapacitation and restraining of specimens.
obj.item.fake_items.abductor_win_stick.name: advanced baton

obj.item.fake_items.abductor_win_stick.n.desc: A quad-mode baton used for incapacitation and restraining of specimens.
obj.item.fake_items.abductor_win_stick.n.name: advanced baton

obj.item.fake_items.feddy_fazbear.desc: A springlock module disguised as a dna lock module, thankfully there is a note on it telling you this.
obj.item.fake_items.feddy_fazbear.name: Springlock Module

obj.item.fake_items.l6_saw.desc: A heavily modified 7mm light machine gun, designated 'L6 SAW'. Has 'Aussec Armoury - 2531' engraved on the receiver below the designation.
obj.item.fake_items.l6_saw.name: L6 SAW

obj.item.fake_items.lahti_l39.desc: The Lahti L-39, now manufactured in space with better materials making it more portable and reliable- still loaded in the same massive cartridge, 		this thing was made to go through a tank and come out the other end- imagine what it could do to an exosuit, there's also a completely useless sight which is totally obstructed by the magazine.
obj.item.fake_items.lahti_l39.name: Lahti L-39

obj.item.fake_items.sm_sliver.desc: A tiny, highly volatile sliver of a supermatter crystal. Do not handle without protection!
obj.item.fake_items.sm_sliver.name: supermatter sliver

obj.item.fake_items.time_stopper.desc: A module that can halt time in a small radius around the user... for as long as they 			want! Great for monologues or lunch breaks. Keep in mind moving will end the stop, and the 			module has a hefty cooldown period to avoid reality errors.
obj.item.fake_items.time_stopper.name: MOD timestopper module

obj.item.fake_items.time_stopper.no_anch.desc: A module that can halt time in a small radius around the user... for as long as they 			want! Great for monologues or lunch breaks. Keep in mind moving will end the stop, and the 			module has a hefty cooldown period to avoid reality errors.
obj.item.fake_items.time_stopper.no_anch.name: MOD timestopper module

obj.item.fake_items.wabbajack.desc: If there is some deity out there, they've definitely skipped their psych appointment before creating this.
obj.item.fake_items.wabbajack.name: Wabbajack

obj.item.fake_items.wabbajack.no_anchor.desc: If there is some deity out there, they've definitely skipped their psych appointment before creating this.
obj.item.fake_items.wabbajack.no_anchor.name: Wabbajack

obj.item.feather.desc: A dark, wilting feather. It seems as old as time.
obj.item.feather.name: feather

obj.item.fireaxe.desc: Truly, the weapon of a madman. Who would think to fight fire with an axe?
obj.item.fireaxe.name: fire axe

obj.item.fireaxe.boardingaxe.desc: A hulking cleaver that feels like a burden just looking at it. Seems excellent at halving obstacles like windows, airlocks, barricades and people.
obj.item.fireaxe.boardingaxe.name: boarding axe

obj.item.fireaxe.boneaxe.desc: A large, vicious axe crafted out of several sharpened bone plates and crudely tied together. Made of monsters, by killing monsters, for killing monsters.
obj.item.fireaxe.boneaxe.name: bone axe

obj.item.fireaxe.energy.desc: You aren't quite sure if this counts as a fire axe anymore, but it sure is fancy! A tag hangs off of it reading: "property of the Gorlex Marauders"
obj.item.fireaxe.energy.name: energy fire axe

obj.item.fireaxe.metal_h2_axe.desc: A lightweight crowbar with an extreme sharp fire axe head attached. It trades its heft as a weapon by making it easier to carry around when holstered to suits without having to sacrifice your backpack.
obj.item.fireaxe.metal_h2_axe.name: metallic hydrogen axe

obj.item.firelance.desc: Melts everything in front of you. Takes a while to start and operate.
obj.item.firelance.name: fire lance

obj.item.firing_pin.desc: A small authentication device, to be inserted into a firearm receiver to allow operation. NT safety regulations require all new designs to incorporate one.
obj.item.firing_pin.name: electronic firing pin

obj.item.firing_pin.abductor.desc: This firing pin is slimy and warm; you can swear you feel it constantly trying to mentally probe you.
obj.item.firing_pin.abductor.name: alien firing pin

obj.item.firing_pin.alert_level.desc: A small authentication device, to be inserted into a firearm receiver to allow operation. This one is configured to only fire on amber alert or higher.
obj.item.firing_pin.alert_level.name: alert level firing pin

obj.item.firing_pin.alert_level.blue.desc: A small authentication device, to be inserted into a firearm receiver to allow operation. This one is configured to only fire on blue alert or higher.
obj.item.firing_pin.alert_level.blue.name: alert level firing pin

obj.item.firing_pin.clown.desc: Advanced clowntech that can convert any firearm into a far more useful object.
obj.item.firing_pin.clown.name: hilarious firing pin

obj.item.firing_pin.clown.ultra.desc: Advanced clowntech that can convert any firearm into a far more useful object.
obj.item.firing_pin.clown.ultra.name: ultra hilarious firing pin

obj.item.firing_pin.clown.ultra.selfdest.desc: Advanced clowntech that can convert any firearm into a far more useful object. It has a small nitrobananium charge on it.
obj.item.firing_pin.clown.ultra.selfdest.name: super ultra hilarious firing pin

obj.item.firing_pin.dna.desc: This is a DNA-locked firing pin which only authorizes one user. Attempt to fire once to DNA-link.
obj.item.firing_pin.dna.name: DNA-keyed firing pin

obj.item.firing_pin.dna.dredd.desc: This is a DNA-locked firing pin which only authorizes one user. Attempt to fire once to DNA-link. It has a small explosive charge on it.
obj.item.firing_pin.dna.dredd.name: DNA-keyed firing pin

obj.item.firing_pin.explorer.desc: A firing pin used by the Australian defense force, retrofit to prevent weapon discharge on the station.
obj.item.firing_pin.explorer.name: outback firing pin

obj.item.firing_pin.implant.desc: This is a security firing pin which only authorizes users who are implanted with a certain device.
obj.item.firing_pin.implant.name: implant-keyed firing pin

obj.item.firing_pin.implant.mindshield.desc: This Security firing pin authorizes the weapon for only mindshield-implanted users.
obj.item.firing_pin.implant.mindshield.name: mindshield firing pin

obj.item.firing_pin.implant.pindicate.desc: This is a security firing pin which only authorizes users who are implanted with a certain device.
obj.item.firing_pin.implant.pindicate.name: syndicate firing pin

obj.item.firing_pin.magic.desc: A small enchanted shard which allows magical weapons to fire.
obj.item.firing_pin.magic.name: magic crystal shard

obj.item.firing_pin.monkey.desc: This firing pin prevents non-monkeys from firing a gun.
obj.item.firing_pin.monkey.name: monkeylock firing pin

obj.item.firing_pin.paywall.desc: A firing pin with a built-in configurable paywall.
obj.item.firing_pin.paywall.name: paywall firing pin

obj.item.firing_pin.paywall.luxury.desc: A firing pin with a built-in configurable paywall.
obj.item.firing_pin.paywall.luxury.name: paywall firing pin

obj.item.firing_pin.permit_pin.desc: A firing pin for a station who can't trust their crew. Only allows you to fire the weapon off-station or with a firearms permit..
obj.item.firing_pin.permit_pin.name: permit-locked firing pin

obj.item.firing_pin.tag.desc: A recreational firing pin, used in laser tag units to ensure users have their vests on.
obj.item.firing_pin.tag.name: laser tag firing pin

obj.item.firing_pin.tag.blue.desc: A recreational firing pin, used in laser tag units to ensure users have their vests on.
obj.item.firing_pin.tag.blue.name: blue laser tag firing pin

obj.item.firing_pin.tag.red.desc: A recreational firing pin, used in laser tag units to ensure users have their vests on.
obj.item.firing_pin.tag.red.name: red laser tag firing pin

obj.item.firing_pin.test_range.desc: This safety firing pin allows weapons to be fired within proximity to a firing range.
obj.item.firing_pin.test_range.name: test-range firing pin

obj.item.firing_pin.wastes.desc: This safety firing pin allows weapons to be fired only outside on the wastes of lavaland or icemoon.
obj.item.firing_pin.wastes.name: Wastes firing pin

obj.item.fish.angelfish.desc: Young Angelfish often live in groups, while adults prefer solitary life. They become territorial and aggressive toward other fish when they reach adulthood.
obj.item.fish.angelfish.name: angelfish

obj.item.fish.arctic_char.desc: A cold-water anadromous fish widespread around the Northern Hemisphere of Earth, yet it has somehow found a way here.
obj.item.fish.arctic_char.name: arctic char

obj.item.fish.armorfish.desc: A small shellfish native to Tizira's oceans, known for its exceptionally hard shell. Consumed similarly to prawns.
obj.item.fish.armorfish.name: armorfish

obj.item.fish.babbelfish.desc: Babbelfish are both visually -and- psychically unsettling - their psychic wails damage the minds of those nearby. The effect is negligible on humans, but deadly for fish. 		It is said that splitting one in two and inserting the pieces into each ear unlocks your psychic potential.
obj.item.fish.babbelfish.name: babbelfish

obj.item.fish.baby_carp.desc: A juvenile spawn of the dreaded space carp. Don't let the innocent looks fool you, they're aggressive little bastards.
obj.item.fish.baby_carp.name: baby space carp

obj.item.fish.boned.desc: What one could mistake for fish remains, is in reality a species that chose to discard its weak flesh a long time ago. A living fossil, in its most literal sense.
obj.item.fish.boned.name: unmarine bonemass

obj.item.fish.bumpy.desc: A misshapen fish-thing all covered in stubby little tendrils.
obj.item.fish.bumpy.name: bump-fish

obj.item.fish.cardinal.desc: Cardinalfish are often found near sea urchins, where the fish hide when threatened.
obj.item.fish.cardinal.name: cardinalfish

obj.item.fish.catfish.desc: A catfish has about 100,000 taste buds, and their bodies are covered with them to help detect chemicals present in the water and also to respond to touch.
obj.item.fish.catfish.name: catfish

obj.item.fish.chainsawfish.desc: A very, very angry bioweapon, whose sole purpose is to rip and tear.
obj.item.fish.chainsawfish.name: chainsawfish

obj.item.fish.chasm_crab.desc: The young of the lobstrosity mature in pools below the earth, eating what falls in until large enough to clamber out. Those found near the station are well-fed.
obj.item.fish.chasm_crab.name: chasm chrab

obj.item.fish.chasm_crab.ice.desc: A subspecies of chasm chrabs that has adapted to the cold climate and lack of abysmal holes of the icemoon.
obj.item.fish.chasm_crab.ice.name: arctic chrab

obj.item.fish.chasm_crab.instant_growth.desc: The young of the lobstrosity mature in pools below the earth, eating what falls in until large enough to clamber out. Those found near the station are well-fed.
obj.item.fish.chasm_crab.instant_growth.name: chasm chrab

obj.item.fish.clownfish.desc: Clownfish catch prey by swimming onto the reef, attracting larger fish, and luring them back to the anemone. The anemone will sting and eat the larger fish, leaving the remains for the clownfish.
obj.item.fish.clownfish.name: clownfish

obj.item.fish.clownfish.lube.desc: A clownfish exposed to cherry-flavored lube for far too long. First discovered the days following a cargo incident around the seas of Europa, when thousands of thousands of thousands...
obj.item.fish.clownfish.lube.name: lubefish

obj.item.fish.dolphish.desc: Strange bloodthirsty apex predator from beyond. A powerful weapon, but it -hates- being held.
obj.item.fish.dolphish.name: walro-dolphish

obj.item.fish.donkfish.desc: A lab-grown donkfish. Its invention was an accident for the most part, as it was intended to be consumed in donk pockets. Unfortunately, it tastes horrible, so it has now become a pseudo-mascot.
obj.item.fish.donkfish.name: donk co. company patent donkfish

obj.item.fish.emulsijack.desc: Ah, the terrifying emulsijack. Created in a laboratory, the only real use of this slimey, scaleless fish is for completely ruining a tank.
obj.item.fish.emulsijack.name: toxic emulsijack

obj.item.fish.firefish.desc: To communicate in the wild, the firefish uses its dorsal fin to alert others of potential danger.
obj.item.fish.firefish.name: firefish goby

obj.item.fish.flumpulus.desc: You can hardly even guess as to how this possibly counts as a fish. Inexplicably, you get the feeling that it could serve as a fantastic way to cushion a fall.
obj.item.fish.flumpulus.name: flumpulus

obj.item.fish.fryish.desc: A youngling of the Fritterish family of <u>delicious</u> extremophile, piscine lifeforms. Just don't tell 'Mankind for Ethical Animal Treatment' you ate it.
obj.item.fish.fryish.name: fryish

obj.item.fish.fryish.fritterish.desc: A <u>deliciously</u> extremophile alien fish. This one looks like a taiyaki.
obj.item.fish.fryish.fritterish.name: fritterish

obj.item.fish.fryish.nessie.desc: A <u>deliciously</u> extremophile alien fish. This one is so big, you could write legends about it.
obj.item.fish.fryish.nessie.name: nessie-fish

obj.item.fish.goldfish.desc: Despite common belief, goldfish do not have three-second memories. 		They can actually remember things that happened up to three months ago.
obj.item.fish.goldfish.name: goldfish

obj.item.fish.goldfish.gill.desc: A great rubber duck tool for Lawyers who can't get a grasp over their case.
obj.item.fish.goldfish.gill.name: McGill

obj.item.fish.goldfish.three_eyes.desc: A goldfish with an extra half a pair of eyes. You wonder what it's been feeding on lately...
obj.item.fish.goldfish.three_eyes.name: three-eyed goldfish

obj.item.fish.goldfish.three_eyes.gill.desc: A great rubber duck tool for Lawyers who can't get a grasp over their case. It looks kinda different today...
obj.item.fish.goldfish.three_eyes.gill.name: McGill

obj.item.fish.greenchromis.desc: The Chromis can vary in color from blue to green depending on the lighting and distance from the lights.
obj.item.fish.greenchromis.name: green chromis

obj.item.fish.gullion.desc: This crystalline fish is actually one of only two known silicon-based lifeforms. 		It avoids death via oxygen-silicate reactions by organically shielding its exterior, allowing the thick scales to calcify into quartz and diamond, at the cost of rendering the fish functionally blind. 		How xenomorphs manage is a complete mystery bordering on bullshit.
obj.item.fish.gullion.name: gullion

obj.item.fish.gunner_jellyfish.desc: So called due to their resemblance to an artillery shell, the gunner jellyfish is native to Tizira, where it is enjoyed as a delicacy. Produces a mild hallucinogen that is destroyed by cooking.
obj.item.fish.gunner_jellyfish.name: gunner jellyfish

obj.item.fish.guppy.desc: Guppy is also known as rainbow fish because of the brightly colored body and fins.
obj.item.fish.guppy.name: guppy

obj.item.fish.holo.desc: A holographic representation of a common goldfish, slowly flickering out, removed from its holo-habitat.
obj.item.fish.holo.name: holographic goldfish

obj.item.fish.holo.angel.desc: A holographic representation of a angelfish. I got nothing snarky to say about this one.
obj.item.fish.holo.angel.name: holographic angelfish

obj.item.fish.holo.checkered.desc: A checkered silhoutte of searing purple and pitch black presents itself before your eyes, like a tear in fabric of reality. It hurts to watch.
obj.item.fish.holo.checkered.name: unrendered holographic fish

obj.item.fish.holo.clown.desc: A holographic representation of a clownfish, or at least how they used to look like five centuries ago.
obj.item.fish.holo.clown.name: holographic clownfish

obj.item.fish.holo.crab.desc: A holographic represantion of a soul-crushingly soulless crab, unlike the cuter ones occasionally roaming around. It stares at you, with empty, beady eyes.
obj.item.fish.holo.crab.name: holographic crab

obj.item.fish.holo.halffish.desc: A holographic representation of... a fish reduced to all bones, except for its head. Isn't it supposed to be dead? Ehr, holo-dead?
obj.item.fish.holo.halffish.name: holographic half-fish

obj.item.fish.holo.puffer.desc: A holographic representation of 100% safe-to-eat pufferfish... that is, if holographic fishes were even edible.
obj.item.fish.holo.puffer.name: holographic pufferfish

obj.item.fish.jumpercable.desc: A surprisingly useful if nasty looking creation from the syndicate fish labs. Drop one in a tank, and 		watch it self-feed and multiply. Generates more and more power as a growing swarm!
obj.item.fish.jumpercable.name: monocloning jumpercable

obj.item.fish.jumpercable.karl.desc: A deadly syndicate monojumper cable saved from the horrors of Nanotrasen by the animal rights consortium. Its been given a new home as a power source for syndicate operations!
obj.item.fish.jumpercable.karl.name: Karl

obj.item.fish.jumpercable.karl.carl.desc: A deadly syndicate monojumper cable saved from the horrors of Nanotrasen by the animal rights consortium. Its been given a new home as a power source for syndicate operations!
obj.item.fish.jumpercable.karl.carl.name: Carl

obj.item.fish.jumpercable.karl.carly.desc: A deadly syndicate monojumper cable saved from the horrors of Nanotrasen by the animal rights consortium. Its been given a new home as a power source for syndicate operations!
obj.item.fish.jumpercable.karl.carly.name: Carly

obj.item.fish.jumpercable.karl.frank.desc: A deadly syndicate monojumper cable saved from the horrors of Nanotrasen by the animal rights consortium. Its been given a new home as a power source for syndicate operations!
obj.item.fish.jumpercable.karl.frank.name: Frank

obj.item.fish.lanternfish.desc: Typically found in areas below 6600 feet below the surface of the ocean, they live in complete darkness.
obj.item.fish.lanternfish.name: lanternfish

obj.item.fish.lavaloop.desc: Due to its curvature, it can be used as make-shift boomerang.
obj.item.fish.lavaloop.name: lavaloop

obj.item.fish.lavaloop.plasma_river.desc: A lavaloop that has evolved to survive in cold liquid plasma. Can be used as make-shift boomerang.
obj.item.fish.lavaloop.plasma_river.name: plasmaloop

obj.item.fish.mastodon.desc: A monster of exposed muscles and innards, wrapped in a fish-like skeleton. You don't remember ever seeing it on the catalog.
obj.item.fish.mastodon.name: unmarine mastodon

obj.item.fish.monkfish.desc: A member of the Lophiid family of anglerfish. It goes by several different names, however none of them will make it look any prettier, nor be any less delicious.
obj.item.fish.monkfish.name: monkfish

obj.item.fish.moonfish.desc: A disc-shaped fish native of the less shallow areas of Tizira's oceans, roughly the size of a tuna. Highly prized in lizard cuisine for their large eggs.
obj.item.fish.moonfish.name: zagoskian moonfish

obj.item.fish.moonfish.dwarf.desc: Ordinarily in the wild, the Zagoskian moonfish is around the size of a tuna, however through selective breeding a smaller breed suitable for being kept as an aquarium pet has been created.
obj.item.fish.moonfish.dwarf.name: dwarf moonfish

obj.item.fish.mossglob.desc: This dreaded, malicious, and nearly unkillable glob of moss is rumoured to be nature's revenge against fishermen.
obj.item.fish.mossglob.name: mossglob

obj.item.fish.needlefish.desc: A tiny, transparent fish which resides in large schools in the oceans of Tizira. A common food for other, larger fish.
obj.item.fish.needlefish.name: needlefish

obj.item.fish.perch.desc: An all around popular panfish, game fish and unfortunate prey to other, bigger predators.
obj.item.fish.perch.name: perch

obj.item.fish.pike.desc: A long-bodied predator with a snout that almost looks like a beak. Definitely not a weapon to swing around.
obj.item.fish.pike.name: pike

obj.item.fish.pike.armored.desc: A long-bodied, metal-clad predator with a snout that almost looks like a halberd. Definitely a weapon to swing around.
obj.item.fish.pike.armored.name: armored pike

obj.item.fish.plaice.desc: Perhaps the most prominent flatfish in the space-market. Nature really pulled out the rolling pin on this one.
obj.item.fish.plaice.name: plaice

obj.item.fish.plasmatetra.desc: Due to their small size, tetras are prey to many predators in their watery world, including eels, crustaceans, and invertebrates.
obj.item.fish.plasmatetra.name: plasma tetra

obj.item.fish.pufferfish.desc: They say that one pufferfish contains enough toxins to kill 30 people, although in the last few decades they've been genetically engineered en masse to be less poisonous.
obj.item.fish.pufferfish.name: pufferfish

obj.item.fish.ratfish.desc: A rat exposed to the murky waters of maintenance too long. Any higher power, if it revealed itself, would state that the ratfish's continued existence is extremely unwelcome.
obj.item.fish.ratfish.name: ratfish

obj.item.fish.sacabambaspis.desc: A jawless fish ought to be extinct by the end of the Ordovician period. Some speculate alien intervention may have been behind its survival and inevitable evolution as a dweller of hot springs.
obj.item.fish.sacabambaspis.name: sacabambaspis

obj.item.fish.sand_crab.desc: A sand-dwelling crustacean. It looks like a crab and tastes like a crab, but waddles like a fish.
obj.item.fish.sand_crab.name: burrower crab

obj.item.fish.sand_surfer.desc: A bronze alien "fish" living and swimming underneath faraway sandy places.
obj.item.fish.sand_surfer.name: sand surfer

obj.item.fish.shrimp.desc: A reddish pink crustacean. How many of them would you have to eat for your skin to turn pink?
obj.item.fish.shrimp.name: shrimp

obj.item.fish.skin_crab.desc: <i>"And on the eighth day, a demential mockery of both humanity and crabity was made."<i> Fascinating.
obj.item.fish.skin_crab.name: skin crab

obj.item.fish.slimefish.desc: Kids, this is what happens when a slime overcomes its hydrophobic nature. It goes glug glug.
obj.item.fish.slimefish.name: aquatic slime

obj.item.fish.sludgefish.desc: A misshapen, fragile, loosely fish-like living goop, the only thing that'd ever thrive in the acidic and claustrophobic cavities of the station's organic waste disposal system.
obj.item.fish.sludgefish.name: sludgefish

obj.item.fish.sludgefish.purple.desc: A misshapen, fragile, loosely fish-like living goop. This one has developed sexual reproduction mechanisms, and a purple tint to boot.
obj.item.fish.sludgefish.purple.name: purple sludgefish

obj.item.fish.sockeye_salmon.desc: A fairly common and iconic salmon endemic of the Pacific Ocean. At some point imported into outer space, where we're now.
obj.item.fish.sockeye_salmon.name: sockeye salmon

obj.item.fish.soul.desc: A distant yet vaguely close critter, like a long lost relative. You feel your soul rejuvenated just from looking at it... Also, what the fuck is this shit?!
obj.item.fish.soul.name: soulfish

obj.item.fish.squid.desc: An elongated mollusk with eight tentacles, natural camouflage and ink clouds to spray at predators. One of the most intelligent, well-equipped invertebrates out there.
obj.item.fish.squid.name: squid

obj.item.fish.starfish.desc: A peculiar, gravity-defying, echinoderm-looking critter from hyperspace.
obj.item.fish.starfish.name: cosmostarfish

obj.item.fish.starfish.chrystarfish.desc: This is what happens when a cosmostarfish sneaks into the bluespace compartment of a hyperspace engine. Very pointy and damaging - leading cause of spaceship explosions in 2554.
obj.item.fish.starfish.chrystarfish.name: chrystarfish

obj.item.fish.stingray.desc: A type of ray, most known for its venomous stinger. Despite that, They're normally docile, if not a bit easily frightened.
obj.item.fish.stingray.name: stingray

obj.item.fish.swordfish.desc: A large billfish, most famous for its elongated bill, while also fairly popular for cooking, and as a fearsome weapon in the hands of a veteran spess-fisherman.
obj.item.fish.swordfish.name: swordfish

obj.item.fish.tadpole.desc: The larval spawn of an amphibian. A very miniscule, round creature with a long tail it uses to swim around.
obj.item.fish.tadpole.name: tadpole

obj.item.fish.zipzap.desc: A fish overflowing with crippling anxiety and electric potential. Worried about the walls of its tank closing in constantly. Both literally and as a general metaphorical unease about life's direction.
obj.item.fish.zipzap.name: anxious zipzap

obj.item.fish_analyzer.desc: A fish-shaped scanner used to monitor fish's status and evolutionary traits.
obj.item.fish_analyzer.name: fish analyzer

obj.item.fish_gene.desc: A single-use injector containing a specific trait that can be used on any (living) fish compatible with it.
obj.item.fish_gene.name: fish trait injector

obj.item.fish_genegun.desc: A device designed to inject or extract traits to and from fish. It takes an empty syringe, which is converted into a fish gene injector once the trait is extracted. Repeated applications may kill the fish.
obj.item.fish_genegun.name: fish gene-gun

obj.item.fish_tank.desc: A more portable sort of aquarium to store various fishes in, unless they're too big or there're too many of them.
obj.item.fish_tank.name: fish tank

obj.item.fish_tank.bluespace.desc: All the capacity of a bulky room aquarium, squeezed in a bag-sized rectangular cuboid.
obj.item.fish_tank.bluespace.name: bluespace fish tank

obj.item.fish_tank.lawyer.desc: A more portable sort of aquarium to store various fishes in, unless they're too big or there're too many of them.
obj.item.fish_tank.lawyer.name: fish tank

obj.item.fish_tank.reproduction.desc: A more portable sort of aquarium to store various fishes in, unless they're too big or there're too many of them.
obj.item.fish_tank.reproduction.name: fish tank

obj.item.fishing_hook.desc: A simple fishing hook. Don't expect to hook onto anything without one.
obj.item.fishing_hook.name: simple fishing hook

obj.item.fishing_hook.bone.desc: A simple hook carved from sharpened bone
obj.item.fishing_hook.bone.name: bone hook

obj.item.fishing_hook.jaws.desc: Despite hints of rust, this gritty beartrap-looking hook looks even more threatening than the real thing. May neptune have mercy of whatever gets caught in its jaws.
obj.item.fishing_hook.jaws.name: jawed hook

obj.item.fishing_hook.magnet.desc: Won't make catching fish any easier, but it might help with looking for other things.
obj.item.fishing_hook.magnet.name: magnetic hook

obj.item.fishing_hook.rescue.desc: An unwieldy hook meant to help with the rescue of those that have fallen down in chasms. You can tell there's no way you'll catch any fish with this, and that it won't be of any use outside of chasms.
obj.item.fishing_hook.rescue.name: rescue hook

obj.item.fishing_hook.shiny.desc: A simple fishing hook. Don't expect to hook onto anything without one.
obj.item.fishing_hook.shiny.name: shiny lure hook

obj.item.fishing_hook.stabilized.desc: A quirky hook that grants the user a better control of the tool, allowing them to move the bait both and up and down when reeling in, otherwise keeping it in place.
obj.item.fishing_hook.stabilized.name: gyro-stabilized hook

obj.item.fishing_hook.weighted.desc: A simple fishing hook. Don't expect to hook onto anything without one.
obj.item.fishing_hook.weighted.name: weighted hook

obj.item.fishing_line.desc: A fishing line. In spite of its simplicity, the added length will make fishing a speck easier.
obj.item.fishing_line.name: fishing line reel

obj.item.fishing_line.auto_reel.desc: A fishing line that automatically spins lures and begins reeling in fish the moment it bites. Also good for hurling things towards you.
obj.item.fishing_line.auto_reel.name: fishing line auto-reel

obj.item.fishing_line.bluespace.desc: A fishing line capable of phasing through the very fabric of reality, along with any hook, bait or anything attached to it.
obj.item.fishing_line.bluespace.name: bluespace fishing line

obj.item.fishing_line.bouncy.desc: This specialized line is much harder to snap.
obj.item.fishing_line.bouncy.name: flexible fishing line reel

obj.item.fishing_line.cloaked.desc: Even harder to notice than the common variety.
obj.item.fishing_line.cloaked.name: cloaked fishing line reel

obj.item.fishing_line.reinforced.desc: Essential for fishing in extreme environments.
obj.item.fishing_line.reinforced.name: reinforced fishing line reel

obj.item.fishing_line.sinew.desc: An all-natural fishing line made of stretched out sinew. A bit stiff, but usable to fish in extreme enviroments.
obj.item.fishing_line.sinew.name: fishing sinew

obj.item.fishing_lure.desc: It's just that, a plastic piece of fishing equipment, yet fish yearn with every last molecule of their bodies to take a bite of it.
obj.item.fishing_lure.name: fishing lure

obj.item.fishing_lure.algae.desc: A soft clump of fake algae. Herbivores love it. Nothing else does, not even omnivores.
obj.item.fishing_lure.algae.name: plastic algae lure

obj.item.fishing_lure.artificial_fly.desc: A fishing lure resembling a large wooly fly. Unlike most other lures, it's fancy enough to catch the interest of picky fish, but only those.
obj.item.fishing_lure.artificial_fly.name: Silkbuzz artificial fly

obj.item.fishing_lure.buzzbait.desc: A metallic, colored clanker attached to a series of cables that somehow attract shock-worthy fish.
obj.item.fishing_lure.buzzbait.name: Electric-Buzz lure

obj.item.fishing_lure.daisy_chain.desc: A lure resembling a small school of fish. Saltwater predators love it, but not much else will.
obj.item.fishing_lure.daisy_chain.name: daisy chain lure

obj.item.fishing_lure.dropping.desc: A fishing lure to catch all sort of slimy, ratty, disgusting and/or junk-loving fish.
obj.item.fishing_lure.dropping.name: plastic dropping

obj.item.fishing_lure.grub.desc: A soft plastic lure with the body of a grub and a twisting tail. Specialized for catching small fish, as long as they aren't herbivores, picky, or picky herbivores.
obj.item.fishing_lure.grub.name: Twister Worm lure

obj.item.fishing_lure.led.desc: A heavy, waterproof and fish-looking LED stick, specialized to catch only nocturnal and deep-dwelling fish.
obj.item.fishing_lure.led.name: LED fishing lure

obj.item.fishing_lure.lucky_coin.desc: A faux-gold lure. Catches the attention of fishies that love shinies. Not nearly tasty-looking enough for anything else.
obj.item.fishing_lure.lucky_coin.name: Maneki-Coin lure

obj.item.fishing_lure.minnow.desc: A fishing lure that may attract small fish. Too tiny, too large, or too picky prey won't be interested in it, though.
obj.item.fishing_lure.minnow.name: artificial minnow

obj.item.fishing_lure.plug.desc: A bigger fishing lure that may attract larger fish. Tiny or picky prey will remain uninterested.
obj.item.fishing_lure.plug.name: artificial plug lure

obj.item.fishing_lure.spinnerbait.desc: A spinny, vulnerable lure, great for attracting freshwater predators, though omnivores won't be interested in it.
obj.item.fishing_lure.spinnerbait.name: spinnerbait lure

obj.item.fishing_lure.spoon.desc: A lustrous piece of metal mimicking the scales of a fish. It specializes in catching small-to-medium-sized fish that live in freshwater.
obj.item.fishing_lure.spoon.name: Indy spoon lure

obj.item.fishing_rod.bone.desc: A humble rod, made with whatever happened to be on hand.
obj.item.fishing_rod.bone.name: bone fishing rod

obj.item.fishing_rod.material.desc: A custom fishing rod from your local autolathe.
obj.item.fishing_rod.material.name: material fishing rod

obj.item.fishing_rod.tech.desc: An embedded universal constructor along with micro-fusion generator makes this marvel of technology never run out of bait. Interstellar treaties prevent using it outside of recreational fishing. And you can fish with this.
obj.item.fishing_rod.tech.name: advanced fishing rod

obj.item.fishing_rod.telescopic.desc: A lightweight, ergonomic, easy to store telescopic fishing rod.
obj.item.fishing_rod.telescopic.name: telescopic fishing rod

obj.item.fishing_rod.telescopic.master.desc: The mythical rod of a lost fisher king. Said to be imbued with unparalleled fishing power. There's writing on the back of the pole. "中国航天制造"
obj.item.fishing_rod.telescopic.master.name: master fishing rod

obj.item.flashlight.eyelight.desc: This shouldn't exist outside of someone's head, how are you seeing this?
obj.item.flashlight.eyelight.name: eyelight

obj.item.flashlight.eyelight.glow.desc: This shouldn't exist outside of someone's head, how are you seeing this?
obj.item.flashlight.eyelight.glow.name: eyelight

obj.item.flashlight.flare.desc: A red Nanotrasen issued flare. There are instructions on the side, it reads 'pull cord, make light'.
obj.item.flashlight.flare.name: flare

obj.item.flashlight.flare.candle.desc: In Greek myth, Prometheus stole fire from the Gods and gave it to 		humankind. The jewelry he kept for himself.
obj.item.flashlight.flare.candle.name: red candle

obj.item.flashlight.flare.candle.cake.desc: In Greek myth, Prometheus stole fire from the Gods and gave it to 		humankind. The jewelry he kept for himself.
obj.item.flashlight.flare.candle.cake.name: red candle

obj.item.flashlight.flare.candle.infinit.desc: In Greek myth, Prometheus stole fire from the Gods and gave it to 		humankind. The jewelry he kept for himself.
obj.item.flashlight.flare.candle.infinit.name: eternal candle

obj.item.flashlight.flare.plasma_project.desc: A burning glob of green plasma, makes an effective temporary lighting source.
obj.item.flashlight.flare.plasma_project.name: plasma flare

obj.item.flashlight.flare.torch.desc: A torch fashioned from some leaves and a log.
obj.item.flashlight.flare.torch.name: torch

obj.item.flashlight.flare.torch.everburn.desc: A torch which burns continuously, even in the vacuum of space
obj.item.flashlight.flare.torch.everburn.name: everburning torch

obj.item.flashlight.flare.torch.on.desc: A torch fashioned from some leaves and a log.
obj.item.flashlight.flare.torch.on.name: torch

obj.item.flashlight.flare.torch.red.desc: A torch fashioned from some leaves and a log.
obj.item.flashlight.flare.torch.red.name: torch

obj.item.flashlight.flare.torch.red.on.desc: A torch fashioned from some leaves and a log.
obj.item.flashlight.flare.torch.red.on.name: torch

obj.item.flashlight.flashdark.desc: A powerful antiphoton projector, capable of projecting a bubble of darkness around the user.
obj.item.flashlight.flashdark.name: flashdark

obj.item.flashlight.lamp.desc: A desk lamp with an adjustable mount.
obj.item.flashlight.lamp.name: desk lamp

obj.item.flashlight.lamp.bananalamp.desc: Only a clown would think to make a ghetto banana-shaped lamp. Even has a goofy pullstring.
obj.item.flashlight.lamp.bananalamp.name: banana lamp

obj.item.flashlight.lamp.space_bubble.desc: A heavy furnace capable of forming a temporary bubble that holds in breathable air.
obj.item.flashlight.lamp.space_bubble.name: space furnace

obj.item.flashlight.lamp.space_bubble.pr.desc: A heavy furnace capable of forming a temporary bubble that holds in breathable air.
obj.item.flashlight.lamp.space_bubble.pr.name: space furnace

obj.item.flashlight.lantern.heirloom_mot.desc: An old lantern that has seen plenty of use.
obj.item.flashlight.lantern.heirloom_mot.name: old lantern

obj.item.flashlight.pen.desc: A pen-sized light, used by medical staff. It can also be used to create a hologram to alert people of incoming medical assistance.
obj.item.flashlight.pen.name: penlight

obj.item.flashlight.pen.paramedic.desc: A high-powered UV penlight intended to help stave off infection in the field on serious burned patients. Probably really bad to look into.
obj.item.flashlight.pen.paramedic.name: paramedic penlight

obj.item.flashlight.seclite.desc: A robust flashlight used by security.
obj.item.flashlight.seclite.name: seclite

obj.item.flashlight.seclite.implant.desc: A robust bulb from a seclite installed at the base of your palm. Flex arm and press lens in to toggle.
obj.item.flashlight.seclite.implant.name: implanted seclite

obj.item.flashlight.slime.desc: Extract from a yellow slime. It emits a strong light when squeezed.
obj.item.flashlight.slime.name: glowing slime extract

obj.item.flatpack.desc: A box containing a compactly packed machine. Use multitool to deploy.
obj.item.flatpack.name: flatpack

obj.item.flatpack.export_gate.desc: A box containing a compactly packed machine. Use multitool to deploy.
obj.item.flatpack.export_gate.name: bounty cube export gate

obj.item.flatpack.flatpacker.desc: A box containing a compactly packed machine. Use multitool to deploy.
obj.item.flatpack.flatpacker.name: flatpacker

obj.item.flatpack.mailsorter.desc: A box containing a compactly packed machine. Use multitool to deploy.
obj.item.flatpack.mailsorter.name: mail sorter

obj.item.flatpack.materials_market.desc: A box containing a compactly packed machine. Use multitool to deploy.
obj.item.flatpack.materials_market.name: materials import market

obj.item.flatpack.shuttle_engine.desc: A box containing a compactly packed machine. Use multitool to deploy.
obj.item.flatpack.shuttle_engine.name: shuttle propulsion engine

obj.item.flesh_shears.desc: Uses shearing action and growth inducers to reshape your coworkers external features!
obj.item.flesh_shears.name: flesh reshaper

obj.item.flesh_shears.medical.desc: Uses shearing action and growth inducers to reshape your coworkers external features!
obj.item.flesh_shears.medical.name: flesh reshaper

obj.item.folded_navigation_gigabeacon.desc: A compact radio navigation gigabeacon, a device used to provide shuttle navigation waypoints in unexplored areas. Must be deployed before use.
obj.item.folded_navigation_gigabeacon.name: compact radio navigation gigabeacon

obj.item.folder.biscuit.desc: A biscuit card. On the back, DO NOT DIGEST is printed in large lettering.
obj.item.folder.biscuit.name: biscuit card

obj.item.folder.biscuit.confidential.desc: A confidential biscuit card. The tasteful blue color and NT logo on the front makes it look a little like a chocolate bar. On the back, DO NOT DIGEST is printed in large lettering.
obj.item.folder.biscuit.confidential.name: confidential biscuit card

obj.item.folder.biscuit.confidential.eme.desc: A confidential biscuit card. The tasteful blue color and NT logo on the front makes it look a little like a chocolate bar. On the back, DO NOT DIGEST is printed in large lettering.
obj.item.folder.biscuit.confidential.eme.name: spare emergency ID safe code biscuit card

obj.item.folder.biscuit.confidential.spa.desc: A confidential biscuit card. The tasteful blue color and NT logo on the front makes it look a little like a chocolate bar. On the back, DO NOT DIGEST is printed in large lettering.
obj.item.folder.biscuit.confidential.spa.name: spare ID safe code biscuit card

obj.item.folder.biscuit.unsealed.desc: A biscuit card. On the back, DO NOT DIGEST is printed in large lettering.
obj.item.folder.biscuit.unsealed.name: biscuit card

obj.item.folder.biscuit.unsealed.confide.desc: A confidential biscuit card. The tasteful blue color and NT logo on the front makes it look a little like a chocolate bar. On the back, DO NOT DIGEST is printed in large lettering.
obj.item.folder.biscuit.unsealed.confide.name: confidential biscuit card

obj.item.folder.documents.desc: A folder stamped "Top Secret - Property of Nanotrasen Corporation. Unauthorized distribution is punishable by death."
obj.item.folder.documents.name: folder- 'TOP SECRET'

obj.item.folder.syndicate.desc: A folder stamped "Top Secret - Property of The Syndicate."
obj.item.folder.syndicate.name: folder- 'TOP SECRET'

obj.item.folder.syndicate.blue.desc: A folder stamped "Top Secret - Property of The Syndicate."
obj.item.folder.syndicate.blue.name: folder- 'TOP SECRET'

obj.item.folder.syndicate.red.desc: A folder stamped "Top Secret - Property of The Syndicate."
obj.item.folder.syndicate.red.name: folder- 'TOP SECRET'

obj.item.food.ant_candy.desc: A colony of ants suspended in hardened sugar. Those things are dead, right?
obj.item.food.ant_candy.name: ant candy

obj.item.food.baba_ghanoush.desc: A thick dip made from mashed eggplant, olive oil, garlic, and lemon juice with some pita bread for dipping. You'll either love it or hate it.
obj.item.food.baba_ghanoush.name: baba ghanoush

obj.item.food.badrecipe.desc: Someone should be demoted from cook for this.
obj.item.food.badrecipe.name: burned mess

obj.item.food.badrecipe.moldy.desc: A rancid, disgusting culture of mold and ants. Somewhere under there, at some point, there was food.
obj.item.food.badrecipe.moldy.name: moldy mess

obj.item.food.badrecipe.moldy.bacteria.desc: Not only is this rancid lump of disgusting bile crawling with insect life, but it is also teeming with various microscopic cultures. It moves when you're not looking.
obj.item.food.badrecipe.moldy.bacteria.name: bacteria rich moldy mess

obj.item.food.bait.doughball.desc: Small piece of dough. Simple but effective fishing bait.
obj.item.food.bait.doughball.name: doughball

obj.item.food.bait.doughball.synthetic.desc: Small piece of dough. Simple but effective fishing bait.
obj.item.food.bait.doughball.synthetic.name: synthetic doughball

obj.item.food.bait.doughball.synthetic.s.desc: Be they herbivore or carnivores, no fish will be able to resist this.
obj.item.food.bait.doughball.synthetic.s.name: super-doughball

obj.item.food.bait.doughball.synthetic.u.desc: Small piece of dough. Simple but effective fishing bait.
obj.item.food.bait.doughball.synthetic.u.name: synthetic doughball

obj.item.food.bait.natural.desc: Fish can't seem to get enough of this!
obj.item.food.bait.natural.name: natural bait

obj.item.food.bait.worm.desc: It's a wriggling worm from a can of fishing bait. You're not going to eat it, are you?
obj.item.food.bait.worm.name: worm

obj.item.food.baked_cheese.desc: A baked cheese wheel, melty and delicious.
obj.item.food.baked_cheese.name: baked cheese wheel

obj.item.food.baked_cheese_platter.desc: A baked cheese wheel: a mothic favourite for sharing. Usually served with crispy bread slices for dipping, 		because the only thing better than good cheese is good cheese on bread.
obj.item.food.baked_cheese_platter.name: stanntkraktælo

obj.item.food.baked_kiri.desc: A kiri fruit baked in an oven, causing the jelly inside to caramelize into a jelly donut-like crispy treat. Try not to get addicted.
obj.item.food.baked_kiri.name: baked kiri fruit

obj.item.food.baked_muli.desc: A muli pod baked in an oven, causing the minty liquid inside to condense and the exterior to soften, giving the vegetable a hard-boiled egg consistency. Remarkably tasty and healthy!
obj.item.food.baked_muli.name: baked muli pod

obj.item.food.baked_potato.desc: A piping hot potato baked in an oven. A bit bland by itself.
obj.item.food.baked_potato.name: baked potato

obj.item.food.ballpark_pretzel.desc: A classic German bread, transformed by the hand of American imperialism into a game-day snack, and then carried to the Red Planet on the backs of Japanese settlers. How multicultural.
obj.item.food.ballpark_pretzel.name: ballpark pretzel

obj.item.food.banana_fritter.desc: A ubiquitous sweet snack from much of Maritime South-East Asia, the banana fritter has many names, but all share a similar style- banana, coated in batter, and fried.
obj.item.food.banana_fritter.name: banana fritter

obj.item.food.bbqribs.desc: BBQ ribs, slathered in a healthy coating of BBQ sauce. The least vegan thing to ever exist.
obj.item.food.bbqribs.name: bbq ribs

obj.item.food.bearsteak.desc: Because eating bear wasn't manly enough.
obj.item.food.bearsteak.name: filet migrawr

obj.item.food.bechamel_sauce.desc: A classic white sauce common to several European cultures.
obj.item.food.bechamel_sauce.name: béchamel sauce

obj.item.food.beef_stroganoff.desc: A Russian dish that consists of beef and sauce. Really popular in Japan, or at least that's what my animes would allude to.
obj.item.food.beef_stroganoff.name: beef stroganoff

obj.item.food.beef_wellington.desc: A luxurious log of beef, covered in a fine mushroom duxelle and pancetta ham, then bound in puff pastry.
obj.item.food.beef_wellington.name: beef wellington

obj.item.food.beef_wellington_slice.desc: A slice of beef wellington, topped with a rich gravy. Simply delicious.
obj.item.food.beef_wellington_slice.name: beef wellington slice

obj.item.food.benedict.desc: There is only one egg on this, how rude.
obj.item.food.benedict.name: eggs benedict

obj.item.food.big_baked_rice.desc: A mothic favourite, baked rice can be filled with a variety of vegetable fillings to make a delicious meal to share. 		Potatoes are also often layered on the bottom of the cooking vessel to create a flavourful crust which is hotly contested amongst diners.
obj.item.food.big_baked_rice.name: big baked rice

obj.item.food.bignekoroll.desc: A fistful of rice with a crude cat face on it. It's got a fishy scent, too.
obj.item.food.bignekoroll.name: nekobara roll

obj.item.food.black_eggs.desc: A country dish from rural Tizira. Made with eggs, blood, and foraged greens. Traditionally eaten with rootbread and a spicy sauce.
obj.item.food.black_eggs.name: black scrambled eggs

obj.item.food.bluefeather_crisp.desc: A spiced cracker made of flattened, dried piru bread. The name comes from the blue stain often left on feathers when eaten with muli dip.
obj.item.food.bluefeather_crisp.name: bluefeather crisp

obj.item.food.bluefeather_crisps_and_dip.desc: Bluefeather crisp crackers, now with dip made of muli juice and tomatoes. The name comes from the blue stain often left on feathers when dripped onto them.
obj.item.food.bluefeather_crisps_and_dip.name: bluefeather crisps and dip

obj.item.food.boh_loh_yah.desc: Confusingly referred to as a "pineapple bun", this Hong Konger treat contains no actual pineapple- instead, it's a sugar-cookie like bun with a butter filling.
obj.item.food.boh_loh_yah.name: boh loh yah

obj.item.food.boiledrice.desc: A steaming cup of boiled rice. A bit bland by itself, but the basis for something delicious...
obj.item.food.boiledrice.name: boiled rice

obj.item.food.boiledspiderleg.desc: A giant spider's leg that's still twitching after being cooked. Gross!
obj.item.food.boiledspiderleg.name: boiled spider leg

obj.item.food.bonbon.caramel_truffle.desc: A bite-sized chocolate truffle with a chewy caramel filling.
obj.item.food.bonbon.caramel_truffle.name: caramel truffle

obj.item.food.bonbon.chocolate_truffle.desc: A bite-sized chocolate truffle with a rich chocolate mousse filling.
obj.item.food.bonbon.chocolate_truffle.name: chocolate truffle

obj.item.food.bonbon.peanut_butter_cup.desc: An ultra-sweet chocolate treat with a savory peanut butter filling.
obj.item.food.bonbon.peanut_butter_cup.name: peanut butter cup

obj.item.food.bonbon.peanut_truffle.desc: A bite-sized chocolate truffle with crunchy peanuts mixed in.
obj.item.food.bonbon.peanut_truffle.name: peanut truffle

obj.item.food.bowled.fried_eggplant_pole.desc: Polenta loaded with cheese, served with a few discs of fried eggplant and some tomato sauce. Lække!
obj.item.food.bowled.fried_eggplant_pole.name: fried eggplant and polenta

obj.item.food.bowled.hua_mulan_congee.desc: Nobody is quite sure why this smiley bowl of rice porridge with eggs and bacon is named after a mythological Chinese figure- 		it's just sorta what it's always been called.
obj.item.food.bowled.hua_mulan_congee.name: Hua Mulan congee

obj.item.food.bowled.mammi.desc: A bowl of mushy bread and milk. It reminds you, not too fondly, of a bowel movement.
obj.item.food.bowled.mammi.name: mammi

obj.item.food.bowled.spacylibertyduff.desc: Jello gelatin, from Alfred Hubbard's cookbook.
obj.item.food.bowled.spacylibertyduff.name: spacy liberty duff

obj.item.food.brain_pate.desc: A thick pink puree made from finely chopped poached eyeballs and brains, fried onions, and fat. Lizards swear it's delicious!
obj.item.food.brain_pate.name: eyeball-and-brain pate

obj.item.food.branrequests.desc: A dry cereal that satiates your requests for bran. Tastes uniquely like raisins and salt.
obj.item.food.branrequests.name: bran requests cereal

obj.item.food.brat_kimchi.desc: Fried kimchi, mixed with sugar and topped with bratwurst. A popular dish at izakayas on Mars.
obj.item.food.brat_kimchi.name: brat-kimchi

obj.item.food.bread.desc: You shouldn't see this, call the coders.
obj.item.food.bread.name: bread?

obj.item.food.bread.corn.desc: Some good down-home country-style, rootin'-tootin', revolver-shootin', dad-gum yeehaw cornbread.
obj.item.food.bread.corn.name: cornbread

obj.item.food.bread.empty.desc: It's bread, customized to your wildest dreams.
obj.item.food.bread.empty.name: bread

obj.item.food.bread.meat.desc: The culinary base of every self-respecting eloquen/tg/entleman.
obj.item.food.bread.meat.name: meatbread loaf

obj.item.food.bread.reispan.desc: Though the concept of rice bread has been common in Asia for centuries, the reispan as we know it today is most commonly associated with Mars- where limited arable land has forced ingenuity.
obj.item.food.bread.reispan.name: reispan

obj.item.food.bread.root.desc: The lizard equivalent to bread, made from tubers like potatoes and yams mixed with ground nuts and seeds. Noticeably denser than regular bread.
obj.item.food.bread.root.name: rootbread

obj.item.food.bread.root.egg.desc: The lizard equivalent to bread, made from tubers like potatoes and yams mixed with ground nuts and seeds. Noticeably denser than regular bread.
obj.item.food.bread.root.egg.name: rootbread

obj.item.food.bread.sausage.desc: Don't think too much about it.
obj.item.food.bread.sausage.name: sausagebread loaf

obj.item.food.bread.spidermeat.desc: Reassuringly green meatloaf made from spider meat.
obj.item.food.bread.spidermeat.name: spider meat loaf

obj.item.food.bread.tofu.desc: Like meatbread but for vegetarians. Not guaranteed to give superpowers.
obj.item.food.bread.tofu.name: tofubread

obj.item.food.bread.xenomeat.desc: The culinary base of every self-respecting eloquen/tg/entleman. Extra Heretical.
obj.item.food.bread.xenomeat.name: xenomeatbread loaf

obj.item.food.breadslice.desc: You shouldn't see this, call the coders.
obj.item.food.breadslice.name: breadslice?

obj.item.food.breadslice.banana.desc: A slice of delicious banana bread.
obj.item.food.breadslice.banana.name: banana-nut bread slice

obj.item.food.breadslice.corn.desc: A chunk of crispy, cowboy-style cornbread. Consume contentedly.
obj.item.food.breadslice.corn.name: cornbread slice

obj.item.food.breadslice.empty.desc: It's a slice of bread, customized to your wildest dreams.
obj.item.food.breadslice.empty.name: bread slice

obj.item.food.breadslice.moldy.desc: Entire stations have been ripped apart arguing whether this is still good to eat.
obj.item.food.breadslice.moldy.name: moldy 'bread' slice

obj.item.food.breadslice.moldy.bacteria.desc: Something (possibly necroyeast) has caused this bread to rise in a macabre state of unlife. 		It lurchs about when unattended. You might want to locate a priest if you see this. Or maybe a flamethrower.
obj.item.food.breadslice.moldy.bacteria.name: bacteria-rich moldy 'bread' slice

obj.item.food.breadslice.piru.desc: A slice of stretchy piru bread.
obj.item.food.breadslice.piru.name: piru bread slice

obj.item.food.breadslice.reispan.desc: A slice of reispan, for use in Martian-style sandwiches.
obj.item.food.breadslice.reispan.name: reispan slice

obj.item.food.breadslice.root.desc: A slice of dense, chewy rootbread.
obj.item.food.breadslice.root.name: rootbread slice

obj.item.food.breadslice.root.egg.desc: A slice of dense, chewy rootbread.
obj.item.food.breadslice.root.egg.name: rootbread slice

obj.item.food.breadslice.spidermeat.desc: A slice of meatloaf made from an animal that most likely still wants you dead.
obj.item.food.breadslice.spidermeat.name: spider meat bread slice

obj.item.food.breadslice.xenomeat.desc: A slice of delicious meatbread. Extra Heretical.
obj.item.food.breadslice.xenomeat.name: xenomeatbread slice

obj.item.food.breadstick.desc: A delicious, buttery breadstick. Highly addictive, but oh-so worth it.
obj.item.food.breadstick.name: breadstick

obj.item.food.brownie.desc: A square slice of delicious, chewy brownie. Often the target of potheads.
obj.item.food.brownie.name: brownie

obj.item.food.brownie_sheet.desc: An uncut sheet of cooked brownie, use a knife to cut it!.
obj.item.food.brownie_sheet.name: brownie sheet

obj.item.food.bubblegum.desc: A rubbery strip of gum. Not exactly filling, but it keeps you busy.
obj.item.food.bubblegum.name: bubblegum

obj.item.food.bubblegum.bubblegum.desc: A rubbery strip of gum. You don't feel like eating it is a good idea.
obj.item.food.bubblegum.bubblegum.name: bubblegum gum

obj.item.food.bubblegum.happiness.desc: A rubbery strip of gum. It smells funny.
obj.item.food.bubblegum.happiness.name: HP+ gum

obj.item.food.bubblegum.nicotine.desc: A rubbery strip of gum. Not exactly filling, but it keeps you busy.
obj.item.food.bubblegum.nicotine.name: nicotine gum

obj.item.food.bubblegum.wake_up.desc: A rubbery strip of gum. It's stamped with the emblem of the Mothic Nomad Fleet.
obj.item.food.bubblegum.wake_up.name: wake-up gum

obj.item.food.bun.desc: A base for any self-respecting burger.
obj.item.food.bun.name: bun

obj.item.food.burger.baconburger.desc: The perfect combination of all things American.
obj.item.food.burger.baconburger.name: bacon burger

obj.item.food.burger.baseball.desc: It's still warm. The steam coming off of it looks like baseball.
obj.item.food.burger.baseball.name: home run baseball burger

obj.item.food.burger.big_blue.desc: The original and best Big Blue, straight outta Mars' favourite burger joint. Catch the wave, brother!
obj.item.food.burger.big_blue.name: Big Blue burger

obj.item.food.burger.bigbite.desc: Forget the Big Mac. THIS is the future!
obj.item.food.burger.bigbite.name: big bite burger

obj.item.food.burger.brain.desc: A strange looking burger. It looks almost sentient.
obj.item.food.burger.brain.name: brainburger

obj.item.food.burger.catburger.desc: Finally those cats and catpeople are worth something!
obj.item.food.burger.catburger.name: catburger

obj.item.food.burger.chappy.desc: Originally born of a night of drinking in a Big Blue Burger's kitchen, the Chappy patty has since become a staple of both Big Blue's menu and Hawaiian (or at least, faux-Hawaiian) cuisine galaxy-wide. Given Big Kahuna operates most of its stores on Mars, it's perhaps no wonder this dish is popular there.
obj.item.food.burger.chappy.name: Chappy patty

obj.item.food.burger.cheese.desc: This noble burger stands proudly clad in golden cheese.
obj.item.food.burger.cheese.name: cheese burger

obj.item.food.burger.crab.desc: A delicious patty of the crabby kind, slapped in between a bun.
obj.item.food.burger.crab.name: crab burger

obj.item.food.burger.crazy.desc: This looks like the sort of food that a demented clown in a trenchcoat would make.
obj.item.food.burger.crazy.name: crazy hamburger

obj.item.food.burger.empoweredburger.desc: It's shockingly good, if you live off of electricity that is.
obj.item.food.burger.empoweredburger.name: empowered burger

obj.item.food.burger.empty.desc: A crazy, custom burger made by a mad cook.
obj.item.food.burger.empty.name: burger

obj.item.food.burger.fish.desc: Almost like a carp is yelling somewhere... Give me back that fillet -o- carp, give me that carp.
obj.item.food.burger.fish.name: fillet -o- carp sandwich

obj.item.food.caprese_salad.name: caprese salad

obj.item.food.cheese.curd_cheese.name: curd cheese

obj.item.food.cheese.royal.name: royal cheese

obj.item.food.cheese.wheel.name: cheese wheel

obj.item.food.cheese_pierogi.name: cheese pierogi

obj.item.food.cheesiehonkers.desc: Bite sized cheesie snacks that will honk all over your mouth.

obj.item.food.cheesyburrito.name: cheesy burrito

obj.item.food.cheesynachos.name: cheesy nachos

obj.item.food.cherrycupcake.name: cherry cupcake

obj.item.food.cherrycupcake.blue.name: blue cherry cupcake

obj.item.food.chips.shrimp.desc: Deep-fried, shrimp flavored chips. A favorite junkfood among seafood connoisseurs!
obj.item.food.chips.shrimp.name: shrimp chips

obj.item.food.chipsandsalsa.desc: Some tortilla chips with a cup of zesty salsa. Highly addictive!
obj.item.food.chipsandsalsa.name: chips and salsa

obj.item.food.chococoin.desc: A completely edible but non-flippable festive coin.

obj.item.food.chococornet.name: chocolate cornet

obj.item.food.classic_hard_shell_taco.name: classic hard-shell taco

obj.item.food.clothing.desc: If you're reading this it means I messed up. This is related to moths eating clothes and I didn't know a better way to do it than making a new food object. <--- stinky idiot wrote this
obj.item.food.clothing.name: temporary moth clothing snack item

obj.item.food.cnds.desc: Legally, we cannot say that these won't melt in your hands.

obj.item.food.cnds.random.name: mystery filled C&Ds

obj.item.food.colonial_course.desc: Something you shouldn't see. But it's edible.
obj.item.food.colonial_course.name: undefined colonial course

obj.item.food.colonial_course.blins.desc:
A vacuum-sealed four-pack of stuffed crepes with a minimal amount of markings. There is nothing else to it, to be frank.
Surprisingly tasty for its looks, as long as you're not lactose intolerant, on diet, or vegan. The back of the packaging is covered in a mass of information detailing the product.
obj.item.food.colonial_course.blins.name: condensed milk crepes

obj.item.food.colonial_course.nachos.desc:
A vacuum-sealed package with what seems to be a generous serving of triangular corn chips, with three sections reserved for a salsa, cheese and guacamole sauces.
Probably the best-looking food you can find in these rations, perhaps due to its simplicity.
obj.item.food.colonial_course.nachos.name: plain nachos tray

obj.item.food.colonial_course.pljeskavic.desc:
Freshly-printed steaming hot burger consisting of a biogenerator-produced handcraft-imitating buns, with a minced meat patty inbetween, among various vegetables and sauces.
Looks good enough for something as replicated as this. Its packaging is covered in copious amounts of information on its nutritional facts, contents and the expiry date. Sadly, it's all written in Pan-Slavic.
obj.item.food.colonial_course.pljeskavic.name: pljeskavica

obj.item.food.cookie.chocolate_chip_cook.desc: A delightful-smelling chocolate chip cookie. Where's the milk?

obj.item.food.cookie.peanut_butter.name: peanut butter cookie

obj.item.food.cookie.raisin.desc: Why would you put raisins on a cookie?
obj.item.food.cookie.raisin.name: raisin cookie

obj.item.food.cookie.shortbread.desc: A rectangular piece of cooked flour. Said to control the sun during Hogmanay.
obj.item.food.cookie.shortbread.name: shortbread

obj.item.food.cookie.snickerdoodle.desc: A soft cookie made from vanilla and cinnamon.
obj.item.food.cookie.snickerdoodle.name: snickerdoodle

obj.item.food.cookie.sugar.desc: Just like your little sister used to make.
obj.item.food.cookie.sugar.name: sugar cookie

obj.item.food.cookie.sugar.spookycoffin.desc: Spooky! It's got delicious coffee flavouring!
obj.item.food.cookie.sugar.spookycoffin.name: coffin cookie

obj.item.food.cookie.sugar.spookyskull.desc: Spooky! It's got delicious calcium flavouring!
obj.item.food.cookie.sugar.spookyskull.name: skull cookie

obj.item.food.cookie.thumbprint_cookie.desc: A cookie with a thumb-sized indent in the middle made for fillings. This one is filled with cherry jelly
obj.item.food.cookie.thumbprint_cookie.name: thumbprint cookie

obj.item.food.cornchips.desc: Triangular corn chips. They do seem a bit bland but would probably go well with some kind of dipping sauce.
obj.item.food.cornchips.name: Boritos corn chips

obj.item.food.cornchips.blue.desc: Which came first, ranch or cool ranch?
obj.item.food.cornchips.blue.name: Coolest Ranch Boritos corn chips

obj.item.food.cornchips.green.desc: It has the salsa baked in, so you don't need dip.
obj.item.food.cornchips.green.name: Spess Salsa Boritos corn chips

obj.item.food.cornchips.purple.desc: The only flavour that actually tastes spicy like proper nachos.
obj.item.food.cornchips.purple.name: Spicy Sweet Chili Boritos corn chips

obj.item.food.cornchips.random.desc: Filled with one of four delicious flavours!
obj.item.food.cornchips.random.name: Boritos cornchips

obj.item.food.cornchips.red.desc: Notorious for helping cover everything you touch in orange cheese dust.
obj.item.food.cornchips.red.name: Nacho Cheese Boritos corn chips

obj.item.food.cornedbeef.desc: Now you can feel like a real tourist vacationing in Ireland.
obj.item.food.cornedbeef.name: corned beef and cabbage

obj.item.food.cornuto.desc: A neapolitan vanilla and chocolate ice cream cone. It menaces with a sprinkling of caramelized nuts.
obj.item.food.cornuto.name: cornuto

obj.item.food.crab_rangoon.desc: Has many names, like crab puffs, cheese won'tons, crab dumplings? Whatever you call them, they're a fabulous blast of cream cheesy crab.
obj.item.food.crab_rangoon.name: crab rangoon

obj.item.food.crispy_headcheese.desc: A delicious snack from the streets of Zagoskeld, consisting of headcheese coated in rootbread breadcrumbs. Commonly served with fries.
obj.item.food.crispy_headcheese.name: crispy breaded headcheese

obj.item.food.croissant.desc: A delicious, buttery croissant. The perfect start to the day.
obj.item.food.croissant.name: croissant

obj.item.food.croissant.throwing.desc: A delicious, buttery croissant. The perfect start to the day.
obj.item.food.croissant.throwing.name: croissant

obj.item.food.croque_martienne.desc: The quintessential Martian breakfast sandwich. Egg, belly pork, pineapple, cheese. Simple. Classic. Available in every cafe across New Osaka.
obj.item.food.croque_martienne.name: croque-martienne

obj.item.food.crunchy_peanut_butter_tart.desc: A miniature pie with a peanut butter filling, creamy icing, and topping of chopped nuts.
obj.item.food.crunchy_peanut_butter_tart.name: crunchy peanut butter tart

obj.item.food.cubancarp.desc: A grifftastic sandwich that burns your tongue and then leaves it numb!
obj.item.food.cubancarp.name: Cuban carp

obj.item.food.danish_hotdog.desc: Appetizing bun, with a sausage in the middle, covered with sauce, fried onion and pickles rings
obj.item.food.danish_hotdog.name: danish hotdog

obj.item.food.deadbanana_spider.desc: Thank god it's gone...but it does look slippery.
obj.item.food.deadbanana_spider.name: dead banana spider

obj.item.food.deadmouse.desc: They look like somebody dropped the bass on it. A lizard's favorite meal.
obj.item.food.deadmouse.name: dead mouse

obj.item.food.deadmouse.moldy.desc: A dead rodent, consumed by mold and rot. There is a slim chance that a lizard might still eat it.
obj.item.food.deadmouse.moldy.name: moldy dead mouse

obj.item.food.donkpocket.desc: The food of choice for the seasoned traitor.
obj.item.food.donkpocket.name: Donk-pocket

obj.item.food.donkpocket.berry.name: Berry-pocket

obj.item.food.donkpocket.dank.desc: The food of choice for the seasoned botanist.
obj.item.food.donkpocket.dank.name: Dank-pocket

obj.item.food.donkpocket.deluxe.nocarb.name: Meat-pocket

obj.item.food.donkpocket.deluxe.vegan.name: Donk-roll

obj.item.food.donkpocket.gondola.desc: The choice to use real gondola meat in the recipe is controversial, to say the least.

obj.item.food.donkpocket.homemade.name: Donk-pocket

obj.item.food.donkpocket.warm.honk.name: warm Honk-pocket

obj.item.food.donkpocket.warm.pizza.name: warm Pizza-pocket
