obj.item.food.doughslice.name: dough slice

obj.item.food.drug.meth_crystal.desc: A clear, sad, fake looking crystal substance.
obj.item.food.drug.meth_crystal.name: crystal meth

obj.item.food.drug.moon_rock.desc:
A small hard lump of kronkaine freebase.
It is said the average kronkaine addict causes as much criminal damage as four cat burglars, two arsonists and one rabid pit bull terrier combined.

Notorious in the medical community for causing dangerous interactions with purging meds!
obj.item.food.drug.moon_rock.name: moon rock

obj.item.food.drug.opium.desc: A little of it, taken as much as a grain of ervum is a pain-easer, and a sleep-causer, and a digester... 	but being drank too much it hurts, making spacemen lethargical, and it kills.
obj.item.food.drug.opium.name: opium

obj.item.food.drug.saturnx.desc:
A congealed glob of pure saturnX.
This compound was first discovered during the infancy of cloaking technology and at the time thought to be a promising candidate agent. It was withdrawn for consideration after the researchers discovered a slew of associated safety issues including thought disorders and hepatoxicity.
It has since attained some limited popularity as a street drug.
obj.item.food.drug.saturnx.name: saturnX glob

obj.item.food.egg.fertile.desc:
An egg! It looks fertilized.
Quite how you can tell this just by looking at it is a mystery.
obj.item.food.egg.fertile.name: fertile-looking egg

obj.item.food.egg.organic.desc: A 100% natural egg from the best hens.
obj.item.food.egg.organic.name: organic egg

obj.item.food.egg.raptor_egg.desc: An uneven egg with a rough, thick shell.
obj.item.food.egg.raptor_egg.name: raptor egg

obj.item.food.egg.watcher.desc: A lonely egg still pulsing with life, somehow untouched by the corruption of the Necropolis.
obj.item.food.egg.watcher.name: watcher egg

obj.item.food.eggplantparm.desc: The only good recipe for eggplant.
obj.item.food.eggplantparm.name: eggplant parmigiana

obj.item.food.eggsausage.desc: A good egg with a side of sausages.
obj.item.food.eggsausage.name: egg with sausage

obj.item.food.eggwrap.desc: The precursor to Pigs in a Blanket.
obj.item.food.eggwrap.name: egg wrap

obj.item.food.emperor_roll.desc: A popular sandwich on Tizira, named in honour of the Imperial family.
obj.item.food.emperor_roll.name: emperor roll

obj.item.food.energybar.desc: An energy bar with a lot of punch, you probably shouldn't eat this if you're not an Ethereal.
obj.item.food.energybar.name: High-power energy bars

obj.item.food.engine_fodder.desc: A common snack for engineers on the mothic fleet, made of seeds, nuts, chocolate, popcorn, and potato chips- 		designed to be dense with calories and easy to snack on when an extra boost is needed.
obj.item.food.engine_fodder.name: engine fodder

obj.item.food.epok_epok.desc: A fried pastry snack from Malaysia, which migrated via Singapore into the Martian diet. Stuffed with curried chicken and potatoes, alongside a slice of hard boiled egg, it's a popular street food on the Red Planet.
obj.item.food.epok_epok.name: epok-epok

obj.item.food.falafel.desc: Beans, herbs, onions, and garlic mashed together and formed into a ball, then deep-fried. The herbs give the interior a unique green color.
obj.item.food.falafel.name: falafel

obj.item.food.feizhou_ji.desc: Considered a Macanese variant on piri-piri, fēizhōu jī, or galinha à africana, or African chicken (if you're feeling like speaking Common), is a popular dish in the TID, and subsequently also on Mars due to its influx of Macanese settlers.
obj.item.food.feizhou_ji.name: fēizhōu jī

obj.item.food.fiesta_corn_skillet.desc: Sweet, spicy, saucy, and all kinds of corny.
obj.item.food.fiesta_corn_skillet.name: fiesta corn skillet

obj.item.food.fish_poke.desc: Simple poke, rice on the bottom, vegetables and fish on top. Should be mixed before eating.
obj.item.food.fish_poke.name: fish poke

obj.item.food.fishandchips.desc: I do say so myself chap.
obj.item.food.fishandchips.name: fish and chips

obj.item.food.fishfry.desc: All that and no bag of chips...
obj.item.food.fishfry.name: fish fry

obj.item.food.fishmeat.desc: A fillet of some fish meat.
obj.item.food.fishmeat.name: fish fillet

obj.item.food.fishmeat.armorfish.desc: An armorfish with its guts and shell removed, ready for use in cooking.
obj.item.food.fishmeat.armorfish.name: cleaned armorfish

obj.item.food.fishmeat.carp.desc: A fillet of spess carp meat.
obj.item.food.fishmeat.carp.name: carp fillet

obj.item.food.fishmeat.carp.imitation.desc: Almost just like the real thing, kinda.
obj.item.food.fishmeat.carp.imitation.name: imitation carp fillet

obj.item.food.fishmeat.carp.no_tox.desc: A fillet of spess carp meat.
obj.item.food.fishmeat.carp.no_tox.name: carp fillet

obj.item.food.fishmeat.donkfish.desc: The dreaded donkfish fillet. No sane spaceman would eat this, and it does not get better when cooked.
obj.item.food.fishmeat.donkfish.name: donkfillet

obj.item.food.fishmeat.fish_tail.desc: A precious fatty filet cut straight from the tail of a very large ...fish? Its rarity has it seen as a delicacy in certain spaces.
obj.item.food.fishmeat.fish_tail.name: fish tail fillet

obj.item.food.fishmeat.gunner_jellyfish.desc: A gunner jellyfish with the stingers removed. Mildly hallucinogenic when raw.
obj.item.food.fishmeat.gunner_jellyfish.name: gunner jellyfish fillet

obj.item.food.fishmeat.gunner_jellyfish..desc: A gunner jellyfish with the stingers removed. Mildly hallucinogenic when raw.
obj.item.food.fishmeat.gunner_jellyfish..name: gunner jellyfish fillet

obj.item.food.fishmeat.moonfish.akula.desc: A fillet of a rather large fish...
obj.item.food.fishmeat.moonfish.akula.name: aquatic fillet

obj.item.food.fishmeat.octopus.desc: A large tentacle from an octopus.
obj.item.food.fishmeat.octopus.name: octopus tentacle

obj.item.food.fishmeat.quality.desc: A fillet of some precious fish meat.
obj.item.food.fishmeat.quality.name: quality fish fillet

obj.item.food.fishmeat.salmon.desc: A chunky, fatty fillet of salmon meat.
obj.item.food.fishmeat.salmon.name: salmon fillet

obj.item.food.flat_piru_dough.desc: Flattened piru dough, can be cooked on a griddle or sliced into pasta.
obj.item.food.flat_piru_dough.name: flattened piru dough

obj.item.food.flatrootdough.desc: Flattened rootdough, ready to be made into a flatbread, or cut into segments.
obj.item.food.flatrootdough.name: flat rootdough

obj.item.food.flatrootdough.egg.desc: Flattened rootdough, ready to be made into a flatbread, or cut into segments.
obj.item.food.flatrootdough.egg.name: flat rootdough

obj.item.food.fortunecookie.desc: A true prophecy in each cookie!
obj.item.food.fortunecookie.name: fortune cookie

obj.item.food.frenchtoast.desc: A slice of bread soaked in an egg mixture and grilled until golden-brown. Drizzle with syrup!
obj.item.food.frenchtoast.name: french toast

obj.item.food.frickles.desc: Spicy fried pickle spears? Such a bold combination can surely come only from one place- Martian ballparks? Well, not really, but they are a popular snack there.
obj.item.food.frickles.name: frickles

obj.item.food.fried_blood_sausage.desc: A blood sausage, battered and deep fried. Commonly served with fries as a quick and simple snack on the streets of Zagoskeld.
obj.item.food.fried_blood_sausage.name: fried blood sausage

obj.item.food.fried_chicken.desc: A juicy hunk of chicken meat, fried to perfection.
obj.item.food.fried_chicken.name: fried chicken

obj.item.food.friedegg.desc: A fried egg. Would go well with a touch of salt and pepper.
obj.item.food.friedegg.name: fried egg

obj.item.food.friedegg.spore.desc: A fried blob spore. Would go well with a dab of cold sauce.
obj.item.food.friedegg.spore.name: fried spore

obj.item.food.fries.desc: AKA: French Fries, Freedom Fries, etc.
obj.item.food.fries.name: space fries

obj.item.food.fudgedice.desc: A little cube of chocolate that tends to have a less intense taste if you eat too many at once.
obj.item.food.fudgedice.name: fudge dice

obj.item.food.fueljacks_lunch.desc: A dish made from fried vegetables, popular amongst fueljacks- the brave moths who operate the fuel skimmers to keep the fleet running. 		Given the constant need for fuel, and the limited windows in which the stars align for harvesting (literally), 		they'll often take packed meals to save on trips to the mess, which they heat using the fresh canisters.
obj.item.food.fueljacks_lunch.name: Fueljack's lunch

obj.item.food.full_english.desc: A hearty plate with all the trimmings, representing the pinnacle of the breakfast art.
obj.item.food.full_english.name: full english breakfast

obj.item.food.futomaki_sushi_roll.desc: A roll of futomaki sushi, made of boiled egg, fish, and cucumber. Sliceable
obj.item.food.futomaki_sushi_roll.name: futomaki sushi roll

obj.item.food.futomaki_sushi_slice.desc: A slice of futomaki sushi, made of boiled egg, fish, and cucumber.
obj.item.food.futomaki_sushi_slice.name: futomaki sushi slice

obj.item.food.garlic_kimchi.desc: A new twist on a classic formula- kimchi and garlic, finally together in perfect harmony.
obj.item.food.garlic_kimchi.name: garlic kimchi

obj.item.food.golem_food.desc: You shouldn't be able to see this. This is an abstract item which exists to allow you to eat rocks.
obj.item.food.golem_food.name: temporary golem material snack item

obj.item.food.golem_food.rocks.desc: The peeled shell of a rockfruit, or as you may call it, "Literal pile of rocks". 	Probably not edible, but a golem will try to prove you otherwise
obj.item.food.golem_food.rocks.name: Peeled rockfruit shell

obj.item.food.granola_bar.desc: A dried mixture of oats, nuts, fruits, and chocolate condensed into a chewy bar. Makes a great snack while space-hiking.
obj.item.food.granola_bar.name: granola bar

obj.item.food.green_lasagne.desc: A fine lasagne made with pesto and a herby white sauce. Good for multiple servings.
obj.item.food.green_lasagne.name: green lasagne al forno

obj.item.food.green_lasagne_slice.desc: A slice of herby, pesto-y lasagne.
obj.item.food.green_lasagne_slice.name: green lasagne al forno slice

obj.item.food.griddle_toast.desc: Thick cut bread, griddled to perfection.
obj.item.food.griddle_toast.name: griddle toast

obj.item.food.griddle_toast.toaster_impl.desc: Thick cut bread, toasted to perfection.
obj.item.food.griddle_toast.toaster_impl.name: toast

obj.item.food.grilled_beef_gyro.desc: A traditional Greek dish of meat wrapped in pita bread with tomato, cabbage, onion, and tzatziki sauce.
obj.item.food.grilled_beef_gyro.name: grilled beef gyro

obj.item.food.grilled_chapslice.desc: A greasy hot slice of chap. Forms a good part of a balanced meal.
obj.item.food.grilled_chapslice.name: grilled slice of chap

obj.item.food.grilled_cheese.desc: As prescribed by Lord Alton, blessed be his name, 99.997% of the world's recipes for grilled cheese flat out lie: 		never once is the cheese grilled, it is merely a griddled sandwich containing melted cheese. This, on the other hand, is truly grilled cheese, grillmarks and all.
obj.item.food.grilled_cheese.name: grilled cheese

obj.item.food.grilled_moonfish.desc: A slab of grilled moonfish. Traditionally served over scalloped roots with a wine-based sauce.
obj.item.food.grilled_moonfish.name: grilled moonfish

obj.item.food.grilled_octopus.desc: A simple seafood dish, typical to everywhere that octopus is eaten. Martians like it with Red Bay.
obj.item.food.grilled_octopus.name: grilled octopus tentacle

obj.item.food.grilled_piru_flatbread.desc: Crispy, grilled piru flatbread. No longer as stretchy, but it smells absolutely amazing.
obj.item.food.grilled_piru_flatbread.name: grilled piru flatbread

obj.item.food.grown.aloe.desc: Cut leaves from the aloe plant.
obj.item.food.grown.aloe.name: aloe

obj.item.food.grown.amauri.desc: A toxic amauri bulb, you shouldn't eat this.
obj.item.food.grown.amauri.name: amauri

obj.item.food.grown.ambrosia.deus.desc: Eating this makes you feel immortal!
obj.item.food.grown.ambrosia.deus.name: ambrosia deus branch

obj.item.food.grown.ambrosia.vulgaris.desc: This is a plant containing various healing chemicals.
obj.item.food.grown.ambrosia.vulgaris.name: ambrosia vulgaris branch

obj.item.food.grown.apple.desc: It's a little piece of Eden.
obj.item.food.grown.apple.name: apple

obj.item.food.grown.apple.gold.desc: Emblazoned upon the apple is the word 'Kallisti'.
obj.item.food.grown.apple.gold.name: golden apple

obj.item.food.grown.ash_flora.desc: Some shavings from a tall mushroom. With enough, might serve as a bowl.
obj.item.food.grown.ash_flora.name: mushroom shavings

obj.item.food.grown.ash_flora.cactus_fru.desc: A cactus fruit covered in a thick, reddish skin. And some ash.
obj.item.food.grown.ash_flora.cactus_fru.name: cactus fruit

obj.item.food.grown.ash_flora.fireblosso.desc: A flower from a fire blossom.
obj.item.food.grown.ash_flora.fireblosso.name: fire blossom

obj.item.food.grown.ash_flora.glowgrowth.desc: A thick sheet of glowing fungi.
obj.item.food.grown.ash_flora.glowgrowth.name: glowgrowth sheet

obj.item.food.grown.ash_flora.mushroom_c.desc: The cap of a large mushroom.
obj.item.food.grown.ash_flora.mushroom_c.name: mushroom cap

obj.item.food.grown.ash_flora.mushroom_s.desc: A long mushroom stem. It's slightly glowing.
obj.item.food.grown.ash_flora.mushroom_s.name: mushroom stem

obj.item.food.grown.ash_flora.seraka.desc: Small, deeply flavourful mushrooms originally native to Tizira.
obj.item.food.grown.ash_flora.seraka.name: seraka cap

obj.item.food.grown.banana.desc: It's an excellent prop for a clown.
obj.item.food.grown.banana.name: banana

obj.item.food.grown.banana.banana_spider.desc: You do not know what it is, but you can bet the clown would love it.
obj.item.food.grown.banana.banana_spider.name: banana spider

obj.item.food.grown.banana.bluespace.desc: It's an excellent prop for a clown.
obj.item.food.grown.banana.bluespace.name: bluespace banana

obj.item.food.grown.banana.bombanana.desc: It's an excellent prop for a clown.
obj.item.food.grown.banana.bombanana.name: banana

obj.item.food.grown.banana.bunch.desc: An exquisite bunch of bananas. The almost otherwordly plumpness steers the mind any discerning entertainer towards the divine.
obj.item.food.grown.banana.bunch.name: banana bunch

obj.item.food.grown.banana.bunch.monkeyb.desc: Am exquisite bunch of bananas. Their otherwordly plumpness seems to be hiding something.
obj.item.food.grown.banana.bunch.monkeyb.name: banana bunch

obj.item.food.grown.banana.mime.desc: It's an excellent prop for a mime.
obj.item.food.grown.banana.mime.name: mimana

obj.item.food.grown.barrelmelon.desc: The nutriments within this melon have been compressed and fermented into rich alcohol.
obj.item.food.grown.barrelmelon.name: barrelmelon

obj.item.food.grown.bell_pepper.desc: A big mild pepper that's good for many things.
obj.item.food.grown.bell_pepper.name: bell pepper

obj.item.food.grown.berries.death.desc: Taste so good, you will die!
obj.item.food.grown.berries.death.name: bunch of death-berries

obj.item.food.grown.berries.poison.desc: Taste so good, you might die!
obj.item.food.grown.berries.poison.name: bunch of poison-berries

obj.item.food.grown.bungofruit.desc: A strange fruit, tough leathery skin protects its juicy flesh and large poisonous seed.
obj.item.food.grown.bungofruit.name: bungo fruit

obj.item.food.grown.bungopit.desc: A large seed, it is said to be potent enough to be able to stop a mans heart.
obj.item.food.grown.bungopit.name: bungo pit

obj.item.food.grown.butterbeans.desc: Soft, creamy and milky... You could almost smear them over toast.
obj.item.food.grown.butterbeans.name: butterbean

obj.item.food.grown.cahnroot.desc: Heavily modified version of terran carrot, originally made to survive the scarciest of environments by an enterprising scientist of Moth Flotilla, Cahn'Mang.
obj.item.food.grown.cahnroot.name: cahn'root

obj.item.food.grown.cannabis.anti.desc: You feel normal looking at it. What the fuck?
obj.item.food.grown.cannabis.anti.name: anti cannabis leaf

obj.item.food.grown.cannabis.death.desc: Looks a bit dark. Oh well.
obj.item.food.grown.cannabis.death.name: death cannabis leaf

obj.item.food.grown.cannabis.rainbow.desc: Is it supposed to be glowing like that...?
obj.item.food.grown.cannabis.rainbow.name: rainbow cannabis leaf

obj.item.food.grown.cannabis.ultimate.desc: You feel dizzy looking at it. What the fuck?
obj.item.food.grown.cannabis.ultimate.name: omega cannabis leaf

obj.item.food.grown.cannabis.white.desc: It feels smooth and nice to the touch.
obj.item.food.grown.cannabis.white.name: white cannabis leaf

obj.item.food.grown.cherry_bomb.desc: You think you can hear the hissing of a tiny fuse.
obj.item.food.grown.cherry_bomb.name: cherry bombs

obj.item.food.grown.cherrybulbs.desc: They're like little Space Christmas lights!
obj.item.food.grown.cherrybulbs.name: cherry bulbs

obj.item.food.grown.chili.desc: It's spicy! Wait... IT'S BURNING ME!!
obj.item.food.grown.chili.name: chili

obj.item.food.grown.citrus.desc: It's so sour, your face will twist.
obj.item.food.grown.citrus.name: citrus

obj.item.food.grown.citrus.lemon.desc: When life gives you lemons, make lemonade.
obj.item.food.grown.citrus.lemon.name: lemon

obj.item.food.grown.citrus.lime.desc: It's so sour, your face will twist.
obj.item.food.grown.citrus.lime.name: lime

obj.item.food.grown.citrus.orange_3d.desc: You can hardly wrap your head around this thing.
obj.item.food.grown.citrus.orange_3d.name: extradimensional orange

obj.item.food.grown.cocaleaf.desc: A leaf of the coca shrub, which contains a potent psychoactive alkaloid known as 'cocaine'.
obj.item.food.grown.cocaleaf.name: coca leaf

obj.item.food.grown.coffee.desc: Dry them out to make coffee.
obj.item.food.grown.coffee.name: coffee arabica beans

obj.item.food.grown.cucumber.desc: Oblong and green, with pimples, the standard of salads.
obj.item.food.grown.cucumber.name: cucumber

obj.item.food.grown.eggy.desc: There MUST be a chicken inside.
obj.item.food.grown.eggy.name: egg-plant

obj.item.food.grown.galaxythistle.desc: This spiny cluster of florets reminds you of the highlands.
obj.item.food.grown.galaxythistle.name: galaxythistle flower head

obj.item.food.grown.garlic.desc: Delicious, but with a potentially overwhelming odor.
obj.item.food.grown.garlic.name: garlic

obj.item.food.grown.gelthi.desc: A cluster of gelthi pods. Each pod contains a different sweetener, and the pods can be juiced into raw sugar.
obj.item.food.grown.gelthi.name: gelthi

obj.item.food.grown.ghost_chili.desc: It seems to be vibrating gently.
obj.item.food.grown.ghost_chili.name: ghost chili

obj.item.food.grown.grass.fairy.desc: Blue, glowing, and smells faintly of mushrooms.
obj.item.food.grown.grass.fairy.name: fairygrass

obj.item.food.grown.greenbeans.desc: Simple and healthy, what more do you need?
obj.item.food.grown.greenbeans.name: green beans

obj.item.food.grown.harebell.desc: "I'll sweeten thy sad grave: thou shalt not lack the flower that's like thy face, pale primrose, nor the azured hare-bell, like thy veins; no, nor the leaf of eglantine, whom not to slander, out-sweeten'd not thy breath."
obj.item.food.grown.harebell.name: harebell

obj.item.food.grown.herbs.desc: A bundle of various herbs. Somehow, you're always able to pick what you need out.
obj.item.food.grown.herbs.name: bundle of herbs

obj.item.food.grown.holymelon.desc: The water within this melon has been blessed by some deity that's particularly fond of watermelon.
obj.item.food.grown.holymelon.name: holymelon

obj.item.food.grown.icepepper.desc: It's a mutant strain of chili.
obj.item.food.grown.icepepper.name: chilly pepper

obj.item.food.grown.jumpingbeans.desc: Umm, what's causing it to move like that?
obj.item.food.grown.jumpingbeans.name: jumping bean

obj.item.food.grown.jurlmah.desc: A frosty jurlmah fruit, it feels cold to the touch.
obj.item.food.grown.jurlmah.name: jurlmah

obj.item.food.grown.kiri.desc: A bizarre egg-shaped fruit, striped with a vivid pink and yellow color. It feels somewhat firm, but the entire thing is edible. Contains an ultra-sweet jelly typically used in teshari cuisine, or it can be baked by itself for a delightful treat.
obj.item.food.grown.kiri.name: kiri fruit

obj.item.food.grown.koibeans.desc: Something about these seems fishy, they seem really soft, almost squeezable!
obj.item.food.grown.koibeans.name: koibean

obj.item.food.grown.korta_nut.desc: A little nut of great importance. Has a peppery shell which can be ground into flour and a soft, pulpy interior that produces a milky fluid when juiced. Or you can eat them whole, as a quick snack.
obj.item.food.grown.korta_nut.name: korta nut

obj.item.food.grown.korta_nut.sweet.desc: A sweet treat lizards love to eat.
obj.item.food.grown.korta_nut.sweet.name: sweet korta nut

obj.item.food.grown.kronkus.desc:
A piece of mature kronkus vine. It exudes a sharp and noxious odor.

It can be fermented to create a crude extract used by space-barge hobos to keep awake when the engine fumes creeps into their shacks.

Further processing is said to yield kronkaine, but infoteks regarding this subject are tightly controlled.
obj.item.food.grown.kronkus.name: kronkus vine segment

obj.item.food.grown.kudzupod.desc: Pueraria Virallis: An invasive species with vines that rapidly creep and wrap around whatever they contact.
obj.item.food.grown.kudzupod.name: kudzu pod

obj.item.food.grown.lanternfruit.desc: A softly glowing fruit with a handle-shaped stem, an Ethereal favorite!
obj.item.food.grown.lanternfruit.name: lanternfruits

obj.item.food.grown.laugh.desc: Ridens Cicer, guaranteed to improve your mood dramatically upon consumption!
obj.item.food.grown.laugh.name: pod of laughin' peas

obj.item.food.grown.material_adamapple.desc: Adam's apples, The garden Eden's bounty! Just peel it for a core.
obj.item.food.grown.material_adamapple.name: Adam's apple

obj.item.food.grown.material_agbergine.desc: Ag-bergine, get it AG? It's hilarious and valuable! Just peel it for a core.
obj.item.food.grown.material_agbergine.name: ag-bergine

obj.item.food.grown.material_aubergine.desc: An aubergine; AU? Get it?!... My talents are wasted here! Just peel it for a core.
obj.item.food.grown.material_aubergine.name: aubergine

obj.item.food.grown.material_bananiumber.desc: holy honkmother... This fruit got a core of bananium, Just peel it!
obj.item.food.grown.material_bananiumber.name: bananiumberry

obj.item.food.grown.material_bluegemdrup.desc: A mutated variant of rockfruits; Incredibly fragile... also not actually a drupe! Just peel it for a core.
obj.item.food.grown.material_bluegemdrup.name: bluegem drupe

obj.item.food.grown.material_dimantis.desc: A fleshy fruid with a diamond core, Just peel it for a core.
obj.item.food.grown.material_dimantis.name: dimantis drupe

obj.item.food.grown.material_ferrotuber.desc: Ferrotubers, fleshy shells with iron fillings! Just peel it for a core.
obj.item.food.grown.material_ferrotuber.name: ferrotuber

obj.item.food.grown.material_plasmaplum.desc: A mutated variant of rockfruits; Incredibly volatile... also not actually a plum! Just peel it for a core.
obj.item.food.grown.material_plasmaplum.name: plasmaplum

obj.item.food.grown.material_runescooper.desc: A fruit, usually grown in wild places where men would kill each other for gain.
obj.item.food.grown.material_runescooper.name: runescooper

obj.item.food.grown.material_sand.desc: A mutated variant of rockfruits; rough, course and now available everywhere. Just peel it for a core.
obj.item.food.grown.material_sand.name: sandfruit

obj.item.food.grown.material_titanituber.desc: soft fruits with incredibly sturdy cores, watch your teeth! Just peel it for a core.
obj.item.food.grown.material_titanituber.name: titanituber

obj.item.food.grown.material_uraniberry.desc: A mutated variant of rockfruits; you might not want to hold it for long... also not actually a berry! Just peel it for a core.
obj.item.food.grown.material_uraniberry.name: uraniberry

obj.item.food.grown.meatwheat.desc: Some blood-drenched wheat stalks. You can crush them into what passes for meat if you squint hard enough.
obj.item.food.grown.meatwheat.name: meatwheat

obj.item.food.grown.moonflower.desc: Store in a location at least 50 yards away from werewolves.
obj.item.food.grown.moonflower.name: moonflower

obj.item.food.grown.muli.desc: A soft, oval-shaped pod. Contains a minty pale-blue juice used for many applications in teshari cuisine.
obj.item.food.grown.muli.name: muli pod

obj.item.food.grown.mushroom.amanita.desc: Amanita Muscaria: Learn poisonous mushrooms by heart. Only pick mushrooms you know.
obj.item.food.grown.mushroom.amanita.name: fly amanita

obj.item.food.grown.mushroom.angel.desc: Amanita Virosa: Deadly poisonous basidiomycete fungus filled with alpha amatoxins.
obj.item.food.grown.mushroom.angel.name: destroying angel

obj.item.food.grown.mushroom.chanterelle.desc: Cantharellus Cibarius: These jolly yellow little shrooms sure look tasty!
obj.item.food.grown.mushroom.chanterelle.name: chanterelle cluster

obj.item.food.grown.mushroom.glowshroom.desc: Mycena Bregprox: This species of mushroom glows in the dark.
obj.item.food.grown.mushroom.glowshroom.name: glowshroom cluster

obj.item.food.grown.mushroom.glowshroom..desc: Mycena Ruthenia: This species of mushroom glows in the dark, but isn't actually bioluminescent. They're warm to the touch...
obj.item.food.grown.mushroom.glowshroom..name: glowcap cluster

obj.item.food.grown.mushroom.glowshroom..desc: Mycena Umbra: This species of mushroom emits shadow instead of light.
obj.item.food.grown.mushroom.glowshroom..name: shadowshroom cluster

obj.item.food.grown.mushroom.jupitercup.desc: A strange red mushroom, its surface is moist and slick. You wonder how many tiny worms have met their fate inside.
obj.item.food.grown.mushroom.jupitercup.name: jupiter cup

obj.item.food.grown.mushroom.odious_puff.desc: Lycoperdon Faetidus: This puffball is considered a great nuisance not only because of the highly irritating nature of its spores, but also because of its considerable size and unsightly appearance.
obj.item.food.grown.mushroom.odious_puff.name: odious puffball

obj.item.food.grown.mushroom.plumphelmet.desc: Plumus Hellmus: Plump, soft and s-so inviting~
obj.item.food.grown.mushroom.plumphelmet.name: plump-helmet

obj.item.food.grown.mushroom.reishi.desc: Ganoderma lucidum: A special fungus known for its medicinal and stress relieving properties.
obj.item.food.grown.mushroom.reishi.name: reishi

obj.item.food.grown.mushroom.walkingmush.desc: Plumus Locomotus: The beginning of the great walk.
obj.item.food.grown.mushroom.walkingmush.name: walking mushroom

obj.item.food.grown.nakati.desc: A segment of fragrant brown 'bark' from a nakati growth, grinds into a zesty spice widely used in teshari cooking.
obj.item.food.grown.nakati.name: nakati bark

obj.item.food.grown.nettle.desc: It's probably not wise to touch it with bare hands...
obj.item.food.grown.nettle.name: nettle

obj.item.food.grown.nettle.death.desc: The glowing nettle incites rage in you just from looking at it!
obj.item.food.grown.nettle.death.name: deathnettle

obj.item.food.grown.nofruit.desc: A cubic nofruit, the leaf on top of the nofruit gesticulates wildly.
obj.item.food.grown.nofruit.name: nofruit

obj.item.food.grown.olive.desc: A small cylindrical salty fruit closely related to mangoes. Can be ground into a paste and mixed with water to make quality oil.
obj.item.food.grown.olive.name: olive

obj.item.food.grown.peace.desc: A plant discovered through extensive genetic engineering, and iterative graft work. It's rumored to bring peace to any who consume it. In the wider AgSci community, it's attained the nickname of 'Pax Mundi'.
obj.item.food.grown.peace.name: cluster of world peas

obj.item.food.grown.peanut.desc: A tasty pair of groundnuts concealed in a tough shell.
obj.item.food.grown.peanut.name: peanut

obj.item.food.grown.piru.desc: A delicate frond of piru, resembling strands of silk more than leaves. grinds down into piru flour used in teshari cuisine.
obj.item.food.grown.piru.name: piru frond

obj.item.food.grown.poppy.desc: Long-used as a symbol of rest, peace, and death.
obj.item.food.grown.poppy.name: poppy

obj.item.food.grown.poppy.opiumpoppy.desc: The seedpod of the opium poppy plant, which contain opium latex.
obj.item.food.grown.poppy.opiumpoppy.name: opium poppy seedpod

obj.item.food.grown.potato.desc: Boil 'em! Mash 'em! Stick 'em in a stew!
obj.item.food.grown.potato.name: potato

obj.item.food.grown.rainbow_flower.desc: A beautiful flower capable of being used for most dyeing processes.
obj.item.food.grown.rainbow_flower.name: rainbow flower

obj.item.food.grown.rose.desc: The classic fleur d'amour - flower of love. Watch for its thorns!
obj.item.food.grown.rose.name: rose

obj.item.food.grown.shand.desc: A handful of shand leaves, the leaves are oily and smell like a laboratory.
obj.item.food.grown.shand.name: shand

obj.item.food.grown.soybeans.desc: It's pretty bland, but oh the possibilities...
obj.item.food.grown.soybeans.name: soybeans

obj.item.food.grown.star_cactus.desc: A spikey, round cluster of prickly star cacti. And no, it's not called a star cactus because it's in space.
obj.item.food.grown.star_cactus.name: star cacti

obj.item.food.grown.sugarcane.saltcane.desc: Ungodly salty, bane of slugs, treasure of horses.
obj.item.food.grown.sugarcane.saltcane.name: saltcane

obj.item.food.grown.sunflower.desc: It's beautiful! A certain person might beat you to death if you trample these.
obj.item.food.grown.sunflower.name: sunflower

obj.item.food.grown.surik.desc: A shimmering surik crystal. The center of the gem thrums with volcanic activity.
obj.item.food.grown.surik.name: surik

obj.item.food.grown.tea.desc: These aromatic tips of the tea plant can be dried to make tea.
obj.item.food.grown.tea.name: Tea Aspera tips

obj.item.food.grown.tea.astra.desc: These aromatic tips of the tea plant can be dried to make tea.
obj.item.food.grown.tea.astra.name: Tea Astra tips

obj.item.food.grown.tea.catnip.desc: These aromatic tips of the tea plant can be dried to make tea.
obj.item.food.grown.tea.catnip.name: catnip buds

obj.item.food.grown.telriis.desc: A sheaf of telris, it can be ground or juiced into a milky liquid.
obj.item.food.grown.telriis.name: telriis

obj.item.food.grown.thaadra.desc: A cluster of thaadra petals, full of niche medicinal chemicals.
obj.item.food.grown.thaadra.name: thaadra

obj.item.food.grown.tobacco.desc: Dry them out to make some smokes.
obj.item.food.grown.tobacco.name: tobacco leaves

obj.item.food.grown.tobacco.space.desc: Dry them out to make some space-smokes.
obj.item.food.grown.tobacco.space.name: space tobacco leaves

obj.item.food.grown.toechtauese.desc: A branch with töchtaüse berries on it. They're a favourite on the Mothic Fleet, but not in this form.
obj.item.food.grown.toechtauese.name: töchtaüse berries

obj.item.food.grown.tomato.desc: I say to-mah-to, you say tom-mae-to.
obj.item.food.grown.tomato.name: tomato

obj.item.food.grown.tomato.blue.desc: I say blue-mah-to, you say blue-mae-to.
obj.item.food.grown.tomato.blue.name: blue-tomato

obj.item.food.grown.tomato.blue.bluespac.desc: So lubricated, you might slip through space-time.
obj.item.food.grown.tomato.blue.bluespac.name: bluespace tomato

obj.item.food.grown.tomato.killer.desc: I say to-mah-to, you say tom-mae-to... OH GOD IT'S EATING MY LEGS!!
obj.item.food.grown.tomato.killer.name: killer-tomato

obj.item.food.grown.trumpet.desc: A vivid flower that smells faintly of freshly cut grass. Touching the flower seems to stain the skin some time after contact, yet most other surfaces seem to be unaffected by this phenomenon.
obj.item.food.grown.trumpet.name: spaceman's trumpet

obj.item.food.grown.vale.desc: A cluster of vale leaves, keep away from open flames.
obj.item.food.grown.vale.name: vale

obj.item.food.grown.vaporsac.desc: An buoyant vaporsac, full of aerosolized chemicals.
obj.item.food.grown.vaporsac.name: vaporsac

obj.item.food.hard_taco_shell.desc: A hard taco shell, just waiting to be stuffed with ingredients. Use an ingredient on it to start making custom tacos!
obj.item.food.hard_taco_shell.name: hard taco shell

obj.item.food.headcheese.desc: A cured block of headcheese. Delicious, if you're a lizard.
obj.item.food.headcheese.name: headcheese block

obj.item.food.headcheese_slice.desc: A slice of headcheese, useful for making sandwiches and snacks. Or surviving the cold Tiziran winters.
obj.item.food.headcheese_slice.name: headcheese slice

obj.item.food.hemophage.desc: If you see this, then something's gone very wrong and you should report it whenever you get the chance.
obj.item.food.hemophage.name: bloody food

obj.item.food.hemophage.blood_cake.desc: Also known as 'pig's blood cake' or 'black cake', this is a variant of blood pudding normally served as street food in night markets. Created from steamed blood and sticky rice, it's been coated in peanut powder and coriander, and can be served with some dipping sauces. It seems the amount of blood in this meal has been turned up a lot, giving the all-too-familiar twinge of iron when it's tasted.
obj.item.food.hemophage.blood_cake.name: ti hoeh koe

obj.item.food.hemophage.blood_curd.desc: Also known as 'blood tofu' or 'blood pudding,' this Yangyu delicacy looks to be made of congealed and cooked blood. It's soft and smooth, slightly chewy, and rich in riboflavin.
obj.item.food.hemophage.blood_curd.name: blood curd

obj.item.food.hemophage.blood_noodles.desc: A plain dish of blood-soaked noodles, it would probably be better with more ingredients.
obj.item.food.hemophage.blood_noodles.name: boiled blood noodles

obj.item.food.hemophage.blood_noodles.bo.desc: A dish with normally made with a very strong combination of pork and beef; the main attraction in this meatless version being the combination of blood curds and curly noodles, seasoned and immersed in fresh blood to the point they've turned crimson. It reeks of iron.
obj.item.food.hemophage.blood_noodles.bo.name: boat noodles

obj.item.food.hemophage.blood_noodles.ra.desc: Noodles thoroughly soaked in blood. Eating them raw doesn't sound appetizing. Nor does eating them at all, really.
obj.item.food.hemophage.blood_noodles.ra.name: raw blood noodles

obj.item.food.hemophage.blood_rice_pearl.desc: A fun finger food. Little clumps of sticky rice with a bit of ground pork and green onion, all soaked and rolled in fresh blood; giving it a crimson hue. Recommended to serve hot!
obj.item.food.hemophage.blood_rice_pearl.name: kessen shinju

obj.item.food.hemophage.blood_rice_pearl.desc: A clump of raw rice, drenched in blood.
obj.item.food.hemophage.blood_rice_pearl.name: uncooked blood rice

obj.item.food.herby_cheese.desc: As a staple of mothic cuisine, cheese is often augmented with various flavours to keep variety in their diet. 		Herbs are one such addition, and are particularly beloved.
obj.item.food.herby_cheese.name: herby cheese

obj.item.food.honey_roll.desc: A sweetened rootroll with sliced fruit, enjoyed as a seasonal dessert on Tizira.
obj.item.food.honey_roll.name: honey sweetroll

obj.item.food.honeybar.desc: Oats and nuts compressed together into a bar, held together with a honey glaze.
obj.item.food.honeybar.name: honey nut bar

obj.item.food.honeybun.desc: A sticky pastry bun glazed with honey.
obj.item.food.honeybun.name: honey bun

obj.item.food.hot_shots.desc: The ultimate baseball snack. Once you start, it's hard to stop!
obj.item.food.hot_shots.name: Hot Shots

obj.item.food.hotcrossbun.desc: The cross represents the Assistants that died for your sins.
obj.item.food.hotcrossbun.name: hot cross bun

obj.item.food.hotdog.desc: Fresh footlong ready to go down on.
obj.item.food.hotdog.name: hotdog

obj.item.food.hotdog.debug.desc: Fresh footlong ready to go down on.
obj.item.food.hotdog.debug.name: hotdog

obj.item.food.hugemushroomslice.desc: A slice from a huge mushroom.
obj.item.food.hugemushroomslice.name: huge mushroom slice

obj.item.food.icecream.desc: Delicious waffle cone, but no ice cream.
obj.item.food.icecream.name: waffle cone

obj.item.food.icecream.chocolate.desc: Delicious chocolate cone, but no ice cream.
obj.item.food.icecream.chocolate.name: chocolate cone

obj.item.food.icecream.korta.desc: Delicious lizard-friendly cone, but no ice cream.
obj.item.food.icecream.korta.name: korta cone

obj.item.food.icecreamsandwich.desc: Portable ice cream in its own packaging.
obj.item.food.icecreamsandwich.name: ice cream sandwich

obj.item.food.inferno_kimchi.desc: For when ordinary kimchi just can't scratch your itch for insane heat, inferno kimchi picks up the slack.
obj.item.food.inferno_kimchi.name: inferno kimchi

obj.item.food.ink_sac.desc: the ink sac from some sort of fish or mollusk. It could be canned with a processor.
obj.item.food.ink_sac.name: ink sac

obj.item.food.izakaya_fries.desc: New Osaka's favourite fries, 2 centuries running- and it's all thanks to the marriage of Red Bay, furikake and mayonnaise.
obj.item.food.izakaya_fries.name: izakaya fries

obj.item.food.jelliedtoast.desc: A slice of toast covered with delicious jam.
obj.item.food.jelliedtoast.name: jellied toast

obj.item.food.jelliedtoast.cherry.desc: A slice of toast covered with delicious jam.
obj.item.food.jelliedtoast.cherry.name: jellied toast

obj.item.food.jelliedtoast.slime.desc: A slice of toast covered with delicious jam.
obj.item.food.jelliedtoast.slime.name: jellied toast

obj.item.food.kamaboko.desc: A Japanese-style cured fishcake frequently used in snacks and ramen.
obj.item.food.kamaboko.name: kamaboko

obj.item.food.kamaboko_slice.desc: A slice of fishcake. Goes good in ramen.
obj.item.food.kamaboko_slice.name: kamaboko slice

obj.item.food.katsu_fillet.desc: Breaded and deep fried meat, used for a variety of dishes.
obj.item.food.katsu_fillet.name: katsu fillet

obj.item.food.kebab.ballpark_tsukune.desc: Skewered chicken meatballs in a sweet-and-savoury yakitori sauce. A common sight at Martian ballparks.
obj.item.food.kebab.ballpark_tsukune.name: ballpark tsukune

obj.item.food.kebab.candied_mushrooms.desc: A slightly bizarre dish from Tizira, consisting of seraka mushrooms coated with caramel on a skewer. Carries a pronounced 'sweet and savoury' kick.
obj.item.food.kebab.candied_mushrooms.name: candied mushrooms

obj.item.food.kebab.fiesta.desc: Variety of meats and vegetables on a stick.
obj.item.food.kebab.fiesta.name: fiesta skewer

obj.item.food.kebab.human.desc: A human meat, on a stick.
obj.item.food.kebab.human.name: human-kebab

obj.item.food.kebab.kasei_dango.desc: Japanese-style dango balls, flavoured with grenadine and orange, giving a final result that looks like Mars and tastes like dessert, served three to a stick.
obj.item.food.kebab.kasei_dango.name: kasei dango

obj.item.food.kebab.picoss_skewers.desc: A popular Tiziran streetfood consisting of vinegar-marinated armorfish on a skewer with onion and chillis.
obj.item.food.kebab.picoss_skewers.name: picoss skewer

obj.item.food.kebab.pineapple_skewer.desc: Chunks of glazed meat skewered on a rod with pineapple slices. Surprisingly not bad!
obj.item.food.kebab.pineapple_skewer.name: pineapple skewer

obj.item.food.kebab.rat.desc: Not so delicious rat meat, on a stick.
obj.item.food.kebab.rat.name: rat-kebab

obj.item.food.kebab.rat.double.desc: Not so delicious rat meat, on a stick.
obj.item.food.kebab.rat.double.name: double rat-kebab

obj.item.food.kebab.raw_ballpark_tsukune.desc: Raw chicken meatballs on a skewer, ready to be griddled into something delicious.
obj.item.food.kebab.raw_ballpark_tsukune.name: raw tsukune

obj.item.food.kebab.tail.desc: Severed lizard tail on a stick.
obj.item.food.kebab.tail.name: lizard-tail kebab

obj.item.food.kebab.ti_hoeh_koe.desc: Pig blood, mixed with rice, fried, and topped with peanut and coriander. It's an... acquired taste for sure, but it's popular at Prospect's night markets, brought by Taiwanese settlers.
obj.item.food.kebab.ti_hoeh_koe.name: ti hoeh koe skewer

obj.item.food.khinkali.desc: One hundred khinkalis? Do I look like a pig?
obj.item.food.khinkali.name: khinkali

obj.item.food.kimchi.desc: A classic Korean dish in the Martian style: shredded cabbage with chilli peppers, konbu, bonito, and a mix of spices.
obj.item.food.kimchi.name: kimchi

obj.item.food.king_katsu_sandwich.desc: A big sandwich with crispy fried katsu, bacon, kimchi slaw and salad, all on reispan bread. Truly the king of meat between bread.
obj.item.food.king_katsu_sandwich.name: King Katsu sandwich

obj.item.food.kiri_curry.desc: Spiced meat mixed with finely sliced piru pasta and minced chili all drizzled in piru jelly sauce, just the perfect balance of spicy and sweet.
obj.item.food.kiri_curry.name: kiri curry

obj.item.food.kiri_jellypuff.desc: A piece of piru bread puffed and rolled into a thick disk, containing a kiri jelly and cream filling and sprinkled with piru flour. Just one will never be enough.
obj.item.food.kiri_jellypuff.name: kiri jellypuff

obj.item.food.kitzushi.desc: A variant on inarizushi popular on Mars amongst vulpinids (and the wider animalid community), kitzushi integrates a spicy cheese and chilli mix inside the pocket for extra flavour.
obj.item.food.kitzushi.name: kitzushi

obj.item.food.korta_wellington.desc: A luxurious log of beef, covered in a fine mushroom duxelle and pancetta ham, then bound in korta pastry.
obj.item.food.korta_wellington.name: korta wellington

obj.item.food.korta_wellington_slice.desc: A slice of korta & beef wellington, topped with a rich gravy. Simply delicious.
obj.item.food.korta_wellington_slice.name: korta wellington slice

obj.item.food.kurry_ok_subsando.desc: The bunny chow meets Martian ingenuity in the form of the kurry-ok subsando, with fries and katsu curry in perfect harmony.
obj.item.food.kurry_ok_subsando.name: kurry-ok subsando

obj.item.food.lasagna.desc: A slice of lasagna. Perfect for a Monday afternoon.
obj.item.food.lasagna.name: lasagna

obj.item.food.lava_chicken.desc: It's tasty as hell! But it's also a lava attack!
obj.item.food.lava_chicken.name: lava chicken

obj.item.food.lil_baked_rice.desc: A single portion of baked rice, perfect as a side dish, or even as a full meal.
obj.item.food.lil_baked_rice.name: lil baked rice

obj.item.food.little_hawaii_hotdog.desc: From the friendly vendors of Honolulu Avenue comes the Little Hawaii dog- tropical and fattening, all at the same time!
obj.item.food.little_hawaii_hotdog.name: Little Hawaii hotdog

obj.item.food.little_shiro_sandwich.desc: A classic Martian sandwich, named for the first president of TerraGov to come from Mars. It features fried eggs, bulgogi beef, a kimchi salad, and a healthy topping of mozzarella cheese.
obj.item.food.little_shiro_sandwich.name: Little Shiro sandwich

obj.item.food.liver_pate.desc: A rich, meaty paste made from liver, meat, and a few additions for extra flavour.
obj.item.food.liver_pate.name: liver pate

obj.item.food.lizard_dumplings.desc: Mashed root vegetables, mixed with korta flour and boiled to produce a large, round and slightly spicy dumpling. Commonly eaten in soup.
obj.item.food.lizard_dumplings.name: Tiziran dumplings

obj.item.food.lizard_escargot.desc: Another example of cultural crossover between lizards and humans, desert snail escargot is closer to the Roman dish cocleas than the contemporary French escargot. It's a common street food in the desert cities.
obj.item.food.lizard_escargot.name: desert snail cocleas

obj.item.food.lizard_fries.desc: One of the many human foods to make its way to the lizards was french fries, which are called poms-franzisks in Draconic. When topped with barbecued meat and sauce, they make a hearty meal.
obj.item.food.lizard_fries.name: loaded poms-franzisks

obj.item.food.lizard_surf_n_turf.desc: A massive platter of Tizira's finest meat and seafood, typically shared by groups at the beach. Of course, nothing's stopping you eating it on your own... fatass.
obj.item.food.lizard_surf_n_turf.name: Zagosk surf 'n' turf smorgasbord

obj.item.food.loaded_baked_potato.desc: A piping hot baked potato, with the insides scooped out and mixed with bacon bits, cheese, and cabbage.
obj.item.food.loaded_baked_potato.name: loaded baked potato

obj.item.food.loaded_curds.desc: What's better than cheese curds? Deep fried cheese curds! What's better than deep fried cheese curds? 		Deep fried cheese curds with chili (and more cheese) on top! And what's better than that? Putting it on fries!
obj.item.food.loaded_curds.name: ozlsettitæloskekllön ede pommes

obj.item.food.loco_moco.desc: A simple classic from Hawaii. Makes for a filling, tasty, and cheap meal.
obj.item.food.loco_moco.name: loco moco

obj.item.food.lollipop.desc: A delicious lollipop. Makes for a great Valentine's present.
obj.item.food.lollipop.name: lollipop

obj.item.food.lollipop.cyborg.desc: A delicious lollipop. Makes for a great Valentine's present.
obj.item.food.lollipop.cyborg.name: lollipop

obj.item.food.mac_balls.desc: Fried balls of macaroni cheese dipped in corn batter, served with tomato sauce. 		A popular snack across the galaxy, and especially on the Mothic Fleet- where they tend to use Ready-Donk as the base.
obj.item.food.mac_balls.name: macheronirölen

obj.item.food.marte_cubano_sandwich.desc: A fusion food from Mars, the Marte-Cubano is based on the classic Cubano, but updated for ingredient availability and changes in tastes.
obj.item.food.marte_cubano_sandwich.name: Marte Cubano sandwich

obj.item.food.mashed_potatoes.desc: A creamy serving of mashed potatoes, a staple of many Thanksgiving dinners.
obj.item.food.mashed_potatoes.name: mashed potatoes

obj.item.food.meat.chapmix.desc: A mass of seasoned meat, ready to be processed.
obj.item.food.meat.chapmix.name: chap mix

obj.item.food.meat.slab.bear.desc: A very manly slab of meat.
obj.item.food.meat.slab.bear.name: bear meat

obj.item.food.meat.slab.blood_worm.desc: Who thought eating this would be a good idea? At least it's juicy...
obj.item.food.meat.slab.blood_worm.name: blood worm meat

obj.item.food.meat.slab.chicken.desc: A slab of raw chicken. Remember to wash your hands!
obj.item.food.meat.slab.chicken.name: chicken meat

obj.item.food.meat.slab.chicken.human.desc: A slab of raw chicken. Remember to wash your hands!
obj.item.food.meat.slab.chicken.human.name: meat

obj.item.food.meat.slab.drakebait.desc: A slab of goliath meat. It's been blessed somehow, Often seen as an offering for Ash Drakes.
obj.item.food.meat.slab.drakebait.name: Seasoned Goliath Meat

obj.item.food.meat.slab.goliath.desc: A slab of goliath meat. It's not very edible now, but it cooks great in lava.
obj.item.food.meat.slab.goliath.name: goliath meat

obj.item.food.meat.slab.gondola.desc: According to legends of old, consuming raw gondola flesh grants one inner peace.
obj.item.food.meat.slab.gondola.name: gondola meat

obj.item.food.meat.slab.gondola.virtual_.desc: According to legends of old, consuming raw gondola flesh grants one inner peace.
obj.item.food.meat.slab.gondola.virtual_.name: gondola meat

obj.item.food.meat.slab.grassfed.desc: A slab of 100% grass fed award-winning farm meat.
obj.item.food.meat.slab.grassfed.name: eco meat

obj.item.food.meat.slab.human.mutant.eth.desc: So shiny you feel like ingesting it might make you shine too
obj.item.food.meat.slab.human.mutant.eth.name: meat

obj.item.food.meat.slab.human.mutant.fly.desc: Nothing says tasty like maggot filled radioactive mutant flesh.
obj.item.food.meat.slab.human.mutant.fly.name: meat

obj.item.food.meat.slab.human.mutant.gol.desc: Edible rocks, welcome to the future.
obj.item.food.meat.slab.human.mutant.gol.name: meat

obj.item.food.meat.slab.human.mutant.gol.desc: From the slime pen to the rune to the kitchen, science.
obj.item.food.meat.slab.human.mutant.gol.name: meat

obj.item.food.meat.slab.human.mutant.mot.desc: Unpleasantly powdery and dry. Kind of pretty, though.
obj.item.food.meat.slab.human.mutant.mot.name: meat

obj.item.food.meat.slab.human.mutant.pla.desc: All the joys of healthy eating with all the fun of cannibalism.
obj.item.food.meat.slab.human.mutant.pla.name: meat

obj.item.food.meat.slab.human.mutant.ske.desc: There's a point where this needs to stop, and clearly we have passed it.
obj.item.food.meat.slab.human.mutant.ske.name: bone

obj.item.food.meat.slab.human.mutant.sli.desc: Because jello wasn't offensive enough to vegans.
obj.item.food.meat.slab.human.mutant.sli.name: meat

obj.item.food.meat.slab.human.mutant.zom.desc: Halfway to becoming fertilizer for your garden.
obj.item.food.meat.slab.human.mutant.zom.name: meat (rotten)

obj.item.food.meat.slab.killertomato.desc: A slice from a huge tomato.
obj.item.food.meat.slab.killertomato.name: killer tomato meat

obj.item.food.meat.slab.meatproduct.desc: A slab of station reclaimed and chemically processed meat product.
obj.item.food.meat.slab.meatproduct.name: meat product

obj.item.food.meat.slab.meatwheat.desc: This doesn't look like meat, but your standards aren't that high to begin with.
obj.item.food.meat.slab.meatwheat.name: meatwheat clump

obj.item.food.meat.slab.mouse.desc: A slab of mouse meat. Best not eat it raw.
obj.item.food.meat.slab.mouse.name: mouse meat

obj.item.food.meat.slab.pig.desc: A slab of raw pork. This little piggy went to the butcher's.
obj.item.food.meat.slab.pig.name: raw pork

obj.item.food.meat.slab.rawcrab.desc: A pile of raw crab meat.
obj.item.food.meat.slab.rawcrab.name: raw crab meat

obj.item.food.meat.slab.spider.desc: A slab of spider meat. That is so Kafkaesque.
obj.item.food.meat.slab.spider.name: spider meat

obj.item.food.meat.snailmix.desc: A mass of seasoned meat, ready to be processed... DO NOT CONFUSE WITH TRAIL MIX!
obj.item.food.meat.snailmix.name: snail mix

obj.item.food.meat.steak.desc: A piece of hot spicy meat.
obj.item.food.meat.steak.name: steak

obj.item.food.meat.steak.bear.desc: A piece of hot spicy meat.
obj.item.food.meat.steak.bear.name: bear steak

obj.item.food.meat.steak.blood_worm.desc: Now that's a bloody good steak!
obj.item.food.meat.steak.blood_worm.name: blood worm steak

obj.item.food.meat.steak.chicken.desc: A piece of hot spicy meat.
obj.item.food.meat.steak.chicken.name: chicken steak

obj.item.food.meat.steak.chicken.human.desc: A piece of hot spicy meat.
obj.item.food.meat.steak.chicken.human.name: chicken steak

obj.item.food.meat.steak.gondola.desc: A piece of hot spicy meat.
obj.item.food.meat.steak.gondola.name: gondola steak

obj.item.food.meat.steak.killertomato.desc: A piece of hot spicy meat.
obj.item.food.meat.steak.killertomato.name: killer tomato steak

obj.item.food.meat.steak.meatproduct.desc: A piece of hot spicy meat.
obj.item.food.meat.steak.meatproduct.name: thermally processed meat product

obj.item.food.meat.steak.penguin.desc: A piece of hot spicy meat.
obj.item.food.meat.steak.penguin.name: penguin steak

obj.item.food.meat.steak.plain.desc: A piece of hot spicy meat.
obj.item.food.meat.steak.plain.name: steak

obj.item.food.meat.steak.plain.human.desc: A piece of hot spicy meat.
obj.item.food.meat.steak.plain.human.name: steak

obj.item.food.meat.steak.plain.human.liz.desc: A piece of hot spicy meat.
obj.item.food.meat.steak.plain.human.liz.name: lizard steak

obj.item.food.meat.steak.plain.pig.desc: A pork chop. Quit bustin' my chops!
obj.item.food.meat.steak.plain.pig.name: pork chops

obj.item.food.meat.steak.plain.synth.desc: A synthetic meat steak. It doesn't look quite right, now does it?
obj.item.food.meat.steak.plain.synth.name: synthsteak

obj.item.food.meat.steak.spider.desc: A piece of hot spicy meat.
obj.item.food.meat.steak.spider.name: spider steak

obj.item.food.meat.steak.xeno.desc: A piece of hot spicy meat.
obj.item.food.meat.steak.xeno.name: xeno steak

obj.item.food.meat_calzone.desc: A calzone filled with cheese, meat, and a tomato sauce. Don't burn your tongue!.
obj.item.food.meat_calzone.name: meat calzone

obj.item.food.meat_pierogi.desc: A dumpling made by wrapping unleavened dough around a savoury or sweet filling and cooking in boiling water. This one is filled with a potato and meat mixture.
obj.item.food.meat_pierogi.name: meat pierogi

obj.item.food.meat_poke.desc: Simple poke, rice on the bottom, vegetables and meat on top. Should be mixed before eating.
obj.item.food.meat_poke.name: meat poke

obj.item.food.meatball.desc: A great meal all round. Not a cord of wood.
obj.item.food.meatball.name: meatball

obj.item.food.meatball.bear.desc: A great meal all round. Not a cord of wood.
obj.item.food.meatball.bear.name: bear meatball

obj.item.food.meatball.chicken.desc: A great meal all round. Not a cord of wood.
obj.item.food.meatball.chicken.name: chicken meatball

obj.item.food.meatball.chicken.human.desc: A great meal all round. Not a cord of wood.
obj.item.food.meatball.chicken.human.name: strange chicken meatball

obj.item.food.meatball.corgi.desc: A great meal all round. Not a cord of wood.
obj.item.food.meatball.corgi.name: corgi meatball

obj.item.food.meatball.human.desc: A great meal all round. Not a cord of wood.
obj.item.food.meatball.human.name: strange meatball

obj.item.food.meatball.xeno.desc: A great meal all round. Not a cord of wood.
obj.item.food.meatball.xeno.name: xenomorph meatball

obj.item.food.meatbun.desc: Has the potential to not be human.
obj.item.food.meatbun.name: meat bun

obj.item.food.meatclown.desc: A delicious, round piece of meat clown. How horrifying.
obj.item.food.meatclown.name: meat clown

obj.item.food.meatloaf.desc: A mixture of meat, onions, and garlic formed into a loaf and baked in an oven. It's covered in a generous slathering of ketchup. Use a knife to cut it into slices!
obj.item.food.meatloaf.name: meatloaf

obj.item.food.meatloaf_slice.desc: A slice of delicious, juicy meatloaf with a ketchup topping.
obj.item.food.meatloaf_slice.name: meatloaf slice

obj.item.food.melonfruitbowl.desc: For people who want to experience an explosion of flavour.
obj.item.food.melonfruitbowl.name: melon fruit bowl

obj.item.food.melonkeg.desc: Who knew vodka was a fruit?
obj.item.food.melonkeg.name: melon keg

obj.item.food.mimce_pie.desc: A pastry with a star-shaped lid, filled with Nothing.
obj.item.food.mimce_pie.name: mimce pie

obj.item.food.mince_pie.desc: The edible embodiment of christmas cheer.
obj.item.food.mince_pie.name: mince pie

obj.item.food.monkeycube.bee.desc: We were sure it was a good idea. Just add water.
obj.item.food.monkeycube.bee.name: bee cube

obj.item.food.monkeycube.chicken.desc: A new Nanotrasen classic, the chicken cube. Tastes like everything!
obj.item.food.monkeycube.chicken.name: chicken cube

obj.item.food.monkeycube.dangerous_horse.desc: This is a cube that, when water is added, creates a syndicate pony powerful enough to break the enemy's face!
obj.item.food.monkeycube.dangerous_horse.name: a pony cube

obj.item.food.monkeycube.gorilla.desc: A Waffle Corp. brand gorilla cube. Now with extra molecules!
obj.item.food.monkeycube.gorilla.name: gorilla cube

obj.item.food.monkeycube.random.desc: A cube that, when water is added, creates a random creature. Who knows what's inside?
obj.item.food.monkeycube.random.name: monster cube

obj.item.food.moonfish_caviar.desc: A rich paste made from moonfish eggs. Generally the only way most lizards can get them, and used fairly heavily in coastal cooking.
obj.item.food.moonfish_caviar.name: moonfish caviar paste

obj.item.food.moonfish_demiglace.desc: A slab of beautifully seared moonfish on a bed of potatoes and carrots, with a wine and demiglace reduction on top. Simply marvelous.
obj.item.food.moonfish_demiglace.name: moonfish demiglace

obj.item.food.moonfish_eggs.desc: The moonfish lays large, translucent blue eggs which are prized in lizard cooking. Their flavour is similar to caviar, but generally is described as deeper and more complex.
obj.item.food.moonfish_eggs.name: moonfish eggs

obj.item.food.moth_cheese_cakes.desc: Ælorölen (cheese balls) are a traditional mothic dessert, made of soft cheese, powdered sugar and flour, rolled into balls, battered and then deep fried. They're often served with either chocolate sauce or honey, or sometimes both!
obj.item.food.moth_cheese_cakes.name: ælorölen

obj.item.food.mothic_pizza_dough.desc: A strong, glutenous dough, made with cornmeal and flour, designed to hold up to cheese and sauce.
obj.item.food.mothic_pizza_dough.name: mothic pizza dough

obj.item.food.mothic_salad.desc: A basic salad of cabbage, red onion and tomato. Can serve as a perfect base for a million different salads.
obj.item.food.mothic_salad.name: mothic salad

obj.item.food.moussaka.desc: A layered Mediterranean dish made of eggplants, mixed veggies, and meat with a topping of bechamel sauce. Sliceable
obj.item.food.moussaka.name: moussaka

obj.item.food.moussaka_slice.desc: A layered Mediterranean dish made of eggplants, mixed veggies, and meat with a topping of bechamel sauce. Delish!
obj.item.food.moussaka_slice.name: moussaka slice

obj.item.food.mozzarella_sticks.desc: Little sticks of mozzarella, breaded and fried.
obj.item.food.mozzarella_sticks.name: mozzarella sticks

obj.item.food.mre_course.desc: Something you shouldn't see. But it's edible.
obj.item.food.mre_course.name: undefined MRE course

obj.item.food.mre_course.dessert.desc: Dessert of the ancient military ration designed for ground troops. This one is NOTHING.
obj.item.food.mre_course.dessert.name: MRE dessert

obj.item.food.mre_course.dessert.cake.desc: Dessert of the ancient military ration designed for ground troops. This one is an amorphous apple pie.
obj.item.food.mre_course.dessert.cake.name: MRE dessert - Apple Pie

obj.item.food.mre_course.dessert.chocola.desc: Dessert of the ancient military ration designed for ground troops. This one is a dark bar of chocolate.
obj.item.food.mre_course.dessert.chocola.name: MRE dessert - Dark Chocolate

obj.item.food.mre_course.dessert.cookie.desc: Dessert of the ancient military ration designed for ground troops. This one is a big dry cookie.

obj.item.food.mre_course.side.bread.name: MRE side course - Cornbread

obj.item.food.mre_course.side.chicken.desc: Side course of the ancient military ration designed for ground troops. This one is some undefined chicken-looking meat covered in cheap reddish sauce.
obj.item.food.mre_course.side.chicken.name: MRE side course - Sweet 'n Sour Chicken

obj.item.food.mre_course.side.pie.desc: Side course of the ancient military ration designed for ground troops. This one is some meat pie.
obj.item.food.mre_course.side.pie.name: MRE side course - Meat Pie

obj.item.food.mushroomy_stirfry.name: mushroomy stirfry

obj.item.food.pineappleslice.name: pineapple slice

obj.item.food.pita_bread.desc: a multi-purposed sweet flatbread of Mediterranean origins.
obj.item.food.pita_bread.name: pita bread

obj.item.food.pizza.arnold.desc: Hello, you've reached Arnold's pizza shop. I'm not here now, I'm out killing pepperoni.

obj.item.food.pizza.donkpocket.desc: Who thought this would be a good idea?
obj.item.food.pizza.donkpocket.name: donkpocket pizza

obj.item.food.pizza.donkpocket.raw.desc: Who thought this would be a good idea?
obj.item.food.pizza.donkpocket.raw.name: raw donkpocket pizza

obj.item.food.pizza.energy.desc: You could probably power a RIPLEY with this. You should avoid eating this if you aren't an Ethereal.
obj.item.food.pizza.energy.name: energy pizza

obj.item.food.pizza.energy.raw.name: raw energy pizza

obj.item.food.pizza.flatbread.fish.name: BBQ fish flatbread

obj.item.food.pizza.flatbread.imperial.name: Imperial flatbread

obj.item.food.pizza.flatbread.italic.name: Italic flatbread

obj.item.food.pizza.flatbread.mushroom.name: mushroom and tomato flatbread

obj.item.food.pizza.flatbread.nutty.name: nut paste flatbread

obj.item.food.pizza.flatbread.rawmeat.desc: Oddly enough, this Tiziran dish is actually a favorite of some health-minded humans.
obj.item.food.pizza.flatbread.rawmeat.name: meatlovers flatbread

obj.item.food.pizza.flatbread.rustic.desc: A simple Tiziran country dish, popular as a side to meat or fish dishes. Topped with herbs and oil.
obj.item.food.pizza.flatbread.rustic.name: rustic flatbread

obj.item.food.pizza.flatbread.stinging.desc: The electric mix of jellyfish and bee larva makes for a flavor sensation that leaves you asking for more!
obj.item.food.pizza.flatbread.stinging.name: Stinging flatbread

obj.item.food.pizza.flatbread.zmorgast.desc: A Tiziran spin on the original Swedish sandwich cake, the Zmorgast is a common dish at family gatherings.
obj.item.food.pizza.flatbread.zmorgast.name: Zmorgast flatbread

obj.item.food.pizza.margherita.desc: The most cheezy pizza in galaxy.
obj.item.food.pizza.margherita.name: pizza margherita

obj.item.food.pizza.margherita.raw.desc: The most cheezy pizza in galaxy.
obj.item.food.pizza.margherita.raw.name: raw pizza margherita

obj.item.food.pizza.margherita.robo.desc: The most cheezy pizza in galaxy.
obj.item.food.pizza.margherita.robo.name: pizza margherita

obj.item.food.pizza.mothic_firecracker.desc: They're not kidding when they call this a hot pizza pie.
obj.item.food.pizza.mothic_firecracker.name: mothic firecracker pizza

obj.item.food.pizza.mothic_five_cheese.desc: A favourite amongst mice, rats, and English inventors.
obj.item.food.pizza.mothic_five_cheese.name: mothic five-cheese pizza

obj.item.food.pizza.mothic_garlic.desc: The best food in the galaxy, hands down.
obj.item.food.pizza.mothic_garlic.name: mothic garlic pizzabread

obj.item.food.pizza.mothic_margherita.desc: A key characteristic of mothic pizza is that it's sold by weight- single slices are available for discretionary credits, while a meal ticket can buy a whole pie.
obj.item.food.pizza.mothic_margherita.name: mothic margherita pizza

obj.item.food.pizza.mothic_pesto.desc: Green as the grass in the garden. Not that there's many of those on mothic ships.
obj.item.food.pizza.mothic_pesto.name: mothic pesto pizza

obj.item.food.pizza.mothic_white_pie.desc: You say to-may-to, I say to-mah-to, and we put neither on this pizza.
obj.item.food.pizza.mothic_white_pie.name: mothic white-pie pizza

obj.item.food.pizza.pineapple.desc: The pizza equivalent of Einstein's riddle.

obj.item.food.pizza.pineapple.raw.name: raw Hawaiian pizza

obj.item.food.pizza.sassysage.desc: You can almost taste the sassiness.
obj.item.food.pizza.sassysage.name: sassysage pizza

obj.item.food.pizza.sassysage.raw.desc: You can almost taste the sassiness.
obj.item.food.pizza.sassysage.raw.name: raw sassysage pizza

obj.item.food.pizza.vegetable.desc: No one of Tomatoes Sapiens were harmed during making this pizza.
obj.item.food.pizza.vegetable.name: vegetable pizza

obj.item.food.pizza.vegetable.raw.desc: No one of Tomatoes Sapiens were harmed during making this pizza.

obj.item.food.pizzabread.desc: Add ingredients to make a pizza.
obj.item.food.pizzabread.name: pizza bread

obj.item.food.pizzaslice.desc: This slice of pizza should not be
obj.item.food.pizzaslice.name: bugged pizza slice

obj.item.food.pizzaslice.ants.desc: The key to a perfect slice of pizza is not to overdo it with the ants.
obj.item.food.pizzaslice.ants.name: Ant Party pizza slice

obj.item.food.pizzaslice.arnold.desc: I come over, maybe I give you a pizza, maybe I break off your arm.

obj.item.food.pizzaslice.custom.desc: A slice of custom fancy pizza.
obj.item.food.pizzaslice.custom.name: pizza slice

obj.item.food.pizzaslice.energy.desc: You're thinking about using this to power your modsuit. You should avoid eating this if you aren't an Ethereal.

obj.item.food.pizzaslice.margherita.desc: A slice of the most cheezy pizza in galaxy.
