obj.item.food.pizzaslice.meat.pizzeria.desc: An ostensibly nutritious slice of meatpizza from a long-closed pizzeria.
obj.item.food.pizzaslice.meat.pizzeria.name: pizzeria meatpizza slice

obj.item.food.pizzaslice.moldy.desc: This was once a perfectly good slice of pizza pie, but now it lies here, rancid and bursting with spores. 		What a bummer! But we should not dwell on the past, only look towards the future.
obj.item.food.pizzaslice.moldy.name: moldy pizza slice

obj.item.food.pizzaslice.moldy.bacteria.desc: Not only is this once delicious pizza encrusted with a layer of spore-spewing fungus, it also seems to shift and slide when unattended, teeming with new life.
obj.item.food.pizzaslice.moldy.bacteria.name: bacteria rich moldy pizza slice

obj.item.food.pizzaslice.mothic_firecrac.desc: A spicy slice of something quite nice.
obj.item.food.pizzaslice.mothic_firecrac.name: mothic firecracker slice

obj.item.food.pizzaslice.mothic_five_che.desc: It's the cheesiest slice in the galaxy!
obj.item.food.pizzaslice.mothic_five_che.name: mothic five-cheese slice

obj.item.food.pizzaslice.mothic_garlic.desc: The best combination of oily, garlicky, and crusty known to mothkind.
obj.item.food.pizzaslice.mothic_garlic.name: mothic garlic pizzabread slice

obj.item.food.pizzaslice.mothic_margheri.desc: A slice of mothic margherita pizza, the most humble of pizzas.
obj.item.food.pizzaslice.mothic_margheri.name: mothic margherita slice

obj.item.food.pizzaslice.mothic_pesto.desc: A slice of presto pesto pizza.
obj.item.food.pizzaslice.mothic_pesto.name: mothic pesto slice

obj.item.food.pizzaslice.mushroom.desc: Maybe it is the last slice of pizza in your life.
obj.item.food.pizzaslice.mushroom.name: mushroom pizza slice

obj.item.food.pizzaslice.vegetable.desc: A slice of the most green pizza of all pizzas not containing green ingredients.
obj.item.food.pizzaslice.vegetable.name: vegetable pizza slice

obj.item.food.plain_hard_shell_taco.desc: A hard-shell taco with just meat, for the picky eaters and children in us all.
obj.item.food.plain_hard_shell_taco.name: plain hard-shell taco

obj.item.food.plasma_dog_supreme.desc: The signature snack of Cybersun Park, home of the New Osaka Woodpeckers: a ballpark hot-dog with sambal, dashi-grilled onions and pineapple-lime salsa. You know, the sort of bold flavours they enjoy on Mars.
obj.item.food.plasma_dog_supreme.name: Plasma Dog Supreme

obj.item.food.plumphelmetbiscuit.desc: This is a finely-prepared plump helmet biscuit. The ingredients are exceptionally minced plump helmet, and well-minced dwarven wheat flour.
obj.item.food.plumphelmetbiscuit.name: plump helmet biscuit

obj.item.food.popcorn.salty.desc: Salty popcorn, a classic for all time.
obj.item.food.popcorn.salty.name: salty popcorn

obj.item.food.popsicle.creamsicle_berry.desc: A vibrant berry creamsicle. A berry good frozen treat.
obj.item.food.popsicle.creamsicle_berry.name: berry creamsicle

obj.item.food.popsicle.creamsicle_orange.desc: A classic orange creamsicle. A sunny frozen treat.
obj.item.food.popsicle.creamsicle_orange.name: orange creamsicle

obj.item.food.popsicle.jumbo.desc: A luxurious ice cream covered in rich chocolate. It seems smaller than you remember it being.
obj.item.food.popsicle.jumbo.name: jumbo ice cream

obj.item.food.popsicle.licorice_creamsic.desc: A salty licorice ice cream. A salty frozen treat.
obj.item.food.popsicle.licorice_creamsic.name: Void Bar™

obj.item.food.popsicle.meatsicle.desc: A horrific abomination of raw meat, glazed with sugar on a stick, then frozen.
obj.item.food.popsicle.meatsicle.name: meatsicle

obj.item.food.popsicle.pineapple_pop.desc: Few cultures love pineapple as much as the Martians, and this dessert proves that- frozen pineapple, on a stick, with just a little dunk of dark chocolate.
obj.item.food.popsicle.pineapple_pop.name: frozen pineapple pop

obj.item.food.popsicle.sea_salt.desc: This sky-blue ice-cream bar is flavoured with only the finest imported sea salt. Salty... no, sweet!
obj.item.food.popsicle.sea_salt.name: sea salt ice-cream bar

obj.item.food.popsicle.topsicle.desc: A frozen treat made from tofu and berry juice blended smooth, then frozen. Supposedly a favourite of bears, but that makes no sense...
obj.item.food.popsicle.topsicle.name: berry topsicle

obj.item.food.popsicle.topsicle.banana.desc: A frozen treat made from tofu and banana juice blended smooth, then frozen. Popular in rural Japan in the summer.
obj.item.food.popsicle.topsicle.banana.name: banana topsicle

obj.item.food.popsicle.topsicle.pineappl.desc: A frozen treat made from tofu and pineapple juice blended smooth, then frozen. As seen on TV.
obj.item.food.popsicle.topsicle.pineappl.name: pineapple topsicle

obj.item.food.poutine.desc: Fries covered in cheese curds and gravy.
obj.item.food.poutine.name: poutine

obj.item.food.powercrepe.desc: With great power, comes great crepes.  It looks like a pancake filled with jelly but packs quite a punch.
obj.item.food.powercrepe.name: powercrepe

obj.item.food.prospect_sunrise.desc: The second-most quintessential Martian breakfast sandwich. The most beautiful combination of omelette, bacon, pickles and cheese. Available in every cafe across Prospect.
obj.item.food.prospect_sunrise.name: Prospect Sunrise

obj.item.food.ratatouille.desc: The perfect dish to save your restaurant from a vindictive food critic. Bonus points if you've got a rat in your hat.
obj.item.food.ratatouille.name: ratatouille

obj.item.food.rationpack.desc: A square bar that sadly looks like chocolate, packaged in a nondescript grey wrapper. Has saved soldiers' lives before - usually by stopping bullets.
obj.item.food.rationpack.name: ration pack

obj.item.food.raw_baked_rice.desc: A big pan of layered potatoes topped with rice and vegetable stock, ready to be baked into a delicious sharing meal.
obj.item.food.raw_baked_rice.name: big rice pan

obj.item.food.raw_ballpark_pretzel.desc: A twisted knot of dough, ready to be baked, or possibly griddled?
obj.item.food.raw_ballpark_pretzel.name: raw pretzel

obj.item.food.raw_breadstick.desc: An uncooked strip of dough in the shape of a breadstick.
obj.item.food.raw_breadstick.name: raw breadstick

obj.item.food.raw_brownie_batter.desc: A sticky mixture of raw brownie batter, cook it in the oven!
obj.item.food.raw_brownie_batter.name: raw brownie batter

obj.item.food.raw_croissant.desc: Folded dough ready to bake into a croissant.
obj.item.food.raw_croissant.name: raw croissant

obj.item.food.raw_frenchtoast.desc: A slice of bread soaked in a beaten egg mixture. Put it on a griddle to start cooking!
obj.item.food.raw_frenchtoast.name: raw french toast

obj.item.food.raw_green_lasagne.desc: A fine lasagne made with pesto and a herby white sauce, ready to bake. Good for multiple servings.
obj.item.food.raw_green_lasagne.name: raw green lasagne al forno

obj.item.food.raw_headcheese.desc: A common food on Tizira, headcheese is traditionally made of an animal's head, with the organs removed, boiled until it falls apart, at which point it is collected, strained of moisture, salted heavily, packed into blocks, and left to dry and age for several months. The resulting hard block tastes similar to cheese.
obj.item.food.raw_headcheese.name: raw headcheese block

obj.item.food.raw_meat_calzone.desc: A raw calzone, ready to be put in the oven.
obj.item.food.raw_meat_calzone.name: raw meat calzone

obj.item.food.raw_meatball.desc: A great meal all round. Not a cord of wood. Kinda raw
obj.item.food.raw_meatball.name: raw meatball

obj.item.food.raw_meatball.bear.desc: A great meal all round. Not a cord of wood. Kinda raw
obj.item.food.raw_meatball.bear.name: raw bear meatball

obj.item.food.raw_meatball.chicken.desc: A great meal all round. Not a cord of wood. Kinda raw
obj.item.food.raw_meatball.chicken.name: raw chicken meatball

obj.item.food.raw_meatball.chicken.human.desc: A great meal all round. Not a cord of wood. Kinda raw
obj.item.food.raw_meatball.chicken.human.name: strange raw chicken meatball

obj.item.food.raw_meatball.corgi.desc: A great meal all round. Not a cord of wood. Kinda raw
obj.item.food.raw_meatball.corgi.name: raw corgi meatball

obj.item.food.raw_meatball.human.desc: A great meal all round. Not a cord of wood. Kinda raw
obj.item.food.raw_meatball.human.name: strange raw meatball

obj.item.food.raw_meatball.xeno.desc: A great meal all round. Not a cord of wood. Kinda raw
obj.item.food.raw_meatball.xeno.name: raw xeno meatball

obj.item.food.raw_meatloaf.desc: A heavy 'loaf' of minced meat, onions, and garlic. Bake it in an oven!
obj.item.food.raw_meatloaf.name: raw meatloaf

obj.item.food.raw_mothic_firecracker.desc: A favourite amongst the more adventurous moths, firecracker pizza is HOT HOT HOT!
obj.item.food.raw_mothic_firecracker.name: raw mothic firecracker pizza

obj.item.food.raw_mothic_five_cheese.desc: For centuries, scholars have asked: how much cheese is too much cheese?
obj.item.food.raw_mothic_five_cheese.name: raw mothic five-cheese pizza

obj.item.food.raw_mothic_garlic.desc: Ahh, garlic. A universally loved ingredient, except possibly by vampires.
obj.item.food.raw_mothic_garlic.name: raw mothic garlic pizzabread

obj.item.food.raw_mothic_margherita.desc: Another human classic adopted by the moths, mothic pizza is characterised by the use of fresh ingredients, 		particularly fresh mozzarella, and the use of strong flour to produce a glutenous dough.
obj.item.food.raw_mothic_margherita.name: raw mothic margherita pizza

obj.item.food.raw_mothic_pesto.desc: Pesto is a popular pizza topping for moths, quite possibly because it exemplifies their favourite flavours: cheese, herbs, and veggies.
obj.item.food.raw_mothic_pesto.name: raw mothic pesto pizza

obj.item.food.raw_mothic_white_pie.desc: A pizza made for the tomato haters.
obj.item.food.raw_mothic_white_pie.name: raw mothic white-pie pizza

obj.item.food.raw_pita_bread.desc: a sticky disk of raw pita bread.
obj.item.food.raw_pita_bread.name: raw pita bread

obj.item.food.raw_ratatouille.desc: Sliced vegetables with a roasted pepper sauce. Delicious, for a peasant food.
obj.item.food.raw_ratatouille.name: raw ratatouille

obj.item.food.raw_sausage.desc: A piece of mixed, long meat, but then raw.
obj.item.food.raw_sausage.name: raw sausage

obj.item.food.raw_sausage.battered.desc: A raw sausage coated in thick beer batter.
obj.item.food.raw_sausage.battered.name: raw battered sausage

obj.item.food.raw_stuffed_peppers.desc: A pepper with the top removed and a herby cheese and onion mix stuffed inside. Probably shouldn't be eaten raw.
obj.item.food.raw_stuffed_peppers.name: raw voltölpaprik

obj.item.food.raw_tiziran_sausage.desc: A raw Tiziran blood sausage, ready to be cured on a drying rack.
obj.item.food.raw_tiziran_sausage.name: raw Tiziran blood sausage

obj.item.food.raw_vegetarian_calzone.desc: A raw calzone, ready to be put in the oven.
obj.item.food.raw_vegetarian_calzone.name: raw vegetarian calzone

obj.item.food.rawegg.desc: Supposedly good for you, if you can stomach it. Better fried.
obj.item.food.rawegg.name: raw egg

obj.item.food.rawegg.spore.desc: Is this the ant egg everyone is always talking about? Better fried.
obj.item.food.rawegg.spore.name: burst spore

obj.item.food.rawkhinkali.desc: One hundred khinkalis? Do I look like a pig?
obj.item.food.rawkhinkali.name: raw khinkali

obj.item.food.ready_donk.desc: A quick Donk-dinner: now with flavour!
obj.item.food.ready_donk.name: Ready-Donk: Bachelor Chow

obj.item.food.ready_donk.country_chicken.desc: A TV dinner classic: "crispy" fried chicken in country gravy, mashed potatoes, and green beans.
obj.item.food.ready_donk.country_chicken.name: Ready-Donk Donkriginals: Country-Fried Chicken

obj.item.food.ready_donk.donkhiladas.desc: Donk Co's signature Donkhiladas with Donk sauce, for an 'authentic' taste of Mexico.
obj.item.food.ready_donk.donkhiladas.name: Ready-Donk: Donkhiladas

obj.item.food.ready_donk.donkrange_chick.desc: A Chinese classic, it's Donk's original spicy orange chicken with stir-fried peppers and onions, all over steamed rice.
obj.item.food.ready_donk.donkrange_chick.name: Ready-Donk: Donk-range Chicken

obj.item.food.ready_donk.mac_n_cheese.desc: Neon-orange mac n' cheese in seconds!
obj.item.food.ready_donk.mac_n_cheese.name: Ready-Donk: Donk-a-Roni

obj.item.food.ready_donk.nachos_grandes.desc: Get ready for game day with Donk's classic Nachos Grandes, sponsors of the Donk Sol Series! Boritos chips loaded with cheese, spicy meat and beans, alongside separate guac, pico and donk sauce. Batter up!
obj.item.food.ready_donk.nachos_grandes.name: Ready-Donk: Donk Sol Series Boritos Nachos Grandes

obj.item.food.ready_donk.salisbury_steak.desc: The original and best: it's a slab of moulded beef, drenched in brown gravy, with a side of mashed potatoes. Better find a TV to eat this in front of.
obj.item.food.ready_donk.salisbury_steak.name: Ready-Donk Donkriginals: Salisbury Steak

obj.item.food.ready_donk.warm.desc: A quick Donk-dinner, now with flavour! And it's even hot!
obj.item.food.ready_donk.warm.name: warm Ready-Donk: Bachelor Chow

obj.item.food.ready_donk.warm.country_ch.desc: A TV dinner classic: "crispy" fried chicken in country gravy, mashed potatoes, and green beans. Get it while it's hot!
obj.item.food.ready_donk.warm.country_ch.name: warm Ready-Donk Donkriginals: Country-Fried Chicken

obj.item.food.ready_donk.warm.donkhilada.desc: Donk Co's signature Donkhiladas with Donk sauce, served as hot as the Mexican sun.
obj.item.food.ready_donk.warm.donkhilada.name: warm Ready-Donk: Donkhiladas

obj.item.food.ready_donk.warm.donkrange_.desc: A Chinese classic, it's Donk's original spicy orange chicken with stir-fried peppers and onions, all over steamed rice and served hotter than a dragon's breath.
obj.item.food.ready_donk.warm.donkrange_.name: warm Ready-Donk: Donk-range Chicken

obj.item.food.ready_donk.warm.mac_n_chee.desc: Neon-orange mac n' cheese, ready to eat!
obj.item.food.ready_donk.warm.mac_n_chee.name: warm Ready-Donk: Donk-a-Roni

obj.item.food.ready_donk.warm.nachos_gra.desc: Get ready for game day with Donk's classic Nachos Grandes, sponsors of the Donk Sol Series! Boritos chips loaded with cheese, spicy meat and beans, alongside separate guac, pico and donk sauce. Served hotter than Sakamoto's fastball!
obj.item.food.ready_donk.warm.nachos_gra.name: warm Ready-Donk: Donk Sol Series Boritos Nachos Grandes

obj.item.food.ready_donk.warm.salisbury_.desc: The original and best: it's a slab of moulded beef, drenched in brown gravy, with a side of mashed potatoes. It's almost as hot as a season finale.
obj.item.food.ready_donk.warm.salisbury_.name: warm Ready-Donk Donkriginals: Salisbury Steak

obj.item.food.refried_beans.desc: A steaming bowl of delicious refried beans, a common staple in Mexican cuisine.
obj.item.food.refried_beans.name: refried beans

obj.item.food.rice_dough.desc: A piece of dough made with equal parts rice flour and wheat flour, for a unique flavour.
obj.item.food.rice_dough.name: rice dough

obj.item.food.roast_dinner.desc: A luxuriously roasted chicken, accompanied by cabbage, parsnip, potatoes, peas, stuffing and a small boat of gravy.
obj.item.food.roast_dinner.name: roast dinner

obj.item.food.roast_dinner_lizzy.desc: A luxuriously roasted chicken, accompanied by cabbage, parsnip, potatoes, peas, korta stuffing and a small boat of korta-blood gravy.
obj.item.food.roast_dinner_lizzy.name: grain-free roast dinner

obj.item.food.roast_dinner_tofu.desc: A luxuriously roasted tofu-'chicken', accompanied by cabbage, parsnip, potatoes, peas, stuffing and a small boat of soy-based gravy.
obj.item.food.roast_dinner_tofu.name: tofu roast dinner

obj.item.food.roast_slice.desc: A small plate of roast chicken, peas, cabbage, parsnips, potatoes, stuffing and... WAIT is this all the gravy I get?!
obj.item.food.roast_slice.name: plate of roast dinner

obj.item.food.roast_slice_lizzy.desc: A small plate of roast chicken, peas, cabbage, parsnips, potatoes, korta stuffing and... WAIT is this all the korta-blood gravy I get?!
obj.item.food.roast_slice_lizzy.name: plate of grain-free roast dinner

obj.item.food.roast_slice_tofu.desc: A small plate of roast tofu-'chicken', peas, cabbage, parsnips, potatoes, stuffing and... WAIT is this all the soy gravy I get?!
obj.item.food.roast_slice_tofu.name: plate of tofu roast dinner

obj.item.food.roasted_bell_pepper.desc: A blackened, blistered bell pepper. Great for making sauces.
obj.item.food.roasted_bell_pepper.name: roasted bell pepper

obj.item.food.root_flatbread.desc: A plain grilled root flatbread. Can be topped with a variety of foods that lizards like to eat.
obj.item.food.root_flatbread.name: root flatbread

obj.item.food.root_flatbread.egg.desc: A plain grilled root flatbread. Can be topped with a variety of foods that lizards like to eat.
obj.item.food.root_flatbread.egg.name: root flatbread

obj.item.food.rootbread_peanut_butter_ba.desc: A peanut butter rootwich with banana slices mixed in, a good high protein treat.
obj.item.food.rootbread_peanut_butter_ba.name: peanut butter and banana rootwich

obj.item.food.rootbread_peanut_butter_je.desc: A classic PB&J rootwich, just like the replicant that replaced your mom used to make.
obj.item.food.rootbread_peanut_butter_je.name: peanut butter and jelly rootwich

obj.item.food.rootdough.desc: A root based dough, made with nuts and tubers. Used in a wide range of Tiziran cooking.
obj.item.food.rootdough.name: root dough

obj.item.food.rootdough.egg.desc: A root based dough, made with nuts, tubers and eggs. Used in a wide range of Tiziran cooking.
obj.item.food.rootdough.egg.name: root dough

obj.item.food.rootdoughslice.desc: A ball of root dough. Perfect for making pasta or rolls.
obj.item.food.rootdoughslice.name: rootdough ball

obj.item.food.rootdoughslice.egg.desc: A ball of root dough. Perfect for making pasta or rolls.
obj.item.food.rootdoughslice.egg.name: rootdough ball

obj.item.food.rootroll.desc: A dense, chewy roll, made from roots. A nice companion to a bowl of soup.
obj.item.food.rootroll.name: rootroll

obj.item.food.rootroll.egg.desc: A dense, chewy roll, made from roots. A nice companion to a bowl of soup.
obj.item.food.rootroll.egg.name: rootroll

obj.item.food.roti_john.desc: A classic Malaysian snack, the roti john consists of bread fried in a mixture of meat, egg and onion, yielding a result that's somewhere between French toast and an omelette.
obj.item.food.roti_john.name: roti john

obj.item.food.salad.aesirsalad.desc: Probably too incredible for mortal men to fully enjoy.
obj.item.food.salad.aesirsalad.name: Aesir salad

obj.item.food.salad.agedashi_tofu.desc: Crispy fried tofu, served in a tasty umami broth. Frequently served at izakayas.
obj.item.food.salad.agedashi_tofu.name: agedashi tofu

obj.item.food.salad.antipasto_salad.desc: A traditional Italian salad made of salami, mozzarella cheese, olives, and tomatoes. Often served as a first course meal.
obj.item.food.salad.antipasto_salad.name: antipasto salad

obj.item.food.salad.beef_bowl.desc: A tasty mix of stewed beef, onion and dashi, served over rice. Typical toppings include pickled ginger, chilli powder, and fried eggs.
obj.item.food.salad.beef_bowl.name: beef bowl

obj.item.food.salad.bibimbap.desc: A Korean dish consisting of rice and various toppings, served in a hot stone bowl.
obj.item.food.salad.bibimbap.name: bibimbap

obj.item.food.salad.bulgogi_noodles.desc: Korean barbecue meat served with noodles! Made with gochujang, for extra spicy flavour.
obj.item.food.salad.bulgogi_noodles.name: bulgogi noodles

obj.item.food.salad.caesar_salad.desc: A simple yet flavorful salad of onions, lettuce, croutons, and shreds of cheese dressed in oil. Comes with a slice of pita bread!
obj.item.food.salad.caesar_salad.name: caesar salad

obj.item.food.salad.cotton_salad.desc: A salad with added cotton and a basic dressing. Presumably either moths are around, or the South's risen again.
obj.item.food.salad.cotton_salad.name: flöfrölenknusksolt

obj.item.food.salad.edensalad.desc: A salad brimming with untapped potential.
obj.item.food.salad.edensalad.name: Salad of Eden

obj.item.food.salad.egg_fried_rice.desc: As simple as fried rice gets: rice, egg, soy sauce. Simple, elegant, and infinitely customisable.
obj.item.food.salad.egg_fried_rice.name: egg fried rice

obj.item.food.salad.eggbowl.desc: A bowl of rice with a fried egg.
obj.item.food.salad.eggbowl.name: egg bowl

obj.item.food.salad.eigamudo_curry.desc: An inexplicable curry dish made from a cacophony of ingredients. Presumably tastes good to someone, somewhere- though good luck finding them.
obj.item.food.salad.eigamudo_curry.name: Eigamudo curry

obj.item.food.salad.fleet_salad.desc: Lörtonknusksolt, or Fleet Salad in GalCom, is commonly seen at the snack bars and canteens aboard the Fleet. 		The grilled cheese makes it particularly filling, while the croutons provide a crunchy kick.
obj.item.food.salad.fleet_salad.name: lörtonknusksolt

obj.item.food.salad.galinha_de_cabidela.desc: Originally a Portuguese dish, cabidela rice is traditionally made with chicken in Portugal, and duck in Macau- ultimately, the chicken version won out on Mars due to European influence.
obj.item.food.salad.galinha_de_cabidela.name: galinha de cabidela

obj.item.food.salad.greek_salad.desc: A popular salad made of tomatoes, onions, feta cheese, and olives all drizzled in olive oil. Though it feels like it's missing something...
obj.item.food.salad.greek_salad.name: greek salad

obj.item.food.salad.gumbo.desc: A spicy and savory meat and rice dish.
obj.item.food.salad.gumbo.name: black eyed gumbo

obj.item.food.salad.hawaiian_fried_rice.desc: Not a traditional Hawaiian dish, Hawaiian fried rice instead utilises a pastiche of Hawaiian ingredients- including diced Chap and, controversially, pineapple. Purists are split on whether pineapple belongs in rice.
obj.item.food.salad.hawaiian_fried_rice.name: Hawaiian fried rice

obj.item.food.salad.herbsalad.desc: A tasty salad with apples on top.
obj.item.food.salad.herbsalad.name: herb salad

obj.item.food.salad.huoxing_tofu.desc: An adaptation of mapo tofu made famous in Prospect, the foodie Mecca of Mars. It even kinda looks like Mars, if you really squint.
obj.item.food.salad.huoxing_tofu.name: Huoxing tofu

obj.item.food.salad.hurricane_rice.desc: Inspired by nasi goreng, this piquant rice dish comes straight from Prospect, on Mars, and its night markets. It's named for its distinctive cooking style, where the frying rice is given lots of airtime while being flipped, mostly because it looks really cool for the customers.
obj.item.food.salad.hurricane_rice.name: hurricane fried rice

obj.item.food.salad.ikareis.desc: A spicy rice dish made with squid-ink, peppers, onions, sausage, and flavourful chillis.
obj.item.food.salad.ikareis.name: ikareis

obj.item.food.salad.kale_salad.desc: A healthy kale salad drizzled in oil, perfect for warm summer months.
obj.item.food.salad.kale_salad.name: kale salad

obj.item.food.salad.kansai_bowl.desc: Also known as konohadon, this donburi is typical to the Kansai region, and consists of kamaboko fishcake, egg and onion served over rice.
obj.item.food.salad.kansai_bowl.name: Kansai bowl

obj.item.food.salad.katsu_curry.desc: Breaded and deep fried meat, topped with curry sauce and served on a bed of rice.
obj.item.food.salad.katsu_curry.name: katsu curry

obj.item.food.salad.ketchup_fried_rice.desc: A classic Japanese comfort food, made with sausage, veggies, worchestershire sauce, rice- oh, and of course, ketchup.
obj.item.food.salad.ketchup_fried_rice.name: ketchup fried rice

obj.item.food.salad.martian_fried_noodle.desc: Fried noodles from the red planet. Martian cooking draws from many cultures, and these noodles are no exception- there's elements of Malay, Thai, Chinese, Korean and Japanese cuisine in here.
obj.item.food.salad.martian_fried_noodle.name: Martian fried noodles

obj.item.food.salad.mediterranean_fried_.desc: A strange take on the fried rice formula: herbs, cheese, olives, and of course, meatballs. Sorta like a hybrid of risotto and fried rice.
obj.item.food.salad.mediterranean_fried_.name: mediterranean fried rice

obj.item.food.salad.moth_kachumbari.desc: Originally a Kenyan recipe, kachumbari is yet another cross-cultural favourite from humanity that has been adopted by the moths- 		though some ingredients have been necessarily changed.
obj.item.food.salad.moth_kachumbari.name: Kæniatknusksolt

obj.item.food.salad.pineapple_foster.desc: A classic Martian adaptation of another classic dessert, Pineapple Foster is a toasty sweet treat which presents only a mild-to-moderate fire risk.
obj.item.food.salad.pineapple_foster.name: pineapple foster

obj.item.food.salad.po_kok_gai.desc: Also known as galinha à portuguesa, or Portuguese chicken, this dish is a Macanese classic born of Portuguese colonialism, though the dish itself is not a Portuguese dish. It consists of chicken in "Portuguese Sauce", a mild coconut-based curry.
obj.item.food.salad.po_kok_gai.name: po kok gai

obj.item.food.salad.potato_salad.desc: A dish of boiled potatoes mixed with boiled eggs, onions, and mayonnaise. A staple of every self-respecting barbecue.
obj.item.food.salad.potato_salad.name: potato salad

obj.item.food.salad.risotto.desc: Proof the Italians mastered every carb.
obj.item.food.salad.risotto.name: risotto

obj.item.food.salad.salt_chilli_bowl.desc: Inspired by the Japanese donburi tradition, this spicy take on ten-don is a flavour sensation that's swept the Martian nation.
obj.item.food.salad.salt_chilli_bowl.name: salt n' chilli octopus bowl

obj.item.food.salad.setagaya_curry.desc: Made famous by a cafe in Setagaya, this curry's extensive recipe has gone on to be a closely-guarded secret amongst cafe owners across human space. The taste is said to replenish the diner's soul, whatever that means.
obj.item.food.salad.setagaya_curry.name: Setagaya curry

obj.item.food.salad.simple_fried_noodles.desc: A simple yet delicious fried noodle dish, perfect for the creative chef to make whatever fried noodles they want.
obj.item.food.salad.simple_fried_noodles.name: simple fried noodles

obj.item.food.salad.spinach_fruit_salad.desc: A vibrant fruit salad made of spinach, berries, and pineapple chunks all drizzled in oil. Yummy!
obj.item.food.salad.spinach_fruit_salad.name: spinach fruit salad

obj.item.food.salad.spring_salad.desc: A simple salad of carrots, lettuce and peas drizzled in oil with a pinch of salt.
obj.item.food.salad.spring_salad.name: spring salad

obj.item.food.salad.sprout_bowl.desc: Named for the Ethereal homeworld, this rice-based bowl draws on the donburi tradition, but rejects typical donburi toppings, instead using sashimi grade fish and pickled voltvine.
obj.item.food.salad.sprout_bowl.name: Sprout bowl

obj.item.food.salad.validsalad.desc: It's just an herb salad with meatballs and fried potato slices. Nothing suspicious about it.
obj.item.food.salad.validsalad.name: valid salad

obj.item.food.salad.yakisoba_katsu.desc: Breaded and deep fried meat on a bed of fried noodles. Delicious, if unconventional.
obj.item.food.salad.yakisoba_katsu.name: yakisoba katsu

obj.item.food.salt_chilli_fries.desc: The simple name of this dish doesn't tell the full story of its deliciousness- sure, salt and chilli are big components, but the onion, ginger and garlic are the real flavour heroes here.
obj.item.food.salt_chilli_fries.name: salt n' chilli fries

obj.item.food.sambal.desc: A spice paste from Indonesia, used widely in cooking throughout South East Asia.
obj.item.food.sambal.name: sambal

obj.item.food.sandwich.desc: A grand creation of meat, cheese, bread, and several leaves of lettuce! Arthur Dent would be proud.
obj.item.food.sandwich.name: sandwich

obj.item.food.sandwich.blt.desc: A classic bacon, lettuce, and tomato sandwich.
obj.item.food.sandwich.blt.name: BLT

obj.item.food.sandwich.cheese.desc: A light snack for a warm day. ...but what if you grilled it?
obj.item.food.sandwich.cheese.name: cheese sandwich

obj.item.food.sandwich.death.desc: Eat it right, or you die!
obj.item.food.sandwich.death.name: death sandwich

obj.item.food.sandwich.grilled_cheese.desc: A warm, melty sandwich that goes perfectly with tomato soup.
obj.item.food.sandwich.grilled_cheese.name: grilled cheese sandwich

obj.item.food.sandwich.jelly.desc: You wish you had some peanut butter to go with this...
obj.item.food.sandwich.jelly.name: jelly sandwich

obj.item.food.sandwich.jelly.cherry.desc: You wish you had some peanut butter to go with this...
obj.item.food.sandwich.jelly.cherry.name: jelly sandwich

obj.item.food.sandwich.jelly.slime.desc: You wish you had some peanut butter to go with this...
obj.item.food.sandwich.jelly.slime.name: jelly sandwich

obj.item.food.sandwich.notasandwich.desc: Something seems to be wrong with this, you can't quite figure what. Maybe it's his moustache.
obj.item.food.sandwich.notasandwich.name: not-a-sandwich

obj.item.food.sandwich.peanut_butter_ban.desc: A peanut butter sandwich with banana slices mixed in, a good high protein treat.
obj.item.food.sandwich.peanut_butter_ban.name: peanut butter and banana sandwich

obj.item.food.sandwich.peanut_butter_jel.desc: A classic PB&J sandwich, just like your mom used to make.
obj.item.food.sandwich.peanut_butter_jel.name: peanut butter and jelly sandwich

obj.item.food.sandwich.philly_cheesestea.desc: A popular sandwich made of sliced meat, onions, melted cheese in a long hoagie roll. Mouthwatering doesn't even begin to describe it.
obj.item.food.sandwich.philly_cheesestea.name: philly cheesesteak

obj.item.food.sandwich.toast_sandwich.desc: A piece of buttered toast between two slices of bread. Why would you make this?
obj.item.food.sandwich.toast_sandwich.name: toast sandwich

obj.item.food.sashimi.desc: Celebrate surviving an attack from hostile alien lifeforms by hospitalising yourself. You sure hope whoever made this is skilled.
obj.item.food.sashimi.name: spider sashimi

obj.item.food.sauerkraut.desc: Pickled cabbage, as made famous by Germans, and which has become common in lizard cooking, where it is known as Zauerkrat.
obj.item.food.sauerkraut.name: sauerkraut

obj.item.food.sausage.desc: A piece of mixed, long meat.
obj.item.food.sausage.name: sausage

obj.item.food.sausage.battered.desc: A sausage coated in thick beer batter, best served with a portion of chips wrapped in a newspaper, it however, is pure cholesterol, Scottish people eat it. Few of them make it to 60.
obj.item.food.sausage.battered.name: battered sausage

obj.item.food.sauteed_eggplant.desc: Thick-cut slices of eggplant sauteed in oil and minced garlic, creating a soft, crispy, healthy snack.
obj.item.food.sauteed_eggplant.name: sauteed eggplant

obj.item.food.scotchegg.desc: A boiled egg wrapped in a delicious, seasoned meatball.
obj.item.food.scotchegg.name: scotch egg

obj.item.food.seaweedsheet.desc: A dried sheet of seaweed used for making sushi. Use an ingredient on it to start making custom sushi!
obj.item.food.seaweedsheet.name: seaweed sheet

obj.item.food.seaweedsheet.saltcane.desc: A dried sheet of saltcane sheathe can used for making sushi. Use an ingredient on it to start making custom sushi!
obj.item.food.seaweedsheet.saltcane.name: dried saltcane sheathe

obj.item.food.semki.desc: A pack of roasted sunflower seeds. Beloved by space Russians and babushka alike.
obj.item.food.semki.name: Semki Sunflower Seeds

obj.item.food.semki.healthy.desc: Homemade roasted sunflower seeds in a paper cup. A healthy and filling snack to nibble as you watch people pass.
obj.item.food.semki.healthy.name: roasted sunflower seeds

obj.item.food.shok_roks.desc: You've heard of Snap-Roks, now get ready for Shok-Roks: the popping candy for Ethereals! Available in 5 exciting flavours, of which this bag contains Stormcloud Candy- like cotton candy, but electric!
obj.item.food.shok_roks.name: Shok-Roks - Stormcloud Candy flavour

obj.item.food.shok_roks.berry.desc: You've heard of Snap-Roks, now get ready for Shok-Roks: the popping candy for Ethereals! Available in 5 exciting flavours, of which this bag contains Berry Storm- filled with nondescript sour berry flavour!
obj.item.food.shok_roks.berry.name: Shok-Roks - Berry Storm flavour

obj.item.food.shok_roks.citrus.desc: You've heard of Snap-Roks, now get ready for Shok-Roks: the popping candy for Ethereals! Available in 5 exciting flavours, of which this bag contains Cirrus Citrus- all the citrus flavour, none of the real citrus extract.
obj.item.food.shok_roks.citrus.name: Shok-Roks - Cirrus Citrus flavour

obj.item.food.shok_roks.lanternfruit.desc: You've heard of Snap-Roks, now get ready for Shok-Roks: the popping candy for Ethereals! Available in 5 exciting flavours, of which this bag contains Lightning Lanternfruit- the only Sprout-native fruit in any Shok-Rok flavour.
obj.item.food.shok_roks.lanternfruit.name: Shok-Roks - Lightning Lanternfruit flavour

obj.item.food.shok_roks.random.desc: You've heard of Snap-Roks, now get ready for Shok-Roks: the popping candy for Ethereals! Available in 5 exciting flavours, any of which could be in this bag!
obj.item.food.shok_roks.random.name: Shok-Roks - Hidden Hurricane flavour

obj.item.food.shok_roks.tropical.desc: You've heard of Snap-Roks, now get ready for Shok-Roks: the popping candy for Ethereals! Available in 5 exciting flavours, of which this bag contains Tropical Thunder- all the tropical fruits! ALL OF THEM!
obj.item.food.shok_roks.tropical.name: Shok-Roks - Tropical Thunder flavour

obj.item.food.shredded_lungs.desc: Crispy lung strips, with veggies and a spicy sauce. Delicious, if you like lungs.
obj.item.food.shredded_lungs.name: crispy shredded lung stirfry

obj.item.food.sirisai_flatbread.desc: Piru flatbread grilled until crispy and topped with meat, chopped muli pods, and tomato sauce. Looks similar to a pizza, but way more purple and blue. Can be sliced!
obj.item.food.sirisai_flatbread.name: sirisai flatbread

obj.item.food.sirisai_flatbread_slice.desc: A slice of piru flatbread grilled until crispy and topped with meat, chopped muli pods, and tomato sauce. Looks similar to a slice of pizza, but way more purple and blue.
obj.item.food.sirisai_flatbread_slice.name: sirisai flatbread slice

obj.item.food.sirisai_wrap.desc: Meat and cabbage seasoned with nakati spice and wrapped tightly in flattened piru bread. Simple, light, delicious.
obj.item.food.sirisai_wrap.name: sirisai wrap

obj.item.food.snacks.neep_tatty_haggis.desc: Oi mate! No neeps, but double beets! SCAM!!!
obj.item.food.snacks.neep_tatty_haggis.name: haggis neeps and tatties

obj.item.food.snowcones.desc: It's just shaved ice. Still fun to chew on.
obj.item.food.snowcones.name: flavorless snowcone

obj.item.food.snowcones.apple.desc: Apple syrup drizzled over a snowball in a paper cup.
obj.item.food.snowcones.apple.name: apple snowcone

obj.item.food.snowcones.berry.desc: Berry syrup drizzled over a snowball in a paper cup.
obj.item.food.snowcones.berry.name: berry snowcone

obj.item.food.snowcones.blue.desc: Bluecherry syrup drizzled over a snowball in a paper cup, how rare!
obj.item.food.snowcones.blue.name: bluecherry snowcone

obj.item.food.snowcones.clown.desc: Laughter drizzled over a snowball in a paper cup.
obj.item.food.snowcones.clown.name: clown snowcone

obj.item.food.snowcones.fruitsalad.desc: A delightful mix of citrus syrups drizzled over a snowball in a paper cup.
obj.item.food.snowcones.fruitsalad.name: fruit salad snowcone

obj.item.food.snowcones.grape.desc: Grape syrup drizzled over a snowball in a paper cup.
obj.item.food.snowcones.grape.name: grape snowcone

obj.item.food.snowcones.honey.desc: Honey drizzled over a snowball in a paper cup.
obj.item.food.snowcones.honey.name: honey snowcone

obj.item.food.snowcones.korta_ice.desc: Shaved ice, korta nectar and berries. A sweet treat to eat to beat summer heat!
obj.item.food.snowcones.korta_ice.name: korta ice

obj.item.food.snowcones.lemon.desc: Lemon syrup drizzled over a snowball in a paper cup.
obj.item.food.snowcones.lemon.name: lemon snowcone

obj.item.food.snowcones.lime.desc: Lime syrup drizzled over a snowball in a paper cup.
obj.item.food.snowcones.lime.name: lime snowcone

obj.item.food.snowcones.orange.desc: Orange syrup drizzled over a snowball in a paper cup.
obj.item.food.snowcones.orange.name: orange snowcone

obj.item.food.snowcones.pineapple.desc: Pineapple syrup drizzled over a snowball in a paper cup.
obj.item.food.snowcones.pineapple.name: pineapple snowcone

obj.item.food.snowcones.pwrgame.desc: Pwrgame soda drizzled over a snowball in a paper cup.
obj.item.food.snowcones.pwrgame.name: pwrgame snowcone

obj.item.food.snowcones.rainbow.desc: A very colorful snowball in a paper cup.
obj.item.food.snowcones.rainbow.name: rainbow snowcone

obj.item.food.snowcones.red.desc: Cherry syrup drizzled over a snowball in a paper cup.
obj.item.food.snowcones.red.name: cherry snowcone

obj.item.food.snowcones.soda.desc: Space Cola drizzled over a snowball in a paper cup.
obj.item.food.snowcones.soda.name: space cola snowcone

obj.item.food.snowcones.spacemountainwin.desc: Space Mountain Wind drizzled over a snowball in a paper cup.
obj.item.food.snowcones.spacemountainwin.name: space mountain wind snowcone

obj.item.food.sosjerky.desc: Beef jerky made from the finest space cows.
obj.item.food.sosjerky.name: Scaredy's Private Reserve Beef Jerky

obj.item.food.sosjerky.healthy.desc: Homemade beef jerky made from the finest space cows.
obj.item.food.sosjerky.healthy.name: homemade beef jerky

obj.item.food.soup.hemophage.blood_soup.desc: A savory stew normally made of offal or freshly-simmered meat. This version features blood curds instead, while also featuring a rich, spicy and dark gravy made of fresh blood and vinegar. Chili and garlic were also added to enhance the savory flavor of the broth.
obj.item.food.soup.hemophage.blood_soup.name: dinuguan

obj.item.food.spacefreezy.desc: The best ice cream in space.
obj.item.food.spacefreezy.name: space freezy

obj.item.food.spacers_sidekick.desc: Spacer's Sidekick: Breathe easy with a friend at your side!
obj.item.food.spacers_sidekick.name: Spacer's Sidekick mints

obj.item.food.spacetwinkie.desc: Guaranteed to survive longer than you will.
obj.item.food.spacetwinkie.name: Space Twinkie

obj.item.food.spaghetti.boiledspaghetti.desc: A plain dish of noodles, this needs more ingredients.
obj.item.food.spaghetti.boiledspaghetti.name: boiled spaghetti

obj.item.food.spaghetti.butternoodles.desc: Noodles covered in savory butter. Simple and slippery, but delicious.
obj.item.food.spaghetti.butternoodles.name: butter noodles

obj.item.food.spaghetti.carbonara.desc: Silky eggs, crispy pork, cheesy bliss. Mamma mia!
obj.item.food.spaghetti.carbonara.name: spaghetti carbonara

obj.item.food.spaghetti.chowmein.desc: A nice mix of noodles and fried vegetables.
obj.item.food.spaghetti.chowmein.name: chow mein

obj.item.food.spaghetti.copypasta.desc: You probably shouldn't try this, you always hear people talking about how bad it is...
obj.item.food.spaghetti.copypasta.name: copypasta

obj.item.food.spaghetti.demit_nizaya.desc: A sweet, creamy nizaya pasta dish made with korta milk and nectar.
obj.item.food.spaghetti.demit_nizaya.name: demit nizaya

obj.item.food.spaghetti.garlic_nizaya.desc: A lizard adaptation of the Italian pasta dish, aglio e olio, made with nizaya pasta.
obj.item.food.spaghetti.garlic_nizaya.name: garlic-and-oil nizaya

obj.item.food.spaghetti.kitakata_ramen.desc: A hearty ramen composed of meat, mushrooms, onion, and garlic. Often given to the sick to comfort them
obj.item.food.spaghetti.kitakata_ramen.name: kitakata ramen

obj.item.food.spaghetti.kitsune_udon.desc: A vegetarian udon made of fried tofu and onions, made sweet and savory with sugar and soy sauce. The name comes from an old folktale about a fox enjoying fried tofu.
obj.item.food.spaghetti.kitsune_udon.name: kitsune udon

obj.item.food.spaghetti.mac_n_cheese.desc: Made the proper way with only the finest cheese and breadcrumbs. And yet, it can't scratch the same itch as Ready-Donk.
obj.item.food.spaghetti.mac_n_cheese.name: mac n' cheese

obj.item.food.spaghetti.mushroom_nizaya.desc: A nizaya pasta dish made with seraka mushrooms and quality oil. Has a pronounced nutty flavour.
obj.item.food.spaghetti.mushroom_nizaya.name: mushroom nizaya

obj.item.food.spaghetti.nikujaga.desc: A delightful Japanese stew of noodles, onions, potatoes, and meat with mixed vegetables.
obj.item.food.spaghetti.nikujaga.name: nikujaga

obj.item.food.spaghetti.nizaya.desc: A form of root and nut pasta originally native to the oceanside regions of Tizira. It's similar in texture and appearance to gnocchi.
obj.item.food.spaghetti.nizaya.name: nizaya pasta

obj.item.food.spaghetti.nizaya.egg.desc: A form of root and nut pasta originally native to the oceanside regions of Tizira. It's similar in texture and appearance to gnocchi.
obj.item.food.spaghetti.nizaya.egg.name: nizaya pasta

obj.item.food.spaghetti.pad_thai.desc: A stir-fried noodle dish popular in Thailand made of peanuts, tofu, lime, and onions.
obj.item.food.spaghetti.pad_thai.name: pad thai

obj.item.food.spaghetti.pastatomato.desc: Spaghetti and crushed tomatoes. Just like your abusive father used to make!
obj.item.food.spaghetti.pastatomato.name: spaghetti

obj.item.food.spaghetti.pastatomato.soul.desc: Just how mom used to make it.
obj.item.food.spaghetti.pastatomato.soul.name: soul food

obj.item.food.spaghetti.pho.desc: A Vietnamese dish made of noodles, vegetables, herbs, and meat. Makes for a very popular street food.
obj.item.food.spaghetti.pho.name: pho

obj.item.food.spaghetti.rawnoodles.desc: Rice noodles, made fresh. Remember, there is no secret ingredient.
obj.item.food.spaghetti.rawnoodles.name: fresh noodles

obj.item.food.spaghetti.shoyu_tonkotsu_r.desc: A simple ramen made of meat, egg, onion, and a sheet of seaweed.
obj.item.food.spaghetti.shoyu_tonkotsu_r.name: shoyu tonkotsu ramen

obj.item.food.spaghetti.snail_nizaya.desc: A high class pasta dish from Tizira's vineyard region of Valyngia. Traditionally made with only the finest Tiziran wine... but the human swill will do, in a pinch.
obj.item.food.spaghetti.snail_nizaya.name: desert snail nizaya

obj.item.food.spanish_rice.desc: A bowl of delicious spanish rice, cooked in a tomato sauce which gives it the orange color.
obj.item.food.spanish_rice.name: spanish rice

obj.item.food.spiced_jerky.desc: A segment of meat seasoned with nakati spice and dehydrated. Makes for a tasty, chewy snack.
obj.item.food.spiced_jerky.name: spiced jerky

obj.item.food.spicyfiletsushiroll.desc: A roll of tasty, spicy sushi made with fish and vegetables. Sliceable into pieces!
obj.item.food.spicyfiletsushiroll.name: spicy filet sushi roll

obj.item.food.spicyfiletsushislice.desc: A slice of tasty, spicy sushi made with fish and vegetables. Don't eat it too fast!.
obj.item.food.spicyfiletsushislice.name: spicy filet sushi slice

obj.item.food.spidereggs.desc: A cluster of juicy spider eggs. A great side dish for when you care not for your health.
obj.item.food.spidereggs.name: spider eggs

obj.item.food.spidereggs.processed.desc: A cluster of juicy spider eggs. Pops in your mouth without making you sick.
obj.item.food.spidereggs.processed.name: processed spider eggs

obj.item.food.spidereggsham.desc: Would you eat them on a train? Would you eat them on a plane? Would you eat them on a state of the art corporate deathtrap floating through space?
obj.item.food.spidereggsham.name: green eggs and ham

obj.item.food.spiderleg.desc: A still twitching leg of a giant spider... you don't really want to eat this, do you?
obj.item.food.spiderleg.name: spider leg

obj.item.food.spiderling.desc: It's slightly twitching in your hand. Ew...
obj.item.food.spiderling.name: spiderling

obj.item.food.spiderlollipop.desc: Still gross, but at least it has a mountain of sugar on it.
obj.item.food.spiderlollipop.name: spider lollipop

obj.item.food.spore_sack.desc: A spore sack. blobby and gooey!
obj.item.food.spore_sack.name: spore sack

obj.item.food.spore_sack.independent.desc: A spore sack. blobby and gooey!
obj.item.food.spore_sack.independent.name: spore sack

obj.item.food.springroll.desc: A plate of translucent rice wrappers filled with fresh vegetables, served with sweet chili sauce. You either love them or hate them.
obj.item.food.springroll.name: spring roll

obj.item.food.squeaking_stir_fry.desc: A mothic classic made with cheese curds and tofu (amongst other things). 		Translated literally the name means 'squeaking stir fry', a name given due to the distinctive squeak of the proteins.
obj.item.food.squeaking_stir_fry.name: skeklitmischtpoppl

obj.item.food.steak_croquette.desc: Man, sticking chunks of steak in a croquette. Must be the countryside way.
obj.item.food.steak_croquette.name: steak croquette

obj.item.food.steeped_mushrooms.desc: Seraka mushrooms that have been steeped in alkaline water to remove the extract, thereby making them completely safe to consume.
obj.item.food.steeped_mushrooms.name: steeped seraka mushrooms

obj.item.food.stewed_muli.desc: A simple stew of meat, carrots and cabbage all cooked in muli juice. For the growing teshari.
obj.item.food.stewed_muli.name: stewed muli

obj.item.food.sticko.desc: A classic treat for all ages, it's Sticko, the original chocolate-coated biscuit stick! This one's the original (and as some would say, best) flavour: biscuit and milk chocolate.
obj.item.food.sticko.name: Sticko Classic

obj.item.food.sticko.matcha.desc: A classic treat for all ages, it's Sticko, the original chocolate-coated biscuit stick! This one's got matcha flavoured white chocolate as its coating, to evoke feelings of tradition.
obj.item.food.sticko.matcha.name: Sticko Matcha

obj.item.food.sticko.nutty.desc: A classic treat for all ages, it's Sticko, the original chocolate-coated biscuit stick! This one's got peanut-butter flavoured chocolate as its coating, for a nutty twist.
obj.item.food.sticko.nutty.name: Sticko Nutty

obj.item.food.sticko.pineapple.desc: A classic treat for all ages, it's Sticko, the original chocolate-coated biscuit stick! This one's got pineapple flavoured white chocolate as its coating, for those ananas fan-as.
obj.item.food.sticko.pineapple.name: Sticko Pineapple

obj.item.food.sticko.random.desc: A classic treat for all ages, it's Sticko, the original chocolate-coated biscuit stick! This one's got an obscuring paper sheath, to hide the true flavour...
obj.item.food.sticko.random.name: Sticko Mystery

obj.item.food.sticko.yuyake.desc: A classic treat for all ages, it's Sticko, the original chocolate-coated biscuit stick! This one's got Yūyake flavoured white chocolate as its coating, for a refreshing melony treat.
obj.item.food.sticko.yuyake.name: Sticko Yūyake

obj.item.food.strawberryicecreamsandwich.desc: Portable ice cream in its own packaging of the strawberry variety.
obj.item.food.strawberryicecreamsandwich.name: strawberry ice cream sandwich

obj.item.food.stuffed_cabbage.desc: A savoury mixture of ground meat and rice wrapped in cooked cabbage leaves and topped with a tomato sauce. To die for.
obj.item.food.stuffed_cabbage.name: stuffed cabbage

obj.item.food.stuffed_eggplant.desc: A cooked half of an eggplant, with the insides scooped out and mixed with meat, cheese, and veggies.
obj.item.food.stuffed_eggplant.name: stuffed eggplant

obj.item.food.stuffed_muli_pod.desc: A cooked muli pod, now stuffed with meat, minced kiri fruit, and chili. Chewy sweet and spicy all in one!
obj.item.food.stuffed_muli_pod.name: stuffed muli pod

obj.item.food.stuffed_peppers.desc: A soft yet still crisp bell pepper, with a wonderful melty cheesy interior.
obj.item.food.stuffed_peppers.name: voltölpaprik

obj.item.food.stuffedlegion.desc: The former skull of a damned human, filled with goliath meat. It has a decorative lava pool made of ketchup and hotsauce.
obj.item.food.stuffedlegion.name: stuffed legion

obj.item.food.surimi.desc: A portion of uncured fish surimi.
obj.item.food.surimi.name: surimi

obj.item.food.sustenance_bar.desc: The PSB, or Prepacked Sustenance Bar, is a densely packed, nutrient rich food which is designed to hold the populace over 		during times of food shortage. Made from soy and pea protein, each lasts 3 days if adequately rationed. While they have a long shelf life, 		they do eventually go bad- prompting them to be sold as surplus by the fleet. This particular one is, like most artificially-flavoured moth food, mixed-herb flavoured.
obj.item.food.sustenance_bar.name: surplus fleet PSB

obj.item.food.sustenance_bar.cheese.desc: The PSB, or Prepacked Sustenance Bar, is a densely packed, nutrient rich food which is designed to hold the populace over 		during times of food shortage. Made from soy and pea protein, each lasts 3 days if adequately rationed. While they have a long shelf life, 		they do eventually go bad- prompting them to be sold as surplus by the fleet. This particular one is three-cheese flavoured- parmesan, mozzarella, and cheddar.
obj.item.food.sustenance_bar.cheese.name: surplus fleet PSB- three-cheese flavour

obj.item.food.sustenance_bar.mint.desc: The PSB, or Prepacked Sustenance Bar, is a densely packed, nutrient rich food which is designed to hold the populace over 		during times of food shortage. Made from soy and pea protein, each lasts 3 days if adequately rationed. While they have a long shelf life, 		they do eventually go bad- prompting them to be sold as surplus by the fleet. This particular one is mint choc chip flavoured- peppermint, 		dark chocolate, and potato chips, showing that mothkind has no idea what mint choc chip is.
obj.item.food.sustenance_bar.mint.name: surplus fleet PSB- mint choc chip flavour

obj.item.food.sustenance_bar.neapolitan.desc: The PSB, or Prepacked Sustenance Bar, is a densely packed, nutrient rich food which is designed to hold the populace over 		during times of food shortage. Made from soy and pea protein, each lasts 3 days if adequately rationed. While they have a long shelf life, 		they do eventually go bad- prompting them to be sold as surplus by the fleet. This particular one is neapolitan flavoured- strawberry, vanilla, and chocolate.
obj.item.food.sustenance_bar.neapolitan.name: surplus fleet PSB- neapolitan flavour

obj.item.food.sustenance_bar.wonka.desc: The PSB, or Prepacked Sustenance Bar, is a densely packed, nutrient rich food which is designed to hold the populace over 		during times of food shortage. Made from soy and pea protein, each lasts 3 days if adequately rationed. While they have a long shelf life, 		they do eventually go bad- prompting them to be sold as surplus by the fleet. This particular one is split into three flavours, 		making up a typical meal- tomato soup, roast pumpkin, and blueberry pie.
obj.item.food.sustenance_bar.wonka.name: surplus fleet PSB- three course dinner

obj.item.food.sweet_and_sour_meatballs.desc: Golden meatballs glazed in a sticky savory sauce, served with pineapple and pepper chunks.
obj.item.food.sweet_and_sour_meatballs.name: sweet and sour meatballs

obj.item.food.sweet_chili_cabbage_wrap.desc: Grilled cheese and salad in a cabbage wrap, topped with delicious sweet chili sauce.
obj.item.food.sweet_chili_cabbage_wrap.name: sweet chili cabbage wrap

obj.item.food.sweet_piru_noodles.desc: Piru pasta mixed in a bowl with chopped kiri fruit, muli pods, and carrots. It looks bizarre and seems kind of slimy, but the taste cannot be denied.
obj.item.food.sweet_piru_noodles.name: sweet piru noodles

obj.item.food.swirl_lollipop.desc: A massive rainbow swirlled lollipop. Said to contain extra sugar.
obj.item.food.swirl_lollipop.name: swirl lollipop

obj.item.food.syndicake.desc: An extremely moist snack cake that tastes just as good after being nuked.
obj.item.food.syndicake.name: Syndi-Cakes

obj.item.food.taco.desc: A traditional taco with meat, cheese, and lettuce.
obj.item.food.taco.name: classic taco

obj.item.food.taco.fish.desc: A taco with fish, cheese, and cabbage.
obj.item.food.taco.fish.name: fish taco

obj.item.food.taco.plain.desc: A traditional taco with meat and cheese, minus the rabbit food.
obj.item.food.taco.plain.name: plain taco

obj.item.food.takoyaki.desc: A classic Japanese street food, takoyaki (or octopus balls) are made from octopus and onion inside a fried batter, topped with a savoury sauce.
obj.item.food.takoyaki.name: takoyaki

obj.item.food.takoyaki.russian.desc: A dangerous twist on a classic dish, that makes for the perfect cover for evading the police.
obj.item.food.takoyaki.russian.name: russian takoyaki

obj.item.food.takoyaki.taco.desc: Straight outta Mars' most innovative street food stands, it's tacoyaki- trading octopus for taco meat and corn, and Worcestershire sauce for queso. ¡Tan sabroso!
obj.item.food.takoyaki.taco.name: tacoyaki

obj.item.food.tatortot.desc: A large fried potato nugget that may or may not try to valid you.
obj.item.food.tatortot.name: tator tot

obj.item.food.tempeh.desc: Fungus fermented soybean cake, warm to the touch.
obj.item.food.tempeh.name: raw tempeh block

obj.item.food.tempehslice.desc: A slice of tempeh, a slice of wkwkwk.
obj.item.food.tempehslice.name: tempeh slice

obj.item.food.tempehstarter.desc: A mix of soy and joy. It's warm... and moving?
obj.item.food.tempehstarter.name: tempeh starter

obj.item.food.tiziran_sausage.desc: A coarse dry-cured blood sausage, traditionally made by farmers in the farmlands around Zagoskeld. Similar in texture to old-Earth Spanish chorizo.
obj.item.food.tiziran_sausage.name: Tiziran blood sausage

obj.item.food.toasted_seeds.desc: While they're far from filling, toasted seeds are a popular snack amongst the moths. 		Salt, sugar, or even some more exotic flavours may be added for some extra pep.
obj.item.food.toasted_seeds.name: toasted seeds

obj.item.food.tofu.prison.desc: You refuse to eat this strange bean curd.
obj.item.food.tofu.prison.name: soggy tofu

obj.item.food.tomato_sauce.desc: Tomato sauce, perfect for pizza or pasta. Mamma mia!
obj.item.food.tomato_sauce.name: tomato sauce

obj.item.food.tonkatsuwurst.desc: A cultural fusion between German and Japanese cooking, tonkatsuwurst blends the currywurst and tonkatsu sauce into something familiar, yet new.
obj.item.food.tonkatsuwurst.name: tonkatsuwurst

obj.item.food.tortilla.desc: The base for all your burritos.
obj.item.food.tortilla.name: tortilla

obj.item.food.tsatsikh.desc: A Tiziran dish consisting of spiced ground offal, stuffed into a stomach and boiled. Pretty foul to anyone who's not used to the taste.
obj.item.food.tsatsikh.name: tsatsikh

obj.item.food.tzatziki_and_pita_bread.desc: Tzatziki sauce, now with pita bread for dipping. Very healthy and delicious all in one.
obj.item.food.tzatziki_and_pita_bread.name: tzatziki and pita bread

obj.item.food.tzatziki_sauce.desc: A garlic-based sauce or dip widely used in Mediterranean and Middle Eastern cuisine. Delicious on its own when dipped with pita bread or vegetables.
obj.item.food.tzatziki_sauce.name: tzatziki sauce

obj.item.food.urinalcake.desc: The noble urinal cake, protecting the station's pipes from the station's pee. Do not eat.
obj.item.food.urinalcake.name: urinal cake

obj.item.food.vegetarian_calzone.desc: A calzone filled with mixed vegetables and a tomato sauce. A healthier, yet less satisfying alternative.
obj.item.food.vegetarian_calzone.name: vegetarian calzone

obj.item.food.vegetarian_chimichanga.desc: A deep-fried burrito packed with a generous amount of baked vegetables, for the non-meat eaters.
obj.item.food.vegetarian_chimichanga.name: vegetarian chimichanga

obj.item.food.vegetarian_gyro.desc: A traditional Greek gyro with cucumbers substituted for meat. Still full of intense flavor and very nourishing.
obj.item.food.vegetarian_gyro.name: vegetarian gyro

obj.item.food.vegetariansushiroll.desc: A roll of simple vegetarian sushi with rice, carrots, and potatoes. Sliceable into pieces!
obj.item.food.vegetariansushiroll.name: vegetarian sushi roll

obj.item.food.vegetariansushislice.desc: A slice of simple vegetarian sushi with rice, carrots, and potatoes.
obj.item.food.vegetariansushislice.name: vegetarian sushi slice

obj.item.food.vendor_snacks.desc: You best hope you aren't a sinner. (You should never see this item please report it)
obj.item.food.vendor_snacks.name: God's Strongest Snacks

obj.item.food.vendor_snacks.lizard_bag.desc: An odd treat of the lizard empire, a mushroom dipped in caramel; unfortunately, it seems to have been bagged before the caramel fully hardened.
obj.item.food.vendor_snacks.lizard_bag.name: candied mushroom

obj.item.food.vendor_snacks.lizard_bag.m.desc: A fish jerky, made from what you can only hope is moonfish. It also seems to taste subtly of barbecue
obj.item.food.vendor_snacks.lizard_bag.m.name: moonfish jerky

obj.item.food.vendor_snacks.lizard_box.desc: A three pack of tiziran style dumplings, not actually stuffed with anything.
obj.item.food.vendor_snacks.lizard_box.name: tiziran dumplings

obj.item.food.vendor_snacks.lizard_box.s.desc: Definitely don't let the guards find out that someone stole your last one.
obj.item.food.vendor_snacks.lizard_box.s.name: honey roll

obj.item.food.vendor_snacks.mochi_ice_cr.desc: A six pack of mochi ice cream, which is to say vanilla icecream surrounded by mochi. Comes with small plastic skewer for consumption.
obj.item.food.vendor_snacks.mochi_ice_cr.name: mochi ice cream balls - vanilla

obj.item.food.vendor_snacks.mochi_ice_cr.desc: A six pack of mochi ice cream - or, more specifically, matcha icecream surrounded by mochi. Comes with small plastic skewer for consumption.
obj.item.food.vendor_snacks.mochi_ice_cr.name: mochi ice cream balls - matcha

obj.item.food.vendor_snacks.moth_bag.desc: A vacuum sealed bag containing a small portion of colorful engine fodder.
obj.item.food.vendor_snacks.moth_bag.name: engine fodder

obj.item.food.vendor_snacks.moth_bag.che.desc: A vacuum sealed bag containing a small cube of a mothic style cheesecake, this one is covered in chocolate.
obj.item.food.vendor_snacks.moth_bag.che.name: chocolate cheesecake cube

obj.item.food.vendor_snacks.moth_bag.che.desc: A vacuum sealed bag containing a small cube of a mothic style cheesecake, this one is covered in honey.
obj.item.food.vendor_snacks.moth_bag.che.name: honey cheesecake cube

obj.item.food.vendor_snacks.moth_bag.fue.desc: A vacuum sealed bag containing a smaller than usual brick of fueljack's lunch, ultimately downgrading it to a fueljack's snack.
obj.item.food.vendor_snacks.moth_bag.fue.name: fueljack's snack

obj.item.food.vendor_snacks.mothmallow.desc: A vacuum sealed bag containing a pretty crushed looking mothmallow, someone save him!
obj.item.food.vendor_snacks.mothmallow.name: mothmallow

obj.item.food.vendor_snacks.rice_cracker.desc: Despite most of the package being clear, you will never truly know what flavor these are until you eat them.
obj.item.food.vendor_snacks.rice_cracker.name: rice crackers

obj.item.food.vendor_tray_meal.desc: A 'salisbury steak' drowning in something similar to a gravy, with a macaroni and cheese substitute mix sitting right beside it.
obj.item.food.vendor_tray_meal.name: NT-Meal: Steak and Macaroni

obj.item.food.vendor_tray_meal.baked_ric.desc: Some sub-par looking fleet style rice, with a very grilled chunk of cheese.
obj.item.food.vendor_tray_meal.baked_ric.name: Main Course - Type M: Baked Rice and Grilled Cheese

obj.item.food.vendor_tray_meal.beef_rice.desc: A few slices of seemingly grilled beef, paired with a disproportionately large amount of rice.
obj.item.food.vendor_tray_meal.beef_rice.name: Meinkosu: Beef and Fried Rice

obj.item.food.vendor_tray_meal.burger.desc: A pretty sad looking burger with a kinda soggy bottom bun and highlighter yellow cheese.
obj.item.food.vendor_tray_meal.burger.name: NT-Meal: Cheeseburger

obj.item.food.vendor_tray_meal.chicken_s.desc: A pretty sad looking chicken sandwich, the 'meat' patty is covered in so many manufactured spices that it has become an eerie red color.
obj.item.food.vendor_tray_meal.chicken_s.name: NT-Meal: Spicy Chicken Sandwich

obj.item.food.vendor_tray_meal.emperor_r.desc: A pretty sad looking emperor roll, if you can even call it that; it seems caviar wasn't in the budget.
obj.item.food.vendor_tray_meal.emperor_r.name: Tizira Imports: Emperor Roll

obj.item.food.vendor_tray_meal.fueljack.desc: A flat chunk of fueljack's lunch, seemingly missing most of the usual variety in ingredients.
obj.item.food.vendor_tray_meal.fueljack.name: Main Course - Type M: Fueljack's Tray

obj.item.food.vendor_tray_meal.moonfish_.desc: An almost synthetic looking cut of moonfish, paired with an equal helping of nizaya pasta.
obj.item.food.vendor_tray_meal.moonfish_.name: Tizira Imports: Moonfish and Nizaya

obj.item.food.vendor_tray_meal.mushroom_.desc: A mix of what was likely mushrooms too low quality to be used in making actual food, lightly fried and tossed in a plastic container together.
obj.item.food.vendor_tray_meal.mushroom_.name: Tizira Imports: Mushroom Stirfry

obj.item.food.vendor_tray_meal.pesto_piz.desc: A rectangular pizza with a suspiciously bright green pesto in place of the standard tomato sauce.
obj.item.food.vendor_tray_meal.pesto_piz.name: Main Course - Type M: Pesto Pizza

obj.item.food.vendor_tray_meal.ramen.desc: A brick of the finest factory made ramen, with a small amount of rehydrated vegetables and herbs floating around.
obj.item.food.vendor_tray_meal.ramen.name: Meinkosu: Homestyle Noodles

obj.item.food.vendor_tray_meal.side.desc: A small stack of tough flatbread, and a small spread of peanut butter for each.
obj.item.food.vendor_tray_meal.side.name: NT-Side: Flatbread and Peanut Butter

obj.item.food.vendor_tray_meal.side.corn.desc: A flattened cut of sweetened cornbread, goes well with butter.
obj.item.food.vendor_tray_meal.side.corn.name: Side Course - Type M: Cornbread

obj.item.food.vendor_tray_meal.side.crac.desc: A small stack of tough flatbread, and a small spread of cheese for each.
obj.item.food.vendor_tray_meal.side.crac.name: NT-Side: Flatbread and Cheese Spread

obj.item.food.vendor_tray_meal.side.crac.desc: A small stack of tough flatbread, and a small spread of nondescript berry jelly for each.
obj.item.food.vendor_tray_meal.side.crac.name: NT-Side: Flatbread and Berry Jelly

obj.item.food.vendor_tray_meal.side.cris.desc: A processed looking block of breaded headcheese.
obj.item.food.vendor_tray_meal.side.cris.name: Tizira Imports: Crisped Headcheese

obj.item.food.vendor_tray_meal.side.kort.desc: A perfectly rectangular portion of unsweetened korta brittle.
obj.item.food.vendor_tray_meal.side.kort.name: Tizira Imports: Korta Brittle

obj.item.food.vendor_tray_meal.side.miso.desc: This is quite literally just a plastic bag full of miso soup, opening it on any side other than the one indicated may result in spilled soup.
obj.item.food.vendor_tray_meal.side.miso.name: Fukusai: Miso Soup

obj.item.food.vendor_tray_meal.side.moff.desc: The result of taking a perfectly fine moffin, and flattening it into a more wafer-like form.
obj.item.food.vendor_tray_meal.side.moff.name: Side Course - Type M: Moffin

obj.item.food.vendor_tray_meal.side.pick.desc: Contains a small assortment of vegetables pickled in a vinegar-like solution.
obj.item.food.vendor_tray_meal.side.pick.name: Fukusai: Pickled Vegetables

obj.item.food.vendor_tray_meal.side.rice.desc: A bag stuffed full of white rice, in case your meal didn't come with enough to sate your needs.
obj.item.food.vendor_tray_meal.side.rice.name: Fukusai: White Rice

obj.item.food.vendor_tray_meal.side.roas.desc: A packet full of various oven roasted seeds.
obj.item.food.vendor_tray_meal.side.roas.name: Side Course - Type M: Roasted Seeds

obj.item.food.vendor_tray_meal.side.root.desc: A small stack of rootbread crackers, with a small spread of meat pate for each.
obj.item.food.vendor_tray_meal.side.root.name: Tizira Imports: Rootbread Crackers and Pate

obj.item.food.vendor_tray_meal.sushi.desc: A pair of sushi rolls, the appearance of which would suggest that the label is lying to you.
obj.item.food.vendor_tray_meal.sushi.name: Meinkosu: Fresh Carp Rolls

obj.item.food.virtual_chocolate.desc: Digital food only gives off the sensation of eating... without any of the nutritional benefits.
obj.item.food.virtual_chocolate.name: virtual chocolate bar

obj.item.food.volt_fish.desc: Some may question the 24-volt fish. After all, fish poached in electric-blue super-sour energy drink looks awful. And, indeed, tastes awful. So why do the Martian ethereals like it, then?
obj.item.food.volt_fish.name: 24-volt fish

obj.item.food.wild_duck_fries.desc: Fries with shredded duck, ketchup, mayo, and Red Bay. A classic street food on Mars, although they're most often associated with Kwik-Kwak, Mars' favourite (and indeed, only) duck themed fast food chain.
obj.item.food.wild_duck_fries.name: wild duck fries

obj.item.forcefield_projector.desc: An experimental device that can create several forcefields at a distance.
obj.item.forcefield_projector.name: forcefield projector

obj.item.forging.billow.desc: A billow specifically crafted for use in forging. Used to stoke the flames and keep the forge lit.
obj.item.forging.billow.name: forging billow

obj.item.forging.billow.primitive.desc: A billow specifically crafted for use in forging. Used to stoke the flames and keep the forge lit.
obj.item.forging.billow.primitive.name: primitive forging billow

obj.item.forging.coil.desc: A simple coil, comprised of coiled iron rods.
obj.item.forging.coil.name: coil

obj.item.forging.complete.arrowhead.desc: An arrowhead, ready to get some wood for completion.
obj.item.forging.complete.arrowhead.name: arrowhead

obj.item.forging.complete.axe.desc: An axe head, ready to get some wood for completion.
obj.item.forging.complete.axe.name: axe head

obj.item.forging.complete.chain.desc: A singular chain, best used in combination with multiple chains.
obj.item.forging.complete.chain.name: chain

obj.item.forging.complete.plate.desc: A plate, best used in combination with multiple plates.
obj.item.forging.complete.plate.name: plate

obj.item.forging.complete.rail_nail.desc: A nail, ready to be used with some wood in order to make tracks.
obj.item.forging.complete.rail_nail.name: rail nail

obj.item.forging.complete.sword.name: sword blade

obj.item.forging.hammer.desc: A mallet specifically crafted for use in forging. Used to slowly shape metal; careful, you could break something with it!
obj.item.forging.hammer.name: forging mallet

obj.item.forging.hammer.primitive.desc: A mallet specifically crafted for use in forging. Used to slowly shape metal; careful, you could break something with it!
