obj.item.forging.incomplete.sword.name: incomplete sword blade

obj.item.forging.incomplete_bow.desc: A wooden bow that has yet to be strung.
obj.item.forging.incomplete_bow.name: incomplete longbow

obj.item.forging.reagent_weapon.axe.desc: An axe especially balanced for throwing and embedding into fleshy targets, yet also effective at destroying shields of all sorts.
obj.item.forging.reagent_weapon.axe.name: reagent axe

obj.item.forging.reagent_weapon.axe.fake.desc: An axe especially balanced for throwing and embedding into fleshy targets, yet also effective at destroying shields of all sorts.
obj.item.forging.reagent_weapon.axe.fake.name: reagent axe

obj.item.forging.reagent_weapon.bokken.desc: A wooden sword that is capable of wielded in two hands. It seems to be made to prevent permanent injuries.
obj.item.forging.reagent_weapon.bokken.name: bokken

obj.item.forging.reagent_weapon.dagger.desc: A lightweight dagger historically used to stab at the gaps in armour of fallen knights of old.
obj.item.forging.reagent_weapon.dagger.name: reagent dagger

obj.item.forging.reagent_weapon.hammer.desc: A heavy, weighted hammer that packs an incredible punch but can prove to be unwieldy. Useful for forging!
obj.item.forging.reagent_weapon.hammer.name: reagent hammer

obj.item.forging.reagent_weapon.katana.desc: A katana sharp enough to penetrate body armor, but not quite million-times-folded sharp.
obj.item.forging.reagent_weapon.katana.name: reagent katana

obj.item.forging.reagent_weapon.rapier.desc: A lightweight rapier with a light and quick swing, even while being so thin, you feel like you can stop all harm with this
obj.item.forging.reagent_weapon.rapier.name: reagent rapier

obj.item.forging.reagent_weapon.spear.desc: A long spear that can be wielded in two hands to boost damage at the cost of single-handed versatility.
obj.item.forging.reagent_weapon.spear.name: reagent spear

obj.item.forging.reagent_weapon.staff.desc: A staff most notably capable of being imbued with reagents, especially useful alongside its otherwise harmless nature.
obj.item.forging.reagent_weapon.staff.name: reagent staff

obj.item.forging.reagent_weapon.sword.desc: A sharp, maneuverable bastard sword most adept at blocking opposing melee strikes.
obj.item.forging.reagent_weapon.sword.name: reagent sword

obj.item.forging.tongs.desc: A set of tongs specifically crafted for use in forging. A wise man once said 'I lift things up and put them down.'
obj.item.forging.tongs.name: forging tongs

obj.item.forging.tongs.primitive.desc: A set of tongs specifically crafted for use in forging. A wise man once said 'I lift things up and put them down.'
obj.item.forging.tongs.primitive.name: primitive forging tongs

obj.item.freeze_cube.desc: A block of semi-clear ice treated with chemicals to behave as a throwable weapon. 		Somehow, it does not transfer its freezing temperatures until it comes into contact with a living creature.
obj.item.freeze_cube.name: freeze cube

obj.item.frog_contract.desc: Create a pact with an elder frog! This great beast will be your mount, protector, but most importantly your friend.
obj.item.frog_contract.name: frog contract

obj.item.frog_statue.desc: Are they really comfortable living in this thing?
obj.item.frog_statue.name: frog statue

obj.item.fuel_pellet.desc: A compressed fuel pellet for long-distance drone flight.
obj.item.fuel_pellet.name: standard fuel pellet

obj.item.fuel_pellet.advanced.desc: A compressed fuel pellet for long-distance drone flight.
obj.item.fuel_pellet.advanced.name: advanced fuel pellet

obj.item.fuel_pellet.exotic.desc: A compressed fuel pellet for long-distance drone flight.
obj.item.fuel_pellet.exotic.name: exotic fuel pellet

obj.item.fugu_gland.desc: The key to the wumborian fugu's ability to increase its mass arbitrarily, this disgusting remnant can apply the same effect to other creatures, giving them great strength.
obj.item.fugu_gland.name: wumborian fugu gland

obj.item.fulton_core.desc: When built, emits a signal which fulton recovery devices can lock onto. Activate in hand to unfold into a beacon.
obj.item.fulton_core.name: extraction beacon assembly kit

obj.item.fur_dyer.desc: Dye that is capable of recoloring fur in a mostly permanent way.
obj.item.fur_dyer.name: electric fur dyer

obj.item.gangster_cellphone.desc: TODO: funny joke about the 80s, brick phones
obj.item.gangster_cellphone.name: cell phone

obj.item.gas_filter.desc: A piece of filtering cloth to be used with atmospheric gas masks and emergency gas masks.
obj.item.gas_filter.name: atmospheric gas filter

obj.item.gas_filter.damaged.desc: A piece of filtering cloth to be used with atmospheric gas masks and emergency gas masks, it seems damaged.
obj.item.gas_filter.damaged.name: damaged gas filter

obj.item.gas_filter.plasmaman.desc: A piece of filtering cloth to be used with atmospheric gas masks and emergency gas masks.
obj.item.gas_filter.plasmaman.name: plasmaman atmospheric gas filter

obj.item.gas_filter.vox.desc: A piece of filtering cloth to be used with atmospheric gas masks and emergency gas masks.
obj.item.gas_filter.vox.name: vox atmospheric gas filter

obj.item.gavelblock.desc: Smack it with a gavel when the assistants get rowdy.
obj.item.gavelblock.name: sound block

obj.item.gavelhammer.desc: Order, order! No bombs in my courthouse.
obj.item.gavelhammer.name: gavel

obj.item.gbp_punchcard.desc:
The Good Assistant Points program is designed to supplement the income of otherwise unemployed or unpaid individuals on board Nanotrasen vessels and colonies.
Simply get your punchcard stamped by a Head of Staff's PDA to earn 150 credits per punch upon turn-in at a Good Assistant Point machine!
Maximum of six punches per any given card. Card replaced upon redemption of existing card. Do not lose your punchcard.
obj.item.gbp_punchcard.name: Good Assistant Points punchcard

obj.item.gbp_punchcard.starting.desc:
The Good Assistant Points program is designed to supplement the income of otherwise unemployed or unpaid individuals on board Nanotrasen vessels and colonies.
Simply get your punchcard stamped by a Head of Staff's PDA to earn 150 credits per punch upon turn-in at a Good Assistant Point machine!
Maximum of six punches per any given card. Card replaced upon redemption of existing card. Do not lose your punchcard.
obj.item.gbp_punchcard.starting.name: Good Assistant Points punchcard

obj.item.gbp_puncher.desc: A puncher for use with the Good Assistant Points system. Use it on a punchcard to punch a hole. Expect to be hassled for punches by assistants.
obj.item.gbp_puncher.name: Good Assistant Points puncher

obj.item.geiger_counter.desc: A handheld device used for detecting and measuring radiation pulses.
obj.item.geiger_counter.name: Geiger counter

obj.item.geneshears.desc: A high tech, high fidelity pair of plant shears, capable of cutting genetic traits out of a plant.
obj.item.geneshears.name: botanogenetic plant shears

obj.item.gibtonite.desc: Extremely explosive if struck with mining equipment, Gibtonite is often used by miners to speed up their work by using it as a mining charge. This material is illegal to possess by unauthorized personnel under space law.
obj.item.gibtonite.name: gibtonite ore

obj.item.gibtonite_hand.desc: You had better launch this at something before it comes out the other end of your body.
obj.item.gibtonite_hand.name: stabilised gibtonite fist

obj.item.gift.mostly_anything.desc: It could be pretty much anything!
obj.item.gift.mostly_anything.name: christmas gift

obj.item.gizmo.desc: Fliggoes the giggoe when its oven in hot the device.
obj.item.gizmo.name: gizmo

obj.item.glassblowing.blowing_rod.desc: A tool that is used to hold the molten glass as well as help shape it.
obj.item.glassblowing.blowing_rod.name: blowing rod

obj.item.glassblowing.glass_globe.desc: A glass bowl that is capable of carrying things.
obj.item.glassblowing.glass_globe.name: glass globe

obj.item.glassblowing.glass_lens.desc: A convex glass lens that would make an excellent magnifying glass if it were attached to a handle.
obj.item.glassblowing.glass_lens.name: glass lens

obj.item.glassblowing.jacks.desc: A tool that helps shape glass during the art process.
obj.item.glassblowing.jacks.name: jacks

obj.item.glassblowing.magnifying_glass.desc: A tool that, with the assistance of a magnifying lens, allows you to view what is small.
obj.item.glassblowing.magnifying_glass.name: magnifying glass

obj.item.glassblowing.metal_cup.desc: A tool that helps shape glass during the art process.
obj.item.glassblowing.metal_cup.name: metal cup

obj.item.glassblowing.molten_glass.desc: A glob of molten glass, ready to be shaped into art.
obj.item.glassblowing.molten_glass.name: molten glass

obj.item.glassblowing.paddle.desc: A tool that helps shape glass during the art process.
obj.item.glassblowing.paddle.name: paddle

obj.item.glassblowing.shears.desc: A tool that helps shape glass during the art process.
obj.item.glassblowing.shears.name: shears

obj.item.gohei.desc: A wooden stick with white streamers at the end. Originally used by shrine maidens to purify things. Now used by the station's valued weeaboos.
obj.item.gohei.name: gohei

obj.item.goldeneye_key.desc: A high profile authentication keycard to Nanotrasen's GoldenEye defence network. It seems indestructible.
obj.item.goldeneye_key.name: GoldenEye authentication keycard

obj.item.golem_shell.desc: The incomplete body of a golem. Add ten sheets of certain minerals to finish.
obj.item.golem_shell.name: incomplete free golem shell

obj.item.golem_shell.servant.desc: The incomplete body of a golem. Add ten sheets of certain minerals to finish.
obj.item.golem_shell.servant.name: incomplete servant golem shell

obj.item.golfcart_kit.desc: A box containing a golf cart. Some assembly required. Batteries not included.
obj.item.golfcart_kit.name: golfcart parts kit

obj.item.goliath_infuser_hammer.desc: A mass of plates held by tendrils has replaced an arm.
obj.item.goliath_infuser_hammer.name: tendril hammer

obj.item.goliath_saddle.desc: This rough saddle will give you a serviceable seat upon a goliath! Provided you can get one to stand still.
obj.item.goliath_saddle.name: goliath saddle

obj.item.gps.desc: Helping lost spacemen find their way through the planets since 2016.
obj.item.gps.name: global positioning system

obj.item.gps.computer.desc: Helping lost spacemen find their way through the planets since 2016.
obj.item.gps.computer.name: pod computer

obj.item.gps.computer.beacon.desc: A GPS beacon, anchored to the ground to prevent loss or accidental movement.
obj.item.gps.computer.beacon.name: GPS beacon

obj.item.gps.computer.space.desc: Helping lost spacemen find their way through the planets since 2016.
obj.item.gps.computer.space.name: gps computer

obj.item.gps.cyborg.desc: A mining cyborg internal positioning system. Used as a recovery beacon for damaged cyborg assets, or a collaboration tool for mining teams.
obj.item.gps.cyborg.name: global positioning system

obj.item.gps.engineering.desc: Helping lost spacemen find their way through the planets since 2016.
obj.item.gps.engineering.name: global positioning system

obj.item.gps.mining.desc: A positioning system helpful for rescuing trapped or injured miners, keeping one on you at all times while mining might just save your life.
obj.item.gps.mining.name: global positioning system

obj.item.gps.mining.internal.desc: A positioning system helpful for rescuing trapped or injured miners, keeping one on you at all times while mining might just save your life.
obj.item.gps.mining.internal.name: global positioning system

obj.item.gps.pai.desc: Helping lost spacemen find their way through the planets since 2016.
obj.item.gps.pai.name: global positioning system

obj.item.gps.science.desc: Helping lost spacemen find their way through the planets since 2016.
obj.item.gps.science.name: global positioning system

obj.item.gps.spaceruin.desc: Helping lost spacemen find their way through the planets since 2016.
obj.item.gps.spaceruin.name: global positioning system

obj.item.gps.visible_debug.desc: This admin-spawn GPS unit leaves the coordinates visible 		on any turf that it passes over while being dragged on the floor. Especially useful 		for marking the area around the transition edges.
obj.item.gps.visible_debug.name: visible GPS

obj.item.graft.desc: A carefully cut graft off of a freshly grown plant. Can be grafted onto a plant in order to share unique plant traits onto a plant.
obj.item.graft.name: plant graft

obj.item.grapple_gun.desc: A small specialised airgun capable of launching a climbing hook into a distant rock face and pulling the user toward it via motorised zip-line. A handy tool for traversing the craggy landscape of lavaland!
obj.item.grapple_gun.name: grapple gun

obj.item.gravity_harness.desc: A bootleg derivative of common Skrellian construction equipment, manufactured and heavily used by Deep Spacer tribes, this harness employs suspensor tech to either nullify or magnify gravity around the wearer.
obj.item.gravity_harness.name: gravity suspension harness

obj.item.greentext.desc: No one knows what this massive tome does, but it feels desirable all the same...
obj.item.greentext.name: greentext

obj.item.greentext.quiet.desc: No one knows what this massive tome does, but it feels desirable all the same...
obj.item.greentext.quiet.name: greentext

obj.item.grenade.c4.desc: Used to put holes in specific areas without too much extra hole. A saboteur's favorite.
obj.item.grenade.c4.name: C-4 charge

obj.item.grenade.c4..desc: Used to put holes in specific areas without too much extra hole. A saboteur's favorite.
obj.item.grenade.c4..name: C-4 charge

obj.item.grenade.c4.ninja.desc: A modified C-4 charge supplied by the Spider Clan. It has great explosive power, but is keyed to only work in one specific area.
obj.item.grenade.c4.ninja.name: spider charge

obj.item.grenade.c4.x4.desc: A shaped high-explosive breaching charge. Designed to ensure user safety and wall nonsafety.
obj.item.grenade.c4.x4.name: X-4 charge

obj.item.grenade.chem_grenade.adv_releas.desc: A custom made advanced release grenade. It is able to be detonated more than once. Can be configured using a multitool.
obj.item.grenade.chem_grenade.adv_releas.name: advanced release grenade

obj.item.grenade.chem_grenade.antiweed.desc: Used for purging large areas of invasive plant species. Contents under pressure. Do not directly inhale contents.
obj.item.grenade.chem_grenade.antiweed.name: weedkiller grenade

obj.item.grenade.chem_grenade.bioterrorf.desc: Tiger Cooperative chemical foam grenade. Causes temporary irritation, blindness, confusion, mutism, and mutations to carbon based life forms. Contains additional spore toxin.
obj.item.grenade.chem_grenade.bioterrorf.name: Bio terror foam grenade

obj.item.grenade.chem_grenade.cleaner.desc: BLAM!-brand foaming space cleaner. In a special applicator for rapid cleaning of wide areas.
obj.item.grenade.chem_grenade.cleaner.name: cleaner grenade

obj.item.grenade.chem_grenade.clf3.desc: BURN!-brand foaming clf3. In a special applicator for rapid purging of wide areas.
obj.item.grenade.chem_grenade.clf3.name: clf3 grenade

obj.item.grenade.chem_grenade.colorful.desc: Used for wide scale painting projects.
obj.item.grenade.chem_grenade.colorful.name: colorful grenade

obj.item.grenade.chem_grenade.cryo.desc: A custom made cryogenic grenade. Rapidly cools contents upon ignition.
obj.item.grenade.chem_grenade.cryo.name: cryo grenade

obj.item.grenade.chem_grenade.ez_clean.desc: Waffle Corp. brand foaming space cleaner. In a special applicator for rapid cleaning of wide areas.
obj.item.grenade.chem_grenade.ez_clean.name: cleaner grenade

obj.item.grenade.chem_grenade.holy.desc: A vessel of concentrated religious might.
obj.item.grenade.chem_grenade.holy.name: holy hand grenade

obj.item.grenade.chem_grenade.incendiary.desc: Used for clearing rooms of living things.
obj.item.grenade.chem_grenade.incendiary.name: incendiary grenade

obj.item.grenade.chem_grenade.large.desc: A custom made large grenade. Larger splash range and increased ignition temperature compared to basic grenades. Fits exotic and bluespace based containers.
obj.item.grenade.chem_grenade.large.name: large grenade

obj.item.grenade.chem_grenade.metalfoam.desc: Used for emergency sealing of hull breaches.
obj.item.grenade.chem_grenade.metalfoam.name: metal foam grenade

obj.item.grenade.chem_grenade.pyro.desc: A custom made pyrotechnical grenade. Heats up contents upon ignition.
obj.item.grenade.chem_grenade.pyro.name: pyro grenade

obj.item.grenade.chem_grenade.rust_sower.desc: A nifty little thing that explodes into rust. Causes borgs and mechs to get utterly obliterated
obj.item.grenade.chem_grenade.rust_sower.name: Rust sower

obj.item.grenade.chem_grenade.smart_meta.desc: Used for emergency sealing of hull breaches, while keeping areas accessible.
obj.item.grenade.chem_grenade.smart_meta.name: smart metal foam grenade

obj.item.grenade.chem_grenade.teargas.desc: Used for nonlethal riot control. Contents under pressure. Do not directly inhale contents.
obj.item.grenade.chem_grenade.teargas.name: teargas grenade

obj.item.grenade.chem_grenade.tuberculos.desc: WARNING: GRENADE WILL RELEASE DEADLY SPORES CONTAINING ACTIVE AGENTS. SEAL SUIT AND AIRFLOW BEFORE USE.
obj.item.grenade.chem_grenade.tuberculos.name: Fungal tuberculosis grenade

obj.item.grenade.chem_grenade.wehnade.desc: A weird, old looking grenade casing. If you shake it you can hear liquid inside. It has no markings on it beside a hand written sticker that says 'Weh'!
obj.item.grenade.chem_grenade.wehnade.name: wehnade

obj.item.grenade.clusterbuster.desc: Use of this weapon may constitute a war crime in your area, consult your local captain.
obj.item.grenade.clusterbuster.name: clusterbang

obj.item.grenade.clusterbuster.antiweed.desc: Use of this weapon may constitute a war crime in your area, consult your local captain.
obj.item.grenade.clusterbuster.antiweed.name: RoundDown

obj.item.grenade.clusterbuster.clf3.desc: Use of this weapon may constitute a war crime in your area, consult your local captain.
obj.item.grenade.clusterbuster.clf3.name: WELCOME TO HELL

obj.item.grenade.clusterbuster.emp.desc: Use of this weapon may constitute a war crime in your area, consult your local captain.
obj.item.grenade.clusterbuster.emp.name: Electromagnetic Storm

obj.item.grenade.clusterbuster.facid.desc: Use of this weapon may constitute a war crime in your area, consult your local captain.
obj.item.grenade.clusterbuster.facid.name: Aciding Rain

obj.item.grenade.clusterbuster.inferno.desc: Use of this weapon may constitute a war crime in your area, consult your local captain.

obj.item.grenade.clusterbuster.metalfoam.desc: Use of this weapon may constitute a war crime in your area, consult your local captain.
obj.item.grenade.clusterbuster.metalfoam.name: Instant Concrete

obj.item.grenade.clusterbuster.random.desc: Use of this weapon may constitute a war crime in your area, consult your local captain.
obj.item.grenade.clusterbuster.random.name: clusterbang

obj.item.grenade.clusterbuster.segment.desc: A smaller segment of a clusterbang. Better run!
obj.item.grenade.clusterbuster.segment.name: clusterbang segment

obj.item.grenade.clusterbuster.slime.desc: Use of this weapon may constitute a war crime in your area, consult your local captain.
obj.item.grenade.clusterbuster.slime.name: Blorble Blorble

obj.item.grenade.clusterbuster.slime.vol.desc: Use of this weapon may constitute a war crime in your area, consult your local captain.
obj.item.grenade.clusterbuster.slime.vol.name: Blorble Blorble

obj.item.grenade.clusterbuster.smoke.desc: Use of this weapon may constitute a war crime in your area, consult your local captain.
obj.item.grenade.clusterbuster.smoke.name: Ninja Vanish

obj.item.grenade.clusterbuster.soap.desc: Use of this weapon may constitute a war crime in your area, consult your local captain.
obj.item.grenade.clusterbuster.soap.name: Slipocalypse

obj.item.grenade.clusterbuster.spawner_m.desc: Use of this weapon may constitute a war crime in your area, consult your local captain.
obj.item.grenade.clusterbuster.spawner_m.name: iViscerator

obj.item.grenade.clusterbuster.spawner_s.desc: Use of this weapon may constitute a war crime in your area, consult your local captain.
obj.item.grenade.clusterbuster.spawner_s.name: Invasion of the Space Carps

obj.item.grenade.clusterbuster.syndiemin.desc: Use of this weapon may constitute a war crime in your area, consult your local captain.
obj.item.grenade.clusterbuster.syndiemin.name: SyndiWrath

obj.item.grenade.clusterbuster.teargas.desc: Use of this weapon may constitute a war crime in your area, consult your local captain.
obj.item.grenade.clusterbuster.teargas.name: Oignon Grenade

obj.item.grenade.empgrenade.desc: It is designed to wreak havoc on electronic systems.
obj.item.grenade.empgrenade.name: classic EMP grenade

obj.item.grenade.firecracker.desc: Outlawed in most of the sector. Doubles as an excellent finger remover.
obj.item.grenade.firecracker.name: large firecracker

obj.item.grenade.frag.desc: An anti-personnel fragmentation grenade, this weapon excels at killing soft targets by shredding them with metal shrapnel.
obj.item.grenade.frag.name: frag grenade

obj.item.grenade.frag.mega.desc: An anti-everything fragmentation grenade, this weapon excels at killing anything any everything by shredding them with metal shrapnel.
obj.item.grenade.frag.mega.name: FRAG grenade

obj.item.grenade.gas_crystal.desc: Some kind of crystal, this shouldn't spawn
obj.item.grenade.gas_crystal.name: Gas Crystal

obj.item.grenade.gas_crystal.crystal_foa.desc: A crystal with a foggy inside
obj.item.grenade.gas_crystal.crystal_foa.name: crystal foam

obj.item.grenade.gas_crystal.healium_cry.desc: A crystal made from the Healium gas, it's cold to the touch.
obj.item.grenade.gas_crystal.healium_cry.name: Healium crystal

obj.item.grenade.gas_crystal.nitrous_oxi.desc: A crystal made from the N2O gas, you can see the liquid gases inside.
obj.item.grenade.gas_crystal.nitrous_oxi.name: N2O crystal

obj.item.grenade.gas_crystal.proto_nitra.desc: A crystal made from the Proto Nitrate gas, you can see the liquid gases inside.
obj.item.grenade.gas_crystal.proto_nitra.name: Proto Nitrate crystal

obj.item.grenade.gluon.desc: An advanced grenade that releases a harmful stream of gluons inducing radiation in those nearby. These gluon streams will also make victims feel exhausted, and induce shivering. This extreme coldness will also likely wet any nearby floors.
obj.item.grenade.gluon.name: gluon frag grenade

obj.item.grenade.hypnotic.desc: A modified flashbang which uses hypnotic flashes and mind-altering soundwaves to induce an instant trance upon detonation.
obj.item.grenade.hypnotic.name: flashbang

obj.item.grenade.mirage.desc: A special device that, when activated, produces a holographic copy of the user.
obj.item.grenade.mirage.name: mirage grenade

obj.item.grenade.primer.desc: A grenade that generates more shrapnel the more you rotate it in your hand after pulling the pin. This one releases shrapnel shards.
obj.item.grenade.primer.name: rotfrag grenade

obj.item.grenade.primer.stingbang.desc: A grenade that generates more shrapnel the more you rotate it in your hand after pulling the pin. This one releases stingballs.
obj.item.grenade.primer.stingbang.name: rotsting

obj.item.grenade.smokebomb.desc: Real bruh moment if you ever see this. Probably tell a c*der or something.
obj.item.grenade.smokebomb.name: smoke grenade

obj.item.grenade.spawnergrenade.desc: It will unleash an unspecified anomaly in the surrounding vicinity.
obj.item.grenade.spawnergrenade.name: delivery grenade

obj.item.grenade.spawnergrenade.buzzkill.desc: The label reads: "WARNING: DEVICE WILL RELEASE LIVE SPECIMENS UPON ACTIVATION. SEAL SUIT BEFORE USE." It is warm to the touch and vibrates faintly.
obj.item.grenade.spawnergrenade.buzzkill.name: Buzzkill grenade

obj.item.grenade.spawnergrenade.cat.desc: You can hear faint meowing and the sounds of claws on metal coming from within.
obj.item.grenade.spawnergrenade.cat.name: Catnade

obj.item.grenade.spawnergrenade.cat.synd.desc: You can hear aggressive meowing and the sounds of sharpened claws on metal coming from within.
obj.item.grenade.spawnergrenade.cat.synd.name: Syndicatnade

obj.item.grenade.spawnergrenade.clown.desc: A sleek device often given to clowns on their 10th birthdays for protection. You can hear faint scratching coming from within.
obj.item.grenade.spawnergrenade.clown.name: C.L.U.W.N.E.

obj.item.grenade.spawnergrenade.clown_br.desc: A sleek device often given to clowns on their 10th birthdays for protection. While a typical C.L.U.W.N.E only holds one creature, sometimes foolish young clowns try to cram more in, often to disastrous effect.
obj.item.grenade.spawnergrenade.clown_br.name: stuffed C.L.U.W.N.E.

obj.item.grenade.spawnergrenade.manhacks.desc: It will unleash an unspecified anomaly in the surrounding vicinity.
obj.item.grenade.spawnergrenade.manhacks.name: viscerator delivery grenade

obj.item.grenade.spawnergrenade.manhacks.desc: It will unleash an unspecified anomaly in the surrounding vicinity.
obj.item.grenade.spawnergrenade.manhacks.name: imperial viscerator delivery grenade

obj.item.grenade.spawnergrenade.spesscar.desc: It will unleash an unspecified anomaly in the surrounding vicinity.
obj.item.grenade.spawnergrenade.spesscar.name: carp delivery grenade

obj.item.grenade.spawnergrenade.syndieso.desc: It will unleash an unspecified anomaly in the surrounding vicinity.
obj.item.grenade.spawnergrenade.syndieso.name: Mister Scrubby

obj.item.grenade.spawnergrenade.therealn.desc: It will unleash an unspecified anomaly in the surrounding vicinity.
obj.item.grenade.spawnergrenade.therealn.name: nuclear delivery grenade

obj.item.grenade.syndieminibomb.desc: A syndicate manufactured explosive used to sow destruction and chaos.
obj.item.grenade.syndieminibomb.name: syndicate minibomb

obj.item.grenade.syndieminibomb.concussi.desc: A compact shrapnel grenade meant to devastate nearby organisms and cause some damage in the process. Pull pin and throw opposite direction.
obj.item.grenade.syndieminibomb.concussi.name: HE Grenade

obj.item.grown.bananapeel.bluespace.desc: A peel from a bluespace banana.
obj.item.grown.bananapeel.bluespace.name: bluespace banana peel

obj.item.grown.bananapeel.gros_michel.desc: A peel from a species of banana that's hyper-vulnerable to contamination.
obj.item.grown.bananapeel.gros_michel.name: gros michel peel

obj.item.grown.carbon_rose.desc: The all new fleur d'amour gris - the flower of love, modernized, with no harsh thorns.
obj.item.grown.carbon_rose.name: carbon rose

obj.item.grown.corncob.desc: A reminder of meals gone by.
obj.item.grown.corncob.name: corn cob

obj.item.grown.corncob.pepper.desc: A reminder of genetic abominations gone by.
obj.item.grown.corncob.pepper.name: pepper corn cob

obj.item.grown.corncob.snap.desc: A reminder of pranks gone by.
obj.item.grown.corncob.snap.name: snap corn cob

obj.item.grown.cotton.durathread.desc: A tough bundle of durathread, good luck unraveling this.
obj.item.grown.cotton.durathread.name: durathread bundle

obj.item.grown.log.desc: It's better than bad, it's good!
obj.item.grown.log.name: tower-cap log

obj.item.grown.log.bamboo.desc: A long and resistant bamboo log.
obj.item.grown.log.bamboo.name: bamboo log

obj.item.grown.novaflower.desc: These beautiful flowers have a crisp smokey scent, like a summer bonfire.
obj.item.grown.novaflower.name: novaflower

obj.item.grown.shrub.desc: A shrubbery, it looks nice and it was only a few credits too. Plant it on the ground to grow a hedge, shrubbing skills not required.
obj.item.grown.shrub.name: shrub

obj.item.guardian_creator.desc: An enchanted deck of tarot cards, rumored to be a source of unimaginable power.
obj.item.guardian_creator.name: enchanted deck of tarot cards

obj.item.guardian_creator.carp.desc: Using the power of Carp'sie, you can catch a carp from byond the veil of Carpthulu, and bind it to your fleshy flesh form.
obj.item.guardian_creator.carp.name: holocarp fishsticks

obj.item.guardian_creator.miner.desc: Seems to be a very old rock, may have originated from a strange meteor.
obj.item.guardian_creator.miner.name: dusty shard

obj.item.guardian_creator.tech.desc: It contains an alien nanoswarm of unknown origin. Though capable of near sorcerous feats via use of hardlight holograms and nanomachines, it requires an organic host as a home base and source of fuel.
obj.item.guardian_creator.tech.name: holoparasite injector

obj.item.guardian_creator.tech.choose.tr.desc: It contains an alien nanoswarm of unknown origin. Though capable of near sorcerous feats via use of hardlight holograms and nanomachines, it requires an organic host as a home base and source of fuel.
obj.item.guardian_creator.tech.choose.tr.name: holoparasite injector

obj.item.guardian_creator.wizard.desc: An enchanted deck of tarot cards, rumored to be a source of unimaginable power.
obj.item.guardian_creator.wizard.name: enchanted deck of tarot cards

obj.item.gun.desc: It's a gun. It's pretty terrible, though.
obj.item.gun.name: gun

obj.item.gun.ballistic.desc: Now comes in flavors like GUN. Uses 10mm ammo, for some reason.
obj.item.gun.ballistic.name: projectile gun

obj.item.gun.ballistic.automatic.desc: Now comes in flavors like GUN. Uses 10mm ammo, for some reason.

obj.item.gun.ballistic.automatic.ar.modu.desc: Nanotrasen's prime ballistic option based on the Stoner design, fitted with a light polymer frame and other tactical furniture, and chambered in .277 Aestus - nicknamed 'Boarder' by Special Operations teams.
obj.item.gun.ballistic.automatic.ar.modu.name: NT ARG-63

obj.item.gun.ballistic.automatic.ar.modu.desc: A specialized Nanotrasen-produced ballistic pulse rifle that uses compressed magazines to output absurd firepower in a compact package.
obj.item.gun.ballistic.automatic.ar.modu.name: NT M44A Pulse Rifle

obj.item.gun.ballistic.automatic.ar.modu.desc: A specialized Nanotrasen-produced ballistic pulse rifle that uses compressed magazines to output absurd firepower in a compact package. This one's fitted with an underbarrel grenade launcher, and a red dot scope to help align it. Compensating for something?
obj.item.gun.ballistic.automatic.ar.modu.name: NT M44AGL Pulse Rifle

obj.item.gun.ballistic.automatic.ar.modu.desc: A specialized Nanotrasen-produced ballistic pulse rifle that uses compressed magazines to output absurd firepower in a compact package. This one's fitted with a long-range scope.
obj.item.gun.ballistic.automatic.ar.modu.name: NT M44AS Pulse Rifle

obj.item.gun.ballistic.automatic.ar.modu.desc: A specialized Nanotrasen-produced ballistic pulse rifle that uses compressed magazines to output absurd firepower in a compact package. This one's fitted with a two-round semi-automatic underbarrel 12 gauge shotgun.
obj.item.gun.ballistic.automatic.ar.modu.name: NT M44ASG Pulse Rifle

obj.item.gun.ballistic.automatic.battle_.desc: Nanotrasen's latest prototype .38 Special longarm, found exclusively in the hands of their private security teams. 		Technically a pistol-caliber carbine, despite the name and its use as a designated marksman rifle. Acceleration technology 		enables improved ballistic performance, but necessitates maintenance.

obj.item.gun.ballistic.automatic.m90.name: M-90gl Carbine

obj.item.gun.ballistic.automatic.m90.unr.desc: A three-round burst .223 toploading carbine, designated 'M-90gl'. Has an attached underbarrel grenade launcher.
obj.item.gun.ballistic.automatic.m90.unr.name: M-90gl Carbine

obj.item.gun.ballistic.automatic.miecz.desc: A short barrel, further compacted conversion of the 'Lanca' rifle to fire pistol caliber .27-54 cartridges. 		Due to the intended purpose of the weapon, and less than optimal ranged performance of the projectile, it has 		nothing more than basic glow-sights as opposed to the ranged scope Lanca users might be used to.
obj.item.gun.ballistic.automatic.miecz.name: Miecz Submachine Gun

obj.item.gun.ballistic.automatic.mini_uz.name: Type U3 Uzi

obj.item.gun.ballistic.automatic.mini_uz.desc: Developed by Syndicate monkeys, for syndicate Monkeys. Despite the name, this weapon resembles an Uzi significantly more than a MAC-10. Uses 9mm rounds. There's a label on the other side of the gun that says "Do what comes natural."
obj.item.gun.ballistic.automatic.mini_uz.name: MONK-10

obj.item.gun.ballistic.automatic.napad.desc: A 9mm submachine gun with a sizeable magazine, there are no other markings on it, why is it so big?
obj.item.gun.ballistic.automatic.napad.name: 'Napad' Submachine Gun

obj.item.gun.ballistic.automatic.napad.n.desc: A 9mm submachine gun with a sizeable magazine, there are no other markings on it, why is it so big?
obj.item.gun.ballistic.automatic.napad.n.name: 'Napad' Submachine Gun

obj.item.gun.ballistic.automatic.ntmp5.desc: A hardlight compliance submachine gun variant designed for sustained non-lethal confrontations. It has a retractable stock included in its design, allowing for easier concealment. Without the stock, its recoil is strong enough that it needs two hands to use effectively.
obj.item.gun.ballistic.automatic.ntmp5.name: NT22-HCS-MP 'Lancer'

obj.item.gun.ballistic.automatic.pistol.desc: Now comes in flavors like GUN. Uses 10mm ammo, for some reason.

obj.item.gun.ballistic.automatic.pistol..desc: A modernized reproduction of an old Soviet machine pistol. It fires quickly, but kicks like a mule. Uses 9mm ammo. Has a threaded barrel for suppressors.

obj.item.gun.ballistic.automatic.pistol..desc: A modified variant of the Ansem, spiritual successor to the Makarov, featuring an integral suppressor and push-button trigger on the grip 	for an underbarrel-mounted disruptor, similar in operation to the standalone SC/FISHER. Chambered in 10mm.
obj.item.gun.ballistic.automatic.pistol..name: Ansem/SC pistol

This allows it to fire a very quick 2-round burst. Chambered in .45.

obj.item.gun.ballistic.automatic.pistol..name: Gwiazda Plasma Sharpshooter

obj.item.gun.ballistic.automatic.pistol..desc: An outdated sidearm rarely seen in use by some members of the CIN. 		Uses plasma power packs. 		Spews an inaccurate stream of searing plasma out the magnetic barrel so long as it has power and the trigger is pulled.

obj.item.gun.ballistic.automatic.pistol..desc: The Malorian Arms 3516 is a 14mm heavy pistol, sporting a titanium frame and unique wooden grip. A custom Dyna-porting and 	direct integral cyber-interlink means only someone with a cyberarm and smartgun link can take full advantage of the pistol's features.

obj.item.gun.ballistic.automatic.smart_m.name: M63A4 "Smartgun"

obj.item.gun.ballistic.automatic.smart_m.desc: A weapon with a blistering rate of fire, so heavy that it needs to be mounted on a modsuit to wield. 	It's equipped with IFF technology, allowing the bullets to intentionally miss friendly targets.

obj.item.gun.ballistic.automatic.smartgu.desc: An old experiment in smart-weapon technology that guides bullets towards the target the gun was aimed at when fired. 		While the tracking functions worked fine, the gun is prone to insanely wide spread thanks to it's practically non-existant barrel.
obj.item.gun.ballistic.automatic.smartgu.name: Abielle Smart-SMG

obj.item.gun.ballistic.automatic.sniper_.desc: A long ranged weapon that does significant damage. No, you can't quickscope.
obj.item.gun.ballistic.automatic.sniper_.name: sniper rifle

obj.item.gun.ballistic.automatic.sniper_.desc: A devastating Aussec Armory heavy sniper rifle, fitted with a modern scope.
obj.item.gun.ballistic.automatic.sniper_.name: AUS-107 anti-materiel rifle

obj.item.gun.ballistic.automatic.sniper_.desc: An illegal Scarborough Arms rendition of an Aussec Armory sniper rifle. This one has been fitted with a heavy duty scope, a sturdier stock, and has a removable muzzle brake that allows easy attachment of suppressors.
obj.item.gun.ballistic.automatic.sniper_.name: SA-107 anti-materiel rifle

obj.item.gun.ballistic.automatic.sniper_.desc: A sleek, light bullpup .416 Stabilis sniper rifle with a reciprocating barrel, nicknamed 'Caracal' by Scarborough Arms. Its compact folding parts make it able to fit into a backpack, and its modular barrel can have a suppressor installed within it rather than as a muzzle extension. Its advanced scope accounts for all ballistic inaccuracies of a reciprocating barrel.
obj.item.gun.ballistic.automatic.sniper_.name: 'Caracal' anti-materiel rifle

obj.item.gun.ballistic.automatic.sniper_.desc: An illegally modified .50 cal sniper rifle with suppression compatibility. Quickscoping still doesn't work.
obj.item.gun.ballistic.automatic.sniper_.name: syndicate sniper rifle

obj.item.gun.ballistic.automatic.toy.rio.desc: A prototype three-round burst toy submachine gun. Ages 8 and up.
obj.item.gun.ballistic.automatic.toy.rio.name: foam force SMG

obj.item.gun.ballistic.automatic.wt550.desc: Recalled by Nanotrasen due to public backlash around heat distribution resulting in unintended discombobulation. 		This outcry was fabricated through various Syndicate-backed misinformation operations to force Nanotrasen to abandon 		its ballistics weapon program, cornering them into the energy weapons market. Most often found today in the hands of pirates, 		underfunded security personnel, cargo technicians, theoretical physicists, and gang bangers out on the rim. 		Light-weight and fully automatic. Uses 4.6x30mm rounds.
obj.item.gun.ballistic.automatic.wt550.name: WT-550 Autorifle

obj.item.gun.ballistic.automatic.wt550.s.desc: A heavier, bulkier automatic variant of the WT-550, and now with 99% less discombobulation! It's back, baby. Uses 4.6x30mm rounds. Recommended to hold with two hands.
obj.item.gun.ballistic.automatic.wt550.s.name: WT-551 Autorifle

obj.item.gun.ballistic.automatic.wylom.desc: A massive, outdated beast of an anti materiel rifle that was once in use by CIN military forces. Fires the devastating .60 Strela caseless round, 		the massively overperforming penetration of which being the reason this weapon was discontinued.
obj.item.gun.ballistic.automatic.wylom.name: Wyłom Anti-Materiel Rifle

obj.item.gun.ballistic.automatic.xhihao_.desc: A weapon that could hardly be called a 'sub' machinegun, firing the monstrous .585 cartridge. 		It provides enough kick to bruise a shoulder pretty bad if used without protection.
obj.item.gun.ballistic.automatic.xhihao_.name: Bogseo Submachine Gun

obj.item.gun.ballistic.automatic.xhihao_.desc: A weapon that could hardly be called a 'sub' machinegun, firing the monstrous .585 cartridge. 		It provides enough kick to bruise a shoulder pretty bad if used without protection.
obj.item.gun.ballistic.automatic.xhihao_.name: Bogseo Submachine Gun

obj.item.gun.ballistic.bow.desc: Seems out-of-place in this day and age, but at least it's reliable.
obj.item.gun.ballistic.bow.name: bow

obj.item.gun.ballistic.bow.ashenbow.desc: A bow made from watcher sinew and bone. Seems to possess an almost eerie radiance about it.
obj.item.gun.ballistic.bow.ashenbow.name: ashen bow

obj.item.gun.ballistic.bow.clockwork.desc: A bow made from brass and other components that you can't quite understand. It glows with a deep energy and frabricates arrows by itself.
obj.item.gun.ballistic.bow.clockwork.name: brass bow

obj.item.gun.ballistic.bow.divine.desc: Holy armament to pierce the souls of sinners.
obj.item.gun.ballistic.bow.divine.name: divine bow

obj.item.gun.ballistic.bow.longbow.desc: While pretty finely crafted, surely you can find something better to use in the current year.
obj.item.gun.ballistic.bow.longbow.name: longbow

obj.item.gun.ballistic.bow.security.desc: A classic shortbow design, upgraded with carbon fiber structure and a hardlight bowstring. Elegant to use, though undeniably still a bit antiquated. 	Offers heightened armor penetration and wounding potential than the older variants.
obj.item.gun.ballistic.bow.security.name: hardlight bow

obj.item.gun.ballistic.bow.shortbow.desc: A simple homemade shortbow. Great for LARPing. Or poking out someones eye.
obj.item.gun.ballistic.bow.shortbow.name: shortbow

obj.item.gun.ballistic.bow.tribalbow.desc: Seems out-of-place in this day and age, but at least it's reliable.
obj.item.gun.ballistic.bow.tribalbow.name: bow

obj.item.gun.ballistic.bow.tribalbow.ash.desc: Some sort of primitive projectile weapon made of bone and wrapped sinew, oddly robust.
obj.item.gun.ballistic.bow.tribalbow.ash.name: bone bow

obj.item.gun.ballistic.bow.tribalbow.pip.desc: Portable and sleek, but you'd be better off hitting someone with a pool noodle.
obj.item.gun.ballistic.bow.tribalbow.pip.name: pipe bow

obj.item.gun.ballistic.derringer.desc: A very compact twin-barreled pistol, chambered in .310 strilka. 		Despite using a rifle cartridge, the short barrels leave a lot to 		be desired for ballistic performance and suffer from immense dropoff.
obj.item.gun.ballistic.derringer.name: Yinbi Derringer

obj.item.gun.ballistic.revolver.badass.desc: A 7-chamber revolver manufactured by Waffle Corp to make their operatives feel Badass. Offers no tactical advantage whatsoever. Uses .357 ammo.
obj.item.gun.ballistic.revolver.badass.name: Badass Revolver

obj.item.gun.ballistic.revolver.badass.n.desc: A 7-chamber revolver manufactured by Waffle Corp to make their operatives feel Badass. Offers no tactical advantage whatsoever. Uses .357 ammo.
obj.item.gun.ballistic.revolver.badass.n.name: Badass Revolver

obj.item.gun.ballistic.revolver.c38.desc: A classic, if not outdated, lethal firearm. Uses .38 Special rounds.
obj.item.gun.ballistic.revolver.c38.name: .38 revolver

obj.item.gun.ballistic.revolver.c38.dete.desc:
A classic, if not outdated, law enforcement firearm. Uses .38 Special rounds. 
Some spread rumors that if you loosen the barrel with a wrench, you can "improve" it.
obj.item.gun.ballistic.revolver.c38.dete.name: Colt Detective Special

obj.item.gun.ballistic.revolver.cowboy.desc: A classic revolver, refurbished for modern use. Uses .357 ammo.
obj.item.gun.ballistic.revolver.cowboy.name: .357 revolver

obj.item.gun.ballistic.revolver.cowboy.n.desc: A classic revolver, refurbished for modern use. Uses .357 ammo.
obj.item.gun.ballistic.revolver.cowboy.n.name: .357 revolver

obj.item.gun.ballistic.revolver.defender.desc: The Defender is a cheap, subpar Martian made knockoff of the Protector series, albeit street lore is that both came out of the same factories. Fires .38 rounds. The poor quality of the machining slightly reduces the round's power and accuracy.
obj.item.gun.ballistic.revolver.defender.name: 'Defender' revolver

obj.item.gun.ballistic.revolver.golden.desc: This ain't no game, ain't never been no show, And I'll gladly gun down the oldest lady you know. Uses .357 ammo.
obj.item.gun.ballistic.revolver.golden.name: Golden revolver

obj.item.gun.ballistic.revolver.grenadel.desc: A break-action grenade launcher. Archaic by modern standards, but it still works, so who can complain?
obj.item.gun.ballistic.revolver.grenadel.name: break-action grenade launcher

obj.item.gun.ballistic.revolver.grenadel.desc: A break-action grenade launcher. Archaic by modern standards, but it still works, so who can complain?
obj.item.gun.ballistic.revolver.grenadel.name: underbarrel grenade launcher

obj.item.gun.ballistic.revolver.grenadel.desc: A break-action grenade launcher. Archaic by modern standards, but it still works, so who can complain?
obj.item.gun.ballistic.revolver.grenadel.name: break-action grenade launcher

obj.item.gun.ballistic.revolver.grenadel.desc: A break-action grenade launcher. Archaic by modern standards, but it still works, so who can complain?
obj.item.gun.ballistic.revolver.grenadel.name: break-action grenade launcher

obj.item.gun.ballistic.revolver.mateba.desc: A retro high-powered autorevolver typically used by officers of the New Russia military. Uses .357 ammo.
obj.item.gun.ballistic.revolver.mateba.name: Unica 6 auto-revolver

obj.item.gun.ballistic.revolver.nagant.desc: An old model of revolver that originated in Russia. Able to be suppressed. Uses 7.62x38mmR ammo.
obj.item.gun.ballistic.revolver.nagant.name: Nagant revolver

obj.item.gun.ballistic.revolver.ocelot.desc: A modified Peacemaker revolver that chambers .357 ammo. Less powerful than the regular .357, but ricochets a lot more.
obj.item.gun.ballistic.revolver.ocelot.name: Colt Peacemaker revolver

obj.item.gun.ballistic.revolver.peashoot.desc: A wild plantlife mutation that shoots hardened peas. Incredible.
obj.item.gun.ballistic.revolver.peashoot.name: peashooter

obj.item.gun.ballistic.revolver.protecto.desc: The Protector was designed to be a compact backup gun for NT law enforcement. Features a built in light and carefully polished action to ensure functionality no matter the environment, chambered in the same NT issue 9mm Murphy to maintain ammo compatibility. 'Murphy' magazines can be notched onto the cylinder for easy reloading.
obj.item.gun.ballistic.revolver.protecto.name: 'Protector' Revolver

obj.item.gun.ballistic.revolver.russian.desc: A Russian-made revolver for drinking games. Uses .357 ammo, and has a mechanism requiring you to spin the chamber before each trigger pull.
obj.item.gun.ballistic.revolver.russian.name: Russian revolver

obj.item.gun.ballistic.revolver.russian..desc: To play with this revolver requires wagering your very soul.
obj.item.gun.ballistic.revolver.russian..name: cursed Russian revolver

obj.item.gun.ballistic.revolver.shotgun_.desc: An outdated sidearm rarely seen in use by some members of the CIN. A revolver type design with a four shell cylinder. That's right, shell, this one shoots twelve guage.
obj.item.gun.ballistic.revolver.shotgun_.name: Bóbr 12 GA revolver

obj.item.gun.ballistic.revolver.shotgun_.desc: A civilian-modified variant of an outdated sidearm rarely seen in use by some members of the CIN. A revolver type design with a four shell cylinder. That's right, shell, this one shoots twelve gauge, but manufacturer modifications leave ballistic performance lacking.
obj.item.gun.ballistic.revolver.shotgun_.name: Bóbr civilian 12 GA revolver

obj.item.gun.ballistic.revolver.sol.desc: A small revolver with a comically short barrel and cylinder space for eight .35 Sol Short rounds.
obj.item.gun.ballistic.revolver.sol.name: Eland Revolver

obj.item.gun.ballistic.revolver.takbok.desc: A hefty revolver with an equally large cylinder capable of holding five .585 Trappiste rounds.
obj.item.gun.ballistic.revolver.takbok.name: Takbok Revolver

obj.item.gun.ballistic.rifle.desc: Some kind of bolt action rifle. You get the feeling you shouldn't have this.
obj.item.gun.ballistic.rifle.name: Bolt Rifle

obj.item.gun.ballistic.rifle.boltaction.desc: A Sakhno Precision Rifle, a bolt action weapon that was (and certainly still is) popular with 		frontiersmen, cargo runners, private security forces, explorers, and other unsavoury types. This particular 		pattern of the rifle dates back all the way to 2440.
obj.item.gun.ballistic.rifle.boltaction.name: Sakhno Precision Rifle

obj.item.gun.ballistic.rifle.boltaction..desc: A mass-manufactured bolt-action sporting rifle with a distinctively long barrel. Powerful enough to take down a space bear from a thousand paces. The lengthened barrel gives it good accuracy and power, even at range.
obj.item.gun.ballistic.rifle.boltaction..name: Donk Co. Jezail

obj.item.gun.ballistic.rifle.boltaction..desc: A weapon favored by carp hunters, but just as infamously employed by agents of the Animal Rights Consortium against human aggressors. Because it's ironic.
obj.item.gun.ballistic.rifle.boltaction..name: ballistic harpoon gun

obj.item.gun.ballistic.rifle.boltaction..desc: A symbol that the true masters of this place are not those who merely inhabit it, but the one willing to twist it towards a killing intent.
obj.item.gun.ballistic.rifle.boltaction..name: pipegun

obj.item.gun.ballistic.rifle.boltaction..desc: It is foolish to think that anyone wearing the grey is incapable of hurting you, simply because they are not baring their teeth.
obj.item.gun.ballistic.rifle.boltaction..name: pipe pistol

obj.item.gun.ballistic.rifle.boltaction..desc: What value is there in honesty towards the dishonest? So that they might twist the arm and slit the wrist? 		The open palm is no sign of weakness; it is to draw the eyes away from the other hand, lying in wait.
obj.item.gun.ballistic.rifle.boltaction..name: regal pipe pistol

obj.item.gun.ballistic.rifle.boltaction..desc: To call this 'regal' is a cruel irony. For the only noteworthy quality of nobility is in how it is wielded to kill. 		All monarchs deserve to be crowned. But none will remember the dead tyrant for the red stain they left on the carpet.
obj.item.gun.ballistic.rifle.boltaction..name: regal pipegun

obj.item.gun.ballistic.rifle.boltaction..desc: An upgrade and modernisation of the original Sakhno rifle, made with such wonders as 		modern materials, a scope, and other impressive technological advancements that, to be honest, 		were already around when the original weapon was designed. Surprisingly for a rifle of this type, 		the scope actually has magnification, rather than being decorative.
obj.item.gun.ballistic.rifle.boltaction..name: Sakhno-Zhihao Sporting Rifle

obj.item.gun.ballistic.rifle.boltaction..desc: A heavily modified Sakhno rifle, parts made by Xhihao light arms based around Jupiter herself. 		Has a higher capacity than standard Sakhno rifles, fitting eight .310 cartridges.
obj.item.gun.ballistic.rifle.boltaction..name: Rengo Precision Rifle

obj.item.gun.ballistic.rifle.boltaction..desc: A heavily modified Sakhno rifle, parts made by Xhihao light arms based around Jupiter herself. 		Has a higher capacity than standard Sakhno rifles, fitting eight .310 cartridges.
obj.item.gun.ballistic.rifle.boltaction..name: Rengo Precision Rifle

obj.item.gun.ballistic.rifle.boltaction..desc: A modification of the Sakhno Precision Rifle, "Sakhno M2442 Army" is stamped into the side. 		It is unknown what army this pattern of rifle was made for or if it was ever even used by an army 		of any sort. What you can discern, however, is that its previous owner did not treat the weapon well. 		For some reason, there's moisture all through the internals.
obj.item.gun.ballistic.rifle.boltaction..name: Sakhno M2442 Army

obj.item.gun.ballistic.rifle.enchanted.desc: Careful not to lose your head.
obj.item.gun.ballistic.rifle.enchanted.name: enchanted bolt action rifle

obj.item.gun.ballistic.rifle.lionhunter.desc: An antique looking rifle that looks immaculate despite being clearly very old.
obj.item.gun.ballistic.rifle.lionhunter.name: Lionhunter's Rifle

obj.item.gun.ballistic.rifle.lionhunter..desc: An antique, brass rifle made with the finest of care. It has an ornate scope in the shape of a cog built into the top.
obj.item.gun.ballistic.rifle.lionhunter..name: brass rifle

obj.item.gun.ballistic.rifle.rebarxbow.desc: A handcrafted crossbow. 		   Aside from conventional sharpened iron rods, it can also fire specialty ammo made from the atmos crystalizer - zaukerite, metallic hydrogen, and healium rods all work. 		   Very slow to reload - you can craft the crossbow with a crowbar to loosen the crossbar, but risk a misfire, or worse...
obj.item.gun.ballistic.rifle.rebarxbow.name: heated rebar crossbow

obj.item.gun.ballistic.rifle.rebarxbow.f.desc: Some idiot decided that they would risk shooting themselves in the face if it meant they could have a draw this crossbow a bit faster. Hopefully, it was worth it.
obj.item.gun.ballistic.rifle.rebarxbow.f.name: stressed rebar crossbow

obj.item.gun.ballistic.rifle.rebarxbow.s.desc: The syndicate liked the bootleg rebar crossbow NT engineers made, so they showed what it could be if properly developed. 			Holds three shots without a chance of exploding, and features a built in scope. Compatible with all known crossbow ammunition.
obj.item.gun.ballistic.rifle.rebarxbow.s.name: syndicate rebar crossbow

obj.item.gun.ballistic.rifle.sks.desc: A revival of the ancient SKS semi-automatic rifle, redesigned to utilize .310 Strilka rounds. Produced to celebrate the 		establishment of the Third Soviet Union in the Spinward Sector. In the wake of the union's collapse, these weapons now hold a 		unique place in history amongst the populace of the sector. However, they are strangely rarer than the Sakhno M2442 Army. 		Frontier settlers are known for owning one of these for hunting purposes. Or fighting off annoying tax collectors.
obj.item.gun.ballistic.rifle.sks.name: Sakhno SKS semi-automatic rifle

obj.item.gun.ballistic.rifle.sks.chekhov.desc: A revival of the ancient SKS semi-automatic rifle, redesigned to utilize .310 Strilka rounds. The name 		'Chekhov' is engraved in the side of the stock. You feel like this had some kind of significance at one point, 		but you cannot be sure as to what that might have been. Or whether that true meaning has yet to reveal itself.
obj.item.gun.ballistic.rifle.sks.chekhov.name: Chekhov's SKS semi-automatic rifle

obj.item.gun.ballistic.rifle.sks.empty.desc: A revival of the ancient SKS semi-automatic rifle, redesigned to utilize .310 Strilka rounds. Produced to celebrate the 		establishment of the Third Soviet Union in the Spinward Sector. In the wake of the union's collapse, these weapons now hold a 		unique place in history amongst the populace of the sector. However, they are strangely rarer than the Sakhno M2442 Army. 		Frontier settlers are known for owning one of these for hunting purposes. Or fighting off annoying tax collectors.
obj.item.gun.ballistic.rifle.sks.empty.name: Sakhno SKS semi-automatic rifle

obj.item.gun.ballistic.rifle.sniper_rifl.desc: A boltaction anti-materiel rifle, utilizing .50 BMG cartridges. While technically outdated in modern arms markets, it still works exceptionally well as 		an anti-personnel rifle. In particular, the employment of modern armored MODsuits utilizing advanced armor plating has given this weapon a new home on the battlefield. 		It is also able to be suppressed... somehow.
obj.item.gun.ballistic.rifle.sniper_rifl.name: anti-materiel sniper rifle

obj.item.gun.ballistic.rifle.sniper_rifl.desc: A boltaction anti-materiel rifle, utilizing .50 BMG cartridges. While technically outdated in modern arms markets, it still works exceptionally well as 		an anti-personnel rifle. In particular, the employment of modern armored MODsuits utilizing advanced armor plating has given this weapon a new home on the battlefield. 		It is also able to be suppressed... somehow. This one seems to have a little picture of someone in a blood-red MODsuit stenciled on it, pointing at a green floppy disk. 		Who knows what that might mean.
obj.item.gun.ballistic.rifle.sniper_rifl.name: anti-materiel sniper rifle

obj.item.gun.ballistic.rocketlauncher.desc: A reusable rocket propelled grenade launcher. An arrow pointing toward the front of the launcher 		alongside the words "Front Toward Enemy" are printed on the tube. Someone seems to have crossed out 		that last word and written "NT" over it at some point. A sticker near the back of the launcher warn 		to "CHECK BACKBLAST CLEAR BEFORE FIRING", whatever that means.
obj.item.gun.ballistic.rocketlauncher.name: Dardo-RE Rocket Launcher

obj.item.gun.ballistic.rocketlauncher.no.desc: A reusable rocket propelled grenade launcher. An arrow pointing toward the front of the launcher 		alongside the words "Front Toward Enemy" are printed on the tube. 		This one has been fitted with a special backblast diverter to prevent 'friendly' fire 'accidents' during use.
obj.item.gun.ballistic.rocketlauncher.no.name: Dardo-REF Flameless Rocket Launcher

obj.item.gun.ballistic.rocketlauncher.se.desc: A reusable rocket propelled grenade launcher. An arrow pointing toward the front of the launcher 		alongside the words "Front Toward Enemy" are printed on the tube. Someone seems to have crossed out 		that last word and written "NT" over it at some point. A sticker near the back of the launcher warn 		to "CHECK BACKBLAST CLEAR BEFORE FIRING", whatever that means.
obj.item.gun.ballistic.rocketlauncher.se.name: Dardo-RE Rocket Launcher

obj.item.gun.ballistic.rocketlauncher.se.desc: A reusable rocket propelled grenade launcher. An arrow pointing toward the front of the launcher 		alongside the words "Front Toward Enemy" are printed on the tube. Someone seems to have crossed out 		that last word and written "NT" over it at some point. A sticker near the back of the launcher warn 		to "CHECK BACKBLAST CLEAR BEFORE FIRING", whatever that means.
obj.item.gun.ballistic.rocketlauncher.se.name: Dardo-RE Rocket Launcher

obj.item.gun.ballistic.rocketlauncher.un.desc: A reusable rocket propelled grenade launcher. An arrow pointing toward the front of the launcher 		alongside the words "Front Toward Enemy" are printed on the tube. 		A sticker near the back of the launcher warn to "CHECK BACKBLAST CLEAR BEFORE FIRING", whatever that means.
obj.item.gun.ballistic.rocketlauncher.un.name: Dardo-RE Rocket Launcher

obj.item.gun.ballistic.rocketlauncher.un.desc: A reusable rocket propelled grenade launcher. The words "Syndicate this way" and an arrow have been written near the barrel. 	A sticker near the cheek rest reads, "ENSURE AREA BEHIND IS CLEAR BEFORE FIRING"
obj.item.gun.ballistic.rocketlauncher.un.name: Dardo-RE Rocket Launcher

obj.item.gun.ballistic.shotgun.desc: A traditional shotgun with wood furniture and a four-shell capacity underneath.
obj.item.gun.ballistic.shotgun.name: shotgun

obj.item.gun.ballistic.shotgun.automatic.desc: A semi automatic shotgun with tactical furniture and a six-shell capacity underneath.
obj.item.gun.ballistic.shotgun.automatic.name: combat shotgun

obj.item.gun.ballistic.shotgun.automatic.desc: A compact version of the semi automatic combat shotgun. Lower magazine capacity, but more easily carried.
obj.item.gun.ballistic.shotgun.automatic.name: compact combat shotgun

obj.item.gun.ballistic.shotgun.automatic.desc: An advanced shotgun with two separate magazine tubes, allowing you to quickly toggle between ammo types.
obj.item.gun.ballistic.shotgun.automatic.name: cycler shotgun

obj.item.gun.ballistic.shotgun.automatic.desc: An advanced shotgun with two separate magazine tubes. This one shows signs of bounty hunting customization, meaning it likely has a dual rubber shot/fire slug load.
obj.item.gun.ballistic.shotgun.automatic.name: bounty cycler shotgun

obj.item.gun.ballistic.shotgun.automatic.desc: An advanced shotgun with two separate magazine tubes, allowing you to quickly toggle between ammo types.
obj.item.gun.ballistic.shotgun.automatic.name: cycler shotgun

obj.item.gun.ballistic.shotgun.bulldog.desc: A 2-round burst fire, mag-fed shotgun for combat in narrow corridors, 		nicknamed 'Bulldog' by boarding parties. Compatible only with specialized 8-round drum magazines. 		Can have a secondary magazine attached to quickly swap between ammo types, or just to keep shooting.
obj.item.gun.ballistic.shotgun.bulldog.name: Bulldog Shotgun

obj.item.gun.ballistic.shotgun.bulldog.b.desc: A 2-round burst fire, mag-fed shotgun for target suppression in narrow corridors, 		nicknamed 'Beandog' by internal security. Compatible only with specialized 8-round beanbag slug drum magazines. 		Can have a secondary magazine attached to quickly reload.
obj.item.gun.ballistic.shotgun.bulldog.b.name: Beandog Shotgun

obj.item.gun.ballistic.shotgun.bulldog.u.desc: A 2-round burst fire, mag-fed shotgun for combat in narrow corridors, 		nicknamed 'Bulldog' by boarding parties. Compatible only with specialized 8-round drum magazines. 		Can have a secondary magazine attached to quickly swap between ammo types, or just to keep shooting.
obj.item.gun.ballistic.shotgun.bulldog.u.name: Bulldog Shotgun

obj.item.gun.ballistic.shotgun.china_lak.desc: A pump-action grenade launcher. Typically found in the hands of space pirate raiders. The weight leaves a lot to be desired, but the high ammo capacity makes 		up for the bulk.
obj.item.gun.ballistic.shotgun.china_lak.name: pump-action grenade launcher

obj.item.gun.ballistic.shotgun.ctf.desc: This looks like it could really hurt in melee.
obj.item.gun.ballistic.shotgun.ctf.name: laser shotgun

obj.item.gun.ballistic.shotgun.ctf.blue.desc: This looks like it could really hurt in melee.
obj.item.gun.ballistic.shotgun.ctf.blue.name: laser shotgun

obj.item.gun.ballistic.shotgun.ctf.green.desc: This looks like it could really hurt in melee.
obj.item.gun.ballistic.shotgun.ctf.green.name: laser shotgun

obj.item.gun.ballistic.shotgun.ctf.red.desc: This looks like it could really hurt in melee.
obj.item.gun.ballistic.shotgun.ctf.red.name: laser shotgun

obj.item.gun.ballistic.shotgun.ctf.yello.desc: This looks like it could really hurt in melee.
obj.item.gun.ballistic.shotgun.ctf.yello.name: laser shotgun

obj.item.gun.ballistic.shotgun.doublebar.desc: A normal double-barrel shotgun that has been rechambered to fit breaching shells. Useful in breaching airlocks and windows, not much else.
obj.item.gun.ballistic.shotgun.doublebar.name: breaching shotgun

obj.item.gun.ballistic.shotgun.doublebar.desc: A hunting shotgun used by the wealthy to hunt "game".
obj.item.gun.ballistic.shotgun.doublebar.name: hunting shotgun

obj.item.gun.ballistic.shotgun.hook.desc: Range isn't an issue when you can bring your victim to you.
obj.item.gun.ballistic.shotgun.hook.name: hook modified sawn-off shotgun

obj.item.gun.ballistic.shotgun.lethal.desc: A traditional shotgun with wood furniture and a four-shell capacity underneath.
obj.item.gun.ballistic.shotgun.lethal.name: shotgun

obj.item.gun.ballistic.shotgun.monkey.desc: A chimp-sized, single-shot and break-action shotgun with an unpractical stock.
obj.item.gun.ballistic.shotgun.monkey.name: Barback's Shot

obj.item.gun.ballistic.shotgun.musket.desc: A large-bore boltloading firearm with a classy wooden frame. Cheap, accurate, and easy to maintain. Reload and rack after every shot.
obj.item.gun.ballistic.shotgun.musket.name: Donk Co. Musket

obj.item.gun.ballistic.shotgun.riot.desc: A sturdy shotgun with a longer magazine and a fixed tactical stock designed for non-lethal riot control.
obj.item.gun.ballistic.shotgun.riot.name: riot shotgun

obj.item.gun.ballistic.shotgun.riot.sol.desc: A twelve gauge shotgun with an eight shell capacity underneath. Made for and used by TerraGov's various military branches.
obj.item.gun.ballistic.shotgun.riot.sol.name: Renoster Shotgun

obj.item.gun.ballistic.shotgun.riot.sol..desc: A twleve gauge shotgun with an eight shell capacity underneath. This one is painted in a tacticool black.
obj.item.gun.ballistic.shotgun.riot.sol..name: Renoster Shotgun

obj.item.gun.ballistic.shotgun.sc_pump.desc: A traditional shotgun with wood furniture and a four-shell capacity underneath.
obj.item.gun.ballistic.shotgun.sc_pump.name: shotgun

obj.item.gun.ballistic.shotgun.toy.desc: A toy shotgun with wood furniture and a four-shell capacity underneath. Ages 8 and up.
obj.item.gun.ballistic.shotgun.toy.name: foam force shotgun

obj.item.gun.ballistic.shotgun.toy.cross.desc: A weapon favored by many overactive children. Ages 8 and up.
obj.item.gun.ballistic.shotgun.toy.cross.name: foam force crossbow

obj.item.gun.ballistic.shotgun.toy.cross.desc: A weapon favored by many overactive children. Ages 8 and up.
obj.item.gun.ballistic.shotgun.toy.cross.name: foam force crossbow

obj.item.gun.ballistic.shotgun.toy.riot.desc: A toy shotgun with wood furniture and a four-shell capacity underneath. Ages 8 and up.
obj.item.gun.ballistic.shotgun.toy.riot.name: foam force shotgun

obj.item.gun.ballistic.toy.foamforce_imp.desc: A spring primed Donksoft blaster that pops out of a panel on your arm. You wonder if having a high tension spring installed in your arm was a good idea.
obj.item.gun.ballistic.toy.foamforce_imp.name: Pop-up Donksoft Blaster

obj.item.gun.blastcannon.desc: A surprisingly portable device used to concentrate a bomb's blast energy to a narrow wave. Small enough to stow in a bag.
obj.item.gun.blastcannon.name: blast cannon

obj.item.gun.chem.desc: A Nanotrasen syringe gun, modified to automatically synthesise chemical darts, and instead hold reagents.
obj.item.gun.chem.name: reagent gun

obj.item.gun.energy.alien.desc: A complicated gun that fires bursts of high-intensity radiation.
obj.item.gun.energy.alien.name: alien pistol

obj.item.gun.energy.alien.astrum.desc: A seemingly complicated gun, that isn't so complicated after all.
obj.item.gun.energy.alien.astrum.name: alien energy pistol

obj.item.gun.energy.alien.zeta.desc: Having this too close to your face makes you start to taste blood, is this safe?
obj.item.gun.energy.alien.zeta.name: Zeta Blaster

obj.item.gun.energy.cell_loaded.desc: A energy gun that functions by loading cells for ammo types
obj.item.gun.energy.cell_loaded.name: cell-loaded gun

obj.item.gun.energy.cell_loaded.alltypes.desc: A energy gun that functions by loading cells for ammo types
obj.item.gun.energy.cell_loaded.alltypes.name: omni gun

obj.item.gun.energy.cell_loaded.medigun.desc: This is my smart gun, it won't hurt anyone friendly, infact it will make them heal! Please tell github if you somehow manage to get this gun.
obj.item.gun.energy.cell_loaded.medigun.name: medigun

obj.item.gun.energy.cell_loaded.medigun..desc: The most advanced version of the CWM-479 line of mediguns, it features slots for six cells and a auto recharging battery
obj.item.gun.energy.cell_loaded.medigun..name: VeyMedical CWM-479-CC cell-powered medigun

obj.item.gun.energy.cell_loaded.medigun..desc: This is a standard model medigun produced by Vey-Med, for healing in less than ideal scenarios. The medicell chamber is rated to fit three cells.
obj.item.gun.energy.cell_loaded.medigun..name: VeyMedical CWM-479 cell-powered medigun

obj.item.gun.energy.cell_loaded.medigun..desc: This is an upgraded variant of the standard CWM-479 medigun. While it still only fits three cells, its cell has been upgraded for higher capacity and faster charging.
obj.item.gun.energy.cell_loaded.medigun..name: VeyMedical CWM-479-FC cell-powered medigun

obj.item.gun.energy.disabler.desc: A self-defense weapon that exhausts organic targets, weakening them until they collapse.
obj.item.gun.energy.disabler.name: disabler

obj.item.gun.energy.disabler.cyborg.desc: An integrated disabler that draws from a cyborg's power cell. This weapon contains a limiter to prevent the cyborg's power cell from overheating.
obj.item.gun.energy.disabler.cyborg.name: cyborg disabler

obj.item.gun.energy.disabler.smg.desc: An automatic disabler variant, as opposed to the conventional model, boasts a higher ammunition capacity at the cost of slightly reduced beam effectiveness.
obj.item.gun.energy.disabler.smg.name: disabler smg

obj.item.gun.energy.disabler.smoothbore.desc: A hand-crafted disabler, using a hard knock on an energy cell to fire the stunner laser. A lack of proper focusing means it has no accuracy whatsoever.
obj.item.gun.energy.disabler.smoothbore.name: smoothbore disabler

obj.item.gun.energy.disabler.smoothbore..desc: An enhancement version of the smoothbore disabler pistol. Improved optics and cell type result in good accuracy and the ability to fire twice. 	The disabler bolts also don't dissipate upon impact with armor, unlike the previous model.
obj.item.gun.energy.disabler.smoothbore..name: elite smoothbore disabler

obj.item.gun.energy.dueling.desc: High-tech dueling pistol. Launches chaff and projectile according to preset settings.
obj.item.gun.energy.dueling.name: dueling pistol

obj.item.gun.energy.e_gun.desc: A basic hybrid energy gun with two settings: disable and kill.
obj.item.gun.energy.e_gun.name: energy gun

obj.item.gun.energy.e_gun.advtaser.desc: A dual-mode taser designed to fire both short-range high-power electrodes and long-range disabler beams.
obj.item.gun.energy.e_gun.advtaser.name: hybrid taser

obj.item.gun.energy.e_gun.advtaser.cybor.desc: An integrated hybrid taser that draws directly from a cyborg's power cell. The weapon contains a limiter to prevent the cyborg's power cell from overheating.
obj.item.gun.energy.e_gun.advtaser.cybor.name: cyborg taser

obj.item.gun.energy.e_gun.advtaser.mount.desc: An arm mounted dual-mode weapon that fires electrodes and disabler shots.
obj.item.gun.energy.e_gun.advtaser.mount.name: mounted taser

obj.item.gun.energy.e_gun.blueshield.desc: An energy weapon fitted with self recharging-cells. Feels somewhat heavy to carry and would certainly hurt to get whacked by.
obj.item.gun.energy.e_gun.blueshield.name: X-02 energy revolver

obj.item.gun.energy.e_gun.blueshield.spe.desc: An advanced model of the energy revolver with all of it's benefit and a much more powerful phase emitter.
obj.item.gun.energy.e_gun.blueshield.spe.name: tactical energy revolver

obj.item.gun.energy.e_gun.dragnet.desc: The "Dynamic Rapid-Apprehension of the Guilty Network" translocation shotgun (or DRAGnet for short) is a revolution in law enforcement technology. 		By syncing the weapon to a DRAGnet beacon, the bluespace transportation fields produced by the weapon's 'snare' function can rapidly exfiltrate an entire 		security squad, with criminal in tow. Otherwise, the weapon is an entirely nonlethal apprehension tool. Exceptionally useful for nonlethal close-quarters battle.
obj.item.gun.energy.e_gun.dragnet.name: DRAGnet translocation shotgun

obj.item.gun.energy.e_gun.hos.desc: This is an expensive, modern recreation of an antique laser gun. This gun has several unique firemodes, but lacks the ability to recharge over time.
obj.item.gun.energy.e_gun.hos.name: X-01 MultiPhase Energy Gun

obj.item.gun.energy.e_gun.lethal.desc: A basic hybrid energy gun with two settings: disable and kill.
obj.item.gun.energy.e_gun.lethal.name: energy gun

obj.item.gun.energy.e_gun.mini.desc: A small, pistol-sized energy gun with a built-in flashlight. It has two settings: disable and kill.
obj.item.gun.energy.e_gun.mini.name: miniature energy gun

obj.item.gun.energy.e_gun.mini.practice_.desc: A modified version of the basic phaser gun, this one fires less concentrated energy bolts designed for target practice.
obj.item.gun.energy.e_gun.mini.practice_.name: practice phaser

obj.item.gun.energy.e_gun.nuclear.desc: An energy gun with an experimental miniaturized nuclear reactor that automatically charges the internal power cell.
obj.item.gun.energy.e_gun.nuclear.name: advanced energy gun

obj.item.gun.energy.e_gun.nuclear.rainbo.desc: An energy gun with an experimental miniaturized nuclear reactor that automatically charges the internal power cell. This one seems quite fancy!
obj.item.gun.energy.e_gun.nuclear.rainbo.name: fantastic energy gun

obj.item.gun.energy.e_gun.old.desc: NT-P:01 Prototype Energy Gun. Early stage development of a unique laser rifle that has multifaceted energy lens allowing the gun to alter the form of projectile it fires on command.
obj.item.gun.energy.e_gun.old.name: prototype energy gun

obj.item.gun.energy.e_gun.stun.desc: Military issue energy gun, is able to fire stun rounds.
obj.item.gun.energy.e_gun.stun.name: tactical energy gun

obj.item.gun.energy.e_gun.stun.blueshiel.desc: Military issue energy gun, is able to fire stun rounds. Extremely slow recharge
obj.item.gun.energy.e_gun.stun.blueshiel.name: defender energy carbine

obj.item.gun.energy.e_gun.turret.desc: A heavy hybrid energy cannon with two settings: Stun and kill.
obj.item.gun.energy.e_gun.turret.name: hybrid turret gun

obj.item.gun.energy.event_horizon.desc: The deranged minds of Nanotrasen, in their great hubris and spite, have birthed forth the definitive conclusion to the arms race. Weaponized black holes, and a platform to deliver them.		To look upon this existential maleficence is to know that the pursuit of profit has consigned all life to this pathetic conclusion; the destruction of reality itself.
obj.item.gun.energy.event_horizon.name: Event Horizon anti-existential beam rifle

obj.item.gun.energy.floragun.desc: A tool that discharges controlled radiation which induces mutation in plant cells.
obj.item.gun.energy.floragun.name: floral somatoray

obj.item.gun.energy.gravity_gun.desc: An experimental, multi-mode device that fires bolts of Zero-Point Energy, causing local distortions in gravity. Requires a gravitational anomaly core to function.
obj.item.gun.energy.gravity_gun.name: one-point gravitational manipulator

obj.item.gun.energy.ionrifle.desc: A man-portable anti-armor weapon designed to disable mechanical threats at range.
obj.item.gun.energy.ionrifle.name: ion rifle

obj.item.gun.energy.ionrifle.carbine.desc: The MK.II Prototype Ion Projector is a lightweight carbine version of the larger ion rifle, built to be ergonomic and efficient.
obj.item.gun.energy.ionrifle.carbine.name: ion carbine

obj.item.gun.energy.laser.desc: The Type 5 Heat Delivery System, developed by Nanotrasen. The workhorse of Nanotrasen's security forces.
obj.item.gun.energy.laser.name: Type 5 laser gun

obj.item.gun.energy.laser.assault.desc: The Type 5 Heat Delivery System, Assault Variant, developed by Nanotrasen. The workhorse of Nanotrasen's security forces and paramilitary organizations. 		While it sacrifices some stopping power and ease of use, its laser system is remarkably efficient and it boasts some resistance against electromagnetic interference.
obj.item.gun.energy.laser.assault.name: Type 5/A assault laser rifle

obj.item.gun.energy.laser.bluetag.desc: A retro laser gun modified to fire harmless blue beams of light. Sound effects included!
obj.item.gun.energy.laser.bluetag.name: laser tag gun

obj.item.gun.energy.laser.bluetag.hitsca.desc: A retro laser gun modified to fire harmless blue beams of light. Sound effects included!
obj.item.gun.energy.laser.bluetag.hitsca.name: laser tag gun

obj.item.gun.energy.laser.captain.desc: This is an antique laser gun. All craftsmanship is of the highest quality. It is decorated with assistant leather and chrome. 		The object menaces with spikes of energy. On the item is an image of Space Station 13. The station is exploding.
obj.item.gun.energy.laser.captain.name: antique laser gun

obj.item.gun.energy.laser.captain.scatte.desc: An industrial-grade heavy-duty laser rifle with a modified laser lens to scatter its shot into multiple smaller lasers. 		The inner-core can self-charge for theoretically infinite use.
obj.item.gun.energy.laser.captain.scatte.name: scatter shot laser rifle

obj.item.gun.energy.laser.carbine.desc: The burst fire Type 5/R Rapid Heat Delivery System, developed by Nanotrasen. Capable of firing a sustained volley of directed energy projectiles, though each individual projectile lacks the punch of the Type 5.
obj.item.gun.energy.laser.carbine.name: Type 5/R laser carbine

obj.item.gun.energy.laser.carbine.practi.desc: A modified version of the Type 5/R laser carbine. Fires entirely harmless bolts of directed energy. Safe AND entertaining to fire with abandon.
obj.item.gun.energy.laser.carbine.practi.name: practice laser carbine

obj.item.gun.energy.laser.chameleon.desc: The Type 5 Heat Delivery System, developed by Nanotrasen. The workhorse of Nanotrasen's security forces.
obj.item.gun.energy.laser.chameleon.name: Type 5 laser gun

obj.item.gun.energy.laser.chameleon.ball.desc: The Type 5 Heat Delivery System, developed by Nanotrasen. The workhorse of Nanotrasen's security forces.
obj.item.gun.energy.laser.chameleon.ball.name: Type 5 laser gun

obj.item.gun.energy.laser.cybersun.desc: A laser gun primarily used by syndicate security guards. It fires a rapid spray of low-power plasma beams.
obj.item.gun.energy.laser.cybersun.name: Cybersun S-120

obj.item.gun.energy.laser.cybersun.unres.desc: A laser gun primarily used by syndicate security guards. It fires a rapid spray of low-power plasma beams.
obj.item.gun.energy.laser.cybersun.unres.name: Cybersun S-120

obj.item.gun.energy.laser.cyborg.desc: An energy-based laser gun that draws power from the cyborg's internal energy cell directly. So this is what freedom looks like?
obj.item.gun.energy.laser.cyborg.name: Type 5 laser gun

obj.item.gun.energy.laser.hellgun.desc: The Type 4 Heat Delivery System, developed by Nanotrasen. Technically speaking, it is an improvement. 		Legally speaking, possession of this weapon is restricted in most occupied sectors of space. 		The Type 4 is notorious for its ability to render victims a carbonized husk with ease, melting flesh and bone as easily as butter. 		A painful, gruesome death awaits anyone on the wrong end of this gun.
obj.item.gun.energy.laser.hellgun.name: Type 4 'hellfire' laser gun

obj.item.gun.energy.laser.instakill.desc: A specialized ASMD laser-rifle, capable of flat-out disintegrating most targets in a single hit.
obj.item.gun.energy.laser.instakill.name: instakill rifle

obj.item.gun.energy.laser.instakill.ctf..desc: A specialized ASMD laser-rifle, capable of flat-out disintegrating most targets in a single hit. This one has a blue design.
obj.item.gun.energy.laser.instakill.ctf..name: instakill rifle

obj.item.gun.energy.laser.instakill.ctf..desc: A specialized ASMD laser-rifle, capable of flat-out disintegrating most targets in a single hit. This one has a green design.
obj.item.gun.energy.laser.instakill.ctf..name: instakill rifle

obj.item.gun.energy.laser.instakill.ctf..desc: A specialized ASMD laser-rifle, capable of flat-out disintegrating most targets in a single hit. This one has a red design.
obj.item.gun.energy.laser.instakill.ctf..name: instakill rifle

obj.item.gun.energy.laser.instakill.ctf..desc: A specialized ASMD laser-rifle, capable of flat-out disintegrating most targets in a single hit. This one has a yellow design.
obj.item.gun.energy.laser.instakill.ctf..name: instakill rifle

obj.item.gun.energy.laser.luxurypaywall.desc: A laser gun modified to cost 20 credits to fire. Point towards poor people.
obj.item.gun.energy.laser.luxurypaywall.name: luxurious laser gun

obj.item.gun.energy.laser.mounted.desc: An arm mounted cannon that fires lethal lasers.
obj.item.gun.energy.laser.mounted.name: mounted laser

obj.item.gun.energy.laser.mounted.augmen.desc: An arm mounted cannon that fires lethal lasers.
obj.item.gun.energy.laser.mounted.augmen.name: mounted laser

obj.item.gun.energy.laser.musket.desc: A hand-crafted laser weapon, it has a hand crank on the side to charge it up.
obj.item.gun.energy.laser.musket.name: laser musket

obj.item.gun.energy.laser.musket.prime.desc: A well-engineered, hand-charged laser weapon. Its capacitors hum with potential.
obj.item.gun.energy.laser.musket.prime.name: heroic laser musket

obj.item.gun.energy.laser.musket.repeate.desc: A weapon of incredible bulk, this ratvarian repeater has been permanently severed from its stand to be carried by hand. Cumbersome, Yes - but powerful.
obj.item.gun.energy.laser.musket.repeate.name: iconoclast's repeater

obj.item.gun.energy.laser.pistol.desc: The Type 5 Heat Delivery System, Compact Variant, developed by Nanotrasen. The workhorse of Nanotrasen's security forces, but in a more portable size. 		Sacrifices some stopping power and capacity for ease of carry and faster charging.
obj.item.gun.energy.laser.pistol.name: Type 5/C laser pistol

obj.item.gun.energy.laser.practice.desc: A modified version of the Type 5 laser gun. Fires entirely harmless bolts of directed energy. Safe AND entertaining to fire with abandon.
obj.item.gun.energy.laser.practice.name: practice laser gun

obj.item.gun.energy.laser.practice.sc_la.desc: A once potent weapon, years of dust have collected in the chamber and lens of this weapon, weakening the beam significantly.
obj.item.gun.energy.laser.practice.sc_la.name: Old laser
