obj.item.gun.energy.laser.redtag.desc: A retro laser gun modified to fire harmless beams red of light. Sound effects included!
obj.item.gun.energy.laser.redtag.name: laser tag gun

obj.item.gun.energy.laser.redtag.hitscan.desc: A retro laser gun modified to fire harmless beams red of light. Sound effects included!
obj.item.gun.energy.laser.redtag.hitscan.name: laser tag gun

obj.item.gun.energy.laser.retro.desc: The Type 1 Heat Delivery System, developed by Nanotrasen. No longer used by Nanotrasen's private security or military forces. Nevertheless, 		it is still quite deadly and easy to maintain, making it a favorite amongst pirates and other outlaws.
obj.item.gun.energy.laser.retro.name: Type 1 laser gun

obj.item.gun.energy.laser.retro.old.desc: The NT Type 1 Heat Delivery System, developed by Nanotrasen. This one looks downright ancient. What the hell happened to it?
obj.item.gun.energy.laser.retro.old.name: Type 1 laser gun

obj.item.gun.energy.laser.retro.sc_retro.desc: An older model of the basic lasergun, no longer used by Nanotrasen's security or military forces.
obj.item.gun.energy.laser.retro.sc_retro.name: retro laser

obj.item.gun.energy.laser.scatter.desc: A laser gun equipped with a refraction kit that spreads bolts.
obj.item.gun.energy.laser.scatter.name: scatter laser gun

obj.item.gun.energy.laser.scatter.shotty.desc: A combat shotgun gutted and refitted with an internal energy emission system. Can switch between scattered disabler shots and taser electrodes.
obj.item.gun.energy.laser.scatter.shotty.name: energy shotgun

obj.item.gun.energy.laser.soul.desc: The Type 3 Heat Delivery System, developed by Nanotrasen. Quite possibly the most popular model of HDS ever made by Nanotrasen. 		They don't make them like they used to.
obj.item.gun.energy.laser.soul.name: Type 3 laser gun

obj.item.gun.energy.laser.thermal.desc: A modified handcannon with a metamorphic reserve of decommissioned weaponized nanites. Spit globs of angry robots into the bad guys.
obj.item.gun.energy.laser.thermal.name: nanite pistol

obj.item.gun.energy.laser.thermal.cryo.desc: A modified handcannon with a metamorphic reserve of decommissioned weaponized nanites. Spit shards of frozen angry robots into the bad guys. 		While it doesn't manipulate temperature in and of itself, it does cause an internal explosion in anyone who is severely hot. Able to generate 		ammunition by manually spinning the weapon's nanite canister.
obj.item.gun.energy.laser.thermal.cryo.name: cryo pistol

obj.item.gun.energy.laser.thermal.infern.desc: A modified handcannon with a metamorphic reserve of decommissioned weaponized nanites. Spit globs of molten angry robots into the bad guys. 		While it doesn't manipulate temperature in and of itself, it does cause an violent eruption in anyone who is severely cold. Able to generate 		ammunition by manually spinning the weapon's nanite canister.
obj.item.gun.energy.laser.thermal.infern.name: inferno pistol

obj.item.gun.energy.laser.xray.desc: The Type 6 Heat Delivery System, developed by Nanotrasen. 		Capable of expelling concentrated 'X-ray' blasts that pass through multiple soft targets and heavier materials.
obj.item.gun.energy.laser.xray.name: Type 6 X-ray laser gun

obj.item.gun.energy.lasercannon.desc: An advanced laser cannon that does more damage the farther away the target is.
obj.item.gun.energy.lasercannon.name: accelerator laser cannon

obj.item.gun.energy.marksman_revolver.desc: Uses electric pulses to fire microscopic pieces of metal at incredibly high speeds. Alternate fire flips a coin that can be targeted for extra firepower.
obj.item.gun.energy.marksman_revolver.name: marksman revolver

obj.item.gun.energy.meteorgun.desc: For the love of god, make sure you're aiming this the right way!
obj.item.gun.energy.meteorgun.name: meteor gun

obj.item.gun.energy.meteorgun.pen.desc: The pen is mightier than the sword.
obj.item.gun.energy.meteorgun.pen.name: meteor pen

obj.item.gun.energy.mindflayer.desc: A prototype weapon recovered from the ruins of Research-Station Epsilon.
obj.item.gun.energy.mindflayer.name: Mind Flayer

obj.item.gun.energy.minigun.desc: An advanced laser cannon with an incredible rate of fire. Requires a bulky backpack power source to use.
obj.item.gun.energy.minigun.name: laser gatling gun

obj.item.gun.energy.modular_laser_rifle.desc: A popular energy weapon system that can be reconfigured into many different variants on the fly. 		Seen commonly amongst the Marsians who produce the weapon, with many different shapes and sizes to fit 		the wide variety of modders the planet is home to.
obj.item.gun.energy.modular_laser_rifle.name: Hyeseong modular laser rifle

obj.item.gun.energy.modular_laser_rifle..desc: A popular energy weapon system that can be reconfigured into many different variants on the fly. 		Seen commonly amongst the Marsians who produce the weapon, with many different shapes and sizes to fit 		the wide variety of modders the planet is home to.
obj.item.gun.energy.modular_laser_rifle..name: Hoshi modular laser carbine

obj.item.gun.energy.photon.desc: A competitive design to the tesla cannon, that instead of charging latent electrons, releases energy into photons. Eye protection is recommended.
obj.item.gun.energy.photon.name: photon cannon

obj.item.gun.energy.plasmacutter.desc: A mining tool capable of expelling concentrated plasma bursts. You could use it to cut limbs off xenos! Or, you know, mine stuff.
obj.item.gun.energy.plasmacutter.name: plasma cutter

obj.item.gun.energy.plasmacutter.adv.desc: A mining tool capable of expelling concentrated plasma bursts. You could use it to cut limbs off xenos! Or, you know, mine stuff.
obj.item.gun.energy.plasmacutter.adv.name: advanced plasma cutter

obj.item.gun.energy.plasmacutter.brg.desc: A mining tool capable of expelling concentrated plasma bursts. You could use it to cut limbs off xenos! Or, you know, mine stuff.
obj.item.gun.energy.plasmacutter.brg.name: advanced plasma cutter

obj.item.gun.energy.printer.desc: An LMG that fires 3D-printed flechettes. They are slowly resupplied using the cyborg's internal power source.
obj.item.gun.energy.printer.name: cyborg lmg

obj.item.gun.energy.pulse.desc: A heavy-duty, multifaceted energy rifle with three modes. Preferred by front-line combat personnel.
obj.item.gun.energy.pulse.name: pulse rifle

obj.item.gun.energy.pulse.carbine.desc: A compact variant of the pulse rifle with less firepower but easier storage.
obj.item.gun.energy.pulse.carbine.name: pulse carbine

obj.item.gun.energy.pulse.carbine.lethal.desc: A compact variant of the pulse rifle with less firepower but easier storage.
obj.item.gun.energy.pulse.carbine.lethal.name: pulse carbine

obj.item.gun.energy.pulse.carbine.loyalp.desc: A compact variant of the pulse rifle with less firepower but easier storage.
obj.item.gun.energy.pulse.carbine.loyalp.name: pulse carbine

obj.item.gun.energy.pulse.carbine.taserl.desc: A compact variant of the pulse rifle with less firepower but easier storage.
obj.item.gun.energy.pulse.carbine.taserl.name: pulse carbine

obj.item.gun.energy.pulse.destroyer.desc: A heavy-duty energy rifle built for pure destruction.
obj.item.gun.energy.pulse.destroyer.name: pulse destroyer

obj.item.gun.energy.pulse.loyalpin.desc: A heavy-duty, multifaceted energy rifle with three modes. Preferred by front-line combat personnel.
obj.item.gun.energy.pulse.loyalpin.name: pulse rifle

obj.item.gun.energy.pulse.pistol.desc: A pulse rifle in an easily concealed handgun package with low capacity.
obj.item.gun.energy.pulse.pistol.name: pulse pistol

obj.item.gun.energy.pulse.pistol.loyalpi.desc: A pulse rifle in an easily concealed handgun package with low capacity.
obj.item.gun.energy.pulse.pistol.loyalpi.name: pulse pistol

obj.item.gun.energy.pulse.pistol.m1911.desc: A compact pulse core in a classic handgun frame for Nanotrasen officers. It's not the size of the gun, it's the size of the hole it puts through people.
obj.item.gun.energy.pulse.pistol.m1911.name: M1911-P

obj.item.gun.energy.pulse.pistol.m1911.l.desc: A compact pulse core in a classic handgun frame for Nanotrasen officers. It's not the size of the gun, it's the size of the hole it puts through people.
obj.item.gun.energy.pulse.pistol.m1911.l.name: M1911-P

obj.item.gun.energy.pulse.pistol.taserle.desc: A pulse rifle in an easily concealed handgun package with low capacity.
obj.item.gun.energy.pulse.pistol.taserle.name: pulse pistol

obj.item.gun.energy.pulse.prize.desc: A heavy-duty, multifaceted energy rifle with three modes. Preferred by front-line combat personnel.
obj.item.gun.energy.pulse.prize.name: pulse rifle

obj.item.gun.energy.recharge.desc: A self recharging gun. Holds one shot at a time.
obj.item.gun.energy.recharge.name: energy gun

obj.item.gun.energy.recharge.ebow.desc: A weapon favored by syndicate stealth specialists.
obj.item.gun.energy.recharge.ebow.name: mini energy crossbow

obj.item.gun.energy.recharge.ebow.hallow.desc: A weapon favored by Syndicate trick-or-treaters.
obj.item.gun.energy.recharge.ebow.hallow.name: candy corn crossbow

obj.item.gun.energy.recharge.ebow.large.desc: A reverse engineered weapon using syndicate technology.
obj.item.gun.energy.recharge.ebow.large.name: energy crossbow

obj.item.gun.energy.recharge.fisher.desc: A self-recharging, integrally suppressed, modified kinetic accelerator that does no damage, 		but disrupts electronics like lights, APCs, and security cameras. 		Can fire twice before requiring a recharge. 		Bolts can be fired around machinery, but the precise nature of shooting light fixtures demands a skillful hand.
obj.item.gun.energy.recharge.fisher.name: SC/FISHER disruptor

obj.item.gun.energy.recharge.kinetic_acc.desc: A self recharging, ranged mining tool that does increased damage in low pressure.
obj.item.gun.energy.recharge.kinetic_acc.name: proto-kinetic accelerator

obj.item.gun.energy.recharge.kinetic_acc.desc: A self recharging, ranged mining tool that does increased damage in low pressure.
obj.item.gun.energy.recharge.kinetic_acc.name: proto-kinetic accelerator

obj.item.gun.energy.recharge.kinetic_acc.desc: During the pizza party for the Mining Research and Development team, one special snowflake researcher wanted a mini murphy instead of a regular 	pizza slice, so reluctantly the Director bought him his mini murphy, which the dumbass immedietly dropped ontop of a PKA. Suddenly the idea to create 	a 'build your own PKA' design was created. The proto-kinetic pistol is arguably worse than the base PKA, sporting lower damage and range. But this lack 	of base efficiency allows room for nearly double the mods, making it truely 'your own PKA'.
obj.item.gun.energy.recharge.kinetic_acc.name: proto-kinetic pistol

obj.item.gun.energy.recharge.kinetic_acc.desc: A Snub Nosed PKA with more mode capacity but less damage and range.
obj.item.gun.energy.recharge.kinetic_acc.name: proto-kinetic pistol

obj.item.gun.energy.recharge.kinetic_acc.desc: Made in a drunk frenzy during the creation of the kinetic railgun, the kinetic grenade launcher fires the same bombs used by 	the mining modsuit. Due to the technology needed to pack the bombs into this weapon, there is no space for modification.
obj.item.gun.energy.recharge.kinetic_acc.name: proto-kinetic grenade launcher

obj.item.gun.energy.recharge.kinetic_acc.desc: Fires the same bombs used by the mining modsuit. Only usable on lavaland
obj.item.gun.energy.recharge.kinetic_acc.name: proto-kinetic grenade launcher

obj.item.gun.energy.recharge.kinetic_acc.desc: A self recharging, ranged mining tool that does increased damage in low pressure.
obj.item.gun.energy.recharge.kinetic_acc.name: proto-kinetic accelerator

obj.item.gun.energy.recharge.kinetic_acc.desc: Before the nice streamlined and modern day Proto-Kinetic Accelerator was created, multiple designs were drafted by the Mining Research and Development 	team. Many were failures, including this one, which came out too bulky and too ineffective. Well recently the MR&D Team got drunk and said 'fuck it we ball' and 	went back to the bulky design, overclocked it, and made it functional, turning it into what is essentially a literal man portable particle accelerator. 	The design results in a massive hard to control blast of kinetic energy, with the power to punch right through creatures and cause massive damage. The 	only problem with the design is that it is so bulky you need to carry it with two hands, and the technology has been outfitted with a special firing pin 	that denies use near or on the station, due to its destructive nature.
obj.item.gun.energy.recharge.kinetic_acc.name: proto-kinetic railgun

obj.item.gun.energy.recharge.kinetic_acc.desc: Portable particle accelerator. Only Usable on lavaland
obj.item.gun.energy.recharge.kinetic_acc.name: proto-kinetic railgun

obj.item.gun.energy.recharge.kinetic_acc.desc: During the pizza party celebrating the release of the new crusher designs, the Mining Research and Development team members were only allowed one slice. 	One member exclaimed 'I wish we could have more than one slice' and another replied 'I wish we could shoot the accelerator more than once' and thus, the repeater 	on the spot. The repeater trades a bit of power for the ability to fire three shots before becoming empty, while retaining the ability to fully recharge in one 	go. The extra technology packed inside to make this possible unfortunately reduces mod space meaning you cant carry as many mods compared to a regular accelerator.
obj.item.gun.energy.recharge.kinetic_acc.name: proto-kinetic repeater

obj.item.gun.energy.recharge.kinetic_acc.desc: A PKA with a three shot magazine
obj.item.gun.energy.recharge.kinetic_acc.name: proto-kinetic repeater

obj.item.gun.energy.recharge.kinetic_acc.desc: Quite frankly, we have no idea how the Mining Research and Development team came up with this one, all we know is that alot of 	beer was involved. This proto-kinetic design will slam the ground, creating a shockwave around the user, with the same power as the base PKA.	The only downside is the lowered mod capacity, the lack of range it offers, and the higher cooldown, but its pretty good for clearing rocks.
obj.item.gun.energy.recharge.kinetic_acc.name: proto-kinetic shockwave

obj.item.gun.energy.recharge.kinetic_acc.desc: Creates a shockwave around the user, with the same power as the base PKA.
obj.item.gun.energy.recharge.kinetic_acc.name: proto-kinetic shockwave

obj.item.gun.energy.recharge.kinetic_acc.desc: During the crusher design pizza party, one member of the Mining Research and Development team brought out a real riot shotgun, and killed three 	other research members with one blast. The MR&D Director immedietly thought of a genuis idea, creating the proto-kinetic shotgun moments later, which he 	immedietly used to execute the research member who brought the real shotgun. The proto-kinetic shotgun trades off some mod capacity and cooldown in favor 	of firing three shots at once with reduce range and power. The total damage of all three shots is higher than a regular PKA but the individual shots are weaker. 	Looks like you need both hands to use it effectively.
obj.item.gun.energy.recharge.kinetic_acc.name: proto-kinetic shotgun

obj.item.gun.energy.recharge.kinetic_acc.desc: A PKA that fires three shots with a longer cooldown.
obj.item.gun.energy.recharge.kinetic_acc.name: proto-kinetic shotgun

obj.item.gun.energy.recharge.resonant_sy.desc: The "Advanced Resonance Control System" or "A.R.C.S" is an advanced, ranged version of a mining resonator. While its main case looks nothing more fancy than a modified proto-kinetic accelerator... One could guess thats not far off the truth. The lugs for a bayonette are missing, but atleast you can play with the new adjustment dial on the side.
obj.item.gun.energy.recharge.resonant_sy.name: A.R.C.S Resonator

obj.item.gun.energy.shrink_ray.desc: This is a piece of frightening alien tech that enhances the magnetic pull of atoms in a localized space to temporarily make an object shrink. 			That or it's just space magic. Either way, it shrinks stuff.
obj.item.gun.energy.shrink_ray.name: shrink ray blaster

obj.item.gun.energy.shrink_ray.one_shot.desc: This is a piece of frightening alien tech that enhances the magnetic pull of atoms in a localized space to temporarily make an object shrink. 		That or it's just space magic. Either way, it shrinks stuff, This one is jerry-rigged to work with a non alien cell. It still recharges though.
obj.item.gun.energy.shrink_ray.one_shot.name: shrink ray blaster

obj.item.gun.energy.tacticool.desc: An older edition of a tactical energy gun, clearly having not been maintained very well. The weapon's cell seems to be stressed extremely by it's taser.
obj.item.gun.energy.tacticool.name: tacticool energy gun

obj.item.gun.energy.taser.desc: A low-capacity, energy-based stun gun used by security teams to subdue targets at range.
obj.item.gun.energy.taser.name: taser gun

obj.item.gun.energy.taser.debug.desc: A low-capacity, energy-based stun gun used by security teams to subdue targets at range.
obj.item.gun.energy.taser.debug.name: taser gun

obj.item.gun.energy.temperature.desc: A gun that changes temperatures. Comes with a collapsible stock.
obj.item.gun.energy.temperature.name: temperature gun

obj.item.gun.energy.temperature.freeze.desc: A gun that reduces temperatures. Only for those with ice in their veins.
obj.item.gun.energy.temperature.freeze.name: cryogenic temperature gun

obj.item.gun.energy.temperature.security.desc: A weapon that can only be used to its full potential by the truly robust.
obj.item.gun.energy.temperature.security.name: security temperature gun

obj.item.gun.energy.tesla_cannon.desc:
A high voltage flux projector prototype created using the latest advancements in the anomaly science.

The anomalous nature of the flux core allows the tesla arc to be guided from the electrode to the target without being diverted to stray conductors outside the target field.
obj.item.gun.energy.tesla_cannon.name: tesla cannon

obj.item.gun.energy.wiremod_gun.desc: A gun that fires projectiles able to control circuitry. It can recharge using power from an attached circuit.
obj.item.gun.energy.wiremod_gun.name: circuit gun

obj.item.gun.energy.wormhole_projector.desc: A projector that emits high density quantum-coupled bluespace beams. Requires a bluespace anomaly core to function. Fits in a bag.
obj.item.gun.energy.wormhole_projector.name: bluespace wormhole projector

obj.item.gun.energy.wormhole_projector.c.desc: A projector that emits high density quantum-coupled bluespace beams. Requires a bluespace anomaly core to function. Fits in a bag.
obj.item.gun.energy.wormhole_projector.c.name: bluespace wormhole projector

obj.item.gun.grenadelauncher.desc: A terrible, terrible thing. It's really awful!
obj.item.gun.grenadelauncher.name: pneumatic grenade launcher

obj.item.gun.magic.desc: This staff is boring to watch because even though it came first you've seen everything it can do in other staves for years.
obj.item.gun.magic.name: staff of nothing

obj.item.gun.magic.bloodchill.desc: A horrifying weapon made of your own bone and blood vessels. It shoots slowing globules of your own blood. Ech.
obj.item.gun.magic.bloodchill.name: blood chiller

obj.item.gun.magic.hook.contractor.desc: A hardlight hook used to non-lethally pull targets much closer to the user.
obj.item.gun.magic.hook.contractor.name: SCORPION hook

obj.item.gun.magic.midas_hand.desc: An ancient Egyptian matchlock pistol imbued with the powers of the Greek King Midas. Don't question the cultural or religious implications of this.
obj.item.gun.magic.midas_hand.name: The Hand of Midas

obj.item.gun.magic.staff.desc: This staff is boring to watch because even though it came first you've seen everything it can do in other staves for years.
obj.item.gun.magic.staff.name: staff of nothing

obj.item.gun.magic.staff.animate.desc: An artefact that spits bolts of life-force which causes objects which are hit by it to animate and come to life! This magic doesn't affect machines.
obj.item.gun.magic.staff.animate.name: staff of animation

obj.item.gun.magic.staff.babel.desc: An artefact that spits bolts of confusion magic that can make something depressed and incoherent.
obj.item.gun.magic.staff.babel.name: staff of babel

obj.item.gun.magic.staff.change.desc: An artefact that spits bolts of coruscating energy which cause the target's very form to reshape itself.
obj.item.gun.magic.staff.change.name: staff of change

obj.item.gun.magic.staff.change.unrestri.desc: An artefact that spits bolts of coruscating energy which cause the target's very form to reshape itself.
obj.item.gun.magic.staff.change.unrestri.name: staff of change

obj.item.gun.magic.staff.chaos.desc: An artefact that spits bolts of chaotic magic that can potentially do anything.
obj.item.gun.magic.staff.chaos.name: staff of chaos

obj.item.gun.magic.staff.chaos.true_wabb.desc: If there is some deity out there, they've definitely skipped their psych appointment before creating this.
obj.item.gun.magic.staff.chaos.true_wabb.name: Wabbajack

obj.item.gun.magic.staff.chaos.unrestric.desc: An artefact that spits bolts of chaotic magic that can potentially do anything.
obj.item.gun.magic.staff.chaos.unrestric.name: staff of chaos

obj.item.gun.magic.staff.door.desc: An artefact that spits bolts of transformative magic that can create doors in walls.
obj.item.gun.magic.staff.door.name: staff of door creation

obj.item.gun.magic.staff.flying.desc: An artefact that spits bolts of graceful magic that can make something fly.
obj.item.gun.magic.staff.flying.name: staff of flying

obj.item.gun.magic.staff.healing.desc: An artefact that spits bolts of restoring magic which can remove ailments of all kinds and even raise the dead.
obj.item.gun.magic.staff.healing.name: staff of healing

obj.item.gun.magic.staff.healing.unrestr.desc: An artefact that spits bolts of restoring magic which can remove ailments of all kinds and even raise the dead.
obj.item.gun.magic.staff.healing.unrestr.name: staff of healing

obj.item.gun.magic.staff.locker.desc: An artefact that expels encapsulating bolts, for incapacitating thy enemy.
obj.item.gun.magic.staff.locker.name: staff of the locker

obj.item.gun.magic.staff.necropotence.desc: An artefact that spits bolts of death magic that can repurpose the soul.
obj.item.gun.magic.staff.necropotence.name: staff of necropotence

obj.item.gun.magic.staff.shrink.desc: An artefact that spits bolts of tiny magic that makes things small. It's easily mistaken for a wand.
obj.item.gun.magic.staff.shrink.name: staff of shrinking

obj.item.gun.magic.staff.spellblade.desc: A deadly combination of laziness and bloodlust, this blade allows the user to dismember their enemies without all the hard work of actually swinging the sword.
obj.item.gun.magic.staff.spellblade.name: spellblade

obj.item.gun.magic.staff.wipe.desc: An artefact that spits bolts of mind-unlocking magic that can let ghosts invade the victim's mind.
obj.item.gun.magic.staff.wipe.name: staff of possession

obj.item.gun.magic.tentacle.desc: A fleshy tentacle that can stretch out and grab things or people.
obj.item.gun.magic.tentacle.name: tentacle

obj.item.gun.magic.wand.animate.desc: This wand is attuned to life and will animate effected objects into destructive servants.
obj.item.gun.magic.wand.animate.name: wand of animation

obj.item.gun.magic.wand.antag.desc: This wand uses the powers of bullshit to turn anyone it hits into an antag
obj.item.gun.magic.wand.antag.name: wand of antag

obj.item.gun.magic.wand.antag.cult.desc: This wand uses the powers of bullshit to turn anyone it hits into an antag cultist
obj.item.gun.magic.wand.antag.cult.name: wand of antag cultist

obj.item.gun.magic.wand.antag.heretic.desc: This wand uses the powers of bullshit to turn anyone it hits into an antag heretic
obj.item.gun.magic.wand.antag.heretic.name: wand of antag heretic

obj.item.gun.magic.wand.anti_tank.desc: One of those magic wands you can buy from a costume vendor, this one reaks of gunpowder and has a different aura however, be careful where you aim this
obj.item.gun.magic.wand.anti_tank.name: wand of tank shell

obj.item.gun.magic.wand.arrow.desc: What the fuck? it looks like one of those wands that you buy from the costume vendor but it has a sticker on it that says 'AWSOME WAND OF BULLET MURDER'
obj.item.gun.magic.wand.arrow.name: AWSOME WAND OF BULLET MURDER

obj.item.gun.magic.wand.babel.desc: The incredible power of this wand causes victims to forget all of the languages they know, and learn a new one.
obj.item.gun.magic.wand.babel.name: rod of babel

obj.item.gun.magic.wand.bald.desc: A wand commonly used in wizard collegiate hazing, renders victims bald or draws significant attention to their baldness.
obj.item.gun.magic.wand.bald.name: shearing rod

obj.item.gun.magic.wand.booze.desc: A wand which fills its target with copious amounts of alcohol. Use in moderation, unless you are 		trying to give someone liver damage.
obj.item.gun.magic.wand.booze.name: party wand

obj.item.gun.magic.wand.death.desc: This deadly wand overwhelms the victim's body with pure energy, slaying them without fail.
obj.item.gun.magic.wand.death.name: wand of death

obj.item.gun.magic.wand.death.debug.desc: In some obscure circles, this is known as the 'cloning tester's friend'.
obj.item.gun.magic.wand.death.debug.name: wand of death

obj.item.gun.magic.wand.disabler.desc: One of those magic wands you can buy from a costume vendor, this one however is not entirely useless, funny.
obj.item.gun.magic.wand.disabler.name: wand of non harmful incapasitation

obj.item.gun.magic.wand.door.desc: This particular wand can create doors in any wall for the unscrupulous wizard who shuns teleportation magics.
obj.item.gun.magic.wand.door.name: wand of door creation

obj.item.gun.magic.wand.fireball.desc: This wand shoots scorching balls of fire that explode into destructive flames.
obj.item.gun.magic.wand.fireball.name: wand of fireball

obj.item.gun.magic.wand.fireball.inert.desc: This wand shoots scorching balls of fire that explode into destructive flames. The years of the cold have weakened the magic inside the wand.
obj.item.gun.magic.wand.fireball.inert.name: weakened wand of fireball

obj.item.gun.magic.wand.freeze.desc: The chilling power of this wand will stop your enemies in their tracks.
obj.item.gun.magic.wand.freeze.name: wand of ice

obj.item.gun.magic.wand.hallucination.desc: A wand which spits bolts of hallucinogenic magic which can do almost anything, or at least make the victim think so.
obj.item.gun.magic.wand.hallucination.name: wand of chaos

obj.item.gun.magic.wand.levitate.desc: The power of this rod lifts living creatures off the ground, potentially leaving them unable to move.
obj.item.gun.magic.wand.levitate.name: lifting rod

obj.item.gun.magic.wand.missile.desc: One of those magic wands you can buy from a costume vendor, this one however has a bunch of explosion/missile launcher stickers on it, its also obviously painted red.
obj.item.gun.magic.wand.missile.name: wand of MISSILE

obj.item.gun.magic.wand.nothing.desc: It's not just a stick, it's a MAGIC stick?
obj.item.gun.magic.wand.nothing.name: wand of nothing

obj.item.gun.magic.wand.nothing.fake_res.desc: It's just a fancy staff so that holy clerics and priests look cool. What? You didn't think someone would leave a REAL magic artifact with a snowman out in the cold, did you?
obj.item.gun.magic.wand.nothing.fake_res.name: holy staff

obj.item.gun.magic.wand.pax.desc: A wand which supernaturally connects victim and target, which renders both unable to fight and makes them feel a little better.
obj.item.gun.magic.wand.pax.name: rod of compassion

obj.item.gun.magic.wand.pizza.desc: The incredible power of this wand transforms certain objects and surfaces into edible pizza.
obj.item.gun.magic.wand.pizza.name: wand of snacking

obj.item.gun.magic.wand.plague.desc: A vile implement which forces its victims' bodies to disgorge frogs and insects.
obj.item.gun.magic.wand.plague.name: pestilent wand

obj.item.gun.magic.wand.polymorph.desc: This wand is attuned to chaos and will radically alter the victim's form.
obj.item.gun.magic.wand.polymorph.name: wand of polymorph

obj.item.gun.magic.wand.prank.desc: A comedy wand which is sure to get a laugh out of you, if not its victims.
obj.item.gun.magic.wand.prank.name: wand of pratfalls

obj.item.gun.magic.wand.rebel.desc: The dark power of this wand turns the victim's body against itself.
obj.item.gun.magic.wand.rebel.name: wand of rebellion

obj.item.gun.magic.wand.repulse.desc: A wand which blasts things away from you.
obj.item.gun.magic.wand.repulse.name: rod of repulsion

obj.item.gun.magic.wand.resurrection.desc: This wand uses healing magics to heal and revive. They are rarely utilized within the Wizard Federation for some reason.
obj.item.gun.magic.wand.resurrection.name: wand of healing

obj.item.gun.magic.wand.resurrection.deb.desc: Is it possible for something to be even more powerful than regular magic? This wand is.
obj.item.gun.magic.wand.resurrection.deb.name: wand of healing

obj.item.gun.magic.wand.resurrection.ine.desc: This wand uses healing magics to heal and revive. The years of the cold have weakened the magic inside the wand.
obj.item.gun.magic.wand.resurrection.ine.name: weakened wand of healing

obj.item.gun.magic.wand.safety.desc: This wand will use the lightest of bluespace currents to gently place the target somewhere safe.
obj.item.gun.magic.wand.safety.name: wand of safety

obj.item.gun.magic.wand.safety.debug.desc: This wand has 'find_safe_turf()' engraved into its blue wood. Perhaps it's a secret message?
obj.item.gun.magic.wand.safety.debug.name: wand of safety

obj.item.gun.magic.wand.shrink.desc: Feel the tiny eldritch terror of an itty... bitty... head!
obj.item.gun.magic.wand.shrink.name: wand of shrinking

obj.item.gun.magic.wand.swap.desc: Exchanges the position of the wielder and an unanchored object they point at.
obj.item.gun.magic.wand.swap.name: switching rod

obj.item.gun.magic.wand.teleport.desc: This wand will wrench targets through space and time to move them somewhere else.
obj.item.gun.magic.wand.teleport.name: wand of teleportation

obj.item.gun.magic.wand.tentacles.desc: This wriggling wand binds its victims in a place for a time, although it doesn't stop them from shooting back.
obj.item.gun.magic.wand.tentacles.name: restraining rod

obj.item.gun.magic.wand.zap.desc: This wand overloads the nerves of your enemies with potent lightning.
obj.item.gun.magic.wand.zap.name: wand of zapping

obj.item.gun.medbeam.afad.desc: Usually supplied in medkits, the AFAD is a revolutionary device meant for fixing scrapes and bruises, and totally not a knockoff of the legendary medibeam. A label on the underside reminds you not to cross the beams.
obj.item.gun.medbeam.afad.name: Automated First Aid Device

obj.item.gun.syringe.desc: A spring loaded gun designed to fit syringes, used to incapacitate unruly patients from a distance.
obj.item.gun.syringe.name: medical syringe gun

obj.item.gun.syringe.blowgun.desc: Fire syringes at a short distance.
obj.item.gun.syringe.blowgun.name: blowgun

obj.item.gun.syringe.dna.desc: A syringe gun that has been modified to be compact and fit DNA injectors instead of normal syringes.
obj.item.gun.syringe.dna.name: modified compact syringe gun

obj.item.gun.syringe.rapidsyringe.desc: A modification of the syringe gun design to be more compact and use a rotating cylinder to store up to six syringes.
obj.item.gun.syringe.rapidsyringe.name: compact rapid syringe gun

obj.item.gun.syringe.smartdart.desc: An adjusted version of the medical syringe gun that only allows SmartDarts to be chambered.
obj.item.gun.syringe.smartdart.name: medical SmartDart gun

obj.item.gun.syringe.syndicate.desc: A small spring-loaded sidearm that functions identically to a syringe gun.
obj.item.gun.syringe.syndicate.name: dart pistol

obj.item.gun.syringe.syndicate.prototype.desc: Cybersun Industries prototype dart pistols. Delivering the syringes at the same 	speed in a smaller weapon proved to be a surprisingly complicated task.
obj.item.gun.syringe.syndicate.prototype.name: prototype dart pistol

obj.item.gun_maintenance_supplies.desc: A toolbox containing gun maintenance supplies and spare parts. Can be applied to firearms to maintain them.
obj.item.gun_maintenance_supplies.name: gun maintenance kit

obj.item.gun_maintenance_supplies.makesh.desc: A toolbox containing enough supplies to juryrig repairs on firearms. Can be applied to firearms to maintain them. 		The tools are a little basic, and the materials low-quality, but it gets the job done.
obj.item.gun_maintenance_supplies.makesh.name: makeshift gun maintenance kit

obj.item.hackc.desc: A small tool with a bunch of ones and zeros on it. The label say 'For emergency use only!'
obj.item.hackc.name: Hack-C repair pod signaller

obj.item.hairbrush.desc: A small, circular brush with an ergonomic grip for efficient brush application.
obj.item.hairbrush.name: hairbrush

obj.item.hairbrush.comb.desc: A rather simple tool, used to straighten out hair and knots in it.
obj.item.hairbrush.comb.name: comb

obj.item.hairbrush.tactical.desc: Sometimes, after a brush with death, a good grooming is just the thing for tactical stress relief.
obj.item.hairbrush.tactical.name: tactical hairbrush

obj.item.hairstyle_preview_magazine.desc: A magazine featuring a magnitude of hairsytles!
obj.item.hairstyle_preview_magazine.name: hip hairstyles magazine

obj.item.hand_item.bonkinghand.desc: Time to bonk someone over the head in comedic fashion.
obj.item.hand_item.bonkinghand.name: bonking hand

obj.item.hand_item.circlegame.desc: If somebody looks at this while it's below your waist, you get to bop them.
obj.item.hand_item.circlegame.name: circled hand

obj.item.hand_item.hand.desc: Sometimes, you just want to act gentlemanly.
obj.item.hand_item.hand.name: hand

obj.item.hand_item.kisser.desc: I want you all to know, everyone and anyone, to seal it with a kiss.
obj.item.hand_item.kisser.name: kiss

obj.item.hand_item.kisser.chef.desc: The secret ingridient is love. And opium, but mostly love.
obj.item.hand_item.kisser.chef.name: chef's kiss

obj.item.hand_item.kisser.death.desc: If looks could kill, they'd be this.
obj.item.hand_item.kisser.death.name: kiss of death

obj.item.hand_item.kisser.french.desc: You really should brush your teeth.
obj.item.hand_item.kisser.french.name: french kiss

obj.item.hand_item.kisser.ink.desc: Is that a blot of ink in your pocket or are you just happy to see me?
obj.item.hand_item.kisser.ink.name: ink kiss

obj.item.hand_item.kisser.syndie.desc: oooooo you like syndicate ur a syndiekisser
obj.item.hand_item.kisser.syndie.name: syndie kiss

obj.item.hand_item.noogie.desc: Get someone in an aggressive grab then use this on them to ruin their day.
obj.item.hand_item.noogie.name: noogie

obj.item.hand_item.self_grasp.desc: Sometimes all you can do is slow the bleeding.
obj.item.hand_item.self_grasp.name: self-grasp

obj.item.hand_item.slapper.desc: This is how real men fight.
obj.item.hand_item.slapper.name: slapper

obj.item.hand_item.stealer.desc: Your filthy little fingers are ready to commit crimes.
obj.item.hand_item.stealer.name: steal

obj.item.hand_labeler.desc: A combined label printer, applicator, and remover, all in a single portable device. Designed to be easy to operate and use.
obj.item.hand_labeler.name: hand labeler

obj.item.hand_labeler.borg.desc: A combined label printer, applicator, and remover, all in a single portable device. Designed to be easy to operate and use.
obj.item.hand_labeler.borg.name: cyborg-hand labeler

obj.item.hand_labeler.cyborg.desc: A combined label printer, applicator, and remover, all in a single portable device. Designed to be easy to operate and use.
obj.item.hand_labeler.cyborg.name: integrated hand labeler

obj.item.hand_labeler_refill.desc: A roll of paper. Use it on a hand labeler to refill it.
obj.item.hand_labeler_refill.name: hand labeler paper roll

obj.item.hand_tele.desc: A portable item using blue-space technology. One of the buttons opens a portal, the other re-opens your last destination.
obj.item.hand_tele.name: hand tele

obj.item.handheld_soulcatcher.desc: The Evoker-Type Resonance Simulation Device is a sort of 'Soulcatcher' instrument that's been designated for handheld usage. These RSDs were designed with the Medical field in mind, a tool meant to offer comfort to the temporarily-departed while their bodies are being repaired, healed, or produced. The Evoker is essentially a very specialized handheld NIF, still using the same nanomachinery for the software and hardware. This careful instrument is able to host a virtual space for a great number of Engrams for an essentially indefinite amount of time in an unlimited variety of simulations, even able to transfer them to and from a NIF. However, it's best Medical practice to not lollygag.
obj.item.handheld_soulcatcher.name: Evoker-type RSD

obj.item.hardened_spike.desc: Hardened biomass, shaped into a spike. Very pointy!
obj.item.hardened_spike.name: biomass spike

obj.item.harmalarm.desc: Releases a harmless blast that confuses most organics. For when the harm is JUST TOO MUCH.
obj.item.harmalarm.name: Sonic Harm Prevention Tool

obj.item.harmalarm.bubbers.desc: Releases a harmless blast that confuses most organics. Use in case of hostile blue whales.
obj.item.harmalarm.bubbers.name: Sonic Harm Prevention Tool

obj.item.hatchet.desc: A very sharp axe blade upon a short fibremetal handle. It has a long history of chopping things, but now it is used for chopping wood.
obj.item.hatchet.name: hatchet

obj.item.hatchet.cutterblade.desc: The blade of a paper cutter. Most likely removed for polishing or sharpening.
obj.item.hatchet.cutterblade.name: paper cutter blade

obj.item.hatchet.cyborg.desc: A very sharp axe blade upon a short fibremetal handle. It has a long history of chopping things, but now it is used for chopping wood.
obj.item.hatchet.cyborg.name: cyborg hatchet

obj.item.hatchet.wooden.desc: A crude axe blade upon a short wooden handle.
obj.item.hatchet.wooden.name: hatchet

obj.item.healthanalyzer.desc: A hand-held body scanner capable of distinguishing vital signs of the subject. Has a side button to scan for chemicals, and can be toggled to scan wounds.
obj.item.healthanalyzer.name: health analyzer

obj.item.healthanalyzer.advanced.desc: A hand-held body scanner able to distinguish vital signs of the subject with high accuracy.
obj.item.healthanalyzer.advanced.name: advanced health analyzer

obj.item.healthanalyzer.no_medibot.desc: A hand-held body scanner capable of distinguishing vital signs of the subject. Has a side button to scan for chemicals, and can be toggled to scan wounds. 	This one seems to lack the mounting braces usually found on medibot-compatable analyzers...
obj.item.healthanalyzer.no_medibot.name: surplus health analyzer

obj.item.healthanalyzer.rad_laser.desc: A hand-held body scanner capable of distinguishing vital signs of the subject. Has a side button to scan for chemicals, and can be toggled to scan wounds.
obj.item.healthanalyzer.rad_laser.name: health analyzer

obj.item.healthanalyzer.simple.desc: A helpful, child-proofed, and most importantly, extremely cheap MeLo-Tech medical scanner used to diagnose injuries and recommend treatment for serious wounds. While it might not sound very informative for it to be able to tell you if you have a gaping hole in your body or not, it applies a temporary holoimage near the wound with information that is guaranteed to double the efficacy and speed of treatment.
obj.item.healthanalyzer.simple.name: wound analyzer

obj.item.healthanalyzer.simple.disease.desc: Another of MeLo-Tech's dubiously useful medsci scanners, the disease analyzer is a pretty rare find these days - NT found out that giving their hospitals the lowest-common-denominator pandemic equipment resulted in too much financial loss of life to be profitable. There are rumours that the inbuilt AI is jealous of the first aid analyzer's success.
obj.item.healthanalyzer.simple.disease.name: disease state analyzer

obj.item.healthanalyzer.simple.miner.desc: A helpful, child-proofed, and most importantly, extremely cheap MeLo-Tech medical scanner used to diagnose injuries and recommend treatment for serious wounds. While it might not sound very informative for it to be able to tell you if you have a gaping hole in your body or not, it applies a temporary holoimage near the wound with information that is guaranteed to double the efficacy and speed of treatment. This one has a cool aesthetic antenna that doesn't actually do anything!
obj.item.healthanalyzer.simple.miner.name: mining wound analyzer

obj.item.hemostat.desc: You think you have seen this before.
obj.item.hemostat.name: hemostat

obj.item.hemostat.ashwalker.desc: You think you have seen this before.
obj.item.hemostat.ashwalker.name: primitive hemostat

obj.item.hemostat.augment.desc: Tiny servos power a pair of pincers to stop bleeding.
obj.item.hemostat.augment.name: hemostat

obj.item.hemostat.cruel.desc: Clamping bleeders, but not so good at fixing breathers.
obj.item.hemostat.cruel.name: cruel hemostat

obj.item.hemostat.cruel.augment.desc: Tiny, warped servos power a pair of pincers to stop bleeding.
obj.item.hemostat.cruel.augment.name: cruel hemostat

obj.item.hemostat.cyborg.desc: You think you have seen this before.
obj.item.hemostat.cyborg.name: hemostat

obj.item.hemostat.supermatter.desc: A pair of tongs made from condensed hyper-noblium gas, searingly cold to the touch, that can safely grip a supermatter sliver.
obj.item.hemostat.supermatter.name: supermatter extraction tongs

obj.item.heretic_labyrinth_handbook.desc: A book containing the laws and regulations of the Locked Labyrinth, penned on an unknown substance. Its pages squirm and strain, looking to lash out and escape.
obj.item.heretic_labyrinth_handbook.name: labyrinth handbook

obj.item.hfr_box.desc: If you see this, call the police.
obj.item.hfr_box.name: HFR box

obj.item.hfr_box.body.desc: Place this on the sides of the core box of your 3x3 multiblock fusion reactor
obj.item.hfr_box.body.name: HFR box body

obj.item.hfr_box.body.fuel_input.desc: Place this on the sides of the core box of your 3x3 multiblock fusion reactor
obj.item.hfr_box.body.fuel_input.name: HFR box fuel input

obj.item.hfr_box.body.interface.desc: Place this on the sides of the core box of your 3x3 multiblock fusion reactor
obj.item.hfr_box.body.interface.name: HFR box interface

obj.item.hfr_box.body.moderator_input.desc: Place this on the sides of the core box of your 3x3 multiblock fusion reactor
obj.item.hfr_box.body.moderator_input.name: HFR box moderator input

obj.item.hfr_box.body.waste_output.desc: Place this on the sides of the core box of your 3x3 multiblock fusion reactor
obj.item.hfr_box.body.waste_output.name: HFR box waste output

obj.item.hfr_box.core.desc: Activate this with a multitool to deploy the full machine after setting up the other boxes
obj.item.hfr_box.core.name: HFR box core

obj.item.hfr_box.corner.desc: Place this as the corner of your 3x3 multiblock fusion reactor
obj.item.hfr_box.corner.name: HFR box corner

obj.item.hhmirror.fullmagic.desc: A handheld mirror that allows you to change your... self?
obj.item.hhmirror.fullmagic.name: full handheld magic mirror

obj.item.hhmirror.syndie.desc: A handheld mirror that allows you to change your looks. Reminds you of old times for some reason...
obj.item.hhmirror.syndie.name: handheld mirror

obj.item.hhmirror.wracemagic.desc: A handheld mirror that allows you to change your... self?
obj.item.hhmirror.wracemagic.name: raceless handheld magic mirror

obj.item.hierophant_club.desc: The shriveled remains of the Hierophant hold some remnant of its power. It used it to beat you, but now you can set the beat.
obj.item.hierophant_club.name: hierophant club

obj.item.highfrequencyblade.desc: A sword reinforced by a powerful alternating current and resonating at extremely high vibration frequencies. 		This oscillation weakens the molecular bonds of anything it cuts, thereby increasing its cutting ability.
obj.item.highfrequencyblade.name: high frequency blade

obj.item.highfrequencyblade.wizard.desc: A blade that was mastercrafted by a legendary blacksmith. Its enchantments let it slash through anything.
obj.item.highfrequencyblade.wizard.name: high frequency blade

obj.item.hilbertshotel.desc: A sphere of what appears to be an intricate network of bluespace. Observing it in detail seems to give you a headache as you try to comprehend the infinite amount of infinitesimally distinct points on its surface.
obj.item.hilbertshotel.name: Hilbert's Hotel

obj.item.his_grace.desc: A toolbox painted bright green. Looking at it makes you feel uneasy.
obj.item.his_grace.name: artistic toolbox

obj.item.hivemind_keyboard.desc: A holographic gesture controller, hooked to hand and finger signals of the user's own choice. This is paired with the Hivemind program itself, used as a means of filtering out unwanted thoughts from being added to the network, ensuring that only intentional thoughts of communication can go through.
obj.item.hivemind_keyboard.name: Hivemind Interface Device

obj.item.hnz_cure.desc: A counter to the HNZ-1 virus, used to rapidly reverse the effects of the virus.
obj.item.hnz_cure.name: HNZ-1 cure vial

obj.item.holochip.desc: A hard-light chip encoded with an amount of credits. It is a modern replacement for physical money that can be directly converted to virtual currency and vice-versa. Keep away from magnets.
obj.item.holochip.name: credit holochip

obj.item.holochip.thousand.desc: A hard-light chip encoded with an amount of credits. It is a modern replacement for physical money that can be directly converted to virtual currency and vice-versa. Keep away from magnets.
obj.item.holochip.thousand.name: credit holochip

obj.item.holocigarette.desc: A cigarette created using holodeck technology. Want to smoke without all the downsides? Try Holocigarettes!
obj.item.holocigarette.name: Holocigarette

obj.item.holocigarette.cigar.desc: A fancy cigar created using holodeck technology. They look like they have a "Bright Cosmos" branding on their wrap.
obj.item.holocigarette.cigar.name: Bright Cosmos cigar

obj.item.holocigarette.masvedishcigar.desc: A soft buzzing device that, using holodeck technology, replicates a slow burn cigar. Now with less-shock technology. It has a small inscription of 'MG' on the golden label.
obj.item.holocigarette.masvedishcigar.name: holocigar

obj.item.holocigarette.nanite.desc: A cigarette created using holodeck technology. Want to smoke without all the downsides? Try Holocigarettes!
obj.item.holocigarette.nanite.name: cloudstick

obj.item.holosign_creator.desc: A handy-dandy holographic projector that displays a janitorial sign.
obj.item.holosign_creator.name: holographic sign projector

obj.item.holosign_creator.atmos.desc: A holographic projector that creates holographic barriers that prevent changes in atmosphere conditions.
obj.item.holosign_creator.atmos.name: ATMOS holofan projector

obj.item.holosign_creator.cyborg.desc: A holographic projector that creates fragile energy fields.
obj.item.holosign_creator.cyborg.name: Energy Barrier Projector

obj.item.holosign_creator.engineering.desc: A holographic projector that creates holographic engineering barriers. You can remotely open barriers with it.
obj.item.holosign_creator.engineering.name: engineering holobarrier projector

obj.item.holosign_creator.hardlight_whee.desc: An emitter which projects a ridable but fragile wheelchair made out of hardlight.
obj.item.holosign_creator.hardlight_whee.name: hardlight wheelchair emitter

obj.item.holosign_creator.janibarrier.desc: A holographic projector that creates hard light wet floor barriers.
obj.item.holosign_creator.janibarrier.name: custodial holobarrier projector

obj.item.holosign_creator.medical.desc: A holographic projector that creates PENLITE holobarriers. Useful during quarantines since they halt those with malicious diseases.
obj.item.holosign_creator.medical.name: PENLITE barrier projector

obj.item.holosign_creator.medical.treatm.desc: A holographic projector that creates a large, clearly marked treatment zone hologram, which warns outsiders that they ought to stay out of it.
obj.item.holosign_creator.medical.treatm.name: emergency treatment zone projector

obj.item.holosign_creator.robot_seat.desc: Use this to place seats for your restaurant guests!
obj.item.holosign_creator.robot_seat.name: seating indicator placer

obj.item.holosign_creator.robot_seat.bar.desc: Use this to place seats for your restaurant guests!
obj.item.holosign_creator.robot_seat.bar.name: bar seating indicator placer

obj.item.holosign_creator.robot_seat.res.desc: Use this to place seats for your restaurant guests!
obj.item.holosign_creator.robot_seat.res.name: restaurant seating indicator placer

obj.item.holosign_creator.security.desc: A holographic projector that creates holographic security barriers. You can remotely open barriers with it.
obj.item.holosign_creator.security.name: security holobarrier projector

obj.item.holosign_creator.sex.desc: Despite the name, it does not project sex, however it does create a non-blocking barrier that informs those who wish to enter that there is sex inside.
obj.item.holosign_creator.sex.name: holographic sex projector

obj.item.holotool.desc: A highly experimental holographic tool projector. Less efficient than its physical counterparts.
obj.item.holotool.name: experimental holotool

obj.item.honey_frame.desc: A scaffold for bees to build honeycomb on.
obj.item.honey_frame.name: honey frame

obj.item.hot_potato.desc: A label on the side of this potato reads "Product of Donk Co. Service Wing. Activate far away from populated areas. Device will only attach to sapient creatures." You can attack anyone with it to force it on them instead of yourself!
obj.item.hot_potato.name: hot potato

obj.item.hot_potato.harmless.desc: A label on the side of this potato reads "Product of Donk Co. Service Wing. Activate far away from populated areas. Device will only attach to sapient creatures." You can attack anyone with it to force it on them instead of yourself!
obj.item.hot_potato.harmless.name: hot potato

obj.item.hot_potato.harmless.toy.desc: A label on the side of this potato reads "Product of Donk Co. Toys and Recreation department." You can attack anyone with it to put it on them instead, if they have a free hand to take it!
obj.item.hot_potato.harmless.toy.name: hot potato

obj.item.hot_potato.syndicate.desc: A label on the side of this potato reads "Product of Donk Co. Service Wing. Activate far away from populated areas. Device will only attach to sapient creatures." You can attack anyone with it to force it on them instead of yourself!
obj.item.hot_potato.syndicate.name: hot potato

obj.item.hourglass.desc: Nanotrasen patented gravity invariant hourglass. Guaranteed to flow perfectly under any conditions.
obj.item.hourglass.name: hourglass

obj.item.hourglass.admin.desc: Nanotrasen patented gravity invariant hourglass. Guaranteed to flow perfectly under any conditions.
obj.item.hourglass.admin.name: hourglass

obj.item.house_edge.desc: Dangerous. Loud. Sleek. It has a built in roulette wheel. This thing could easily rip your arm off if you're not careful.
obj.item.house_edge.name: House Edge

obj.item.hypernoblium_crystal.desc: Crystallized oxygen and hypernoblium stored in a bottle to pressure-proof your clothes or stop reactions occurring in portable atmospheric devices.
obj.item.hypernoblium_crystal.name: Hypernoblium Crystal

obj.item.hypospray.mkii.desc: A new development from DeForest Medical, this hypospray takes 50-unit vials as the drug supply for easy swapping.
obj.item.hypospray.mkii.name: hypospray Mk.II

obj.item.hypospray.mkii.combat.desc: The combat variant of DeForest Hypospray Mk. II series, able to pierce through thick armor and quickly self-inject the user in combat scenarios.
obj.item.hypospray.mkii.combat.name: hypospray Mk.II combat

obj.item.hypospray.mkii.deluxe.desc: The deluxe variant of the Hypospray Mk. II, able to take both 100u and 50u vials.
obj.item.hypospray.mkii.deluxe.name: hypospray Mk.II deluxe

obj.item.hypospray.mkii.deluxe.cmo.desc: The CMO's prized Hypospray Mk. II Deluxe, able to take both 100u and 50u vials, acting faster and able to deliver more reagents per spray.
obj.item.hypospray.mkii.deluxe.cmo.name: hypospray Mk.II deluxe: CMO edition

obj.item.hypospray.mkii.deluxe.cmo.comba.desc: The CMO's prized Hypospray Mk. II Deluxe, able to take both 100u and 50u vials, acting faster and able to deliver more reagents per spray.
obj.item.hypospray.mkii.deluxe.cmo.comba.name: hypospray Mk.II deluxe: CMO edition

obj.item.hypospray.mkii.deluxe.combat.desc: A variant of the Hypospray Mk. II Deluxe, able to take both 100u and 50u vials, with overcharged applicators and an armor-piercing tip.
obj.item.hypospray.mkii.deluxe.combat.name: hypospray Mk.II deluxe: combat edition

obj.item.hypospray.mkii.piercing.desc: The advanced variant in the DeForest Hypospray Mk. II series, able to pierce through thick armor and quickly spray or inject the chemicals.
obj.item.hypospray.mkii.piercing.name: hypospray Mk.II advanced

obj.item.ice_energy_crystal.desc: Remnants of the demonic frost miners ice energy.
obj.item.ice_energy_crystal.name: ice energy crystal

obj.item.immortality_talisman.desc: A dread talisman that can render you completely invulnerable.
obj.item.immortality_talisman.name: Immortality Talisman

obj.item.implant.camouflage.desc: Allows its owner to blend in with their surroundings. Cool!
obj.item.implant.camouflage.name: experimental camouflage implant

obj.item.implant.deathrattle.desc: Hope no one else dies, prepare for when they do.
obj.item.implant.deathrattle.name: deathrattle implant

obj.item.implant.deathrattle.lavaland.desc: Hope no one else dies, prepare for when they do.
obj.item.implant.deathrattle.lavaland.name: expeditionary deathrattle implant

obj.item.implant.deathrattle.offstation.desc: Hope no one else dies, prepare for when they do.
obj.item.implant.deathrattle.offstation.name: off-station deathrattle implant

obj.item.implant.exile.desc: Prevents you from returning from away missions.
obj.item.implant.exile.name: exile implant

obj.item.implant.exile.noteleport.desc: Uses impressive bluespace grounding techniques to deny the person implanted by this implant the ability to teleport or be teleported. 		Used by certain slavers, or particularly strict employers, to keep their slaves or employees from using teleporters to escape their grasp.
obj.item.implant.exile.noteleport.name: anti-teleportation implant

obj.item.implant.explosive.deniability.desc: An enhanced version of the microbomb that directly plugs into the brain. No downsides, promise!
obj.item.implant.explosive.deniability.name: tactical deniability implant

obj.item.implant.explosive.macro.desc: And boom goes the weasel. And everything else nearby.
obj.item.implant.explosive.macro.name: macrobomb implant

obj.item.implant.freedom.desc: Use this to escape from those evil Red Shirts.
obj.item.implant.freedom.name: freedom implant

obj.item.implant.kaza_ruk.desc: Teaches you the Tiziran martial arts of Kaza Ruk in 5 short instructional videos beamed directly into your eyeballs.
obj.item.implant.kaza_ruk.name: kaza ruk implant

obj.item.implant.mod.desc: Lets you recall a MODsuit to you at any time.
obj.item.implant.mod.name: MOD pathfinder implant

obj.item.implant.nuclear_operative.desc: Registers you as a member of a Syndicate nuclear operative team.
obj.item.implant.nuclear_operative.name: nuclear operative implant

obj.item.implant.radio.antenna.desc: The internal organ part of the antenna. Science has not yet given it a good name.
obj.item.implant.radio.antenna.name: internal antenna organ

obj.item.implant.radio.syndicate.desc: Are you there God? It's me, Syndicate Comms Agent.
obj.item.implant.radio.syndicate.name: internal radio implant

obj.item.implant.spell.desc: Allows you to cast a spell as if you were a wizard.
obj.item.implant.spell.name: spell implant

obj.item.implant.stealth.desc: Allows you to be hidden in plain sight.
obj.item.implant.stealth.name: S3 implant

obj.item.implant.storage.desc: Stores up to two big items in a bluespace pocket.
obj.item.implant.storage.name: storage implant

obj.item.implant.teleport_blocker.desc: Grounds your bluespace signature in baseline reality, whatever the hell that means.
obj.item.implant.teleport_blocker.name: bluespace grounding implant

obj.item.implant.tracking.c38.desc: A smaller tracking implant that supplies power for only a few minutes.
obj.item.implant.tracking.c38.name: TRAC implant

obj.item.implant_mounted_chainsaw.desc: A chainsaw that conceals inside your arm.
obj.item.implant_mounted_chainsaw.name: integrated chainsaw

obj.item.implantcase.desc: A glass case containing an implant.
obj.item.implantcase.name: implant case

obj.item.implantcase.beacon.desc: A glass case containing a beacon implant.
obj.item.implantcase.beacon.name: implant case - 'Beacon'

obj.item.implantcase.chem.desc: A glass case containing a remote chemical implant.
obj.item.implantcase.chem.name: implant case - 'Remote Chemical'

obj.item.implantcase.circuit.desc: A glass case containing a circuit implant shell.
obj.item.implantcase.circuit.name: implant case - 'Circuit'

obj.item.implantcase.deathrattle.desc: A glass case containing a deathrattle implant.
obj.item.implantcase.deathrattle.name: implant case - 'Deathrattle'

obj.item.implantcase.deathrattle.lavalan.desc: A glass case containing an expeditionary deathrattle implant. Only alerts to deaths that occur on Lavaland.
obj.item.implantcase.deathrattle.lavalan.name: implant case - 'Expeditionary Deathrattle'

obj.item.implantcase.deathrattle.offstat.desc: A glass case containing an off-station deathrattle implant.
obj.item.implantcase.deathrattle.offstat.name: implant case - 'Off-Station Deathrattle'

obj.item.implantcase.exile.desc: A glass case containing an exile implant.
obj.item.implantcase.exile.name: implant case - 'Exile'

obj.item.implantcase.exile.noteleport.desc: A glass case containing an anti-teleportation implant.
obj.item.implantcase.exile.noteleport.name: implant case - 'Anti-Teleportation'

obj.item.implantcase.explosive.desc: A glass case containing an explosive implant.
obj.item.implantcase.explosive.name: implant case - 'Explosive'

obj.item.implantcase.freedom.desc: A glass case containing a freedom implant.
obj.item.implantcase.freedom.name: implant case - 'Freedom'

obj.item.implantcase.interdyne.desc: A glass case containing an IFF system implant manufactured by Interdyne Pharmaceutics. These do not work with the IFF systems used by the Gorlex Marauders. Are you ready to join the Syndicate, agent?
obj.item.implantcase.interdyne.name: implant case - 'Syndicate Identification Friend or Foe'

obj.item.implantcase.kaza_ruk.desc: A glass case containing an implant that can teach the user the Tiziran martial arts of Kaza Ruk.
obj.item.implantcase.kaza_ruk.name: implant case - 'Kaza Ruk'

obj.item.implantcase.mindshield.desc: A glass case containing a mindshield implant.
obj.item.implantcase.mindshield.name: implant case - 'Mindshield'

obj.item.implantcase.sad_trombone.desc: A glass case containing a sad trombone implant.
obj.item.implantcase.sad_trombone.name: implant case - 'Sad Trombone'

obj.item.implantcase.spell.desc: A glass case containing an implant that can teach the user the arts of Wizardry.
obj.item.implantcase.spell.name: implant case - 'Wizardry'

obj.item.implantcase.teleport_blocker.desc: A glass case containing a bluespace grounding implant.
obj.item.implantcase.teleport_blocker.name: implant case - 'Bluespace Grounding'

obj.item.implantcase.toaster.desc: A glass case containing a toaster implant. Sweet.
obj.item.implantcase.toaster.name: implant case - 'Toaster'

obj.item.implantcase.tracking.desc: A glass case containing a tracking implant.
obj.item.implantcase.tracking.name: implant case - 'Tracking'

obj.item.implantcase.weapons_auth.desc: A glass case containing a firearms authentication implant.
obj.item.implantcase.weapons_auth.name: implant case - 'Firearms Authentication'

obj.item.implanter.induction_implant.desc: A sterile automatic implant injector. You can see a tiny, somehow legible sticker on the side: 'NOT A BRAINWASH DEVICE'
obj.item.implanter.induction_implant.name: implanter (nuclear operative)

obj.item.inducer.desc: A tool for inductively charging internal power cells and batteries.
obj.item.inducer.name: inducer

obj.item.inducer.cyborg.desc: A tool for inductively charging internal power cells and batteries.
obj.item.inducer.cyborg.name: modular inducer

obj.item.inducer.cyborg.sci.desc: A tool for inductively charging internal power cells and batteries.
obj.item.inducer.cyborg.sci.name: modular inducer

obj.item.inducer.empty.desc: A tool for inductively charging internal power cells and batteries.
obj.item.inducer.empty.name: inducer

obj.item.inducer.orderable.desc: A tool for inductively charging internal power cells and batteries.
obj.item.inducer.orderable.name: inducer

obj.item.inducer.sci.desc: A tool for inductively charging internal power cells. This one has a science color scheme, and is less potent than its engineering counterpart.
obj.item.inducer.sci.name: inducer

obj.item.inducer.syndicate.desc: A tool for inductively charging internal power cells. This one has a suspicious colour scheme, and seems to be rigged to transfer charge at a much faster rate.
obj.item.inducer.syndicate.name: inducer

obj.item.inert_anomaly.desc: A chunk of fused exotic materials. Useless to you, but some other lab might purchase it.
obj.item.inert_anomaly.name: inert anomaly core

obj.item.inflatable.desc: A folded membrane which rapidly expands into a large cubical shape on activation.
obj.item.inflatable.name: inflatable wall

obj.item.inflatable.door.desc: A folded membrane which rapidly expands into a simple door on activation.
obj.item.inflatable.door.name: inflatable door

obj.item.inflatable.door.torn.desc: A folded membrane which rapidly expands into a simple door on activation.
obj.item.inflatable.door.torn.name: inflatable door

obj.item.inflatable.torn.desc: A folded membrane which rapidly expands into a large cubical shape on activation.
obj.item.inflatable.torn.name: inflatable wall

obj.item.inhaler.desc: A small device capable of administering short bursts of aerosolized chemicals. Requires a canister to function.
obj.item.inhaler.name: inhaler

obj.item.inhaler.albuterol.desc: A small device capable of administering short bursts of aerosolized chemicals. Requires a canister to function.
obj.item.inhaler.albuterol.name: albuterol inhaler

obj.item.inhaler.albuterol.asthma.desc: A small device capable of administering short bursts of aerosolized chemicals. Requires a canister to function.
obj.item.inhaler.albuterol.asthma.name: rescue inhaler

obj.item.inhaler.medical.desc: A small device capable of administering short bursts of aerosolized chemicals. Requires a canister to function.
obj.item.inhaler.medical.name: inhaler

obj.item.inhaler.salbutamol.desc: A small device capable of administering short bursts of aerosolized chemicals. Requires a canister to function.
obj.item.inhaler.salbutamol.name: salbutamol inhaler

obj.item.inspector.desc: Central Command standard issue inspection device. 		Used for precision scans to determine if an item contains, or is itself, contraband.
obj.item.inspector.name: N-spect scanner

obj.item.instrument.banjo.desc: A 'Mura' brand banjo. It's pretty much just a drum with a neck and strings.
obj.item.instrument.banjo.name: banjo

obj.item.instrument.bikehorn.desc: An exquisitely decorated bike horn, capable of honking in a variety of notes.
obj.item.instrument.bikehorn.name: gilded bike horn

obj.item.instrument.bilehorn.desc: Bits of bileworm anatomy rearranged to produce wonderful music, not bile. Keeps the name though, because for an instrument, it is quite vile.
obj.item.instrument.bilehorn.name: bilehorn

obj.item.instrument.eguitar.desc: Makes all your shredding needs possible.
obj.item.instrument.eguitar.name: electric guitar

obj.item.instrument.glockenspiel.desc: Smooth metal bars perfect for any marching band.
obj.item.instrument.glockenspiel.name: glockenspiel

obj.item.instrument.guitar.desc: It's made of wood and has bronze strings.
obj.item.instrument.guitar.name: guitar

obj.item.instrument.harmonica.desc: For when you get a bad case of the space blues.
obj.item.instrument.harmonica.name: harmonica

obj.item.instrument.musicalduffy.desc: A familiar looking moth sporting a fancy pair of glasses and a piano that harmonizes the screaming agony of moths.
obj.item.instrument.musicalduffy.name: suspicious musical moth

obj.item.instrument.musicalmoth.desc: Despite its popularity, this controversial musical toy was eventually banned due to its unethically sampled sounds of moths screaming in agony.
obj.item.instrument.musicalmoth.name: musical moth

obj.item.instrument.piano_synth.desc: An advanced electronic synthesizer that can be used as various instruments.
obj.item.instrument.piano_synth.name: synthesizer

obj.item.instrument.piano_synth.headphon.desc: Merch of their Electric Guitarist Demi Galgan from the Singularity Shredders. It's heavily customizable and even comes with a holographic tail!
obj.item.instrument.piano_synth.headphon.name: Cat-Ear Headphones

obj.item.instrument.piano_synth.headphon.desc: Flex your money, AND ignore what everyone else says, all at once!
obj.item.instrument.piano_synth.headphon.name: Nanotrasen space pods

obj.item.instrument.recorder.desc: Just like in school, playing ability and all.
obj.item.instrument.recorder.name: recorder

obj.item.instrument.saxophone.desc: This soothing sound will be sure to leave your audience in tears.
obj.item.instrument.saxophone.name: saxophone

obj.item.instrument.saxophone.spectral.desc: This spooky sound will be sure to leave mortals in bones.
obj.item.instrument.saxophone.spectral.name: spectral saxophone

obj.item.instrument.saxophone.spectral.o.desc: This spooky sound will be sure to leave mortals in bones.
obj.item.instrument.saxophone.spectral.o.name: spectral saxophone

obj.item.instrument.trombone.desc: How can any pool table ever hope to compete?
obj.item.instrument.trombone.name: trombone

obj.item.instrument.trombone.spectral.desc: A skeleton's favorite instrument. Apply directly on the mortals.
obj.item.instrument.trombone.spectral.name: spectral trombone

obj.item.instrument.trombone.spectral.on.desc: A skeleton's favorite instrument. Apply directly on the mortals.
obj.item.instrument.trombone.spectral.on.name: spectral trombone

obj.item.instrument.trumpet.desc: To announce the arrival of the king!
obj.item.instrument.trumpet.name: trumpet

obj.item.instrument.trumpet.spectral.desc: Things are about to get spooky!
obj.item.instrument.trumpet.spectral.name: spectral trumpet

obj.item.instrument.trumpet.spectral.one.desc: Things are about to get spooky!
obj.item.instrument.trumpet.spectral.one.name: spectral trumpet

obj.item.instrument.violin.desc: A wooden musical instrument with four strings and a bow. "The devil went down to space, he was looking for an assistant to grief."
obj.item.instrument.violin.name: space violin

obj.item.instrument.violin.festival.desc: A violin that holds a special interest in the songs played from its strings.
obj.item.instrument.violin.festival.name: Cogitandi Fidis

obj.item.instrument.violin.golden.desc: A golden musical instrument with four strings and a bow. "The devil went down to space, he was looking for an assistant to grief."
obj.item.instrument.violin.golden.name: golden violin

obj.item.integrated_circuit.desc: By inserting components and a cell into this, wiring them up, and putting them into a shell, anyone can pretend to be a programmer.
obj.item.integrated_circuit.name: integrated circuit

obj.item.integrated_circuit.admin.desc: The components installed in here are far beyond your comprehension.
obj.item.integrated_circuit.admin.name: administrative circuit

obj.item.integrated_circuit.loaded.hello.desc: By inserting components and a cell into this, wiring them up, and putting them into a shell, anyone can pretend to be a programmer.
obj.item.integrated_circuit.loaded.hello.name: integrated circuit

obj.item.integrated_circuit.loaded.speec.desc: By inserting components and a cell into this, wiring them up, and putting them into a shell, anyone can pretend to be a programmer.
obj.item.integrated_circuit.loaded.speec.name: integrated circuit

obj.item.integrated_circuit.module.desc: By inserting components and a cell into this, wiring them up, and putting them into a shell, anyone can pretend to be a programmer.
obj.item.integrated_circuit.module.name: integrated circuit

obj.item.jacobs_ladder.desc: A celestial ladder that violates the laws of physics.
obj.item.jacobs_ladder.name: jacob's ladder

obj.item.jammer.desc: Device used to disrupt nearby radio communication. Alternate function creates a powerful disruptor wave which disables all nearby listening devices.
obj.item.jammer.name: radio jammer

obj.item.jammer.makeshift.desc: A jury-rigged device that disrupts nearby radio communication. Its crude construction provides a significantly smaller area of effect compared to its Syndicate counterpart.
obj.item.jammer.makeshift.name: makeshift radio jammer

obj.item.janicart_upgrade.desc: An abstract upgrade for mobile janicarts.
obj.item.janicart_upgrade.name: base upgrade

obj.item.janicart_upgrade.buffer.desc: An upgrade for mobile janicarts which adds a floor buffer functionality.
obj.item.janicart_upgrade.buffer.name: floor buffer upgrade

obj.item.janicart_upgrade.vacuum.desc: An upgrade for mobile janicarts which adds a vacuum functionality.
obj.item.janicart_upgrade.vacuum.name: vacuum upgrade

obj.item.katana.ninja_blade.desc: A katana infused with strong energy.
obj.item.katana.ninja_blade.name: energy katana

obj.item.katana.weak.curator.desc: An ancient Katana. Forged by... Well, it doesn't really say, but surely it's authentic! And sharp to boot!
obj.item.katana.weak.curator.name: katana

obj.item.key.atv.desc: A small grey key for starting and operating ATVs.
obj.item.key.atv.name: ATV key

obj.item.key.collar.desc: A key for a tiny lock on a collar or bag.
obj.item.key.collar.name: collar key

obj.item.key.collar.antimagic.desc: The only kind of key that will open an antimagic collar. Hard to come across organically.
obj.item.key.collar.antimagic.name: antimagic collar key

obj.item.key.displaycase.desc: The key to the curator's display cases and arcade cabinets.
obj.item.key.displaycase.name: curator key

obj.item.key.golfcart.desc: A small grey key for using the golf cart.
obj.item.key.golfcart.name: golfcart key

obj.item.key.janitor.desc: A keyring with a small steel key, and a pink fob reading "Pussy Wagon".
obj.item.key.janitor.name: key

obj.item.key.kink_collar.desc: A key for a tiny lock on a collar or bag.
obj.item.key.kink_collar.name: kink collar key

obj.item.key.lasso.desc: The perfect tool for directing a Goliath! If only it made them move any faster...
obj.item.key.lasso.name: bone lasso

obj.item.key.security.desc: A keyring with a small steel key, and a rubber stun baton accessory.
obj.item.key.security.name: key

obj.item.key_card.desc: This feels like it belongs to a door.
obj.item.key_card.name: door keycard

obj.item.key_card.hotel_room.desc: A keycard, to open a keycard-locked hotel room.
obj.item.key_card.hotel_room.name: Twin Nexus keycard

obj.item.key_card.hotel_room.five.desc: A keycard, to open a keycard-locked hotel room.
obj.item.key_card.hotel_room.five.name: Twin Nexus keycard

obj.item.key_card.hotel_room.four.desc: A keycard, to open a keycard-locked hotel room.
obj.item.key_card.hotel_room.four.name: Twin Nexus keycard

obj.item.key_card.hotel_room.master.desc:
A master keycard, to open all the keycard-locked hotel rooms.
It has an engraving on it that reads: "Master Access"
obj.item.key_card.hotel_room.master.name: Twin Nexus master keycard

obj.item.key_card.hotel_room.one.desc: A keycard, to open a keycard-locked hotel room.
obj.item.key_card.hotel_room.one.name: Twin Nexus keycard

obj.item.key_card.hotel_room.seven.desc: A keycard, to open a keycard-locked hotel room.
obj.item.key_card.hotel_room.seven.name: Twin Nexus keycard

obj.item.key_card.hotel_room.two.desc: A keycard, to open a keycard-locked hotel room.
obj.item.key_card.hotel_room.two.name: Twin Nexus keycard

obj.item.keycard.desc: This feels like it belongs to a door.
obj.item.keycard.name: security keycard

obj.item.keycard.assault_ops_chemistry.desc: A red keycard with an image of a beaker. Using this will allow you to gain access to the Chemical Manufacturing Plant in Firebase Balthazord.
obj.item.keycard.assault_ops_chemistry.name: Chemistry Closet Access Card

obj.item.keycard.biological_anomalies.desc: A keycard that looks like the basic access card however it has a biological hazard warning on it.
obj.item.keycard.biological_anomalies.name: Bio storage keycard

obj.item.keycard.blue.desc: A blue keycard. How terrific. Looks like it belongs to a high security door.
obj.item.keycard.blue.name: blue keycard

obj.item.keycard.cafeteria.desc: The key to the cafeteria, as the name implies.
obj.item.keycard.cafeteria.name: museum cafeteria keycard

obj.item.keycard.cbrn_area.desc: A keycard that has a few weird logos and stickers on it all related to biohazards or radiation.
obj.item.keycard.cbrn_area.name: CBRN storage keycard

obj.item.keycard.claw_card.desc: A keycard that looks more complex than the already other complex keycards, it a simple design of a skull on it.
obj.item.keycard.claw_card.name: Biometric keycard

obj.item.keycard.entry.desc: The Heck Brewzone, first rate brewing and packaging. This one is labeled 'front door'.
obj.item.keycard.entry.name: secure keycard

obj.item.keycard.freeman_boss_entry.desc: This feels like it belongs to a door.
obj.item.keycard.freeman_boss_entry.name: entry keycard

obj.item.keycard.freeman_boss_exit.desc: How could you do it? HOW?!!
obj.item.keycard.freeman_boss_exit.name: Freeman's ID card

obj.item.keycard.heretic_entrance.desc: A keycard that simply states, basic access.
obj.item.keycard.heretic_entrance.name: secure storage keycard

obj.item.keycard.highsec_access.desc: A keycard that simply states, 'only under exteme circumstances'.
obj.item.keycard.highsec_access.name: secure storage keycard

obj.item.keycard.hilbert.desc: A keycard with an engraving on it. The engraving reads: "Hilbert".
obj.item.keycard.hilbert.name: Hilbert's office keycard

obj.item.keycard.icebox.office.desc: The NT post office, first rate shipping and packaging. This one is labeled 'front door'.
obj.item.keycard.icebox.office.name: secure keycard (1)

obj.item.keycard.icebox.processing.desc: The NT post office, first rate shipping and packaging. This one is labeled 'Boss's office'.
obj.item.keycard.icebox.processing.name: secure keycard (2)

obj.item.keycard.meatderelict.armory.desc: A red keycard. Has a really cool image of a gun on it. Fancy.
obj.item.keycard.meatderelict.armory.name: armory keycard

obj.item.keycard.meatderelict.director.desc: A fancy keycard. Likely unlocks the directors office. The name tag is all smudged.
obj.item.keycard.meatderelict.director.name: directors keycard

obj.item.keycard.meatderelict.engpost.desc: A fancy keycard. Has the engineering insignia on it.
obj.item.keycard.meatderelict.engpost.name: post keycard

obj.item.keycard.misc_anomalies.desc: A keycard that looks like the basic access card however it has a staff on it.
obj.item.keycard.misc_anomalies.name: Misc storage keycard

obj.item.keycard.nt_commsbuoy.desc: A keycard with the NT logo prominently displayed. The last user broke off the end; the card can still swipe, but this won't insert 	into any chip readers now. On the back, mostly obscured by dried blood, the text "SPINWARD" is printed, followed by an illegible ID string.
obj.item.keycard.nt_commsbuoy.name: Nanotrasen comms buoy keycard

obj.item.keycard.office.desc: The Brewzone, first rate brewing and packaging. This one is labeled 'office'.
obj.item.keycard.office.name: management keycard

obj.item.keycard.stockroom.desc: The Heck Brewzone, first rate brewing and packaging. This one is labeled 'stockroom'.
obj.item.keycard.stockroom.name: stockroom keycard

obj.item.keycard.syndicate_bio.desc: A red keycard with a biohazard symbol. Using this will allow you to gain access to the Bio-Weapon Lab in Firebase Balthazord.
obj.item.keycard.syndicate_bio.name: Syndicate Bio-Weapon Laboratory Access Card

obj.item.keycard.syndicate_bomb.desc: A red keycard with an image of a bomb. Using this will allow you to gain access to the Ordnance Lab in Firebase Balthazord.
obj.item.keycard.syndicate_bomb.name: Syndicate Ordnance Laboratory Access Card

obj.item.keycard.syndicate_chem.desc: A red keycard with an image of a beaker. Using this will allow you to gain access to the Chemical Manufacturing Plant in Firebase Balthazord.
obj.item.keycard.syndicate_chem.name: Syndicate Chemical Plant Access Card

obj.item.keycard.syndicate_custodial.desc: A purple keycard with an image of a mop. Using this will allow you to gain access to the Custodial Closet, containing janitorial equipment and a canister of water vapour.
obj.item.keycard.syndicate_custodial.name: Custodial Closet Access Card

obj.item.keycard.syndicate_fridge.desc: A grey keycard with Lopez's Information on it. This is your ticket into the Fridge in Firebase Balthazord.
obj.item.keycard.syndicate_fridge.name: Lopez's Access Card

obj.item.keycard.tarkon_engi.desc: Tarkon industries secure storage lock key.
obj.item.keycard.tarkon_engi.name: Engineering keycard

obj.item.keycard.tarkon_job_command.desc: Tarkon industries secure storage lock key. This one has a label reading 'Command Secure Storage'
