obj.item.keycard.tarkon_rnd.name: Research keycard

obj.item.keycard.tarkon_vault.desc: Tarkon industries secure storage lock key.
obj.item.keycard.tarkon_vault.name: Vault keycard

obj.item.keycard.thing_boss.desc: A fancy keycard for storage room 2.
obj.item.keycard.thing_boss.name: Storage Room 2 Keycard

obj.item.keycard.weapon_anomalies.desc: A keycard that looks like the basic access card however it has a simple recognizable handgun on it.
obj.item.keycard.weapon_anomalies.name: Weapon storage keycard

obj.item.keycard.yellow.desc: A yellow keycard. How fantastic. Looks like it belongs to a high security door.
obj.item.keycard.yellow.name: yellow keycard

obj.item.kinetic_crusher.desc: An early design of the proto-kinetic accelerator, it is little more than a combination of various mining tools cobbled together, 		forming a high-tech club. While it is an effective mining tool, it did little to aid any but the most skilled and/or 		suicidal miners against local fauna.
obj.item.kinetic_crusher.name: proto-kinetic crusher

obj.item.kinetic_crusher.compact.desc: An early design of the proto-kinetic accelerator, it is little more than a combination of various mining tools cobbled together, 		forming a high-tech club. While it is an effective mining tool, it did little to aid any but the most skilled and/or 		suicidal miners against local fauna.
obj.item.kinetic_crusher.compact.name: compact kinetic crusher

obj.item.kinetic_crusher.cursed.desc: A horrible, alive-looking weapon that pulses every so often. The tendril created this monstrosity to mimic and compete with those who invade the land.
obj.item.kinetic_crusher.cursed.name: cursed ash carver

obj.item.kinky_shocker.desc: A small toy that can weakly shock someone.
obj.item.kinky_shocker.name: kinky shocker

obj.item.kirbyplants.fern.desc: An old botanical research sample collected on a long forgotten jungle planet.
obj.item.kirbyplants.fern.name: neglected fern

obj.item.kirbyplants.monkey.desc: Something that seems to have been made by the Nanotrasen science division, one might call it an abomination. It's heads seem... alive.
obj.item.kirbyplants.monkey.name: monkey plant

obj.item.kirbyplants.potty.desc: A secret agent staffed in the station's bar to protect the mystical cakehat.
obj.item.kirbyplants.potty.name: Potty the Potted Plant

obj.item.kirbyplants.random.fullysynthet.desc: A fake, cheap looking, plastic tree. Perfect for people who kill every plant they touch.
obj.item.kirbyplants.random.fullysynthet.name: plastic potted plant

obj.item.kirbyplants.synthetic.desc: A fake, cheap looking, plastic tree. Perfect for people who kill every plant they touch.
obj.item.kirbyplants.synthetic.name: plastic potted plant

obj.item.kirbyplants.synthetic.plant26.desc: A fake, cheap looking, plastic tree. Perfect for people who kill every plant they touch.
obj.item.kirbyplants.synthetic.plant26.name: plastic potted plant

obj.item.kirbyplants.synthetic.plant27.desc: A fake, cheap looking, plastic tree. Perfect for people who kill every plant they touch.
obj.item.kirbyplants.synthetic.plant27.name: plastic potted plant

obj.item.kirbyplants.synthetic.plant28.desc: A fake, cheap looking, plastic tree. Perfect for people who kill every plant they touch.
obj.item.kirbyplants.synthetic.plant28.name: plastic potted plant

obj.item.kirbyplants.synthetic.plant29.desc: A fake, cheap looking, plastic tree. Perfect for people who kill every plant they touch.
obj.item.kirbyplants.synthetic.plant29.name: plastic potted plant

obj.item.kitchen.fork.plastic.desc: Really takes you back to highschool lunch.
obj.item.kitchen.fork.plastic.name: plastic fork

obj.item.kitchen.rollingpin.desc: Used to knock out the Bartender.
obj.item.kitchen.rollingpin.name: rolling pin

obj.item.kitchen.rollingpin.illegal.desc: A heavy metallic rolling pin used to bash in those annoying ingredients.
obj.item.kitchen.rollingpin.illegal.name: metal rolling pin

obj.item.kitchen.spoon.desc: Just be careful your food doesn't melt the spoon first.
obj.item.kitchen.spoon.name: spoon

obj.item.kitchen.spoon.plastic.desc: Just be careful your food doesn't melt the spoon first.
obj.item.kitchen.spoon.plastic.name: plastic spoon

obj.item.kitchen.spoon.soup_ladle.desc: What is a ladle but a comically large spoon?
obj.item.kitchen.spoon.soup_ladle.name: ladle

obj.item.kitchen.tongs.desc: So you never have to touch anything with your dirty, unwashed hands.
obj.item.kitchen.tongs.name: tongs

obj.item.knife.desc: The original knife, it is said that all other knives are only copies of this one.
obj.item.knife.name: knife

obj.item.knife.bloodletter.desc: An occult looking dagger that is cold to the touch. Somehow, the flawless orb on the pommel is made entirely of liquid blood.
obj.item.knife.bloodletter.name: bloodletter

obj.item.knife.bowie.desc: A frontiersman's classic, closer to a shortsword than a knife. It boasts a full-tanged build, a brass handguard and pommel, a wicked sharp point, and a large, heavy blade, It's almost everything you could want in a knife, besides portability.
obj.item.knife.bowie.name: Bowie knife

obj.item.knife.butcher.desc: A huge thing used for chopping and chopping up meat. This includes clowns and clown by-products.
obj.item.knife.butcher.name: butcher's cleaver

obj.item.knife.carp.desc: Looks sharp. Sharp enough to poke someone's eye out. Holy fuck it's big.
obj.item.knife.carp.name: carp tooth

obj.item.knife.combat.desc: A military combat utility survival knife.
obj.item.knife.combat.name: combat knife

obj.item.knife.combat.bone.desc: A sharpened bone. The bare minimum in survival.
obj.item.knife.combat.bone.name: bone dagger

obj.item.knife.combat.cyborg.desc: A cyborg-mounted plasteel knife. Extremely sharp and durable.
obj.item.knife.combat.cyborg.name: cyborg knife

obj.item.knife.combat.marksman.desc: Very well weighted for throwing, feels awkward to use for anything else.
obj.item.knife.combat.marksman.name: throwing knife

obj.item.knife.combat.root.desc: A root dagger, deceptively sharp. Perfect to hide and stab someone with, or make a couple and throw them at enemies.
obj.item.knife.combat.root.name: cahn'root dagger

obj.item.knife.hotknife.desc: Once known as Lightbringer, this sword has been demoted to a simple pizza cutting knife... It may still have its fire attack powers.
obj.item.knife.hotknife.name: thousand degree knife

obj.item.knife.hunting.desc: Despite its name, it's mainly used for cutting meat from dead prey rather than actual hunting.
obj.item.knife.hunting.name: hunting knife

obj.item.knife.hunting.wildhunter.desc: A magical knife made out of ashen stone. It was used to butcher local fauna by best hunters. Cuts everything to the simplest.
obj.item.knife.hunting.wildhunter.name: wildhunter's butchering knife

obj.item.knife.kitchen.desc: A general purpose Chef's Knife made by SpaceCook Incorporated. Guaranteed to stay sharp for years to come.
obj.item.knife.kitchen.name: kitchen knife

obj.item.knife.kitchen.magic.desc: A general purpose Chef's Knife made by SpaceCook Incorporated. Guaranteed to stay sharp for years to come.
obj.item.knife.kitchen.magic.name: magic knife

obj.item.knife.kitchen.silicon.desc: A breakthrough in synthetic engineering, this tool is a knife programmed to dull when not used for cooking purposes, and can exchange the blade for a rolling pin
obj.item.knife.kitchen.silicon.name: Kitchen Toolset

obj.item.knife.plastic.desc: A very safe, barely sharp knife made of plastic. Good for cutting food and not much else.
obj.item.knife.plastic.name: plastic knife

obj.item.knife.rainbowknife.desc: A strange, transparent knife which constantly shifts color. It hums slightly when moved.
obj.item.knife.rainbowknife.name: rainbow knife

obj.item.knife.razor_claws.desc: A set of sharp, retractable claws built into the fingertips, five double-edged blades sure to turn people into mincemeat. Capable of shifting into 'Precision' mode to act similar to wirecutters.
obj.item.knife.razor_claws.name: implanted razor claws

obj.item.knife.ritual.desc: The unearthly energies that once powered this blade are now dormant.
obj.item.knife.ritual.name: ritual knife

obj.item.knife.shiv.carrot.desc: Unlike other carrots, you should probably keep this far away from your eyes.
obj.item.knife.shiv.carrot.name: carrot shiv

obj.item.knife.shiv.parsnip.desc: Truly putting 'snip' in the 'parsnip', and it's not sub-par either!
obj.item.knife.shiv.parsnip.name: parsnip shiv

obj.item.knife.shiv.plastitanium.desc: A makeshift titanium-infused plasma glass shiv.
obj.item.knife.shiv.plastitanium.name: plastitanium shiv

obj.item.knife.shiv.root.desc: A root sharpened into a shiv. A root source of someone's stab wounds soon, most likely.
obj.item.knife.shiv.root.name: cahn'root shiv

obj.item.language_manual.codespeak_manua.desc: The book's cover reads: "Codespeak(tm) - Secure your communication with metaphors so elaborate, they seem randomly generated!"
obj.item.language_manual.codespeak_manua.name: codespeak manual

obj.item.language_manual.codespeak_manua.desc: The book's cover reads: "Codespeak(tm) - Secure your communication with metaphors so elaborate, they seem randomly generated!"
obj.item.language_manual.codespeak_manua.name: deluxe codespeak manual

obj.item.language_manual.dronespeak_manu.desc: The book's cover reads: "Understanding Dronespeak - An exercise in futility." The book is written entirely in binary, non-silicons probably won't understand it.
obj.item.language_manual.dronespeak_manu.name: dronespeak manual

obj.item.language_manual.piratespeak.desc: A book containing all the knowledge, jargon and buzzwords to speak like a true old salt.
obj.item.language_manual.piratespeak.name: Captain Pete's Guide to Pirate Lingo

obj.item.laser_pointer.desc: Don't shine it in your eyes!
obj.item.laser_pointer.name: laser pointer

obj.item.laser_pointer.blue.desc: Don't shine it in your eyes!
obj.item.laser_pointer.blue.name: laser pointer

obj.item.laser_pointer.green.desc: Don't shine it in your eyes!
obj.item.laser_pointer.green.name: laser pointer

obj.item.laser_pointer.infinite_range.desc: Used to shine in the eyes of Cyborgs who need a bit of a push, this works through camera consoles.
obj.item.laser_pointer.infinite_range.name: infinite laser pointer

obj.item.laser_pointer.limited.desc: Don't shine it in your eyes!
obj.item.laser_pointer.limited.name: laser pointer

obj.item.laser_pointer.limited.blue.desc: Don't shine it in your eyes!
obj.item.laser_pointer.limited.blue.name: laser pointer

obj.item.laser_pointer.limited.green.desc: Don't shine it in your eyes!
obj.item.laser_pointer.limited.green.name: laser pointer

obj.item.laser_pointer.limited.purple.desc: Don't shine it in your eyes!
obj.item.laser_pointer.limited.purple.name: laser pointer

obj.item.laser_pointer.limited.red.desc: Don't shine it in your eyes!
obj.item.laser_pointer.limited.red.name: laser pointer

obj.item.laser_pointer.purple.desc: Don't shine it in your eyes!
obj.item.laser_pointer.purple.name: laser pointer

obj.item.laser_pointer.red.desc: Don't shine it in your eyes!
obj.item.laser_pointer.red.name: laser pointer

obj.item.lava_staff.desc: The ability to fill the emergency shuttle with lava. What more could you want out of life?
obj.item.lava_staff.name: staff of lava

obj.item.lazarus_injector.desc: An injector with a cocktail of nanomachines and chemicals, this device can seemingly raise animals from the dead, making them become friendly to the user. Unfortunately, the process is useless on higher forms of life and incredibly costly, so these were hidden in storage until an executive thought they'd be great motivation for some of their employees.
obj.item.lazarus_injector.name: lazarus injector

obj.item.lighter.bright.desc: Sustains an incredibly bright chemical reaction when you spark it. Avoid looking directly at the igniter when lit.
obj.item.lighter.bright.name: illuminative zippo

obj.item.lighter.mime.desc: In lieu of fuel, performative spirit can be used to light cigarettes.
obj.item.lighter.mime.name: pale zippo

obj.item.lighter.royal.desc: A gilded lighter with two seperate folding lids. The fuel inside it makes the flame a deep purple, leading to it also being called a Shadow Lighter.
obj.item.lighter.royal.name: royal zippo

obj.item.lighter.skull.desc: An absolutely badass zippo lighter. Just look at that skull!
obj.item.lighter.skull.name: badass zippo

obj.item.lighter.slime.desc: A specialty zippo made from slimes and industry. Has a much hotter flame than normal.
obj.item.lighter.slime.name: slime zippo

obj.item.lightreplacer.desc: A device to automatically replace lights. Refill with broken or working light bulbs, or sheets of glass.
obj.item.lightreplacer.name: light replacer

obj.item.lightreplacer.advanced.desc: A higher capacity light replacer. Refill with broken or working lightbulbs, or sheets of glass.
obj.item.lightreplacer.advanced.name: high capacity light replacer

obj.item.lightreplacer.blue.desc: A modified light replacer that zaps lights into place. Refill with broken or working lightbulbs, or sheets of glass.
obj.item.lightreplacer.blue.name: bluespace light replacer

obj.item.lipstick.black.death.desc: An incredibly potent tube of lipstick made from the venom of the dreaded Yellow Spotted Space Lizard, as deadly as it is chic. Try not to smear it!
obj.item.lipstick.black.death.name: Kiss of Death

obj.item.lipstick.hypnosyndie.desc: A potent lipstick capable of weakening and even hypnotizing the minds of those you kiss!
obj.item.lipstick.hypnosyndie.name: hypno lipstick

obj.item.lipstick.syndie.desc: Syndicate branded lipstick with a killer dose of kisses. Observe safety regulations!
obj.item.lipstick.syndie.name: syndie lipstick

obj.item.locator.desc: A handheld device that locks onto the unique bluespace resonance of tracking implants, providing real-time directional and positional data.
obj.item.locator.name: bluespace locator

obj.item.lustwish_discount.desc: A strange card with a blue lamia on the back.
obj.item.lustwish_discount.name: LustWish elite card

obj.item.lycan_booster.desc: A highly advanced mix of nanomachines and general 'bad vibes' that will significantly boost the combat performance of your 	Lycan form, granting significant damage resistance, baton resistance, regeneration, and further sharpening your claws, along other improvements. 	Additionally grants you expert fitness.
obj.item.lycan_booster.name: lycanthropy booster

obj.item.machine_remote.desc: A remote for controlling machines and bots around the station.
obj.item.machine_remote.name: machine wand

obj.item.mail.desc: An officially postmarked, tamper-evident parcel regulated by CentCom and made of high-quality materials.
obj.item.mail.name: mail

obj.item.mail.envelope.desc: An officially postmarked, tamper-evident parcel regulated by CentCom and made of high-quality materials.
obj.item.mail.envelope.name: envelope

obj.item.mail.mail_strike.desc: An unmarked parcel of unknown origins, effectively undeliverable.
obj.item.mail.mail_strike.name: dead mail

obj.item.mail.traitor.desc: An officially postmarked, tamper-evident parcel regulated by CentCom and made of high-quality materials.
obj.item.mail.traitor.name: mail

obj.item.mail.traitor.envelope.desc: An officially postmarked, tamper-evident parcel regulated by CentCom and made of high-quality materials.
obj.item.mail.traitor.envelope.name: envelope

obj.item.mail.traitor.mail_strike.desc: An unmarked parcel of unknown origins, effectively undeliverable.
obj.item.mail.traitor.mail_strike.name: dead mail

obj.item.malf_upgrade.desc:
A highly illegal, highly dangerous upgrade for artificial intelligence units, granting them a variety of powers as well as the ability to hack APCs.
This upgrade does not override any active laws, and must be applied directly to an active AI core.
obj.item.malf_upgrade.name: combat software upgrade

obj.item.maneki_neko.desc: A figurine of a cat holding a coin, said to bring fortune and wealth, and perpetually moving its paw in a beckoning gesture.
obj.item.maneki_neko.name: Maneki-Neko

obj.item.mansus_eye.desc: An eerie eye stares back at you, unblinking, tracking your every movement.
obj.item.mansus_eye.name: watching eye

obj.item.market_uplink.desc: A market uplink. Usable with markets. You probably shouldn't have this!
obj.item.market_uplink.name: Market Uplink

obj.item.market_uplink.blackmarket.desc: An illegal black market uplink. If command wanted you to have these, they wouldn't have made it so hard to get one.
obj.item.market_uplink.blackmarket.name: Black Market Uplink

obj.item.match.desc: A simple match stick, used for lighting fine smokables.
obj.item.match.name: match

obj.item.match.battery.desc: A budget lighter done by using a battery and some aluminium. Hold tightly to ignite.
obj.item.match.battery.name: battery lighter

obj.item.match.firebrand.desc: An unlit firebrand. It makes you wonder why it's not just called a stick.
obj.item.match.firebrand.name: firebrand

obj.item.mayhem.desc: A magically infused bottle of blood, the scent of which will drive anyone nearby into a murderous frenzy.
obj.item.mayhem.name: mayhem in a bottle

obj.item.mecha_ammo.desc: A box of ammo for an unknown weapon.
obj.item.mecha_ammo.name: generic ammo box

obj.item.mecha_ammo.clusterbang.desc: A box of clustered flashbangs, for use with a specialized exosuit cluster launcher. Cannot be primed by hand.
obj.item.mecha_ammo.clusterbang.name: launchable flashbang clusters

obj.item.mecha_ammo.flashbang.desc: A box of smooth flashbangs, for use with a large exosuit launcher. Cannot be primed by hand.
obj.item.mecha_ammo.flashbang.name: launchable flashbangs

obj.item.mecha_ammo.incendiary.desc: A box of incendiary ammunition for use with exosuit weapons.
obj.item.mecha_ammo.incendiary.name: incendiary ammo box

obj.item.mecha_ammo.lmg.desc: A box of linked ammunition, designed for the Ultra AC 2 exosuit weapon.
obj.item.mecha_ammo.lmg.name: machine gun ammo box

obj.item.mecha_ammo.missiles_pep.desc: A box of large missiles, ready for loading into a PEP-6 exosuit missile rack.
obj.item.mecha_ammo.missiles_pep.name: precision explosive missiles

obj.item.mecha_ammo.missiles_srm.desc: A box of large missiles, ready for loading into an SRM-8 exosuit missile rack.
obj.item.mecha_ammo.missiles_srm.name: short range missiles

obj.item.mecha_ammo.scattershot.desc: A box of scaled-up buckshot, for use in exosuit shotguns.
obj.item.mecha_ammo.scattershot.name: scattershot ammo box

obj.item.mecha_diagnostic.desc: A holographic datasheet of unique data related to the mecha's construction and any production differences between the published designs to increment improvements.
obj.item.mecha_diagnostic.name: mecha holodiagnostic

obj.item.mecha_parts.camera_kit.desc: A security camera meant for exosuit-mounted surveillance-on-the-go.
obj.item.mecha_parts.camera_kit.name: exosuit-mounted camera

obj.item.mecha_parts.mecha_equipment.air.desc: An internal air tank used to pressurize mech cabin, scrub CO2 and power RCS thrusters. Comes with a pump and a set of sensors.
obj.item.mecha_parts.mecha_equipment.air.name: mounted air tank

obj.item.mecha_parts.mecha_equipment.air.desc: An internal air tank used to pressurize mech cabin, scrub CO2 and power RCS thrusters. Comes with a pump and a set of sensors.
obj.item.mecha_parts.mecha_equipment.air.name: mounted air tank

obj.item.mecha_parts.mecha_equipment.arm.desc: Boosts exosuit armor against melee attacks
obj.item.mecha_parts.mecha_equipment.arm.name: exosuit impact cushion plates

obj.item.mecha_parts.mecha_equipment.arm.desc: Boosts exosuit armor against energy-based attacks. Also shields the exosuit's internal wiring from hostile EMP attacks. However, this may leave the 		exosuit slightly more vulnerable to kinetic blows due to taking up valuable hull cushioning.
obj.item.mecha_parts.mecha_equipment.arm.name: exosuit ablative insulation

obj.item.mecha_parts.mecha_equipment.arm.desc: Boosts exosuit armor against energy-based attacks. Also shields the exosuit's internal wiring from hostile EMP attacks.
obj.item.mecha_parts.mecha_equipment.arm.name: exosuit hardened ablative insulation

obj.item.mecha_parts.mecha_equipment.arm.desc: Boosts exosuit armor against ranged kinetic and energy projectiles. Completely blocks taser shots.
obj.item.mecha_parts.mecha_equipment.arm.name: exosuit projectile shielding

obj.item.mecha_parts.mecha_equipment.arm.desc: Report this to a coder if you see this!
obj.item.mecha_parts.mecha_equipment.arm.name: abstract armor

obj.item.mecha_parts.mecha_equipment.con.desc: A compartment that allows a non-combat mecha to equip one weapon while hiding the weapon from plain sight.
obj.item.mecha_parts.mecha_equipment.con.name: concealed weapon bay

obj.item.mecha_parts.mecha_equipment.dri.desc: Equipment for engineering and combat exosuits. This is the drill that'll pierce the heavens!
obj.item.mecha_parts.mecha_equipment.dri.name: exosuit drill

obj.item.mecha_parts.mecha_equipment.dri.desc: Equipment for engineering and combat exosuits. This is an upgraded version of the drill that'll pierce the heavens!
obj.item.mecha_parts.mecha_equipment.dri.name: diamond-tipped exosuit drill

obj.item.mecha_parts.mecha_equipment.eje.desc: Holds cargo loaded with a hydraulic clamp.
obj.item.mecha_parts.mecha_equipment.eje.name: cargo compartment

obj.item.mecha_parts.mecha_equipment.eje.desc: Holds suspects loaded with a hydraulic claw.
obj.item.mecha_parts.mecha_equipment.eje.name: holding cell

obj.item.mecha_parts.mecha_equipment.ext.desc: Equipment for engineering exosuits. A rapid-firing high capacity fire extinguisher.
obj.item.mecha_parts.mecha_equipment.ext.name: exosuit extinguisher

obj.item.mecha_parts.mecha_equipment.gen.desc: An exosuit module that generates power using solid plasma as fuel.
obj.item.mecha_parts.mecha_equipment.gen.name: plasma engine

obj.item.mecha_parts.mecha_equipment.hyd.desc: Equipment for engineering exosuits. Lifts objects and loads them into cargo.
obj.item.mecha_parts.mecha_equipment.hyd.name: hydraulic clamp

obj.item.mecha_parts.mecha_equipment.hyd.desc: They won't know what clamped them! This time for real!
obj.item.mecha_parts.mecha_equipment.hyd.name: KILL CLAMP

obj.item.mecha_parts.mecha_equipment.hyd.desc: They won't know what clamped them!
obj.item.mecha_parts.mecha_equipment.hyd.name: KILL CLAMP

obj.item.mecha_parts.mecha_equipment.med.desc: Equipment for medical exosuits. Generates a focused beam of medical nanites.
obj.item.mecha_parts.mecha_equipment.med.name: exosuit medical beamgun

obj.item.mecha_parts.mecha_equipment.med.desc: Equipment for medical exosuits. A chem synthesizer with syringe gun. Reagents inside are held in stasis, so no reactions will occur.
obj.item.mecha_parts.mecha_equipment.med.name: exosuit syringe gun

obj.item.mecha_parts.mecha_equipment.min.desc: Equipment for working exosuits. It will automatically check surrounding rock for useful minerals.
obj.item.mecha_parts.mecha_equipment.min.name: exosuit mining scanner

obj.item.mecha_parts.mecha_equipment.ore.desc: An automated ore box management device, complete with a built-in boulder processor.
obj.item.mecha_parts.mecha_equipment.ore.name: ore storage module

obj.item.mecha_parts.mecha_equipment.rad.desc: A basic component of every vehicle.
obj.item.mecha_parts.mecha_equipment.rad.name: mounted radio

obj.item.mecha_parts.mecha_equipment.rep.desc: An automated repair droid for exosuits. Scans for damage and repairs it. Can fix almost all types of external or internal damage.
obj.item.mecha_parts.mecha_equipment.rep.name: exosuit repair droid

obj.item.mecha_parts.mecha_equipment.rip.desc: A pressurized canopy attachment kit for an Autonomous Power Loader Unit "Ripley" MK-I exosuit, to convert it to the slower, but space-worthy MK-II design. This kit cannot be removed, once applied.
obj.item.mecha_parts.mecha_equipment.rip.name: Ripley MK-II Conversion Kit

obj.item.mecha_parts.mecha_equipment.rip.desc: A hardpoint modification kit for an Autonomous Power Loader Unit "Ripley" MK-I exosuit, to convert it to the Paddy lightweight security design. This kit cannot be removed, once applied.
obj.item.mecha_parts.mecha_equipment.rip.name: Paddy Conversion Kit

obj.item.mecha_parts.mecha_equipment.sle.desc: A mounted sleeper that stabilizes patients.
obj.item.mecha_parts.mecha_equipment.sle.name: mounted sleeper

obj.item.mecha_parts.mecha_equipment.sle.desc: A mounted sleeper that stabilizes patients.
obj.item.mecha_parts.mecha_equipment.sle.name: mounted sleeper

obj.item.mecha_parts.mecha_equipment.sle.desc: Equipment for medical exosuits. A mounted sleeper that stabilizes patients and can inject reagents from a equipped exosuit syringe gun.
obj.item.mecha_parts.mecha_equipment.sle.name: mounted sleeper

obj.item.mecha_parts.mecha_equipment.tel.desc: An exosuit module that allows exosuits to teleport to any position in view.
obj.item.mecha_parts.mecha_equipment.tel.name: mounted teleporter

obj.item.mecha_parts.mecha_equipment.thr.desc: A generic set of thrusters, from an unknown source. Uses not-understood methods to propel exosuits seemingly for free.
obj.item.mecha_parts.mecha_equipment.thr.name: generic exosuit thrusters

obj.item.mecha_parts.mecha_equipment.thr.desc: A set of thrusters that allow for exosuit movement in zero-gravity environments, by expelling gas from the internal life support tank.
obj.item.mecha_parts.mecha_equipment.thr.name: RCS thruster package

obj.item.mecha_parts.mecha_equipment.thr.desc: A set of thrusters that allow for exosuit movement in zero-gravity environments.
obj.item.mecha_parts.mecha_equipment.thr.name: Ion thruster package

obj.item.mecha_parts.mecha_equipment.wea.desc: A weapon for combat exosuits. Shoots incendiary bullets.
obj.item.mecha_parts.mecha_equipment.wea.name: FNX-99 "Hades" Carbine

obj.item.mecha_parts.mecha_equipment.wea.desc: Equipment for clown exosuits. Launches banana peels.
obj.item.mecha_parts.mecha_equipment.wea.name: banana mortar

obj.item.mecha_parts.mecha_equipment.wea.desc: Equipment for clown exosuits. Launches exploding banana peels.
obj.item.mecha_parts.mecha_equipment.wea.name: bombanana mortar

obj.item.mecha_parts.mecha_equipment.wea.desc: A weapon for combat exosuits. Launches primed flashbangs.
obj.item.mecha_parts.mecha_equipment.wea.name: SGL-6 grenade launcher

obj.item.mecha_parts.mecha_equipment.wea.desc: A weapon for combat exosuits. Launches primed clusterbangs. You monster.
obj.item.mecha_parts.mecha_equipment.wea.name: SOB-3 grenade launcher

obj.item.mecha_parts.mecha_equipment.wea.desc: A weapon for combat exosuits. Launches primed tear-stache grenades.
obj.item.mecha_parts.mecha_equipment.wea.name: HONKeR-6 grenade launcher

obj.item.mecha_parts.mecha_equipment.wea.desc: Equipment for clown exosuits. Launches armed mousetraps.
obj.item.mecha_parts.mecha_equipment.wea.name: mousetrap mortar

obj.item.mecha_parts.mecha_equipment.wea.desc: Equipment for clown exosuits. Delivers fun right to your face!
obj.item.mecha_parts.mecha_equipment.wea.name: Oingo Boingo Punch-face

obj.item.mecha_parts.mecha_equipment.wea.desc: A weapon for combat exosuits. Shoots a rapid, three shot burst.
obj.item.mecha_parts.mecha_equipment.wea.name: Ultra AC 2

obj.item.mecha_parts.mecha_equipment.wea.desc: A weapon for combat exosuits. Launches short range missiles.
obj.item.mecha_parts.mecha_equipment.wea.name: SRM-8 missile rack

obj.item.mecha_parts.mecha_equipment.wea.desc: A weapon for combat exosuits. Launches precision explosive projectiles designed to explode only when striking a structured target, including walls, exosuits and cyborgs.
obj.item.mecha_parts.mecha_equipment.wea.name: PEP-6 missile rack

obj.item.mecha_parts.mecha_equipment.wea.desc: A weapon for combat exosuits. Shoots a spread of pellets.
obj.item.mecha_parts.mecha_equipment.wea.name: LBX AC 10 "Scattershot"

obj.item.mecha_parts.mecha_equipment.wea.desc: A weapon for combat exosuits. A mime invention, field tests have shown that targets cannot even scream before going down.
obj.item.mecha_parts.mecha_equipment.wea.name: S.H.H. "Quietus" Carbine

obj.item.mecha_parts.mecha_equipment.wea.desc: A weapon for combat exosuits. Shoots a bunch of weak disabler beams.
obj.item.mecha_parts.mecha_equipment.wea.name: CH-DS "Peacemaker" disabler

obj.item.mecha_parts.mecha_equipment.wea.desc: A weapon for combat exosuits. Shoots technology-disabling ion beams. Don't catch yourself in the blast!
obj.item.mecha_parts.mecha_equipment.wea.name: MKIV ion heavy cannon

obj.item.mecha_parts.mecha_equipment.wea.desc: A weapon for combat exosuits. Shoots basic lasers.
obj.item.mecha_parts.mecha_equipment.wea.name: CH-PS "Immolator" laser

obj.item.mecha_parts.mecha_equipment.wea.desc: A weapon for combat exosuits. Shoots heavy lasers.
obj.item.mecha_parts.mecha_equipment.wea.name: CH-LC "Solaris" laser cannon

obj.item.mecha_parts.mecha_equipment.wea.desc: An exosuit-mounted mining tool that does increased damage in low pressure. Drawing from an onboard power source allows it to project further than the handheld version.
obj.item.mecha_parts.mecha_equipment.wea.name: Exosuit Proto-kinetic Accelerator

obj.item.mecha_parts.mecha_equipment.wea.desc: A device that shoots resonant plasma bursts at extreme velocity. The blasts are capable of crushing rock and demolishing solid obstacles.
obj.item.mecha_parts.mecha_equipment.wea.name: 217-D Heavy Plasma Cutter

obj.item.mecha_parts.mecha_equipment.wea.desc: A weapon for combat exosuits. Shoots powerful destructive blasts capable of demolishing obstacles.
obj.item.mecha_parts.mecha_equipment.wea.name: eZ-13 MK2 heavy pulse rifle

obj.item.mecha_parts.mecha_equipment.wea.desc: A weapon for combat exosuits. Shoots non-lethal stunning electrodes.
obj.item.mecha_parts.mecha_equipment.wea.name: PBT "Pacifier" mounted taser

obj.item.mecha_parts.mecha_equipment.wea.desc: A weapon for combat exosuits. Fires bolts of electricity similar to the experimental tesla engine.
obj.item.mecha_parts.mecha_equipment.wea.name: MKI Tesla Cannon

obj.item.mecha_parts.mecha_equipment.wea.desc: A special prototype of a heavy thermal weapon designed for use on exosuits. This one is debug-chambered.
obj.item.mecha_parts.mecha_equipment.wea.name: Prototype -I 'Thermal Cannon'

obj.item.mecha_parts.mecha_equipment.wea.desc: A special prototype of a heavy thermal weapon designed for use on exosuits. This one is cryo-chambered.
obj.item.mecha_parts.mecha_equipment.wea.name: Prototype I 'Cryo Thermal Cannon'

obj.item.mecha_parts.mecha_equipment.wea.desc: A special prototype of a heavy thermal weapon designed for use on exosuits. This one is molten-chambered.
obj.item.mecha_parts.mecha_equipment.wea.name: Prototype II 'Pyro Thermal Cannon'

obj.item.mecha_parts.mecha_equipment.wea.desc: Equipment for clown exosuits. Spreads fun and joy to everyone around. Honk!
obj.item.mecha_parts.mecha_equipment.wea.name: HoNkER BlAsT 5000

obj.item.mecha_parts.mecha_equipment.wea.desc: A modified hydraulic clamp, for use exclusively with the Paddy exosuit. Non-lethally apprehends suspects.
obj.item.mecha_parts.mecha_equipment.wea.name: hydraulic claw

obj.item.mecha_parts.mecha_equipment.wor.desc: An exosuit module that allows generating of small quasi-stable wormholes, allowing for long-range inaccurate teleportation.
obj.item.mecha_parts.mecha_equipment.wor.name: mounted wormhole generator

obj.item.mecha_parts.mecha_tracking.desc: Device used to transmit exosuit data.
obj.item.mecha_parts.mecha_tracking.name: exosuit tracking beacon

obj.item.mecha_parts.mecha_tracking.ai_c.desc: A device used to transmit exosuit data. Also allows active AI units to take control of said exosuit.
obj.item.mecha_parts.mecha_tracking.ai_c.name: exosuit AI control beacon

obj.item.mecha_parts.part.clarke_head.desc: A Clarke head. Contains an integrated diagnostic HUD scanner.
obj.item.mecha_parts.part.clarke_head.name: Clarke head

obj.item.mecha_parts.part.clarke_left_ar.desc: A Clarke left arm. Data and power sockets are compatible with most exosuit tools.
obj.item.mecha_parts.part.clarke_left_ar.name: Clarke left arm

obj.item.mecha_parts.part.clarke_right_a.desc: A Clarke right arm. Data and power sockets are compatible with most exosuit tools.
obj.item.mecha_parts.part.clarke_right_a.name: Clarke right arm

obj.item.mecha_parts.part.clarke_torso.desc: A torso part of Clarke. Contains power unit, processing core and life support systems.
obj.item.mecha_parts.part.clarke_torso.name: Clarke torso

obj.item.mecha_parts.part.durand_armor.desc: A set of armor plates for the Durand. Built heavy to resist an incredible amount of brute force.
obj.item.mecha_parts.part.durand_armor.name: Durand armor plates

obj.item.mecha_parts.part.durand_head.desc: A Durand head. Houses advanced surveillance and targeting sensors.
obj.item.mecha_parts.part.durand_head.name: Durand head

obj.item.mecha_parts.part.durand_left_ar.desc: A Durand left arm. Data and power sockets are compatible with most exosuit tools and weapons. Packs a really mean punch as well.
obj.item.mecha_parts.part.durand_left_ar.name: Durand left arm

obj.item.mecha_parts.part.durand_left_le.desc: A Durand left leg. Built particularly sturdy to support the Durand's heavy weight and defensive needs.
obj.item.mecha_parts.part.durand_left_le.name: Durand left leg

obj.item.mecha_parts.part.durand_right_a.desc: A Durand right arm. Data and power sockets are compatible with most exosuit tools and weapons. Packs a really mean punch as well.
obj.item.mecha_parts.part.durand_right_a.name: Durand right arm

obj.item.mecha_parts.part.durand_right_l.desc: A Durand right leg. Built particularly sturdy to support the Durand's heavy weight and defensive needs.
obj.item.mecha_parts.part.durand_right_l.name: Durand right leg

obj.item.mecha_parts.part.durand_torso.desc: A torso part of Durand. Contains power unit, processing core and life support systems within a robust protective frame.
obj.item.mecha_parts.part.durand_torso.name: Durand torso

obj.item.mecha_parts.part.gygax_armor.desc: A set of armor plates designed for the Gygax. Designed to effectively deflect damage with a lightweight construction.
obj.item.mecha_parts.part.gygax_armor.name: Gygax armor plates

obj.item.mecha_parts.part.gygax_head.desc: A Gygax head. Houses advanced surveillance and targeting sensors.
obj.item.mecha_parts.part.gygax_head.name: Gygax head

obj.item.mecha_parts.part.gygax_left_arm.desc: A Gygax left arm. Data and power sockets are compatible with most exosuit tools and weapons.
obj.item.mecha_parts.part.gygax_left_arm.name: Gygax left arm

obj.item.mecha_parts.part.gygax_left_leg.desc: A Gygax left leg. Constructed with advanced servomechanisms and actuators to enable faster speed.
obj.item.mecha_parts.part.gygax_left_leg.name: Gygax left leg

obj.item.mecha_parts.part.gygax_right_ar.desc: A Gygax right arm. Data and power sockets are compatible with most exosuit tools and weapons.
obj.item.mecha_parts.part.gygax_right_ar.name: Gygax right arm

obj.item.mecha_parts.part.gygax_right_le.desc: A Gygax right leg. Constructed with advanced servomechanisms and actuators to enable faster speed.
obj.item.mecha_parts.part.gygax_right_le.name: Gygax right leg

obj.item.mecha_parts.part.gygax_torso.desc: A torso part of Gygax. Contains power unit, processing core and life support systems.
obj.item.mecha_parts.part.gygax_torso.name: Gygax torso

obj.item.mecha_parts.part.honker_head.desc: A H.O.N.K head. Appears to lack a face plate.
obj.item.mecha_parts.part.honker_head.name: H.O.N.K head

obj.item.mecha_parts.part.honker_left_ar.desc: A H.O.N.K left arm. With unique sockets that accept odd weaponry designed by clown scientists.
obj.item.mecha_parts.part.honker_left_ar.name: H.O.N.K left arm

obj.item.mecha_parts.part.honker_left_le.desc: A H.O.N.K left leg. The foot appears just large enough to fully accommodate a clown shoe.
obj.item.mecha_parts.part.honker_left_le.name: H.O.N.K left leg

obj.item.mecha_parts.part.honker_right_a.desc: A H.O.N.K right arm. With unique sockets that accept odd weaponry designed by clown scientists.
obj.item.mecha_parts.part.honker_right_a.name: H.O.N.K right arm

obj.item.mecha_parts.part.honker_right_l.desc: A H.O.N.K right leg. The foot appears just large enough to fully accommodate a clown shoe.
obj.item.mecha_parts.part.honker_right_l.name: H.O.N.K right leg

obj.item.mecha_parts.part.honker_torso.desc: A torso part of H.O.N.K. Contains chuckle unit, bananium core and honk support systems.
obj.item.mecha_parts.part.honker_torso.name: H.O.N.K torso

obj.item.mecha_parts.part.odysseus_head.desc: An Odysseus head. Contains an integrated medical HUD scanner.
obj.item.mecha_parts.part.odysseus_head.name: Odysseus head

obj.item.mecha_parts.part.odysseus_left_.desc: An Odysseus left arm. Data and power sockets are compatible with specialized medical equipment.
obj.item.mecha_parts.part.odysseus_left_.name: Odysseus left arm

obj.item.mecha_parts.part.odysseus_left_.desc: An Odysseus left leg. Contains complex servodrives and balance maintaining systems to maintain stability for critical patients.
obj.item.mecha_parts.part.odysseus_left_.name: Odysseus left leg

obj.item.mecha_parts.part.odysseus_right.desc: An Odysseus right arm. Data and power sockets are compatible with specialized medical equipment.
obj.item.mecha_parts.part.odysseus_right.name: Odysseus right arm

obj.item.mecha_parts.part.odysseus_right.desc: An odysseus right leg. Contains complex servodrives and balance maintaining systems to maintain stability for critical patients.
obj.item.mecha_parts.part.odysseus_right.name: Odysseus right leg

obj.item.mecha_parts.part.odysseus_torso.desc: A torso part of Odysseus. Contains power unit, processing core and life support systems along with an attachment port for a mounted sleeper.
obj.item.mecha_parts.part.odysseus_torso.name: Odysseus torso

obj.item.mecha_parts.part.phazon_armor.desc: Phazon armor plates. They are layered with plasma to protect the pilot from the stress of phasing and have unusual properties.
obj.item.mecha_parts.part.phazon_armor.name: Phazon armor

obj.item.mecha_parts.part.phazon_head.desc: A Phazon head. Its sensors are carefully calibrated to provide vision and data even when the exosuit is phasing.
obj.item.mecha_parts.part.phazon_head.name: Phazon head

obj.item.mecha_parts.part.phazon_left_ar.desc: A Phazon left arm. Several microtool arrays are located under the armor plating, which can be adjusted to the situation at hand.
obj.item.mecha_parts.part.phazon_left_ar.name: Phazon left arm

obj.item.mecha_parts.part.phazon_left_le.desc: A Phazon left leg. It contains the unique phase drives that allow the exosuit to phase through solid matter when engaged.
obj.item.mecha_parts.part.phazon_left_le.name: Phazon left leg

obj.item.mecha_parts.part.phazon_right_a.desc: A Phazon right arm. Several microtool arrays are located under the armor plating, which can be adjusted to the situation at hand.
obj.item.mecha_parts.part.phazon_right_a.name: Phazon right arm

obj.item.mecha_parts.part.phazon_right_l.desc: A Phazon right leg. It contains the unique phase drives that allow the exosuit to phase through solid matter when engaged.
obj.item.mecha_parts.part.phazon_right_l.name: Phazon right leg

obj.item.mecha_parts.part.phazon_torso.desc: A Phazon torso part. The socket for the ectoplasmic core that powers the exosuit's unique phase drives is located in the middle.
obj.item.mecha_parts.part.phazon_torso.name: Phazon torso

obj.item.mecha_parts.part.ripley_left_ar.desc: A Ripley APLU left arm. Data and power sockets are compatible with most exosuit tools.
obj.item.mecha_parts.part.ripley_left_ar.name: Ripley left arm

obj.item.mecha_parts.part.ripley_left_le.desc: A Ripley APLU left leg. Contains somewhat complex servodrives and balance maintaining systems.
obj.item.mecha_parts.part.ripley_left_le.name: Ripley left leg

obj.item.mecha_parts.part.ripley_right_a.desc: A Ripley APLU right arm. Data and power sockets are compatible with most exosuit tools.
obj.item.mecha_parts.part.ripley_right_a.name: Ripley right arm

obj.item.mecha_parts.part.ripley_right_l.desc: A Ripley APLU right leg. Contains somewhat complex servodrives and balance maintaining systems.
obj.item.mecha_parts.part.ripley_right_l.name: Ripley right leg

obj.item.mecha_parts.part.ripley_torso.desc: A torso part of Ripley APLU. Contains power unit, processing core and life support systems.
obj.item.mecha_parts.part.ripley_torso.name: Ripley torso

obj.item.mecha_parts.part.savannah_ivano.desc: Savannah-Ivanov armor plates. They are uniquely shaped and reinforced to deal with the stresses of two pilots, grandiose leaps, and missiles.
obj.item.mecha_parts.part.savannah_ivano.name: Savannah-Ivanov armor

obj.item.mecha_parts.part.savannah_ivano.desc: A Savannah-Ivanov head. It's sensors have been adjusted to support graceful landings.
obj.item.mecha_parts.part.savannah_ivano.name: Savannah-Ivanov head

obj.item.mecha_parts.part.savannah_ivano.desc: A Savannah-Ivanov left arm. Hidden rocket fabrication included in the wrists.
obj.item.mecha_parts.part.savannah_ivano.name: Savannah-Ivanov left arm

obj.item.mecha_parts.part.savannah_ivano.desc: A Savannah-Ivanov left leg. In production they were designed to carry more than two passengers, so the leaping functionality was added as to not waste potential.
obj.item.mecha_parts.part.savannah_ivano.name: Savannah-Ivanov left leg

obj.item.mecha_parts.part.savannah_ivano.desc: A Savannah-Ivanov left arm. Hidden rocket fabrication included in the wrists.
obj.item.mecha_parts.part.savannah_ivano.name: Savannah-Ivanov right arm

obj.item.mecha_parts.part.savannah_ivano.desc: A Savannah-Ivanov left leg. In production they were designed to carry more than two passengers, so the leaping functionality was added as to not waste potential.
obj.item.mecha_parts.part.savannah_ivano.name: Savannah-Ivanov right leg

obj.item.mecha_parts.part.savannah_ivano.desc: A Savannah-Ivanov torso part. It's missing a huge chunk of space...
obj.item.mecha_parts.part.savannah_ivano.name: Savannah-Ivanov torso

obj.item.megaphone.desc: A device used to project your voice. Loudly.
obj.item.megaphone.name: megaphone

obj.item.megaphone.cargo.desc: A device used to project your voice. Loudly.
obj.item.megaphone.cargo.name: supply megaphone

obj.item.megaphone.command.desc: A device used to project your voice. Loudly.
obj.item.megaphone.command.name: command megaphone

obj.item.megaphone.sec.desc: A device used to project your voice. Loudly.
obj.item.megaphone.sec.name: security megaphone

obj.item.melee.arm_blade.desc: A grotesque blade made out of bone and flesh that cleaves through people as a hot knife through butter.
obj.item.melee.arm_blade.name: arm blade

obj.item.melee.arm_blade.changeling_zomb.desc: A grotesque blade made out of bone and flesh that cleaves through people as a hot knife through butter.
obj.item.melee.arm_blade.changeling_zomb.name: arm blade

obj.item.melee.arm_blade.false.desc: A grotesque mass of flesh that used to be your arm. Although it looks dangerous at first, you can tell it's actually quite dull and useless.
obj.item.melee.arm_blade.false.name: arm blade

obj.item.melee.arm_blade.slime.desc: What remains of the bones in your arm. Incredibly sharp, and painful for both you and your opponents.
obj.item.melee.arm_blade.slime.name: slimy boneblade

obj.item.melee.baseball_bat.desc: There ain't a skull in the league that can withstand a swatter.
obj.item.melee.baseball_bat.name: baseball bat

obj.item.melee.baseball_bat.ablative.desc: This bat is made of highly reflective, highly armored material.
obj.item.melee.baseball_bat.ablative.name: metal baseball bat

obj.item.melee.baseball_bat.homerun.desc: This thing looks dangerous... Dangerously good at baseball, that is.
obj.item.melee.baseball_bat.homerun.name: home run bat

obj.item.melee.baton.desc: A wooden truncheon for beating criminal scum.
obj.item.melee.baton.name: police baton

obj.item.melee.baton.abductor.desc: A quad-mode baton used for incapacitation and restraining of specimens.
obj.item.melee.baton.abductor.name: advanced baton

obj.item.melee.baton.nunchaku.desc: The most common fitness equipment in the entire syndicate, titanium rods weigh strictly 13 pounds
obj.item.melee.baton.nunchaku.name: Syndie Fitness Nunchuks

obj.item.melee.baton.security.desc: The Secure Apprehension Device, as developed by Nanotrasen. Delivers a precise shock to a target's central nervous system to incapacitate them.
obj.item.melee.baton.security.name: stun baton

obj.item.melee.baton.security.boomerang.desc: A device invented in 2486 for the great Space Emu War by the confederacy of Australicus, these high-tech boomerangs also work exceptionally well at stunning crewmembers. Just be careful to catch it when thrown!
obj.item.melee.baton.security.boomerang.name: OZtek Boomerang

obj.item.melee.baton.security.boomerang..desc: A device invented in 2486 for the great Space Emu War by the confederacy of Australicus, these high-tech boomerangs also work exceptionally well at stunning crewmembers. Just be careful to catch it when thrown!
obj.item.melee.baton.security.boomerang..name: OZtek Boomerang

obj.item.melee.baton.security.cattleprod.desc: A prod with a telecrystal on the end. It sparks with a desire for theft and subversion.
obj.item.melee.baton.security.cattleprod.name: snatcherprod

obj.item.melee.baton.security.cattleprod.desc: A prod with a bluespace crystal on the end. The crystal doesn't look too fun to touch.
obj.item.melee.baton.security.cattleprod.name: teleprod

obj.item.melee.baton.security.loaded.desc: The Secure Apprehension Device, as developed by Nanotrasen. Delivers a precise shock to a target's central nervous system to incapacitate them.
obj.item.melee.baton.security.loaded.name: stun baton

obj.item.melee.baton.security.loaded.dep.desc: A stun baton fitted with a departmental area-lock, based off the station's blueprint layout - outside of its department, it only has three uses.
obj.item.melee.baton.security.loaded.dep.name: departmental stun baton

obj.item.melee.baton.security.loaded.dep.desc: A stun baton that doesn't operate outside of the Cargo department, based off the station's blueprint layout. Can be used outside of Cargo up to three times before needing to return!
obj.item.melee.baton.security.loaded.dep.name: cargo stun baton

obj.item.melee.baton.security.loaded.dep.desc: A stun baton that doesn't operate outside of the Engineering department, based off the station's blueprint layout. Can be used outside of Engineering up to three times before needing to return!
obj.item.melee.baton.security.loaded.dep.name: engineering stun baton

obj.item.melee.baton.security.loaded.dep.desc: A stun baton that doesn't operate outside of the Medical department, based off the station's blueprint layout. Can be used outside of Medical up to three times before needing to return!
obj.item.melee.baton.security.loaded.dep.name: medical stun baton

obj.item.melee.baton.security.loaded.dep.desc: A stun baton that doesn't operate outside of the Prison, based off the station's blueprint layout. Can be used outside of the Prison up to three times before needing to return!
obj.item.melee.baton.security.loaded.dep.name: prison stun baton

obj.item.melee.baton.security.loaded.dep.desc: A stun baton that doesn't operate outside of the Science department, based off the station's blueprint layout. Can be used outside of Science up to three times before needing to return!
obj.item.melee.baton.security.loaded.dep.name: science stun baton

obj.item.melee.baton.security.loaded.dep.desc: A stun baton that doesn't operate outside of the Service department, based off the station's blueprint layout. Can be used outside of Service up to three times before needing to return!
obj.item.melee.baton.security.loaded.dep.name: service stun baton

obj.item.melee.baton.security.loaded.hos.desc: The Secure Apprehension Device, as developed by Nanotrasen. Delivers a precise shock to a target's central nervous system to incapacitate them.
obj.item.melee.baton.security.loaded.hos.name: stun baton

obj.item.melee.baton.security.stunsword.desc: It's a sword. It stuns. What more could you want?
obj.item.melee.baton.security.stunsword.name: NT-20 'Excalibur' Stunsword

obj.item.melee.baton.security.stunsword..desc: It's a sword. It stuns. What more could you want?
obj.item.melee.baton.security.stunsword..name: NT-20 'Excalibur' Stunsword

obj.item.melee.baton.telescopic.desc: A compact yet robust personal defense weapon. Can be concealed when folded.
obj.item.melee.baton.telescopic.name: telescopic baton

obj.item.melee.baton.telescopic.bronze.desc: A compact yet robust personal defense weapon. Can be concealed when folded. This one is ranked BRONZE, and thus has mediocre penetrative power.
obj.item.melee.baton.telescopic.bronze.name: bronze-capped telescopic baton

obj.item.melee.baton.telescopic.contract.desc: A high tech telescopic stun baton, as developed by Cybersun Industries. Delivers a precise shock to a target's central nervous system to incapacitate them.
obj.item.melee.baton.telescopic.contract.name: contractor baton

obj.item.melee.baton.telescopic.contract.desc: A compact, specialised baton assigned to Syndicate contractors. Applies light electrical shocks to targets. This one seems to have unremovable parts.
obj.item.melee.baton.telescopic.contract.name: contractor baton

obj.item.melee.baton.telescopic.gold.desc: A compact yet robust personal defense weapon. Can be concealed when folded. This one is ranked GOLD, and thus has exceptional penetrative power.
obj.item.melee.baton.telescopic.gold.name: gold-capped telescopic baton

obj.item.melee.baton.telescopic.silver.desc: A compact yet robust personal defense weapon. Can be concealed when folded. This one is ranked SILVER, and thus has decent penetrative power.
obj.item.melee.baton.telescopic.silver.name: silver-capped telescopic baton

obj.item.melee.beesword.desc: Taken from a giant bee and folded over one thousand times in pure honey. Can sting through anything.
obj.item.melee.beesword.name: The Stinger

obj.item.melee.blood_magic.desc: A sinister looking aura that distorts the flow of reality around it.
obj.item.melee.blood_magic.name: magical aura

obj.item.melee.blood_magic.armor.desc: Will equip cult combat gear onto a cultist on contact.
obj.item.melee.blood_magic.armor.name: Arming Aura

obj.item.melee.blood_magic.construction.desc: Corrupts certain metallic objects on contact.
obj.item.melee.blood_magic.construction.name: Twisting Aura

obj.item.melee.blood_magic.manipulator.desc: Absorbs blood from anything you touch. Touching cultists and constructs can heal them. Use in-hand to cast an advanced rite.
obj.item.melee.blood_magic.manipulator.name: Blood Rite Aura

obj.item.melee.blood_magic.shackles.desc: Will start handcuffing a victim on contact, and mute them if successful.
obj.item.melee.blood_magic.shackles.name: Shackling Aura

obj.item.melee.blood_magic.stun.desc: Will stun and mute a weak-minded victim on contact.
obj.item.melee.blood_magic.stun.name: Stunning Aura

obj.item.melee.blood_magic.teleport.desc: Will teleport a cultist to a teleport rune on contact.
obj.item.melee.blood_magic.teleport.name: Teleporting Aura

obj.item.melee.breaching_hammer.desc: A metallic-plastic composite breaching hammer, looks like a whack with this would severly harm or tire someone.
obj.item.melee.breaching_hammer.name: D-4 tactical hammer

obj.item.melee.chainofcommand.desc: A tool used by great men to placate the frothing masses. Can be used to hasten allies with right-click.
obj.item.melee.chainofcommand.name: chain of command

obj.item.melee.chainofcommand.tailwhip.desc: A whip fashioned from the severed tails of lizards.
obj.item.melee.chainofcommand.tailwhip.name: liz o' nine tails

obj.item.melee.chainofcommand.tailwhip.k.desc: A whip fashioned from the severed tails of cats.
obj.item.melee.chainofcommand.tailwhip.k.name: cat o' nine tails

obj.item.melee.cleaving_saw.desc: This saw, effective at drawing the blood of beasts, transforms into a long cleaver that makes use of centrifugal force.
obj.item.melee.cleaving_saw.name: cleaving saw

obj.item.melee.cleaving_saw.miner.desc: This saw, effective at drawing the blood of beasts, transforms into a long cleaver that makes use of centrifugal force.
obj.item.melee.cleaving_saw.miner.name: cleaving saw

obj.item.melee.cleric_mace.desc: The grandson of the club, yet the grandfather of the baseball bat. Most notably used by holy orders in days past.
obj.item.melee.cleric_mace.name: cleric mace

obj.item.melee.cultblade.desc: A sword humming with unholy energy. It glows with a dim red light.
obj.item.melee.cultblade.name: eldritch longsword

obj.item.melee.cultblade.dagger.desc: A strange dagger said to be used by sinister groups for "preparing" a corpse before sacrificing it to their dark gods.
obj.item.melee.cultblade.dagger.name: ritual dagger

obj.item.melee.cultblade.ghost.desc: A sword humming with unholy energy. It glows with a dim red light.
obj.item.melee.cultblade.ghost.name: eldritch sword

obj.item.melee.cultblade.halberd.desc: A halberd with a volatile axehead made from crystallized blood. It seems linked to its creator. And, admittedly, more of a poleaxe than a halberd.
obj.item.melee.cultblade.halberd.name: bloody halberd

obj.item.melee.cultblade.haunted.desc: An eerie sword with a blade that is less 'black' than it is 'absolute nothingness'. It glows with furious, restrained green energy.
obj.item.melee.cultblade.haunted.name: haunted longsword

obj.item.melee.curator_whip.desc: Somewhat eccentric and outdated, it still stings like hell to be hit by.
obj.item.melee.curator_whip.name: curator's whip

obj.item.melee.energy.blade.desc: A concentrated beam of energy in the shape of a blade. Very stylish... and lethal.
obj.item.melee.energy.blade.name: energy blade

obj.item.melee.energy.blade.hardlight.desc: An extremely sharp blade made out of hard light. Packs quite a punch.
obj.item.melee.energy.blade.hardlight.name: hardlight blade

obj.item.melee.energy.sword.desc: May the force be within you.
obj.item.melee.energy.sword.name: energy sword

obj.item.melee.energy.sword.bananium.desc: May the force be within you.
obj.item.melee.energy.sword.bananium.name: bananium sword

obj.item.melee.energy.sword.cyborg.desc: May the force be within you.
obj.item.melee.energy.sword.cyborg.name: cyborg energy sword

obj.item.melee.energy.sword.cyborg.saw.desc: For heavy duty cutting. It has a carbon-fiber blade in addition to a toggleable hard-light edge to dramatically increase sharpness.
obj.item.melee.energy.sword.cyborg.saw.name: energy saw

obj.item.melee.energy.sword.holographic.desc: May the force be with you. Sorta.
obj.item.melee.energy.sword.holographic.name: holographic energy sword

obj.item.melee.energy.sword.holographic..desc: May the force be with you. Sorta.
obj.item.melee.energy.sword.holographic..name: holographic energy sword

obj.item.melee.energy.sword.holographic..desc: May the force be with you. Sorta.
obj.item.melee.energy.sword.holographic..name: holographic energy sword

obj.item.melee.energy.sword.nullrod.desc: If you strike me down, I shall become more robust than you can possibly imagine.
obj.item.melee.energy.sword.nullrod.name: light energy sword

obj.item.melee.energy.sword.nullrod.pira.desc: Convincing HR that your religion involved piracy was no mean feat.
obj.item.melee.energy.sword.nullrod.pira.name: nautical energy cutlass

obj.item.melee.energy.sword.nullrod.red.desc: Woefully ineffective when used on steep terrain.
obj.item.melee.energy.sword.nullrod.red.name: dark energy sword

obj.item.melee.energy.sword.saber.desc: May the force be within you.
obj.item.melee.energy.sword.saber.name: energy sword

obj.item.melee.energy.sword.saber.blue.desc: May the force be within you.
obj.item.melee.energy.sword.saber.blue.name: energy sword

obj.item.melee.energy.sword.saber.green.desc: May the force be within you.
obj.item.melee.energy.sword.saber.green.name: energy sword

obj.item.melee.energy.sword.saber.purple.desc: May the force be within you.
obj.item.melee.energy.sword.saber.purple.name: energy sword

obj.item.melee.energy.sword.saber.red.desc: May the force be within you.
obj.item.melee.energy.sword.saber.red.name: energy sword

obj.item.melee.energy.sword.surplus.desc: Oversized, overengineered, and somehow still mass-produced. The twin energy blades, theoretically, help make up for the poor cutting plane the emitter generates. 		When there are no more heroes in a desperate struggle, it's kill or be killed.
obj.item.melee.energy.sword.surplus.name: Pattern I 'Iaito' energy sword

obj.item.melee.fakebeesword.desc: A cheap replica of The Stinger. It isn't nearly as powerful, no wonder it's wielder died.
obj.item.melee.fakebeesword.name: The Stinger

obj.item.melee.flyswatter.desc: Useful for killing pests of all sizes.
obj.item.melee.flyswatter.name: flyswatter

obj.item.melee.ghost_sword.desc: A rusted and dulled blade. It doesn't look like it'd do much damage. It glows weakly.
obj.item.melee.ghost_sword.name: spectral blade

obj.item.melee.implantarmblade.desc: A long, sharp, mantis-like blade implanted into someones arm. Cleaves through flesh like its particularly strong butter.
obj.item.melee.implantarmblade.name: implanted arm blade

obj.item.melee.implantarmblade.energy.desc: A long mantis-like blade made entirely of blazing-hot energy. Stylish and EXTRA deadly!
obj.item.melee.implantarmblade.energy.name: energy arm blade

obj.item.melee.macahuitl.desc: A weapon that looks like it will leave really bad marks.
obj.item.melee.macahuitl.name: ash macahuitl

obj.item.melee.moonlight_greatsword.desc: Don't tell anyone you put any points into dex, though.
obj.item.melee.moonlight_greatsword.name: moonlight greatsword

obj.item.melee.parsnip_sabre.desc: A weird, yet elegant weapon. Surprisingly sharp for something made from a parsnip.
obj.item.melee.parsnip_sabre.name: parsnip sabre

obj.item.melee.powerfist.desc: A metal gauntlet with a piston-powered ram on top for that extra 'oomph' in your punch.
obj.item.melee.powerfist.name: power-fist

obj.item.melee.roastingstick.desc: A telescopic roasting stick with a miniature shield generator designed to ensure entry into various high-tech shielded cooking ovens and firepits.
obj.item.melee.roastingstick.name: advanced roasting stick

obj.item.melee.rune_carver.desc: A small knife made of cold steel, pure and perfect. Its sharpness can carve into titanium itself - 		but only few can evoke the dangers that lurk beneath reality.
obj.item.melee.rune_carver.name: carving knife

obj.item.melee.sabre.desc: An elegant weapon, its monomolecular edge is capable of cutting through flesh and bone with ease.
obj.item.melee.sabre.name: officer's sabre

obj.item.melee.sabre.cargo.desc: An expertly crafted historical human sword once used by the Persians which has recently gained traction due to Venusian historal recreation sports. One small flaw, the Taj-based company who produces these has mistaken them for British cavalry sabres akin to those used by high ranking Nanotrasen officials. Atleast it cuts the same way!
obj.item.melee.sabre.cargo.name: authentic shamshir sabre

obj.item.melee.sabre.luna.desc: Forged by a madwoman, in recognition of a time, a place - she thought almost real. Various etchings of moons are inscribed onto the surface, different phases marking different parts of the blade.
obj.item.melee.sabre.luna.name: Luna

obj.item.melee.sickly_blade.desc: A sickly green crescent blade, decorated with an ornamental eye. You feel like you're being watched...
obj.item.melee.sickly_blade.name: sickly blade

obj.item.melee.sickly_blade.ash.desc: Molten and unwrought, a hunk of metal warped to cinders and slag. 		Unmade, it aspires to be more than it is, and shears soot-filled wounds with a blunt edge.
obj.item.melee.sickly_blade.ash.name: ashen blade

obj.item.melee.sickly_blade.cosmic.desc: A mote of celestial resonance, shaped into a star-woven blade. 		An iridescent exile, carving radiant trails, desperately seeking unification.
obj.item.melee.sickly_blade.cosmic.name: cosmic blade

obj.item.melee.sickly_blade.cursed.desc: A dark blade, cursed to bleed forever. In constant struggle between the eldritch and the dark, it is forced to accept any wielder as its master. 		Its eye's cornea drips blood endlessly into the ground, yet its piercing gaze remains on you.
obj.item.melee.sickly_blade.cursed.name: cursed blade

obj.item.melee.sickly_blade.dark.desc: A galliant blade, sundered and torn. 		Furiously, the blade cuts. Silver scars bind it forever to its dark purpose.
obj.item.melee.sickly_blade.dark.name: sundered blade

obj.item.melee.sickly_blade.flesh.desc: A crescent blade born from a fleshwarped creature. 		Keenly aware, it seeks to spread to others the suffering it has endured from its dreadful origins.
obj.item.melee.sickly_blade.flesh.name: bloody blade

obj.item.melee.sickly_blade.lock.desc: A blade and a key, a key to what? 		What grand gates does it open?
obj.item.melee.sickly_blade.lock.name: key blade

obj.item.melee.sickly_blade.moon.desc: A blade of iron, reflecting the truth of the earth: All join the troupe one day. 		A troupe bringing joy, carving smiles on their faces if they want one or not.
obj.item.melee.sickly_blade.moon.name: moon blade

obj.item.melee.sickly_blade.rust.desc: This crescent blade is decrepit, wasting to rust. 		Yet still it bites, ripping flesh and bone with jagged, rotten teeth.
obj.item.melee.sickly_blade.rust.name: rusted blade

obj.item.melee.sickly_blade.training.desc: A blade given to those who cannot accept the truth, out of pity. 		May it act as a blessing in the short time it remains alongside you.
obj.item.melee.sickly_blade.training.name: imperfect blade

obj.item.melee.sickly_blade.void.desc: Devoid of any substance, this blade reflects nothingness. 		It is a real depiction of purity, and chaos that ensues after its implementation.
obj.item.melee.sickly_blade.void.name: void blade

obj.item.melee.skateboard.desc: A skateboard. It can be placed on its wheels and ridden, or used as a radical weapon.
obj.item.melee.skateboard.name: skateboard

obj.item.melee.skateboard.holyboard.desc: A board blessed by the gods with the power to grind for our sins. Has the initials 'J.C.' on the underside.
obj.item.melee.skateboard.holyboard.name: holy skateboard

obj.item.melee.skateboard.hoverboard.desc: A blast from the past, so retro!
obj.item.melee.skateboard.hoverboard.name: hoverboard

obj.item.melee.skateboard.hoverboard.adm.desc: The engineering complexity of a spaceship concentrated inside of a board. Just as expensive, too.
obj.item.melee.skateboard.hoverboard.adm.name: Board Of Directors

obj.item.melee.skateboard.improvised.desc: A jury-rigged skateboard. It can be placed on its wheels and ridden, or used as a radical weapon.
obj.item.melee.skateboard.improvised.name: improvised skateboard

obj.item.melee.skateboard.pro.desc: An EightO brand professional skateboard. It looks sturdy and well made.
obj.item.melee.skateboard.pro.name: skateboard

obj.item.melee.supermatter_sword.desc: In a station full of bad ideas, this might just be the worst.
obj.item.melee.supermatter_sword.name: supermatter sword

obj.item.melee.synthetic_arm_blade.desc: A grotesque blade that on closer inspection seems to be made out of synthetic flesh, it still feels like it would hurt very badly as a weapon.
obj.item.melee.synthetic_arm_blade.name: synthetic arm blade

obj.item.melee.tomahawk.desc: A somewhat dulled axe blade upon a short fibremetal handle.
obj.item.melee.tomahawk.name: expeditionary tomahawk

obj.item.melee.touch_attack.duffelbag.desc: Where is the bar from here?
obj.item.melee.touch_attack.duffelbag.name: burdening touch

obj.item.melee.touch_attack.flesh_to_sto.desc: That's the bottom line, because flesh to stone said so!
obj.item.melee.touch_attack.flesh_to_sto.name: petrifying touch

obj.item.melee.touch_attack.lay_on_hands.desc: Unlike in your favorite tabletop games, you sadly can't cast this on yourself, so you can't use that as a Scapegoat.
obj.item.melee.touch_attack.lay_on_hands.name: mending touch

obj.item.melee.touch_attack.mansus_fist.desc: A sinister looking aura that distorts the flow of reality around it. 		Causes knockdown, minor bruises, and major stamina damage. 		It gains additional beneficial effects as you expand your knowledge of the Mansus.
obj.item.melee.touch_attack.mansus_fist.name: Mansus Grasp

obj.item.melee.touch_attack.scream_for_m.desc: Guaranteed to make your victims scream, or your money back!
obj.item.melee.touch_attack.scream_for_m.name: bloody touch

obj.item.melee.touch_attack.shock.desc: This is kind of like when you rub your feet on a shag rug so you can zap your friends, only a lot less safe.
obj.item.melee.touch_attack.shock.name: shock touch

obj.item.melee.touch_attack.smite.desc: This hand of mine glows with an awesome power!
obj.item.melee.touch_attack.smite.name: smiting touch

obj.item.melee.touch_attack.star_touch.desc: A sinister looking aura that distorts the flow of reality around it. 		Causes people with a star mark to sleep for 4 seconds, and causes people without a star mark to get one.
obj.item.melee.touch_attack.star_touch.name: Star Touch

obj.item.mending_globule.desc: It somehow heals those who touch it.
obj.item.mending_globule.name: mending globule

obj.item.mending_globule.hardlight.desc: A ball of regenerative synthetic plant matter, contained within a soft hardlight field.
obj.item.mending_globule.hardlight.name: salve globule

obj.item.mind_controller.desc: A small remote for sending basic emotion patterns to a collar.
obj.item.mind_controller.name: mind controller

obj.item.mine_bot_upgrade.regnerative_sh.desc: Allows your minebot to tank many hits before going down!
obj.item.mine_bot_upgrade.regnerative_sh.name: regenerative shield

obj.item.minespawner.desc: When activated, will deploy an Asset Protection landmine after 3 seconds passes, perfect for high ranking NT officers looking to cover their assets from afar.
obj.item.minespawner.name: landmine deployment device

obj.item.minespawner.ancient_milsim.desc: When activated, will deploy a low-yield explosive landmine after 1.5 second passes, perfect for setting traps in tight corridors.
obj.item.minespawner.ancient_milsim.name: deactivated low-yield landmine

obj.item.minespawner.explosive.desc: When activated, will deploy into a highly explosive mine after 3 seconds passes, perfect for lazy militarymen looking to cover their fortifications with no effort.
obj.item.minespawner.explosive.name: deactivated explosive landmine

obj.item.minespawner.explosive.nri.desc: When activated, will deploy into a highly explosive mine after 3 seconds passes, perfect for lazy militarymen looking to cover their fortifications with no effort.
obj.item.minespawner.explosive.nri.name: deactivated explosive landmine

obj.item.minigunpack.desc: The massive external power source for the laser gatling gun.
obj.item.minigunpack.name: backpack power source

obj.item.mining_scanner.desc: A scanner that checks surrounding rock for useful minerals; it can also be used to stop gibtonite detonations.
obj.item.mining_scanner.name: manual mining scanner

obj.item.mining_scanner.admin.desc: A scanner that checks surrounding rock for useful minerals; it can also be used to stop gibtonite detonations.
obj.item.mining_scanner.admin.name: manual mining scanner

obj.item.mining_stabilizer.desc: Inject certain types of monster organs with this stabilizer to prevent their rapid decay.
obj.item.mining_stabilizer.name: stabilizing serum

obj.item.mining_voucher.desc: A token to redeem a piece of equipment. Use it on a mining equipment vendor.
obj.item.mining_voucher.name: mining voucher

obj.item.miningsuitupgradekit.desc: A kit containing necessary parts to turn your hat and jacket of your choice into a mining suit. Note: Uncovered limbs will remain unprotected
obj.item.miningsuitupgradekit.name: DIY explorer suit kit

obj.item.mjollnir.desc: A weapon worthy of a god, able to strike with the force of a lightning bolt. It crackles with barely contained energy.
obj.item.mjollnir.name: Mjollnir

obj.item.mmi.desc: The Warrior's bland acronym, MMI, obscures the true horror of this monstrosity, that nevertheless has become standard-issue on Nanotrasen stations.
obj.item.mmi.name: Man-Machine Interface

obj.item.mmi.posibrain.desc: A cube of shining metal, four inches to a side and covered in shallow grooves.
obj.item.mmi.posibrain.name: positronic brain

obj.item.mmi.posibrain.circuit.desc: A compact circuit, perfectly dimensioned to fit in the same slot as a cyborg's positronic brain.
obj.item.mmi.posibrain.circuit.name: compact AI circuit

obj.item.mmi.posibrain.display.desc: A small positronic brain that doesn't allow the downloading of personalities.
obj.item.mmi.posibrain.display.name: display positronic brain

obj.item.mmi.posibrain.sphere.desc: Recent developments on cost-cutting measures have allowed us to cut positronic brain cubes into twice-as-cheap spheres. 	Unfortunately, it also allows them to move around the lab via rolling maneuvers.
obj.item.mmi.posibrain.sphere.name: positronic sphere

obj.item.mmi.syndie.desc: Syndicate's own brand of MMI. It enforces laws designed to help Syndicate agents achieve their goals upon cyborgs and AIs created with it.
obj.item.mmi.syndie.name: Syndicate Man-Machine Interface

obj.item.mob_holder.pet.donator.centrals.desc: Central's beloved pet mothroach, Mr. Fluff. He looks so happy to be here!
obj.item.mob_holder.pet.donator.centrals.name: Mr. Fluff

obj.item.mod.desc: You should not see this, yell at a coder!
obj.item.mod.name: Base MOD

obj.item.mod.ai_minicard.desc: A small card designed to eject dead AIs. You could use an intellicard to recover it.
obj.item.mod.ai_minicard.name: AI mini-card

obj.item.mod.construction.desc: A part used in MOD construction.
obj.item.mod.construction.name: Base MOD

obj.item.mod.construction.boots.desc: A part used in MOD construction.
obj.item.mod.construction.boots.name: MOD boots

obj.item.mod.construction.broken_core.desc: An internal power source for a Modular Outerwear Device. You don't seem to be able to source any power from this one, though.
obj.item.mod.construction.broken_core.name: broken MOD core

obj.item.mod.construction.chestplate.desc: A part used in MOD construction.
obj.item.mod.construction.chestplate.name: MOD chestplate

obj.item.mod.construction.gauntlets.desc: A part used in MOD construction.
obj.item.mod.construction.gauntlets.name: MOD gauntlets

obj.item.mod.construction.helmet.desc: A part used in MOD construction.
obj.item.mod.construction.helmet.name: MOD helmet

obj.item.mod.construction.lavalandcore.desc: A strange flower from the desolate wastes of lavaland. It pulses with a bright purple glow.  		Its shape is remarkably similar to that of a MOD core.
obj.item.mod.construction.lavalandcore.name: plasma flower

obj.item.mod.construction.plating.name: MOD external plating

obj.item.mod.control.name: MOD control unit
