obj.item.mod.core.desc: A non-functional MOD core. Inform the admins if you see this.
obj.item.mod.core.name: MOD core

obj.item.mod.core.ethereal.desc: A reverse engineered core of a Modular Outerwear Device. Using natural liquid electricity from Ethereals, 		preventing the need to use external sources to convert electric charge. As the suits are naturally charged by 		liquid electricity, this core makes it much more efficient, running all soft, hard, and wetware with several 		times less energy usage.
obj.item.mod.core.ethereal.name: MOD ethereal core

obj.item.mod.core.infinite.desc: A fusion core using the rare Fixium to sustain enough energy for the lifetime of the MOD's user. 		This might be because of the slowly killing poison inside, but those are just rumors.
obj.item.mod.core.infinite.name: MOD infinite core

obj.item.mod.core.plasma.desc: Nanotrasen's attempt at capitalizing on their plasma research. These plasma cores are refueled 		through plasma fuel, allowing for easy continued use by their mining squads.
obj.item.mod.core.plasma.name: MOD plasma core

obj.item.mod.core.plasma.lavaland.desc: A strange flower from the desolate wastes of lavaland. It pulses with a strange purple glow.  		The wires coming out of it could be hooked into a MODsuit.
obj.item.mod.core.plasma.lavaland.name: MOD plasma flower core

obj.item.mod.core.protean.desc: If you see this, go scream at a coder and tell them how you managed to do this.
obj.item.mod.core.protean.name: MOD protean core

obj.item.mod.core.soul.desc: A soul shard haphazardly jammed into a hand-crafted MOD core frame.
obj.item.mod.core.soul.name: MOD soul shard core

obj.item.mod.core.soul.wizard.desc: A soul shard haphazardly jammed into a hand-crafted MOD core frame.
obj.item.mod.core.soul.wizard.name: MOD soul shard core

obj.item.mod.core.standard.desc:
Growing in the most lush, fertile areas of the planet Sprout, there is a crystal known as the Heartbloom. 		These rare, organic piezoelectric crystals are of incredible cultural significance to the artist castes of the 		Ethereals, owing to their appearance; which is exactly similar to that of an Ethereal's heart.
		Which one you have in your suit is unclear, but either way, 		it's been repurposed to be an internal power source for a Modular Outerwear Device.
obj.item.mod.core.standard.name: MOD standard core

obj.item.mod.module.desc: You should not see this, yell at a coder!
obj.item.mod.module.name: MOD module

obj.item.mod.module.active_sonar.desc: Ancient tech from the 20th century, this module uses sonic waves to detect living creatures within the user's radius. 		Its basic function slowly scans around the user for any bio-signatures, however it can be overclocked to scan everywhere at once.		Its loud ping is much harder to hide in an indoor station than in the outdoor operations it was designed for.
obj.item.mod.module.active_sonar.name: MOD active sonar

obj.item.mod.module.adrenaline_boost.desc: The secrets of the Spider Clan are many. The exact specifications of their suits, 		the techniques they use to make every singular cut make their enemies weep with admiration, 		but one of their greatest mysteries is the chemical compound their assassin-saboteurs use in times of need. 		It's capable of clearing any fatigue whatsoever from the user, any immobilizing effect, and can even 		cure total paralysis. All that's known is that the fluid requires radiation to properly 'cook,' 		so this module demands radium to be refilled with.
obj.item.mod.module.adrenaline_boost.name: MOD adrenaline boost module

obj.item.mod.module.anomaly_locked.desc: A form of a module, locked behind an anomalous core to function.
obj.item.mod.module.anomaly_locked.name: MOD anomaly locked module

obj.item.mod.module.anomaly_locked.antig.desc: A module that uses a gravitational core to make the user completely weightless.
obj.item.mod.module.anomaly_locked.antig.name: MOD anti-gravity module

obj.item.mod.module.anomaly_locked.antig.desc: A module that uses a gravitational core to make the user completely weightless.
obj.item.mod.module.anomaly_locked.antig.name: MOD anti-gravity module

obj.item.mod.module.anomaly_locked.antig.desc: A module that uses a gravitational core to make the user completely weightless.
obj.item.mod.module.anomaly_locked.antig.name: MOD anti-gravity module

obj.item.mod.module.anomaly_locked.kines.desc: A modular plug-in to the forearm, this module was presumed lost for many years, 		despite the suits it used to be mounted on still seeing some circulation. 		This piece of technology allows the user to generate precise anti-gravity fields, 		letting them move objects as small as a titanium rod to as large as industrial machinery. 		Oddly enough, it doesn't seem to work on living creatures.
obj.item.mod.module.anomaly_locked.kines.name: MOD kinesis module

obj.item.mod.module.anomaly_locked.kines.desc: A modular plug-in to the forearm, this module was recently reredeveloped in super secret. 		This one can force some of the grasped objects to phase through walls. Oh no.
obj.item.mod.module.anomaly_locked.kines.name: MOD kinesis++ module

obj.item.mod.module.anomaly_locked.kines.desc: A modular plug-in to the forearm, this module was recently redeveloped in secret. 		The bane of all ne'er-do-wells, the kinesis+ module is a powerful tool that allows the user 		to manipulate the world around them. Like its older counterpart, it's capable of manipulating 		structures, machinery, vehicles, and, thanks to the fruitful efforts of its creators - living beings.
obj.item.mod.module.anomaly_locked.kines.name: MOD kinesis+ module

obj.item.mod.module.anomaly_locked.kines.desc: A modular plug-in to the forearm, this module was presumed lost for many years, 		despite the suits it used to be mounted on still seeing some circulation. 		This piece of technology allows the user to generate precise anti-gravity fields, 		letting them move objects as small as a titanium rod to as large as industrial machinery. 		Oddly enough, it doesn't seem to work on living creatures.
obj.item.mod.module.anomaly_locked.kines.name: MOD kinesis module

obj.item.mod.module.anomaly_locked.kines.desc: A modular plug-in to the forearm, this module was presumed lost for many years, 		despite the suits it used to be mounted on still seeing some circulation. 		This piece of technology allows the user to generate precise anti-gravity fields, 		letting them move objects as small as a titanium rod to as large as industrial machinery. 		Oddly enough, it doesn't seem to work on living creatures.
obj.item.mod.module.anomaly_locked.kines.name: MOD kinesis module

obj.item.mod.module.anomaly_locked.kines.desc: A modular plug-in to the forearm, this module was presumed lost for many years, 		despite the suits it used to be mounted on still seeing some circulation. 		This piece of technology allows the user to generate precise anti-gravity fields, 		letting them move objects as small as a titanium rod to as large as industrial machinery. 		Oddly enough, it doesn't seem to work on living creatures.
obj.item.mod.module.anomaly_locked.kines.name: MOD prototype kinesis module

obj.item.mod.module.anomaly_locked.telep.desc: A module that uses a bluespace core to let the user transport their particles elsewhere.
obj.item.mod.module.anomaly_locked.telep.name: MOD teleporter module

obj.item.mod.module.anomaly_locked.telep.desc: A module that uses a bluespace core to let the user transport their particles elsewhere.
obj.item.mod.module.anomaly_locked.telep.name: MOD teleporter module

obj.item.mod.module.anomaly_locked.telep.desc: A module that uses a bluespace core to let the user transport their particles elsewhere.
obj.item.mod.module.anomaly_locked.telep.name: MOD teleporter module

obj.item.mod.module.anti_magic.desc: A series of obsidian rods installed into critical points around the suit, 		vibrated at a certain low frequency to enable them to resonate. 		This creates a low-range, yet strong, magic nullification field around the user, 		aided by a full replacement of the suit's normal coolant with holy water. 		Spells will spall right off this field, though it'll do nothing to help others believe you about all this.
obj.item.mod.module.anti_magic.name: MOD magic nullifier module

obj.item.mod.module.anti_magic.wizard.desc: The caster wielding this spell gains an invisible barrier around them, channeling arcane power through 		specialized runes engraved onto the surface of the suit to generate anti-magic field. 		The field will neutralize all magic that comes into contact with the user. 		It will not protect the caster from social ridicule.
obj.item.mod.module.anti_magic.wizard.name: MOD magic neutralizer module

obj.item.mod.module.ash_accretion.desc: A module that collects ash from the terrain, covering the suit in a protective layer, this layer is 		lost when moving across standard terrain.
obj.item.mod.module.ash_accretion.name: MOD ash accretion module

obj.item.mod.module.atrocinator.desc: A mysterious orb that has mysterious effects when inserted in a MODsuit.
obj.item.mod.module.atrocinator.name: MOD atrocinator module

obj.item.mod.module.auto_doc.desc: The reverse-engineered and redesigned medical assistance system, previously used by the now decommissioned VOSKHOD combat armor. 		The technology it uses is very similar to the one of Spider Clan, yet Innovations and Defense Collegium reject any similarities. 		Using a built-in storage of chemical compounds and miniature chemical mixer, it's capable of injecting its user with simple painkillers and coagulants, 		assisting them with their restoration, as long as they don't overdose themselves. However, this system heavily relies on some rarely combat-available chemical compounds to prepare its injections, 		mainly Cryptobiolin, which appear in the user's bloodstream from time to time, and its trivial damage assesment systems are inadequate for complete restoration purposes.
obj.item.mod.module.auto_doc.name: MOD automatic paramedical module

obj.item.mod.module.balloon.desc: A strange module invented years ago by some ingenious mimes. It blows balloons.
obj.item.mod.module.balloon.name: MOD balloon blower module

obj.item.mod.module.balloon.advanced.desc: A relatively new piece of technology developed by finest clown engineers to make long balloons and balloon animals 		at party-appropriate rate.
obj.item.mod.module.balloon.advanced.name: MOD advanced balloon blower module

obj.item.mod.module.baton_holster.desc: A module installed into the chest of a MODSuit, this allows you 		to retrieve an inserted baton from the suit at will. Insert a baton 		by hitting the module, while it is removed from the suit, with the baton.
obj.item.mod.module.baton_holster.name: MOD baton holster module

obj.item.mod.module.baton_holster.preloa.desc: A module installed into the chest of a MODSuit, this allows you 		to retrieve an inserted baton from the suit at will. Insert a baton 		by hitting the module, while it is removed from the suit, with the baton.
obj.item.mod.module.baton_holster.preloa.name: MOD baton holster module

obj.item.mod.module.baton_holster.preloa.desc: A module installed into the chest of a MODSuit, this allows you 		to retrieve an inserted baton from the suit at will. Insert a baton 		by hitting the module, while it is removed from the suit, with the baton.
obj.item.mod.module.baton_holster.preloa.name: MOD baton holster module

obj.item.mod.module.bikehorn.desc: A shoulder-mounted piece of heavy sonic artillery, this module uses the finest femto-manipulator technology to 		precisely deliver an almost lethal squeeze to... a bike horn, producing a significantly memorable sound.
obj.item.mod.module.bikehorn.name: MOD bike horn module

obj.item.mod.module.chameleon.desc: A module using chameleon technology to disguise the suit as another object.
obj.item.mod.module.chameleon.name: MOD chameleon module

obj.item.mod.module.chameleon.contractor.desc: A module using chameleon technology to disguise the suit as another object.
obj.item.mod.module.chameleon.contractor.name: MOD chameleon module

obj.item.mod.module.circuit.desc: A module shell that allows a circuit to be inserted into, and interface with, a MODsuit.
obj.item.mod.module.circuit.name: MOD circuit adapter module

obj.item.mod.module.clamp.desc: A series of actuators installed into both arms of the suit, boasting a lifting capacity of almost a ton. 		However, this design has been locked by Nanotrasen to be primarily utilized for lifting various crates. 		A lot of people would say that loading cargo is a dull job, but you could not disagree more.
obj.item.mod.module.clamp.name: MOD hydraulic clamp module

obj.item.mod.module.clamp.loader.desc: A series of actuators installed into both arms of the suit, boasting a lifting capacity of almost a ton. 		However, this design has been locked by Nanotrasen to be primarily utilized for lifting various crates. 		A lot of people would say that loading cargo is a dull job, but you could not disagree more.
obj.item.mod.module.clamp.loader.name: MOD loader hydraulic clamp module

obj.item.mod.module.constructor.desc: This module entirely occupies the wearer's forearm, notably causing conflict with 		advanced arm servos meant to carry crewmembers. However, it functions as an 		extremely advanced construction hologram scanner, as well as containing the 		latest engineering schematics combined with inbuilt memory to help the user build walls.
obj.item.mod.module.constructor.name: MOD constructor module

obj.item.mod.module.criminalcapture.desc: The private security that had orders to take in people dead were quite 		happy with their space-proofed suit, but for those who wanted to bring back 		whomever their targets were still breathing needed a way to "share" the 		space-proofing. And thus: criminal capture! Creates a hardlight prisoner transport bag 		around the apprehended that has breathable atmospheric conditions.
obj.item.mod.module.criminalcapture.name: MOD criminal capture module

obj.item.mod.module.criminalcapture.pati.desc: A module built into the forearm of the suit. Countless waves of mostly-lost mining teams being sent to 		Indecipheries and other hazardous locations have taught the DeForest Medical Company many lessons. 		Physical bodybags are difficult to store, hard to deploy, and even worse to keep intact in tough scenarios. 		Enter the hardlight transport bag. Summonable with merely a gesture, weightless, and immunized against 		any extreme scenario the wearer could think of, this bag is perfectly designed for 		transport of any body in any environment, any time.
obj.item.mod.module.criminalcapture.pati.name: MOD patient transport module

obj.item.mod.module.defibrillator.desc: A module built into the gauntlets of the suit; commonly known as the 'Healing Hands' by medical professionals. 		The user places their palms above the patient. Onboard computers in the suit calculate the necessary voltage, 		and a modded targeting computer determines the best position for the user to push. 		Twenty five pounds of force are applied to the patient's skin. Shocks travel from the suit's gloves 		and counter-shock the heart, and the wearer returns to Medical a hero. Don't you even think about using it as a weapon; 		regulations on manufacture and software locks expressly forbid it.
obj.item.mod.module.defibrillator.name: MOD defibrillator module

obj.item.mod.module.defibrillator.combat.desc: A module built into the gauntlets of the suit; commonly known as the 'Healing Hands' by medical professionals. 		The user places their palms above the patient. Onboard computers in the suit calculate the necessary voltage, 		and a modded targeting computer determines the best position for the user to push. 		Twenty five pounds of force are applied to the patient's skin. Shocks travel from the suit's gloves 		and counter-shock the heart, and the wearer returns to Medical a hero. 		Interdyne Pharmaceutics marketed the domestic version of the Healing Hands as foolproof and unusable as a weapon. 		But when it came time to provide their operatives with usable medical equipment, they didn't hesitate to remove 		those in-built safeties. Operatives in the field can benefit from what they dub as 'Stun Gloves', able to apply shocks 		straight to a victims heart to disable them, or maybe even outright stop their heart with enough power.
obj.item.mod.module.defibrillator.combat.name: MOD combat defibrillator module

obj.item.mod.module.demoralizer.desc: One incredibly morbid member of the RND team at Roseus Galactic posed a question to her colleagues. 	'I desire the power to scar my enemies mentally as I murder them. Who will stop me implementing this in our next project?' 	And thus the Psi-Echo Demoralizer Device was reluctantly invented. The future of psychological warfare, today!
obj.item.mod.module.demoralizer.name: MOD psi-echo demoralizer module

obj.item.mod.module.dispenser.desc: A rare piece of technology reverse-engineered from a prototype found in a Donk Company vessel. 		This can draw incredible amounts of power from the suit's charge to create edible organic matter in the 		palm of the wearer's glove; however, research seemed to have entirely stopped at burgers. 		Notably, all attempts to get it to dispense Earl Grey tea have failed.
obj.item.mod.module.dispenser.name: MOD burger dispenser module

obj.item.mod.module.dispenser.ancient_mi.desc: A rare piece of technology reverse-engineered from a prototype found in a Donk Company vessel. 		This can draw incredible amounts of power from the suit's charge to create edible organic matter in the 		palm of the wearer's glove; however, research seemed to have entirely stopped at burgers. 		Notably, all attempts to get it to dispense Earl Grey tea have failed.
obj.item.mod.module.dispenser.ancient_mi.name: MOD burger dispenser module

obj.item.mod.module.dispenser.ancient_mi.desc: This module can create a box of barricades and additional throwing knives at the user's liking.
obj.item.mod.module.dispenser.ancient_mi.name: MOD barricade box-throwing knives dispenser module

obj.item.mod.module.dispenser.ancient_mi.desc: This module can create set of advanced tools and additional cable coils at the user's liking.
obj.item.mod.module.dispenser.ancient_mi.name: MOD alien tools-cable dispenser module

obj.item.mod.module.dispenser.ancient_mi.desc: This module can create a single combat hypospray and additional cartridges at the user's liking.
obj.item.mod.module.dispenser.ancient_mi.name: MOD custom hypospray-hypospray vials dispenser module

obj.item.mod.module.dispenser.ancient_mi.desc: This module can create a single disassembled heavy machinegun and additional ammo boxes at the user's liking.
obj.item.mod.module.dispenser.ancient_mi.name: MOD stationary machinegun-machinegun ammo box module

obj.item.mod.module.dispenser.ancient_mi.desc: This module can create a chameleon projector and additional stealth landmines at the user's liking.
obj.item.mod.module.dispenser.ancient_mi.name: MOD chameleon projector-stealth landmines dispenser module

obj.item.mod.module.dispenser.ancient_mi.desc: This module can create a single .40 Sol caliber assault rifle and additional magazines at the user's liking.
obj.item.mod.module.dispenser.ancient_mi.name: MOD Sol rifle-Sol rifle magazine dispenser module

obj.item.mod.module.dispenser.mirage.desc: This module can create mirage grenades at the user's liking. These grenades create holographic copies of the user.
obj.item.mod.module.dispenser.mirage.name: MOD mirage grenade dispenser module

obj.item.mod.module.dispenser.ninja.desc: This piece of Spider Clan technology can exploit known energy-matter equivalence principles, 		using the nanites already hosted in the wearer's suit to transmute into monomolecular shuriken. 		While these lack the intense bleeding edge of conventional throwing stars, 		they have been set to electrify fleeing targets; and branded with the Spider Clan symbol.
obj.item.mod.module.dispenser.ninja.name: MOD ninja star dispenser module

obj.item.mod.module.disposal_connector.desc: A module that connects to the disposal pipeline, causing the user to go into their config selected disposal. 		Only seems to work when the suit is on.
obj.item.mod.module.disposal_connector.name: MOD disposal selector module

obj.item.mod.module.dna_lock.desc: A module which engages with the various locks and seals tied to the suit's systems, 		enabling it to only be worn by someone corresponding with the user's exact DNA profile; 		however, this incredibly sensitive module is shorted out by EMPs. Luckily, cloning has been outlawed.
obj.item.mod.module.dna_lock.name: MOD DNA lock module

obj.item.mod.module.dna_lock.reinforced.desc: A module which engages with the various locks and seals tied to the suit's systems, 		enabling it to only be worn by someone corresponding with the user's exact DNA profile. 		Due to utilizing a skintight dampening shield, this one is entirely sealed against electromagnetic interference; 		it also dutifully protects the secrets of the Spider Clan from unknowing outsiders.
obj.item.mod.module.dna_lock.reinforced.name: MOD reinforced DNA lock module

obj.item.mod.module.drill.desc: An arm-mounted drill, typically extending over the user's hand. While useful for drilling through rock, 		your drill is surely the one that both pierces and creates the heavens. Integrates with mining MODs' sphere 		transformation module, changing it from a mere traversal tool to high-powered excavation unit.
obj.item.mod.module.drill.name: MOD drill module

obj.item.mod.module.emp_shield.desc: A field inhibitor installed into the suit, protecting it against feedback such as 		electromagnetic pulses that would otherwise damage the electronic systems of the suit or it's modules. 		However, it will take from the suit's power to do so.
obj.item.mod.module.emp_shield.name: MOD EMP shield module

obj.item.mod.module.emp_shield.advanced.desc: An advanced field inhibitor installed into the suit, protecting it against feedback such as 		electromagnetic pulses that would otherwise damage the electronic systems of the suit or electronic devices on the wearer, 		including augmentations. However, it will take from the suit's power to do so.
obj.item.mod.module.emp_shield.advanced.name: MOD advanced EMP shield module

obj.item.mod.module.emp_shield.pulse.desc: This module is normally set to activate on dramatic gestures, inverting and expanding the suit's 		EMP dampening shield to cause an electromagnetic pulse of its own. While this won't interfere with the wearer, 		it will piss off everyone around them.
obj.item.mod.module.emp_shield.pulse.name: MOD EMP pulse module

obj.item.mod.module.energy_net.desc: A custom-built net-thrower. While conventional implementations of this capturing device 		utilize monomolecular fibers or cutting razorwire, this uses hardlight technology to deploy a 		trapping field capable of immobilizing even the strongest opponents.
obj.item.mod.module.energy_net.name: MOD energy net module

obj.item.mod.module.energy_shield.desc: A personal, protective forcefield typically seen in military applications. 		This advanced deflector shield is essentially a scaled down version of those seen on starships, 		and the power cost can be an easy indicator of this. However, it is capable of blocking nearly any incoming attack, 		but only once every few seconds; a grim reminder of the users mortality.
obj.item.mod.module.energy_shield.name: MOD energy shield module

obj.item.mod.module.energy_shield.protot.desc: An early prototype of energy shield adapted for use inside of a MOD, the energy shield before this saw 	extensive use in now defunct construction, combat, and mining exosuits with exosuits being something between a 	modsuit and a mech with most still functioning exosuits either being in a museaum or a military parade
obj.item.mod.module.energy_shield.protot.name: MOD prototype energy shield

obj.item.mod.module.energy_shield.wizard.desc: The caster wielding this spell gains a visible barrier around them, channeling arcane power through 		specialized runes engraved onto the surface of the suit to generate a wall of force. 		This shield can perfectly nullify attacks ranging from high-caliber rifles to magic missiles, 		though can also be drained by more mundane attacks. It will not protect the caster from social ridicule.
obj.item.mod.module.energy_shield.wizard.name: MOD battlemage shield module

obj.item.mod.module.eradication_lock.desc: A module which remembers the original owner of the suit, even alternate universe 			versions. When a non-owner enters, the eradication lock will begin eradicating the suit 			from the timeline... with the intruder inside. Not the way you want to go, so it turns 			out to be a good deterrent.
obj.item.mod.module.eradication_lock.name: MOD eradication lock module

obj.item.mod.module.fishing_glove.desc: A MOD module that takes in an external fishing rod to enable the user to fish without having to hold one, while also making it slightly easier.
obj.item.mod.module.fishing_glove.name: MOD fishing glove module

obj.item.mod.module.flamethrower.desc: A custom-manufactured flamethrower, used to burn through your path. Burn well.
obj.item.mod.module.flamethrower.name: MOD flamethrower module

obj.item.mod.module.flashlight.desc: A simple pair of configurable flashlights installed on the left and right sides of the helmet, 		useful for providing light in a variety of ranges and colors. 		Some survivalists prefer the color green for their illumination, for reasons unknown.
obj.item.mod.module.flashlight.name: MOD flashlight module

obj.item.mod.module.flashlight.darkness.desc: A quirky pair of configurable flashdarks installed on the sides of the helmet, 		useful for providing darkness at a configurable range.
obj.item.mod.module.flashlight.darkness.name: MOD flashdark module

obj.item.mod.module.gps.desc: This module uses common Nanotrasen technology to calculate the user's position anywhere in space, 		down to the exact coordinates. This information is fed to a central database viewable from the device itself, 		though using it to help people is up to you.
obj.item.mod.module.gps.name: MOD internal GPS module

obj.item.mod.module.hacker.desc: Built for one purpose, electronic warfare, this module is built into the hands. 		Using near-field communication alongside precise electro-stimulation of the wires in machines, 		this decker's dream is normally used to pass through doors like a phantom. 		It's also capable of non-precise electro-stimulation of an assassin-saboteur's opponents on disarming attacks.
obj.item.mod.module.hacker.name: MOD hacker module

obj.item.mod.module.hat_stabilizer.desc: A simple set of deployable stands, directly atop one's head; 		these will deploy under a hat to keep it from falling off, allowing them to be worn atop the sealed helmet. 		You still need to take the hat off your head while the helmet deploys, though. 		This is a must-have for Nanotrasen Captains, enabling them to show off their authoritative hat even while in their MODsuit.
obj.item.mod.module.hat_stabilizer.name: MOD hat stabilizer module

obj.item.mod.module.hat_stabilizer.syndi.desc: A simple set of deployable stands, directly atop one's head; 		these will deploy under a hat to keep it from falling off, allowing them to be worn atop the sealed helmet. 		You still need to take the hat off your head while the helmet deploys, though. This is a must-have for 		Syndicate Operatives and Agents alike, enabling them to continue to style on the opposition even while in their MODsuit.
obj.item.mod.module.hat_stabilizer.syndi.name: MOD elite hat stabilizer module

obj.item.mod.module.headprotector.desc: A series of dampening plates are installed along the back and upper areas of 		the helmet. These plates absorb abrupt kinetic shocks delivered to the skull. 		The bulk of this module prevents it from being installed in any suit that is capable 		of combat armor adjustments. However, the rudimentry nature of the module makes it 		relatively easy to install into most other suits.
obj.item.mod.module.headprotector.name: MOD safety-first head protection module

obj.item.mod.module.health_analyzer.desc: A module installed into the glove of the suit. This is a high-tech biological scanning suite, 		allowing the user indepth information on the vitals and injuries of others even at a distance, 		all with the flick of the wrist. Data is displayed in a convenient package, but it's up to you to do something with it.
obj.item.mod.module.health_analyzer.name: MOD health analyzer module

obj.item.mod.module.holster.desc: Based off typical storage compartments, this system allows the suit to holster a 		standard firearm across its surface and allow for extremely quick retrieval. 		While some users prefer the chest, others the forearm for quick deployment, 		some law enforcement prefer the holster to extend from the thigh.
obj.item.mod.module.holster.name: MOD holster module

obj.item.mod.module.hydraulic.desc: A pair of powerful hydraulic arms installed in a MODsuit.
obj.item.mod.module.hydraulic.name: MOD loader hydraulic arms module

obj.item.mod.module.hypno_visor.desc: A module inserted into the visor of a suit in which commands can be processed.
obj.item.mod.module.hypno_visor.name: MOD hypnotic visor module

obj.item.mod.module.infiltrator.desc: The primary stealth systems operating within the suit. Utilizing electromagnetic signals, 		the wearer simply cannot be observed closely, or heard clearly by those around them.		It also contains some dampening systems to help protect a user from blows to the head.
obj.item.mod.module.infiltrator.name: MOD infiltration core programs module

obj.item.mod.module.injector.desc: A module installed into the wrist of the suit, this functions as a high-capacity syringe, 		with a tip fine enough to locate the emergency injection ports on any suit of armor, 		penetrating it with ease. Even yours.
obj.item.mod.module.injector.name: MOD injector module

obj.item.mod.module.insignia.desc: Despite the existence of IFF systems, radio communique, and modern methods of deductive reasoning involving 		the wearer's own eyes, colorful paint jobs remain a popular way for different factions in the galaxy to display who 		they are. This system utilizes a series of tiny moving paint sprayers to both apply and remove different 		color patterns to and from the suit.
obj.item.mod.module.insignia.name: MOD insignia module

obj.item.mod.module.insignia.chaplain.desc: Despite the existence of IFF systems, radio communique, and modern methods of deductive reasoning involving 		the wearer's own eyes, colorful paint jobs remain a popular way for different factions in the galaxy to display who 		they are. This system utilizes a series of tiny moving paint sprayers to both apply and remove different 		color patterns to and from the suit.
obj.item.mod.module.insignia.chaplain.name: MOD insignia module

obj.item.mod.module.insignia.clown.desc: Despite the existence of IFF systems, radio communique, and modern methods of deductive reasoning involving 		the wearer's own eyes, colorful paint jobs remain a popular way for different factions in the galaxy to display who 		they are. This system utilizes a series of tiny moving paint sprayers to both apply and remove different 		color patterns to and from the suit.
obj.item.mod.module.insignia.clown.name: MOD insignia module

This system utilizes a series of tiny moving paint sprayers to both apply and remove different 		color patterns to and from the suit.
obj.item.mod.module.insignia.commander.name: MOD insignia module

obj.item.mod.module.insignia.milsim_sabo.name: MOD insignia module

obj.item.mod.module.insignia.milsim_sent.name: MOD insignia module

This system utilizes a series of tiny moving paint sprayers to both apply and remove different 		color patterns to and from the suit.
obj.item.mod.module.insignia.milsim_trap.name: MOD insignia module

This system utilizes a series of tiny moving paint sprayers to both apply and remove different 		color patterns to and from the suit.
obj.item.mod.module.insignia.milsim_troo.name: MOD insignia module

obj.item.mod.module.insignia.security.desc: Despite the existence of IFF systems, radio communique, and modern methods of deductive reasoning involving 		the wearer's own eyes, colorful paint jobs remain a popular way for different factions in the galaxy to display who 		they are. This system utilizes a series of tiny moving paint sprayers to both apply and remove different 		color patterns to and from the suit.
obj.item.mod.module.insignia.security.name: MOD insignia module

obj.item.mod.module.insignia.syndie.desc: Despite the existence of IFF systems, radio communique, and modern methods of deductive reasoning involving 		the wearer's own eyes, colorful paint jobs remain a popular way for different factions in the galaxy to display who 		they are. This system utilizes a series of tiny moving paint sprayers to both apply and remove different 		color patterns to and from the suit.
obj.item.mod.module.insignia.syndie.name: MOD insignia module

obj.item.mod.module.jetpack.desc: A series of electric thrusters installed across the suit, this is a module highly anticipated by trainee Engineers. 		Rather than using gasses for combustion thrust, these jets are capable of accelerating ions using 		charge from the suit's charge. Some say this isn't Nakamura Engineering's first foray into jet-enabled suits.
obj.item.mod.module.jetpack.name: MOD ion jetpack module

obj.item.mod.module.jetpack.advanced.desc: An improvement on the previous model of electric thrusters. This one achieves higher precision 		and spartial stability through mounting of more jets and application of red paint.
obj.item.mod.module.jetpack.advanced.name: MOD advanced ion jetpack module

obj.item.mod.module.joint_torsion.desc: A compact, weak AC generator that charges the suit's internal cell through the power of deambulation. It doesn't work in zero G. More than one can be installed.
obj.item.mod.module.joint_torsion.name: MOD joint torsion ratchet module

obj.item.mod.module.joint_torsion.entomb.desc: Your adaptation to life in this MODsuit shell allows you to ambulate in such a way that your movements recharge the suit's internal batteries slightly, but only while under the effect of gravity.
obj.item.mod.module.joint_torsion.entomb.name: internal joint torsion adaptation

obj.item.mod.module.joint_torsion.perman.desc: A compact, weak AC generator that charges the suit's internal cell through the power of deambulation. It doesn't work in zero G. More than one can be installed.
obj.item.mod.module.joint_torsion.perman.name: MOD joint torsion ratchet module

obj.item.mod.module.jump_jet.desc: A specialised ionic thruster which provides a short but powerful boost capable of pushing against gravity, 		after which time it needs to recharge.
obj.item.mod.module.jump_jet.name: MOD ionic jump jet module

obj.item.mod.module.longfall.desc: Useful for protecting both the suit and the wearer, 		utilizing commonplace systems to convert the possible damage from a fall into kinetic charge, 		as well as internal gyroscopes to ensure the user's safe falling. 		Useful for mining, monorail tracks, or even skydiving!
obj.item.mod.module.longfall.name: MOD longfall module

obj.item.mod.module.magboot.desc: These are powerful electromagnets fitted into the suit's boots, allowing users both 		excellent traction no matter the condition indoors, and to essentially hitch a ride on the exterior of a hull. 		However, these basic models do not feature computerized systems to automatically toggle them on and off, 		so numerous users report a certain stickiness to their steps.
obj.item.mod.module.magboot.name: MOD magnetic stability module

obj.item.mod.module.magboot.advanced.desc: These are powerful electromagnets fitted into the suit's boots, allowing users both 		excellent traction no matter the condition indoors, and to essentially hitch a ride on the exterior of a hull. 		However, these basic models do not feature computerized systems to automatically toggle them on and off, 		so numerous users report a certain stickiness to their steps.
obj.item.mod.module.magboot.advanced.name: MOD advanced magnetic stability module

obj.item.mod.module.magnet.desc: A powerful hydraulic electromagnet able to launch crates and lockers towards the user, and keep 'em attached.
obj.item.mod.module.magnet.name: MOD loader hydraulic magnet module

obj.item.mod.module.magnetic_harness.desc: Based off old TerraGov harness kits, this magnetic harness automatically attaches dropped guns back to the wearer.
obj.item.mod.module.magnetic_harness.name: MOD magnetic harness module

obj.item.mod.module.medbeam.desc: A wrist mounted variant of the medbeam gun, allowing the user to heal their allies without the risk of dropping it.
obj.item.mod.module.medbeam.name: MOD medical beamgun module

obj.item.mod.module.megaphone.desc: A microchip megaphone linked to a MODsuit, for very important purposes, like: loudness.
obj.item.mod.module.megaphone.name: MOD megaphone module

obj.item.mod.module.microwave_beam.desc: An oddly domestic device, this module is installed into the user's palm, 		hooking up with culinary scanners located in the helmet to blast food with precise microwave radiation, 		allowing them to cook food from a distance, with the greatest of ease. Not recommended for use against grapes.
obj.item.mod.module.microwave_beam.name: MOD microwave beam module

obj.item.mod.module.mind_swap.desc: Swaps the MOD wearer's and Assistant AI's neural pathways.
obj.item.mod.module.mind_swap.name: MOD Neural Transference module

obj.item.mod.module.mister.desc: A module containing a mister, able to spray it over areas.
obj.item.mod.module.mister.name: MOD water mister module

obj.item.mod.module.mister.atmos.desc: An atmospheric resin mister, able to fix up areas quickly.
obj.item.mod.module.mister.atmos.name: MOD resin mister module

obj.item.mod.module.mister.cleaner.desc: A space cleaner mister, able to clean up messes quickly. Synthesizes its own supply over time (if active).
obj.item.mod.module.mister.cleaner.name: MOD janitorial mister module

obj.item.mod.module.mouthhole.desc: A favorite by Miners, this modification to the helmet utilizes a nanotechnology barrier infront of the mouth 		to allow eating and drinking while retaining protection and atmosphere. However, it won't free you from masks, 		lets pepper spray pass through and it will do nothing to improve the taste of a goliath steak.
obj.item.mod.module.mouthhole.name: MOD eating apparatus module

obj.item.mod.module.night.desc: A heads-up display installed into the visor of the suit. Typical for both civilian and military applications, 		this allows the user to perceive their surroundings while in complete darkness, enhancing the view by tenfold; 		yet brightening everything into a spooky green glow. They say these also let you see behind you. 		These ones are a special version which remain compatible with the other visor modules.
obj.item.mod.module.night.name: MOD night vision module

obj.item.mod.module.noslip.desc: These are a modified variant of standard magnetic boots, utilizing piezoelectric crystals on the soles. 		The two plates on the bottom of the boots automatically extend and magnetize as the user steps; 		a pull that's too weak to offer them the ability to affix to a hull, but just strong enough to 		protect against the fact that you didn't read the wet floor sign. Honk Co. has come out numerous times 		in protest of these modules being legal.
obj.item.mod.module.noslip.name: MOD anti slip module

obj.item.mod.module.orebag.desc: An integrated ore storage system installed into the suit, 		this utilizes precise electromagnets and storage compartments to automatically collect and deposit ore. 		It's recommended by Nakamura Engineering to actually deposit that ore at local refineries.
obj.item.mod.module.orebag.name: MOD ore bag module

obj.item.mod.module.organizer.desc: A device recovered from a crashed Interdyne Pharmaceuticals vessel, 		this module has been unearthed for better or for worse. 		It's an arm-mounted device utilizing technology similar to modern rapid part exchange devices, 		capable of instantly replacing up to 5 organs at once in surgery without the need to remove them first, even from range. 		It's recommended by the DeForest Medical Corporation to not inform patients it has been used.
obj.item.mod.module.organizer.name: MOD organizer module

obj.item.mod.module.paper_dispenser.desc: A simple module designed by the bureaucrats of Torch Bay. 		It dispenses 'warm, clean, and crisp sheets of paper' onto a nearby table. Usually.
obj.item.mod.module.paper_dispenser.name: MOD paper dispenser module

obj.item.mod.module.pathfinder.desc: This module, brought to you by Nakamura Engineering, has two components. 		The first component is a series of thrusters and a computerized location subroutine installed into the 		very control unit of the suit, allowing it flight at highway speeds using the suit's access locks 		to navigate through the station, and to be able to locate the second part of the system; 		a pathfinding implant installed into the base of the user's spine, 		broadcasting their location to the suit and allowing them to recall it to their person at any time. 		The implant is stored in the module and needs to be injected in a human to function. 		Nakamura Engineering swears up and down there's airbrakes.
obj.item.mod.module.pathfinder.name: MOD pathfinder module

obj.item.mod.module.pepper_shoulders.desc: A module that attaches two pepper sprayers on shoulders of a MODsuit, reacting to touch with a spray around the user.
obj.item.mod.module.pepper_shoulders.name: MOD pepper shoulders module

obj.item.mod.module.plasma_stabilizer.desc: This system essentially forms an atmosphere of its own, within the suit, 		efficiently and quickly preventing oxygen from causing the user's head to burst into flame. 		This allows plasmamen to safely remove their helmet, allowing for easier 		equipping of any MODsuit-related equipment, or otherwise. 		The purple glass of the visor seems to be constructed for nostalgic purposes.
obj.item.mod.module.plasma_stabilizer.name: MOD plasma stabilizer module

obj.item.mod.module.plasma_stabilizer.en.desc: Your colony has fully integrated the internal segments of your suit's plate into your skeleton, forming a hermetic seal between you and the outside world from which none of your atmosphere can escape. This is enough to allow your head to view the world with your helmet retracted.
obj.item.mod.module.plasma_stabilizer.en.name: colony-stabilized interior seal

obj.item.mod.module.plate_compression.desc: A module that keeps the suit in a very tightly fit state, lowering the overall size. 		Due to the pressure on all the parts, typical storage modules do not fit.
obj.item.mod.module.plate_compression.name: MOD plate compression module

obj.item.mod.module.power_kick.desc: This module uses high-power myomer to generate an incredible amount of energy, transferred into the power of a kick.
obj.item.mod.module.power_kick.name: MOD power kick module

obj.item.mod.module.projectile_dampener.desc: Using technology from peaceborgs, this module weakens all projectiles in nearby range.
obj.item.mod.module.projectile_dampener.name: MOD projectile dampener module

obj.item.mod.module.protean_servo.desc: A module made for use in protean MOD suits that adds new subroutines while folded. Comes with three modes, each partially takes over MOD suit's motor functions to enhance the wearer's general movement, performing medical duties or construction tasks. Due to high computing power demand, protean can only use this module while worn by someone else.
obj.item.mod.module.protean_servo.name: protean MOD servo module

obj.item.mod.module.quick_carry.desc: A suite of advanced servos, redirecting power from the suit's arms to help carry the wounded; 		or simply for fun. However, Nanotrasen has locked the module's ability to assist in hand-to-hand combat.
obj.item.mod.module.quick_carry.name: MOD quick carry module

obj.item.mod.module.quick_carry.advanced.desc: A suite of advanced servos, redirecting power from the suit's arms to help carry the wounded; 		or simply for fun. However, Nanotrasen has locked the module's ability to assist in hand-to-hand combat.
obj.item.mod.module.quick_carry.advanced.name: MOD advanced quick carry module

obj.item.mod.module.quick_cuff.desc: Enhanced gauntlet grip pads that help with placing individuals in restraints more quickly. Doesn't look like they'll come off.
obj.item.mod.module.quick_cuff.name: MOD restraint assist module

obj.item.mod.module.rad_protection.desc: A module utilizing polymers and reflective shielding to protect the user against ionizing radiation; 		a common danger in space. This comes with software to notify the wearer that they're even in a radioactive area, 		giving a voice to an otherwise silent killer.
obj.item.mod.module.rad_protection.name: MOD radiation protection module

obj.item.mod.module.reagent_scanner.desc: A module based off research-oriented Nanotrasen HUDs, this is capable of scanning the contents of 		containers and projecting the information in an easy-to-read format on the wearer's display. 		It cannot detect flavors, so that's up to you.
obj.item.mod.module.reagent_scanner.name: MOD reagent scanner module

obj.item.mod.module.reagent_scanner.adva.desc: An advanced module with all the features of research-oriented Nanotrasen HUDs, this is capable of scanning 		the contents of containers and projecting the information in an easy-to-read format on the wearer's display. 		It also contains a research scanner and an explosion sensor that gives details on nearby explosions. 		No improvements have been made to allow it to detect flavors so that's still up to you.
obj.item.mod.module.reagent_scanner.adva.name: MOD advanced reagent scanner module

obj.item.mod.module.recycler.desc: An innovative garbage collection module that recycles gathered trash into usable material. 		Doesn't work on debris and some items. May recycle live ammunition. 		Activate on a nearby turf or storage to unload stored material.
obj.item.mod.module.recycler.name: MOD recycler module

obj.item.mod.module.recycler.donk.desc: A mod module collects and repackages fired foam darts (and garbage) into half-sized boxes of riot foam darts. 		Activate on a nearby turf or storage to unload stored ammo boxes.
obj.item.mod.module.recycler.donk.name: MOD riot foam dart recycler module

obj.item.mod.module.recycler.donk.safe.desc: A mod module that collects and repackages fired foam darts into half-sized ammo boxes. 		Activate on a nearby turf or storage to unload stored ammo boxes.
obj.item.mod.module.recycler.donk.safe.name: MOD foam dart recycler module

obj.item.mod.module.remote_control.desc: A module, once inserted, will allow anyone with its linked remote to control all functionality of the suit.
obj.item.mod.module.remote_control.name: modsuit remote module

obj.item.mod.module.rewinder.desc: A module that can pull the user back through time given an anchor point to 			pull to. Very useful tool to get the job done, but keep in mind the suit locks for 			safety reasons while preparing a rewind.
obj.item.mod.module.rewinder.name: MOD rewinder module

obj.item.mod.module.scorpion_hook.desc: A module installed in the wrist of a MODSuit, this highly 			illegal module uses a hardlight hook to forcefully pull 			a target towards you at high speed, knocking them down and 			partially exhausting them.
obj.item.mod.module.scorpion_hook.name: MOD SCORPION hook module

obj.item.mod.module.selfcleaner.desc: A small spray to clean oneself up. Has a pleasant scent.
obj.item.mod.module.selfcleaner.name: MOD perfumer module

obj.item.mod.module.shock_absorber.desc: A module that makes the user resistant to the knockdown and CNS disruption inflicted by Stun Batons.
obj.item.mod.module.shock_absorber.name: MOD shock absorption module

obj.item.mod.module.shooting_assistant.desc: A botched prototype meant to boost the TGMC crayon eaters' ability with firearms. 		It has only two modes available in its configurations: 		'Quick Fire Stormtrooper' and 'Slow Ricochet Sharpshooter', 		both incompatible with dual wielding firearms.
obj.item.mod.module.shooting_assistant.name: MOD shooting assistant module

obj.item.mod.module.shove_blocker.desc: Layers upon layers of shock dampening plates, just to stop you from getting shoved into a wall by an angry mob.
obj.item.mod.module.shove_blocker.name: MOD bulwark module

obj.item.mod.module.shove_blocker.locked.desc: Layers upon layers of shock dampening plates, just to stop you from getting shoved into a wall by an angry mob. Good luck removing this one.
obj.item.mod.module.shove_blocker.locked.name: superglued MOD bulwark module

obj.item.mod.module.signlang_radio.desc: A module that adds motion sensors into the suit's gloves, 		which works in tandem with a short-range subspace transmitter, 		letting the audibly impaired use sign language over comms.
obj.item.mod.module.signlang_radio.name: MOD glove translator module

obj.item.mod.module.smartgun.desc: A bulky module that attahces to the back of a MODsuit, this 			module is comprised of two parts, a holster and the M63A4 "Smartgun". 			The holster works as storage for a gun that would be otherwise uncarryable, 			and the gun itself fires at a blistering rate of fire, capable of suppressing enemies 			without hurting teammates thanks to IFF technology.
obj.item.mod.module.smartgun.name: MOD smartgun module

obj.item.mod.module.smartgun.marines.desc: A bulky module that attahces to the back of a MODsuit, this 			module is comprised of two parts, a holster and the M63A4 "Smartgun". 			The holster works as storage for a gun that would be otherwise uncarryable, 			and the gun itself fires at a blistering rate of fire, capable of suppressing enemies 			without hurting teammates thanks to IFF technology.
obj.item.mod.module.smartgun.marines.name: MOD smartgun module

obj.item.mod.module.sphere_transform.desc: A module able to move the suit's parts around, turning it and the user into a sphere. 		The sphere can move quickly, even through lava, and launch mining micromissile to decimate terrain and fauna alike.
obj.item.mod.module.sphere_transform.name: MOD sphere transform module

obj.item.mod.module.springlock.desc: A module that spans the entire size of the MOD unit, sitting under the outer shell. 		This mechanical exoskeleton pushes out of the way when the user enters and it helps in booting 		up, but was taken out of modern suits because of the springlock's tendency to "snap" back 		into place when exposed to humidity. You know what it's like to have an entire exoskeleton enter you?
obj.item.mod.module.springlock.name: MOD springlock module

obj.item.mod.module.springlock.bite_of_8.desc: A module that spans the entire size of the MOD unit, sitting under the outer shell. 		This mechanical exoskeleton pushes out of the way when the user enters and it helps in booting 		up, but was taken out of modern suits because of the springlock's tendency to "snap" back 		into place when exposed to humidity. You know what it's like to have an entire exoskeleton enter you?
obj.item.mod.module.springlock.bite_of_8.name: MOD springlock module

obj.item.mod.module.springlock.contracto.desc: A much more modern version of a springlock system. 	This is a module that uses magnets to speed up the deployment and retraction time of your MODsuit.
obj.item.mod.module.springlock.contracto.name: MOD magnetic deployment module

obj.item.mod.module.springlock.contracto.desc: A much more modern version of a springlock system. 	This is a module that uses magnets to speed up the deployment and retraction time of your MODsuit.
obj.item.mod.module.springlock.contracto.name: MOD magnetic deployment module

obj.item.mod.module.stamp.desc: A module installed into the wrist of the suit, this functions as a high-power stamp, 		able to switch between accept, deny, and void modes.
obj.item.mod.module.stamp.name: MOD stamper module

obj.item.mod.module.status_readout.desc: A once-common module, this technology unfortunately went out of fashion in the safer regions of space; 		and found new life in the research networks of the Periphery. This particular unit hooks into the suit's spine, 		capable of capturing and displaying all possible biometric data of the wearer; sleep, nutrition, fitness, fingerprints, 		and even useful information such as their overall health and wellness. The vitals monitor also comes with a speaker, loud enough 		to alert anyone nearby that someone has, in fact, died.
obj.item.mod.module.status_readout.name: MOD status readout module

obj.item.mod.module.status_readout.ninja.desc: A once-common module, this technology unfortunately went out of fashion in the safer regions of space; 		and, according to the extra markings on this particular unit's casing, right into the arachnid grip of the Spider Clan. 		Like other similar units, this one hooks into the suit's spine, and is capable of capturing and displaying 		all possible biometric data of the wearer; sleep, nutrition, fitness, fingerprints, 		and even useful information such as their overall health and wellness. This one comes with a clock that calibrates to the 		local system time, and an operational ID number display. The vital monitor's speaker has been removed.
obj.item.mod.module.status_readout.ninja.name: MOD Spider Clan status readout module

obj.item.mod.module.status_readout.opera.desc: A once-common module, this technology unfortunately went out of fashion in the safer regions of space; 		however, it remained in use everywhere else. This particular unit hooks into the suit's spine, 		capable of capturing and displaying all possible biometric data of the wearer; sleep, nutrition, fitness, fingerprints, 		and even useful information such as their overall health and wellness. The vitals monitor also comes with a speaker, loud enough 		to alert anyone nearby that someone has, in fact, died. This specific unit has a clock and operational ID readout.
obj.item.mod.module.status_readout.opera.name: MOD operational status readout module

obj.item.mod.module.stealth.desc: A complete retrofitting of the suit, this is a form of visual concealment tech employing esoteric technology 		to bend light around the user, as well as mimetic materials to make the surface of the suit match the 		surroundings based off sensor data. For some reason, this tech is rarely seen.
obj.item.mod.module.stealth.name: MOD prototype cloaking module

obj.item.mod.module.stealth.ninja.desc: The latest in stealth technology, this module is a definite upgrade over previous versions. 		The field has been tuned to be even more responsive and fast-acting, with enough stability to 		continue operation of the field even if the user bumps into others. 		The power draw has been reduced drastically, making this perfect for activities like 		standing near sentry turrets for extended periods of time.
obj.item.mod.module.stealth.ninja.name: MOD advanced cloaking module

obj.item.mod.module.stealth.wraith.desc: A more destructive adaptation of the stealth module. Incompatible with armor modules
obj.item.mod.module.stealth.wraith.name: MOD Wraith Cloaking Module

obj.item.mod.module.storage.desc: What amounts to a series of integrated storage compartments and specialized pockets installed across 		the surface of the suit, useful for storing various bits, and or bobs. This version has been trimmed down to save space.
obj.item.mod.module.storage.name: MOD compact storage module

obj.item.mod.module.storage.belt.desc: Some concessions had to be made when creating a compressed modular suit core. 		As a result, Roseus Galactic equipped their suit with a slimline storage case.  		If you find this equipped to a standard modular suit, then someone has almost certainly shortchanged you on a proper storage module.
obj.item.mod.module.storage.belt.name: MOD case storage module

obj.item.mod.module.storage.bluespace.desc: A storage system developed by Nanotrasen, these compartments employ 		miniaturized bluespace pockets for the ultimate in storage technology; regardless of the weight of objects put inside.
obj.item.mod.module.storage.bluespace.name: MOD bluespace storage module

obj.item.mod.module.storage.holding.desc: A prototype storage module utilizing the power of anomalous bluespace phenomena to store copious amounts of matter. Unfortunately, it suffers from the same drawbacks as its standalone counterpart, including tearing catastrophic rifts in reality when nested inside bluespace pockets produced through similar means.
obj.item.mod.module.storage.holding.name: MOD storage module of holding

obj.item.mod.module.storage.holding.preb.desc: A prototype storage module utilizing the power of anomalous bluespace phenomena to store copious amounts of matter. Unfortunately, it suffers from the same drawbacks as its standalone counterpart, including tearing catastrophic rifts in reality when nested inside bluespace pockets produced through similar means.
obj.item.mod.module.storage.holding.preb.name: MOD storage module of holding

obj.item.mod.module.storage.holding.preb.desc: A prototype storage module utilizing the power of anomalous bluespace phenomena to store copious amounts of matter. Unfortunately, it suffers from the same drawbacks as its standalone counterpart, including tearing catastrophic rifts in reality when nested inside bluespace pockets produced through similar means.
obj.item.mod.module.storage.holding.preb.name: MOD storage module of holding

obj.item.mod.module.storage.large_capaci.desc: Reverse engineered by Nakamura Engineering from Donk Company designs, this system of hidden compartments 		is entirely within the suit, distributing items and weight evenly to ensure a comfortable experience for the user; 		whether smuggling, or simply hauling.
obj.item.mod.module.storage.large_capaci.name: MOD storage module

obj.item.mod.module.storage.syndicate.desc: A storage system using nanotechnology developed by Cybersun Industries, these compartments use 		esoteric technology to compress the physical matter of items put inside of them, 		essentially shrinking items for much easier and more portable storage.
obj.item.mod.module.storage.syndicate.name: MOD syndicate storage module

obj.item.mod.module.surgical_processor.desc: A module using an onboard surgical computer which can be connected to other computers to download and 		perform advanced surgeries on the go.
obj.item.mod.module.surgical_processor.name: MOD surgical processor module

obj.item.mod.module.surgical_processor.e.desc: A module using an onboard surgical computer which can be connected to other computers to download and 		perform advanced surgeries on the go. This one came pre-loaded with some emergency surgeries.
obj.item.mod.module.surgical_processor.e.name: MOD surgical processor module

obj.item.mod.module.surgical_processor.p.desc: A module using an onboard surgical computer which can be connected to other computers to download and 		perform advanced surgeries on the go. This one came pre-loaded with some advanced surgeries.
obj.item.mod.module.surgical_processor.p.name: MOD surgical processor module

obj.item.mod.module.t_ray.desc: A module installed into the visor of the suit, allowing the user to use a pulse of terahertz radiation 		to essentially echolocate things beneath the floor, mostly cables and pipes. 		A staple of atmospherics work, and counter-smuggling work.
obj.item.mod.module.t_ray.name: MOD t-ray scan module

obj.item.mod.module.tanner.desc: A tanning module for modular suits. Skin cancer functionality has not been ever proven, 		although who knows with the rumors...
obj.item.mod.module.tanner.name: MOD tanning module

obj.item.mod.module.tem.desc: The correction device of a fourth dimensional group outside time itself used to 			change the destination of a timeline. this device is capable of wiping a being from the 			timestream. They never are, they never were, they never will be.
obj.item.mod.module.tem.name: MOD timestream eradication module

obj.item.mod.module.tether.desc: A custom-built grappling-hook powered by a winch capable of hauling the user. 		While some older models of cargo-oriented grapples have capacities of a few tons, 		these are only capable of working in zero-gravity environments, a blessing to some Engineers.
obj.item.mod.module.tether.name: MOD emergency tether module

obj.item.mod.module.thermal_regulator.desc: Advanced climate control, using an inner body glove interwoven with thousands of tiny, 		flexible cooling lines. This circulates coolant at various user-controlled temperatures, 		ensuring they're comfortable; even if they're some that like it hot.
obj.item.mod.module.thermal_regulator.name: MOD thermal regulator module

obj.item.mod.module.thread_ripper.desc: A custom-built module integrated with the suit's wrist. The thread ripper is built from 		recent technology dating back to the start of 2562, after an attempt by a well-known Nanotrasen researcher to 		expand on the rapid-tailoring technology found in Autodrobes. Rather than being capable of creating 		any fabric pattern under the suns, the thread ripper is capable of rapid disassembly of them. 		Anything from kevlar-weave, to leather, to durathread can be quickly pulled open to the wearer's specification 		and sewn back together, a development commonly utilized by Medical workers to obtain easy access for 		surgery, defibrillation, or injection of chemicals to ease patients into not worrying about their 		brand-name fashion being marred.
obj.item.mod.module.thread_ripper.name: MOD thread ripper module

obj.item.mod.module.timeline_jumper.desc: A module used to traverse timelines, phasing the user in and out of the stream of events.
obj.item.mod.module.timeline_jumper.name: MOD timeline jumper module

obj.item.mod.module.timestopper.desc: A module that can halt time in a small radius around the user... for as long as they 			want! Great for monologues or lunch breaks. Keep in mind moving will end the stop, and the 			module has a hefty cooldown period to avoid reality errors.
obj.item.mod.module.timestopper.name: MOD timestopper module

obj.item.mod.module.visor.desc: A heads-up display installed into the visor of the suit. They say these also let you see behind you.
obj.item.mod.module.visor.name: MOD visor module

obj.item.mod.module.visor.diaghud.desc: A heads-up display installed into the visor of the suit. This uses a series of advanced sensors to access data 		from advanced machinery, exosuits, and other devices, allowing the user to visualize current power levels 		and integrity of such. They say these also let you see behind you.
obj.item.mod.module.visor.diaghud.name: MOD diagnostic visor module

obj.item.mod.module.visor.medhud.desc: A heads-up display installed into the visor of the suit. This cross-references suit sensor data with a modern 		biological scanning suite, allowing the user to visualize the current health of organic lifeforms, as well as 		access data such as patient files in a convenient readout. They say these also let you see behind you.
obj.item.mod.module.visor.medhud.name: MOD medical visor module

obj.item.mod.module.visor.meson.desc: A heads-up display installed into the visor of the suit. This module is based off well-loved meson scanner 		technology, used by construction workers and miners across the galaxy to see basic structural and terrain layouts 		through walls, regardless of lighting conditions. They say these also let you see behind you.
obj.item.mod.module.visor.meson.name: MOD meson visor module

obj.item.mod.module.visor.night.desc: A heads-up display installed into the visor of the suit. Typical for both civilian and military applications, 		this allows the user to perceive their surroundings while in complete darkness, enhancing the view by tenfold; 		yet brightening everything into a spooky green glow. They say these also let you see behind you.
obj.item.mod.module.visor.night.name: MOD night visor module

obj.item.mod.module.visor.rave.desc: A Super Cool Awesome Visor (SCAV), intended for modular suits.
obj.item.mod.module.visor.rave.name: MOD rave visor module

obj.item.mod.module.visor.sechud.desc: A heads-up display installed into the visor of the suit. This module is a heavily-retrofitted targeting system, 		plugged into various criminal databases to be able to view arrest records, command simple security-oriented robots, 		and generally know who to shoot. They say these also let you see behind you.
obj.item.mod.module.visor.sechud.name: MOD security visor module

obj.item.mod.module.visor.thermal.desc: A heads-up display installed into the visor of the suit. This uses a small IR scanner to detect and identify 		the thermal radiation output of objects near the user. While it can detect the heat output of even something as 		small as a rodent, it still produces irritating red overlay. They say these also let you see behind you.
obj.item.mod.module.visor.thermal.name: MOD thermal visor module

obj.item.mod.module.waddle.desc: Some of the most primitive technology in use by Honk Co. This module works off an automatic intention system, 		utilizing its sensitivity to the pilot's often-limited brainwaves to directly read their next step, 		affecting the boots they're installed in. Employing a twin-linked gravitonic drive to create 		miniaturized etheric blasts of space-time beneath the user's feet, this enables them to... 		to waddle around, bouncing to and fro with a pep in their step.
obj.item.mod.module.waddle.name: MOD waddle module

obj.item.mod.module.weapon_recall.desc: The cornerstone of a clanmember's life as a blademaster, and a module symbolizing their eternal bond with their weapon. 		This hooks to the micro bluespace drive inside an energy katana's handle, capable of recalling it to the user's 		skilled hands wherever they are. However, those that make such a bond with their weapon are cursed to 		fusing their existence with acts of combat, with a singular purpose; Cutting Down Their Opponent. 		Their hand a hand that is cutting, their body a body that is cutting, their mind, a mind that is cutting. 		Ranged weapons are forbidden.
obj.item.mod.module.weapon_recall.name: MOD weapon recall module

obj.item.mod.module.welding.desc: A module installed into the visor of the suit, this projects a 		polarized, holographic overlay in front of the user's eyes. It's rated high enough for 		immunity against extremities such as spot and arc welding, solar eclipses, and handheld flashlights.
obj.item.mod.module.welding.name: MOD welding protection module

obj.item.mod.module.welding.camera_visio.desc: A module installed into the suit's helmet. This specialized piece of technology is built for subterfuge, 		replacing the standard visor with a nanotech display; capable of displaying specialized imagery at 		just the right frequency to jam all known forms of camera tracking and facial recognition, 		as well as automatically dimming incoming flashes of light to protect the user's eyes. Become the unseen.
obj.item.mod.module.welding.camera_visio.name: MOD camera vision module

obj.item.mod.module.welding.syndicate.desc: A module installed into the visor of the suit, this projects a 		polarized, holographic overlay in front of the user's eyes. It's rated high enough for 		immunity against extremities such as spot and arc welding, solar eclipses, and handheld flashlights.
obj.item.mod.module.welding.syndicate.name: MODsuit flash-protected optical suite

obj.item.mod.paint.desc: This kit will repaint your MODsuit to something unique.
obj.item.mod.paint.name: MOD paint kit

obj.item.mod.skin_applier.desc: This one-use skin applier will add a skin to MODsuits of a specific type. Must be used on an inactive control unit.
obj.item.mod.skin_applier.name: MOD skin applier

obj.item.mod.skin_applier.honkerative.desc: This one-use skin applier will add a skin to MODsuits of a specific type. Must be used on an inactive control unit.
obj.item.mod.skin_applier.honkerative.name: MOD skin applier

obj.item.modular_computer.laptop.gamer.desc: A high-end laptop often used for metagaming.
obj.item.modular_computer.laptop.gamer.name: laptop

obj.item.modular_computer.laptop.preset..desc: A low-end laptop often used for personal recreation.
obj.item.modular_computer.laptop.preset..name: laptop

obj.item.modular_computer.laptop.preset..desc: A low-end laptop often used for personal recreation.
obj.item.modular_computer.laptop.preset..name: laptop

obj.item.modular_computer.laptop.preset..desc: A SYNDIX operating system laptop, modified through open source to be compatible with NTOS programs. The miracle of software!
obj.item.modular_computer.laptop.preset..name: laptop

obj.item.modular_computer.mini_painting_.desc: Allows users to quickly print off desired artworks.
obj.item.modular_computer.mini_painting_.name: instant portrait printer

obj.item.modular_computer.pda.request_91.desc: A small experimental microcomputer, up to Terragov 911 Responder standards.
obj.item.modular_computer.pda.request_91.name: Terragov PDA

obj.item.modular_computer.pda.request_91.desc: A small experimental microcomputer, up to Terragov 911 Responder standards.
obj.item.modular_computer.pda.request_91.name: Terragov Atmospherics PDA

obj.item.modular_computer.pda.request_91.desc: A small experimental microcomputer, up to Terragov 911 Responder standards.
obj.item.modular_computer.pda.request_91.name: Terragov Medical PDA

obj.item.modular_computer.pda.request_91.desc: A small experimental microcomputer, up to Terragov 911 Responder standards.
obj.item.modular_computer.pda.request_91.name: Terragov Marshal PDA

obj.item.mop.desc: The world of janitalia wouldn't be complete without a mop.
obj.item.mop.name: mop

obj.item.mop.advanced.desc: The most advanced tool in a custodian's arsenal, complete with a condenser for self-wetting! Just think of all the viscera you will clean up with this! Due to the self-wetting technology, it proves very inefficient for cleaning up spills.
obj.item.mop.advanced.name: advanced mop

obj.item.mop.tribal.desc: The ancient god-warrior Jaenator used this strange weapon to slay the terrible filth haunting his people.
obj.item.mop.tribal.name: mop

obj.item.mounted_machine_gun_folded.desc: A folded and unloaded mounted machine gun, ready to be deployed and used.
obj.item.mounted_machine_gun_folded.name: folded T-90 mounted machine gun

obj.item.multitool.desc: Used for pulsing wires to test which to cut. Not recommended by doctors. You can activate it in-hand to locate the nearest APC.
obj.item.multitool.name: multitool

obj.item.multitool.abductor.implant.desc: An optimized, highly advanced stripped-down multitool able to interface with electronics far better than its standard counterpart.
obj.item.multitool.abductor.implant.name: multitool

obj.item.multitool.advanced.desc: The reproduction of an abductor's multitool, this multitool is a classy silver. There's a sticker attached declaring that it needs updating from 'the latest samples'.
obj.item.multitool.advanced.name: advanced multitool

obj.item.multitool.ai_detect.desc: Used for pulsing wires to test which to cut. Not recommended by doctors. You can activate it in-hand to locate the nearest APC.
obj.item.multitool.ai_detect.name: multitool

obj.item.multitool.circuit.desc: A circuit multitool. Used to mark entities which can then be uploaded to components by pressing the upload button on a port. 	Acts as a normal multitool otherwise. Use in hand to clear marked entity so that you can mark another entity.
obj.item.multitool.circuit.name: circuit multitool

obj.item.multitool.cyborg.desc: Optimised version of a regular multitool. Streamlines processes handled by its internal microchip.
obj.item.multitool.cyborg.name: electronic multitool

obj.item.multitool.drone.desc: A multitool built into your chassis.
obj.item.multitool.drone.name: built-in multitool

obj.item.multitool.field_debug.desc: Seems to project a colored field!
obj.item.multitool.field_debug.name: strange multitool

obj.item.mushpunch.desc: Sapienza Ophioglossoides:An odd mushroom from the flesh of a mushroom person. It has apparently retained some innate power of its owner, as it quivers with barely-contained POWER!
obj.item.mushpunch.name: odd mushroom

obj.item.mutant_hand.desc: Won't somebody give me a hand?
obj.item.mutant_hand.name: mutant hand

obj.item.mutant_hand.hnz_mutant_hand.desc: A mutant's claw is its primary tool, capable of infecting 		humans, butchering all other living things to 		sustain the mutant, smashing open airlock doors and opening 		child-safe caps on bottles.
obj.item.mutant_hand.hnz_mutant_hand.name: mutant claw

obj.item.mutant_hand.hnz_mutant_hand.fas.desc: A mutant's claw is its primary tool, capable of infecting 		humans, butchering all other living things to 		sustain the mutant, smashing open airlock doors and opening 		child-safe caps on bottles.
obj.item.mutant_hand.hnz_mutant_hand.fas.name: weak mutant claw

obj.item.mutant_hand.lycan_claw.desc: An extended set of claws, slower but more powerful, and capable of striking structures. Worse for actual combat.
obj.item.mutant_hand.lycan_claw.name: extended claws

obj.item.mutant_hand.shattered_risen.desc: What once appeared to be a normal human fist, now holds a mauled nest of sharp bone-shards.
obj.item.mutant_hand.shattered_risen.name: bone-shards

obj.item.mutant_hand.zombie.desc: A zombie's claw is its primary tool, capable of infecting 		humans, butchering all other living things to 		sustain the zombie, smashing open airlock doors and opening 		child-safe caps on bottles.
obj.item.mutant_hand.zombie.name: zombie claw

obj.item.mutant_hand.zombie.weak.desc: A zombie's claw is its primary tool, capable of infecting 		humans, butchering all other living things to 		sustain the zombie, smashing open airlock doors and opening 		child-safe caps on bottles.
obj.item.mutant_hand.zombie.weak.name: zombie claw

obj.item.nanite_remote.desc: A device that can remotely control active nanites through wireless signals.
obj.item.nanite_remote.name: nanite remote control

obj.item.nanite_remote.comm.desc: A device that can send text messages to specific programs.
obj.item.nanite_remote.comm.name: nanite communication remote

obj.item.nanite_scanner.desc: A hand-held body scanner able to detect nanites and their programming.
obj.item.nanite_scanner.name: nanite scanner

obj.item.necromantic_stone.desc: A shard capable of resurrecting humans as skeleton thralls.
obj.item.necromantic_stone.name: necromantic stone

obj.item.necromantic_stone.unlimited.desc: A shard capable of resurrecting humans as skeleton thralls.
obj.item.necromantic_stone.unlimited.name: necromantic stone

obj.item.newspaper.desc: An issue of The Griffon, the newspaper circulating aboard Nanotrasen Space Stations.
obj.item.newspaper.name: newspaper

obj.item.nif_hud_adapter.desc: A kit that modifies select glasses to display HUDs for NIFs
obj.item.nif_hud_adapter.name: Scrying Lens Adapter

obj.item.nif_repair_kit.desc: A repair kit that allows for NIFs to be repaired without the use of surgery
obj.item.nif_repair_kit.name: Cerulean NIF Regenerator

obj.item.nifsoft_remover.desc: A small device that lets the user remove NIFSofts from a NIF user
obj.item.nifsoft_remover.name: Lopland 'Wrangler' NIF-Cutter

obj.item.nifsoft_remover.syndie.desc: A modified version of a NIFSoft remover that allows the user to remove a NIFSoft and have a blank copy of the removed NIFSoft saved to a disk.
obj.item.nifsoft_remover.syndie.name: Cybersun 'Scalpel' NIF-Cutter

obj.item.nitrium_crystal.desc: A weird brown crystal, it smokes when broken
obj.item.nitrium_crystal.name: nitrium crystal

obj.item.ntusp_conversion_kit.desc: A standard conversion kit for use in converting NT22-HCS magazines to be more lethal or less lethal.
obj.item.ntusp_conversion_kit.name: NT22-HCS conversion kit

obj.item.nuclear_challenge.desc: Use to send a declaration of hostilities to the target, delaying your shuttle departure for 20 minutes while they prepare for your assault.  			Such a brazen move will attract the attention of powerful benefactors within the Syndicate, who will supply your team with a massive amount of bonus telecrystals.  			Must be used within five minutes, or your benefactors will lose interest.
obj.item.nuclear_challenge.name: Declaration of War (Challenge Mode)

obj.item.nuclear_challenge.clownops.desc: Use to send a declaration of hostilities to the target, delaying your shuttle departure for 20 minutes while they prepare for your assault.  			Such a brazen move will attract the attention of powerful benefactors within the Syndicate, who will supply your team with a massive amount of bonus telecrystals.  			Must be used within five minutes, or your benefactors will lose interest.
obj.item.nuclear_challenge.clownops.name: Declaration of War (Challenge Mode)

obj.item.nuclear_challenge.literally_jus.desc: It's a Syndicate Declaration of War thing-a-majig, but it only plays the loud sound and message. Nothing else.
obj.item.nuclear_challenge.literally_jus.name: "Declaration of War"

obj.item.nuke_core.supermatter_sliver.desc: A tiny, highly volatile sliver of a supermatter crystal. Do not handle without protection!
obj.item.nuke_core.supermatter_sliver.name: supermatter sliver

obj.item.nuke_core_container.supermatter.desc: A tiny receptacle that releases an inert hyper-noblium mix upon sealing, allowing a sliver of a supermatter crystal to be safely stored.
obj.item.nuke_core_container.supermatter.name: supermatter bin

obj.item.nullrod.desc: A rod of pure obsidian; its very presence disrupts and dampens 'magical forces'. That's what the guidebook says, anyway.
obj.item.nullrod.name: null rod

obj.item.nullrod.armblade.desc: Particularly twisted deities grant gifts of dubious value.
obj.item.nullrod.armblade.name: dark blessing

obj.item.nullrod.armblade.tentacle.desc: Particularly twisted deities grant gifts of dubious value.
obj.item.nullrod.armblade.tentacle.name: unholy blessing

obj.item.nullrod.bostaff.desc: A long, tall staff made of polished wood. Traditionally used in ancient old-Earth martial arts, it is now used to harass the clown.
obj.item.nullrod.bostaff.name: monk's staff

obj.item.nullrod.chainsaw.desc: Good? Bad? You're the guy with the chainsaw hand.
obj.item.nullrod.chainsaw.name: chainsaw hand

obj.item.nullrod.claymore.desc: A weapon fit for a crusade!
obj.item.nullrod.claymore.name: holy claymore

obj.item.nullrod.claymore.chainsaw_sword.desc: Suffer not a heretic to live.
obj.item.nullrod.claymore.chainsaw_sword.name: sacred chainsaw sword

obj.item.nullrod.claymore.chainsaw_sword.desc: An chainsaw sword that has its blade heated up to be nearly white hot, why the fuck is it named kyle? why not like, the incinerator or heretic melter or something.
obj.item.nullrod.claymore.chainsaw_sword.name: kyle

obj.item.nullrod.claymore.darkblade.desc: Spread the glory of the dark gods!
obj.item.nullrod.claymore.darkblade.name: dark blade

obj.item.nullrod.claymore.glowing.desc: The blade glows with the power of faith. Or possibly a battery.
obj.item.nullrod.claymore.glowing.name: force weapon

obj.item.nullrod.claymore.heretic.desc: Steels your hand to slay foes beyond comprehension.
obj.item.nullrod.claymore.heretic.name: occultist's khopesh

obj.item.nullrod.claymore.katana.desc: Capable of cutting clean through a holy claymore.
obj.item.nullrod.claymore.katana.name: Hanzo steel
