obj.item.nullrod.claymore.multiverse.desc: Once the harbinger of an interdimensional war, its sharpness fluctuates wildly.
obj.item.nullrod.claymore.multiverse.name: extradimensional blade

obj.item.nullrod.claymore.spellblade.desc: The blade grants the wielder nearly limitless power...if they can figure out how to turn it on, that is.
obj.item.nullrod.claymore.spellblade.name: dormant spellblade

obj.item.nullrod.claymore.talking.desc: When the station falls into chaos, it's nice to have a friend by your side.
obj.item.nullrod.claymore.talking.name: possessed blade

obj.item.nullrod.claymore.talking.chains.desc: Suffer not a heretic to live.
obj.item.nullrod.claymore.talking.chains.name: possessed chainsaw sword

obj.item.nullrod.cultdagger.desc: A strange dagger said to be once used by a sinister group..
obj.item.nullrod.cultdagger.name: ritual dagger

obj.item.nullrod.egyptian.desc: A tutorial in mummification is carved into the staff. You could probably craft the wraps if you had some cloth.
obj.item.nullrod.egyptian.name: egyptian staff

obj.item.nullrod.fedora.desc: The brim of the hat is as sharp as your wit. The edge would hurt almost as much as disproving the existence of God.
obj.item.nullrod.fedora.name: atheist's fedora

obj.item.nullrod.godhand.desc: This hand of yours glows with an awesome power!
obj.item.nullrod.godhand.name: god hand

obj.item.nullrod.hammer.desc: This war hammer cost the chaplain forty thousand space dollars.
obj.item.nullrod.hammer.name: relic war hammer

obj.item.nullrod.hypertool.desc: A tool so powerful even you cannot perfectly use it.
obj.item.nullrod.hypertool.name: hypertool

obj.item.nullrod.non_station.desc: A rod of pure obsidian; its very presence disrupts and dampens 'magical forces'. That's what the guidebook says, anyway.
obj.item.nullrod.non_station.name: null rod

obj.item.nullrod.nullblade.desc: Clerical assassins are not officially recognized by the collective faiths of Nanotrasen. And yet, here you are.
obj.item.nullrod.nullblade.name: nullblade

obj.item.nullrod.papal_staff.desc: A staff used by traditional bishops and popes.
obj.item.nullrod.papal_staff.name: papal staff

obj.item.nullrod.pitchfork.desc: Holding this makes you look absolutely devilish.
obj.item.nullrod.pitchfork.name: unholy pitchfork

obj.item.nullrod.pride_hammer.desc: It resonates an aura of Pride.
obj.item.nullrod.pride_hammer.name: Pride-struck Hammer

obj.item.nullrod.rosary.desc: A set of prayer beads used by many of the more traditional religions in space
obj.item.nullrod.rosary.name: prayer beads

obj.item.nullrod.scythe.sickle.desc: A green crescent blade, decorated with an ornamental eye. The pupil has faded...
obj.item.nullrod.scythe.sickle.name: damned sickle

obj.item.nullrod.scythe.sickle.void.desc: Made of clear crystal, the blade refracts the light slightly. Purity, so close yet unattainable in this form.
obj.item.nullrod.scythe.sickle.void.name: crystal sickle

obj.item.nullrod.sord.desc: This thing is so unspeakably HOLY you are having a hard time even holding it.
obj.item.nullrod.sord.name: UNREAL SORD

obj.item.nullrod.spear.desc: An ancient spear made of brass, I mean gold, I mean bronze. It looks highly mechanical.
obj.item.nullrod.spear.name: ancient spear

obj.item.nullrod.staff.desc: It has a mysterious, protective aura.
obj.item.nullrod.staff.name: red holy staff

obj.item.nullrod.staff.blue.desc: It has a mysterious, protective aura.
obj.item.nullrod.staff.blue.name: blue holy staff

obj.item.nullrod.sylvanstaff.desc: Dryads and druids use staves like this one as a focus to better attune with Nature
obj.item.nullrod.sylvanstaff.name: Sylvan Staff

obj.item.nullrod.tribal_knife.desc: They say fear is the true mind killer, but stabbing them in the head works too. Honour compels you to not sheathe it once drawn.
obj.item.nullrod.tribal_knife.name: arrhythmic knife

obj.item.nullrod.vibro.desc: Bad references are the DNA of the soul.
obj.item.nullrod.vibro.name: high frequency blade

obj.item.nullrod.whip.desc: What a terrible night to be on Space Station 13.
obj.item.nullrod.whip.name: holy whip

obj.item.oar.desc: Not to be confused with the kind Research hassles you for.
obj.item.oar.name: oar

obj.item.ore_sensor.desc: Using demonic frequencies, this ear-mounted tool detects ores in the nearby terrain.
obj.item.ore_sensor.name: ore sensor

obj.item.organ.adamantine_resonator.desc: Fragments of adamantine exist in all golems, stemming from their origins as purely magical constructs. These are used to "hear" messages from their leaders.
obj.item.organ.adamantine_resonator.name: adamantine resonator

obj.item.organ.antennae.desc: A moths antennae. What is it telling them? What are they sensing?
obj.item.organ.antennae.name: moth antennae

obj.item.organ.appendix.corrupt.desc: What kind of dark, cosmic force is even going to bother to corrupt an appendix?
obj.item.organ.appendix.corrupt.name: corrupt appendix

obj.item.organ.appendix.golem.desc: This expanded digestive chamber allows golems to smelt minerals, provided that they are immersed in lava.
obj.item.organ.appendix.golem.name: internal forge

obj.item.organ.appendix.roach.desc: Roach DNA infused into what was once a normal appendix. It could get worse?
obj.item.organ.appendix.roach.name: mutated roach-appendix

obj.item.organ.borer_body.desc: the body of a cortical borer, full of human viscera, blood, and more.
obj.item.organ.borer_body.name: engorged cortical borer

obj.item.organ.brain.desc: A piece of juicy meat found in a person's head.
obj.item.organ.brain.name: brain

obj.item.organ.brain.abductor.desc: A piece of juicy meat found in an ayy lmao's head.
obj.item.organ.brain.abductor.name: grey brain

obj.item.organ.brain.alien.desc: We barely understand the brains of terrestial animals. Who knows what we may find in the brain of such an advanced species?
obj.item.organ.brain.alien.name: alien brain

obj.item.organ.brain.carp.desc: Carp DNA infused into what was once a normal brain.
obj.item.organ.brain.carp.name: mutated carp-brain

obj.item.organ.brain.cybernetic.desc: A mechanical brain found inside of androids. Not to be confused with a positronic brain.
obj.item.organ.brain.cybernetic.name: cybernetic brain

obj.item.organ.brain.cybernetic.ai.desc: Can be inserted into a body with NO ORGANIC INTERNAL ORGANS (robotic organs only) to allow AIs to control it. Comes with its own health sensors beacon. MUST be a humanoid or bad things happen to the consciousness.
obj.item.organ.brain.cybernetic.ai.name: AI-uplink brain

obj.item.organ.brain.cybernetic.cortical.desc: A brain which has been, in some part, mechanized.
obj.item.organ.brain.cybernetic.cortical.name: cortically-augmented brain

obj.item.organ.brain.cybernetic.cortical.desc: A brain which has been in some part mechanized. The components are seamlessly integrated into the flesh, which protect that grey matter from biological processes.
obj.item.organ.brain.cybernetic.cortical.name: vox-augmented brain

obj.item.organ.brain.cybernetic.surplus.desc: A mostly-mechanized brain. Not much of the flesh remains. Does this make them an IPC?
obj.item.organ.brain.cybernetic.surplus.name: surplus augmented brain

obj.item.organ.brain.dullahan.desc: A piece of juicy meat found in a person's head.
obj.item.organ.brain.dullahan.name: brain

obj.item.organ.brain.felinid.desc: A piece of juicy meat found in a person's head.
obj.item.organ.brain.felinid.name: brain

obj.item.organ.brain.ghost.desc: How are you even able to hold this?
obj.item.organ.brain.ghost.name: ghost brain

obj.item.organ.brain.golem.desc: This collection of sparkling gems somehow allows a golem to think.
obj.item.organ.brain.golem.name: crystalline matrix

obj.item.organ.brain.goliath.desc: goliath DNA infused into what was once a normal brain.
obj.item.organ.brain.goliath.name: mutated goliath-brain

obj.item.organ.brain.lizard.desc: This juicy piece of meat has a oversized brain stem and cerebellum, with not much of a limbic system to speak of at all. You would expect its owner to be pretty cold blooded.
obj.item.organ.brain.lizard.name: lizard brain

obj.item.organ.brain.lustrous.desc: This is your brain on bluespace dust. Not even once.
obj.item.organ.brain.lustrous.name: lustrous brain

obj.item.organ.brain.lycan.desc: A larger than average, albeit slightly smoother brain. The hypothalamus seems larger than normal.
obj.item.organ.brain.lycan.name: lupine brain

obj.item.organ.brain.pod.desc: The brain of a pod person, it's a bit more plant-like than a human brain.
obj.item.organ.brain.pod.name: pod nucleus

obj.item.organ.brain.primate.desc: This wad of meat is small, but has enlarged occipital lobes for spotting bananas.
obj.item.organ.brain.primate.name: Primate Brain

obj.item.organ.brain.primitive.desc: This juicy piece of meat has a clearly underdeveloped frontal lobe.
obj.item.organ.brain.primitive.name: primitive brain

obj.item.organ.brain.protean.desc: An advanced positronic brain, typically found in the core of a protean.
obj.item.organ.brain.protean.name: protean core

obj.item.organ.brain.psyker.desc: This brain is blue, split into two hemispheres, and has immense psychic powers. What kind of monstrosity would use that?
obj.item.organ.brain.psyker.name: psyker brain

obj.item.organ.brain.serpentid.desc: A piece of juicy meat found in a person's head.
obj.item.organ.brain.serpentid.name: distributed nervous system

obj.item.organ.brain.shadow.desc: Something that was once a brain, before being remolded by a shadowling. It has adapted to the dark, irreversibly.
obj.item.organ.brain.shadow.name: shadowling tumor

obj.item.organ.brain.shadow.nightmare.desc: A fleshy growth that was dug out of the skull of a Nightmare.
obj.item.organ.brain.shadow.nightmare.name: tumorous mass

obj.item.organ.brain.skrell.desc: A piece of juicy meat found in a person's head.
obj.item.organ.brain.skrell.name: spongy brain

obj.item.organ.brain.synth.desc: A cube of shining metal, four inches to a side and covered in shallow grooves. It has an IPC serial number engraved on the top. It is usually slotted into the chest of synthetic crewmembers.
obj.item.organ.brain.synth.name: compact positronic brain

obj.item.organ.brain.synth.circuit.desc: A compact and extremely complex circuit, perfectly dimensioned to fit in the same slot as a synthetic-compatible positronic brain. It is usually slotted into the chest of synthetic crewmembers.
obj.item.organ.brain.synth.circuit.name: compact AI circuit

obj.item.organ.brain.synth.mmi.desc: A compact man-machine interface, perfectly dimensioned to fit in the same slot as a synthetic-compatible positronic brain. Unfortunately, the brain seems to be permanently attached to the circuitry, and it seems relatively sensitive to it's environment. It is usually slotted into the chest of synthetic crewmembers.
obj.item.organ.brain.synth.mmi.name: compact man-machine interface

obj.item.organ.brain.xeno_hybrid.desc: A piece of juicy meat found in a person's head.
obj.item.organ.brain.xeno_hybrid.name: brain

obj.item.organ.brain.zombie.desc: This glob of green mass can't have much intelligence inside it.
obj.item.organ.brain.zombie.name: zombie brain

obj.item.organ.cyberimp.desc: A state-of-the-art implant that improves a baseline's functionality.
obj.item.organ.cyberimp.name: cybernetic implant

obj.item.organ.cyberimp.arm.desc: An implant that goes in your arm to improve it.
obj.item.organ.cyberimp.arm.name: arm-mounted implant

obj.item.organ.cyberimp.arm.strongarm.desc: When implanted, this cybernetic implant will enhance the muscles of the arm to deliver more power-per-action. Install one in each arm 		to pry open doors with your bare hands!
obj.item.organ.cyberimp.arm.strongarm.name: Strong-Arm empowered musculature implant

obj.item.organ.cyberimp.arm.toolkit.desc: You shouldn't see this! Adminhelp and report this as an issue on github!
obj.item.organ.cyberimp.arm.toolkit.name: arm-mounted toolkit

obj.item.organ.cyberimp.arm.toolkit.armb.desc: An integrated blade implant designed to be installed into a persons arm. Stylish and deadly; Although, being caught with this without proper permits is sure to draw unwanted attention.
obj.item.organ.cyberimp.arm.toolkit.armb.name: arm blade implant

obj.item.organ.cyberimp.arm.toolkit.bato.desc: An illegal combat implant that allows the user to administer disabling shocks from their arm.
obj.item.organ.cyberimp.arm.toolkit.bato.name: arm electrification implant

obj.item.organ.cyberimp.arm.toolkit.bota.desc: A rather simple arm implant containing tools used in gardening and botanical research.
obj.item.organ.cyberimp.arm.toolkit.bota.name: botany arm implant

obj.item.organ.cyberimp.arm.toolkit.comb.desc: A powerful cybernetic implant that contains combat modules built into the user's arm.
obj.item.organ.cyberimp.arm.toolkit.comb.name: combat cybernetics implant

obj.item.organ.cyberimp.arm.toolkit.eswo.desc: An illegal and highly dangerous cybernetic implant that can project a deadly blade of concentrated energy.
obj.item.organ.cyberimp.arm.toolkit.eswo.name: arm-mounted energy blade

obj.item.organ.cyberimp.arm.toolkit.flas.desc: An integrated projector mounted onto a user's arm that is able to be used as a powerful flash.
obj.item.organ.cyberimp.arm.toolkit.flas.name: integrated high-intensity photon projector

obj.item.organ.cyberimp.arm.toolkit.foam.desc: An implanted foam dart blaster from Donksoft. Do not aim at face. Do not use modified darts.
obj.item.organ.cyberimp.arm.toolkit.foam.name: donksoft pop-up blaster implant

obj.item.organ.cyberimp.arm.toolkit.foam.desc: An implanted foam dart blaster from Donksoft. Do not aim at face. Do not use modified darts.
obj.item.organ.cyberimp.arm.toolkit.foam.name: donksoft pop-up blaster implant

obj.item.organ.cyberimp.arm.toolkit.foam.desc: An implanted foam dart blaster from Donksoft. Do not aim at face. Do not use modified darts.
obj.item.organ.cyberimp.arm.toolkit.foam.name: donksoft pop-up blaster implant

obj.item.organ.cyberimp.arm.toolkit.gun..desc: A variant of the arm cannon implant that fires lethal laser beams. The cannon emerges from the subject's arm and remains inside when not in use.
obj.item.organ.cyberimp.arm.toolkit.gun..name: arm-mounted laser implant

obj.item.organ.cyberimp.arm.toolkit.gun..desc: A variant of the arm cannon implant that fires electrodes and disabler shots. The cannon emerges from the subject's arm and remains inside when not in use.
obj.item.organ.cyberimp.arm.toolkit.gun..name: arm-mounted taser implant

obj.item.organ.cyberimp.arm.toolkit.hack.desc: An small arm implant containing an advanced screwdriver, wirecutters, and multitool designed for engineers and on-the-field machine modification. Actually legal, despite what the name may make you think.
obj.item.organ.cyberimp.arm.toolkit.hack.name: hacking arm implant

obj.item.organ.cyberimp.arm.toolkit.jani.desc: A set of janitorial tools on the user's arm.
obj.item.organ.cyberimp.arm.toolkit.jani.name: janitorial tools implant

obj.item.organ.cyberimp.arm.toolkit.medi.desc: A cybernetic implant that allows the user to project a healing beam from their hand.
obj.item.organ.cyberimp.arm.toolkit.medi.name: integrated medical beamgun

obj.item.organ.cyberimp.arm.toolkit.pape.desc: A highly sought out implant among heads of personnel, and other high up command staff in Nanotrasen. This implant allows the user to always have the tools necessary for paperwork handy
obj.item.organ.cyberimp.arm.toolkit.pape.name: integrated paperwork implant

obj.item.organ.cyberimp.arm.toolkit.penf.desc: A cybernetic fingertip replacement containing a four color pen.
obj.item.organ.cyberimp.arm.toolkit.penf.name: four color pen implant

obj.item.organ.cyberimp.arm.toolkit.penf.desc: A cybernetic fingertip replacement containing a four color pen.
obj.item.organ.cyberimp.arm.toolkit.penf.name: four color pen implant

obj.item.organ.cyberimp.arm.toolkit.penf.desc: A cybernetic fingertip replacement containing a four color pen.
obj.item.organ.cyberimp.arm.toolkit.penf.name: four color pen implant

obj.item.organ.cyberimp.arm.toolkit.pill.desc: You shouldn't see this! Adminhelp and report this as an issue on github!
obj.item.organ.cyberimp.arm.toolkit.pill.name: arm-mounted toolkit

obj.item.organ.cyberimp.arm.toolkit.pill.desc: You shouldn't see this! Adminhelp and report this as an issue on github!
obj.item.organ.cyberimp.arm.toolkit.pill.name: arm-mounted toolkit

obj.item.organ.cyberimp.arm.toolkit.powe.desc: An internal power cord. Useful if you run on elecricity. Not so much otherwise.
obj.item.organ.cyberimp.arm.toolkit.powe.name: charging implant

obj.item.organ.cyberimp.arm.toolkit.powe.desc: An internal power cord. Useful if you run on elecricity. Not so much otherwise.
obj.item.organ.cyberimp.arm.toolkit.powe.name: charging implant

obj.item.organ.cyberimp.arm.toolkit.powe.desc: An internal power cord. Useful if you run on elecricity. Not so much otherwise.
obj.item.organ.cyberimp.arm.toolkit.powe.name: charging implant

obj.item.organ.cyberimp.arm.toolkit.razo.desc: A set of hidden, retractable blades built into the fingertips; cyborg mercenary approved.
obj.item.organ.cyberimp.arm.toolkit.razo.name: razor claws implant

obj.item.organ.cyberimp.arm.toolkit.razo.desc: A set of hidden, retractable blades built into the fingertips; cyborg mercenary approved.
obj.item.organ.cyberimp.arm.toolkit.razo.name: razor claws implant

obj.item.organ.cyberimp.arm.toolkit.razo.desc: A set of hidden, retractable blades built into the fingertips; cyborg mercenary approved.
obj.item.organ.cyberimp.arm.toolkit.razo.name: razor claws implant

obj.item.organ.cyberimp.arm.toolkit.secl.desc: An implanted model of seclite installed in the palm.
obj.item.organ.cyberimp.arm.toolkit.secl.name: seclite implant

obj.item.organ.cyberimp.arm.toolkit.secl.desc: An implanted model of seclite installed in the palm.
obj.item.organ.cyberimp.arm.toolkit.secl.name: seclite implant

obj.item.organ.cyberimp.arm.toolkit.secl.desc: An implanted model of seclite installed in the palm.
obj.item.organ.cyberimp.arm.toolkit.secl.name: seclite implant

obj.item.organ.cyberimp.arm.toolkit.shar.desc: An eerie metal shard surrounded by dark energies...of soup drinking. You probably don't think you should have been able to find this.
obj.item.organ.cyberimp.arm.toolkit.shar.name: dark spoon shard

obj.item.organ.cyberimp.arm.toolkit.shar.desc: An eerie metal shard surrounded by dark energies.
obj.item.organ.cyberimp.arm.toolkit.shar.name: dark shard

obj.item.organ.cyberimp.arm.toolkit.shar.desc: This shard seems to be directly linked to some sinister entity. It might be your god! It also gives you a really horrible rash when you hold onto it for too long.
obj.item.organ.cyberimp.arm.toolkit.shar.name: sinister shard

obj.item.organ.cyberimp.arm.toolkit.surg.desc: A set of surgical tools hidden behind a concealed panel on the user's arm.
obj.item.organ.cyberimp.arm.toolkit.surg.name: surgical toolset implant

obj.item.organ.cyberimp.arm.toolkit.surg.desc: A set of alien surgical tools hidden behind a concealed panel on the user's arm.
obj.item.organ.cyberimp.arm.toolkit.surg.name: alien surgical toolset implant

obj.item.organ.cyberimp.arm.toolkit.surg.desc: A modified set of surgical tools hidden behind a concealed panel on the user's arm. These tools seem twisted and cruel, designed to maximize pain while operating with incredible precision.
obj.item.organ.cyberimp.arm.toolkit.surg.name: morbid surgical toolset implant

obj.item.organ.cyberimp.arm.toolkit.surg.desc: A set of surgical tools hidden behind a concealed panel on the user's arm. This one seems to have been tampered with.
obj.item.organ.cyberimp.arm.toolkit.surg.name: hacked surgical toolset implant

obj.item.organ.cyberimp.arm.toolkit.tape.desc: A tape recorder implanted within the forearm. Triple press button on wrist to quickly start and stop recording. Further controls on inside facing of casette slot panel.
obj.item.organ.cyberimp.arm.toolkit.tape.name: universal recorder implant

obj.item.organ.cyberimp.arm.toolkit.tape.desc: A tape recorder implanted within the forearm. Triple press button on wrist to quickly start and stop recording. Further controls on inside facing of casette slot panel.
obj.item.organ.cyberimp.arm.toolkit.tape.name: universal recorder implant

obj.item.organ.cyberimp.arm.toolkit.tape.desc: A tape recorder implanted within the forearm. Triple press button on wrist to quickly start and stop recording. Further controls on inside facing of casette slot panel.
obj.item.organ.cyberimp.arm.toolkit.tape.name: universal recorder implant

obj.item.organ.cyberimp.arm.toolkit.tool.desc: A stripped-down version of the engineering cyborg toolset, designed to be installed on subject's arm. Contain advanced versions of every tool.
obj.item.organ.cyberimp.arm.toolkit.tool.name: integrated toolset implant

obj.item.organ.cyberimp.arm.toolkit.tool.desc: A version of the engineering toolset, designed to be installed on subject's arm. Contain abductor tools.
obj.item.organ.cyberimp.arm.toolkit.tool.name: integrated alien toolset implant

obj.item.organ.cyberimp.bci.desc: An implant that can be placed in a user's head to control circuits using their brain.
obj.item.organ.cyberimp.bci.name: brain-computer interface

obj.item.organ.cyberimp.brain.desc: Injectors of extra sub-routines for the brain.
obj.item.organ.cyberimp.brain.name: cybernetic brain implant

obj.item.organ.cyberimp.brain.anti_drop.desc: This cybernetic brain implant will allow you to force your hand muscles to contract, preventing item dropping. Twitch ear to toggle.
obj.item.organ.cyberimp.brain.anti_drop.name: anti-drop implant

obj.item.organ.cyberimp.brain.anti_sleep.desc: This implant will automatically attempt to jolt you awake when it detects you have fallen unconscious outside of REM sleeping cycles. Has a short cooldown. Conflicts with the CNS Rebooter, making them incompatible with eachother.
obj.item.organ.cyberimp.brain.anti_sleep.name: CNS jumpstarter

obj.item.organ.cyberimp.brain.anti_stun.desc: This implant will automatically give you back control over your central nervous system, reducing downtime when stunned.
obj.item.organ.cyberimp.brain.anti_stun.name: CNS rebooter implant

obj.item.organ.cyberimp.brain.connector.desc: This cybernetic adds a port to the back of your head, where you can remove or add skillchips at will.
obj.item.organ.cyberimp.brain.connector.name: CNS skillchip connector implant

obj.item.organ.cyberimp.brain.empathic_s.desc: This won't fix your social issues, but it may help you repress them better.
obj.item.organ.cyberimp.brain.empathic_s.name: empathic sensor implant

obj.item.organ.cyberimp.brain.nif.desc: A brain implant that infuses the user with nanites.
obj.item.organ.cyberimp.brain.nif.name: Nanite Implant Framework

obj.item.organ.cyberimp.brain.nif.debug.desc: A brain implant that infuses the user with nanites.
obj.item.organ.cyberimp.brain.nif.debug.name: Nanite Implant Framework

obj.item.organ.cyberimp.brain.nif.rolepl.desc: 'Econo-Deck' is a classification for lower-quality Nanite Implant Frameworks. Typically, these are off-brand 'economical' bootlegs of higher-quality Frameworks featuring lower-grade power cells, outdated and risky construction patterns, and far rougher calibration with a user.
obj.item.organ.cyberimp.brain.nif.rolepl.name: Econo-Deck Type NIF

obj.item.organ.cyberimp.brain.nif.rolepl.desc: 'Trial-Lite' is a classification for temporary Nanite Implant Frameworks. These are typically distributed at promotional events, for the use of single-purpose NIFsofts, or at some Corporate dealerships to offer prospective users a look into the scene. Normally, Trial-Lite frameworks do not actually 'bond' with their user, forming an extremely loose connection before dissolving into scattered and dead nanomachines within a few hours, typically exhaled.
obj.item.organ.cyberimp.brain.nif.rolepl.name: Trial-Lite Type NIF

obj.item.organ.cyberimp.brain.nif.standa.desc: 'Standard-Type' is a classification for high-quality Nanite Implant Frameworks. This category primarily includes Framework patterns with high reliability, seamless bonding with a user, and a combination of storage space and processing power to run a wide array of programs.
obj.item.organ.cyberimp.brain.nif.standa.name: Standard Type NIF

obj.item.organ.cyberimp.brain.nif.standa.desc: 'Standard-Type' is a classification for high-quality Nanite Implant Frameworks. This category primarily includes Framework patterns with high reliability, seamless bonding with a user, and a combination of storage space and processing power to run a wide array of programs.
obj.item.organ.cyberimp.brain.nif.standa.name: Standard Type NIF

obj.item.organ.cyberimp.brain.surgical_p.desc: A cybernetic brain implant that allows you to perform advanced operations anywhere, anytime.
obj.item.organ.cyberimp.brain.surgical_p.name: surgical processor implant

obj.item.organ.cyberimp.brain.surgical_p.desc: A cybernetic brain implant that allows you to perform advanced operations anywhere, anytime.
obj.item.organ.cyberimp.brain.surgical_p.name: surgical processor implant

obj.item.organ.cyberimp.brain.wound_scan.desc: A simple implanted health monitoring chip to scan for wounds and give treatment instructions, relayed to the brain.
obj.item.organ.cyberimp.brain.wound_scan.name: internal wound analyzer chip

obj.item.organ.cyberimp.chest.desc: Implants for the organs in your torso.
obj.item.organ.cyberimp.chest.name: cybernetic torso implant

obj.item.organ.cyberimp.chest.nutriment.desc: This implant will synthesize and pump into your bloodstream a small amount of nutriment when you are starving.
obj.item.organ.cyberimp.chest.nutriment.name: nutriment pump implant

obj.item.organ.cyberimp.chest.nutriment..desc: This implant will synthesize and pump into your bloodstream a small amount of nutriment when you are hungry.
obj.item.organ.cyberimp.chest.nutriment..name: nutriment pump implant PLUS

obj.item.organ.cyberimp.chest.reviver.desc: This implant will attempt to revive and heal you if you lose consciousness. For the faint of heart!
obj.item.organ.cyberimp.chest.reviver.name: reviver implant

obj.item.organ.cyberimp.chest.scanner.desc: An advanced health analyzer implant, designed to directly interface with a host's body and relay scan information to the brain on command.
obj.item.organ.cyberimp.chest.scanner.name: internal health analyzer

obj.item.organ.cyberimp.chest.spine.desc: This gravitronic spinal interface is able to improve the athletics of a user, allowing them greater physical ability. 		Contains a slot which can be upgraded with a gravity anomaly core, improving its performance.
obj.item.organ.cyberimp.chest.spine.name: Herculean gravitronic spinal implant

obj.item.organ.cyberimp.chest.spine.atla.desc: This gravitronic spinal interface is able to improve the athletics of a user, allowing them greater physical ability. 		This one has been improved through the installation of a gravity anomaly core, allowing for personal gravity manipulation. 		Not only can you walk with your feet planted firmly on the ground even during a loss of environmental gravity, but you also 		carry heavier loads with relative ease.
obj.item.organ.cyberimp.chest.spine.atla.name: Atlas gravitonic spinal implant

obj.item.organ.cyberimp.chest.thrusters.desc: An implantable set of thruster ports. They use the gas from environment or subject's internals for propulsion in zero-gravity areas. 	Unlike regular jetpacks, this device has no stabilization system.
obj.item.organ.cyberimp.chest.thrusters.name: implantable thrusters set

obj.item.organ.cyberimp.eyes.hud.desc: These cybernetic eyes will display a HUD over everything you see. Maybe.
obj.item.organ.cyberimp.eyes.hud.name: HUD implant

obj.item.organ.cyberimp.eyes.hud.civilia.desc: These cybernetic eye implants will display a Civilian HUD over everything you see.
obj.item.organ.cyberimp.eyes.hud.civilia.name: Civilian HUD implant

obj.item.organ.cyberimp.eyes.hud.civilia.desc: These cybernetic eye implants will display a Civilian HUD over everything you see.
obj.item.organ.cyberimp.eyes.hud.civilia.name: Civilian HUD implant

obj.item.organ.cyberimp.eyes.hud.diagnos.desc: These cybernetic eye implants will display a diagnostic HUD over everything you see.
obj.item.organ.cyberimp.eyes.hud.diagnos.name: diagnostic HUD implant

obj.item.organ.cyberimp.eyes.hud.medical.desc: These cybernetic eye implants will display a medical HUD over everything you see.
obj.item.organ.cyberimp.eyes.hud.medical.name: medical HUD implant

obj.item.organ.cyberimp.eyes.hud.securit.desc: These cybernetic eye implants will display a security HUD over everything you see.
obj.item.organ.cyberimp.eyes.hud.securit.name: security HUD implant

obj.item.organ.cyberimp.eyes.hud.securit.desc: A Cybersun Industries brand Security HUD Implant. These illicit cybernetic eye implants will display a security HUD over everything you see.
obj.item.organ.cyberimp.eyes.hud.securit.name: contraband security HUD implant

obj.item.organ.cyberimp.mouth.desc: A state-of-the-art implant that improves a baseline's functionality.
obj.item.organ.cyberimp.mouth.name: cybernetic implant

obj.item.organ.cyberimp.mouth.breathing_.desc: This simple implant adds an internals connector to your back, allowing you to use internals without a mask and protecting you from being choked.
obj.item.organ.cyberimp.mouth.breathing_.name: breathing tube implant

obj.item.organ.ears.desc: There are three parts to the ear. Inner, middle and outer. Only one of these parts should be normally visible.
obj.item.organ.ears.name: ears

obj.item.organ.ears.babbelfish.desc: Both halves of a babbelfish after being twisted apart. The legends claim inserting these can unlock your psychic potential. It probably wasn't worth hearing that wail, though.
obj.item.organ.ears.babbelfish.name: split babbelfish halves

obj.item.organ.ears.cat.desc: There are three parts to the ear. Inner, middle and outer. Only one of these parts should be normally visible.
obj.item.organ.ears.cat.name: cat ears

obj.item.organ.ears.cat.cybernetic.desc: A basic cybernetic organ designed to mimic the operation of ears.
obj.item.organ.ears.cat.cybernetic.name: basic cybernetic cat ears

obj.item.organ.ears.cat.cybernetic.upgra.desc: A cybernetic cat ear, still less durable than human ears.
obj.item.organ.ears.cat.cybernetic.upgra.name: cybernetic cat ears

obj.item.organ.ears.cat.cybernetic.volum.desc: Advanced cybernetic cat ears capable of dampening loud noises to protect their user.
obj.item.organ.ears.cat.cybernetic.volum.name: volume-adjusting cybernetic cat ears

obj.item.organ.ears.cat.cybernetic.whisp.desc: Allows the user to more easily hear whispers. The user becomes extremely vulnerable to loud noises, however.
obj.item.organ.ears.cat.cybernetic.whisp.name: whisper-sensiive cybernetic cat ears

obj.item.organ.ears.cat.cybernetic.xray.desc: Through the power of modern feline engineering, allows the user to hear speech through walls. The user becomes extremely vulnerable to loud noises, however.
obj.item.organ.ears.cat.cybernetic.xray.name: wall-penetrating cybernetic cat ears

obj.item.organ.ears.cat.super.desc: A pair of kitty ears that harvest the true energy of cats. Mrow!
obj.item.organ.ears.cat.super.name: Super Kitty Ears

obj.item.organ.ears.cat.super.syndie.desc: A pair of kitty ears that harvest the true energy of cats. Mrow!
obj.item.organ.ears.cat.super.syndie.name: Super Kitty Ears

obj.item.organ.ears.cat.tajaran.desc: These ears to seem to be from a feline of some type
obj.item.organ.ears.cat.tajaran.name: Tajaran ears

obj.item.organ.ears.cybernetic.desc: A basic cybernetic organ designed to mimic the operation of ears.
obj.item.organ.ears.cybernetic.name: basic cybernetic ears

obj.item.organ.ears.cybernetic.protean.desc: Nanites designed to collect audio feedback from the surrounding world.
obj.item.organ.ears.cybernetic.protean.name: sensory nanites

obj.item.organ.ears.cybernetic.upgraded.desc: A cybernetic ear, surpassing the performance of organic ears.
obj.item.organ.ears.cybernetic.upgraded.name: cybernetic ears

obj.item.organ.ears.cybernetic.volume.desc: Advanced cybernetic ears capable of dampening loud noises to protect their user.
obj.item.organ.ears.cybernetic.volume.name: volume-adjusting cybernetic ears

obj.item.organ.ears.cybernetic.whisper.desc: Allows the user to more easily hear whispers. The user becomes extra vulnerable to loud noises, however.
obj.item.organ.ears.cybernetic.whisper.name: whisper-sensitive cybernetic ears

obj.item.organ.ears.cybernetic.xray.desc: Through the power of modern engineering, allows the user to hear speech through walls. The user becomes extra vulnerable to loud noises, however.
obj.item.organ.ears.cybernetic.xray.name: wall-penetrating cybernetic ears

obj.item.organ.ears.dullahan.desc: There are three parts to the ear. Inner, middle and outer. Only one of these parts should be normally visible.
obj.item.organ.ears.dullahan.name: ears

obj.item.organ.ears.fox.desc: There are three parts to the ear. Inner, middle and outer. Only one of these parts should be normally visible.
obj.item.organ.ears.fox.name: fox ears

obj.item.organ.ears.ghost.desc: All the more to hear you... though it can't hear through walls.
obj.item.organ.ears.ghost.name: ghost ears

obj.item.organ.ears.invincible.desc: There are three parts to the ear. Inner, middle and outer. Only one of these parts should be normally visible.
obj.item.organ.ears.invincible.name: ears

obj.item.organ.ears.lycan.desc: These ears are large and pointed, all the better to hear you with, my dear.
obj.item.organ.ears.lycan.name: lupine ears

obj.item.organ.ears.mutant.desc: Wait, there's two pairs of these?
obj.item.organ.ears.mutant.name: fluffy ears

obj.item.organ.ears.penguin.desc: The source of a penguin's happy feet.
obj.item.organ.ears.penguin.name: penguin ears

obj.item.organ.ears.serpentid.desc: There are three parts to the ear. Inner, middle and outer. Only one of these parts should be normally visible.
obj.item.organ.ears.serpentid.name: antennae

obj.item.organ.ears.stoat.desc: Stoat DNA infused into what was once a normal pair of ears.
obj.item.organ.ears.stoat.name: mutated stoat-ears

obj.item.organ.ears.synth.desc: A pair of microphones intended to be installed in an IPC or Synthetics head, that grant the ability to hear.
obj.item.organ.ears.synth.name: auditory sensors

obj.item.organ.ears.teshari.desc: A set of four long rabbit-like ears, a Teshari's main tool while hunting. Naturally extremely sensitive to loud sounds.
obj.item.organ.ears.teshari.name: teshari ears

obj.item.organ.eyes.alien.desc: It turned out they had them after all!
obj.item.organ.eyes.alien.name: alien eyes

obj.item.organ.eyes.corrupt.desc: These eyes have seen something they shouldn't have.
obj.item.organ.eyes.corrupt.name: corrupt orbs

obj.item.organ.eyes.felinid.desc: A pair of highly reflective eyes with slit pupils, like those of a cat.
obj.item.organ.eyes.felinid.name: felinid eyes

obj.item.organ.eyes.fly.desc: These eyes seem to stare back no matter the direction you look at it from.
obj.item.organ.eyes.fly.name: fly eyes

obj.item.organ.eyes.ghost.desc: Despite lacking pupils, these can see pretty well.
obj.item.organ.eyes.ghost.name: ghost eyes

obj.item.organ.eyes.golem.desc: Golems somehow measure external light levels and detect nearby ore using this sensitive mineral lattice.
obj.item.organ.eyes.golem.name: resonating crystal

obj.item.organ.eyes.insect.desc: Some kind of buggy eyeball things.
obj.item.organ.eyes.insect.name: insect eyes

obj.item.organ.eyes.jelly.desc: These eyes are made of a soft jelly. Unlike all other eyes, though, there are three of them.
obj.item.organ.eyes.jelly.name: jelly eyes

obj.item.organ.eyes.lizard.desc: A pair of reptile eyes with thin vertical slits for pupils.
obj.item.organ.eyes.lizard.name: reptile eyes

obj.item.organ.eyes.lycan.desc: These eyes are large, all the better to see you with, my dear.
obj.item.organ.eyes.lycan.name: lupine eyes

obj.item.organ.eyes.moth.desc: These eyes seem to have increased sensitivity to bright light, with no improvement to low light vision.
obj.item.organ.eyes.moth.name: moth eyes

obj.item.organ.eyes.night_vision.cyber.desc: A pair of eyes with built-in nightvision optics, with the additional bonus of being rad as hell.
obj.item.organ.eyes.night_vision.cyber.name: nightvision eyes

obj.item.organ.eyes.night_vision.goliath.desc: goliath DNA infused into what was once some normal eyes.
obj.item.organ.eyes.night_vision.goliath.name: goliath eyes

obj.item.organ.eyes.night_vision.mainten.desc: These red eyes look like two foggy marbles. They give off a particularly worrying glow in the dark.
obj.item.organ.eyes.night_vision.mainten.name: adapted eyes

obj.item.organ.eyes.night_vision.mushroo.desc: While on the outside they look inert and dead, the eyes of mushroom people are actually very advanced.
obj.item.organ.eyes.night_vision.mushroo.name: fung-eye

obj.item.organ.eyes.night_vision.rat.desc: Rat DNA infused into what was once a normal pair of eyes.
obj.item.organ.eyes.night_vision.rat.name: mutated rat-eyes

obj.item.organ.eyes.robotic.basic.desc: A pair of basic cybernetic eyes that restore vision, but at some vulnerability to light.
obj.item.organ.eyes.robotic.basic.name: basic robotic eyes

obj.item.organ.eyes.robotic.basic.moth.desc: A pair of basic cybernetic eyes that restore vision, but at some vulnerability to light.
obj.item.organ.eyes.robotic.basic.moth.name: basic robotic moth eyes

obj.item.organ.eyes.robotic.flashlight.desc: It's two flashlights rigged together with some wire. Why would you put these in someone's head?
obj.item.organ.eyes.robotic.flashlight.name: flashlight eyes

obj.item.organ.eyes.robotic.glow.desc: Special glowing eyes, used by snowflakes who want to be special.
obj.item.organ.eyes.robotic.glow.name: high luminosity eyes

obj.item.organ.eyes.robotic.glow.moth.desc: Special glowing eyes, to be one with the lamp. Much like actual moth eyes, very sensitive to bright lights.
obj.item.organ.eyes.robotic.glow.moth.name: high luminosity moth eyes

obj.item.organ.eyes.robotic.manuallyshie.desc: These eyes will protect you from going blind while welding after you manually activate them.
obj.item.organ.eyes.robotic.manuallyshie.name: manually shielded robotic eyes

obj.item.organ.eyes.robotic.manuallyshie.desc: These eyes will protect you from going blind while welding after you manually activate them.
obj.item.organ.eyes.robotic.manuallyshie.name: manually shielded robotic moth eyes

obj.item.organ.eyes.robotic.moth.desc: Your vision is augmented. Much like actual moth eyes, very sensitive to bright lights.
obj.item.organ.eyes.robotic.moth.name: robotic moth eyes

obj.item.organ.eyes.robotic.protean.desc: Nanites designed to collect visual data from the surrounding world.
obj.item.organ.eyes.robotic.protean.name: imaging nanites

obj.item.organ.eyes.robotic.shield.desc: These reactive micro-shields will protect you from welders and flashes without obscuring your vision.
obj.item.organ.eyes.robotic.shield.name: shielded robotic eyes

obj.item.organ.eyes.robotic.shield.moth.desc: These reactive micro-shields will protect you from welders and flashes without obscuring your vision.
obj.item.organ.eyes.robotic.shield.moth.name: shielded robotic moth eyes

obj.item.organ.eyes.robotic.tacvisor.desc: A failed attempt at integrating IFF systems directly into soldiers' prefrontal cortex, this complex sensor array has proved to be impractical as the additional load impared the user's ability to recognize people's appearances or voices. The screen is there just for intimidation.
obj.item.organ.eyes.robotic.tacvisor.name: tactical EFF visor

obj.item.organ.eyes.robotic.tacvisor.dea.desc: A failed attempt at integrating IFF systems directly into soldiers' prefrontal cortex, this complex sensor array has proved to be impractical as the additional load impared the user's ability to recognize people's appearances or voices. The screen is there just for intimidation.
obj.item.organ.eyes.robotic.tacvisor.dea.name: tactical EFF visor

obj.item.organ.eyes.robotic.thermals.desc: These cybernetic eye implants will give you thermal vision. Vertical slit pupil included.
obj.item.organ.eyes.robotic.thermals.name: thermal eyes

obj.item.organ.eyes.robotic.thermals.mot.desc: These cybernetic eye implants will give you thermal vision. Vertical slit pupil included.
obj.item.organ.eyes.robotic.thermals.mot.name: thermal moth eyes

obj.item.organ.eyes.robotic.xray.desc: These cybernetic eyes will give you X-ray vision. Blinking is futile.
obj.item.organ.eyes.robotic.xray.name: x-ray eyes

obj.item.organ.eyes.robotic.xray.moth.desc: These cybernetic imitation moth eyes will give you X-ray vision. Blinking is futile. Much like actual moth eyes, very sensitive to bright lights.
obj.item.organ.eyes.robotic.xray.moth.name: moth x-ray eyes

obj.item.organ.eyes.shadekin.desc: These eyes are massive, and feel warm to the touch. The shadekin that's missing these is probably feeling very queasy.
obj.item.organ.eyes.shadekin.name: shadekin eyes

obj.item.organ.eyes.shadow.desc: Even without their shadowy owner, looking at these eyes gives you a sense of dread.
obj.item.organ.eyes.shadow.name: burning red eyes

obj.item.organ.eyes.snail.desc: These eyes seem to have a large range, but might be cumbersome with glasses.
obj.item.organ.eyes.snail.name: snail eyes

obj.item.organ.eyes.stoat.desc: Stoat DNA infused into what was once a normal pair of eyes.
obj.item.organ.eyes.stoat.name: mutated stoat-eyes

obj.item.organ.eyes.synth.desc: A very basic set of optical sensors with no extra vision modes or functions.
obj.item.organ.eyes.synth.name: optical sensors

obj.item.organ.eyes.vulpkanin.desc: These eyes seem adept at seeing in low light environments, not that the vulpkanin missing them can see anything right now.
obj.item.organ.eyes.vulpkanin.name: vulpkanin eyes

obj.item.organ.eyes.zombie.desc: Somewhat counterintuitively, these half-rotten eyes actually have superior vision to those of a living human.
obj.item.organ.eyes.zombie.name: undead eyes

obj.item.organ.frills.desc: Ear-like external organs often seen on aquatic reptilians.
obj.item.organ.frills.name: frills

obj.item.organ.genital.anus.desc: What do you want me to tell you?
obj.item.organ.genital.anus.name: anus

obj.item.organ.genital.belly.desc: You see a belly on their midsection.
obj.item.organ.genital.belly.name: belly

obj.item.organ.genital.butt.desc: You see a pair of asscheeks.
obj.item.organ.genital.butt.name: butt

obj.item.organ.heart.desc: I feel bad for the heartless bastard who lost this.
obj.item.organ.heart.name: heart

obj.item.organ.heart.carp.desc: Carp DNA infused into what was once a normal heart.
obj.item.organ.heart.carp.name: mutated carp-heart

obj.item.organ.heart.corrupt.desc: What corruption is this spreading along with the blood?
obj.item.organ.heart.corrupt.name: corrupt heart

obj.item.organ.heart.cursed.desc: A heart that, when inserted, will force you to pump it manually.
obj.item.organ.heart.cursed.name: cursed heart

obj.item.organ.heart.cursed.wizard.desc: A heart that, when inserted, will force you to pump it manually.
obj.item.organ.heart.cursed.wizard.name: cursed heart

obj.item.organ.heart.cybernetic.desc: A basic electronic device designed to mimic the functions of an organic human heart.
obj.item.organ.heart.cybernetic.name: basic cybernetic heart

obj.item.organ.heart.cybernetic.anomaloc.desc: A cutting-edge cyberheart, originally designed for Nanotrasen killsquad usage but later declassified for normal research. Voltaic technology allows the heart to keep the body upright in dire circumstances, alongside redirecting anomalous flux energy to fully shield the user from shocks and electro-magnetic pulses. Requires a refined Flux core as a power source.
obj.item.organ.heart.cybernetic.anomaloc.name: voltaic combat cyberheart

obj.item.organ.heart.cybernetic.surplus.desc: A fragile mockery of a human heart that resembles a water pump more than an actual heart. 		Offers no protection against EMPs.
obj.item.organ.heart.cybernetic.surplus.name: surplus prosthetic heart

obj.item.organ.heart.cybernetic.tier2.desc: An electronic device designed to mimic the functions of an organic human heart. In case of lacerations or haemorrhaging, the heart rapidly begins self-replicating 		artificial blood. However, this can cause toxins to build up in the bloodstream to the imperfect replication process.
obj.item.organ.heart.cybernetic.tier2.name: cybernetic heart

obj.item.organ.heart.cybernetic.tier3.desc: An electronic device designed to mimic the functions of an organic human heart. In case of physical trauma, the heart has temporary failsafes to maintain patient stability 		and mobility for a brief moment. In addition, the heart is able to safely self-replicate blood without risk of toxin buildup.
obj.item.organ.heart.cybernetic.tier3.name: upgraded cybernetic heart

obj.item.organ.heart.demon.desc: Still it beats furiously, emanating an aura of utter hate.
obj.item.organ.heart.demon.name: demon heart

obj.item.organ.heart.ethereal.desc: A crystal-like organ that functions similarly to a heart for Ethereals. It can revive its owner.
obj.item.organ.heart.ethereal.name: crystal core

obj.item.organ.heart.evolved.sacred.desc: Your foul magics stand no chance against the power of LOVE!!!
obj.item.organ.heart.evolved.sacred.name: sacred heart

obj.item.organ.heart.fly.desc: I feel bad for the heartless bastard who lost this.
obj.item.organ.heart.fly.name: heart

obj.item.organ.heart.freedom.desc: This heart pumps with the passion to give... something freedom.
obj.item.organ.heart.freedom.name: heart of freedom

obj.item.organ.heart.gland.desc: A nausea-inducing hunk of twisting flesh and metal.
obj.item.organ.heart.gland.name: fleshy mass

obj.item.organ.heart.gondola.name: mutated gondola-heart

obj.item.organ.heart.hemophage.desc: This pulsating organ nearly resembles a normal heart, but it's been twisted beyond any human appearance, having turned to the color of coal. obj.item.organ.heart.hemophage.name: pulsating tumor

obj.item.organ.heart.lycan.desc: A large heart that beats powerfully. The veins on it are far larger than normal.
obj.item.organ.heart.lycan.name: lupine heart

obj.item.organ.heart.nightmare.name: heart of darkness

obj.item.organ.heart.pod.desc: This plant-like organ is the powerhouse of the podperson.
obj.item.organ.heart.pod.name: pod mitochondria

obj.item.organ.heart.protean.desc: A small computer, designed for highly parallel workloads.
obj.item.organ.heart.protean.name: orchestrator module

obj.item.organ.heart.rat.name: mutated rat-heart

obj.item.organ.heart.skrell.desc: I feel bad for the heartless bastard who lost this.
obj.item.organ.heart.skrell.name: skrellian heart

obj.item.organ.heart.snail.desc: A primary heart normally nestled inside a gastropod's shell, and another in the owner's actual chest; necessary to maintain ample bloodflow through essentially two torsos.
obj.item.organ.heart.snail.name: twin gastropod hearts

obj.item.organ.heart.stoat.desc: Stoat DNA infused into what was once a normal heart.
obj.item.organ.heart.stoat.name: mutated stoat-heart

obj.item.organ.heart.synth.desc: An electronic device that handles the hydraulic pumps, powering one's robotic limbs. Without this, synthetics are unable to move.
obj.item.organ.heart.synth.name: hydraulic pump engine

obj.item.organ.heart.vampire.desc: Some guy stabbed his brother 6,000 years ago so now you have this.
obj.item.organ.heart.vampire.name: vampire heart

obj.item.organ.horns.desc: Why do lizards even have horns? Well, this one obviously doesn't.
obj.item.organ.horns.name: horns

obj.item.organ.legion_tumour.desc: A mass of pulsing flesh and dark tendrils, containing the power to regenerate flesh at a terrible cost.
obj.item.organ.legion_tumour.name: legion tumour

obj.item.organ.liver.desc: Pairing suggestion: chianti and fava beans.
obj.item.organ.liver.name: liver

obj.item.organ.liver.alien.desc: A liver that used to belong to a killer alien, who knows what it used to eat.
obj.item.organ.liver.alien.name: alien liver

obj.item.organ.liver.bloody.desc: An extra spongy liver, only slightly better than a normal liver, but with an increased ability to replenish blood.
obj.item.organ.liver.bloody.name: leaky liver

obj.item.organ.liver.bone.desc: You have no idea what this strange ball of bones does.
obj.item.organ.liver.bone.name: mass of bones

obj.item.organ.liver.bone.plasmaman.desc: A large crystal that is somehow capable of metabolizing chemicals, these are found in plasmamen.
obj.item.organ.liver.bone.plasmaman.name: reagent processing crystal

obj.item.organ.liver.corrupt.desc: After what you've seen you could really go for a drink.
obj.item.organ.liver.corrupt.name: corrupt liver

obj.item.organ.liver.cybernetic.desc: A very basic device designed to mimic the functions of a human liver. Handles toxins slightly worse than an organic liver.
obj.item.organ.liver.cybernetic.name: basic cybernetic liver

obj.item.organ.liver.cybernetic.surplus.desc: A very cheap prosthetic liver, mass produced for low-functioning alcoholics... It looks more like a water filter than 		an actual liver. 		Very fragile, absolutely terrible at filtering toxins and substantially weak to alcohol. 		Offers no protection against EMPs.
obj.item.organ.liver.cybernetic.surplus.name: surplus prosthetic liver

obj.item.organ.liver.cybernetic.tier2.desc: An electronic device designed to mimic the functions of a human liver. Handles toxins slightly better than an organic liver.
obj.item.organ.liver.cybernetic.tier2.name: cybernetic liver

obj.item.organ.liver.cybernetic.tier3.desc: An upgraded version of the cybernetic liver, designed to improve further upon organic livers. It is resistant to alcohol poisoning and is very robust at filtering toxins.
obj.item.organ.liver.cybernetic.tier3.name: upgraded cybernetic liver

obj.item.organ.liver.distillery.desc: The perfect liver, distilling non-alcoholic reagents into alcohol whenever possible.
obj.item.organ.liver.distillery.name: alcoholics delight

obj.item.organ.liver.evolved.desc: A more robust liver, better at everything.
obj.item.organ.liver.evolved.name: evolved liver

obj.item.organ.liver.fish.desc: Fish DNA infused into a stomach that now uses tetrodotoxin as regenerative material. It also processes alcohol quite well.
obj.item.organ.liver.fish.name: mutated fish-liver

obj.item.organ.liver.fly.desc: Pairing suggestion: chianti and fava beans.
obj.item.organ.liver.fly.name: liver

obj.item.organ.liver.ghost.desc: Processes the last alcohol they drank in their time alive.
obj.item.organ.liver.ghost.name: ghost liver

obj.item.organ.liver.golem.desc: A spongy rock capable of absorbing chemicals.
obj.item.organ.liver.golem.name: porous rock

obj.item.organ.liver.gondola.desc: Gondola DNA infused into what was once a normal liver.
obj.item.organ.liver.gondola.name: mutated gondola-liver

obj.item.organ.liver.hemophage.desc: Pairing suggestion: chianti and fava beans.
obj.item.organ.liver.hemophage.name: liver

obj.item.organ.liver.lycan.desc: A large liver, should wolves even be drinking alcohol?
obj.item.organ.liver.lycan.name: lupine liver

obj.item.organ.liver.pod.desc: A small plant-like organ found in podpeople responsible for filtering toxins while aiding in photosynthesis.
obj.item.organ.liver.pod.name: pod peroxisome

obj.item.organ.liver.protean.desc: A nanite harvester that processes chemicals and distributes them to the nanite swarm.
obj.item.organ.liver.protean.name: reagent catalyst

obj.item.organ.liver.roach.desc: Roach DNA infused into what was once a normal liver.
obj.item.organ.liver.roach.name: mutated roach-liver

obj.item.organ.liver.serpentid.desc: Pairing suggestion: chianti and fava beans.
obj.item.organ.liver.serpentid.name: toxin filter

obj.item.organ.liver.skrell.desc: Pairing suggestion: chianti and fava beans.
obj.item.organ.liver.skrell.name: skrell liver

obj.item.organ.liver.snail.desc: A slimy liver, constantly secreting impressive volumes of lube. Usually cooked with olive oil and cilantro, and traditionally eaten under a white flag.
obj.item.organ.liver.snail.name: snail liver

obj.item.organ.liver.synth.desc: An electronic device that processes the beneficial chemicals for the synthetic user.
obj.item.organ.liver.synth.name: reagent processing unit

obj.item.organ.liver.xeno_hybrid.desc: Pairing suggestion: chianti and fava beans.
obj.item.organ.liver.xeno_hybrid.name: liver

obj.item.organ.lungs.adaptive.desc: if you have these, or see these, someone fucked up
obj.item.organ.lungs.adaptive.name: debug-adaptive lungs

obj.item.organ.lungs.adaptive.cold.desc: A set of lungs adapted to low temperatures, though they are more susceptible to high temperatures
obj.item.organ.lungs.adaptive.cold.name: cold-adapted lungs

obj.item.organ.lungs.adaptive.cold.cyber.desc: A set of cybernetic lungs built for low temperatures, though they are more susceptible to high temperatures and EMPs. Considerably more fragile than its organic counterpart.
obj.item.organ.lungs.adaptive.cold.cyber.name: cybernetic cold-engineered lungs

obj.item.organ.lungs.adaptive.hot.desc: A set of lungs adapted to high temperatures, though they are more susceptible to low temperatures
obj.item.organ.lungs.adaptive.hot.name: heat-adapted lungs

obj.item.organ.lungs.adaptive.hot.cybern.desc: A set of cybernetic lungs built for high temperatures, though they are more susceptible to low temperatures and EMPs. Considerably more fragile than its organic counterpart.
obj.item.organ.lungs.adaptive.hot.cybern.name: cybernetic heat-engineered lungs

obj.item.organ.lungs.carp.desc: Carp DNA infused into what was once some normal lungs.
obj.item.organ.lungs.carp.name: mutated carp-lungs

obj.item.organ.lungs.corrupt.desc: Some things SHOULD be drowned in tar.
obj.item.organ.lungs.corrupt.name: corrupt lungs

obj.item.organ.lungs.cybernetic.desc: A basic cybernetic version of the lungs found in traditional humanoid entities.
obj.item.organ.lungs.cybernetic.name: basic cybernetic lungs

obj.item.organ.lungs.cybernetic.surplus.desc: Two fragile, inflatable sacks of air that only barely mimic the function of human lungs. 		Offer no protection against EMPs.
obj.item.organ.lungs.cybernetic.surplus.name: surplus prosthetic lungs

obj.item.organ.lungs.cybernetic.tier2.desc: A cybernetic version of the lungs found in traditional humanoid entities. Allows for greater intakes of oxygen than organic lungs, requiring slightly less pressure.
obj.item.organ.lungs.cybernetic.tier2.name: cybernetic lungs

obj.item.organ.lungs.cybernetic.tier3.desc: A more advanced version of the stock cybernetic lungs. Features the ability to filter out lower levels of plasma and carbon dioxide.
obj.item.organ.lungs.cybernetic.tier3.name: upgraded cybernetic lungs

obj.item.organ.lungs.ethereal.desc: These exotic lungs seem crunchier than most.
obj.item.organ.lungs.ethereal.name: aeration reticulum

obj.item.organ.lungs.ethereal.ethereal_s.desc: A pair of exotic lungs that look pale and sickly, a result from smoking a lot.
obj.item.organ.lungs.ethereal.ethereal_s.name: smoker aeration reticulum

obj.item.organ.lungs.evolved.desc: A pair of lungs, with an organic filtering system and a stronger musculature.
obj.item.organ.lungs.evolved.name: evolved lungs

obj.item.organ.lungs.fish.desc: Fish DNA infused on what once was a normal pair of lungs that now require spacemen to breathe water vapor, or keep themselves covered in water.
obj.item.organ.lungs.fish.name: mutated gills

obj.item.organ.lungs.fish.amphibious.desc: DNA from an amphibious or semi-aquatic creature infused on a pair lungs. Enjoy breathing underwater without drowning outside water.
obj.item.organ.lungs.fish.amphibious.name: mutated semi-aquatic lungs

obj.item.organ.lungs.ghost.desc: No one knows what this is even supposed to breathe.
obj.item.organ.lungs.ghost.name: ghost lungs

obj.item.organ.lungs.icebox_adapted.desc: Lungs adapted to frozen environments that would be otherwise inhospitable to most races. Feels cold.
obj.item.organ.lungs.icebox_adapted.name: hardy lungs

obj.item.organ.lungs.lavaland.desc: Exposure to the necropolis has mutated these lungs to breathe the air of Indecipheres, the lava-covered moon.
obj.item.organ.lungs.lavaland.name: blackened frilled lungs

obj.item.organ.lungs.lavaland.goliath.desc: goliath DNA infused into what was once some normal lungs.
obj.item.organ.lungs.lavaland.goliath.name: mutated goliath-lungs

obj.item.organ.lungs.lycan.desc: These lungs are larger than normal.
obj.item.organ.lungs.lycan.name: lupine lungs

obj.item.organ.lungs.nitrogen.desc: A set of lungs for breathing nitrogen.
obj.item.organ.lungs.nitrogen.name: nitrogen lungs

obj.item.organ.lungs.nitrogen.slime_lung.desc: Traditional slimeperson lungs. These ones run off nitrogen.
obj.item.organ.lungs.nitrogen.slime_lung.name: nitrogen-based vacuole

obj.item.organ.lungs.oxy.desc: A set of lungs adapted to lower-pressure environments, though more susceptible to extreme temperatures.
obj.item.organ.lungs.oxy.name: low-oxygen-adapted lungs

obj.item.organ.lungs.oxy.cybernetic.desc: A set of cybernetic lungs built for low oxygen environments, though more susceptible to extreme temperatures and EMPs. Considerably more fragile than its organic counterpart.
obj.item.organ.lungs.oxy.cybernetic.name: cybernetic low-oxygen-engineered lungs

obj.item.organ.lungs.plasmaman.desc: A spongy rib-shaped mass for filtering plasma from the air.
obj.item.organ.lungs.plasmaman.name: plasma filter

obj.item.organ.lungs.plasmaman.plasmaman.desc: A plasma filter that look discolored, a result from smoking a lot.
obj.item.organ.lungs.plasmaman.plasmaman.name: smoker plasma filter

obj.item.organ.lungs.pod.desc: A large organelle designed to store oxygen and other important gasses.
obj.item.organ.lungs.pod.name: pod vacuole

obj.item.organ.lungs.slime.desc: A large organelle designed to store oxygen and other important gasses.
obj.item.organ.lungs.slime.name: slime vacuole

obj.item.organ.lungs.smoker_lungs.desc: A pair of lungs that look sickly, a result from smoking a lot.
obj.item.organ.lungs.smoker_lungs.name: smoker lungs

obj.item.organ.lungs.synth.desc: A device that transfers generated heat to a fluid medium to cool it down. Required to keep your synthetics cool-headed. It's shape resembles lungs.
obj.item.organ.lungs.synth.name: heatsink

obj.item.organ.lungs.toxin.desc: A set of lungs adapted to toxic environments, though more susceptible to extreme temperatures.
obj.item.organ.lungs.toxin.name: toxin-adapted lungs

obj.item.organ.lungs.toxin.cybernetic.desc: A set of cybernetic lungs built for toxic environments, though more susceptible to extreme temperatures and EMPs. Considerably more fragile than its organic counterpart.
obj.item.organ.lungs.toxin.cybernetic.name: cybernetic toxin-engineered lungs

obj.item.organ.monster_core.desc: All that remains of a monster. This abstract item should not spawn. 		It will rapidly decay into uselessness. but don't worry because it's already useless.
obj.item.organ.monster_core.name: monster core

obj.item.organ.monster_core.brimdust_sac.desc: A strange organ from a brimdemon. You can shake it out to coat yourself in explosive powder.
obj.item.organ.monster_core.brimdust_sac.name: brimdust sac

obj.item.organ.monster_core.regenerative.desc: All that remains of a hivelord. It can be used to help keep your body going, but it will rapidly decay into uselessness.
obj.item.organ.monster_core.regenerative.name: regenerative core

obj.item.organ.monster_core.regenerative.desc: A strange rock that crackles with power. It can be used to heal completely, but it will rapidly decay into uselessness.
obj.item.organ.monster_core.regenerative.name: regenerative core

obj.item.organ.monster_core.rush_gland.desc: A lobstrosity's engorged adrenal gland. You can squeeze it to get a rush of energy on demand.
obj.item.organ.monster_core.rush_gland.name: rush gland

obj.item.organ.moth_markings.desc: How did you even get that off...?
obj.item.organ.moth_markings.name: moth markings

obj.item.organ.skrell_hair.desc: Hair isn't really the best way to describe it, but you really can't think of any other word that makes sense.
obj.item.organ.skrell_hair.name: skrell_hair

obj.item.organ.snout.desc: Take a closer look at that snout!
obj.item.organ.snout.name: snout

obj.item.organ.snout.stoat.desc: Take a closer look at that snout!
obj.item.organ.snout.stoat.name: stoat snout

obj.item.organ.snout.top.desc: Take a closer look at that snout!
obj.item.organ.snout.top.name: snout

obj.item.organ.snout.top_adj.desc: Take a closer look at that snout!
obj.item.organ.snout.top_adj.name: snout

obj.item.organ.stomach.bone.desc: You have no idea what this strange ball of bones does.
obj.item.organ.stomach.bone.name: mass of bones

obj.item.organ.stomach.bone.plasmaman.desc: A strange crystal that is responsible for metabolizing the unseen energy force that feeds plasmamen.
obj.item.organ.stomach.bone.plasmaman.name: digestive crystal

obj.item.organ.stomach.corrupt.desc: This parasite demands an unwholesome diet in order to be satisfied.
obj.item.organ.stomach.corrupt.name: corrupt stomach

obj.item.organ.stomach.cybernetic.desc: A basic device designed to mimic the functions of a human stomach
obj.item.organ.stomach.cybernetic.name: basic cybernetic stomach

obj.item.organ.stomach.cybernetic.surplu.desc: A mechanical plastic oval that utilizes sulfuric acid instead of stomach acid. 		Very fragile, with painfully slow metabolism.		Offers no protection against EMPs.
obj.item.organ.stomach.cybernetic.surplu.name: surplus prosthetic stomach

obj.item.organ.stomach.cybernetic.tier2.desc: An electronic device designed to mimic the functions of a human stomach. Handles disgusting food a bit better.
obj.item.organ.stomach.cybernetic.tier2.name: cybernetic stomach

obj.item.organ.stomach.cybernetic.tier3.desc: An upgraded version of the cybernetic stomach, designed to improve further upon organic stomachs. Handles disgusting food very well.
obj.item.organ.stomach.cybernetic.tier3.name: upgraded cybernetic stomach

obj.item.organ.stomach.ethereal.desc: A crystal-like organ that stores the electric charge of ethereals.
obj.item.organ.stomach.ethereal.name: biological battery

obj.item.organ.stomach.evolved.desc: It can draw nutrients from your food even harder!
obj.item.organ.stomach.evolved.name: evolved stomach

obj.item.organ.stomach.fish.desc: Fish DNA infused into a stomach now permeated by the faint smell of salt and slightly putrefied fish.
obj.item.organ.stomach.fish.name: mutated fish-stomach

obj.item.organ.stomach.ghost.desc: Ghosts eat plenty, you know? And it's not just your life, I swear!
obj.item.organ.stomach.ghost.name: ghost stomach

obj.item.organ.stomach.golem.desc: A rocklike organ which grinds and processes nutrition from minerals.
obj.item.organ.stomach.golem.name: silicate grinder

obj.item.organ.stomach.lycan.desc: A large stomach, good for holding large meals, you suppose.
obj.item.organ.stomach.lycan.name: lupine stomach

obj.item.organ.stomach.oversized.desc: Typically found in huge creatures, this monstrous engine has developed to be highly efficient, made to get an enormous amount of nutrients to an enormous eater.
obj.item.organ.stomach.oversized.name: huge guts

obj.item.organ.stomach.pod.desc: A green plant-like organ that functions similarly to a human stomach.
obj.item.organ.stomach.pod.name: pod chloroplast

obj.item.organ.stomach.protean.desc: An extremely fragile factory used to recycle materials and create more nanite mass. Needed to facilitate the repair process on a collapsed Protean; it can be installed as a module in the rig, or as an organ.
obj.item.organ.stomach.protean.name: refactory

obj.item.organ.stomach.rat.desc: Rat DNA infused into what was once a normal stomach.
obj.item.organ.stomach.rat.name: mutated rat-stomach

obj.item.organ.stomach.roach.desc: Roach DNA infused into what was once a normal stomach.
obj.item.organ.stomach.roach.name: mutated roach-stomach

obj.item.organ.stomach.synth.desc: A specialised mini reactor, for synthetic use only. Has a low-power mode to ensure baseline functions. Without this, synthetics are unable to stay powered.
obj.item.organ.stomach.synth.name: synthetic bio-reactor

obj.item.organ.stomach.synth.oversized.desc: Typically found in huge synthetics, this monstrous engine has been developed to be highly efficient, made to provide an enormous amount of power to an enormous machine.
obj.item.organ.stomach.synth.oversized.name: huge synthetic bio-reactor

obj.item.organ.synth_antenna.desc: Wonder if we'll catch Syndicate frequencies with these...
obj.item.organ.synth_antenna.name: synth antenna

obj.item.organ.synth_screen.desc: Surely that's just a bunch of LEDs and not a retro-projected screen, right? Right...?
obj.item.organ.synth_screen.name: synth screen

obj.item.organ.tail.desc: A severed tail. What did you cut this off of?
obj.item.organ.tail.name: tail

obj.item.organ.tail.cat.desc: A severed tail. What did you cut this off of?
obj.item.organ.tail.cat.name: tail

obj.item.organ.tail.fish.desc: A severed tail from some sort of marine creature... or a fish-infused spaceman. It's smooth, faintly wet and definitely not flopping.
obj.item.organ.tail.fish.name: fish tail

obj.item.organ.tail.fluffy.desc: A severed tail. What did you cut this off of?
obj.item.organ.tail.fluffy.name: fluffy tail

obj.item.organ.tail.fluffy.no_wag.desc: A severed tail. What did you cut this off of?
obj.item.organ.tail.fluffy.no_wag.name: fluffy tail

obj.item.organ.tail.lizard.desc: A severed lizard tail. Somewhere, no doubt, a lizard hater is very pleased with themselves.
obj.item.organ.tail.lizard.name: lizard tail

obj.item.organ.tail.lizard.fake.desc: A fabricated severed lizard tail. This one's made of synthflesh. Probably not usable for lizard wine.
obj.item.organ.tail.lizard.fake.name: fabricated lizard tail

obj.item.organ.tail.monkey.desc: A severed tail. What did you cut this off of?
obj.item.organ.tail.monkey.name: monkey tail

obj.item.organ.tail.xeno.desc: A long and flexible tail slightly resembling a spine, used by its original owner as both weapon and balance aid.
obj.item.organ.tail.xeno.name: alien tail

obj.item.organ.tail.xeno_queen.desc: An enormous serrated tail, used to deadly effect by its original owner but perhaps too heavy for a human spine.
obj.item.organ.tail.xeno_queen.name: alien queen's tail

obj.item.organ.tongue.desc: A fleshy muscle mostly used for lying.
obj.item.organ.tongue.name: tongue

obj.item.organ.tongue.abductor.desc: A mysterious structure that allows for instant communication between users. Pretty impressive until you need to eat something.
obj.item.organ.tongue.abductor.name: superlingual matrix

obj.item.organ.tongue.akula.desc: A fleshy muscle mostly used for lying.
obj.item.organ.tongue.akula.name: tongue

obj.item.organ.tongue.alien.desc: According to leading xenobiologists the evolutionary benefit of having a second mouth in your mouth is "that it looks badass".
obj.item.organ.tongue.alien.name: alien tongue

obj.item.organ.tongue.aquatic.desc: A fleshy muscle mostly used for lying.
obj.item.organ.tongue.aquatic.name: tongue

obj.item.organ.tongue.avian.desc: A short and stubby tongue that craves seeds.
obj.item.organ.tongue.avian.name: avian tongue

obj.item.organ.tongue.bone.desc: Apparently skeletons alter the sounds they produce through oscillation of their teeth, hence their characteristic rattling.
obj.item.organ.tongue.bone.name: bone "tongue"

obj.item.organ.tongue.bone.plasmaman.desc: Like animated skeletons, Plasmamen vibrate their teeth in order to produce speech.
obj.item.organ.tongue.bone.plasmaman.name: plasma bone "tongue"

obj.item.organ.tongue.bovine.desc: A long and wide tongue that craves grass.
obj.item.organ.tongue.bovine.name: bovine tongue

obj.item.organ.tongue.carp.desc: Carp DNA infused into what was once some normal teeth.
obj.item.organ.tongue.carp.name: mutated carp-jaws

obj.item.organ.tongue.cat.desc: A fleshy muscle mostly used for meowing. Or biting.
obj.item.organ.tongue.cat.name: felinid tongue

obj.item.organ.tongue.cat.primitive.desc: A fleshy muscle mostly used for meowing. Or biting.
obj.item.organ.tongue.cat.primitive.name: felinid tongue

obj.item.organ.tongue.cat.tajaran.desc: A fleshy muscle mostly used for meowing. Or biting.
obj.item.organ.tongue.cat.tajaran.name: tajaran tongue

obj.item.organ.tongue.cybernetic.desc: A fully-functional synthetic tongue, encased in soft silicone. Features include high-resolution vocals and taste receptors.
obj.item.organ.tongue.cybernetic.name: cybernetic tongue

obj.item.organ.tongue.cybernetic.protean.desc: Millions of nanites vibrate in harmony to create the sound you hear.
obj.item.organ.tongue.cybernetic.protean.name: protean audio fabricator

obj.item.organ.tongue.dog.desc: A long and wet tongue. It seems to jump when it's called good, oddly enough.
obj.item.organ.tongue.dog.name: long tongue

obj.item.organ.tongue.dullahan.desc: A fleshy muscle mostly used for lying.
obj.item.organ.tongue.dullahan.name: tongue

obj.item.organ.tongue.dwarven.desc: A fleshy muscle mostly used for bellowing.
obj.item.organ.tongue.dwarven.name: dwarven tongue

obj.item.organ.tongue.ethereal.desc: A sophisticated ethereal organ, capable of synthesising speech via electrical discharge.
obj.item.organ.tongue.ethereal.name: electric discharger

obj.item.organ.tongue.fly.desc: A freakish looking meat tube that apparently can take in liquids.
obj.item.organ.tongue.fly.name: proboscis

obj.item.organ.tongue.ghost.desc: You feel spooked even thinking about someone talking through this.
obj.item.organ.tongue.ghost.name: ghost tongue

obj.item.organ.tongue.ghoul.desc: A fleshy muscle mostly used for rasping.
obj.item.organ.tongue.ghoul.name: ghoulish tongue

obj.item.organ.tongue.golem.desc: This silicate plate doesn't seem particularly mobile, but golems use it to form sounds.
obj.item.organ.tongue.golem.name: golem tongue

obj.item.organ.tongue.gondola.desc: Gondola DNA infused into what was once a normal tongue.
obj.item.organ.tongue.gondola.name: mutated gondola-tongue

obj.item.organ.tongue.hemophage.desc: A fleshy muscle mostly used for lying.
obj.item.organ.tongue.hemophage.name: tongue

obj.item.organ.tongue.holo_bubble.desc: A fleshy muscle mostly used for lying.
obj.item.organ.tongue.holo_bubble.name: holographic tongue

obj.item.organ.tongue.human.desc: A fleshy muscle mostly used for lying.
obj.item.organ.tongue.human.name: tongue

obj.item.organ.tongue.inky.desc: A black tongue linked to two swollen black sacs underneath the palate.
obj.item.organ.tongue.inky.name: ink-secreting tongue

obj.item.organ.tongue.insect.desc: A fleshy muscle mostly used for chittering.
obj.item.organ.tongue.insect.name: insect tongue

obj.item.organ.tongue.jelly.desc: Ah... That's not the sound I expected it to make. Sounds like a Space Autumn Bird.
obj.item.organ.tongue.jelly.name: jelly tongue

obj.item.organ.tongue.lizard.desc: A thin and long muscle typically found in reptilian races, apparently moonlights as a nose.
obj.item.organ.tongue.lizard.name: forked tongue

obj.item.organ.tongue.lizard.cybernetic.desc: A fully-functional forked synthetic tongue, encased in soft silicone. Features include high-resolution vocals and taste receptors.
obj.item.organ.tongue.lizard.cybernetic.name: forked cybernetic tongue

obj.item.organ.tongue.lizard.robot.desc: A lizard-like voice synthesizer that can interface with organic lifeforms.
obj.item.organ.tongue.lizard.robot.name: robotic lizard voicebox

obj.item.organ.tongue.lizard.silver.desc: A genetic branch of the high society Silver Scales that gives them their silverizing properties. To them, it is everything, and society traitors have their tongue forcibly revoked. Oddly enough, it itself is just blue.
obj.item.organ.tongue.lizard.silver.name: silver tongue

obj.item.organ.tongue.lycan.desc: A massive tongue that craves meat.
obj.item.organ.tongue.lycan.name: lupine tongue

obj.item.organ.tongue.mammal.desc: A fleshy muscle mostly used for lying.
obj.item.organ.tongue.mammal.name: tongue

obj.item.organ.tongue.monkey.desc: For aggressively chimpering. And consuming bananas.
obj.item.organ.tongue.monkey.name: primitive tongue

obj.item.organ.wings.flight.angel.desc: A pair of magnificent, feathery wings. They look strong enough to lift you up in the air.

obj.item.organ.wings.flight.dragon.name: dragon wings

obj.item.organ.wings.functional.dragon.desc: Hey, HEY- NOT lizard wings. Dragon wings. Mighty dragon wings.

obj.item.organ.wings.functional.robotic.desc: Using microscopic hover-engines, or "microwings," as they're known in the trade, these tiny devices are able to lift a few grams at a time. Gather enough of them, and you can lift impressively large things.
