obj.item.permanent_portal_anchor.desc: A device with a very complex name, that serves as the stationary target of a linked two-way bluespace entanglement device.
obj.item.permanent_portal_anchor.name: two-way bluespace entanglement anchor

obj.item.permanent_portal_anchor.space_h.desc:
A device with a very complex name, that serves as the stationary target of a linked two-way bluespace entanglement device.

In your case, it serves to let your guests out.
obj.item.permanent_portal_anchor.space_h.name: Twin Nexus two-way bluespace entanglement anchor

obj.item.permanent_portal_creator.desc: A device with a very complex name, that is only used to confirm the second location that's tied to a stationary entanglement anchor.
obj.item.permanent_portal_creator.name: two-way bluespace entanglement device

obj.item.permanent_portal_creator.space_.desc: A device with a very complex name, that is only used to confirm the second location that's tied to a stationary entanglement anchor.
obj.item.permanent_portal_creator.space_.name: Twin Nexus two-way bluespace entanglement device

obj.item.pestle.desc: An ancient, simple tool used in conjunction with a mortar to grind or juice items.
obj.item.pestle.name: pestle

obj.item.pet_carrier.desc: A big white-and-blue pet carrier. Good for carrying <s>meat to the chef</s> cute animals around.
obj.item.pet_carrier.name: pet carrier

obj.item.pet_carrier.biopod.desc: Alien device used for undescribable purpose. Or carrying pets.
obj.item.pet_carrier.biopod.name: biopod

obj.item.pet_carrier.small.desc: A small pet carrier for miniature sized animals.
obj.item.pet_carrier.small.name: small pet carrier

obj.item.pet_carrier.small.mouse.desc: A small pet carrier for miniature sized animals. This looks prepared for a mouse.
obj.item.pet_carrier.small.mouse.name: small mouse carrier

obj.item.pet_food.desc: Far too bland for your pet OR reality. You shouldn't be seeing this.
obj.item.pet_food.name: Generic pet treat

obj.item.pet_food.pet_space_treat.desc: A tasty snack for any loving companion that'll make them resistant to the nasty void of space! (Warranty void if pet cannot, in fact, handle the void of space)
obj.item.pet_food.pet_space_treat.name: Spaceproof Pet Treat

obj.item.petri_dish.oldstation.desc: You can see a moldy piece of sandwich inside the dish. Maybe it helped to preserve the bacteria for that long.
obj.item.petri_dish.oldstation.name: molly's biopsy

obj.item.ph_booklet.desc: A booklet containing paper soaked in universal indicator.
obj.item.ph_booklet.name: pH indicator booklet

obj.item.ph_meter.desc: An electrode attached to a small circuit box that will display details of a solution. Can be toggled to provide a description of each of the reagents. The screen currently displays nothing.
obj.item.ph_meter.name: Chemical Analyzer

obj.item.ph_paper.desc: A piece of paper that will change colour depending on the pH of a solution.
obj.item.ph_paper.name: pH indicator strip

obj.item.physic_manipulation_tool.desc: A tool for manipulating physics of objects.
obj.item.physic_manipulation_tool.name: physic gun

obj.item.physic_manipulation_tool.advanc.desc: A tool for manipulating physics of objects.
obj.item.physic_manipulation_tool.advanc.name: physic gun

obj.item.physic_manipulation_tool.advanc.desc: A tool for manipulating physics of objects.
obj.item.physic_manipulation_tool.advanc.name: physic gun

obj.item.phystool.desc: Some kind of a revolver with a bluespace power cell and an anomaly core attached together.
obj.item.phystool.name: Toolgun

obj.item.pickaxe.diamond.desc: A pickaxe with a diamond pick head. Extremely robust at cracking rock walls and digging up dirt.
obj.item.pickaxe.diamond.name: diamond-tipped pickaxe

obj.item.pickaxe.drill.desc: An electric mining drill for the especially scrawny.
obj.item.pickaxe.drill.name: mining drill

obj.item.pickaxe.drill.compact.desc: A powered mining drill, it drills all over the place. Compact enough to hopefully fit in a backpack.
obj.item.pickaxe.drill.compact.name: compact mining drill

obj.item.pickaxe.drill.diamonddrill.desc: Yours is the drill that will pierce the heavens!
obj.item.pickaxe.drill.diamonddrill.name: diamond-tipped mining drill

obj.item.pickaxe.drill.jackhammer.demoni.desc: Cracks rocks at an inhuman speed, as well as being enhanced for combat purposes.
obj.item.pickaxe.drill.jackhammer.demoni.name: demonic jackhammer

obj.item.pickaxe.emergency.desc: For extracting yourself from rough landings.
obj.item.pickaxe.emergency.name: emergency disembarkation tool

obj.item.pickaxe.improvised.desc: A pickaxe made with a knife and crowbar taped together, how does it not break?
obj.item.pickaxe.improvised.name: improvised pickaxe

obj.item.pickaxe.mini.desc: A smaller, compact version of the standard pickaxe.
obj.item.pickaxe.mini.name: compact pickaxe

obj.item.pickaxe.rusted.desc: A pickaxe that's been left to rust.
obj.item.pickaxe.rusted.name: rusty pickaxe

obj.item.pickaxe.silver.desc: A silver-plated pickaxe that mines slightly faster than standard-issue.
obj.item.pickaxe.silver.name: silver-plated pickaxe

obj.item.picket_sign.cyborg.desc: A high tech picket sign used by silicons that can reprogram its surface at will. Probably hurts to get hit by, too.
obj.item.picket_sign.cyborg.name: metallic nano-sign

obj.item.piggy_bank.desc: A pig-shaped money container made of porkelain, oink. Do not throw.
obj.item.piggy_bank.name: piggy bank

obj.item.piggy_bank.museum.desc: The museum's mascot piggy bank and favorite embezzler, known to carry donations between shifts without paying taxes. The space IRS hates him.
obj.item.piggy_bank.museum.name: Pigston Swinelord VI

obj.item.piggy_bank.vault.desc: A pig-shaped money container made of porkelain, containing the station's emergency funds carried between shifts, oink. Do not throw.
obj.item.piggy_bank.vault.name: vault piggy bank

obj.item.pillow.desc: A soft and fluffy pillow. You can smack someone with this!
obj.item.pillow.name: pillow

obj.item.pillow.clown.desc: Daww look at that little clown!
obj.item.pillow.clown.name: clown pillow

obj.item.pillow.mime.desc: Daww look at that little mime!
obj.item.pillow.mime.name: mime pillow

obj.item.pillow.random.desc: A soft and fluffy pillow. You can smack someone with this!
obj.item.pillow.random.name: pillow

obj.item.pinata.desc: A papier-mâché corgi that contains various candy, must be set up before you can smash it.
obj.item.pinata.name: pinata assembly kit

obj.item.pinata.donk.desc: A papier-mâché corgi that contains various foodstuff and toys, must be set up before you can smash it.
obj.item.pinata.donk.name: Donk Co. pinata assembly kit

obj.item.pinata.syndie.desc: A papier-mâché corgi that contains various candy and explosives, must be set up before you can smash it.
obj.item.pinata.syndie.name: weapons grade pinata assembly kit

obj.item.pinpointer.desc: A handheld tracking device that locks onto certain signals.
obj.item.pinpointer.name: pinpointer

obj.item.pinpointer.crew.desc: A handheld tracking device that points to crew suit sensors.
obj.item.pinpointer.crew.name: crew pinpointer

obj.item.pinpointer.crew.contractor.desc: A handheld tracking device that locks onto certain signals. Ignores suit sensors, but is much less accurate.
obj.item.pinpointer.crew.contractor.name: contractor pinpointer

obj.item.pinpointer.material_sniffer.desc: A handheld tracking device that locates sheets of glass and iron.
obj.item.pinpointer.material_sniffer.name: material sniffer

obj.item.pinpointer.nuke.desc: A handheld tracking device that locks onto certain signals.
obj.item.pinpointer.nuke.name: pinpointer

obj.item.pinpointer.nuke.goldeneye.desc: A handheld tracking device that locks onto certain signals. This one is configured to locate any GoldenEye keycards.
obj.item.pinpointer.nuke.goldeneye.name: GoldenEye keycard pinpointer

obj.item.pinpointer.nuke.syndicate.desc: A handheld tracking device that locks onto certain signals. It's configured to switch tracking modes once it detects the activation signal of a nuclear device.
obj.item.pinpointer.nuke.syndicate.name: syndicate pinpointer

obj.item.pinpointer.pair.desc: A handheld tracking device that locks onto its other half of the matching pair.
obj.item.pinpointer.pair.name: pair pinpointer

obj.item.pinpointer.shuttle.desc: A handheld tracking device that locates the bounty hunter shuttle for quick escapes.
obj.item.pinpointer.shuttle.name: bounty shuttle pinpointer

obj.item.pinpointer.syndicate_cyborg.desc: An integrated tracking device, jury-rigged to search for living Syndicate operatives.
obj.item.pinpointer.syndicate_cyborg.name: cyborg syndicate pinpointer

obj.item.pinpointer.vent.desc: A handheld tracking device. It will locate and point to nearby vents. A bit unreliable though.
obj.item.pinpointer.vent.name: ventpointer

obj.item.pipe_dispenser.desc: A device used to rapidly pipe things.
obj.item.pipe_dispenser.name: rapid pipe dispenser

obj.item.pipe_dispenser.bluespace.desc: State of the art technology being tested by NT scientists; this is their only working prototype.
obj.item.pipe_dispenser.bluespace.name: bluespace RPD

obj.item.pipe_dispenser.drone.desc: A rapid pipe dispenser built into your chassis.
obj.item.pipe_dispenser.drone.name: built-in rapid pipe dispenser

obj.item.pipe_meter.desc: A meter that can be wrenched on pipes, or attached to the floor with screws.
obj.item.pipe_meter.name: meter

obj.item.pitchfork.desc: A simple tool used for moving hay.
obj.item.pitchfork.name: pitchfork

obj.item.plant_analyzer.desc: A scanner used to evaluate a plant's various areas of growth, genetic traits and chemicals.
obj.item.plant_analyzer.name: plant analyzer

obj.item.plaque.desc: A blank plaque, use a fancy pen to engrave it. It can be placed on a wall.
obj.item.plaque.name: blank plaque

obj.item.plate.desc: Holds food, powerful. Good for morale when you're not eating your spaghetti off of a desk.
obj.item.plate.name: plate

obj.item.plate.blowing_glass.desc: A glass plate that is capable of carrying things.
obj.item.plate.blowing_glass.name: glass plate

obj.item.plate.ceramic.desc: Holds food, powerful. Good for morale when you're not eating your spaghetti off of a desk.
obj.item.plate.ceramic.name: ceramic plate

obj.item.plate.large.desc: A large plate made for the professional catering industry but also apppreciated by mukbangers and other persons of considerable size and heft.
obj.item.plate.large.name: buffet plate

obj.item.plate.small.desc: A small plate, perfect for appetizers, desserts or trendy modern cusine.
obj.item.plate.small.name: appetizer plate

obj.item.plunger.reinforced.desc: It's an M. 7 Reinforced Plunger© for heavy duty plunging.
obj.item.plunger.reinforced.name: reinforced plunger

obj.item.pneumatic_cannon.desc: A gas-powered cannon that can fire any object loaded into it.
obj.item.pneumatic_cannon.name: pneumatic cannon

obj.item.pneumatic_cannon.ghetto.desc: A gas-powered, object-firing cannon made out of common parts.
obj.item.pneumatic_cannon.ghetto.name: improvised pneumatic cannon

obj.item.pneumatic_cannon.pie.desc: Load cream pie for optimal results.
obj.item.pneumatic_cannon.pie.name: pie cannon

obj.item.pneumatic_cannon.pie.selfcharge.desc: Load cream pie for optimal results.

obj.item.pointman_broken.desc: Might be able to be repaired with plasteel and a welder.
obj.item.pointman_broken.name: broken pointman shield

obj.item.poker_chip.name: poker chip

obj.item.powersink.desc: A power sink which drains energy from electrical systems and converts it to heat. Ensure short workloads and ample time to cool down if used in high energy systems.
obj.item.powersink.name: power sink

obj.item.prescription_lenses.desc: Little toolbox with some spare prescription lenses, with everything you need to switch out old lenses on glasses.
obj.item.prescription_lenses.name: spare lens kit

obj.item.pressure_plate.desc: An electronic device that triggers when stepped on.
obj.item.pressure_plate.name: pressure plate

obj.item.pressure_plate.hologrid.desc: A high power, electronic input port for a holobox, which can unlock the hologrid's storage compartment. Safe to stand on.
obj.item.pressure_plate.hologrid.name: hologrid

obj.item.pressure_plate.puzzle.desc: An electronic device that triggers when stepped on.
obj.item.pressure_plate.puzzle.name: pressure plate

obj.item.prisoncube.desc: Dusty cube with humanoid imprint on it.
obj.item.prisoncube.name: prison cube

obj.item.proteon_orb.desc: An eerie translucent orb that feels impossibly light. Legends say summoning orbs are created from corrupted scrying orbs. If you hold it close to your ears, you can hear the screams of the damned.
obj.item.proteon_orb.name: summoning orb

obj.item.pushbroom.desc: This is my BROOMSTICK! It can be used manually or braced with two hands to sweep items as you move. It has a telescopic handle for compact storage.
obj.item.pushbroom.name: push broom

obj.item.quadborg_tongue.desc: Useful for slurping mess off the floor before affectionally licking the crew members in the face.
obj.item.quadborg_tongue.name: synthetic tongue

obj.item.quantum_keycard.desc: A keycard able to link to a quantum pad's particle signature, allowing other quantum pads to travel there instead of their linked pad.
obj.item.quantum_keycard.name: quantum keycard

obj.item.queen_bee.bought.name: queen bee

obj.item.queen_promotion.desc: Inject this into one of your grown children to promote her to a Praetorian!
obj.item.queen_promotion.name: royal parasite

obj.item.reagent_containers.cup.soda_can.name: Grey Bull

obj.item.reagent_containers.cup.soda_can.desc: You wanted ORANGE. It gave you Lemon Lime.
obj.item.reagent_containers.cup.soda_can.name: orange soda

obj.item.reagent_containers.cup.soda_can.desc: Japan's favourite melon soda, now available in can form!
obj.item.reagent_containers.cup.soda_can.name: Kansumi Melon Soda

obj.item.reagent_containers.cup.soda_can.desc: Unleash the ape!
obj.item.reagent_containers.cup.soda_can.name: Monkey Energy

obj.item.reagent_containers.cup.soda_can.desc: The only drink with the PWR that true gamers crave. When a gamer talks about gamerfuel, this is what they're literally referring to.
obj.item.reagent_containers.cup.soda_can.name: Pwr Game

obj.item.reagent_containers.cup.soda_can.desc: ~Shake me up some of that Shambler's Juice!~
obj.item.reagent_containers.cup.soda_can.name: Shambler's juice

obj.item.reagent_containers.cup.soda_can.desc: ~J'I'CE!~
obj.item.reagent_containers.cup.soda_can.name: Shambler's juice Eldritch Energy!

obj.item.reagent_containers.cup.soda_can.desc: A can of ginger beer, don't let the beer part mislead you, this is entirely non-alcoholic.
obj.item.reagent_containers.cup.soda_can.name: Gyárhajó 1023: Ginger Beer

obj.item.reagent_containers.cup.soda_can.desc: A can of kortara, alcohol brewed from korta seeds, which gives it a unique peppery spice flavor.
obj.item.reagent_containers.cup.soda_can.name: kortara

obj.item.reagent_containers.cup.soda_can.desc: A can of lemonade, for those who are into that kind of thing, or just have no choice.
obj.item.reagent_containers.cup.soda_can.name: Gyárhajó 1023: Lemonade

obj.item.reagent_containers.cup.soda_can.desc: The perfect lubricant for your weary gears.
obj.item.reagent_containers.cup.soda_can.name: LubriCola

obj.item.reagent_containers.cup.soda_can.desc: A can of navy rum brewed up and imported from a detachment of the nomad fleet, or so the can says.
obj.item.reagent_containers.cup.soda_can.name: Gyárhajó 1506: Navy Rum

obj.item.reagent_containers.cup.soda_can.desc: A can of soda water. Why not make a rum and soda? Now that you think of it, maybe not.
obj.item.reagent_containers.cup.soda_can.name: Gyárhajó 1023: Soda Water

obj.item.reagent_containers.cup.soda_can.desc: A recompiling can of synthanol.
obj.item.reagent_containers.cup.soda_can.name: Silly Cone's Synthanol

obj.item.reagent_containers.cup.soda_can.desc: More energy than in an IED! Now carbonated. WARNING: Contains toxic and flammable fuels.
obj.item.reagent_containers.cup.soda_can.name: Welding Fizz

obj.item.reagent_containers.cup.soda_can.desc: A can of electrically infused wine, recharges ethereals and is safe for consumption.
obj.item.reagent_containers.cup.soda_can.name: canned voltaic wine

obj.item.reagent_containers.cup.soda_can.desc: A can of soda water. Why not make a scotch and soda?
obj.item.reagent_containers.cup.soda_can.name: soda water

obj.item.reagent_containers.cup.soda_can.desc: Maybe this will help your tummy feel better. Maybe not.
obj.item.reagent_containers.cup.soda_can.name: Sol Dry

obj.item.reagent_containers.cup.soda_can.desc: Blows right through you like a space wind.
obj.item.reagent_containers.cup.soda_can.name: Space Mountain Wind

obj.item.reagent_containers.cup.soda_can.desc: Tastes like a hull breach in your mouth.
obj.item.reagent_containers.cup.soda_can.name: Space-Up!

obj.item.reagent_containers.cup.soda_can.desc: The taste of a star in liquid form. And, a bit of tuna...?
obj.item.reagent_containers.cup.soda_can.name: Star-kist

obj.item.reagent_containers.cup.soda_can.desc: The CMO has advised crew members that consumption of Thirteen Loko may result in seizures, blindness, drunkenness, or even death. Please Drink Responsibly.
obj.item.reagent_containers.cup.soda_can.name: Thirteen Loko

obj.item.reagent_containers.cup.soda_can.desc: Quinine tastes funny, but at least it'll keep that Space Malaria away.
obj.item.reagent_containers.cup.soda_can.name: T-Borg's tonic water

obj.item.reagent_containers.cup.soda_can.desc: Recharge, with 24-Volt Energy!
obj.item.reagent_containers.cup.soda_can.name: 24-Volt Energy

obj.item.reagent_containers.cup.soda_can.desc: A strange purple drink, smelling of saltwater. Somewhere in the distance, you hear seagulls.
obj.item.reagent_containers.cup.soda_can.name: Wellcheers Juice

obj.item.reagent_containers.cup.watering.desc: It's a watering can. It is scientifically proved that using a watering can to simulate rain increases plant happiness!
obj.item.reagent_containers.cup.watering.name: watering can

obj.item.reagent_containers.cup.watering.desc: Everything a botanist would want in a watering can. This marvel of technology generates its own water!
obj.item.reagent_containers.cup.watering.name: advanced watering can

obj.item.reagent_containers.cup.watering.desc: An old metal-made watering can but shoddily painted to look like it was made of wood for some dubious reason...
obj.item.reagent_containers.cup.watering.name: wood watering can

obj.item.reagent_containers.dropper.desc: A dropper. Holds up to 5 units.
obj.item.reagent_containers.dropper.name: dropper

obj.item.reagent_containers.dropper.prec.desc: A high precision pippette. Holds 1 unit.
obj.item.reagent_containers.dropper.prec.name: pipette

obj.item.reagent_containers.hash.desc: Concentrated cannabis extract. Delivers a much better high when used in a bong.
obj.item.reagent_containers.hash.name: hash

obj.item.reagent_containers.hash.dabs.desc: Oil extract from cannabis plants. Just delivers a different type of hit.
obj.item.reagent_containers.hash.dabs.name: dab

obj.item.reagent_containers.hashbrick.desc: A brick of hash. Good for transport!
obj.item.reagent_containers.hashbrick.name: hash brick

obj.item.reagent_containers.heroin.desc: Take a line and take some time of man.
obj.item.reagent_containers.heroin.name: heroin

obj.item.reagent_containers.heroinbrick.desc: A brick of heroin. Good for transport!
obj.item.reagent_containers.heroinbrick.name: heroin brick

obj.item.reagent_containers.hypospray.desc: The DeForest Medical Corporation hypospray is a sterile, air-needle autoinjector for rapid administration of drugs to patients.
obj.item.reagent_containers.hypospray.name: hypospray

obj.item.reagent_containers.hypospray.cm.desc: The DeForest Medical Corporation hypospray is a sterile, air-needle autoinjector for rapid administration of drugs to patients.
obj.item.reagent_containers.hypospray.cm.name: hypospray

obj.item.reagent_containers.hypospray.co.desc: A modified air-needle autoinjector, used by support operatives to quickly heal injuries in combat.
obj.item.reagent_containers.hypospray.co.name: combat stimulant injector

obj.item.reagent_containers.hypospray.co.desc: A modified air-needle autoinjector, used by support operatives to quickly heal injuries in combat.
obj.item.reagent_containers.hypospray.co.name: combat stimulant injector

obj.item.reagent_containers.hypospray.co.desc: A modified air-needle autoinjector for use in combat situations. Prefilled with 5 doses of a holy water and pacifier mixture. Not for use on your teammates.
obj.item.reagent_containers.hypospray.co.name: holy water piercing injector

obj.item.reagent_containers.hypospray.co.desc: A modified air-needle autoinjector for use in combat situations. Prefilled with experimental medical nanites and a stimulant for rapid healing and a combat boost.
obj.item.reagent_containers.hypospray.co.name: experimental combat stimulant injector

obj.item.reagent_containers.hypospray.me.desc: A rapid and safe way to stabilize patients in critical condition for personnel without advanced medical knowledge. Contains a powerful preservative that can delay decomposition when applied to a dead body, and stop the production of histamine during an allergic reaction.
obj.item.reagent_containers.hypospray.me.name: epinephrine medipen

obj.item.reagent_containers.hypospray.me.desc: A rapid way to save a person from a critical injury state! Additionally contains a powerful coagulant to prevent blood loss.
obj.item.reagent_containers.hypospray.me.name: atropine autoinjector

obj.item.reagent_containers.hypospray.me.desc: A medipen designed to stabilize and rapidly reverse severe bloodloss.
obj.item.reagent_containers.hypospray.me.name: hypovolemic-response autoinjector

obj.item.reagent_containers.hypospray.me.desc: A Deforest branded autoinjector, though this one seems to be both empty and non-functional.
obj.item.reagent_containers.hypospray.me.name: non-functional Deforest autoinjector

obj.item.reagent_containers.hypospray.me.desc: A Deforest branded autoinjector, loaded with a mix of reagents to intentionally give yourself fight or flight on demand.
obj.item.reagent_containers.hypospray.me.name: adrenaline injector

obj.item.reagent_containers.hypospray.me.desc: A Deforest branded autoinjector, loaded with a cocktail of drugs to make any who take it nearly 		immune to exhaustion while it's in their system.
obj.item.reagent_containers.hypospray.me.name: aranepaine combat stimulant injector

obj.item.reagent_containers.hypospray.me.desc: A Deforest branded autoinjector, loaded with a stabilizing mix of reagents to repair critical conditions.
obj.item.reagent_containers.hypospray.me.name: calopine emergency stabilizant injector

obj.item.reagent_containers.hypospray.me.desc: A Deforest branded autoinjector, loaded with a mix of coagulants to prevent and stop bleeding.
obj.item.reagent_containers.hypospray.me.name: coagulant-S injector

obj.item.reagent_containers.hypospray.me.desc: A Deforest branded autoinjector, loaded with 'DemonEye' among other reagents. This drug is known to make 		those who take it numb to all pains and extremely difficult to kill as a result.
obj.item.reagent_containers.hypospray.me.name: DemonEye steroid injector

obj.item.reagent_containers.hypospray.me.desc: A Deforest branded autoinjector, loaded with a mix of medicines to remedy the effects of liver failure and common drugs.
obj.item.reagent_containers.hypospray.me.name: halobinin soberant injector

obj.item.reagent_containers.hypospray.me.desc: A Deforest branded autoinjector, loaded with a mix of stimulants and weak healing agents.
obj.item.reagent_containers.hypospray.me.name: krotozine manipulative stimulant injector

obj.item.reagent_containers.hypospray.me.desc: A Deforest branded autoinjector, loaded with a mix of medicines to rapidly treat burns.
obj.item.reagent_containers.hypospray.me.name: lepoturi burn treatment injector

obj.item.reagent_containers.hypospray.me.desc: A Deforest branded autoinjector, loaded with a mix of reagents to numb pain and repair small amounts of physical damage. 		Works most effectively against damaged caused by brute attacks.
obj.item.reagent_containers.hypospray.me.name: lipital regenerative stimulant injector

obj.item.reagent_containers.hypospray.me.desc: A Deforest branded autoinjector, loaded with a mix of reagents to serve as antidote to most galactic toxins. 		A warning sticker notes it should not be used if the patient is physically damaged, as it may cause complications.
obj.item.reagent_containers.hypospray.me.name: meridine antidote injector

obj.item.reagent_containers.hypospray.me.desc: A Deforest branded autoinjector, loaded with a mix of reagents to numb pain and repair small amounts of physical damage.
obj.item.reagent_containers.hypospray.me.name: morpital regenerative stimulant injector

obj.item.reagent_containers.hypospray.me.desc: A Deforest branded autoinjector, loaded with a mix of reagents to restore your vision and hearing to operation.
obj.item.reagent_containers.hypospray.me.name: occuisate sensory restoration injector

obj.item.reagent_containers.hypospray.me.desc: A Deforest branded autoinjector, loaded with a cocktail of drugs to make any who take it 		recover from many different types of damages, with many unusual or undocumented side-effects.
obj.item.reagent_containers.hypospray.me.name: pentibinin normalizant injector

obj.item.reagent_containers.hypospray.me.desc: The pen injector is an open-source copy of the medipen system - It's less compact design eases mass production, and ensures safety even with untrained personnel by retracting the needle after use, while requiring a more deliberate pen-like grip.
obj.item.reagent_containers.hypospray.me.name: pen injector

obj.item.reagent_containers.hypospray.me.desc: The pen injector is an open-source copy of the medipen system - It's less compact design eases mass production, and ensures safety even with untrained personnel by retracting the needle after use, while requiring a more deliberate pen-like grip.
obj.item.reagent_containers.hypospray.me.name: pen injector

obj.item.reagent_containers.hypospray.me.name: pen injector

obj.item.reagent_containers.hypospray.me.name: pen injector

obj.item.reagent_containers.hypospray.me.desc: A Deforest branded autoinjector, loaded with a mix of medicines to remedy many common ailments, such as drowsiness, pain, instability, the like.
obj.item.reagent_containers.hypospray.me.name: psifinil personal recovery injector

obj.item.reagent_containers.hypospray.me.desc: A Deforest branded autoinjector, loaded with liquid solder to repair synthetic processor core damage.
obj.item.reagent_containers.hypospray.me.name: synthetic smart-solder autoinjector

obj.item.reagent_containers.hypospray.me.desc: A Deforest branded autoinjector, loaded with system cleaner for purging synthetics of reagents.
obj.item.reagent_containers.hypospray.me.name: synthetic cleaner autoinjector

obj.item.reagent_containers.hypospray.me.desc: A Deforest branded autoinjector, loaded with a cocktail of drugs to make any who take it 		nearly immune to the slowing effects of silly things like 'being tired' or 'facing muscle failure'.
obj.item.reagent_containers.hypospray.me.name: synalvipitol muscle stimulant injector

obj.item.reagent_containers.hypospray.me.desc: A Deforest branded autoinjector, loaded with a mix of reagents to stabilize critical condition and recover from stamina deficits.
obj.item.reagent_containers.hypospray.me.name: synephrine emergency stimulant injector

obj.item.reagent_containers.hypospray.me.desc: A Deforest branded autoinjector, loaded with 'TWitch' among other reagents. This drug is known to make 		those who take it 'see faster', whatever that means.
obj.item.reagent_containers.hypospray.me.name: TWitch sensory stimulant injector

obj.item.reagent_containers.hypospray.me.desc: An epinephrine medipen with extra coagulant and antibiotics to help stabilize bad cuts and burns.
obj.item.reagent_containers.hypospray.me.name: emergency first-aid autoinjector

obj.item.reagent_containers.hypospray.me.desc: A medipen loaded with synthesized glucose, useful for keeping yourself going during prolonged EVA shifts or as emergency nutrition in medical settings.
obj.item.reagent_containers.hypospray.me.name: glucose medipen

obj.item.reagent_containers.hypospray.me.desc: A ghetto-looking autoinjector filled with gore, aka dirty kronkaine. You probably shouldn't take this while on the job, but it is a super-stimulant. Don't take two at once.
obj.item.reagent_containers.hypospray.me.name: gore autoinjector

obj.item.reagent_containers.hypospray.me.desc: An autoinjector containing a stabilized Saturn-X compound. Produced for use in tactical stealth operations, by operatives who were presumably comfortable with nudity.
obj.item.reagent_containers.hypospray.me.name: invisibility autoinjector

obj.item.reagent_containers.hypospray.me.desc: A custom-frame needle injector with a small single-use reservoir, containing an experimental serum. Unlike the more common medipen frame, it cannot pierce through protective armor or space suits, nor can the chemical inside be extracted.
obj.item.reagent_containers.hypospray.me.name: experimental autoinjector

obj.item.reagent_containers.hypospray.me.desc: Contains a relatively safe quantity of methamphetamine, along with mannitol to ensure that brain damage is kept at a minimum.
obj.item.reagent_containers.hypospray.me.name: methamphetamine medipen

obj.item.reagent_containers.hypospray.me.desc: A rapid way to get you out of a tight situation and fast! You'll feel rather drowsy, though.
obj.item.reagent_containers.hypospray.me.name: morphine medipen

obj.item.reagent_containers.hypospray.me.desc: A mutadone medipen to assist in curing genetic errors in one single injector.
obj.item.reagent_containers.hypospray.me.name: mutadone autoinjector

obj.item.reagent_containers.hypospray.me.desc: An autoinjector containing oxandrolone, used to treat severe burns.
obj.item.reagent_containers.hypospray.me.name: oxandrolone medipen

obj.item.reagent_containers.hypospray.me.desc: An autoinjector containing pentetic acid, used to reduce high levels of radiations and moderate toxins.
obj.item.reagent_containers.hypospray.me.name: pentetic acid medipen

obj.item.reagent_containers.hypospray.me.desc: Experimental heart medication.
obj.item.reagent_containers.hypospray.me.name: penthrite autoinjector

obj.item.reagent_containers.hypospray.me.desc: A ghetto looking autoinjector filled with a cheap adrenaline shot... Great for shrugging off the effects of stunbatons.
obj.item.reagent_containers.hypospray.me.name: maintenance pump-up

obj.item.reagent_containers.hypospray.me.desc: An autoinjector containing salicylic acid, used to treat severe brute damage.
obj.item.reagent_containers.hypospray.me.name: salicylic acid medipen

obj.item.reagent_containers.hypospray.me.desc: An autoinjector containing salbutamol, used to heal oxygen damage quickly.
obj.item.reagent_containers.hypospray.me.name: salbutamol medipen

obj.item.reagent_containers.hypospray.me.desc: All-purpose snail medicine! Do not use on non-snails!
obj.item.reagent_containers.hypospray.me.name: snail shot

obj.item.reagent_containers.hypospray.me.desc: A rapid way to stimulate your body's adrenaline, allowing for freer movement in restrictive armor.
obj.item.reagent_containers.hypospray.me.name: stimpack medipen

obj.item.reagent_containers.hypospray.me.desc: A modified stimulants autoinjector for use in combat situations. Has a mild healing effect.
obj.item.reagent_containers.hypospray.me.name: stimpack medipen

obj.item.reagent_containers.hypospray.me.desc: Contains a very large amount of an incredibly powerful stimulant, vastly increasing your movement speed and reducing stuns by a very large amount for around five minutes. Do not take if pregnant.
obj.item.reagent_containers.hypospray.me.name: stimulant medipen

obj.item.reagent_containers.hypospray.me.desc: A medipen for surviving in the harsh environments, heals most common damage sources. WARNING: May cause organ damage.
obj.item.reagent_containers.hypospray.me.name: survival emergency medipen

obj.item.reagent_containers.hypospray.me.desc: Cutting edge bluespace technology allowed Nanotrasen to compact 60u of volume into a single medipen. Contains rare and powerful chemicals used to aid in exploration of very hard environments. WARNING: DO NOT MIX WITH EPINEPHRINE OR ATROPINE.
obj.item.reagent_containers.hypospray.me.name: luxury medipen

obj.item.reagent_containers.hypospray.me.desc: Bio Virus Antidote Kit autoinjector. Has a two use system for yourself, and someone else. Inject when infected.
obj.item.reagent_containers.hypospray.me.name: BVAK autoinjector

obj.item.reagent_containers.inhaler_cani.desc: A small canister filled with aerosolized reagents for use in a inhaler.
obj.item.reagent_containers.inhaler_cani.name: inhaler canister

obj.item.reagent_containers.inhaler_cani.desc: A small canister filled with aerosolized reagents for use in a inhaler. This one contains albuterol, a potent bronchodilator that can stop 	asthma attacks in their tracks.
obj.item.reagent_containers.inhaler_cani.name: albuterol canister

obj.item.reagent_containers.inhaler_cani.desc: A small canister filled with aerosolized reagents for use in a inhaler. This one contains albuterol, a potent bronchodilator that can stop 	asthma attacks in their tracks. It seems to be a lower-pressure variant, and can only hold 20u.
obj.item.reagent_containers.inhaler_cani.name: low-pressure albuterol canister

obj.item.reagent_containers.inhaler_cani.desc: A small canister filled with aerosolized reagents for use in a inhaler.
obj.item.reagent_containers.inhaler_cani.name: salbutamol canister

obj.item.reagent_containers.medigel.desc: A medical gel applicator bottle, designed for precision application, with an unscrewable cap.
obj.item.reagent_containers.medigel.name: medical gel

obj.item.reagent_containers.medigel.aiur.desc: A medical gel applicator bottle, designed for precision application, with an unscrewable cap. This one contains aiuri, useful for treating burns. Aiuri does minor eye damage. Diluted with granibitaluri.

obj.item.reagent_containers.medigel.libi.name: medical gel (libital)

obj.item.reagent_containers.medigel.ster.desc: gel bottle loaded with non-toxic sterilizer. Useful in preparation for surgery.
obj.item.reagent_containers.medigel.ster.name: sterilizer gel

obj.item.reagent_containers.medigel.synt.desc: A medical gel applicator bottle, designed for precision application, with an unscrewable cap. This one contains synthflesh, a slightly toxic medicine capable of healing bruises, burns, and husks.
obj.item.reagent_containers.medigel.synt.name: medical gel (synthflesh)

This one comes pre-chilled, making it especially good at cooling synthetic burns! It has a bold warning label near the nozzle: ONLY USE IN EMERGENCIES! WILL CAUSE FREEZING! SECONDARY EFFECT ONLY USEFUL ON LIVING SYNTHS! INEFFECTIVE ON DECEASED! There's a smaller warning label on the body of the spray: IN EVENT OF RUNAWAY ENDOTHERMY, APPLY SYSTEM CLEANER!

obj.item.restraints.legcuffs.beartrap.pr.desc: A trap used to catch bears and other legged creatures.
obj.item.restraints.legcuffs.beartrap.pr.name: bear trap

obj.item.restraints.legcuffs.bola.desc: A restraining device designed to be thrown at the target. Upon connecting with said target, it will wrap around their legs, making it difficult for them to move quickly.
obj.item.restraints.legcuffs.bola.name: bola

obj.item.restraints.legcuffs.bola.cult.desc: A strong bola, bound with dark magic that allows it to pass harmlessly through Nar'Sien cultists. Throw it to trip and slow your victim.
obj.item.restraints.legcuffs.bola.cult.name: Nar'Sien bola

obj.item.restraints.legcuffs.bola.energy.desc: A specialized hard-light bola designed to ensnare fleeing criminals and aid in arrests.
obj.item.restraints.legcuffs.bola.energy.name: energy bola

obj.item.restraints.legcuffs.bola.gonbol.desc: Hey, if you have to be hugged in the legs by anything, it might as well be this little guy.
obj.item.restraints.legcuffs.bola.gonbol.name: gonbola

obj.item.restraints.legcuffs.bola.tactic.desc: A strong bola, made with a long steel chain. It looks heavy, enough so that it could trip somebody.
obj.item.restraints.legcuffs.bola.tactic.name: reinforced bola

obj.item.restraints.legcuffs.goliath_ten.desc: A writhing tentacle constricting one of your limbs.
obj.item.restraints.legcuffs.goliath_ten.name: tentacle mass

obj.item.restraints.legcuffs.goliath_ten.desc: A writhing tentacle constricting one of your limbs.
obj.item.restraints.legcuffs.goliath_ten.name: tentacle mass

obj.item.resurrection_crystal.desc: When used by anything holding it, this crystal gives them a second chance at life if they die.
obj.item.resurrection_crystal.name: resurrection crystal

obj.item.retractor.advanced.desc: An agglomerate of rods and gears.
obj.item.retractor.advanced.name: mechanical pinches

obj.item.retractor.alien.desc: You're not sure if you want the veil pulled back.
obj.item.retractor.alien.name: alien retractor

obj.item.retractor.cruel.desc: Helps reveal secrets that would rather stay buried.
obj.item.retractor.cruel.name: twisted retractor

obj.item.retractor.cruel.augment.desc: A twisted micro-mechanical manipulator for retracting flesh and sinew.
obj.item.retractor.cruel.augment.name: twisted retractor

obj.item.reverse_bear_trap.desc: A horrifying set of shut metal jaws, rigged to a kitchen timer and secured by padlock to a head-mounted clamp. To apply, hit someone with it.
obj.item.reverse_bear_trap.name: reverse bear trap

obj.item.riding_saddle.leather.desc: A thick leather riding saddle. Typically used for animals, this one has been designed for use by the taurs of the galaxy. This saddle has specialized footrests that will allow a rider to use both their hands while riding.
obj.item.riding_saddle.leather.name: riding saddle

obj.item.riding_saddle.leather.peacekeep.desc: A thick leather riding saddle. Typically used for animals, this one has been designed for use by the taurs of the galaxy. This saddle has specialized footrests that will allow a rider to use both their hands while riding.
obj.item.riding_saddle.leather.peacekeep.name: peacekeeper saddle

obj.item.ritual_totem.desc: A wooden totem with strange carvings on it.
obj.item.ritual_totem.name: ritual totem

obj.item.rna_extractor.desc: A tool used to extract the RNA from viruses. Apply to skin.
obj.item.rna_extractor.name: advanced virus RNA extractor

obj.item.rna_vial.desc: A glass vial containing raw virus RNA. Slot this into the combinator to upload the sample.
obj.item.rna_vial.name: raw RNA vial

obj.item.robot_suit.desc: A complex metal backbone with standard limb sockets and pseudomuscle anchors.
obj.item.robot_suit.name: cyborg endoskeleton

obj.item.rod_of_asclepius.desc: A wooden rod about the size of your forearm with a snake carved around it, winding its way up the sides of the rod. Something about it seems to inspire in you the responsibilty and duty to help others.
obj.item.rod_of_asclepius.name: Rod of Asclepius

obj.item.rolling_table_dock.desc: A collapsed roller table that can be ejected for service on the go. Must be collected or replaced after use.
obj.item.rolling_table_dock.name: rolling table dock

obj.item.rollingpaper.desc: A thin piece of paper used to make fine smokeables.
obj.item.rollingpaper.name: rolling paper

obj.item.roulette_wheel_beacon.desc: N.T. approved roulette wheel beacon, toss it down and you will have a complementary roulette wheel delivered to you.
obj.item.roulette_wheel_beacon.name: roulette wheel beacon

obj.item.royale_implanter.desc: Subtly implants people with rumble royale implants, 		preparing them to struggle for their life for the enjoyment of the Syndicate's paying audience. 		Implants may cause irritation at site of implantation.
obj.item.royale_implanter.name: royale implanter

obj.item.royale_remote.desc: A single use device which will activate any linked rumble royale implants, starting the show.
obj.item.royale_remote.name: royale remote

obj.item.rpd_upgrade.unwrench.desc: Adds reverse wrench mode to the RPD. Attention, due to budget cuts, the mode is hard linked to the destroy mode control button.
obj.item.rpd_upgrade.unwrench.name: RPD advanced upgrade: wrench mode

obj.item.rsd_interface.desc: A small device inserted, typically, into inert brains. As Resonance cannot persist in what's referred to as a 'vacuum', RSDs--much like the brains and CPUs they emulate--employ cerebral white noise as a foundation for Resonance to persist in otherwise dead-quiet containers..
obj.item.rsd_interface.name: RSD Phylactery

obj.item.rsf.desc: A device used to rapidly deploy service items.
obj.item.rsf.name: Rapid-Service-Fabricator

obj.item.rsf.cookiesynth.desc: A self-recharging device used to rapidly deploy cookies.
obj.item.rsf.cookiesynth.name: Cookie Synthesizer

obj.item.rsf.cyborg.desc: A device used to rapidly deploy service items.
obj.item.rsf.cyborg.name: Rapid-Service-Fabricator

obj.item.runic_vendor_scepter.desc: This scepter allows you to conjure, force push and detonate Runic Vendors. It can hold up to 3 charges that can be recovered with a simple magical channeling. A modern spin on the old Geomancy spells.
obj.item.runic_vendor_scepter.name: scepter of runic vendormancy

obj.item.rupee.desc: Your excitement boils away as you realize it's just colored glass. Why would someone hoard these things?
obj.item.rupee.name: weird crystal

obj.item.rwd.desc: A device used to rapidly lay cable & pick up stray cable pieces laying around.
obj.item.rwd.name: rapid wiring device

obj.item.rwd.admin.desc: A device used to rapidly lay cable & pick up stray cable pieces laying around.
obj.item.rwd.admin.name: admin RWD

obj.item.rwd.loaded.desc: A device used to rapidly lay cable & pick up stray cable pieces laying around.
obj.item.rwd.loaded.name: rapid wiring device

obj.item.sacrificial_face_shield.desc: A thick piece of glass with mounting points for slotting onto a 'Val' sacrificial ballistic helmet. 		While it does not make the helmet any stronger, it does protect your face much like a riot helmet would.
obj.item.sacrificial_face_shield.name: 'Val' ballistic add-on face plate

obj.item.sales_tagger.desc: A scanner that lets you tag wrapped items for sale, splitting the profit between you and cargo.
obj.item.sales_tagger.name: sales tagger

obj.item.satchel_of_holding_inert.desc: What is currently a just an unwieldly block of metal with a slot ready to accept a bluespace anomaly core.
obj.item.satchel_of_holding_inert.name: inert satchel of holding

obj.item.sbeacondrop.desc: A label on it reads: Warning: Activating this device will send a special beacon to your location.
obj.item.sbeacondrop.name: suspicious beacon

obj.item.sbeacondrop.bomb.desc: A label on it reads: Warning: Activating this device will send a high-ordinance explosive to your location.
obj.item.sbeacondrop.bomb.name: suspicious beacon

obj.item.sbeacondrop.carrot.desc: A cell phone with an in-coming call from someone simply labelled 'Lady Jab'. A small sticker on the back notes that any calls to French overlords will incur a 5 credit service charge.
obj.item.sbeacondrop.carrot.name: carrot phone

obj.item.sbeacondrop.clownbomb.desc: A label on it reads: Warning: Activating this device will send a silly explosive to your location.
obj.item.sbeacondrop.clownbomb.name: suspicious beacon

obj.item.sbeacondrop.constructshell.desc: A label on it reads: Warning: Activating this device will send a Nar'sian construct shell to your location.
obj.item.sbeacondrop.constructshell.name: suspicious beacon

obj.item.sbeacondrop.emp.desc: A label on it reads: Warning: Activating this device will send a high-powered electromagnetic device to your location.
obj.item.sbeacondrop.emp.name: suspicious beacon

obj.item.sbeacondrop.horse.desc: A label on it reads: Warning: Activating this device will send a live horse to your location.
obj.item.sbeacondrop.horse.name: suspicious beacon

obj.item.sbeacondrop.no_escape.desc: A label on it reads: Warning: Activating this device will send a special beacon to your location.
obj.item.sbeacondrop.no_escape.name: very suspicious beacon

obj.item.sbeacondrop.powersink.desc: A label on it reads: Warning: Activating this device will send a power draining device to your location.
obj.item.sbeacondrop.powersink.name: suspicious beacon

obj.item.scalpel.desc: Cut, cut, and once more cut.
obj.item.scalpel.name: scalpel

obj.item.scalpel.advanced.desc: An advanced scalpel which uses laser technology to cut.
obj.item.scalpel.advanced.name: laser scalpel

obj.item.scalpel.alien.desc: It's a gleaming sharp knife made out of silvery-green metal.
obj.item.scalpel.alien.name: alien scalpel

obj.item.scalpel.ashwalker.desc: Cut, cut, and once more cut.
obj.item.scalpel.ashwalker.name: primitive scalpel

obj.item.scalpel.augment.desc: Ultra-sharp blade attached directly to your bone for extra-accuracy.
obj.item.scalpel.augment.name: scalpel

obj.item.scalpel.cruel.desc: I remember every time I hold you. My born companion...
obj.item.scalpel.cruel.name: hungry scalpel

obj.item.scalpel.cruel.augment.desc: Ultra-sharp blade attached directly to your bone for enhanced vivisection.
obj.item.scalpel.cruel.augment.name: hungry scalpel

obj.item.scalpel.cyborg.desc: Cut, cut, and once more cut.
obj.item.scalpel.cyborg.name: scalpel

obj.item.scalpel.supermatter.desc: A scalpel with a fragile tip of condensed hyper-noblium gas, searingly cold to the touch, that can safely shave a sliver off a supermatter crystal.
obj.item.scalpel.supermatter.name: supermatter scalpel

obj.item.scanner_wand.desc: A wand that medically scans people. Inserting it into a medical kiosk makes it able to perform a health scan on the patient.
obj.item.scanner_wand.name: kiosk scanner wand

obj.item.scissors.desc: Some say a barbers best tool is his electric razor, that is not the case. These are used to cut hair in a professional way!
obj.item.scissors.name: barber's scissors

obj.item.scooter_frame.desc: A metal frame for building a scooter. Looks like you'll need to add some iron to make wheels.
obj.item.scooter_frame.name: scooter frame

obj.item.scratching_stone.desc: A specialized kind of whetstone, made of unknown alloys to hone a cyborg mercenary's claws to the best they can be. This one looks like a shitty second-hand sold by razorkids. It's got like, what, maybe one use left?
obj.item.scratching_stone.name: scratching stone

obj.item.screwdriver.desc: You can be totally screwy with this.
obj.item.screwdriver.name: screwdriver

obj.item.screwdriver.advanced.desc: A classy silver screwdriver with an alien alloy tip, it works almost as well as the real thing. There's a sticker attached declaring that it needs updating from 'the latest samples'.
obj.item.screwdriver.advanced.name: advanced screwdriver

obj.item.screwdriver.ashwalker.desc: You can be totally screwy with this.
obj.item.screwdriver.ashwalker.name: primitive screwdriver

obj.item.screwdriver.brass.desc: A screwdriver made of brass. The handle feels warm to the touch.
obj.item.screwdriver.brass.name: brass screwdriver

obj.item.screwdriver.caravan.desc: A prototype of a new screwdriver design, allegedly the red color scheme makes it go faster.
obj.item.screwdriver.caravan.name: experimental screwdriver

obj.item.screwdriver.cyborg.desc: A powerful automated screwdriver, designed to be both precise and quick.
obj.item.screwdriver.cyborg.name: automated screwdriver

obj.item.screwdriver.cyborg.power.desc: A cyborg fitted module resembling the hand drill
obj.item.screwdriver.cyborg.power.name: automated drill

obj.item.screwdriver.drone.desc: A screwdriver built into your chassis.
obj.item.screwdriver.drone.name: built-in screwdriver

obj.item.screwdriver.makeshift.desc: A makeshift screwdriver, flimsily made using cloth and some metal.
obj.item.screwdriver.makeshift.name: makeshift screwdriver

obj.item.screwdriver.nuke.desc: A screwdriver with an ultra thin tip that's carefully designed to boost screwing speed.
obj.item.screwdriver.nuke.name: screwdriver

obj.item.screwdriver.omni_drill.desc: The ultimate in multi purpose construction tools. With heads for wire cutting, bolt driving, and driving screws, what's not to love? Well, the slow speed. Compared to other power drills these tend to be not much quicker than unpowered tools.
obj.item.screwdriver.omni_drill.name: powered driver

obj.item.screwdriver.power.protonitrate.desc: Hand drill combined with Proto Nitrate Crystal for increased efficeincy.
obj.item.screwdriver.power.protonitrate.name: proto nitrate hand drill

obj.item.screwdriver.power.protonitrate..desc: Hand drill combined with Proto Nitrate Crystal for increased efficeincy.
obj.item.screwdriver.power.protonitrate..name: proto nitrate hand drill

obj.item.screwdriver.red.desc: You can be totally screwy with this.
obj.item.screwdriver.red.name: screwdriver

obj.item.scrying.desc: An incandescent orb of otherworldly energy, merely holding it gives you vision and hearing beyond mortal means, and staring into it lets you see the entire universe.
obj.item.scrying.name: scrying orb

obj.item.scythe.desc: A sharp and curved blade on a long fibremetal handle, this tool makes it easy to reap what you sow.
obj.item.scythe.name: scythe

obj.item.scythe.tier1.desc: A sharp and curved blade on a long fibremetal handle, this tool makes it easy to reap what you sow.
obj.item.scythe.tier1.name: scythe (tier 1)

obj.item.scythe.tier2.desc: A sharp and curved blade on a long fibremetal handle, this tool makes it easy to reap what you sow.
obj.item.scythe.tier2.name: scythe (tier 2)

obj.item.scythe.tier3.desc: A sharp and curved blade on a long fibremetal handle, this tool makes it easy to reap what you sow.
obj.item.scythe.tier3.name: scythe (tier 3)

obj.item.scythe.tier4.desc: A sharp and curved blade on a long fibremetal handle, this tool makes it easy to reap what you sow.
obj.item.scythe.tier4.name: scythe (tier 4)

obj.item.secateurs.desc: It's a tool for cutting grafts off plants or changing podperson looks.
obj.item.secateurs.name: secateurs

obj.item.secateurs.ashwalker.desc: It's a tool for cutting grafts off plants or changing podperson looks.
obj.item.secateurs.ashwalker.name: primitive secateurs

obj.item.secateurs.cyborg.desc: It's a tool for cutting grafts off plants or changing podperson looks.
obj.item.secateurs.cyborg.name: cyborg secateurs

obj.item.secateurs.wooden.desc: Some shoddy looking secateurs, they look sturdy enough to get a graft... or poke someone in both eyes at once!
obj.item.secateurs.wooden.name: primitive secateurs

obj.item.secure_camera_console_pod.desc: A pre-packaged camera console used for all your AI stuff, programmed to only active in the SAT.
obj.item.secure_camera_console_pod.name: pre-packaged advanced camera control

obj.item.security_voucher.desc: A token to redeem a piece of equipment.
obj.item.security_voucher.name: security voucher

obj.item.security_voucher.primary.desc: A token to redeem a piece of equipment.
obj.item.security_voucher.primary.name: security primary voucher

obj.item.security_voucher.utility.desc: A token to redeem a piece of equipment.
obj.item.security_voucher.utility.name: security utility voucher

obj.item.seed_mesh.desc: A little mesh that, when paired with sand, has the possibility of filtering out large seeds.
obj.item.seed_mesh.name: seed mesh

obj.item.seeds.adamapple.desc: These seeds grow to produce fruits, with cores of adamantine.
obj.item.seeds.adamapple.name: adam's apple seed pack

obj.item.seeds.agbergine.desc: These seeds grow to produce fruits, with cores of solid silver.
obj.item.seeds.agbergine.name: ag-bergine seed pack

obj.item.seeds.amanita.desc: This mycelium grows into something horrible.
obj.item.seeds.amanita.name: fly amanita mycelium pack

obj.item.seeds.amauri.desc: These seeds grow into amauri plants. Grows bulbs full of potent toxins.
obj.item.seeds.amauri.name: amauri seed pack

obj.item.seeds.ambrosia.desc: These seeds grow into common ambrosia, a plant grown by and from medicine.
obj.item.seeds.ambrosia.name: ambrosia vulgaris seed pack

obj.item.seeds.ambrosia.deus.desc: These seeds grow into ambrosia deus. Could it be the food of the gods..?
obj.item.seeds.ambrosia.deus.name: ambrosia deus seed pack

obj.item.seeds.ambrosia.gaia.desc: These seeds grow into ambrosia gaia, filled with infinite potential.
obj.item.seeds.ambrosia.gaia.name: ambrosia gaia seed pack

obj.item.seeds.angel.desc: This mycelium grows into something devastating.
obj.item.seeds.angel.name: destroying angel mycelium pack

obj.item.seeds.apple.desc: These seeds grow into apple trees.
obj.item.seeds.apple.name: apple seed pack

obj.item.seeds.apple.gold.desc: These seeds grow into golden apple trees. Good thing there are no firebirds in space.
obj.item.seeds.apple.gold.name: golden apple seed pack

obj.item.seeds.aubergine.desc: These seeds grow to golden cored fruits.
obj.item.seeds.aubergine.name: au-bergine seed pack

obj.item.seeds.bamboo.desc: A plant known for its flexible and resistant logs.
obj.item.seeds.bamboo.name: bamboo seed pack

obj.item.seeds.banana.desc: They're seeds that grow into banana trees. When grown, keep away from clown.
obj.item.seeds.banana.name: banana seed pack

obj.item.seeds.banana.bluespace.desc: They're seeds that grow into bluespace banana trees. When grown, keep away from bluespace clown.
obj.item.seeds.banana.bluespace.name: bluespace banana seed pack

obj.item.seeds.banana.bombanana.desc: They're seeds that grow into bombanana trees. When grown, give to the clown.
obj.item.seeds.banana.bombanana.name: bombanana seed pack

obj.item.seeds.banana.mime.desc: They're seeds that grow into mimana trees. When grown, keep away from mime.
obj.item.seeds.banana.mime.name: mimana seed pack

obj.item.seeds.banana.spider_banana.desc: They're seeds that grow into banana trees. However, those bananas might be alive.
obj.item.seeds.banana.spider_banana.name: leggy banana seed pack

obj.item.seeds.bananiumberry.desc: These seeds grow to produce unholy abominations.
obj.item.seeds.bananiumberry.name: bananium berry seed pack

obj.item.seeds.berry.desc: These seeds grow into berry bushes.
obj.item.seeds.berry.name: berry seed pack

obj.item.seeds.berry.death.desc: These seeds grow into death berries.
obj.item.seeds.berry.death.name: death-berry seed pack

obj.item.seeds.berry.glow.desc: These seeds grow into glow-berry bushes.
obj.item.seeds.berry.glow.name: glow-berry seed pack

obj.item.seeds.berry.poison.desc: These seeds grow into poison-berry bushes.
obj.item.seeds.berry.poison.name: poison-berry seed pack

obj.item.seeds.bluegemdrupe.desc: These seeds grow to produce extremely volatile 'drupes'.
obj.item.seeds.bluegemdrupe.name: bluegem drupe seed pack

obj.item.seeds.cannabis.anti.desc: These seeds grow into anti weed.
obj.item.seeds.cannabis.anti.name: anti weed seed pack

obj.item.seeds.cannabis.death.desc: These seeds grow into deathweed. Not groovy.
obj.item.seeds.cannabis.death.name: deathweed seed pack

obj.item.seeds.cannabis.rainbow.desc: These seeds grow into rainbow weed. Groovy... and also highly addictive.
obj.item.seeds.cannabis.rainbow.name: rainbow weed seed pack

obj.item.seeds.cannabis.ultimate.desc: These seeds grow into omega weed.
obj.item.seeds.cannabis.ultimate.name: omega weed seed pack

obj.item.seeds.cannabis.white.desc: I will give unto him that is munchies of the fountain of the cravings of life, freely.
obj.item.seeds.cannabis.white.name: lifeweed seed pack

obj.item.seeds.carbon_rose.desc: These seeds grow into carbon roses.
obj.item.seeds.carbon_rose.name: carbon rose seed pack

obj.item.seeds.chanter.desc: This mycelium grows into chanterelle mushrooms.
obj.item.seeds.chanter.name: chanterelle mycelium pack

obj.item.seeds.chanter.jupitercup.desc: This mycelium grows into jupiter cups. Zeus would be envious at the power at your fingertips.
obj.item.seeds.chanter.jupitercup.name: jupiter cup mycelium pack

obj.item.seeds.cherry.desc: Careful not to crack a tooth on one... That'd be the pits.
obj.item.seeds.cherry.name: cherry pit pack

obj.item.seeds.cherry.bomb.desc: They give you vibes of dread and frustration.
obj.item.seeds.cherry.bomb.name: cherry bomb pit pack

obj.item.seeds.chili.desc: These seeds grow into chili plants. HOT! HOT! HOT!
obj.item.seeds.chili.name: chili seed pack

obj.item.seeds.chili.bell_pepper.desc: These seeds grow into bell pepper plants. MILD! MILD! MILD!
obj.item.seeds.chili.bell_pepper.name: bell pepper seed pack

obj.item.seeds.chili.ghost.desc: These seeds grow into a chili said to be the hottest in the galaxy.
obj.item.seeds.chili.ghost.name: ghost chili seed pack

obj.item.seeds.chili.ice.desc: These seeds grow into chilly pepper plants.
obj.item.seeds.chili.ice.name: chilly pepper seed pack

obj.item.seeds.cocaleaf.desc: These seeds grow into coca shrubs. They make you feel energized just looking at them...
obj.item.seeds.cocaleaf.name: coca leaf seed pack

obj.item.seeds.cocoapod.desc: These seeds grow into cacao trees. They look fattening.
obj.item.seeds.cocoapod.name: cocoa pod seed pack

obj.item.seeds.cocoapod.bungotree.desc: These seeds grow into bungo trees. They appear to be heavy and almost perfectly spherical.
obj.item.seeds.cocoapod.bungotree.name: bungo tree seed pack

obj.item.seeds.cocoapod.vanillapod.desc: These seeds grow into vanilla trees. They look fattening.
obj.item.seeds.cocoapod.vanillapod.name: vanilla pod seed pack

obj.item.seeds.coffee.desc: These seeds grow into coffee arabica bushes.
obj.item.seeds.coffee.name: coffee arabica seed pack

obj.item.seeds.coffee.robusta.desc: These seeds grow into coffee robusta bushes.
obj.item.seeds.coffee.robusta.name: coffee robusta seed pack

obj.item.seeds.corn.desc: I don't mean to sound corny...
obj.item.seeds.corn.name: corn seed pack

obj.item.seeds.corn.pepper.desc: If Peter picked a pack of pepper-corn...
obj.item.seeds.corn.pepper.name: pepper-corn seed pack

obj.item.seeds.cotton.desc: A pack of seeds that'll grow into a cotton plant. Assistants make good free labor if neccesary.
obj.item.seeds.cotton.name: cotton seed pack

obj.item.seeds.cotton.durathread.desc: A pack of seeds that'll grow into an extremely durable thread that could easily rival plasteel if woven properly.
obj.item.seeds.cotton.durathread.name: durathread seed pack

obj.item.seeds.cucumber.desc: These seeds grow into cucumber plants.
obj.item.seeds.cucumber.name: cucumber seed pack

obj.item.seeds.dimantis.desc: These seeds grow to produce extremely valuable dimatis fruits.
obj.item.seeds.dimantis.name: dimantis seed pack

obj.item.seeds.eggplant.desc: These seeds grow to produce berries that look nothing like eggs.
obj.item.seeds.eggplant.name: eggplant seed pack

obj.item.seeds.eggplant.eggy.desc: These seeds grow to produce berries that look a lot like eggs.
obj.item.seeds.eggplant.eggy.name: egg-plant seed pack

obj.item.seeds.ferrotuber.desc: These seeds grow to produce tubers, with cores of iron.
obj.item.seeds.ferrotuber.name: ferrotuber seed pack

obj.item.seeds.firelemon.desc: When life gives you lemons, don't make lemonade. Make life take the lemons back! Get mad! I don't want your damn lemons!
obj.item.seeds.firelemon.name: combustible lemon seed pack

obj.item.seeds.galaxythistle.desc: An impressive species of weed that is thought to have evolved from the simple milk thistle. Contains flavolignans that can help repair a damaged liver.
obj.item.seeds.galaxythistle.name: galaxythistle seed pack

obj.item.seeds.garlic.desc: A packet of extremely pungent seeds.
obj.item.seeds.garlic.name: garlic seed pack

obj.item.seeds.gatfruit.desc: These seeds grow into pea-shooting revolvers.
obj.item.seeds.gatfruit.name: gatfruit seed pack

obj.item.seeds.gelthi.desc: These seeds grow into gelthi plants. Lauded by chefs for its unique ability to produce honey, and often hoarded for this very reason.
obj.item.seeds.gelthi.name: gelthi seed pack

obj.item.seeds.glowshroom.shadowshroom.desc: This mycelium will grow into something shadowy.
obj.item.seeds.glowshroom.shadowshroom.name: shadowshroom mycelium pack

obj.item.seeds.grape.desc: These seeds grow into grape vines.
obj.item.seeds.grape.name: grape seed pack

obj.item.seeds.grape.green.desc: These seeds grow into green-grape vines.
obj.item.seeds.grape.green.name: green grape seed pack

obj.item.seeds.kronkus.desc:
A pack of highly illegal kronkus seeds.
Possession of these seeds carries the death penalty in 7 sectors.
obj.item.seeds.kronkus.name: kronkus seed pack

obj.item.seeds.kudzu.desc: These seeds grow into a weed that grows incredibly fast.
obj.item.seeds.kudzu.name: kudzu seed pack

obj.item.seeds.lanternfruit.desc: These seeds grow into lanternfruit pods.
obj.item.seeds.lanternfruit.name: lanternfruit seed pack

obj.item.seeds.lavaland.cactus.name: fruiting cactus seed pack

obj.item.seeds.lavaland.seraka.name: seraka mycelium pack

obj.item.seeds.liberty.desc: This mycelium grows into liberty-cap mushrooms.

Small seedlings of the golem rockfruit plant. There's a warning label on its packaging: 
	"Remember: Legally speaking, rocking is more legal than stoning. 
 	We are not liable for any injury, death, or complete body evaporation caused by using or growing these plants"

obj.item.shield.adamantineshield.name: adamantine shield

obj.item.shield.ballistic.name: ballistic shield

obj.item.shield.big_bertha.desc: A shield so fat and heavy, it should block just about anything, as long as you have the stamina for it.
obj.item.shield.big_bertha.name: Big Bertha

obj.item.shield.bloodsucker.desc: A shield made out of blood, requiring blood to sustain hits.
obj.item.shield.bloodsucker.name: blood shield

obj.item.shield.buckler.moonflower.desc: A buckler made from a steel-cap reinforced moonflower.
obj.item.shield.buckler.moonflower.name: moonflower buckler

obj.item.shield.buckler.reagent_weapon.desc: A small, round shield best used in tandem with a melee weapon in close-quarters combat.
obj.item.shield.buckler.reagent_weapon.name: reagent plated buckler shield

obj.item.shield.buckler.reagent_weapon.p.desc: An oblong shield used by ancient crossbowmen as cover while reloading. Probably just as useful with an actual gun.
obj.item.shield.buckler.reagent_weapon.p.name: reagent plated pavise shield

obj.item.shield.buckler.reagent_weapon.p.desc: An oblong shield used by ancient crossbowmen as cover while reloading. Probably just as useful with an actual gun.
obj.item.shield.buckler.reagent_weapon.p.name: Stalwart Defense

obj.item.shield.changeling.name: shield-like mass

obj.item.shield.energy.desc: A hardlight shield capable of reflecting blocked energy projectiles, as well as providing well-rounded defense from most all other attacks.
obj.item.shield.energy.name: combat energy shield

obj.item.shield.energy.advanced.desc: A hardlight shield capable of reflecting all energy projectiles, as well as providing well-rounded defense from most all other attacks. 		Often employed by Nanotrasen deathsquads.
obj.item.shield.energy.advanced.name: advanced combat energy shield

obj.item.shield.energy.bananium.desc: A shield that stops most melee attacks, protects user from almost all energy projectiles, and can be thrown to slip opponents.
obj.item.shield.energy.bananium.name: bananium energy shield

obj.item.shield.goliath.desc: A shield made from interwoven plates of goliath hide.
obj.item.shield.goliath.name: goliath shield

obj.item.shield.improvised.desc: A crude shield made out of several sheets of iron taped together, not very durable.
obj.item.shield.improvised.name: improvised shield

obj.item.shield.kite.desc: Protect your internal organs with this almond shaped shield.
obj.item.shield.kite.name: kite shield

obj.item.shield.mirror.desc: An infamous shield used by Nar'Sien sects to confuse and disorient their enemies. Its edges are weighted for use as a throwing weapon - capable of disabling multiple foes with preternatural accuracy.
obj.item.shield.mirror.name: mirror shield

obj.item.shield.riot.desc: A shield adept at blocking blunt objects from connecting with the torso of the shield wielder, less so bullets and laser beams.
obj.item.shield.riot.name: riot shield

obj.item.shield.riot.flash.desc: A shield with a built in, high intensity light capable of blinding and disorienting suspects. Takes regular handheld flashes as bulbs.
obj.item.shield.riot.flash.name: strobe shield

obj.item.shield.riot.pointman.desc: A shield fit for those that want to sprint headfirst into the unknown! Cumbersome as hell.
obj.item.shield.riot.pointman.name: pointman shield

obj.item.shield.riot.pointman.hecu.desc: A shield fit for those that want to sprint headfirst into the unknown! Cumbersome as hell. Repair with iron.
obj.item.shield.riot.pointman.hecu.name: ballistic shield

obj.item.shield.riot.pointman.nri.desc: A shield designed for people that have to sprint to the rescue. Cumbersome as hell. Repair with plasteel.
obj.item.shield.riot.pointman.nri.name: heavy corpsman shield

obj.item.shield.riot.tele.desc: An advanced riot shield made of lightweight materials that collapses for easy storage.
obj.item.shield.riot.tele.name: telescopic shield

obj.item.shield.roman.desc: Bears an inscription on the inside: "Romanes venio domus".
obj.item.shield.roman.name: Roman shield

obj.item.shield.roman.fake.desc: Bears an inscription on the inside: "Romanes venio domus". It appears to be a bit flimsy.
obj.item.shield.roman.fake.name: Roman shield

obj.item.ship_in_a_bottle.name: ship in a bottle

obj.item.shockpaddles.mod.name: MOD defibrillator gauntlets

obj.item.shockpaddles.syndicate.name: syndicate defibrillator paddles

obj.item.shockpaddles.syndicate.cyborg.desc: A pair of paddles used to revive deceased operatives. They possess both the ability to penetrate armor and to deliver powerful or disabling shocks offensively.
obj.item.shockpaddles.syndicate.cyborg.name: syndicate defibrillator paddles

obj.item.shockpaddles.syndicate.cyborg.n.desc: A pair of paddles used to revive deceased operatives. They possess both the ability to penetrate armor and to deliver powerful or disabling shocks offensively.
obj.item.shockpaddles.syndicate.cyborg.n.name: modified defibrillator paddles

obj.item.shockpaddles.syndicate.mod.name: MOD combat defibrillator gauntlets

obj.item.shockpaddles.syndicate.nanotras.desc: A pair of paddles used to revive deceased ERT members. They possess both the ability to penetrate armor and to deliver powerful or disabling shocks offensively.
obj.item.shockpaddles.syndicate.nanotras.name: elite Nanotrasen defibrillator paddles

obj.item.shovel.reagent_weapon.name: reagent shovel

obj.item.shovel.serrated.dull.desc: An ancient, dull bone shovel with a strange design and markings. Visually, it seems pretty weak, but you get the feeling there's more to it than meets the eye...
obj.item.shovel.serrated.dull.name: dull bone shovel

obj.item.shovel.spade.desc: A small tool for digging and moving dirt.

obj.item.shovel.spade.cyborg.name: cyborg spade

obj.item.shuttle_blueprints.desc: A blank sheet of synthetic engineering-grade paper.
obj.item.shuttle_blueprints.name: shuttle blueprints

obj.item.shuttle_blueprints.borg.name: shuttle blueprint database

obj.item.shuttle_blueprints.crude.desc: This is just a sheet of paper thoroughly covered in what could either be crayon or spraypaint.
obj.item.shuttle_blueprints.crude.name: crude shuttle blueprints

obj.item.shuttle_curse.desc: You peer within this smokey orb and glimpse terrible fates befalling the emergency escape shuttle.
obj.item.shuttle_curse.name: cursed orb

obj.item.shuttle_remote.desc: A remote to send away or call a shuttle.
obj.item.shuttle_remote.name: shuttle remote

obj.item.sign.desc: A plastic sign backing, use a pen to change the decal. It can be placed on a wall.
obj.item.sign.name: sign backing

obj.item.sign.flag.desc: The folded flag of nothing. It has nothing on it. Beautiful.
obj.item.sign.flag.name: folded blank flag

obj.item.sign.flag.azulea.name: folded banner of the Akula Democratic Union

obj.item.sign.flag.pride.desc: You probably shouldn't be seeing this. Yell at the coders about it.

obj.item.sign.flag.pride.ace.name: folded asexual pride flag

obj.item.sign.flag.usa.desc: The folded flag of the United States of America.

obj.item.singularityhammer.desc: The pinnacle of close combat technology, the hammer harnesses the power of a miniaturized singularity to deal crushing blows.
obj.item.singularityhammer.name: singularity hammer

obj.item.skeleton_key.desc: An artifact usually found in the hands of the natives of lavaland, which NT now holds a monopoly on.
obj.item.skeleton_key.name: skeleton key

obj.item.skillchip.desc: This biochip integrates with user's brain to enable mastery of specific skill. Consult certified Nanotrasen neurosurgeon before use.
obj.item.skillchip.name: skillchip

obj.item.skillchip.acrobatics.desc: A formerly cutting-edge skillchip that granted the user an advanced, Olympian-level degree of kinesthesics for flipping, spinning, and absolutely nothing else. 		It was pulled off the markets shortly after release due to users damaging the chip's integrity from excessive acrobatics, causing deadly malfunctions. It really puts the 'flop' in 'Fosbury Flop'!
obj.item.skillchip.acrobatics.name: old F058UR7 skillchip

obj.item.skillchip.acrobatics.kiss.desc: An idle experiment when developing skillchips led to this catastrophe. Everyone involved swore to keep it a secret until death, but it looks like someone has let loose this mistake into the world.
obj.item.skillchip.acrobatics.kiss.name: prototype N. 807 - K1SS skillchip

obj.item.skillchip.appraiser.desc: The name couldn't be any more desperate and self-explainatory, by skillchip naming standards.
obj.item.skillchip.appraiser.name: GENUINE ID Appraisal Now! skillchip

obj.item.skillchip.big_pointer.desc: A biochip detailing various techniques employed by historical leaders to points at things like a true boss.
obj.item.skillchip.big_pointer.name: Kommand skillchip

obj.item.skillchip.bonsai.desc: "Learn how to trim hedges and potted plants into new shapes. Third edition."
obj.item.skillchip.bonsai.name: Hedge 3 skillchip

obj.item.skillchip.brainwashing.desc: This biochip integrates with user's brain to enable mastery of specific skill. Consult certified Nanotrasen neurosurgeon before use.
obj.item.skillchip.brainwashing.name: suspicious skillchip

obj.item.skillchip.chameleon.reload.desc: If used, allows the user to perform tactical and instant reloads on all weapons with a magazine.
obj.item.skillchip.chameleon.reload.name: T.A.C.T.I.C00L skillchip

obj.item.skillchip.chefs_kiss.desc: This skillchip faintly smells of apple pie, how lovely. Consult a dietician before use.
obj.item.skillchip.chefs_kiss.name: K1SS skillchip

obj.item.skillchip.disk_verifier.desc: A skillchip with a tiny print of a nuclear authentification disk stamped onto it.
obj.item.skillchip.disk_verifier.name: K33P-TH4T-D15K skillchip

obj.item.skillchip.disposals.desc: Become a dauntless disposaler, target trash right where it belongs.
obj.item.skillchip.disposals.name: T4RG3T.bin skillchip

obj.item.skillchip.drunken_brawler.desc: A skillchip reeking of alcohol, said to improve one's fighting prowess while inebriated, as if that will save you from liver cirrhosis.
obj.item.skillchip.drunken_brawler.name: F0RC3 4DD1CT10N skillchip

obj.item.skillchip.entrails_reader.desc: This biochip integrates with user's brain to enable mastery of specific skill. Consult certified Nanotrasen neurosurgeon before use.
obj.item.skillchip.entrails_reader.name: 3NTR41LS skillchip

obj.item.skillchip.intj.desc: This biochip integrates with user's brain to enable mastery of specific skill. Consult certified Nanotrasen neurosurgeon before use.
obj.item.skillchip.intj.name: Integrated Intuitive Thinking and Judging skillchip

obj.item.skillchip.job.desc: This biochip integrates with user's brain to enable mastery of specific skill. Consult certified Nanotrasen neurosurgeon before use.
obj.item.skillchip.job.name: skillchip

obj.item.skillchip.job.chef.desc: This biochip faintly smells of garlic, which is odd for something that is normally wedged inside a user's brain. Consult a dietician before use.
obj.item.skillchip.job.chef.name: B0RK-X3 skillchip

obj.item.skillchip.job.clown.desc: This biochip contains several terabytes of uncannily religious, Honkmother-praising guides on how to reshape balloons into silly animals.
obj.item.skillchip.job.clown.name: B@L00NY skillchip

obj.item.skillchip.job.psychology.desc: Learn to bend the abyss to your will.
obj.item.skillchip.job.psychology.name: HYPERG1G4 skillchip

obj.item.skillchip.light_remover.desc: A skillchip about safe lightbulb removal. Whoever came up with that awful name should be fired.
obj.item.skillchip.light_remover.name: N16H7M4R3 skillchip

obj.item.skillchip.master_angler.desc: A skillchip brimmed with encyclopedic excerpts and factoids about fishing and fishes.
obj.item.skillchip.master_angler.name: Mast-Angl-Er skillchip

obj.item.skillchip.matrix_taunt.desc: Overclock, override and overload your kinesthesic senses, proprioception and reflexes for a small window of time to 		automatically dodge fired projectiles. Activated by performing a taunt.
obj.item.skillchip.matrix_taunt.name: BULLET_DODGER skillchip

obj.item.skillchip.mkiiultra.desc:
Why bother with training will when you can install obedience directly? Transform your target into a devoted, compliant companion - no leash required!		

With Patented Enthrallment Tech™, even the most independent spirits will be eager to fetch you coffee, act as a makeshift coat rack, or just stare adoringly at you as if you hold the secrets to the universe (you don’t).		

Side effects may include unnerving eye contact, sudden availability, and an unsettling enthusiasm for being at your beck and call.
obj.item.skillchip.mkiiultra.name: ENT-PET Mk.II ULTRA skillchip

obj.item.skillchip.musical.desc: An old copy of "Space Station 13: The Musical", 		ran on the station's 100th anniversary...Or maybe it was the 200th?
obj.item.skillchip.musical.name: Old Copy of "Space Station 13: The Musical"

obj.item.skillchip.research_director.desc: Knowledge of how to solve the ancient conundrum: what happens when an unstoppable force meets an immovable object.
obj.item.skillchip.research_director.name: R.D.S.P.L.X. skillchip

obj.item.skillchip.sabrage.desc: A skillchip faintly smelling of alcohol. Best used in conjuction with a sabre or otherwise a sharp blade.
obj.item.skillchip.sabrage.name: Le S48R4G3 skillchip

obj.item.skillchip.self_surgery.desc: A skillchip containing old Nanotrasen medical training protocols, which one could use to perform surgical operations on themselves. 		This one doesn't look like it's in the best condition - bit rot has probably rendered it somewhat risky to use.
obj.item.skillchip.self_surgery.name: 4U70-P3R4710N skillchip

obj.item.skillchip.useless_adapter.desc: Yo dawg, heard you like skillchips so we put a skillchip in your skillchip so you can... uuuh...
obj.item.skillchip.useless_adapter.name: Skillchip adapter

obj.item.skillchip.xenoarch_magnifier.desc: This biochip integrates with user's brain to enable the mastery of a specific skill. Consult certified Nanotrasen neurosurgeon before use. 	There's a little face etched into the back of the skillchip, with buck teeth and goofy-looking glasses.
obj.item.skillchip.xenoarch_magnifier.name: R3T3N-T1VE skillchip

obj.item.sliced_pipe.desc: Two half-size pipes made from one.
obj.item.sliced_pipe.name: halved pipe

obj.item.slime_cookie.desc: A weird slime cookie. You shouldn't see this.
obj.item.slime_cookie.name: error cookie

obj.item.slime_cookie.adamantine.desc: A translucent rock candy in the shape of a cookie. Surprisingly chewy.
obj.item.slime_cookie.adamantine.name: crystal cookie

obj.item.slime_cookie.black.desc: A pitch black cookie with an icing ghost on the front. Spooky!
obj.item.slime_cookie.black.name: spooky cookie

obj.item.slime_cookie.blue.desc: A transparent blue cookie. Constantly dripping wet.
obj.item.slime_cookie.blue.name: water cookie

obj.item.slime_cookie.bluespace.desc: A white cookie with green icing. Surprisingly hard to hold.
obj.item.slime_cookie.bluespace.name: space cookie

obj.item.slime_cookie.cerulean.desc: A cerulean cookie with strange proportions. It feels like it could break apart easily.
obj.item.slime_cookie.cerulean.name: duplicookie

obj.item.slime_cookie.darkblue.desc: A dark blue cookie with a snowflake pattern. Feels cold.
obj.item.slime_cookie.darkblue.name: frosty cookie

obj.item.slime_cookie.darkpurple.desc: A dark purple cookie, stinking of plasma.
obj.item.slime_cookie.darkpurple.name: toxic cookie

obj.item.slime_cookie.gold.desc: A buttery golden cookie, closer to a bread than anything. May good fortune find you.
obj.item.slime_cookie.gold.name: gilded cookie

obj.item.slime_cookie.green.desc: A disgusting green cookie, seeping with pus. You kind of feel ill just looking at it.
obj.item.slime_cookie.green.name: gross cookie

obj.item.slime_cookie.grey.desc: A grey-ish transparent cookie. Nutritious, probably.
obj.item.slime_cookie.grey.name: slime cookie

obj.item.slime_cookie.lightpink.desc: A light pink cookie with a peace symbol in the icing. Lovely!
obj.item.slime_cookie.lightpink.name: peace cookie

obj.item.slime_cookie.metal.desc: A shiny grey cookie. Hard to the touch.
obj.item.slime_cookie.metal.name: metallic cookie

obj.item.slime_cookie.oil.desc: An oily black cookie, which sticks to your hands. Smells like chocolate.
obj.item.slime_cookie.oil.name: tar cookie

obj.item.slime_cookie.orange.desc: An orange cookie with a fiery pattern. Feels warm.
obj.item.slime_cookie.orange.name: fiery cookie

obj.item.slime_cookie.pink.desc: A pink cookie with an icing heart. D'aww.
obj.item.slime_cookie.pink.name: love cookie

obj.item.slime_cookie.purple.desc: A purple cookie with a cross pattern. Soothing.
obj.item.slime_cookie.purple.name: health cookie

obj.item.slime_cookie.pyrite.desc: A yellow cookie with rainbow-colored icing. Reflects the light strangely.
obj.item.slime_cookie.pyrite.name: color cookie

obj.item.slime_cookie.red.desc: A red cookie, oozing a thick red fluid. Vampires might enjoy it.
obj.item.slime_cookie.red.name: blood cookie

obj.item.slime_cookie.sepia.desc: A light brown cookie with a clock pattern. Takes some time to chew.
obj.item.slime_cookie.sepia.name: time cookie

obj.item.slime_cookie.silver.desc: A warm, crispy cookie, sparkling silver in the light. Smells wonderful.
obj.item.slime_cookie.silver.name: waybread cookie

obj.item.slime_cookie.yellow.desc: A yellow cookie with a lightning pattern. Has a rubbery texture.
obj.item.slime_cookie.yellow.name: sparking cookie
