obj.item.slimecross.stabilized.silver.name: stabilized extract

obj.item.slimecross.stabilized.yellow.desc: It seems inert, but anything it touches glows softly...
obj.item.slimecross.stabilized.yellow.name: stabilized extract

obj.item.slimecrossbeaker.autoinjector.p.desc: A light pink gooey sphere. Simply touching it makes you a little dizzy.
obj.item.slimecrossbeaker.autoinjector.p.name: peaceful distillation

obj.item.slimecrossbeaker.autoinjector.r.desc: A strange glob of sweet-smelling semifluid, which seems to stick to skin rather easily.
obj.item.slimecrossbeaker.autoinjector.r.name: mending solution

obj.item.slimecrossbeaker.autoinjector.s.desc: A sphere of slime jelly. It seems to stick to your skin, but avoids other surfaces.
obj.item.slimecrossbeaker.autoinjector.s.name: slime jelly bubble

obj.item.slimecrossbeaker.autoinjector.s.desc: A bubbling purple mixture, designed to heal and boost movement.
obj.item.slimecrossbeaker.autoinjector.s.name: invigorating gel

obj.item.slimecrossbeaker.bloodpack.desc: A sphere of liquid blood, somehow managing to stay together.
obj.item.slimecrossbeaker.bloodpack.name: blood extract

obj.item.slimecrossbeaker.omnizine.desc: A gelatinous extract of pure omnizine.
obj.item.slimecrossbeaker.omnizine.name: healing extract

obj.item.slimecrossbeaker.pax.desc: A small blob of synthetic pax.
obj.item.slimecrossbeaker.pax.name: peace-inducing extract

obj.item.slimepotion.desc: A hard yet gelatinous capsule excreted by a slime, containing mysterious substances.
obj.item.slimepotion.name: slime potion

obj.item.slimepotion.enhancer.desc: A potent chemical mix that will give a slime extract an additional use.
obj.item.slimepotion.enhancer.name: extract enhancer

obj.item.slimepotion.enhancer.max.desc: An extremely potent chemical mix that will maximize a slime extract's uses.
obj.item.slimepotion.enhancer.max.name: extract maximizer

obj.item.slimepotion.extract_cloner.desc: A more powerful version of the extract enhancer potion, capable of cloning regular slime extracts.
obj.item.slimepotion.extract_cloner.name: extract cloning potion

obj.item.slimepotion.fireproof.desc: A potent chemical mix that will fireproof any article of clothing. Has three uses.
obj.item.slimepotion.fireproof.name: slime chill potion

obj.item.slimepotion.genderchange.desc: An interesting chemical mix that changes the biological gender of what its applied to. Cannot be used on things that lack gender entirely.
obj.item.slimepotion.genderchange.name: gender change potion

obj.item.slimepotion.lavaproof.desc: A strange, reddish goo said to repel lava as if it were water, without reducing flammability. Has two uses.
obj.item.slimepotion.lavaproof.name: slime lavaproofing potion

obj.item.slimepotion.lovepotion.desc: A pink chemical mix thought to inspire feelings of love.
obj.item.slimepotion.lovepotion.name: love potion

obj.item.slimepotion.peacepotion.desc: A light pink solution of chemicals, smelling like liquid peace. And mercury salts.
obj.item.slimepotion.peacepotion.name: pacification potion

obj.item.slimepotion.renaming.desc: A potion that allows a self-aware being to change what name it subconsciously presents to the world.
obj.item.slimepotion.renaming.name: renaming potion

obj.item.slimepotion.sentience.desc: A miraculous chemical mix that grants human like intelligence to living beings.
obj.item.slimepotion.sentience.name: intelligence potion

obj.item.slimepotion.sentience.mining.desc: Can be used to grant sentience to minebots. It's incompatible with minebot armor and melee upgrades, and will override them.
obj.item.slimepotion.sentience.mining.name: minebot AI upgrade

obj.item.slimepotion.sentience.nuclear.desc: A miraculous chemical mix that grants human like intelligence to living beings. It has been modified with Syndicate technology to also grant an internal radio implant to the target and authenticate with identification systems.
obj.item.slimepotion.sentience.nuclear.name: syndicate intelligence potion

obj.item.slimepotion.sentience.nuclear.d.desc: A miraculous chemical mix that grants human like intelligence to pony beings. It has been modified with Syndicate technology to also grant an internal radio implant to the pony and authenticate with identification systems
obj.item.slimepotion.sentience.nuclear.d.name: dangerous pony potion

obj.item.slimepotion.slime.chargedstabil.desc: An extremely potent chemical mix that will stop a slime from mutating completely.
obj.item.slimepotion.slime.chargedstabil.name: slime omnistabilizer

obj.item.slimepotion.slime.docility.desc: A potent chemical mix that nullifies a slime's hunger, causing it to become docile and tame.
obj.item.slimepotion.slime.docility.name: docility potion

obj.item.slimepotion.slime.mutator.desc: A potent chemical mix that will increase the chance of a slime mutating.
obj.item.slimepotion.slime.mutator.name: slime mutator

obj.item.slimepotion.slime.stabilizer.desc: A potent chemical mix that will reduce the chance of a slime mutating.
obj.item.slimepotion.slime.stabilizer.name: slime stabilizer

obj.item.slimepotion.slime.steroid.desc: A potent chemical mix that will cause a baby slime to generate more extract.
obj.item.slimepotion.slime.steroid.name: slime steroid

obj.item.slimepotion.slime_reviver.desc: Infused with plasma and compressed gel, this brings dead slimes back to life.
obj.item.slimepotion.slime_reviver.name: slime revival potion

obj.item.slimepotion.slimeradio.desc: A strange chemical that grants those who ingest it the ability to broadcast and receive subscape radio waves.
obj.item.slimepotion.slimeradio.name: bluespace radio potion

obj.item.slimepotion.spaceproof.desc: A potent chemical sealant that will render any article of clothing airtight. Has two uses.
obj.item.slimepotion.spaceproof.name: slime pressurization potion

obj.item.slimepotion.speed.desc: A potent chemical mix that will remove the slowdown from any item.
obj.item.slimepotion.speed.name: slime speed potion

obj.item.slimepotion.transference.desc: A strange slime-based chemical that, when used, allows the user to transfer their consciousness to a lesser being.
obj.item.slimepotion.transference.name: consciousness transference potion

obj.item.smelling_salts.desc: A small pile of a salt-like substance that smells absolutely repulsive. Rumor has it that the smell is so pungent that even the dead will come back to life to escape it.
obj.item.smelling_salts.name: smelling salts

obj.item.soap.desc: A cheap bar of soap. Doesn't smell.
obj.item.soap.name: soap

obj.item.soap.deluxe.desc: A deluxe Waffle Corporation brand bar of soap. Smells of high-class luxury.
obj.item.soap.deluxe.name: soap

obj.item.soap.drone.desc: A cheap bar of soap. Doesn't smell.
obj.item.soap.drone.name: integrated soap module

obj.item.soap.homemade.desc: A homemade bar of soap. Smells of... well....
obj.item.soap.homemade.name: soap

obj.item.soap.nanotrasen.desc: A heavy duty bar of Nanotrasen brand soap. Smells of plasma.
obj.item.soap.nanotrasen.name: soap

obj.item.soap.nanotrasen.cyborg.desc: A heavy duty bar of Nanotrasen brand soap. Smells of plasma.
obj.item.soap.nanotrasen.cyborg.name: built-in soap

obj.item.soap.omega.desc: The most advanced soap known to mankind. The beginning of the end for germs.
obj.item.soap.omega.name: Omega soap

obj.item.soap.syndie.desc: An untrustworthy bar of soap made of strong chemical agents that dissolve blood faster.
obj.item.soap.syndie.name: soap

obj.item.soil_sack.desc: A large plastic bag containing commercial garden soil. It is packed with sand, peat and manure. While you might not care much for such mixture, the plants have strange tastes.
obj.item.soil_sack.name: soil sack

obj.item.soil_sack.coir.desc:
A sack of Tiziran korta root coir. The fiberous roots are composted until they separate into individual fibres.

Provides an excellent food source for saprotrophic mushrooms and helps hold onto water in the hot Tizirian climate.
obj.item.soil_sack.coir.name: #1™ korta coir sack

obj.item.soil_sack.gel.desc: A sack of space age superabsorbent gel beads! You wonder how shipping them prehydrated would ever make business sense...
obj.item.soil_sack.gel.name: hydrogel bead sack

obj.item.soil_sack.rich.desc:
A sack of rich black soil.
As your gaze falls upon it, you feel a bit more connected to the land.
obj.item.soil_sack.rich.name: rich soil sack

obj.item.soil_sack.vermaculite.desc:
A sack of expanded mineral granules that can be used as soilless growing medium.

You like to think of it a bag of rocky popcorn that lets the roots breathe.
obj.item.soil_sack.vermaculite.name: NT vermaculite sack

obj.item.soil_sack.worm.desc:
A sack of vermicompost, also known as worm castings.

This invertebrate manure not only contains plant nutrients and undigested organic matter, it also harbours a rich flora of beneficial microorganisms.
obj.item.soil_sack.worm.name: worm castings sack

obj.item.solar_assembly.desc: A solar panel assembly kit, allows constructions of a solar panel, or with a tracking circuit board, a solar tracker.
obj.item.solar_assembly.name: solar panel assembly

obj.item.sord.desc: This thing is so unspeakably shitty you are having a hard time even holding it.
obj.item.sord.name: SORD

obj.item.soulscythe.desc: An old relic of hell created by devils to establish themselves as the leadership of hell over the demons. It grows stronger while it possesses a powerful soul.
obj.item.soulscythe.name: soulscythe

obj.item.soulstone.desc: A fragment of the legendary treasure known simply as the 'Soul Stone'. The shard still flickers with a fraction of the full artefact's power.
obj.item.soulstone.name: soulstone shard

obj.item.soulstone.anybody.desc: A fragment of the legendary treasure known simply as the 'Soul Stone'. The shard still flickers with a fraction of the full artefact's power.
obj.item.soulstone.anybody.name: soulstone shard

obj.item.soulstone.anybody.chaplain.desc: A fragment of the legendary treasure known simply as the 'Soul Stone'. The shard still flickers with a fraction of the full artefact's power.
obj.item.soulstone.anybody.chaplain.name: mysterious old shard

obj.item.soulstone.anybody.chaplain.spar.desc: A prison for those who lost a divine game.
obj.item.soulstone.anybody.chaplain.spar.name: divine punishment

obj.item.soulstone.anybody.mining.desc: A fragment of the legendary treasure known simply as the 'Soul Stone'. The shard still flickers with a fraction of the full artefact's power.
obj.item.soulstone.anybody.mining.name: soulstone shard

obj.item.soulstone.anybody.purified.desc: A fragment of the legendary treasure known simply as the 'Soul Stone'. The shard still flickers with a fraction of the full artefact's power.
obj.item.soulstone.anybody.purified.name: soulstone shard

obj.item.soulstone.anybody.revolver.desc: A fragment of the legendary treasure known simply as the 'Soul Stone'. The shard still flickers with a fraction of the full artefact's power.
obj.item.soulstone.anybody.revolver.name: soulstone shard

obj.item.soulstone.bloodsucker.desc: A fragment of the legendary treasure known simply as the 'Soul Stone'. The shard still flickers with a fraction of the full artefact's power.
obj.item.soulstone.bloodsucker.name: soulstone shard

obj.item.soulstone.mystic.desc: A fragment of the legendary treasure known simply as the 'Soul Stone'. The shard still flickers with a fraction of the full artefact's power.
obj.item.soulstone.mystic.name: soulstone shard

obj.item.space_crawl.desc: You are unable to hold anything while in this form.
obj.item.space_crawl.name: space crawl

obj.item.spanking_pad.desc: A leather pad with a handle.
obj.item.spanking_pad.name: spanking pad

obj.item.sparkler.desc: A little stick coated with metal powder and barium nitrate, burns with a pleasing sparkle.
obj.item.sparkler.name: sparkler

obj.item.spear.desc: A haphazardly-constructed yet still deadly weapon of ancient design.
obj.item.spear.name: spear

obj.item.spear.bamboospear.desc: A haphazardly-constructed bamboo stick with a sharpened tip, ready to poke holes into unsuspecting people.
obj.item.spear.bamboospear.name: bamboo spear

obj.item.spear.bonespear.desc: A haphazardly-constructed yet still deadly weapon. The pinnacle of modern technology.
obj.item.spear.bonespear.name: bone spear

obj.item.spear.dragonator.desc: An oversized multi-bladed spear designed to kill large hostile xenoforms such as space dragons or the creatures of Indecipheres. Capable of being launched from a ballista.
obj.item.spear.dragonator.name: giantslayer spear

obj.item.spear.dragonator_untreated.desc: A half-finished giantslayer spear, needs to be thrown in lava to forge the metals to a killing edge.
obj.item.spear.dragonator_untreated.name: unfired giantslayer spear

obj.item.spear.explosive.desc: A haphazardly-constructed yet still deadly weapon of ancient design.
obj.item.spear.explosive.name: explosive lance

obj.item.spear.grey_tide.desc: Recovered from the aftermath of a revolt aboard Defense Outpost Theta Aegis, in which a seemingly endless tide of Assistants caused heavy casualties among Nanotrasen military forces.
obj.item.spear.grey_tide.name: Grey Tide

obj.item.spear.military.desc: A stick with a seemingly blunt spearhead on its end. Looks like it might break bones easily.
obj.item.spear.military.name: military javelin

obj.item.spear.skybulge.desc: A legendary stick with a very pointy tip. Takes you to the skies!
obj.item.spear.skybulge.name: Sky Bulge

obj.item.spellbook.desc: An unearthly tome that glows with power.
obj.item.spellbook.name: spell book

obj.item.spellpacket.lightningbolt.desc: Some birdseed wrapped in cloth that crackles with electricity.
obj.item.spellpacket.lightningbolt.name: Lightning bolt Spell Packet

obj.item.spess_knife.desc: Unleash the cosmic ingenuity at your fingertips. It seamlessly shifts forms, revealing hidden talents that might just save the day. Who knows what secrets lie within this celestial tool?
obj.item.spess_knife.name: spess knife

obj.item.spider_egg.desc: A white egg with something crawling around inside. Looks... fragile.
obj.item.spider_egg.name: spider egg

obj.item.stack.arcadeticket.desc: Wow! With enough of these, you could buy a bike! ...Pssh, yeah right.
obj.item.stack.arcadeticket.name: arcade tickets

obj.item.stack.arcadeticket.thirty.desc: Wow! With enough of these, you could buy a bike! ...Pssh, yeah right.
obj.item.stack.arcadeticket.thirty.name: arcade tickets

obj.item.stack.cable_coil.desc: A coil of insulated power cable.
obj.item.stack.cable_coil.name: cable coil

obj.item.stack.cable_coil.cut.desc: A coil of insulated power cable.
obj.item.stack.cable_coil.cut.name: cable coil

obj.item.stack.cable_coil.five.desc: A coil of insulated power cable.
obj.item.stack.cable_coil.five.name: cable coil

obj.item.stack.cable_coil.thirty.desc: A coil of insulated power cable.
obj.item.stack.cable_coil.thirty.name: cable coil

obj.item.stack.cannonball.desc: A stack of heavy plasteel cannonballs. Gunnery for the space age!
obj.item.stack.cannonball.name: cannonballs

obj.item.stack.cannonball.emp.desc: A shot filled with two chambers that combine on impact, creating a chemical EMP. What does any of that mean? Who knows. Modern piracy really lost its soul with these newfangled things.
obj.item.stack.cannonball.emp.name: malfunction shots

obj.item.stack.cannonball.four.desc: A stack of heavy plasteel cannonballs. Gunnery for the space age!
obj.item.stack.cannonball.four.name: cannonballs

obj.item.stack.cannonball.fourteen.desc: A stack of heavy plasteel cannonballs. Gunnery for the space age!
obj.item.stack.cannonball.fourteen.name: cannonballs

obj.item.stack.cannonball.shellball.desc: An explosive anti-materiel and counter-battery projectile cannonball. Makes great work out of any wall, for easy entrances.
obj.item.stack.cannonball.shellball.name: explosive shellballs

obj.item.stack.cannonball.shellball.four.desc: An explosive anti-materiel and counter-battery projectile cannonball. Makes great work out of any wall, for easy entrances.
obj.item.stack.cannonball.shellball.four.name: explosive shellballs

obj.item.stack.cannonball.shellball.seve.desc: An explosive anti-materiel and counter-battery projectile cannonball. Makes great work out of any wall, for easy entrances.
obj.item.stack.cannonball.shellball.seve.name: explosive shellballs

obj.item.stack.cannonball.the_big_one.desc: An insane amount of explosives jammed into a massive cannonball. The last cannonball you'll ever fire in a fight, mostly because there'll be nothing left to shoot at afterwards.
obj.item.stack.cannonball.the_big_one.name: "The Biggest Ones"

obj.item.stack.cannonball.the_big_one.fi.desc: An insane amount of explosives jammed into a massive cannonball. The last cannonball you'll ever fire in a fight, mostly because there'll be nothing left to shoot at afterwards.
obj.item.stack.cannonball.the_big_one.fi.name: "The Biggest Ones"

obj.item.stack.cannonball.trashball.desc: A clump of tightly packed garbage. It'll work as a cannonball, but it may be unhealthy to actually put this in a real cannon.
obj.item.stack.cannonball.trashball.name: trashballs

obj.item.stack.cannonball.trashball.four.desc: A clump of tightly packed garbage. It'll work as a cannonball, but it may be unhealthy to actually put this in a real cannon.
obj.item.stack.cannonball.trashball.four.name: trashballs

obj.item.stack.circuit_stack.desc: A dense, overdesigned cluster of electronics which attempted to function as a multipurpose circuit electronic. Circuits can be removed from it... if you don't bleed out in the process.
obj.item.stack.circuit_stack.name: polycircuit aggregate

obj.item.stack.circuit_stack.full.desc: A dense, overdesigned cluster of electronics which attempted to function as a multipurpose circuit electronic. Circuits can be removed from it... if you don't bleed out in the process.
obj.item.stack.circuit_stack.full.name: polycircuit aggregate

obj.item.stack.clay.desc: A pile of clay that can be used to create ceramic artwork.
obj.item.stack.clay.name: clay

obj.item.stack.license_plates.empty.desc: Instead of a license plate number, this could contain a quote like "Live laugh love".
obj.item.stack.license_plates.empty.name: empty license plate

obj.item.stack.license_plates.empty.fift.desc: Instead of a license plate number, this could contain a quote like "Live laugh love".
obj.item.stack.license_plates.empty.fift.name: empty license plate

obj.item.stack.light_w.desc: A glass tile, which is wired, somehow.
obj.item.stack.light_w.name: wired glass tile

obj.item.stack.marker_beacon.desc: Prism-brand path illumination devices. Used by miners to mark paths and warn of danger.
obj.item.stack.marker_beacon.name: marker beacon

obj.item.stack.marker_beacon.ten.desc: Prism-brand path illumination devices. Used by miners to mark paths and warn of danger.
obj.item.stack.marker_beacon.ten.name: marker beacon

obj.item.stack.marker_beacon.thirty.desc: Prism-brand path illumination devices. Used by miners to mark paths and warn of danger.
obj.item.stack.marker_beacon.thirty.name: marker beacon

obj.item.stack.medical.aloe.desc: A healing paste for minor cuts and burns.
obj.item.stack.medical.aloe.name: aloe cream

obj.item.stack.medical.aloe.fresh.desc: A healing paste for minor cuts and burns.
obj.item.stack.medical.aloe.fresh.name: aloe cream

obj.item.stack.medical.bandage.desc: A DeForest brand bandage designed for basic first aid on blunt-force trauma.
obj.item.stack.medical.bandage.name: first aid bandage

obj.item.stack.medical.bandage.makeshift.desc: A hastily constructed bandage designed for basic first aid on blunt-force trauma.
obj.item.stack.medical.bandage.makeshift.name: makeshift bandage

obj.item.stack.medical.bone_gel.desc: A potent medical gel that, when applied to a damaged bone in a proper surgical setting, triggers an intense melding reaction to repair the wound. Can be directly applied alongside surgical sticky tape to a broken bone in dire circumstances, though this is very harmful to the patient and not recommended.
obj.item.stack.medical.bone_gel.name: bone gel

obj.item.stack.medical.bone_gel.one.desc: A potent medical gel that, when applied to a damaged bone in a proper surgical setting, triggers an intense melding reaction to repair the wound. Can be directly applied alongside surgical sticky tape to a broken bone in dire circumstances, though this is very harmful to the patient and not recommended.
obj.item.stack.medical.bone_gel.one.name: bone gel

obj.item.stack.medical.bruise_pack.desc: A therapeutic gel pack and bandages designed to treat blunt-force trauma.
obj.item.stack.medical.bruise_pack.name: bruise pack

obj.item.stack.medical.mesh.desc: A bacteriostatic mesh used to dress burns.
obj.item.stack.medical.mesh.name: regenerative mesh

obj.item.stack.medical.mesh.advanced.desc: An advanced mesh made with aloe extracts and sterilizing chemicals, used to treat burns.
obj.item.stack.medical.mesh.advanced.name: advanced regenerative mesh

obj.item.stack.medical.mesh.bloody.desc: A hemostatic mesh used to dress burns and stimulate hemopoiesis. Due to its blood-related purpose, it is worse at sanitizing infections.
obj.item.stack.medical.mesh.bloody.name: hemostatic mesh

obj.item.stack.medical.ointment.desc: Basic burn ointment, rated effective for second degree burns with proper bandaging, though it's still an effective stabilizer for worse burns. Not terribly good at outright healing burns though.
obj.item.stack.medical.ointment.name: ointment

obj.item.stack.medical.ointment.red_sun.desc: A popular brand of ointment for handling anything under the red sun, which tends to be terrible burns. 		Which red sun may this be referencing? Not even the producers of the balm are sure.
obj.item.stack.medical.ointment.red_sun.name: red sun balm

obj.item.stack.medical.poultice.desc:
A type of primitive herbal poultice.
		While traditionally used to prepare corpses for the mourning feast, 		it can also treat scrapes and burns on the living, however, 		it is liable to cause shortness of breath when employed in this manner.
		It is imbued with ancient wisdom.
obj.item.stack.medical.poultice.name: mourning poultices

obj.item.stack.medical.suture.desc: Basic sterile sutures used to seal up cuts and lacerations and stop bleeding.
obj.item.stack.medical.suture.name: suture

obj.item.stack.medical.suture.bloody.desc: Bloodclotting agent-infused sterile sutures used to seal up cuts and lacerations and reverse critical bleedings.
obj.item.stack.medical.suture.bloody.name: hemostatic suture

obj.item.stack.medical.suture.coagulant.desc: A small packet of fabricated coagulant for bleeding. Not as effective as some 		other methods of coagulating wounds, but is more effective than plain sutures. 		The downsides? It repairs less of the actual damage that's there.
obj.item.stack.medical.suture.coagulant.name: coagulant-F packet

obj.item.stack.medical.suture.medicated.desc: A suture infused with drugs that speed up wound healing of the treated laceration.
obj.item.stack.medical.suture.medicated.name: medicated suture

obj.item.stack.medical.wound_recovery.desc: A roll of flexible material dotted with millions of micro-scale injectors on one side. 		On application to a body part with a damaged bone structure, nanomachines stored within those 		injectors will surround the wound and form a subdermal, self healing splint. While convenient 		for keeping appearances and rapid healing, the nanomachines tend to leave their host particularly 		vulnerable to new damage for several minutes after application.
obj.item.stack.medical.wound_recovery.name: subdermal splint applicator

obj.item.stack.medical.wound_recovery.ra.desc: A small device filled with a fast acting coagulant of some type. 		When used on a bleeding area, will nearly instantly stop all bleeding. 		This rapid clotting action may result in temporary vulnerability to further 		damage after application.
obj.item.stack.medical.wound_recovery.ra.name: rapid coagulant applicator

obj.item.stack.medical.wound_recovery.ro.desc: A needle-tip foam gun filled with an advanced synthetic foam that rapidly 		fills and stabilizes structural damage in synthetics. The damaged area will be 		vulnerable to further damage while the foam hardens.
obj.item.stack.medical.wound_recovery.ro.name: robotic repair spray

obj.item.stack.medical.wound_recovery.ro.desc: A needle-tip foam gun filled with an advanced synthetic foam that rapidly 		fills and stabilizes structural damage in synthetics. The damaged area will be 		vulnerable to further damage while the foam hardens. 		This special premium type can also be used to repair almost any possible type 		of synthetic damage.
obj.item.stack.medical.wound_recovery.ro.name: premium robotic repair spray

obj.item.stack.medical.wrap.desc: Something you can wrap around someone, like a hug.
obj.item.stack.medical.wrap.name: wrap

obj.item.stack.medical.wrap.gauze.desc: A roll of elastic cloth, perfect for stabilizing all kinds of wounds, from cuts and burns, to broken bones.
obj.item.stack.medical.wrap.gauze.name: medical gauze

obj.item.stack.medical.wrap.gauze.improv.desc: A roll of cloth roughly cut from something that does a decent job of stabilizing wounds, but less efficiently so than real medical gauze.
obj.item.stack.medical.wrap.gauze.improv.name: improvised gauze

obj.item.stack.medical.wrap.gauze.steril.desc: A small roll of elastic material specially treated to be entirely sterile, and sealed in plastic just to be sure. 		These make excellent treatment against burn wounds, but due to their small nature are sub-par for serving as 		bone wound wrapping.
obj.item.stack.medical.wrap.gauze.steril.name: sealed aseptic gauze

obj.item.stack.medical.wrap.gauze.twelve.desc: A roll of elastic cloth, perfect for stabilizing all kinds of wounds, from cuts and burns, to broken bones.
obj.item.stack.medical.wrap.gauze.twelve.name: medical gauze

obj.item.stack.medical.wrap.sticky_tape.desc: Used for sticking to things for sticking said things to people.
obj.item.stack.medical.wrap.sticky_tape.name: sticky tape

obj.item.stack.medical.wrap.sticky_tape..desc: Tape designed for sealing punctures, holes and breakages in objects. Engineers swear by this stuff for practically all kinds of repairs. Maybe a little TOO much...
obj.item.stack.medical.wrap.sticky_tape..name: duct tape

obj.item.stack.medical.wrap.sticky_tape..desc: Used for sticking to things for sticking said things inside people.
obj.item.stack.medical.wrap.sticky_tape..name: pointy tape

obj.item.stack.medical.wrap.sticky_tape..desc: You didn't know tape could look so sinister. Welcome to Space Station 13.
obj.item.stack.medical.wrap.sticky_tape..name: super pointy tape

obj.item.stack.medical.wrap.sticky_tape..desc: Quite possibly the most mischievous substance in the galaxy. Use with extreme lack of caution.
obj.item.stack.medical.wrap.sticky_tape..name: super sticky tape

The lack of any imprinted dates, as well as its origin, the food replicator, should probably give you a good enough hint at its short, if reasonable, expiry time.

obj.item.storage.box.gum.colonial.desc: The packaging is entirely written in Pan-Slavic, with a small blurb of Sol Common. You would need to take a better look to read it, though, as it is written quite small.

obj.item.storage.box.gum.happiness.desc: A seemingly homemade packaging with an odd smell. It has a weird drawing of a smiling face sticking out its tongue.
obj.item.storage.box.gum.happiness.name: HP+ gum packet

obj.item.storage.box.gum.nicotine.name: nicotine gum packet

obj.item.storage.box.gum.wake_up.desc: Stay awake during long shifts in the maintenance tunnels with Activin! The approval seal of the Mothic Nomad Fleet 		is emblazoned on the packaging, alongside a litany of health and safety disclaimers in both Mothic and Galactic Common.
obj.item.storage.box.gum.wake_up.name: Activin 12 Hour medicated gum packet

obj.item.storage.box.hecu_rations.desc: A box containing a few rations and some chewing gum, for keeping a starving crayon-eater going.
obj.item.storage.box.hecu_rations.name: Meal, Ready-to-Eat

obj.item.storage.box.heretic_box.desc: A box containing toys resembling pierced realities.
obj.item.storage.box.heretic_box.name: box of pierced realities

obj.item.storage.box.hero.desc: This legendary figure of still dubious historical accuracy is thought to have been a world-famous archeologist who embarked on countless adventures in far away lands, along with his trademark whip and fedora hat.
obj.item.storage.box.hero.name: Courageous Tomb Raider - 1940's.

obj.item.storage.box.hero.astronaut.desc: One small step for a man, one giant leap for mankind. Relive the beginnings of space exploration with this fully functional set of vintage EVA equipment.
obj.item.storage.box.hero.astronaut.name: First Man on the Moon - 1960's.

obj.item.storage.box.hero.carphunter.desc: Despite his nickname, this wildlife expert was mainly known as a passionate environmentalist and conservationist, often coming in contact with dangerous wildlife to teach about the beauty of nature.
obj.item.storage.box.hero.carphunter.name: Carp Hunter, Wildlife Expert - 2506.

obj.item.storage.box.hero.etherealwarden.desc: Many fantastical stories are told of valiant trail wardens, even by offworlders who, thanks to their guidance, avoided an untimely demise while traveling the sometimes treacherous roads of Sprout. In truth their job entails far more walking and fixing roads than slaying dragons, but it is no less important and well respected: keeping the roads and trails safe and well maintained is for many settlements a matter of survival.
obj.item.storage.box.hero.etherealwarden.name: Ethereal Trailwarden - 2450's.

obj.item.storage.box.hero.journalist.desc: Many courageous individuals risked their lives to report on events the government sought to keep hidden from the public, ensuring that the truth remained buried and unheard. These garments are replicas of the clothing worn by one such 'journalist,' a silent sentinel in the fight for truth.
obj.item.storage.box.hero.journalist.name: Assassinated by CIA - 1984.

obj.item.storage.box.hero.mothpioneer.desc: Some claim that the fleet engineers are directly responsible for most modern advancements in spacefaring designs. Although the exact details of their past contributions are somewhat fuzzy, their ingenuity remains unmatched and unquestioned to this day.
obj.item.storage.box.hero.mothpioneer.name: Mothic Fleet Pioneer - 2429.

obj.item.storage.box.hero.ronin.desc: Anyone can give up, it's the easiest thing in the world to do. But to hold it together when everyone else would understand if you fell apart, that's true strength. Become the wandering swordsman you were always meant to be!
obj.item.storage.box.hero.ronin.name: Sword Saint, Wandering Vagabond - 1600's.

obj.item.storage.box.hero.scottish.desc: Seemingly a legendary figure in the battle for Scottish independence, this historical figure is closely associated with blue facepaint, big swords, strange man skirts, and his ever enduring catchphrase: 'FREEDOM!!'
obj.item.storage.box.hero.scottish.name: Braveheart, the Scottish rebel - 1300's.

obj.item.storage.pill_bottle.desc: It's an airtight container for storing medication.
obj.item.storage.pill_bottle.name: pill bottle

obj.item.storage.pill_bottle.aranesp.desc: The label has 'fuck disablers' hastily scrawled in black marker.
obj.item.storage.pill_bottle.aranesp.name: suspicious pill bottle

obj.item.storage.pill_bottle.epinephrine.desc: Contains pills used to stabilize patients.
obj.item.storage.pill_bottle.epinephrine.name: bottle of epinephrine pills

obj.item.storage.pill_bottle.happinessps.desc: Contains pills used as a last resort means to temporarily stabilize depression and anxiety. WARNING: side effects may include slurred speech, drooling, and severe addiction.
obj.item.storage.pill_bottle.happinessps.name: happiness pills

obj.item.storage.pill_bottle.happy.desc: There is a smiley on the top.
obj.item.storage.pill_bottle.happy.name: suspicious pill bottle

obj.item.storage.pill_bottle.immunodefic.desc: Contains immune system boosters, used to manage chronic immunodeficiency.
obj.item.storage.pill_bottle.immunodefic.name: bottle of immune boosters

obj.item.storage.pill_bottle.iron.desc: Contains pills used to reduce blood loss slowly. The tag in the bottle states 'Only take one each five minutes'.
obj.item.storage.pill_bottle.iron.name: bottle of iron pills

obj.item.storage.pill_bottle.lidocaine.desc: A package of local anesthetic medication, used in surgery to numb patients.
obj.item.storage.pill_bottle.lidocaine.name: lidocaine pills

obj.item.storage.pill_bottle.liquid_sold.desc: Contains pills used to treat synthetic brain damage.
obj.item.storage.pill_bottle.liquid_sold.name: bottle of liquid solder pills

obj.item.storage.pill_bottle.liquid_sold.desc: Contains diluted pills used to treat synthetic brain damage symptoms. Take one when feeling lightheaded.
obj.item.storage.pill_bottle.liquid_sold.name: bottle of liquid solder pills

obj.item.storage.pill_bottle.lsd.desc: There is a crude drawing which could be either a mushroom, or a deformed moon.
obj.item.storage.pill_bottle.lsd.name: suspicious pill bottle

obj.item.storage.pill_bottle.lsdpsych.desc: !FOR THERAPEUTIC USE ONLY! Contains pills used to alleviate the symptoms of Reality Dissociation Syndrome.
obj.item.storage.pill_bottle.lsdpsych.name: mindbreaker toxin pills

obj.item.storage.pill_bottle.maintenance.desc: An old pill bottle. It smells musty.
obj.item.storage.pill_bottle.maintenance.name: bottle of maintenance pills

obj.item.storage.pill_bottle.maintenance.desc: An old pill bottle. It smells musty.
obj.item.storage.pill_bottle.maintenance.name: bottle of maintenance pills

obj.item.storage.pill_bottle.mannitol.desc: Contains pills used to treat brain damage.
obj.item.storage.pill_bottle.mannitol.name: bottle of mannitol pills

obj.item.storage.pill_bottle.mannitol.br.desc: Contains diluted pills used to treat brain tumor symptoms. Take one when feeling lightheaded.
obj.item.storage.pill_bottle.mannitol.br.name: bottle of mannitol pills

obj.item.storage.pill_bottle.mining.desc: Contains patches used to treat brute and burn damage.
obj.item.storage.pill_bottle.mining.name: bottle of patches

obj.item.storage.pill_bottle.multiver.desc: Contains pills used to counter toxins.
obj.item.storage.pill_bottle.multiver.name: bottle of multiver pills

obj.item.storage.pill_bottle.multiver.le.desc: Contains pills used to counter toxins.
obj.item.storage.pill_bottle.multiver.le.name: bottle of multiver pills

obj.item.storage.pill_bottle.mutadone.desc: Contains pills used to treat genetic abnormalities.
obj.item.storage.pill_bottle.mutadone.name: bottle of mutadone pills

obj.item.storage.pill_bottle.nanite_slur.desc: Contains nanite slurry pills used for critical system repair to induce an overdose in a synthetic to repair organs.
obj.item.storage.pill_bottle.nanite_slur.name: bottle of concentrated nanite slurry pills

obj.item.storage.pill_bottle.neurine.desc: Contains pills to treat non-severe mental traumas.
obj.item.storage.pill_bottle.neurine.name: bottle of neurine pills

obj.item.storage.pill_bottle.ondansetron.desc: A bottle containing patches of ondansetron, a drug used to treat nausea and vomiting. May cause drowsiness.
obj.item.storage.pill_bottle.ondansetron.name: ondansetron patches

obj.item.storage.pill_bottle.painkiller.desc: It's an airtight container for storing medication. This one is all-white and has labels for containing amollin, a blend of Miner's Salve and Lidocaine.
obj.item.storage.pill_bottle.painkiller.name: amollin pill bottle

obj.item.storage.pill_bottle.paxpsych.desc: Contains pills used to temporarily pacify patients that are deemed a harm to themselves or others.
obj.item.storage.pill_bottle.paxpsych.name: pax pills

obj.item.storage.pill_bottle.penacid.desc: Contains pills to expunge radiation and toxins.
obj.item.storage.pill_bottle.penacid.name: bottle of pentetic acid pills

obj.item.storage.pill_bottle.potassiodid.desc: Contains pills used to reduce radiation damage.
obj.item.storage.pill_bottle.potassiodid.name: bottle of potassium iodide pills

obj.item.storage.pill_bottle.prescriptio.desc: A bottle of mild and medicinally approved stimulants to help prevent drowsiness. The list of substances reads: Contains 3u modafinil, 5u synaptizine and 5u glucose. A warning label reads: Take in moderation.
obj.item.storage.pill_bottle.prescriptio.name: bottle of prescribed stimulant pills

obj.item.storage.pill_bottle.probital.desc: Contains pills used to treat brute damage. The tag in the bottle states 'Eat before ingesting, may cause fatigue'.
obj.item.storage.pill_bottle.probital.name: bottle of probital pills

obj.item.storage.pill_bottle.psicodine.desc: Contains pills used to treat mental distress and traumas.
obj.item.storage.pill_bottle.psicodine.name: bottle of psicodine pills

obj.item.storage.pill_bottle.sansufentan.desc: A bottle of pills developed by Interdyne Pharmaceuticals. They're used to treat Hereditary Manifold Sickness.
obj.item.storage.pill_bottle.sansufentan.name: bottle of experimental medication

obj.item.storage.pill_bottle.stimulant.desc: Guaranteed to give you that extra burst of energy during a long shift!
obj.item.storage.pill_bottle.stimulant.name: bottle of stimulant pills

obj.item.storage.pill_bottle.system_clea.desc: Contains pills used to detoxify synthetic bodies.
obj.item.storage.pill_bottle.system_clea.name: bottle of system cleaner pills

obj.item.storage.pod.name: emergency space suits

obj.item.storage.portable_chem_mixer.name: portable chemical mixer

obj.item.storage.pouch.ammo.name: ammo pouch

obj.item.storage.pouch.cin_medkit.name: colonial first aid kit

obj.item.storage.toolbox.artistic.desc: A toolbox painted bright green. Why anyone would store art supplies in a toolbox is beyond you, but it has plenty of extra space.

obj.item.storage.toolbox.crafter.name: crafter toolbox

obj.item.storage.toolbox.emergency.turre.desc: A discreet kit for a magazine fed turret.
obj.item.storage.toolbox.emergency.turre.name: mag-fed turret kit

obj.item.storage.toolbox.emergency.turre.desc: A "Tarkon Industries Blackrust Salvage" "Cerberus" Turret Deployment Kit, it deploys a turret feeding from provided magazines. 	This model comes with 3 adjustable magazine slots, supporting most commonly available magazines.
obj.item.storage.toolbox.emergency.turre.name: T.I.B.S Cerberus Kit

obj.item.storage.toolbox.emergency.turre.desc: A deployable turret designed for safety during colony construction and colonist expeditionary camps. It is chambered to fire .460 ammunition
obj.item.storage.toolbox.emergency.turre.name: colonist defense turret kit

obj.item.storage.toolbox.emergency.turre.desc: A quick-deployable turret kit designed for sudden deployment in emergent situations, having warnings to "Not stand in front of the barrel. Friendly Fire Isn't". It is fitted to use handfuls of loose shotgun shells or M12g magazines.
obj.item.storage.toolbox.emergency.turre.name: duster emergent turret kit

obj.item.storage.toolbox.emergency.turre.desc: A "Tarkon Industries" "Hoplite" Turret Deployment Kit, it deploys a turret feeding from provided magazines. 	This model comes with 2 adjustable magazine slots, supporting 4.6x30mm magazines as well as Cesarzowa and Trappiste.
obj.item.storage.toolbox.emergency.turre.name: Tarkon Industries Hoplite Kit

obj.item.storage.toolbox.emergency.turre.desc: A deployable turret designed for outpost point defense and management of stray fauna.
obj.item.storage.toolbox.emergency.turre.name: outpost defense turret kit

obj.item.storage.toolbox.emergency.turre.desc: A throw-deployable turret capsule designed for securing areas within hostile fauna held zones. It is chambered in 4.6x30mm ammunition.
obj.item.storage.toolbox.emergency.turre.name: spider offensive turret capsule

obj.item.storage.toolbox.emergency.turre.desc: A deployable turret kit used for aggressive expansion and zone defense. It is chambered to fire 4.6x30mm ammunition. This one seems to have some odd lights flashing on it.
obj.item.storage.toolbox.emergency.turre.name: odd spider turret kit

obj.item.storage.toolbox.emergency.turre.desc: A throw-deployable turret capsule designed for securing areas within hostile fauna held zones. It is chambered in 4.6x30mm ammunition.
obj.item.storage.toolbox.emergency.turre.name: twin-fang offensive turret capsule

obj.item.storage.toolbox.emergency.turre.desc: A throw-deployable turret capsule designed for securing areas within hostile fauna held zones. It is chambered in .4.6x30mm ammunition. This one seems to have some odd lights flashing on it.
obj.item.storage.toolbox.emergency.turre.name: odd twinfang turret kit

obj.item.storage.toolbox.emergency.turre.desc: A deployable turret designed for office warfare. Throw it in the neighboring cubicle and take cover as it does the rest. Made with a flexible, recolourable material.
obj.item.storage.toolbox.emergency.turre.name: toy turret kit

obj.item.storage.toolbox.emergency.turre.desc: You feel a strange urge to hit this with a wrench.

obj.item.storage.toolbox.guncase.soviet.desc: A weapon's case. Has the symbol of the Third Soviet Union stamped on the side.

obj.item.storage.toolbox.guncase.traitor.desc: A weapon's case. Has a blood-red 'S' stamped on the cover. There seems to be a strange switch along the side inside a plastic flap.

obj.item.storage.toolbox.guncase.traitor.desc: A weapon's case. Has a blood-red 'S' stamped on the cover. There seems to be a strange switch along the side inside a plastic flap.
obj.item.storage.toolbox.guncase.traitor.name: makarov 9mm magazine case

obj.item.storage.toolbox.guncase.traitor.desc: A weapon's case. Has a blood-red 'S' stamped on the cover. There seems to be a strange switch along the side inside a plastic flap.

obj.item.storage.toolbox.guncase.traitor.name: Donksoft riot pistol gun case

obj.item.storage.toolbox.mechanical.old..desc: An old, blue toolbox, it looks robust.
obj.item.storage.toolbox.mechanical.old..name: toolbox

obj.item.storage.toolbox.medical.desc: A toolbox painted soft white and light blue. This is getting ridiculous.
obj.item.storage.toolbox.medical.name: medical toolbox

obj.item.storage.toolbox.medical.coroner.desc: A toolbox painted soft white and dark grey. This is getting beyond ridiculous.
obj.item.storage.toolbox.medical.coroner.name: coroner toolbox

obj.item.storage.toolbox.medical.full.desc: A toolbox painted soft white and light blue. This is getting ridiculous.
obj.item.storage.toolbox.medical.full.name: medical toolbox

obj.item.storage.wallet.desc: It can hold a few small and personal things.
obj.item.storage.wallet.name: wallet

obj.item.storage.wallet.money.desc: It can hold a few small and personal things. This one reeks of toilet water.
obj.item.storage.wallet.money.name: wallet

obj.item.storage.wallet.random.desc: It can hold a few small and personal things.
obj.item.storage.wallet.random.name: wallet

obj.item.storm_staff.desc: An ancient staff retrieved from the remains of Legion. The wind stirs as you move it.
obj.item.storm_staff.name: staff of storms

obj.item.straight_razor.desc: A very sharp blade, mostly used for shaving faces...
obj.item.straight_razor.name: straight razor

obj.item.strapon_dildo.desc: An item with which to be menacing and merciless.
obj.item.strapon_dildo.name: strapon

obj.item.style_meter.desc: Attach this to a pair of glasses to install a style meter system in them. You get style points from performing stylish acts and lose them for breaking your style. The style affects the quality of your mining, with you being able to mine ore better during a good chain. A responsive data HUD gives you the ability to reflect lavaland-based projectiles by punching them with an empty hand. In addition, at high style, you are able to swap an item in your hand with one in your backpack by hitting one with another.
obj.item.style_meter.name: style meter attachment

obj.item.suit_sensor.desc: That thingamabob medbay keeps telling you to set to 'Tracking Beacon'. It needs to be attached to a worn suit or dress to work.
obj.item.suit_sensor.name: suit sensor

obj.item.suit_voucher.desc: A token to redeem a new suit. Use it on a mining equipment vendor.
obj.item.suit_voucher.name: suit voucher

obj.item.summon_beacon.desc: Summons a thing. Probably shouldn't use this one, though.
obj.item.summon_beacon.name: summoner beacon

obj.item.summon_beacon.gas_miner.desc: Once a gas miner type is selected, delivers a gas miner to the target location.
obj.item.summon_beacon.gas_miner.name: gas miner beacon

obj.item.summon_beacon.gas_miner.syndica.desc: Once a gas miner type is selected, delivers a gas miner to the target location.
obj.item.summon_beacon.gas_miner.syndica.name: syndicate gas miner beacon

obj.item.supplypod_beacon.desc: A device that can be linked to an Express Supply Console for precision supply pod deliveries.
obj.item.supplypod_beacon.name: Supply Pod Beacon

obj.item.suppressor.desc: A syndicate small-arms suppressor for maximum espionage.
obj.item.suppressor.name: suppressor

obj.item.suppressor.standard.desc: A small-arms suppressor for maximum espionage.
obj.item.suppressor.standard.name: suppressor

obj.item.surgery_tray.desc: A DeForest-brand medical cart. It is a folding model, meaning the wheels on the bottom can be retracted and the body used as a tray.
obj.item.surgery_tray.name: surgery tray

obj.item.surgery_tray.deployed.desc: A DeForest-brand medical cart. It is a folding model, meaning the wheels on the bottom can be retracted and the body used as a tray.
obj.item.surgery_tray.deployed.name: surgery tray

obj.item.surgery_tray.full.desc: A DeForest-brand medical cart. It is a folding model, meaning the wheels on the bottom can be retracted and the body used as a tray.
obj.item.surgery_tray.full.name: surgery tray

obj.item.surgery_tray.full.advanced.desc: A DeForest-brand medical cart. It is a folding model, meaning the wheels on the bottom can be retracted and the body used as a tray.
obj.item.surgery_tray.full.advanced.name: surgery tray

obj.item.surgery_tray.full.deployed.desc: A DeForest-brand medical cart. It is a folding model, meaning the wheels on the bottom can be retracted and the body used as a tray.
obj.item.surgery_tray.full.deployed.name: surgery tray

obj.item.surgery_tray.full.morgue.desc: A DeForest-brand surgery tray, made for use in morgues. It is a folding model, 		meaning the wheels on the bottom can be extended outwards, making it a cart.
obj.item.surgery_tray.full.morgue.name: autopsy tray

obj.item.surgery_tray.full.morgue.deploy.desc: A DeForest-brand surgery tray, made for use in morgues. It is a folding model, 		meaning the wheels on the bottom can be extended outwards, making it a cart.
obj.item.surgery_tray.full.morgue.deploy.name: autopsy tray

obj.item.surgical_drapes.desc: Nanotrasen brand surgical drapes provide optimal safety and infection control.
obj.item.surgical_drapes.name: surgical drapes

obj.item.surgical_drapes.cyborg.desc: Nanotrasen brand surgical drapes provide optimal safety and infection control.
obj.item.surgical_drapes.cyborg.name: surgical drapes

obj.item.surgical_processor.desc: A device for scanning and initiating surgeries from a disk or operating computer.
obj.item.surgical_processor.name: surgical processor

obj.item.surgical_processor.mod.desc: A device for scanning and initiating surgeries from a disk or operating computer.
obj.item.surgical_processor.mod.name: MOD surgical processor

obj.item.surgical_processor.mod.emergenc.desc: A device for scanning and initiating surgeries from a disk or operating computer.
obj.item.surgical_processor.mod.emergenc.name: MOD surgical processor

obj.item.surgical_processor.mod.preloade.desc: A device for scanning and initiating surgeries from a disk or operating computer.
obj.item.surgical_processor.mod.preloade.name: MOD surgical processor

obj.item.surgicaldrill.desc: You can drill using this item. You dig?
obj.item.surgicaldrill.name: surgical drill

obj.item.surgicaldrill.alien.desc: Maybe alien surgeons have finally found a use for the drill.
obj.item.surgicaldrill.alien.name: alien drill

obj.item.surgicaldrill.ashwalker.desc: You can drill using this item. You dig?
obj.item.surgicaldrill.ashwalker.name: primitive surgical drill

obj.item.surgicaldrill.augment.desc: Effectively a small power drill contained within your arm. May or may not pierce the heavens.
obj.item.surgicaldrill.augment.name: surgical drill

obj.item.surgicaldrill.cruel.desc: What secrets do they keep buried within those pearls...
obj.item.surgicaldrill.cruel.name: tearing drill

obj.item.surgicaldrill.cruel.augment.desc: You cannot hide your secrets from me...
obj.item.surgicaldrill.cruel.augment.name: tearing drill

obj.item.surgicaldrill.cyborg.desc: You can drill using this item. You dig?
obj.item.surgicaldrill.cyborg.name: surgical drill

obj.item.surprise_egg.desc: A chocolate egg containing a little something special. Unwrap and enjoy!
obj.item.surprise_egg.name: wrapped egg

obj.item.survivalcapsule.desc: An emergency shelter stored within a pocket of bluespace.
obj.item.survivalcapsule.name: bluespace shelter capsule

obj.item.survivalcapsule.bathroom.desc: Provides vital emergency support to employees who are caught short in the field.
obj.item.survivalcapsule.bathroom.name: emergency relief capsule

obj.item.survivalcapsule.botany.desc: A bluespace pod, containing botanical equipment.
obj.item.survivalcapsule.botany.name: botany control capsule

obj.item.survivalcapsule.cabin.desc: A bluespace pod, containing a wooden cabin.
obj.item.survivalcapsule.cabin.name: deployable comfort capsule

obj.item.survivalcapsule.chemistry.desc: A bluespace capsule that deploys a functional chemistry refining area, useful for harvesting those helpful geysers.
obj.item.survivalcapsule.chemistry.name: chemical refinement pod

obj.item.survivalcapsule.fan.desc: A bluespace pod, containing a deployable fan, to keep the pressure in.
obj.item.survivalcapsule.fan.name: airlock fan capsule

obj.item.survivalcapsule.fishing.desc: An illegally modified mining capsule containing a small fishing spot connected to some faraway place.
obj.item.survivalcapsule.fishing.name: fishing spot capsule

obj.item.survivalcapsule.fishing.hacked.desc: An illegally modified mining capsule containing a small fishing spot connected to some faraway place.
obj.item.survivalcapsule.fishing.hacked.name: fishing spot capsule

obj.item.survivalcapsule.kitchen.desc: A bluespace pod, containing a kitchen.
obj.item.survivalcapsule.kitchen.name: deployable kitchen capsule

obj.item.survivalcapsule.luxury.desc: An exorbitantly expensive luxury suite stored within a pocket of bluespace.
obj.item.survivalcapsule.luxury.name: luxury bluespace shelter capsule

obj.item.survivalcapsule.luxuryelite.desc: A luxury bar in a capsule. Bartender required and not included.
obj.item.survivalcapsule.luxuryelite.name: luxury elite bar capsule

obj.item.survivalcapsule.medical.desc: A bluespace capsule that deploys a fairly effective medical treatment pod!
obj.item.survivalcapsule.medical.name: medical trauma pod

obj.item.survivalcapsule.o2.desc: A bluespace pod, containing a small pumping station, to harvest breathable O2.
obj.item.survivalcapsule.o2.name: oxygen harvesting capsule

obj.item.survivalcapsule.plap.desc: A bluespace capsule colored in syndie red and black. It has the letters PLAP written on it.
obj.item.survivalcapsule.plap.name: PLAP capsule

obj.item.survivalcapsule.sauna.desc: A bluespace capsule that deploys a luxurous sauna and hot tub
obj.item.survivalcapsule.sauna.name: sauna and hottub shelter

obj.item.survivalcapsule.sixbysix.desc: A bluespace pod, containing an empty 6x6 capsule.
obj.item.survivalcapsule.sixbysix.name: deployable large empty capsule

obj.item.survivalcapsule.threebythree.desc: A bluespace pod, containing an empty 3x3 capsule.
obj.item.survivalcapsule.threebythree.name: deployable small empty capsule

obj.item.survivalcapsule.trays.desc: A bluespace pod, containing botanical equipment.
obj.item.survivalcapsule.trays.name: botany trays capsule

obj.item.survivalcapsule.triage.desc: A bluespace pod, containing an 3x3 emergency triage.
obj.item.survivalcapsule.triage.name: deployable triage capsule

obj.item.survivalcapsule.xenoarchpod.desc: A bluespace pod, containing an 3x3 xenoarcheology capsule.
obj.item.survivalcapsule.xenoarchpod.name: deployable xenoarcheology capsule

obj.item.suspiciousphone.desc: This device raises pink levels to unknown highs.
obj.item.suspiciousphone.name: suspicious phone

obj.item.swab.desc: Some men use these for different reasons.
obj.item.swab.name: swab

obj.item.swapper.desc: An experimental device that is able to swap the locations of two entities by switching their particles' spin values. Must be linked to another device to function.
obj.item.swapper.name: quantum spin inverter

obj.item.syndicate_contacts.desc: A sinister red case that contains two shiny black contact lenses.
obj.item.syndicate_contacts.name: suspicious contact lens case

obj.item.syndicate_teleporter.desc: A reverse-engineered version of the Nanotrasen handheld teleporter. Lacks the advanced safety features of its counterpart. A three-headed serpent can be seen on the back.
obj.item.syndicate_teleporter.name: experimental teleporter

obj.item.syndicatedetonator.desc: Your standard issue bomb synchronizing button. Five second safety delay to prevent 'accidents'.
obj.item.syndicatedetonator.name: big red button

obj.item.syndicrate_key.desc: A device bearing a serpentine emblem, capable of splitting itself into two keys. Can be used to open one syndicrate.
obj.item.syndicrate_key.name: syndicrate key

obj.item.syndie_glue.desc: A black market brand of high strength adhesive, rarely sold to the public. Do not ingest.
obj.item.syndie_glue.name: bottle of super glue

obj.item.synth_powercord.desc: An internal power cord. Useful if you run on electricity. Not so much otherwise.
obj.item.synth_powercord.name: power cord

obj.item.t_scanner.desc: A terahertz-ray emitter and scanner used to detect underfloor objects such as cables and pipes.
obj.item.t_scanner.name: T-ray scanner

obj.item.t_scanner.adv_mining_scanner.desc: A scanner that automatically checks surrounding rock for useful minerals; it can also be used to stop gibtonite detonations. This one has an extended range.
obj.item.t_scanner.adv_mining_scanner.name: advanced automatic mining scanner

obj.item.t_scanner.adv_mining_scanner.le.desc: A scanner that automatically checks surrounding rock for useful minerals; it can also be used to stop gibtonite detonations.
obj.item.t_scanner.adv_mining_scanner.le.name: automatic mining scanner

obj.item.t_scanner.drone.desc: A T-ray scanner built into your chassis.
obj.item.t_scanner.drone.name: digital T-ray scanner

obj.item.table_clock.desc: An annoying clock that keeps you sane through tireless nights.
obj.item.table_clock.name: table clock

obj.item.tail_pin.desc: Officially branded 'pin the tail on the corgi' style party implement. Not intended to be used on people.
obj.item.tail_pin.name: tail pin

obj.item.tailclub.desc: For the beating to death of lizards with their own tails.
obj.item.tailclub.name: tail club

obj.item.tank.internals.anesthetic.desc: A tank with an N2O/O2 gas mix.
obj.item.tank.internals.anesthetic.name: anesthetic tank

obj.item.tank.internals.anesthetic.pure.desc: A tank with pure N2O. There is a warning sticker crudely slapped onto the tank.
obj.item.tank.internals.anesthetic.pure.name: anesthetic tank

obj.item.tank.internals.emergency_oxygen.desc: Used for emergencies. Contains very little oxygen, so try to conserve it until you actually need it.
obj.item.tank.internals.emergency_oxygen.name: emergency oxygen tank

obj.item.tank.internals.emergency_oxygen.desc: Used for emergencies. Contains very little oxygen, so try to conserve it until you actually need it.
obj.item.tank.internals.emergency_oxygen.name: double emergency oxygen tank

obj.item.tank.internals.emergency_oxygen.desc: Used for emergencies. Contains very little oxygen, so try to conserve it until you actually need it.
obj.item.tank.internals.emergency_oxygen.name: extended-capacity emergency oxygen tank

obj.item.tank.internals.emergency_oxygen.desc: Used for emergencies. Contains very little oxygen with an extra of a funny gas, so try to conserve it until you actually need it.
obj.item.tank.internals.emergency_oxygen.name: funny emergency oxygen tank

obj.item.tank.internals.emergency_oxygen.desc: Used for emergencies. Contains very little oxygen with an extra of a funny gas, so try to conserve it until you actually need it.
obj.item.tank.internals.emergency_oxygen.name: funny emergency oxygen tank

obj.item.tank.internals.emergency_oxygen.desc: Used for emergencies. Contains very little oxygen with an extra of a funny gas, so try to conserve it until you actually need it.
obj.item.tank.internals.emergency_oxygen.name: funny emergency oxygen tank

obj.item.tank.internals.emergency_oxygen.desc: Used for emergencies. Contains very little oxygen with an extra of a funny gas, so try to conserve it until you actually need it.
obj.item.tank.internals.emergency_oxygen.name: funny emergency oxygen tank

obj.item.tank.internals.generic.desc: A generic tank used for storing and transporting gasses. Can be used for internals.
obj.item.tank.internals.generic.name: gas tank

obj.item.tank.internals.nitrogen.desc: A small tank of nitrogen, for crew who don't breathe the standard air mix.
obj.item.tank.internals.nitrogen.name: nitrogen tank

obj.item.tank.internals.nitrogen.belt.desc: A small tank of nitrogen, for crew who don't breathe the standard air mix.
obj.item.tank.internals.nitrogen.belt.name: nitrogen tank

obj.item.tank.internals.nitrogen.belt.em.desc: Used for emergencies. Contains very little nitrogen, so try to conserve it until you actually need it.
obj.item.tank.internals.nitrogen.belt.em.name: emergency nitrogen tank

obj.item.tank.internals.oxygen.desc: A tank of oxygen, this one is blue.
obj.item.tank.internals.oxygen.name: oxygen tank

obj.item.tank.internals.oxygen.red.desc: A tank of oxygen, this one is red.
obj.item.tank.internals.oxygen.red.name: oxygen tank

obj.item.tank.internals.oxygen.yellow.desc: A tank of oxygen, this one is yellow.
obj.item.tank.internals.oxygen.yellow.name: oxygen tank

obj.item.tank.internals.plasma.desc: Contains dangerous plasma. Do not inhale. Warning: extremely flammable.
obj.item.tank.internals.plasma.name: plasma tank

obj.item.tank.internals.plasmaman.desc: A tank of plasma gas designed specifically for use as internals, particularly for plasma-based lifeforms. If you're not a Plasmaman, you probably shouldn't use this.
obj.item.tank.internals.plasmaman.name: plasma internals tank

obj.item.tank.internals.plasmaman.belt.desc: A tank of plasma gas designed specifically for use as internals, particularly for plasma-based lifeforms. If you're not a Plasmaman, you probably shouldn't use this.
obj.item.tank.internals.plasmaman.belt.name: plasma internals tank

obj.item.tank.jetpack.desc: A tank of compressed gas for use as propulsion in zero-gravity areas. Use with caution.
obj.item.tank.jetpack.name: jetpack (oxygen)

obj.item.tank.jetpack.captain.desc: A compact, lightweight jetpack containing a high amount of compressed oxygen.
obj.item.tank.jetpack.captain.name: captain's jetpack

obj.item.tank.jetpack.carbondioxide.desc: A tank of compressed carbon dioxide for use as propulsion in zero-gravity areas. Painted black to indicate that it should not be used as a source for internals.
obj.item.tank.jetpack.carbondioxide.name: jetpack (carbon dioxide)

obj.item.tank.jetpack.harness.desc: A lightweight tactical harness, used by those who don't want to be weighed down by traditional jetpacks.
obj.item.tank.jetpack.harness.name: jet harness (oxygen)

obj.item.tank.jetpack.improvised.desc: A jetpack made from two air tanks, a fire extinguisher and some atmospherics equipment. It doesn't look like it can hold much.
obj.item.tank.jetpack.improvised.name: improvised jetpack

obj.item.tank.jetpack.security.desc: A tank of compressed oxygen for use as propulsion in zero-gravity areas by security forces.
obj.item.tank.jetpack.security.name: security jetpack (oxygen)

obj.item.tank.jetpack.void.desc: It works well in a void.
obj.item.tank.jetpack.void.name: void jetpack (oxygen)

obj.item.tank.rbmk2_rod.desc: A rod for the RB-MK2 reactor. Usually filled with a mix of tritium and an inert gas, such as nitrogen.
obj.item.tank.rbmk2_rod.name: RB-MK2 reactor rod

obj.item.tape.desc: A magnetic tape that can hold up to ten minutes of content on either side.
obj.item.tape.name: tape

obj.item.tape.comms_wall.desc: A magnetic tape that can hold up to ten minutes of content on either side.
obj.item.tape.comms_wall.name: tape

obj.item.tape.dyed.desc: A magnetic tape that can hold up to ten minutes of content on either side.
obj.item.tape.dyed.name: tape

obj.item.tape.frozen.desc: A frozen old tape. The cold has somewhat preserved the recording inside.
obj.item.tape.frozen.name: frozen tape

obj.item.tape.random.desc: A magnetic tape that can hold up to ten minutes of content on either side.
obj.item.tape.random.name: tape

obj.item.tape.ruins.desc: A magnetic tape that can hold up to ten minutes of content on either side.
obj.item.tape.ruins.name: tape

obj.item.tape.ruins.ancient_milsim.desc: Tape recording made, presumably, somewhere around twenty third century - at least, that's what the smudged labels are saying. Why is it smudged? Presumably to be authentic.
obj.item.tape.ruins.ancient_milsim.name: Developer Commentary

obj.item.tape.ruins.ancient_milsim.devlo.desc: Tape recording made, presumably, somewhere around twenty third century - at least, that's what the smudged labels are saying. Why is it smudged? Presumably to be authentic.
obj.item.tape.ruins.ancient_milsim.devlo.name: Developer Commentary, Log 1: Setting

obj.item.tape.ruins.ancient_milsim.devlo.desc: Tape recording made, presumably, somewhere around twenty third century - at least, that's what the smudged labels are saying. Why is it smudged? Presumably to be authentic.
obj.item.tape.ruins.ancient_milsim.devlo.name: Developer Commentary, Log 3: SNPCs

obj.item.tape.ruins.ancient_milsim.devlo.desc: Tape recording made, presumably, somewhere around twenty third century - at least, that's what the smudged labels are saying. Why is it smudged? Presumably to be authentic.
obj.item.tape.ruins.ancient_milsim.devlo.name: Developer Commentary, Log 2: Mechanics

obj.item.tape.ruins.black_mesa.first_eas.desc: The tape with some signs of date. Probably used by some aspiring wave listener.
obj.item.tape.ruins.black_mesa.first_eas.name: tape

obj.item.tape.ruins.black_mesa.first_hec.desc: Freshly-recorded tape, it isn't even signed.
obj.item.tape.ruins.black_mesa.first_hec.name: tape

obj.item.tape.ruins.black_mesa.second_ea.desc: The tape with some markings of blood. Probably used by some (now deceased) radio enthusiast.
obj.item.tape.ruins.black_mesa.second_ea.name: tape

obj.item.tape.ruins.black_mesa.second_he.desc: Relatively freshly-recorded taped, signed as "radio transmission number XX XX.XX.200X". Date and serial numbers have been scratched beyond recognition. How convenient.
obj.item.tape.ruins.black_mesa.second_he.name: tape

obj.item.tape.ruins.black_mesa.third_eas.desc: The tape with some... weird vines faintly growing through. Probably used by some alien.
obj.item.tape.ruins.black_mesa.third_eas.name: tape

obj.item.tape.ruins.black_mesa.third_hec.desc: Blood-covered tape. That's pretty much it.
obj.item.tape.ruins.black_mesa.third_hec.name: tape

obj.item.tape.ruins.salvagepost.desc: The tape is lazily labelled with "Msg for my replacement"
obj.item.tape.ruins.salvagepost.name: tape

obj.item.tape.ruins.tarkon.desc: An old, dusty tape with a small, faded stamp, reading "Cleanup Chatter."... Should definitely be flipped if not being read when played.
obj.item.tape.ruins.tarkon.name: dusty tape

obj.item.tape.ruins.tarkon.celebration.desc: An old tape with a label, "Celebrations were a mistake", writen shakily in red pen.. Should definitely be flipped if not being read when played.
obj.item.tape.ruins.tarkon.celebration.name: dusty tape

obj.item.tape.ruins.tarkon.safe.desc: An old tape with a label, "Exchange with the Science Leader"... Should definitely be flipped if not being read when played.
obj.item.tape.ruins.tarkon.safe.name: dusty tape

obj.item.taperecorder.desc: A device that can record to cassette tapes, and play them. It automatically translates the content in playback.
obj.item.taperecorder.name: universal recorder

obj.item.taperecorder.empty.desc: A device that can record to cassette tapes, and play them. It automatically translates the content in playback.
obj.item.taperecorder.empty.name: universal recorder

obj.item.target.alien.desc: A shooting target that looks like a xenomorphic alien.
obj.item.target.alien.name: shooting target

obj.item.target.alien.anchored.desc: A shooting target that looks like a xenomorphic alien.
obj.item.target.alien.anchored.name: shooting target

obj.item.target.clown.desc: A shooting target that looks like a useless clown.
obj.item.target.clown.name: shooting target

obj.item.target.syndicate.desc: A shooting target that looks like syndicate scum.
obj.item.target.syndicate.name: shooting target

obj.item.target_designator.desc: A simple target designation system used to let someone over-ride a turrets targeting software and focus on one entity, or designate someone as a "Friend".
obj.item.target_designator.name: Turret Target Designator

obj.item.target_designator.sniper.desc: A target designator with a shorter acquisition duration and a singular turret limit, but capable of tagging targets at much further ranges.
obj.item.target_designator.sniper.name: Shot Caller

obj.item.taster.desc: Tastes things, so you don't have to!
obj.item.taster.name: taster

obj.item.tattoo_kit.desc: A kit with all the tools necessary for losing a bet, or making otherwise incredibly indelible decisions.
obj.item.tattoo_kit.name: tattoo kit

obj.item.tcgcard.desc: Wow, a mint condition coder card! Better tell the GitHub all about this!
obj.item.tcgcard.name: Coder

obj.item.teleport_rod.desc: A magical rod that teleports you to the location you point it. 		Using it puts you in a state of flux, removing some of your reagents and 		causing you to take damage from further uses until you stabilize once more.
obj.item.teleport_rod.name: Telegram Scepter

obj.item.teleport_rod.admin.desc: A magical rod that teleports you anywhere, no questions asked.
obj.item.teleport_rod.admin.name: Harmonious

obj.item.terragov_reporter.desc: Use this in-hand to vote to call TerraGov backup. If half your team votes for it, SWAT will be dispatched.
obj.item.terragov_reporter.name: TerraGov reporter

obj.item.terragov_reporter.pizza_manager.desc: Use this in-hand to vote to call for Dogginos Regional Managers if the station refuses to pay for their pizza. 		If half your delivery squad votes for it, Dogginos Regional Managers will be dispatched.
obj.item.terragov_reporter.pizza_manager.name: Dogginos uncompliant customer reporter

obj.item.terragov_reporter.swat_caller.desc: Use this in-hand to vote to call TerraGov S.W.A.T. backup. If half your team votes for it, SWAT will be dispatched.
obj.item.terragov_reporter.swat_caller.name: S.W.A.T. backup caller

obj.item.terragov_reporter.treason_repor.desc: Use this in-hand to vote that the station is engaging in Treason. If half your team votes for it, the Military will handle the situation.
obj.item.terragov_reporter.treason_repor.name: treason reporter

obj.item.tether_anchor.desc: A reinforced anchor with a tether attachment point. A centuries old EVA tool which saved countless engineers' lives.
obj.item.tether_anchor.name: tether anchor

obj.item.tgui_book.desc: Must be one of those new fangled electronic books.
obj.item.tgui_book.name: book

obj.item.tgui_book.manual.desc: Must be one of those new fangled electronic books.
obj.item.tgui_book.manual.name: book

obj.item.tgui_book.manual.dsm.desc: The Space Diagnostic and Statistical Manual of Mental Disorders, 		a comprehensive book on all known mental disorders. 		On its 35th edition - though it's due for an update...
obj.item.tgui_book.manual.dsm.name: SDSM-35

obj.item.tgui_book.manual.idc.desc: The Interplanetary Classification of Diseases, 		a comprehensive book on all known diseases and ailments. 		On its 27th edition - though it's due for an update...
obj.item.tgui_book.manual.idc.name: IDC-27

obj.item.tgui_book.manual.infuser.desc: An entire book on how to not turn yourself into a fly mutant.
obj.item.tgui_book.manual.infuser.name: DNA infusion book

obj.item.thermometer.desc: A thermometer for checking a something's temperature.
obj.item.thermometer.name: thermometer

obj.item.thermometer.pen.desc: A thermometer for checking a something's temperature.
obj.item.thermometer.pen.name: thermometer

obj.item.throwing_star.desc: An ancient weapon still used to this day, due to its ease of lodging itself into its victim's body parts.
obj.item.throwing_star.name: throwing star

obj.item.throwing_star.stamina.desc: An aerodynamic disc designed to cause excruciating pain when stuck inside fleeing targets, hopefully without causing fatal harm.
obj.item.throwing_star.stamina.name: shock throwing star

obj.item.throwing_star.stamina.ninja.desc: An evolution of the traditional steel shuriken, commonly used by Spider Clan initiates. 		When thrown or embedded, its internal energy emitter releases an electromagnetic pulse.
obj.item.throwing_star.stamina.ninja.name: energy throwing star

obj.item.throwing_star.toy.desc: An aerodynamic disc strapped with adhesive for sticking to people, good for playing pranks and getting yourself killed by security.
obj.item.throwing_star.toy.name: toy throwing star

obj.item.ticket_machine_ticket.desc: A ticket which shows your place in the Head of Personnel's line. Made from Nanotrasen patented NanoPaper®. Though solid, its form seems to shimmer slightly. Feels (and burns) just like the real thing.
obj.item.ticket_machine_ticket.name: ticket

obj.item.tickle_feather.desc: A rather ticklish feather that can be used in both mirth and malice.
obj.item.tickle_feather.name: tickling feather

obj.item.tome.desc: An old, dusty tome with frayed edges and a sinister-looking cover.
obj.item.tome.name: arcane tome

obj.item.toner.desc: A small, lightweight cartridge of Nanotrasen ValueBrand toner. Fits photocopiers and autopainters alike.
obj.item.toner.name: toner cartridge

obj.item.toner.extreme.desc: Why would ANYONE need THIS MUCH TONER?
obj.item.toner.extreme.name: extremely large toner cartridge

obj.item.toner.large.desc: A hefty cartridge of Nanotrasen ValueBrand toner. Fits photocopiers and autopainters alike.
obj.item.toner.large.name: large toner cartridge

obj.item.tourniquet.desc: A medical device used to stop severe bleeding from a limb.
obj.item.tourniquet.name: tourniquet

obj.item.towel.desc: Everyone knows what a towel is. Use it to dry yourself, or wear it around your chest, your waist or even your head!
obj.item.towel.name: towel

obj.item.toy.ammo.gun.desc: Make sure to recycle the box in an autolathe when it gets empty.
obj.item.toy.ammo.gun.name: capgun ammo

obj.item.toy.balloon.desc: No birthday is complete without it. Sealed with a mechanical bluespace wrap so it remains floating no matter what.
obj.item.toy.balloon.name: balloon

obj.item.toy.balloon.arrest.desc: A half inflated balloon about a boyband named Arreyst that was popular about ten years ago, famous for making fun of red jumpsuits as unfashionable.
obj.item.toy.balloon.arrest.name: arreyst balloon

obj.item.toy.balloon.corgi.desc: A balloon in the shape of a corgi's head. For the all year good boys.
obj.item.toy.balloon.corgi.name: corgi balloon

obj.item.toy.balloon.heart.desc: A balloon in the shape of a heart. How lovely
obj.item.toy.balloon.heart.name: heart balloon

obj.item.toy.balloon.long.desc: A perfect balloon to contort into goofy forms. Sealed with a mechanical bluespace wrap so it remains floating no matter what.
obj.item.toy.balloon.long.name: long balloon

obj.item.toy.balloon.syndicate.desc: There is a tag on the back that reads "FUK NT!11!".
obj.item.toy.balloon.syndicate.name: syndicate balloon

obj.item.toy.balloon_animal.ai.desc: A somewhat unrealistic balloon effigy of the station's AI core. Actual AI probably wouldn't smile like this.
obj.item.toy.balloon_animal.ai.name: balloon ai core

obj.item.toy.balloon_animal.banana.desc: A balloon banana. This one can't be slipped on. Good for psychological warfare, though.
obj.item.toy.balloon_animal.banana.name: balloon banana

obj.item.toy.balloon_animal.cat.desc: Without the sharp claws, balloon cats are possibly cuter than their live counterparts, though not as relatable, warm and fuzzy.
obj.item.toy.balloon_animal.cat.name: balloon cat

obj.item.toy.balloon_animal.clown.desc: A balloon clown, smiling from ear to ear and beyond!
obj.item.toy.balloon_animal.clown.name: balloon clown

obj.item.toy.balloon_animal.dog.desc: A balloon effigy of the best boy. It cannot truly compare, but it makes an effort.
obj.item.toy.balloon_animal.dog.name: balloon dog

obj.item.toy.balloon_animal.ethereal.desc: A balloon effigy of an ethereal artisan. Clownery is one form of art, and as such, ethereals were both drawn to and readily accepted at clown planet. Don't mind the lighbulb head, it's art too.
obj.item.toy.balloon_animal.ethereal.name: balloon ethereal

obj.item.toy.balloon_animal.fly.desc: A balloon effigy of a flyperson. Thankfully, it doesn't come with balloon vomit.
obj.item.toy.balloon_animal.fly.name: balloon fly

obj.item.toy.balloon_animal.guy.desc: A balloon effigy of the everyday standard issue human guy. Wonder if he pays balloon taxes. He probably evades them.
obj.item.toy.balloon_animal.guy.name: balloon guy

obj.item.toy.balloon_animal.lizard.desc: A balloon effigy of a lizard. One of the first species to adapt to clown planet's culture. Perhaps because they are naturally laughable?
obj.item.toy.balloon_animal.lizard.name: balloon lizard

obj.item.toy.balloon_animal.moth.desc: A balloon effigy of a common member of moth flotillas. Very few of them ever decide to settle on the clown planet, but those who do have the best 'piece-of-cloth-disappearing' acts.
obj.item.toy.balloon_animal.moth.name: balloon moth

obj.item.toy.balloon_animal.nukie.desc: A balloon effigy of syndicate's nuclear operative. Either made to appease them and pray for survival, or to poke fun at them.
obj.item.toy.balloon_animal.nukie.name: balloon nukie

obj.item.toy.balloon_animal.plasmaman.desc: A balloon effigy of a plasmaman. Among the rarest on the clown planet, only having appeared recently thanks to ready trade between clown planet and NT.
obj.item.toy.balloon_animal.plasmaman.name: balloon plasmaman

obj.item.toy.balloon_animal.podguy.desc: A balloon effigy of a podperson. Though, actual podpeople have heads and not stalks and leaves.
obj.item.toy.balloon_animal.podguy.name: balloon podguy

obj.item.toy.balloon_animal.slime.desc: A balloon effigy of single specimen of the galaxy-wide slime scourge, of purple variety. Slimes tried to invade clown planet once. They got quickly washed out by water-spitting flowers, though.
obj.item.toy.balloon_animal.slime.name: balloon slime

obj.item.toy.balloon_animal.xeno.desc: A balloon effigy of a spooky xeno! Too squishy to scare anyone itself, though.
obj.item.toy.balloon_animal.xeno.name: balloon xeno

obj.item.toy.basketball.desc: Here's your chance, do your dance at the Space Jam.
obj.item.toy.basketball.name: basketball

obj.item.toy.beach_ball.baseball.desc: Enter the world of concussions and become who you were destined to be.
obj.item.toy.beach_ball.baseball.name: baseball

obj.item.toy.beach_ball.branded.desc: The simple beach ball is one of Nanotrasen's most popular products. 'Why do we make beach balls? Because we can! (TM)' - Nanotrasen
obj.item.toy.beach_ball.branded.name: Nanotrasen-brand beach ball

obj.item.toy.braintoy.desc: A Mr. Monstrous brand toy made to imitate a human brain in smell and texture.
obj.item.toy.braintoy.name: squeaky brain

obj.item.toy.brokenradio.desc: An old radio that produces nothing but static when turned on.
obj.item.toy.brokenradio.name: broken radio

obj.item.toy.captainsaid.desc: Every captain's greatest ally when exploring the vast emptiness of space, now with a color display!
obj.item.toy.captainsaid.name: Captain's Aid

obj.item.toy.captainsaid.collector.desc: A copy of the first run of Captain's Aid ever released. Functionally the same as the later batches, just more expensive. For the truly aristocratic.
obj.item.toy.captainsaid.collector.name: Collector's Edition Captain's Aid

obj.item.toy.cards.cardhand.desc: A number of cards not in a deck, customarily held in ones hand.
obj.item.toy.cards.cardhand.name: hand of cards

obj.item.toy.cards.deck.desc: A deck of space-grade playing cards.
obj.item.toy.cards.deck.name: deck of cards

obj.item.toy.cards.deck.blank.desc: A deck of playing cards that can be customized with writing.
obj.item.toy.cards.deck.blank.name: custom deck of cards

obj.item.toy.cards.deck.blank.black.desc: A deck of playing cards that can be customized with writing.
obj.item.toy.cards.deck.blank.black.name: custom deck of cards

obj.item.toy.cards.deck.cardshoe.desc: A clear plastic card dispenser for holding a large amount of cards. For better or for worse, 		the dispenser is designed to prevent a haphazard scattering of cards if thrown.
obj.item.toy.cards.deck.cardshoe.name: card shoe

obj.item.toy.cards.deck.cas.desc: A deck for the game Cards Against Spess, still popular after all these centuries. Warning: may include traces of broken fourth wall. This is the white deck.
obj.item.toy.cards.deck.cas.name: CAS deck (white)

obj.item.toy.cards.deck.cas.black.desc: A deck for the game Cards Against Spess, still popular after all these centuries. Warning: may include traces of broken fourth wall. This is the black deck.
obj.item.toy.cards.deck.cas.black.name: CAS deck (black)

obj.item.toy.cards.deck.kotahi.desc: A deck of kotahi cards. House rules to argue over not included.
obj.item.toy.cards.deck.kotahi.name: KOTAHI deck

obj.item.toy.cards.deck.kotahi.nanite.desc: A deck of kotahi cards. House rules to argue over not included.
obj.item.toy.cards.deck.kotahi.nanite.name: kotahi deck

obj.item.toy.cards.deck.nanite.desc: A deck of space-grade playing cards.
obj.item.toy.cards.deck.nanite.name: main deck

obj.item.toy.cards.deck.syndicate.desc: A deck of space-grade playing cards. They seem unusually rigid.
obj.item.toy.cards.deck.syndicate.name: suspicious looking deck of cards

obj.item.toy.cards.deck.syndicate.hologr.desc: A deck of holographic playing cards.
obj.item.toy.cards.deck.syndicate.hologr.name: suspicious looking deck of cards

obj.item.toy.cards.deck.tarot.desc: A full 78 card game deck of tarot cards. Complete with 4 suites of 14 cards, and a full suite of trump cards.
obj.item.toy.cards.deck.tarot.name: tarot game deck

obj.item.toy.cards.deck.tarot.haunted.desc: A spooky looking tarot deck. You can sense a supernatural presence linked to the cards...
obj.item.toy.cards.deck.tarot.haunted.name: haunted tarot game deck

obj.item.toy.cards.deck.tarot.nanite.desc: A full 78 card game deck of tarot cards. Complete with 4 suites of 14 cards, and a full suite of trump cards.
