obj.item.toy.cards.deck.tarot.nanite.name: tarot deck

obj.item.toy.cards.deck.wizoff.desc: A Wiz-Off deck. Fight an arcane battle for the fate of the universe: Draw 5! Play 5! Best of 5! A rules card is attached.
obj.item.toy.cards.deck.wizoff.name: Wiz-Off deck

obj.item.toy.clockwork_watch.desc: A stylish steampunk watch made out of thousands of tiny cogwheels.
obj.item.toy.clockwork_watch.name: steampunk watch

obj.item.toy.crayon.desc: A colourful crayon. Looks tasty. Mmmm...
obj.item.toy.crayon.name: crayon

obj.item.toy.crayon.black.desc: A colourful crayon. Looks tasty. Mmmm...
obj.item.toy.crayon.black.name: black crayon

obj.item.toy.crayon.blue.desc: A colourful crayon. Looks tasty. Mmmm...
obj.item.toy.crayon.blue.name: blue crayon

obj.item.toy.crayon.green.desc: A colourful crayon. Looks tasty. Mmmm...
obj.item.toy.crayon.green.name: green crayon

obj.item.toy.crayon.orange.desc: A colourful crayon. Looks tasty. Mmmm...
obj.item.toy.crayon.orange.name: orange crayon

obj.item.toy.crayon.purple.desc: A colourful crayon. Looks tasty. Mmmm...
obj.item.toy.crayon.purple.name: purple crayon

obj.item.toy.crayon.rainbow.desc: A colourful crayon. Looks tasty. Mmmm...
obj.item.toy.crayon.rainbow.name: rainbow crayon

obj.item.toy.crayon.red.desc: A colourful crayon. Looks tasty. Mmmm...
obj.item.toy.crayon.red.name: red crayon

obj.item.toy.crayon.revenant.desc: If you're reading this, something went wrong. yell at coders.
obj.item.toy.crayon.revenant.name: bloodwriting

obj.item.toy.crayon.spraycan.desc: A colourful crayon. Looks tasty. Mmmm...
obj.item.toy.crayon.spraycan.name: spray can

obj.item.toy.crayon.spraycan.borg.desc: A metallic container containing shiny synthesised paint.
obj.item.toy.crayon.spraycan.borg.name: cyborg spraycan

obj.item.toy.crayon.spraycan.hellcan.desc: This spraycan doesn't seem to be filled with paint...
obj.item.toy.crayon.spraycan.hellcan.name: hellcan

obj.item.toy.crayon.spraycan.lubecan.desc: You can barely keep hold of this thing.
obj.item.toy.crayon.spraycan.lubecan.name: slippery spraycan

obj.item.toy.crayon.spraycan.mimecan.desc: Art is best seen, not heard.
obj.item.toy.crayon.spraycan.mimecan.name: silent spraycan

obj.item.toy.crayon.spraycan.roboticist.desc: Paint for restyling unattached robotic limbs. Sadly doesn't shine like chrome.
obj.item.toy.crayon.spraycan.roboticist.name: roboticist spraycan

obj.item.toy.crayon.yellow.desc: A colourful crayon. Looks tasty. Mmmm...
obj.item.toy.crayon.yellow.name: yellow crayon

obj.item.toy.darksabre.desc: This blade looks as dangerous as its owner.
obj.item.toy.darksabre.name: Kiara's sabre

obj.item.toy.dodgeball.desc: Used for playing the most violent and degrading of childhood games.
obj.item.toy.dodgeball.name: dodgeball

obj.item.toy.eightball.desc:
A black ball with a stenciled number eight in white on the side. It seems full of dark liquid.
The instructions state that you should ask your question aloud, and then shake.
obj.item.toy.eightball.name: magic eightball

obj.item.toy.eightball.broken.desc: A black ball with a stenciled number eight in white on the side. It is cracked and seems empty.
obj.item.toy.eightball.broken.name: broken magic eightball

obj.item.toy.eightball.haunted.desc:
A black ball with a stenciled number eight in white on the side. It seems full of dark liquid.
The instructions state that you should ask your question aloud, and then shake.
obj.item.toy.eightball.haunted.name: magic eightball

obj.item.toy.eldritch_book.desc: A toy book that closely resembles the Codex Cicatrix. Covered in fake polyester human flesh and has a huge googly eye attached to the cover. The runes are gibberish and cannot be used to summon demons... Hopefully?
obj.item.toy.eldritch_book.name: Codex Cicatrix

obj.item.toy.foam_runic_scepter.desc: A foam replica of the scepters Wizards us on Vendormancy Soccer.
obj.item.toy.foam_runic_scepter.name: foam scepter

obj.item.toy.foamblade.desc: It says "Sternside Changs #1 fan" on it.
obj.item.toy.foamblade.name: foam armblade

obj.item.toy.foamblade.nanite.desc: It says "Sternside Changs #1 fan" on it.
obj.item.toy.foamblade.nanite.name: armblade

obj.item.toy.foamfinger.desc: root for the home team! wait, does this station even have a sports team?
obj.item.toy.foamfinger.name: foam finger

obj.item.toy.gun.desc: Looks almost like the real thing! Ages 8 and up. Please recycle in an autolathe when you're out of caps.
obj.item.toy.gun.name: cap gun

obj.item.toy.intento.desc: Fundamentally useless for all intents and purposes.
obj.item.toy.intento.name: Intento

obj.item.toy.minimeteor.desc: Relive the excitement of a meteor shower! SweetMeat-eor Co. is not responsible for any injuries, headaches or hearing loss caused by Mini-Meteor.
obj.item.toy.minimeteor.name: Mini-Meteor

obj.item.toy.nuke.desc: A plastic model of a Nuclear Fission Explosive.
obj.item.toy.nuke.name: Nuclear Fission Explosive toy

obj.item.toy.nyamagotchi.desc: A small electronic 'pet' that requires care and attention. An ancient relic sure to evoke nostalgic feelings.
obj.item.toy.nyamagotchi.name: Nyamagotchi

obj.item.toy.plush.desc: This is the special coder plush, do not steal.
obj.item.toy.plush.name: plush

obj.item.toy.plush.Synth.desc: An adorable stuffed toy that resembles a very happy synth.
obj.item.toy.plush.Synth.name: Synth plushie

obj.item.toy.plush.abductor.desc: A plushie depicting an alien abductor. The tag on it is in an indecipherable language.
obj.item.toy.plush.abductor.name: abductor plushie

obj.item.toy.plush.abductor.agent.desc: A plushie depicting an alien abductor agent. The stun baton is attached to the hand of the plushie, and appears to be inert. I wouldn't stay alone with it.
obj.item.toy.plush.abductor.agent.name: abductor agent plushie

obj.item.toy.plush.aeri.desc: A highly controversial silicone 'plushie' modeled after its infamous namesake. Pulled from most storefronts after a spectacular public backlash, it now survives mainly through grey-market resellers. Rumor has it a few limited-run units shipped with a functional handheld railgun.
obj.item.toy.plush.aeri.name: Interdimensional Terrorist Plushie

obj.item.toy.plush.amber_shadekin_plush.desc: A plushie featuring the likeness of a certain self declared mad genius shadekin. It smells faintly of cinnamon.
obj.item.toy.plush.amber_shadekin_plush.name: Squishy Shadekin Plush

obj.item.toy.plush.androiddog.desc: A faded plushie toy of an android dog. Will not bite. \ A sticker says 'Push me!' on a little heart on the hand.
obj.item.toy.plush.androiddog.name: android dog plushie

obj.item.toy.plush.awakenedplushie.desc: An ancient plushie that has grown enlightened to the true nature of reality.
obj.item.toy.plush.awakenedplushie.name: awakened plushie

obj.item.toy.plush.beeplushie.desc: A cute toy that resembles an even cuter bee.
obj.item.toy.plush.beeplushie.name: bee plushie

obj.item.toy.plush.bellybird.desc: It has a tag on the back. 'You seen the opera, now get ready for the theatrical release with the new Bellybird plushie. House Feather's patented design allows this plushie to feel almost lifelike with its synthetic feathers and smoothed scales, glow in the dark eyes and a round tummy to rest your head on, not to mention it comes complete with Autumn the snake tail! Witness Autumn in action as this flexible tail is able to snap her jaws and hiss at any opponent with such realism. Order now for only two low payments of 19.95!'
obj.item.toy.plush.bellybird.name: bellybird plushie

obj.item.toy.plush.bigdeer.desc: An incredibly round deer plush. It appears to have had too many berries for snack time.
obj.item.toy.plush.bigdeer.name: big deer plushie

obj.item.toy.plush.bottomsynf.desc: The plush of a synth fox who enjoys being high in the chain of command. Or so it seems. It's wearing its favourite CentCom formal coat.
obj.item.toy.plush.bottomsynf.name: CentCom Synth Fox Plush

obj.item.toy.plush.bubbledragon.desc: This plush of a regal dragon seems to clean every surface it touches. When hugged, it squeaks and blows bubbles! An excellent companion for when TamaGoSlep
obj.item.toy.plush.bubbledragon.name: bubbledragon plushie

obj.item.toy.plush.bubbleplush.desc: The friendly red demon that gives good miners gifts.
obj.item.toy.plush.bubbleplush.name: Bubblegum plushie

obj.item.toy.plush.carpplushie.desc: An adorable stuffed toy that resembles a space carp.
obj.item.toy.plush.carpplushie.name: space carp plushie

obj.item.toy.plush.carpplushie.dehy_carp.desc: An adorable stuffed toy that resembles a space carp.
obj.item.toy.plush.carpplushie.dehy_carp.name: space carp plushie

obj.item.toy.plush.carpplushie.dehy_carp.desc: An adorable stuffed toy that resembles a space carp.
obj.item.toy.plush.carpplushie.dehy_carp.name: space carp plushie

obj.item.toy.plush.carpplushie.nullrod.desc: An adorable stuffed toy that resembles the god of all carp. The teeth look pretty sharp. Activate it to receive the blessing of Carp-Sie.
obj.item.toy.plush.carpplushie.nullrod.name: carp-sie plushie

obj.item.toy.plush.cat_annoying.desc: This plush reeks of Green apples, and HATES physical affection. You can feel it looking at you with a judgmental gaze..
obj.item.toy.plush.cat_annoying.name: Annoying Cat Plush

obj.item.toy.plush.cello_plush.desc: A large, silky-soft plushie of a merseed dragon. When you hug it, you can't get your arms around it no matter how hard you try.
obj.item.toy.plush.cello_plush.name: concerningly large merseed plush

obj.item.toy.plush.cescrewsplush.desc: An adorable blue Lizard plushie wearing a Chief Engineer's Uniform, Rocket Boots, and Meson Goggles. It has a strange, silicone pocket on its underside...
obj.item.toy.plush.cescrewsplush.name: Chief Screws Plush

obj.item.toy.plush.chaotic_toaster.desc: You arent sure if this plushie want a hug, or harvest your organs, or both.
obj.item.toy.plush.chaotic_toaster.name: Chaotic toaster

obj.item.toy.plush.donkpocket.desc: The stuffed companion of choice for the seasoned traitor.
obj.item.toy.plush.donkpocket.name: donk pocket plushie

obj.item.toy.plush.especiallystrange.desc: A small plushie based on the thousand tajaran volunteer, this one in particular seems to be a gun maintainer.
obj.item.toy.plush.especiallystrange.name: ironmoon tajaran plushie

obj.item.toy.plush.ethereal.desc: A plushie showing a succesful ethereal, manufactured in attempts to raise visibility of Sproutians and their culture, and 3% are going to charity! Its shoe-straps can be tugged on to activate the voicebox, playing real ethereal noises!
obj.item.toy.plush.ethereal.name: businessman ethereal plush

obj.item.toy.plush.expie.desc: A plushie of a canid of sorts. It yearns to be detonated on a landmine.
obj.item.toy.plush.expie.name: Experiment Plushie

obj.item.toy.plush.expie.milky.desc: A plushie of snowy-white, furred canid. Maybe it'll trade something with you?
obj.item.toy.plush.expie.milky.name: Milky Plushie

obj.item.toy.plush.fleshlight.screws.desc: An adorable blue Lizard plushie wearing a Chief Engineer's Uniform... her upturned skirt revealing a tight, pre-lubed pussy.
obj.item.toy.plush.fleshlight.screws.name: Chief Screws Plush

obj.item.toy.plush.foxy_plush.desc: A fox plush made to look like a certain prankster fox. Unsuprisingly it also smells like ocean breeze and a nice warm forge. \ Batteries not included for the plastic arm!
obj.item.toy.plush.foxy_plush.name: tiny prankster fox plush

obj.item.toy.plush.ghoul.desc: Even the marketable plushie of this thing is utterly terrifying. At least it's cuddly...
obj.item.toy.plush.ghoul.name: intern ghoul plushie

obj.item.toy.plush.goatplushie.desc: Despite its cuddly appearance and plush nature, it will beat you up all the same. Goats never change.
obj.item.toy.plush.goatplushie.name: strange goat plushie

obj.item.toy.plush.headcrab.desc: A small, parasitic alien from the borderworld of Xen, this one is fake.
obj.item.toy.plush.headcrab.name: headcrab plushie

obj.item.toy.plush.horse.desc: A squishy soft horse plushie. This one is bay with white socks.
obj.item.toy.plush.horse.name: horse plushie

obj.item.toy.plush.human.desc: This is a felt plush of a human. All craftsmanship is of the lowest quality. The human is crying. The human is screaming.
obj.item.toy.plush.human.name: human plushie

obj.item.toy.plush.internshiba.desc: An adorable shiba inu plushie of a well-known intern mutt.
obj.item.toy.plush.internshiba.name: Intern Shiba Plush

obj.item.toy.plush.largeredslime.desc: The plushie is squishy to touch and smells strongly of strawberry.
obj.item.toy.plush.largeredslime.name: large red slime plushie

obj.item.toy.plush.lazy_synth.desc: A soft plush of an extremely lazy synth. Might be found loafing in random places.
obj.item.toy.plush.lazy_synth.name: lazy synth plush

obj.item.toy.plush.lizard_plushie.desc: An adorable stuffed toy that resembles a lizardperson.
obj.item.toy.plush.lizard_plushie.name: lizard plushie

obj.item.toy.plush.lizard_plushie.green.desc: An adorable stuffed toy that resembles a green lizardperson. This one fills you with nostalgia and soul.
obj.item.toy.plush.lizard_plushie.green.name: lizard plushie

obj.item.toy.plush.lizard_plushie.greysc.desc: An adorable stuffed toy that resembles a lizardperson. This one has been custom made.
obj.item.toy.plush.lizard_plushie.greysc.name: lizard plushie

obj.item.toy.plush.lizard_plushie.space.desc: An adorable stuffed toy that resembles a very determined spacefaring lizardperson. To infinity and beyond, little guy.
obj.item.toy.plush.lizard_plushie.space.name: space lizard plushie

obj.item.toy.plush.lizard_plushie.space..desc: An adorable stuffed toy that resembles a very determined spacefaring green lizardperson. To infinity and beyond, little guy. This one fills you with nostalgia and soul.
obj.item.toy.plush.lizard_plushie.space..name: space lizard plushie

obj.item.toy.plush.mal0.desc: An adorable stuffed toy that resembles something you download on your pda.
obj.item.toy.plush.mal0.name: Mal0 plushie

obj.item.toy.plush.mold_kobold.desc: A cuddly kobold plushie. Produced by Nanotrasen in the soft likeness of a hemophage employee; 			focus groups thought this design played less into hemophage stereotypes as opposed to the previous iteration, 			Lord Grog the Vile Parasite. A tag on the left leg says 10% of proceeds go to blood banks!
obj.item.toy.plush.mold_kobold.name: hemophage awareness kobold

obj.item.toy.plush.monkey.desc: The tag reads: 'Oop eek! I'm a chimpanzee!', with 'Now in JUMBO SIZE!' on the flipside.
obj.item.toy.plush.monkey.name: monkey plushie

obj.item.toy.plush.moth.desc: A plushie depicting an adorable mothperson. It's a huggable bug!
obj.item.toy.plush.moth.name: moth plushie

obj.item.toy.plush.moth.lovers.desc: An adorable mothperson plushie. It's a lovely bug!
obj.item.toy.plush.moth.lovers.name: lovers moth plushie

obj.item.toy.plush.mothroach_plush.desc: A plushie featuring the likeness everyone's favorite genetic freak-turned station pet. Do not soak it in milk and throw it against a wall.
obj.item.toy.plush.mothroach_plush.name: mothroach plush

obj.item.toy.plush.myrthel_plush.desc: An action plush of a mothic engineer. Comes with family-friendly, self-igniting action! Not a viable source of heat, or fire.
obj.item.toy.plush.myrthel_plush.name: extra hot moth plush

obj.item.toy.plush.narplush.desc: A small stuffed doll of the elder goddess Nar'Sie. Who thought this was a good children's toy?
obj.item.toy.plush.narplush.name: Nar'Sie plushie

obj.item.toy.plush.nobl.desc: It seems to be a small canine, not necessarily latex like you would suspect for some reason, but extremely squishy.
obj.item.toy.plush.nobl.name: fluffy skog plushie

obj.item.toy.plush.nukeplushie.desc: A stuffed toy that resembles a syndicate nuclear operative. The tag claims operatives to be purely fictitious.
obj.item.toy.plush.nukeplushie.name: operative plushie

obj.item.toy.plush.pkplush.desc: A plushie depicting a peacekeeper cyborg. Only you can prevent human harm!
obj.item.toy.plush.pkplush.name: peacekeeper plushie

obj.item.toy.plush.plasmamanplushie.desc: A stuffed toy that resembles your purple coworkers. Mmm, yeah, in true plasmaman fashion, it's not cute at all despite the designer's best efforts.
obj.item.toy.plush.plasmamanplushie.name: plasmaman plushie

obj.item.toy.plush.plushling.desc: An adorable stuffed toy- wait, did it just move?
obj.item.toy.plush.plushling.name: peculiar plushie

obj.item.toy.plush.purplecat.desc: A small, fluffy purple cat with an even purpler collar and bell. It also has a translucent green tail that rubbery to the touch.
obj.item.toy.plush.purplecat.name: Purple cat plushie

obj.item.toy.plush.ratplush.desc: An adorable plushie of the clockwork justiciar himself with new and improved spring arm action.
obj.item.toy.plush.ratplush.name: Ratvar plushie

obj.item.toy.plush.rouny.desc: A plushie depicting a xenomorph runner, made to commemorate the centenary of the Battle of LV-426. Much cuddlier than the real thing.
obj.item.toy.plush.rouny.name: runner plushie

obj.item.toy.plush.secoff.desc: A soft toy representing a popular, young officer, representing the alliance between GalFed and NT. The bottom of his work boot says 'Andy'
obj.item.toy.plush.secoff.name: GalFed Secoff

obj.item.toy.plush.shark.desc: A plushie depicting a somewhat cartoonish shark. The tag calls it a 'hákarl', noting that it was made by an obscure furniture manufacturer in old Scandinavia.
obj.item.toy.plush.shark.name: shark plushie

obj.item.toy.plush.sinvox.desc: An evil looking toy. It's got a vox beak that splits into mandibles like a bug;		its tail looks like a copy of the xenomorph plushie stitched together poorly.		Property and copyright of VOXXXED Studios...
obj.item.toy.plush.sinvox.name: sinister vox plushie

obj.item.toy.plush.skyrat.desc: This is the special coder plush, do not steal.
obj.item.toy.plush.skyrat.name: plush

obj.item.toy.plush.skyrat.blue_cat.desc: A bright blue cat plush with neon pink hair, here to hand out kisses wherever kisses need be. Usually found near its home habitat, the tram.
obj.item.toy.plush.skyrat.blue_cat.name: blue cat plushie

obj.item.toy.plush.skyrat.blue_dog.desc: A devious looking husky that seems to be begging for headpats. It smells faintly of blueberries.
obj.item.toy.plush.skyrat.blue_dog.name: blue dog plushie

obj.item.toy.plush.skyrat.boom_bird.desc: This little bird plushie may look like a nerd, but you have the sneaking suspicion it might be valid! Why does your skin start to glow when you hug it?
obj.item.toy.plush.skyrat.boom_bird.name: boom bird plushie

obj.item.toy.plush.skyrat.borbplushie.desc: An adorable stuffed toy that resembles a round, fluffy looking bird. Not to be mistaken for his friend, the birb plushie.
obj.item.toy.plush.skyrat.borbplushie.name: borb plushie

obj.item.toy.plush.skyrat.breakdancing_b.desc: This little robotic bird plushie loves to give you a little dance in celebration of your achievements, no matter how mundane.
obj.item.toy.plush.skyrat.breakdancing_b.name: breakdancing bird plushie

obj.item.toy.plush.skyrat.cat.desc: A small cat plushie with black beady eyes.
obj.item.toy.plush.skyrat.cat.name: cat plushie

obj.item.toy.plush.skyrat.cat.tux.desc: A small cat plushie with black beady eyes.
obj.item.toy.plush.skyrat.cat.tux.name: tux cat plushie

obj.item.toy.plush.skyrat.cat.white.desc: A small cat plushie with black beady eyes.
obj.item.toy.plush.skyrat.cat.white.name: white cat plushie

obj.item.toy.plush.skyrat.chunko.desc: A soulless creature that haunts your dreams.
obj.item.toy.plush.skyrat.chunko.name: chunko fop

obj.item.toy.plush.skyrat.chunko.andrew.desc: An 'adorable', if big eyed rabbit girl(?). This one is green and orange. Produced by the Chunko Fop Company TM. Spits out various Bunnies of dubious existance.
obj.item.toy.plush.skyrat.chunko.andrew.name: chunko fop green and orange bunny

obj.item.toy.plush.skyrat.chunko.bonnie.desc: An 'adorable', if big eyed rabbit girl. This one is blue. Produced by the Chunko Fop Company TM. Spits out various Rabbit facts of dubious validity.
obj.item.toy.plush.skyrat.chunko.bonnie.name: chunko fop blue bunny

obj.item.toy.plush.skyrat.chunko.inessa.desc: An 'adorable', tired looking bear woman. This one produces fake smoke! Produced by the Chunko Fop Company TM. Spits out various Medical facts with a broken voicebox.
obj.item.toy.plush.skyrat.chunko.inessa.name: chunko fop medical bear

obj.item.toy.plush.skyrat.chunko.plushie.desc: An almost intimidating black lizard plush, this one's got a little beret to come with it! Best not to separate the two. Its eyes shine with suggestion, no maidens?
obj.item.toy.plush.skyrat.chunko.plushie.name: dark and brooding lizard plush

obj.item.toy.plush.skyrat.commanding_tes.desc: A very soft plush resembling a certain science-loving, command inclined Teshari. Just holding it makes you feel cared for.
obj.item.toy.plush.skyrat.commanding_tes.name: commanding teshari plushy

obj.item.toy.plush.skyrat.courier_synth.desc: This synth plushie looks about ready to deliver hugs and beeps straight to the heart! The tag seems to have an advertisement for a delivery company on it...
obj.item.toy.plush.skyrat.courier_synth.name: courier synth plushie

obj.item.toy.plush.skyrat.deer.desc: An adorable stuffed toy that resembles a deer.
obj.item.toy.plush.skyrat.deer.name: deer plushie

obj.item.toy.plush.skyrat.derg_plushie.desc: A cute green-and-yellow wingless dragon plushie! For what its worth, it does have a comically large tail. 		Comes with an additional paramedic cap.
obj.item.toy.plush.skyrat.derg_plushie.name: wingless dragon plush

obj.item.toy.plush.skyrat.duffmoth.desc: A plushie depicting a certain moth. He probably got turned into a marketable plushie.
obj.item.toy.plush.skyrat.duffmoth.name: suspicious moth plushie

obj.item.toy.plush.skyrat.edgy_bird.desc: An edgy plush of an edgy bird. You could swear it's teleporting to a different spot every time you look away...
obj.item.toy.plush.skyrat.edgy_bird.name: edgy birb plushie

obj.item.toy.plush.skyrat.engi_snek.desc: This plush looks like it knows the difference between pumps and pipes! The arm is detachable, so don't lose it!
obj.item.toy.plush.skyrat.engi_snek.name: engineering snek plushie

obj.item.toy.plush.skyrat.engihound.desc: An adorable stuffed toy of a engihound.
obj.item.toy.plush.skyrat.engihound.name: engi-hound plushie

obj.item.toy.plush.skyrat.fermis.desc: An affectionate stuffed toy that resembles a certain medcat, comes complete with battery operated wagging tail!! You get the impression she's cheering you on to find happiness and be kind to people.
obj.item.toy.plush.skyrat.fermis.name: medcat plushie

obj.item.toy.plush.skyrat.fermis.chen.desc: The official stuffed companion to the medcat plushie!! It resembles a certain securicat. You get the impression she's encouraging you to be brave and protect those you care for.
obj.item.toy.plush.skyrat.fermis.chen.name: securicat plushie

obj.item.toy.plush.skyrat.fox.desc: An adorable stuffed toy of a Fox.
obj.item.toy.plush.skyrat.fox.name: fox plushie

obj.item.toy.plush.skyrat.fox.kailyn.desc: A familiar looking vixen in a peacekeeper attire, perfect for everyone who intends on venturing in the dark alone! There's a little tag which tells you to not boop its nose.
obj.item.toy.plush.skyrat.fox.kailyn.name: teasable fox plushie

obj.item.toy.plush.skyrat.fox.mia.desc: A small stuffed silver fox with a collar tag that says “Eavy” and a tiny bell in its fluffy tail.
obj.item.toy.plush.skyrat.fox.mia.name: silver fox plushie

obj.item.toy.plush.skyrat.fox.plushie_je.desc: A familiar snow white Vulpkanin plushie. This one appears to be wearing a mask obscuring their face.
obj.item.toy.plush.skyrat.fox.plushie_je.name: masked roboticist plushie

obj.item.toy.plush.skyrat.glitch_synth.desc: A synthetic plush, the interface seems to glitch out every time you give it a hug or call it cute!
obj.item.toy.plush.skyrat.glitch_synth.name: glitching synthetic plushie

obj.item.toy.plush.skyrat.ian.desc: A plushie of an adorable corgi! Don't you just want to hug it and squeeze it and call it "Ian"?
obj.item.toy.plush.skyrat.ian.name: plush corgi

obj.item.toy.plush.skyrat.ian.lisa.desc: A plushie of an adorable corgi! Don't you just want to hug it and squeeze it and call it "Lisa"?
obj.item.toy.plush.skyrat.ian.lisa.name: plush girly corgi

obj.item.toy.plush.skyrat.ian.small.desc: A plushie of an adorable corgi! Don't you just want to hug it and squeeze it and call it "Ian"?
obj.item.toy.plush.skyrat.ian.small.name: small plush corgi

obj.item.toy.plush.skyrat.igneous_synth.desc: Not actually made of igneous rock, giving this plush a hug will let you feel like you're being squeezed by the jaws of life!
obj.item.toy.plush.skyrat.igneous_synth.name: igneous synth plushie

obj.item.toy.plush.skyrat.immovable_rod.desc: Realistic! But also squishy and certainly not as dangerous as its real counterpart.
obj.item.toy.plush.skyrat.immovable_rod.name: immovable rod

obj.item.toy.plush.skyrat.jecca.desc: For some reason, this plushie is rather shiny, with glistening, glittering scales, and its ruby colored eyes seem to be rather enticing and full of mischievous, lewd thoughts behind them.
obj.item.toy.plush.skyrat.jecca.name: sexy snoodle plushie

obj.item.toy.plush.skyrat.leaplush.desc: A cute and all too familiar deer.
obj.item.toy.plush.skyrat.leaplush.name: suspicious deer plushie

obj.item.toy.plush.skyrat.lizzyplush.desc: Brought to you by Nanotrasen Wellness Program is the Yoga Odd Lizzy! He smells vaguely of blueberries, and likely resembles a horrible lover.
obj.item.toy.plush.skyrat.lizzyplush.name: odd yoga lizzy plushie

obj.item.toy.plush.skyrat.mechanic_fox.desc: A fox with fabulous hair! It has a tendency to make synth plushies look good as new when placed next to them.
obj.item.toy.plush.skyrat.mechanic_fox.name: mechanist fox plushie

obj.item.toy.plush.skyrat.meddrake.desc: An adorable stuffed toy of a Medidrake.
obj.item.toy.plush.skyrat.meddrake.name: medi-drake plushie

obj.item.toy.plush.skyrat.medihound.desc: An adorable stuffed toy of a medihound.
obj.item.toy.plush.skyrat.medihound.name: medi-hound plushie

obj.item.toy.plush.skyrat.pintaplush.desc: A pint-sized cervine with a vacant look.
obj.item.toy.plush.skyrat.pintaplush.name: smaller deer plushie

obj.item.toy.plush.skyrat.plush_janiborg.desc: A miniature omnidroid toy straight from the Lockstep Enterprises Corporation marketing department in handsome janitorial purple. Now with real squirting action!
obj.item.toy.plush.skyrat.plush_janiborg.name: Friendly Janiborg Plush

obj.item.toy.plush.skyrat.plushie_azyre.desc: A need to cook only rivaled by a hunger for fox tail.
obj.item.toy.plush.skyrat.plushie_azyre.name: handsome chef plushie

obj.item.toy.plush.skyrat.plushie_chiara.desc: A large stuffed fox which radiates confidence and vigor from their emerald eyes.
obj.item.toy.plush.skyrat.plushie_chiara.name: commanding fox plush

obj.item.toy.plush.skyrat.plushie_dan.desc: A stuffed fox with an aura of endearment leaking from their soft exterior.
obj.item.toy.plush.skyrat.plushie_dan.name: comfy fox plush

obj.item.toy.plush.skyrat.plushie_elofy.desc: A white-haired wolfgirl in a stylish red security skirt. Despite her scary cybernetic arm, she is soft to hug and only wishes to be praised and comforted.
obj.item.toy.plush.skyrat.plushie_elofy.name: bumbling wolfgirl plushie

obj.item.toy.plush.skyrat.plushie_razura.desc: A determined scientist with a hint of mischief in her smile.
obj.item.toy.plush.skyrat.plushie_razura.name: science shark plushie

obj.item.toy.plush.skyrat.plushie_razura.desc: Despite her height, the plushie regards you with keen and frankly unamused eyes; the look on her face, and the elegance of her little tiny coat tell you that she knows something you don't.
obj.item.toy.plush.skyrat.plushie_razura.name: dwarf shark plushie

obj.item.toy.plush.skyrat.plushie_star.desc: The plushie of a celestial in the known universe.
obj.item.toy.plush.skyrat.plushie_star.name: star angel plush

obj.item.toy.plush.skyrat.plushie_syntax.desc: A floppy-eared rabbit in marketable plushie form. Complete with an internal self-inflating squeaker device!
obj.item.toy.plush.skyrat.plushie_syntax.name: lop bunny plushie

obj.item.toy.plush.skyrat.plushie_synthi.desc: This plush is perfect For adventures in space and in bed, a cuddly purple Synth, their scarf is extra soft!
obj.item.toy.plush.skyrat.plushie_synthi.name: adventurous synth plushie

obj.item.toy.plush.skyrat.riffplush.desc: A stuffed toy in the likeness of a peculiar demonic one. Likely turned into a plushie to sell such. They look quite alright about it.
obj.item.toy.plush.skyrat.riffplush.name: valid plushie

obj.item.toy.plush.skyrat.roselia.desc: A plush recreation of a pink sergal. The chest is extremely padded and the small plush clothes are barely holding themselves together.
obj.item.toy.plush.skyrat.roselia.name: obscene sergal plushie

obj.item.toy.plush.skyrat.rubi.desc: It reminds you of a very, very, very huggable bee.
obj.item.toy.plush.skyrat.rubi.name: huggable bee plushie

obj.item.toy.plush.skyrat.sarmieplush.desc: A stuffed toy who look like a familiar cosplayer, he looks sad.
obj.item.toy.plush.skyrat.sarmieplush.name: cosplayer plushie

obj.item.toy.plush.skyrat.scrubpuppy.desc: An adorable stuffed toy of a Scrubpuppy, the hard-working pup who keeps the station clean!
obj.item.toy.plush.skyrat.scrubpuppy.name: scrub-puppy plushie

obj.item.toy.plush.skyrat.seaduplush.desc: A plushie of a particular, bundled up IPC. Underneath the cloak, you can see a plush recreation of the captain's sabre.
obj.item.toy.plush.skyrat.seaduplush.name: sneed plushie

obj.item.toy.plush.skyrat.secdrake.desc: An adorable stuffed toy of a Secdrake.
obj.item.toy.plush.skyrat.secdrake.name: sec-drake plushie

obj.item.toy.plush.skyrat.sechound.desc: An adorable stuffed toy of a SecHound, the trusty Nanotrasen sponsored security borg!
obj.item.toy.plush.skyrat.sechound.name: sec-hound plushie

obj.item.toy.plush.skyrat.sharknet.desc: A heavy plushie of a rather large and hungry shark
obj.item.toy.plush.skyrat.sharknet.name: gluttonous shark plushie

obj.item.toy.plush.skyrat.skreking_vox.desc: A vox plushie that seems ready to pull a gun on you and demand your money! Rumor has it that if you poke it in a particular way, it will show you its skrektual technique.
obj.item.toy.plush.skyrat.skreking_vox.name: skreking vox plushie

obj.item.toy.plush.skyrat.snow_owl.desc: A very soft plush resembling a feathery and witch like owl who is known to frequent science and medical.
obj.item.toy.plush.skyrat.snow_owl.name: snowy owl plush

obj.item.toy.plush.skyrat.szaplush.desc: A plushie of a shy looking drider, colored in floortile gray.
obj.item.toy.plush.skyrat.szaplush.name: suspicious spider

obj.item.toy.plush.skyrat.tesh.desc: Winner of Be Made Into A Plushy by ClownCo!
obj.item.toy.plush.skyrat.tesh.name: Squish-Me-Tesh

obj.item.toy.plush.skyrat.tracy.desc: An astonishingly well-endowed catfox plushie... It seems content.
obj.item.toy.plush.skyrat.tracy.name: creature plushie

obj.item.toy.plush.skyrat.tribal_salaman.desc: A water-safe plushie that always seems to lose any clothes you try to put on it.
obj.item.toy.plush.skyrat.tribal_salaman.name: tribal salamander plushie

obj.item.toy.plush.skyrat.voodoo.desc: A not so small voodoo doll made out of cut and sewn potato bags. It almost looks cute.
obj.item.toy.plush.skyrat.voodoo.name: voodoo doll

obj.item.toy.plush.skyrat.xixi.desc: A plushie depicting a bright-red and oddly familiar looking harpy! The tag on the back lists distributor information and a tagline telling you how it'll add a little 'skree' to your daily grind.
obj.item.toy.plush.skyrat.xixi.name: familiar looking harpy plushie

obj.item.toy.plush.skyrat.zapp.desc: An authentic piece of primo Pwr Game merchandise! 			This cuddly companion is the perfect ornament to decorate your battlestation. 			He sits upright unassisted, and can hold your headset, webcam, or keep your Pwr Game safe and secure. 			This one is outfitted with a state-of-the-art skill reader; 			just squeeze him tight and Zapp will tell you if you're ready for the next big game!
obj.item.toy.plush.skyrat.zapp.name: Lil' Zapp

obj.item.toy.plush.slimeplushie.desc: An adorable stuffed toy that resembles a slime. It is practically just a hacky sack.
obj.item.toy.plush.slimeplushie.name: slime plushie

obj.item.toy.plush.snakeplushie.desc: An adorable stuffed toy that resembles a snake. Not to be mistaken for the real thing.
obj.item.toy.plush.snakeplushie.name: snake plushie

obj.item.toy.plush.squeaky_toy.desc: A plush made to order of a particular rodent. Smells like an awful lover. \ A small sticker says, TUG MY EARS!
obj.item.toy.plush.squeaky_toy.name: squeaky rat plushie

obj.item.toy.plush.sunny_plush.desc: A soft, weighted plushie of a moostoat. Very comfortable to hug and have lying on you. It smells of fresh milk.
obj.item.toy.plush.sunny_plush.name: weighty moostoat plushie

obj.item.toy.plush.suspicious_protogen.desc: A suspicious pink looking protogen plushie commonly seen roaming the station almost everywhere, 			perfect for cuddling when you feel upset at something.
obj.item.toy.plush.suspicious_protogen.name: Suspicious protogen plush

obj.item.toy.plush.tian_plush.desc:
A giant, weighted plushie of a goat-carp bureaucrat, who seems to be very hungry for paper(work). It's nearly impossible to get your arms all the way around her.

A tag on the back reads 'Comfort provided under official licence.'
obj.item.toy.plush.tian_plush.name: bureaucratic goat plush

obj.item.toy.plush.tiredtesh.desc: He looks very eepy. A tag on the back of the plushie reads, 'Happy birthday, big guy.'
obj.item.toy.plush.tiredtesh.name: tired tesh plushie

obj.item.toy.plush.tunafish.desc: Useful for more than just sashimi.
obj.item.toy.plush.tunafish.name: Piscene Paddle

obj.item.toy.plush.unicorn.desc: A squishy soft unicorn plushie. It has a magical aura.
obj.item.toy.plush.unicorn.name: unicorn plushie

obj.item.toy.plush.whiny_plushie.desc: An ancient plushie that demands constant companionship, after being forgotten for too long.
obj.item.toy.plush.whiny_plushie.name: whiny plushie

obj.item.toy.plush.xenoplush.desc: A cute rendition of the notorious xenomorph. Its stuffing is an acidic green colour.
obj.item.toy.plush.xenoplush.name: xenomorph plushie

obj.item.toy.plush.xenoplush.xenomaidplu.desc: A cute rendition of the notorious xenomorph, but in a maid costume. It's eager to help you clean the station.
obj.item.toy.plush.xenoplush.xenomaidplu.name: xenomorph maid plushie

obj.item.toy.plushie_shell.desc: A plushie. Its eyes seem to be staring right back at you. Something isn't quite right.
obj.item.toy.plushie_shell.name: Plushie Shell

obj.item.toy.reality_pierce.desc: Hah. You thought it was the real deal!
obj.item.toy.reality_pierce.name: Pierced reality

obj.item.toy.redbutton.desc: A big, plastic red button. Reads 'From HonkCo Pranks!' on the back.
obj.item.toy.redbutton.name: big red button

obj.item.toy.seashell.desc: May you always have a shell in your pocket and sand in your shoes. Whatever that's supposed to mean.
obj.item.toy.seashell.name: seashell

obj.item.toy.singlecard.desc: A playing card used to play card games like poker.
obj.item.toy.singlecard.name: card

obj.item.toy.singlecard.wizoff_ruleset.desc: A ruleset for the playing card game Wiz-Off.
obj.item.toy.singlecard.wizoff_ruleset.name: card

obj.item.toy.snowball.desc: A compact ball of snow. Good for throwing at people.
obj.item.toy.snowball.name: snowball

obj.item.toy.spinningtoy.dark_matter.desc:
"Surviving the encounter with the horrible thing, I realized immediately what I had to do: sell marketable toys of it. "
- Chief Engineer Tenshin Nakamura
obj.item.toy.spinningtoy.dark_matter.name: dark matter singularity

obj.item.toy.sprayoncan.desc: What is the number one problem facing our station today?
obj.item.toy.sprayoncan.name: spray-on insulation applicator

obj.item.toy.sword.desc: A cheap, plastic replica of an energy sword. Realistic sounds! Ages 8 and up.
obj.item.toy.sword.name: toy sword

obj.item.toy.talking.desc: A generic action figure modeled after nothing in particular.
obj.item.toy.talking.name: talking action figure

obj.item.toy.talking.ai.desc: A little toy model AI core with real law announcing action!
obj.item.toy.talking.ai.name: toy AI

obj.item.toy.talking.codex_gigas.desc: A tool to help you write fictional devils!
obj.item.toy.talking.codex_gigas.name: Toy Codex Gigas

obj.item.toy.talking.griffin.desc: An action figure modeled after 'The Griffin', criminal mastermind.
obj.item.toy.talking.griffin.name: griffin action figure

obj.item.toy.talking.owl.desc: An action figure modeled after 'The Owl', defender of justice.
obj.item.toy.talking.owl.name: owl action figure

obj.item.toy.tennis.desc: A classical tennis ball. It appears to have faint bite marks scattered all over its surface.
obj.item.toy.tennis.name: tennis ball

obj.item.toy.tennis.blue.desc: A blue tennis ball. It seems ever so slightly more robust than normal.
obj.item.toy.tennis.blue.name: blue tennis ball

obj.item.toy.tennis.cyan.desc: A cyan tennis ball. It seems to have odd electrical properties.
obj.item.toy.tennis.cyan.name: cyan tennis ball

obj.item.toy.tennis.green.desc: A green tennis ball. It seems to have an impermeable coating.
obj.item.toy.tennis.green.name: green tennis ball

obj.item.toy.tennis.purple.desc: A purple tennis ball. It seems to have an acid-resistant coating.
obj.item.toy.tennis.purple.name: purple tennis ball

obj.item.toy.tennis.rainbow.desc: A tennis ball from another plane of existance. Really groovy.
obj.item.toy.tennis.rainbow.name: pseudo-euclidean interdimensional tennis sphere

obj.item.toy.tennis.rainbow.izzy.desc: A tennis ball that's seen a good bit of love, being covered in a few black and white hairs and slobber.
obj.item.toy.tennis.rainbow.izzy.name: Katlin's ball

obj.item.toy.tennis.red.desc: A red tennis ball. It goes three times faster!
obj.item.toy.tennis.red.name: red tennis ball

obj.item.toy.tennis.yellow.desc: A yellow tennis ball. It seems to have a flame-retardant coating.
obj.item.toy.tennis.yellow.name: yellow tennis ball

obj.item.toy.toy_dagger.desc: A cheap plastic replica of a dagger. Produced by THE ARM Toys, Inc.
obj.item.toy.toy_dagger.name: toy dagger

obj.item.toy.toy_xeno.desc: MEGA presents the new Xenos Isolated action figure! Comes complete with realistic sounds! Pull back string to use.
obj.item.toy.toy_xeno.name: xenomorph action figure

obj.item.toy.waterballoon.desc: A translucent balloon. There's nothing in it.
obj.item.toy.waterballoon.name: water balloon

obj.item.toy.windup_toolbox.desc: A replica toolbox that rumbles when you turn the key.
obj.item.toy.windup_toolbox.name: windup toolbox

obj.item.toy.xmas_cracker.desc: Directions for use: Requires two people, one to pull each end.
obj.item.toy.xmas_cracker.name: xmas cracker

obj.item.trade_chip.desc: Uses the station's cargo network to contact a black market supplier, allowing the purchase of a new crate type at cargo console.
obj.item.trade_chip.name: trade contract chip

obj.item.training_toolbox.desc: AURUMILL-Brand Baby's First Training Toolbox. A digital display on the back keeps track of hits made by the user. Second toolbox sold separately!
obj.item.training_toolbox.name: Training Toolbox

obj.item.traitor_spraycan.desc: This spraycan deploys a subversive pattern containing subliminal priming agents over a 3x3 area. Contains enough primer for just one final coating.
obj.item.traitor_spraycan.name: seditious spraycan

obj.item.transfer_valve.desc: Regulates the transfer of air between two tanks.
obj.item.transfer_valve.name: tank transfer valve

obj.item.trapdoor_kit.desc: A kit containing all the parts needed to build a trapdoor. Can only be used on open space.
obj.item.trapdoor_kit.name: trapdoor parts kit

obj.item.trapdoor_remote.desc: A small machine that interfaces with a trapdoor controller for easy use.
obj.item.trapdoor_remote.name: trapdoor remote

obj.item.trapdoor_remote.preloaded.desc: A small machine that interfaces with a trapdoor controller for easy use.
obj.item.trapdoor_remote.preloaded.name: trapdoor remote

obj.item.trash.bee.desc: No wonder the bees are dying out, you monster.
obj.item.trash.bee.name: bee

obj.item.trash.blins.desc: Empty torn wrapper that used to hold something ridiculously sweet. It's probably best to recycle it.
obj.item.trash.blins.name: empty crepes wrapper

obj.item.trash.empty_food_tray.desc: The condensation and what you can only hope are the leftovers of food make this a bit hard to reuse.
obj.item.trash.empty_food_tray.name: empty plastic food tray

obj.item.trash.empty_side_pack.desc: Unfortunately, this no longer holds any sides to distract you from the other 'food'.
obj.item.trash.empty_side_pack.name: empty side wrapper

obj.item.trash.empty_side_pack.moth.desc: Unfortunately, this no longer holds any sides to distract you from the other 'food'.
obj.item.trash.empty_side_pack.moth.name: empty side wrapper

obj.item.trash.empty_side_pack.nt.desc: Unfortunately, this no longer holds any sides to distract you from the other 'food'.
obj.item.trash.empty_side_pack.nt.name: empty side wrapper

obj.item.trash.empty_side_pack.tizira.desc: Unfortunately, this no longer holds any sides to distract you from the other 'food'.
obj.item.trash.empty_side_pack.tizira.name: empty side wrapper

obj.item.trash.empty_side_pack.yangyu.desc: Unfortunately, this no longer holds any sides to distract you from the other 'food'.
obj.item.trash.empty_side_pack.yangyu.name: empty side wrapper

obj.item.trash.fleet_ration.desc: In the Mothic Fleet every individual wrapper is carefully recycled and repurposed into fresh material. Over here they are more commonly dropped directly onto the floor.
obj.item.trash.fleet_ration.name: surplus fleet wrapper

obj.item.trash.nachos.desc: Covered in sauce smearings and smaller pieces of the dish on the inside, a plastic food tray with not much use anymore. It's probably best to dispose of it or recycle it.
obj.item.trash.nachos.name: empty nachos tray

obj.item.trash.pljeskavica.desc: Covered in sauce smearings and smaller pieces of the dish on the inside, crumpled into a ball. It's probably best to dispose of it.
obj.item.trash.pljeskavica.name: pljeskavica wrapping paper

obj.item.trash.popcorn.caramel.desc: Now it's not a sweet snack, but just a sticky bag...
obj.item.trash.popcorn.caramel.name: empty caramel popcorn

obj.item.trash.popcorn.salty.desc: It looks like there are only a few grains of salt left at the bottom of the bag...
obj.item.trash.popcorn.salty.name: empty salty popcorn

obj.item.trash.vendor_trash.desc: The leftovers of what was likely a great snack in a past time.
obj.item.trash.vendor_trash.name: God's Weakest Snacks

obj.item.trash.vendor_trash.lizard_bag.desc: All that money importing tiziran snacks just to end at this?
obj.item.trash.vendor_trash.lizard_bag.name: empty tiziran snack bag

obj.item.trash.vendor_trash.lizard_box.desc: Tizira, contributing to the space plastic crisis since 2530.
obj.item.trash.vendor_trash.lizard_box.name: empty tiziran snack box

obj.item.trash.vendor_trash.mochi_ice_cr.desc: Somehow, that tiny plastic skewer it came with has gone missing.
obj.item.trash.vendor_trash.mochi_ice_cr.name: empty mochi ice cream tray

obj.item.trash.vendor_trash.moth_bag.desc: The clear plastic reveals that this no longer holds tasty treats for your winged friends.
obj.item.trash.vendor_trash.moth_bag.name: empty mothic snack bag

obj.item.trash.vendor_trash.rice_cracker.desc: You never did find out what flavor that was supposed to be, did you?
obj.item.trash.vendor_trash.rice_cracker.name: empty rice crackers bag

obj.item.trench_tool.desc: The multi-purpose tool you always needed.
obj.item.trench_tool.name: entrenching tool

obj.item.trim_token.desc: Base for other trim tokens, if you somehow find this, yell at your local coders.
obj.item.trim_token.name: generic trim token

obj.item.ttsdevice.desc: A small device with a keyboard attached. Anything entered on the keyboard is played out the speaker. Ctrl-click the device to make it beep. Ctrl-shift-click to name the device.
obj.item.ttsdevice.name: TTS device

obj.item.tumor_shard.desc: A strange, sharp, crystal shard from an odd tumor on Lavaland.  Stabbing the corpse of a lavaland elite with this will revive them, assuming their soul still lingers.  Revived lavaland elites only have half their max health, but are completely loyal to their reviver.
obj.item.tumor_shard.name: tumor shard

obj.item.turbine_parts.desc: you really should call an admin
obj.item.turbine_parts.name: turbine parts

obj.item.turbine_parts.compressor.desc: Install in a turbine engine compressor to increase its performance
obj.item.turbine_parts.compressor.name: compressor part

obj.item.turbine_parts.rotor.desc: Install in a turbine engine rotor to increase its performance
obj.item.turbine_parts.rotor.name: rotor part

obj.item.turbine_parts.stator.desc: Install in a turbine engine turbine to increase its performance
obj.item.turbine_parts.stator.name: stator part

obj.item.turret_assembly.desc: A set of assembly parts for a magazine-fed turret, requiring a receiver, servo and sensor along with construction. This one seems to be for a basic outpost defense turret.
obj.item.turret_assembly.name: turret plate assembly

obj.item.turret_assembly.cerberus.desc: A set of assembly parts for a magazine-fed turret, requiring a receiver, servo and sensor along with construction. This one is for a "Cerberus" model turret type.
obj.item.turret_assembly.cerberus.name: cerberus plate assembly

obj.item.turret_assembly.duster.desc: A set of assembly parts for a magazine-fed turret, requiring a receiver, servo and sensor along with construction. This one is for a "Duster" model of the "Emergent" turret type.
obj.item.turret_assembly.duster.name: duster plate assembly

obj.item.turret_assembly.hoplite.desc: A set of assembly parts for a magazine-fed turret, requiring a receiver, servo and sensor along with construction. This one is for a "Hoplite" model turret type.
obj.item.turret_assembly.hoplite.name: hoplite plate assembly

obj.item.turret_assembly.twin_fang.desc: A set of assembly parts for a magazine-fed turret, requiring a receiver, servo and sensor along with construction. This one is for a "Twin-Fang" model of the "Spider" turret type.
obj.item.turret_assembly.twin_fang.name: twin_fang plate assembly

obj.item.uber_teleporter.desc: It glows harshly, the power of a portal wielding monster lays within.
obj.item.uber_teleporter.name: Nihilanth's Divinity

obj.item.umbrella.parasol.desc: A black laced parsol, how intricate.
obj.item.umbrella.parasol.name: parasol

obj.item.undertile_circuit.desc: A panel for an integrated circuit. It needs to be fit under a floor tile to operate.
obj.item.undertile_circuit.name: circuit panel

obj.item.universal_scanner.desc: A device used to check objects against Nanotrasen exports database, assign price tags, or ready an item for a custom vending machine.
obj.item.universal_scanner.name: universal scanner

obj.item.upgradescroll.desc: Somehow, this piece of paper can be applied to items to make them "better". Apparently there's a risk of losing the item if it's already "too good". This all feels so arbitrary...
obj.item.upgradescroll.name: item fortification scroll

obj.item.upgradescroll.unlimited.desc: Somehow, this piece of paper can be applied to items to make them "better". This scroll is made from the tongues of dead paper wizards, and can be used an unlimited number of times, with no drawbacks.
obj.item.upgradescroll.unlimited.name: unlimited foolproof item fortification scroll

obj.item.uplink.desc: A basic handheld radio that communicates with local telecommunication networks.
obj.item.uplink.name: station bounced radio

obj.item.uplink.clownop.desc: A basic handheld radio that communicates with local telecommunication networks.
obj.item.uplink.clownop.name: station bounced radio

obj.item.uplink.debug.desc: A basic handheld radio that communicates with local telecommunication networks.
obj.item.uplink.debug.name: debug uplink

obj.item.uplink.loneop.desc: A basic handheld radio that communicates with local telecommunication networks.
obj.item.uplink.loneop.name: station bounced radio

obj.item.uplink.nuclear.desc: A basic handheld radio that communicates with local telecommunication networks.
obj.item.uplink.nuclear.name: station bounced radio

obj.item.uplink.nuclear.debug.desc: A basic handheld radio that communicates with local telecommunication networks.
obj.item.uplink.nuclear.debug.name: debug nuclear uplink

obj.item.uplink.nuclear_restricted.desc: A basic handheld radio that communicates with local telecommunication networks.
obj.item.uplink.nuclear_restricted.name: station bounced radio

obj.item.uplink.old_radio.desc: A dusty and old looking radio.
obj.item.uplink.old_radio.name: old radio

obj.item.uplink.standard.desc: A basic handheld radio that communicates with local telecommunication networks.
obj.item.uplink.standard.name: station bounced radio

obj.item.usb_cable.desc: A cable that can connect integrated circuits to anything with a USB port, such as computers and machines.
obj.item.usb_cable.name: usb cable

obj.item.v8_engine.desc: An extremely well-preserved, massive V8 engine from the early 2000s. It seems to be missing the rest of the vehicle. There's a tiny label on the side.
obj.item.v8_engine.name: ancient engine

obj.item.vape.desc: A classy and highly sophisticated electronic cigarette, for classy and dignified gentlemen. A warning label reads "Warning: Do not fill with flammable materials."
obj.item.vape.name: E-Cigarette

obj.item.vape.black.desc: A classy and highly sophisticated electronic cigarette, for classy and dignified gentlemen. A warning label reads "Warning: Do not fill with flammable materials."

obj.item.vape.yellow.desc: A classy and highly sophisticated electronic cigarette, for classy and dignified gentlemen. A warning label reads "Warning: Do not fill with flammable materials."
obj.item.vape.yellow.name: E-Cigarette

obj.item.veilrender.desc: A wicked curved blade of alien origin, recovered from the ruins of a vast city.
obj.item.veilrender.name: veil render

obj.item.veilrender.honkrender.desc: A wicked curved blade of alien origin, recovered from the ruins of a vast circus.
obj.item.veilrender.honkrender.name: honk render

obj.item.veilrender.honkrender.honkhulkr.desc: A wicked curved blade of alien origin, recovered from the ruins of a vast circus. This one gleams with a special light.
obj.item.veilrender.honkrender.honkhulkr.name: superior honk render

obj.item.veilrender.vealrender.desc: A wicked curved blade of alien origin, recovered from the ruins of a vast farm.
obj.item.veilrender.vealrender.name: veal render

obj.item.virgin_mary.desc: A small, cheap icon depicting the virgin mother.
obj.item.virgin_mary.name: a picture of the virgin mary

obj.item.void_eater.desc: A deformed appendage, capable of shattering any glass and any flesh.
obj.item.void_eater.name: void eater

obj.item.wallframe.apc.desc: Used for repairing or building APCs.
obj.item.wallframe.apc.name: APC frame

obj.item.wallframe.barsign.desc: Used to help draw the rabble into your bar. Some assembly required.
obj.item.wallframe.barsign.name: bar sign frame

obj.item.wallframe.barsign.all_access.desc: Used to help draw the rabble into your bar. Some assembly required. This one doesn't have an access lock.
obj.item.wallframe.barsign.all_access.name: bar sign frame

obj.item.wallframe.camera.desc: The basic construction for Nanotrasen-Always-Watching-You cameras.
obj.item.wallframe.camera.name: camera assembly

obj.item.wallframe.cell_charger_multi.desc: The innovative technology of a cell charging rack, but able to be mounted neatly on a wall out of the way!
obj.item.wallframe.cell_charger_multi.name: unmounted wall multi-cell charging rack

obj.item.wallframe.circuit.desc: A box that can be mounted on a wall and have circuits installed.
obj.item.wallframe.circuit.name: circuit box frame

obj.item.wallframe.clocktrap.lever.desc: A small switch attatched to the wall.
obj.item.wallframe.clocktrap.lever.name: switch

obj.item.wallframe.closet.desc: It's a wall mounted storage unit for... well, whatever you put in this one. Apply to wall to use.
obj.item.wallframe.closet.name: wall mounted closet

obj.item.wallframe.defib_mount.desc: A frame for a defibrillator mount. Once placed, it can be removed with a wrench.
obj.item.wallframe.defib_mount.name: unhooked defibrillator mount

obj.item.wallframe.defib_mount.charging.desc: A frame for a PENLITE defibrillator mount. Unlike the normal mount, it can passively recharge the unit inside.
obj.item.wallframe.defib_mount.charging.name: unhooked PENLITE defibrillator mount

obj.item.wallframe.detectiveboard.desc: A board for linking evidence to crimes.
obj.item.wallframe.detectiveboard.name: detective notice board

obj.item.wallframe.digital_clock.desc: Used to build digital clocks, just secure to the wall.
obj.item.wallframe.digital_clock.name: digital clock frame

obj.item.wallframe.emcloset.desc: It's a wall mounted storage unit for emergency breath masks and O2 tanks. Apply to wall to use.
obj.item.wallframe.emcloset.name: wall mounted emergency closet

obj.item.wallframe.extinguisher_cabinet.desc: Used for building wall-mounted extinguisher cabinets.
obj.item.wallframe.extinguisher_cabinet.name: extinguisher cabinet frame

obj.item.wallframe.fireaxecabinet.desc: Home to a window's greatest nightmare. Apply to wall to use.
obj.item.wallframe.fireaxecabinet.name: fire axe cabinet

obj.item.wallframe.fireaxecabinet.jawsof.desc: Home to the paramedic's jaws of recovery. Apply to wall to use.
obj.item.wallframe.fireaxecabinet.jawsof.name: jaws of recovery tool cabinet

obj.item.wallframe.fireaxecabinet.mechre.desc: Home to a very special crowbar. Apply to wall to use.
obj.item.wallframe.fireaxecabinet.mechre.name: mech removal tool cabinet

obj.item.wallframe.firecloset.desc: It's a wall mounted storage unit for fire-fighting supplies. Apply to wall to use.
obj.item.wallframe.firecloset.name: wall mounted fire-safety closet

obj.item.wallframe.fish.desc: The frame of a mount for trophy fish, to show off your proudest catch.
obj.item.wallframe.fish.name: fish mount

obj.item.wallframe.frontier_medstation.desc: The innovative technology of a biogenerator to print medical supplies, but able to be mounted neatly on a wall out of the way.
obj.item.wallframe.frontier_medstation.name: unmounted wall med-station

obj.item.wallframe.health_station.desc: An unmounted health station. Attach it to a wall to use.
obj.item.wallframe.health_station.name: detached N-URSEI Suite

obj.item.wallframe.indicator_display.desc: Used to build tram indicator displays, just secure to the wall.
obj.item.wallframe.indicator_display.name: indicator display frame

obj.item.wallframe.intercom.desc: A ready-to-go intercom. Just slap it on a wall and screw it in!
obj.item.wallframe.intercom.name: intercom frame

obj.item.wallframe.lewd_portal.desc: A device utilizing bluespace technology to transpose portions of people from one space to another.
obj.item.wallframe.lewd_portal.name: Lustwish Portal Bore

obj.item.wallframe.light_switch.desc: An unmounted light switch. Attach it to a wall to use.
obj.item.wallframe.light_switch.name: light switch

obj.item.wallframe.mirror.desc: An unmounted mirror. Attach it to a wall to use.
obj.item.wallframe.mirror.name: mirror

obj.item.wallframe.newscaster.desc: Used to build newscasters, just secure to the wall.
obj.item.wallframe.newscaster.name: newscaster frame

obj.item.wallframe.noticeboard.desc: Right now it's more of a clipboard. Attach to a wall to use.
obj.item.wallframe.noticeboard.name: notice board

obj.item.wallframe.painting.desc: The perfect showcase for your favorite deathtrap memories.
obj.item.wallframe.painting.name: painting frame

obj.item.wallframe.painting.eldritch.desc: An impossible painting made of impossible paint. It should not exist in this reality.
obj.item.wallframe.painting.eldritch.name: The Blank Canvas: A Study in Default Subtypes

obj.item.wallframe.painting.eldritch.bea.desc: A painting of an otherworldly being. Its thin, porcelain-coloured skin is stretched tight over its strange bone structure. It has an odd beauty.
obj.item.wallframe.painting.eldritch.bea.name: Lady of the Gate

obj.item.wallframe.painting.eldritch.des.desc: A painting of an elaborate feast. Despite being made entirely of rotting meat and decaying organs, the food looks very appetising.
obj.item.wallframe.painting.eldritch.des.name: The Feast of Desire

obj.item.wallframe.painting.eldritch.rus.desc: A painting of a strange being climbing a rust-coloured mountain. The brushwork is unnatural and unnerving.
obj.item.wallframe.painting.eldritch.rus.name: Master of the Rusted Mountain

obj.item.wallframe.painting.eldritch.vin.desc: A painting depicting a massive thicket. This painting teems with life, and seems to strain against its frame.
obj.item.wallframe.painting.eldritch.vin.name: Great Chaparral Over Rolling Hills

obj.item.wallframe.painting.eldritch.wee.desc: A beautiful painting depicting a fair lady sitting beside Him. He weeps. You will see him again.
obj.item.wallframe.painting.eldritch.wee.name: The Sister and He Who Wept

obj.item.wallframe.painting.large.desc: The perfect showcase for your favorite deathtrap memories. Make sure you have enough space to mount this one to the wall.
obj.item.wallframe.painting.large.name: large painting frame

obj.item.wallframe.picture.desc: The perfect showcase for your favorite deathtrap memories.
obj.item.wallframe.picture.name: picture frame

obj.item.wallframe.requests_console.desc: An unmounted requests console. Attach it to a wall to use.
obj.item.wallframe.requests_console.name: requests console

obj.item.wallframe.secure_safe.desc: A locked safe. It being unpowered prevents any access until placed back onto a wall.
obj.item.wallframe.secure_safe.name: secure safe frame

obj.item.wallframe.sinkframe.desc: A sink frame, that needs a water recycler to finish construction.
obj.item.wallframe.sinkframe.name: sink frame

obj.item.wallframe.sparker.desc: An unmounted sparker. Attach it to a wall to use.
obj.item.wallframe.sparker.name: Sparker WallFrame

obj.item.wallframe.status_display.desc: Used to build status displays, just secure to the wall.
obj.item.wallframe.status_display.name: status display frame

obj.item.wallframe.status_display.vitals.desc: Used to build vitals displays. Secure on a wall nearby a stasis bed, operating table, 		or another machine that can hold patients such as cryo cells or sleepers.
obj.item.wallframe.status_display.vitals.name: vitals display frame

obj.item.wallframe.status_display.vitals.desc: Used to build advanced vitals displays. Performs a more detailed scan of the patient than the basic display.
obj.item.wallframe.status_display.vitals.name: advanced vitals display frame

obj.item.wallframe.telescreen.test_chamb.name: xenobiology test chamber camera telescreen frame
