obj.item.wallframe.ticket_machine.desc: An unmounted ticket machine. Attach it to a wall to use.
obj.item.wallframe.ticket_machine.name: ticket machine frame

obj.item.wallframe.torch.desc: A simple torch ready to be mounted to the wall, for lighting and such. Apply to wall to use.
obj.item.wallframe.torch.name: wall mounted torch

obj.item.wallframe.tram.desc: A box that contains the equipment to control a tram. Just secure to the tram wall.
obj.item.wallframe.tram.name: tram controller cabinet

obj.item.wallframe.turret_control.desc: Used for building turret control panels.
obj.item.wallframe.turret_control.name: turret control frame

obj.item.wallframe.urinal.desc: An unmounted urinal. Attach it to a wall to use.
obj.item.wallframe.urinal.name: urinal frame

obj.item.wallframe.wall_heater.desc: A compact heating and cooling device for small scale applications, made to mount onto walls up and out of the way. 		Like other, more free-standing space heaters however, these still require cell power to function.
obj.item.wallframe.wall_heater.name: unmounted wall heater

obj.item.wargame_projector.desc: A handy-dandy holographic projector developed by Nanotrasen Naval Command for playing wargames with, this one seems broken.
obj.item.wargame_projector.name: holographic projector

obj.item.wargame_projector.ships.desc: A handy-dandy holographic projector developed by Nanotrasen Naval Command for playing wargames with, this one creates markers for 'units'.
obj.item.wargame_projector.ships.name: holographic unit projector

obj.item.wargame_projector.ships.red.desc: A handy-dandy holographic projector developed by Nanotrasen Naval Command for playing wargames with, this one creates markers for 'units'.
obj.item.wargame_projector.ships.red.name: holographic unit projector

obj.item.wargame_projector.terrain.desc: A handy-dandy holographic projector developed by Nanotrasen Naval Command for playing wargames with, this one creates markers for space 'terrain'.
obj.item.wargame_projector.terrain.name: holographic terrain projector

obj.item.warp_whistle.desc: Calls a cloud to come pick you up and drop you at a random location on the station.
obj.item.warp_whistle.name: warp whistle

obj.item.watcher_hatchling.desc: A newly born watcher, apparently free of the Necropolis' corruption. Perhaps one of the last.
obj.item.watcher_hatchling.name: watcher hatchling

obj.item.watertank.desc: A S.U.N.S.H.I.N.E. brand water tank backpack with a nozzle to water plants.
obj.item.watertank.name: backpack water tank

obj.item.watertank.atmos.desc: A refrigerated and pressurized backpack tank with extinguisher nozzle, intended to fight fires. Swaps between extinguisher, resin launcher and a smaller scale resin foamer.
obj.item.watertank.atmos.name: backpack firefighter tank

obj.item.watertank.janitor.desc: A janitorial cleaner backpack with nozzle to clean blood and graffiti.
obj.item.watertank.janitor.name: backpack cleaner tank

obj.item.watertank.pepperspray.desc: The ultimate crowd-control device; this tool allows the user to quickly and efficiently pacify groups of hostile targets.
obj.item.watertank.pepperspray.name: ANTI-TIDER-2500 suppression backpack

obj.item.weaponcell.desc: used to add ammo types to guns
obj.item.weaponcell.name: default weaponcell

obj.item.weaponcell.medical.desc: The standard oxygen cell, most guns come with this already installed.
obj.item.weaponcell.medical.name: default medicell

obj.item.weaponcell.medical.brute.desc: A small cell with a slight red glow. Can be used on mediguns to enable basic brute damage healing functionality.
obj.item.weaponcell.medical.brute.name: brute I medicell

obj.item.weaponcell.medical.brute.tier_2.desc: A small cell with a noticeable red glow. Can be used on mediguns to enable improved brute damage healing functionality.
obj.item.weaponcell.medical.brute.tier_2.name: brute II medicell

obj.item.weaponcell.medical.brute.tier_3.desc: A small cell with an intense red glow and a reinforced casing. Can be used on mediguns to enable advanced brute damage healing functionality.
obj.item.weaponcell.medical.brute.tier_3.name: brute III medicell

obj.item.weaponcell.medical.burn.desc: A small cell with a slight yellow glow. Can be used on mediguns to enable basic burn damage healing functionality.
obj.item.weaponcell.medical.burn.name: burn I medicell

obj.item.weaponcell.medical.burn.tier_2.desc: A small cell with a noticeable yellow glow. Can be used on mediguns to enable improved burn damage healing functionality.
obj.item.weaponcell.medical.burn.tier_2.name: burn II medicell

obj.item.weaponcell.medical.burn.tier_3.desc: A small cell with an intense yellow glow and a reinforced casing. Can be used on mediguns to enable advanced burn damage healing functionality.
obj.item.weaponcell.medical.burn.tier_3.name: burn III medicell

obj.item.weaponcell.medical.oxygen.desc: A small cell with a slight blue glow. Can be used on mediguns to enable basic oxygen deprivation healing functionality.
obj.item.weaponcell.medical.oxygen.name: oxygen I medicell

obj.item.weaponcell.medical.oxygen.tier_.desc: A small cell with a notable blue glow. Can be used on mediguns to enable improved oxygen deprivation healing functionality.
obj.item.weaponcell.medical.oxygen.tier_.name: oxygen II medicell

obj.item.weaponcell.medical.oxygen.tier_.desc: A small cell with an intense blue glow and a reinforced casing. Can be used on mediguns to enable advanced oxygen deprivation healing functionality.
obj.item.weaponcell.medical.oxygen.tier_.name: oxygen III medicell

obj.item.weaponcell.medical.toxin.desc: A small cell with a slight green glow. Can be used on mediguns to enable basic toxin damage healing functionality.
obj.item.weaponcell.medical.toxin.name: toxin I medicell

obj.item.weaponcell.medical.toxin.tier_2.desc: A small cell with a noticeable green glow. Can be used on mediguns to enable improved toxin damage healing functionality.
obj.item.weaponcell.medical.toxin.tier_2.name: toxin II medicell

obj.item.weaponcell.medical.toxin.tier_3.desc: A small cell with an intense green glow and a reinforced casing. Can be used on mediguns to enable advanced toxin damage healing functionality.
obj.item.weaponcell.medical.toxin.tier_3.name: toxin III medicell

obj.item.weaponcell.medical.utility.desc: You really shouldn't be seeing this. If you do, please yell at your local coders.
obj.item.weaponcell.medical.utility.name: utility class medicell

obj.item.weaponcell.medical.utility.bed.desc: A medicell that summons a temporary roller bed under a patient already lying on the floor.
obj.item.weaponcell.medical.utility.bed.name: hardlight roller bed medicell

obj.item.weaponcell.medical.utility.body.desc: A medicell that allows the user to transport a dead body to themselves.
obj.item.weaponcell.medical.utility.body.name: body transporter medicell

obj.item.weaponcell.medical.utility.clot.desc: A medicell designed to help deal with bleeding patients.
obj.item.weaponcell.medical.utility.clot.name: clotting medicell

obj.item.weaponcell.medical.utility.hard.desc: A medicell that creates a hardlight hospital gown on the target.
obj.item.weaponcell.medical.utility.hard.name: hardlight gown medicell

obj.item.weaponcell.medical.utility.relo.desc: A medicell that safely relocates personnel after a given grace period, if used by someone with the appropriate access and within an appropriately designated area (usually Medbay).
obj.item.weaponcell.medical.utility.relo.name: oppressive force relocation medicell

obj.item.weaponcell.medical.utility.relo.desc: An upgraded version of the Relocation Medicell. It has the access and area requirements removed, along with having the standard grace period disabled.
obj.item.weaponcell.medical.utility.relo.name: upgraded oppressive force relocation medicell

obj.item.weaponcell.medical.utility.salv.desc: A medicell that applies a healing globule of synthetic plant matter to a patient.
obj.item.weaponcell.medical.utility.salv.name: hardlight salve medicell

obj.item.weaponcell.medical.utility.temp.desc: A medicell that adjusts a patient's temperature to the sweet spot between "blood frozen in veins" and "blood flash-boiling in veins".
obj.item.weaponcell.medical.utility.temp.name: temperature readjustment medicell

obj.item.weaponcrafting.giant_wrench.desc: Illegal parts to make a giant like wrench commonly known as a Big Slappy.
obj.item.weaponcrafting.giant_wrench.name: Big Slappy parts kit

obj.item.weaponcrafting.gunkit.desc: It's an empty gun parts container! Why do you have this?
obj.item.weaponcrafting.gunkit.name: generic gun parts kit

obj.item.weaponcrafting.gunkit.beam_rifl.desc: What fevered minds wrought this terrible construction kit? To create a frame to harness the strange energies that flow through the Spinward Sector towards such horrible acts of violence?
obj.item.weaponcrafting.gunkit.beam_rifl.name: Event Horizon anti-existential beam rifle part kit (DOOMSDAY DEVICE, DO NOT CONSTRUCT)

obj.item.weaponcrafting.gunkit.ebow.desc: Highly illegal weapons refurbishment kit that allows you to turn the standard proto-kinetic accelerator into a near-duplicate energy crossbow. Almost like the real thing!
obj.item.weaponcrafting.gunkit.ebow.name: energy crossbow part kit (less lethal)

obj.item.weaponcrafting.gunkit.hellgun.desc: Take a perfectly functioning laser gun. Butcher the inside of the gun so it runs hot and mean. You now have a hellfire laser. You monster.
obj.item.weaponcrafting.gunkit.hellgun.name: hellfire laser gun degradation kit (warcrime lethal)

obj.item.weaponcrafting.gunkit.ion.desc: A suitcase containing the necessary gun parts to transform a standard laser gun into a ion carbine. Perfect against lockers you don't have access to.
obj.item.weaponcrafting.gunkit.ion.name: ion carbine parts kit (nonlethal/highly destructive/very lethal (silicons))

obj.item.weaponcrafting.gunkit.nuclear.desc: A suitcase containing the necessary gun parts to transform a standard energy gun into an advanced energy gun.
obj.item.weaponcrafting.gunkit.nuclear.name: advanced energy gun parts kit (lethal/nonlethal)

obj.item.weaponcrafting.gunkit.photon.desc: A suitcase containing the necessary gun parts to construct a photon cannon around a stabilized flux anomaly. Harness the power of the sun, in the palms of your hands.
obj.item.weaponcrafting.gunkit.photon.name: photon cannon parts kit (nonlethal)

obj.item.weaponcrafting.gunkit.regal_con.desc: A suitcase containing the necessary gun parts to assemble a very powerful handgun. The case itself has a foreboding aura to it.
obj.item.weaponcrafting.gunkit.regal_con.name: unnamed weapon parts case (viciously lethal)

obj.item.weaponcrafting.gunkit.sks.desc: A suitcase containing the necessary gun parts to construct a Sakhno SKS semi-automatic rifle. These things are all over the frontier worlds.
obj.item.weaponcrafting.gunkit.sks.name: Sakhno SKS semi-automatic rifle parts kit (lethal)

obj.item.weaponcrafting.gunkit.temperatu.desc: A suitcase containing the necessary gun parts to transform a standard energy gun into a temperature gun. Fantastic at birthday parties and killing indigenous populations of lizardpeople.
obj.item.weaponcrafting.gunkit.temperatu.name: temperature gun parts kit (less lethal/very lethal (lizardpeople))

obj.item.weaponcrafting.gunkit.tesla.desc: A suitcase containing the necessary gun parts to construct a tesla cannon around a stabilized flux anomaly. Handle with care.
obj.item.weaponcrafting.gunkit.tesla.name: tesla cannon parts kit (lethal)

obj.item.weaponcrafting.gunkit.xray.desc: A suitcase containing the necessary gun parts to turn a laser gun into a x-ray laser gun. Do not point most parts directly towards face.
obj.item.weaponcrafting.gunkit.xray.name: x-ray laser gun parts kit (lethal)

obj.item.weaponcrafting.receiver.desc: A prototype modular receiver and trigger assembly for a firearm.
obj.item.weaponcrafting.receiver.name: modular receiver

obj.item.weaponcrafting.silkstring.desc: A long piece of string that looks like a cable coil.
obj.item.weaponcrafting.silkstring.name: string

obj.item.weaponcrafting.stock.desc: A classic rifle stock that doubles as a grip, roughly carved out of wood.
obj.item.weaponcrafting.stock.name: rifle stock

obj.item.weldingtool.desc: A standard edition welder provided by Nanotrasen.
obj.item.weldingtool.name: welding tool

obj.item.weldingtool.abductor.desc: An alien welding tool. Whatever fuel it uses, it never runs out.
obj.item.weldingtool.abductor.name: alien welding tool

obj.item.weldingtool.advanced.desc: A modern, experimental welding tool combined with an alien welding tool's generation methods, it never runs out of fuel and works almost as fast.
obj.item.weldingtool.advanced.name: advanced welding tool

obj.item.weldingtool.drone.desc: A welding tool built into your chassis.
obj.item.weldingtool.drone.name: built-in welding tool

obj.item.weldingtool.electric.desc: An experimental welding tool capable of welding functionality through the use of electricity. The flame seems almost cold.
obj.item.weldingtool.electric.name: electrical welding tool

obj.item.weldingtool.electric.arc_welder.desc: A specialized welding tool utilizing high powered arcs of electricity to weld things together. 		Compared to other electrically-powered welders, this model is slow and highly power inefficient, 		but it still gets the job done and chances are you printed this bad boy off for free.
obj.item.weldingtool.electric.arc_welder.name: arc welding tool

obj.item.weldingtool.empty.desc: A standard edition welder provided by Nanotrasen.
obj.item.weldingtool.empty.name: welding tool

obj.item.weldingtool.experimental.desc: An experimental welder capable of self-fuel generation and less harmful to the eyes.
obj.item.weldingtool.experimental.name: experimental welding tool

obj.item.weldingtool.experimental.brass.desc: A brass welder that seems to constantly refuel itself. It is faintly warm to the touch.
obj.item.weldingtool.experimental.brass.name: brass welding tool

obj.item.weldingtool.experimental.proton.desc: An experimental welder further enchanced by combining it with Proto Nitrate Crystal.
obj.item.weldingtool.experimental.proton.name: proto nitrate welding tool

obj.item.weldingtool.hugetank.desc: An upgraded welder based of the industrial welder.
obj.item.weldingtool.hugetank.name: upgraded industrial welding tool

obj.item.weldingtool.largetank.desc: A slightly larger welder with a larger tank.
obj.item.weldingtool.largetank.name: industrial welding tool

obj.item.weldingtool.largetank.cyborg.desc: An advanced welder designed to be used in robotic systems. Custom framework doubles the speed of welding.
obj.item.weldingtool.largetank.cyborg.name: integrated welding tool

obj.item.weldingtool.largetank.empty.desc: A slightly larger welder with a larger tank.
obj.item.weldingtool.largetank.empty.name: industrial welding tool

obj.item.weldingtool.makeshift.desc: A makeshift welder, flimsily constructed with miscellaneous parts.
obj.item.weldingtool.makeshift.name: makeshift welder

obj.item.weldingtool.mini.desc: A miniature welder used during emergencies.
obj.item.weldingtool.mini.name: emergency welding tool

obj.item.weldingtool.mini.empty.desc: A miniature welder used during emergencies.
obj.item.weldingtool.mini.empty.name: emergency welding tool

obj.item.weldingtool.repairbot.desc: A standard edition welder provided by Nanotrasen.
obj.item.weldingtool.repairbot.name: welding tool

obj.item.wendigo_blood.desc: A bottle of viscous red liquid... You're not actually going to drink this, are you?
obj.item.wendigo_blood.name: bottle of wendigo blood

obj.item.wendigo_skull.desc: A bloody skull torn from a murderous beast, the soulless eye sockets seem to constantly track your movement.
obj.item.wendigo_skull.name: wendigo skull

obj.item.wheelchair.desc: A collapsed wheelchair that can be carried around.
obj.item.wheelchair.name: wheelchair

obj.item.wheelchair.gold.desc: A collapsed, shiny wheelchair that can be carried around.
obj.item.wheelchair.gold.name: gold wheelchair

obj.item.wire_priest_staff.desc: A large wooden staff wrapped in wires... The wires seem to be moving and coiling around the staff actively. 	Due to its size, it can reach opponents at a longer range than most weapons.
obj.item.wire_priest_staff.name: wire priest's staff

obj.item.wirebrush.desc: A tool that is used to scrub the rust thoroughly off walls. Not for hair!
obj.item.wirebrush.name: wirebrush

obj.item.wirecutters.abductor.desc: Extremely sharp wirecutters, made out of a silvery-green metal.
obj.item.wirecutters.abductor.name: alien wirecutters

obj.item.wirecutters.advanced.desc: A set of reproduction alien wirecutters, they have a silver handle with an exceedingly sharp blade. There's a sticker attached declaring that it needs updating from 'the latest samples'.
obj.item.wirecutters.advanced.name: advanced wirecutters

obj.item.wirecutters.brass.desc: A pair of wirecutters made of brass. The handle feels faintly warm.
obj.item.wirecutters.brass.name: brass wirecutters

obj.item.wirecutters.caravan.desc: A prototype of a new wirecutter design, allegedly the red color scheme makes it go faster.
obj.item.wirecutters.caravan.name: experimental wirecutters

obj.item.wirecutters.cyborg.desc: Cuts wires with the power of ELECTRICITY. Faster than normal wirecutters.
obj.item.wirecutters.cyborg.name: powered wirecutters

obj.item.wirecutters.makeshift.desc: Makeshift wire cutters, flimsily constructed with miscellaneous parts.
obj.item.wirecutters.makeshift.name: makeshift wirecutters

obj.item.wireprod.desc: A metal rod with some wire attached to one of the ends, waiting for something sharp.
obj.item.wireprod.name: wireprod

obj.item.wisp_lantern.desc: This lantern gives off no light, but is home to a friendly wisp.
obj.item.wisp_lantern.name: spooky lantern

obj.item.wormhole_jaunter.desc:
A single use device harnessing outdated wormhole technology, Nanotrasen has since turned its eyes to bluespace for more accurate teleportation. The wormholes it creates are unpleasant to travel through, to say the least.
Thanks to modifications provided by the Free Golems, this jaunter can be worn on the belt to provide protection from chasms.
obj.item.wormhole_jaunter.name: wormhole jaunter

obj.item.wrench.desc: A wrench with common uses. Can be found in your hand.
obj.item.wrench.name: wrench

obj.item.wrench.abductor.desc: A polarized wrench. It causes anything placed between the jaws to turn.
obj.item.wrench.abductor.name: alien wrench

obj.item.wrench.advanced.desc: A wrench that uses the same magnetic technology that abductor tools use, but slightly more ineffeciently. It looks cobbled together.
obj.item.wrench.advanced.name: advanced wrench

obj.item.wrench.ashwalker.desc: A wrench with common uses. Can be found in your hand.
obj.item.wrench.ashwalker.name: primitive wrench

obj.item.wrench.bolter.desc: A wrench designed to grab into airlock's bolting system and raise it regardless of the airlock's power status.
obj.item.wrench.bolter.name: bolter wrench

obj.item.wrench.brass.desc: A brass wrench. It's faintly warm to the touch.
obj.item.wrench.brass.name: brass wrench

obj.item.wrench.caravan.desc: A prototype of a new wrench design, allegedly the red color scheme makes it go faster.
obj.item.wrench.caravan.name: experimental wrench

obj.item.wrench.combat.desc: It's like a normal wrench but edgier. Can be found on the battlefield.
obj.item.wrench.combat.name: combat wrench

obj.item.wrench.cyborg.desc: An advanced robotic wrench, powered by internal hydraulics. Twice as fast as the handheld version.
obj.item.wrench.cyborg.name: hydraulic wrench

obj.item.wrench.drone.desc: A wrench built into your chassis.
obj.item.wrench.drone.name: built-in wrench

obj.item.wrench.makeshift.desc: A makeshift wrench, flimsily constructed with miscellaneous parts.
obj.item.wrench.makeshift.name: makeshift wrench

obj.item.wrench.medical.desc: A medical wrench with common(medical?) uses. Can be found in your hand.
obj.item.wrench.medical.name: medical wrench

obj.item.xenoarch.broken_item.desc: An item that has been damaged, destroyed for quite some time. It is possible to recover it.
obj.item.xenoarch.broken_item.name: broken item

obj.item.xenoarch.broken_item.alien.desc: An item that has been damaged, destroyed for quite some time. It is possible to recover it.
obj.item.xenoarch.broken_item.alien.name: broken unknown object

obj.item.xenoarch.broken_item.animal.desc: An animal that is long past its prime. It is possible to recover it. Can be swabbed to recover its original animal's remnant DNA.
